Somali: Tababarka laba-geesoodka ah hadda waa qasab: Dhamaan ardayda TVET waa inay shaqeeyaan inta ay bartaan.

English: EACC builds local watchdog groups to fight bribery in counties.

Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenenerete oboikeranu na gotanga obokurumi (EACC) nkorosia kere nkere nabatuki baye gokemanyia na korwania obokengeka na koria amaaki ase chokaonti.
Dholuo: EACC loso grube mag jorit e alwora mondo oked gi mibadhi e counties.
Somali: EACC waxay dhisataa kooxo ilaalin ah oo maxalliga ah si ay ula dagaallamaan laaluushka degmooyinka.

English: EACC campaigns to encourage anonymous reporting of corruption cases.
Kiswahili: EACC inafanya kampeni za kuhamasisha kuripoti visa vya ufisadi bila majina.

Somali: EACC waxay ololeyn ku sameyneysaa inay dhiirrigeliso warbixinta aan la aqoon ee kiisaska musuqmaasuqa.

Kiswahili: EACC huunda vilabu vya shule ili kukuza maadili ya kupambana na ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenenerete oboikeranu na gotanga obokurumi (EACC) nkorosia bare ebiombe chisukuru erio gokong'ia  values.
Dholuo: EACC loso club mag skunde mondo gijiw timbe mag kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: EACC waxay samaysaa kooxaha dugsiyada si ay u kobciyaan qiimaha la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa.

Kiswahili: EACC inaanzisha programu ya simu kwa ajili ya kurahisisha kuripoti ufisadi.

Somali: EACC waxay soo bandhigtay barnaamij mobile ah oo si fudud loogu soo sheegayo musuqmaasuqa.

English: EACC introduces multiple reporting channels for whistleblowers.

Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenenerete oboikeranu na gotanga obokurumi (EACC) kiarure omoroberio ase abaaki enangi gokemanyia amang'ana.

English: Learners sitting for Kenya Primary School Education Assessment (KPSEA) and Kenya Junior School Education Assessment (KJSEA) will now be required to shade their answers using Optical Mark Recognition (OMR) sheets
Kiswahili: Wanafunzi wanaofanya Tathmini ya Elimu ya Shule ya Msingi ya Kenya (KPSEA) na Tathmini ya Elimu ya Shule ya Wadogo ya Kenya (KJSEA) sasa watahitajika kuficha majibu yao kwa kutumia karatasi za Utambuzi wa Alama za Optical (OMR).
Ekegusii: Abana baria bagochia gokora amatemwa na korengwa echikuru chiboroso (KPSEA) nabana bechisekenderi chia inse (KJSEA) bono mbagaberigwe kongororia amachibu yamatemwa abo ase risakara riria riamatemwa.
Dholuo: Jopuonjre mobiro e penj mar Kenya Primary School Education Assessment (KPSEA) kod Kenya Junior School Education Assessment (KJSEA) koro biro dwaro ni gipiem dwoko margi ka gitiyo gi Optical Mark Recognition (OMR) sheets
Somali: Ardayda ku fadhiya Qiimaynta Waxbarashada Dugsiyada hoose ee Kenya (KPSEA) iyo Qiimaynta Waxbarashada Dugsiyada hoose ee Kenya (KJSEA) ayaa hadda looga baahan doonaa inay jawaabooda hoos u dhigaan iyagoo adeegsanaya waraaqaha Aqoonsiga Calaamadaha Optical Mark (OMR)

English: Listeners win airtime by answering civic questions
Kiswahili: Wasikilizaji hushinda muda wa matangazo kwa kujibu maswali ya kiraia
Ekegusii: Abategereri eredio baranyare koiraneria amaborio igoro yobogesaku mbaegwe ribaga goaka chisimi chiabo bosa koiraneria amaborio.
Dholuo: Jowinjo yudo thuolo mar chiwo dwoko e wi penjo ma ji penjo
Somali: Dhageystayaashu waxay ku guuleystaan waqtiga baahinta iyagoo ka jawaabaya su'aalaha bulshada

English: Maintain hygiene standards in schools 2024.
Kiswahili: Dumisha viwango vya usafi shuleni 2024.
Ekegusii: Ikerania ebirengo biobochenu ase chisukuru 2024.
Dholuo: Rit chike mag ler e skunde 2024.
Somali: Hagaajinta heerarka nadaafadda dugsiyada 2024.

English: Maintain playgrounds safely 2021.
Kiswahili: Tunza viwanja vya michezo kwa usalama mwaka 2021.
Ekegusii: Ikerania amchiko ase chiogosori 2021.
Dholuo: Rit maber kuonde tugo e higa mar 2021.
Somali: Hagaajinta goobaha ciyaaraha si ammaan ah 2021.

English: Maintain school infrastructure 2023.
Kiswahili: Kudumisha miundombinu ya shule 2023.
Ekegusii: Renda oboikeranu bwamaagacho yesukuru 2023.
Dholuo: Rit maber chenro mag skunde 2023.
Somali: In la ilaaliyo kaabayaasha dugsiga sanadka 2023.

English: Make schools accessible! Install ramps for disabled students.
Kiswahili: Fanya shule zipatikane! Weka njia panda kwa wanafunzi wenye ulemavu.
Ekegusii: Rora ng'a abana bonsi (abaremaru gose bare nokongu ao ao) mbare neribaga gosoa esukuru! Karwe ebinto biria bigonya bari batari konyara gotenenena na kogenda.
Dholuo: Timuru mondo ji duto oyud thuolo mar dhi e skul! Ket kuonde ma nyithindo nyalo idhogo.
Somali: Iskuulada ka dhig mid la heli karo, ardayda naafada ah u rakib.

English: Modernize learning! Install smart boards in classrooms.
Kiswahili: Boresha ujifunzaji! Sakinisha mbao mahiri darasani.
Ekegusii: Kora ogosoma okoyia! Ibeka ebinto biria biokoererania chinkwana gati yabarimu nabana ase eborore biebirasi ime.
Dholuo: Timuru dongruok e yore mag puonjruok! Ket board e klas.
Somali: Waxbarashada casriyeeyso! Ku rakib looxyo casri ah fasallada.

English: Monitor air quality in schools 2024.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia ubora wa hewa shuleni 2024.
Ekegusii: Bwatia komanya nga embeo nengiya esuchuku 2024.
Dholuo: Non chal mar muya e skunde 2024.
Somali: Kormeerka tayada hawada ee dugsiyada 2024.

English: Monitor cyberbullying 2023.

Dholuo: Non kaka ji tiyo gi intanet e higa mar 2023.
Somali: La soco dhibaatada internetka sanadka 2023.

English: Monitor dropout rates quarterly 2020.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia viwango vya kuacha shule kila robo mwaka 2020.
Ekegusii: Bwatia komanya ekerengo abana bakogwa amatemwa nyuma yemetienyi 3 omwaka 2020.
Dholuo: Luwo kwan mar joma weyo skul e higa mar 2020.
Somali: Kormeerka heerarka ka bixitaanka fasaxa saddexda bilood ee 2020.

English: Monitor exam integrity 2023.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia uadilifu wa mtihani 2023.
Ekegusii: Bwatia komanya oboikeranu bwatemwa omwaka 2023.
Dholuo: Non kaka penj biro dhi maber e higa 2023.
Somali: La soco imtixaanka daacadnimada 2023.

English: Monitor learning outcomes 2025.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia matokeo ya kujifunza 2025.
Ekegusii: Bwatia komanya amatokeo yamasomo abana 2025.
Dholuo: Luwo gik ma ji puonjore e higa 2025.
Somali: Raadinta natiijooyinka barashada 2025.

English: Monitor nutrition in school feeding programs 2020.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia lishe katika programu za kulisha shuleni 2020.
Ekegusii: Bwatia komanya gose omoroberio bwendagera abana bakoria esukuru ng'a nebwenerate 2020.
Dholuo: Luwo wach chiemo e chenro mag pidho nyithindo e skul e higa mar 2020.

English: Monitor nutrition programs 2024.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia programu za lishe 2024.
Ekegusii: Bwatia komanya gose emeroberio bwendagera nobwenerete omwaka 2024.
Dholuo: Non program mag chiemo e higa 2024.
Somali: La soco barnaamijyada nafaqada ee 2024.

English: Monitor student attendance post-COVID 2021.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia mahudhurio ya wanafunzi baada ya COVID 2021.
Ekegusii: Bwatia komanya buna abana bagocha esukuru nyuma yendwari yenya'maa - KORONA omwaka 2021.
Dholuo: Luwre kod kwan mar jopuonjre bang' COVID 2021.
Somali: Kormeerka ka qaybgalka ardayda ka dib COVID 2021.

English: Monitor teacher absenteeism 2023.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia utoro wa walimu 2023.
Ekegusii: Bwatia komanya buna abarimu batari goika esukuru gosomia 2023.
Dholuo: Luwo kwan mar jopuonj ma ok yudre e skul 2023.
Somali: Kormeerka maqnaanshaha macalimiinta sanadka 2023.

English: More teachers! Support hiring in underserved regions.
Kiswahili: Walimu zaidi! Saidia kuajiri katika maeneo ambayo hayana huduma za kutosha.
Ekegusii: Abarimu abange! Sira omoroberio bwogomboa abarimi chingongo chiria chitari goikereka kebwororo gose konyora obokoreri bweserikari buna ebwenerete.
Dholuo: Jopuonj mang'eny! Konyuru joma dwaro tich e gwenge ma ji ok yudie tich.

English: Motivate teachers! Offer bonuses for rural school postings.
Kiswahili: Wahamasishe walimu! Toa bonasi kwa nafasi za shule za vijijini.

Dholuo: Jiw jopuonj! Chiw mich mag pesa ne joma dhi e skunde man kuonde maboyo.
Somali: Dhiirigelinta macalimiinta! Bixi gunno shaqooyinka dugsiyada miyiga.

English: Multi-agency team monitors school safety during KCSE exams.
Kiswahili: Timu ya mashirika mengi hufuatilia usalama wa shule wakati wa mitihani ya KCSE.

Dholuo: Grube ma nigi tije mopogore opogore nono chal mar kuonde somo e kinde penj mag KCSE.
Somali: Koox ka kooban hay'ado badan ayaa kormeera ammaanka dugsiga inta lagu jiro imtixaannada KCSE.

English: New Competency-Based Curriculum for TVET launched ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Å“ download free from KICD.

English: No arson in schools! Keep flammables away from dorms.
Kiswahili: Hakuna uchomaji moto shuleni! Weka vifaa vya kuwaka moto mbali na mabweni.
Ekegusii: Sukuru tichisambwa! Beka omorero are korwa nechinyomba chiokorara.

Kiswahili: Hakuna mabadiliko kwenye ratiba ya KCSE 2025 baada ya Oktoba 1.

Somali: Ma jiro wax isbeddel ah oo ku yimaada jadwalka KCSE 2025 ka dib 1da Oktoobar.

English: No child left behind: 100% transition from primary to secondary enforced nationwide.
Kiswahili: Hakuna mtoto aliyeachwa nyuma: Mpito wa 100% kutoka shule ya msingi hadi shule ya upili unatekelezwa kote nchini.

Somali: Ilmo la'aan: 100% gudbinta dugsiga koowaad ilaa dugsiga koowaad waxaa lagu qasbay dalka oo dhan.

English: No child to repeat Grade 6 ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Å“ automatic promotion to JSS enforced nationwide!
Kiswahili: Hakuna mtoto wa kurudia Daraja la 6 ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Å“ kupandishwa cheo kiotomatiki kwa JSS kunatekelezwa kote nchini!
Ekegusii: mwana onde tari orairorere egeredi gia 6 korende gosoa ebirasi biechisekenderi chia inse (JSS) yabebikwe chinguri Kenya engima!

English: No delay in school reopening 2025 due to floods.
Kiswahili: Hakuna kuchelewa kwa kufungua shule mwaka 2025 kutokana na mafuriko.

Dholuo: Onge deko e chako skul kendo e higa mar 2025 nikech ataro.
Somali: Dib-u-furitaanka dugsiyada 2025 ma dib u dhicin sababtoo ah fatahaadaha.

Kiswahili: Hakuna kiingilio bila sare na kitambulisho kuanzia Januari 6, 2025.
Ekegusii: Gosoa tikoiyo onye tobwati eyunifomu nekebande korwa chitariki 6 chiomotienyi 1, omwaka 2025.

Somali: Ma jiro wax soo galo ah oo aan lahayn uniform iyo aqoonsi laga bilaabo 6-da Janaayo 2025.

English: No fees for public primary ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Å“ report any demand to 0800721490 immediately!
Kiswahili: Hakuna ada kwa ajili ya shule za msingi za umma toa taarifa kuhusu ombi lolote kwa 0800721490 mara moja!

English: No learner to be locked out for lack of uniform ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Å“ principals warned!

Ekegusii: Mwana onde tari oratangwe gosoa sukuru ekiagera atabwati eyunifomu, barimu abanene baonyirwe
Dholuo: Onge japuonjre mabiro bedo oko nikech onge japuonj maduong' morwakore gi yunifom!
Somali: Ma jiro arday lagu xiro dhar la'aantiis, macallimiinta ayaa ka digay!

English: No learner to miss school due to fees ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Å“ call 0800721490 if blocked at the gate.
Kiswahili: Mwanafunzi asikose shule kutokana na ada piga 0800721490 ikiwa amezuiwa langoni.
Ekegusii: Mwana onde tari oraserigwe korwa esukuru ekiagera ataraakana chibesa chiesukuru, eka esimi eye kegima 0800721490 onye gwasiekierwe gotasoa.

Somali: Ma jiro arday ka maqnaan doona dugsiga lacag la'aan ah. Wac 0800721490 haddii lagu xannibo iridda.

English: No learner to walk more than 5km to school ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Å“ free buses deployed in rural areas!
Kiswahili: Hakuna mwanafunzi anayeruhusiwa kutembea zaidi ya kilomita 5 kwenda shuleni, mabasi ya bure yanapelekwa vijijini!

Dholuo: Onge japuonjre mabiro wuotho mokalo kilomita abich mondo odhi e skul gi bas ma onge chudo moketi e gwenge maboyo!
Somali: Ardaygu ma socdo wax ka badan 5km ilaa dugsiga basaska lacag la'aanta ah ee loo adeegsado meelaha miyiga ah!

English: No violence! Report student issues to school management.
Kiswahili: Hakuna vurugu! Ripoti masuala ya wanafunzi kwa usimamizi wa shule.
Ekegusii: No violence! Report student issues to school management.
Dholuo: Onge timbe gero! Lend ne jotelo mag skundno kuom weche ma chando jopuonjre.
Somali: Dhibaatooyinka ardayda u sheeg maamulka dugsiga.

English: No visits to secondary schools during third term as per circular.
Kiswahili: Hakuna ziara katika shule za upili wakati wa muhula wa tatu kulingana na waraka.
Ekegusii: No visits to secondary schools during third term as per circular.
Dholuo: Onge limbe e skunde sekondar e kinde mar adek kaka oler e barua.
Somali: Ma jiro booqasho dugsiyada dhexe muddada saddexaad sida ku cad wareegga.

Kiswahili: Karatasi za majibu za OMR za KPSEA 2025 sasa zinatumia miduara badala ya mistari.
Ekegusii: Etekinorochi yokomaki amatemwa ase okororera ritemwa rimakirie (OMR) ase okorenga amatemwa yeschisukuru chioboroso  (KPSEA) 2025 bono ata enoti na tari buna yarenge yokongororia.

English: On May 5 2015 KUCCPS opened its portal for 2014 KCSE candidates to apply for TVET diploma and certificate courses with a deadline of June 15 2015.
Kiswahili: Mnamo Mei 5, 2015, KUCCPS ilifungua lango lake kwa watahiniwa wa KCSE wa 2014 kuomba kozi za stashahada na cheti cha TVET huku tarehe ya mwisho ikiwa Juni 15, 2015.
Ekegusii: Chitariki isano omotienyi 5 omwaka 2015 ekeombe keria getenenerete kegochora abana gochia chiyunifasiti nechikoregi (KUCCPS) nkiaigorete eintaneti yaye ase abana besekenderi  baria bokorete amatemwa a KCSE omwaka 2014 batome ogosaba kwabo ase chikosi chiobundi, nechisemi chiokwegendereria (TVET) ase ekosi yechipuloma naboigo yechisatifiketi nyuma yechitariki 15 chiomotieni 6 omwaka 2015.
Dholuo: Chieng' Mei 5 2015 KUCCPS noyawo portal mare ne joma dwaro KCSE e higa mar 2014 mondo gichiw kwayo mar dhi e tiegruok mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok kod lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok gi lony e yore mag tiegruok e yore mag tiegruok kod lony e weche mag tiegruok gi lony e dwe mar Jun 15 2015.
Somali: Bishii Maajo 5, 2015 KUCCPS waxay furtay boggeeda musharixiinta 2014 ee KCSE si ay u dalbadaan koorsooyinka shahaadada iyo shahaadada TVET iyada oo waqtigeedu yahay Juun 15, 2015.

English: Open doors! Integrate refugee students into national schools.
Kiswahili: Milango wazi! Wajumuishe wanafunzi wakimbizi katika shule za kitaifa.
Ekegusii: Igora emerangu! Anchera abana ba baria batamire chisegi korwa sobo ase chisuluru chinene .
Dholuo: Yawuru dhoudi! Riwo jopuonjre ma oringo thuchegi lwedo e skunde mag jopinyno.
Somali: albaabada u fur, ardayda qaxootiga ah iskuulada qaranka.

English: Open schools! Enroll refugee children in education.
Kiswahili: Fungua shule! Waandikishe watoto wakimbizi katika elimu.
Ekegusii: Igora chisukuru!  Anchera abana ba baria batamire chisegi korwa sobo ase chisemi.
Dholuo: Nyis ji ni isedonjo e skul! Kony nyithindo moringo thuchegi mondo oyud somo.
Somali: Dugsiyada fur, caruurta qaxootiga ku qor waxbarashada.

English: Organize career guidance days 2021.
Kiswahili: Panga siku za mwongozo wa kazi 2021.
Ekegusii: Kabe nomoroberio bwerituko riokorwa ogosemia igoro yebinto abana bagochia gosomera 2021.
Dholuo: Chenro mar bedo gi odiechienge mag chiwo paro e wi tije 2021.
Somali: Abaabulka maalmaha tababbarka xirfadaha 2021.

Dholuo: Chenro mar goyo mbaka e kind ji e higa 2020.
Somali: Ururinta kooxaha doodda 2020.

English: Organize exchange programs 2020.
Kiswahili: Panga programu za kubadilishana 2020.
Ekegusii: Roberia koira abana chisukuru chinde koumerana na korora buna bagosoma 2020.
Dholuo: Loso chenro mag loko ji e higa mar 2020.
Somali: Abaabulka barnaamijyada isweydaarsiga 2020.

English: Organize science fairs annually 2022.
Kiswahili: Kuandaa maonyesho ya sayansi kila mwaka 2022.

Dholuo: Jopuonjre ma nigi dwaro makende: Kwa kony mar Ksh 50,000 higa ka higa kapok Desemba 15.
Somali: Ardayda u baahan baahiyo gaar ah: Ka codso deeqda sanadlaha ah ee Ksh 50,000 ka hor 15-ka Diseembar.

Kiswahili: HOTUBA YA MHESHIMIWA MHESHIMIWA UHURU KENYATTA, C.G.H., RAIS WA JAMHURI YA KENYA NA Amiri Jeshi Mkuu wa Majeshi ya Ulinzi Wakati wa Hotuba ya Kitaifa ya Siku ya Mashujaa mnamo, 20 Oktoba, 2021 DISTIN...
Ekegusii: EKWANA  YOMORAISI  YOMOSIKE: UHURU KENYATTA, C.G.H., EPURESIDENTI YENSE YA KENYA NAENDE OMONENE BWAMACHESI EKERO KIAERITUKO RIA MASHUJAA GOKWANERA ENSE CHITARIKI, 20 OMOTIENYI 10 OMWAKA, 2021 ABASIKE...
Dholuo: Wuowi matin, ma ne ok ong'eyo wuoyo maber, ne odonjo e obadhono. UHURU KENYATTA, C.G.H., PRESIDENTI MAR REPUBLIC OF KENYA KAN JATELO MACHIEL MAR KIT NGIMA MAR KENYA E WECHE MAG CHIENG' MAR MASHUJAA E DWE MAR OCTOBER, tarik 20, higa mar 2021 E WECHE MAG CHIENG' MACHON...
Somali: Hadal uu soo jeediyay Mudane Xasan Sheekh Xasan Sheekh, Madaxweynaha Jamhuuriyadda Kenya iyo Taliyaha Guud ee Ciidamada Difaaca inta lagu gudajiray maalinta MashujaA.

English: Start your business! Join TVET entrepreneurship courses.
Kiswahili: Anza biashara yako! Jiunge na kozi za ujasiriamali za TVET.
Ekegusii: Chaka ebiasara biao! Soa ekorechi yobobundi nechisemi chiokwegendereria  (TVET) ase ekosi yochusi.
Dholuo: Chako tijeni iwuon! Donj e tiegruok mar TVET e weche mag ohala.
Somali: Bilow ganacsigaaga! Ku biir koorsooyinka ganacsiga ee TVET.

English: Stay alert! Avoid unsafe routes to school in banditry zones.
Kiswahili: Kuwa macho! Epuka njia zisizo salama za kwenda shuleni katika maeneo ya majambazi.
Ekegusii: Kabe maiso! Tiga goetera chinchera chitabwati usalama gochia esukuru ase chingongo chiria chichoire nobokebago.
Dholuo: Beduru motang'! Tang' gi yore maok ler mag dhi e skul e gwenge mopong' gi jo mahundu.
Somali: Ka fogow waddooyinka aan ammaan ahayn ee dugsiga ku yaal meelaha ay ka socdaan bandhigyada.

English: Stay alert! Schools, monitor for abduction risks.
Kiswahili: Kuwa macho! Shule, fuatilia hatari za utekaji nyara.
Ekegusii: Kabe maiso Chisukuru, Bwatia komanya bun abana babaise koibwa korwa esukuru.
Dholuo: Beduru motang'! Skunde, nonuru kaka ginyalo mako ji.
Somali: Dugsiyada, kormeerka khatarta afduubka.

English: Stay cautious! Avoid strangers and report risks to teachers.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu! Epuka wageni na uripoti hatari kwa walimu.
Ekegusii: Renda kegima! Kabe are nabanto otamanyeti na karwe amangana gochia ararete bokongu bonde bwonsi gochia ase abarimu.
Dholuo: Bed motang'! Geng' joma ok ing'eyo kendo nyis jopuonj kapo ni nitie gimoro manyalo hinyi.
Somali: Iska taxaddar, dadka aadan aqoon ka fogaada oo u sheeg macalimiinta khatarta.

English: Stay clean! Use school sanitation facilities to prevent cholera.
Kiswahili: Endelea kuwa safi! Tumia vifaa vya usafi wa shule ili kuzuia kipindupindu.
Ekegusii: Kabe omoterere! Tumia chinyomba chiobosafi chiesukuru gotanga endwari yogosaa.
Dholuo: Beduru maler! Ti maber gi kuonde ma ler yudore e skul mondo kik iyud kute mag ayaki.
Somali: Isticmaal xarumaha nadaafadda dugsiga si looga hortago cudurka kolera.

English: Stay healthy! Ensure schools have clean water and sanitation.
Kiswahili: Endelea kuwa na afya njema! Hakikisha shule zina maji safi na usafi wa mazingira.
Ekegusii: Kabe na afia engiya! Rora ng'a chisukuru nchibwate amache amaya nechinyomba chiobochenu.
Dholuo: Bed gi ngima maber! Neno ni skunde nigi pi maler kod kuonde ma ler mar dhi e ler.
Somali: Iska ilaali in dugsiyada ay helaan biyo nadiif ah iyo biyo nadiifinta.

English: Stay in school! Avoid protest zones for safety.
Kiswahili: Endelea shuleni! Epuka maeneo ya maandamano kwa ajili ya usalama.
Ekegusii: Bera esukuru! Kabe are korwa ase baria bakoreta eburaburu ase esukuru ase okwerenda.
Dholuo: Bed e skul! Kik udhi kuonde ma ji ng'urie nikech mano nyalo kelonu hinyruok.
Somali: Iskuulka joog, ka fogaada meelaha banaanbaxyada si aad u badbaado.

English: Stay nourished! Enroll in schools with feeding programs.
Kiswahili: Endelea kupata lishe bora! Jiandikishe katika shule zenye programu za kulisha.
Ekegusii: Ragera buya! Soa chisukuru chibwate omoroberio bwokorageria.
Dholuo: Chiemuru mamit! Dhi e skunde ma nigi chenro mar pidho nyithindo.
Somali: Ku qor dugsiyada barnaamijyada quudinta.

English: Stay safe during protests! Avoid demonstration zones near schools.
Kiswahili: Jilinde wakati wa maandamano! Epuka maeneo ya maandamano karibu na shule.
Ekegusii: Erende chingaki chieburaburu ase esukuru. Kabe are korwa aria ase chiburaburu chigoansera esukuru.
Dholuo: Beduru motang' e kinde mag ng'anyo! Kik idhi kuonde ma ji ng'enyie machiegni gi skunde.
Somali: Iska ilaali inta lagu jiro mudaaharaadyada! Ka fogow meelaha banaanbaxyada ee ku dhow dugsiyada.

English: Stay safe online! Teach students to avoid cyber threats.
Kiswahili: Kaa salama mtandaoni! Wafundishe wanafunzi kuepuka vitisho vya mtandaoni.
Ekegusii: Kabe otari namochando ase eintaneti! Somia abana bande gwetanga kogosereria ase eintaneti.
Dholuo: Bed motang' sama in e Intanet! Puonj nyithindo kaka ginyalo geng'o gik ma nyalo kelonegi hinyruok e intanet.
Somali: Isku day ardayda inay ka fogaadaan hanjabaadaha internetka.

English: Stay safe! Follow evacuation plans during chemical spills.
Kiswahili: Kaa salama! Fuata mipango ya uokoaji wakati wa kumwagika kwa kemikali.
Ekegusii: Erende! Bwatia emeroberio yokwebacha korwa amache achafuirwe nechikemiko gose amasigira achfuirwe nechikemiko.
Dholuo: Beduru motang'! Luw chenro moketi mar ringo ji e kinde ma kembe moko oleny.
Somali: Iska ilaali qorshaha gurmadka inta lagu jiro daadka kiimikada.

English: Stay safe! Know your schoolÃ¢â‚¬TMs flood safety zones.
Kiswahili: Kaa salama! Jua maeneo ya usalama wa mafuriko ya shule yako.
Ekegusii: Menya buya! Manya esukuru yao aase aimogete igoro.
Dholuo: Beduru motang'! Ng'e ni ATM mag sikul ma intie ok nyal geng'o pi.
Somali: Iska ilaali, ogow goobaha dugsigaaga lagu badbaadiyo fatahaadaha.

English: Stay safe! Report strangers near schools to teachers or police.
Kiswahili: Kaa salama! Waripoti wageni walio karibu na shule kwa walimu au polisi.
Ekegusii: Menya buya! Manyia igoro yomonto omogeni ase omwarimu gose omosikari.
Dholuo: Beduru motang'! Nyis jopuonj kata polise kapo ni nitie joma ok ing'eyo machiegni gi skul.
Somali: Iska ilaali, dadka aan aqoonin oo ku dhow dugsiyada u sheeg macalimiinta ama booliska.

English: Stay safe! Schools, teach students about trafficking risks.
Kiswahili: Kaeni salama! Shule, wafundisheni wanafunzi kuhusu hatari za usafirishaji haramu wa binadamu.
Ekegusii: Menya buya! Chisukuru, somia abana igoro yomochando  bwokoibwa kwa abana.
Dholuo: Beduru motang'! Skunde onego opuonj nyithindgi wach ohand dhano.
Somali: Iskuullada, ardayda baro khatarta ganacsiga.

English: Stay safe, students! Avoid protest areas near schools.
Kiswahili: Kaeni salama, wanafunzi! Epuka maeneo ya maandamano karibu na shule.
Ekegusii: Menya buya, abana! Kabe are korwa ase eburaburu ere ange nechisukuru.
Dholuo: Beduru motang', un jopuonjre! Kik idhi kuonde ma ji ng'urie machiegni gi skunde.
Somali: Iska ilaali ardayda, ka fogow meelaha banaanbaxa ee ku dhow dugsiyada.

English: Stay vigilant! Follow school safety protocols during terror alerts.
Kiswahili: Kuwa macho! Fuata itifaki za usalama shuleni wakati wa tahadhari za ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Kabe maiso! Bwatia emeroberio yesukuru ekero mwakureirwe.
Dholuo: Beduru motang'! Luw chike mag ritruok e skul e kinde ma nitie gik ma nyalo kelo hinyruok.
Somali: Ka taxaddar nidaamyada badbaadada dugsiga inta lagu jiro digniinta argagixisada.

English: Stay vigilant! Report banditry threats near schools to police.
Kiswahili: Kuwa macho! Ripoti vitisho vya ujambazi karibu na shule kwa polisi.
Ekegusii: Kabe maiso! Manyia igor yobokebago borabe ange nesukuru ase abasikari.
Dholuo: Beduru motang'! Lando ne polise ka nitie jokuoge machiegni gi skunde.
Somali: Ka warbixi hanjabaadaha tuugada ee ku dhow dugsiyada booliiska.

English: Stop GBV! Report gender-based violence in schools to 116.
Kiswahili: Acha Ukatili wa Kijinsia! Ripoti ukatili wa kijinsia shuleni kwa 116.
Ekegusii: Tanga ogokorera bobe abande (GBV)! Manyia ogokorera bobe abande ase esukuru goetera 116.
Dholuo: Weuru timbe mag gero! Lando timbe gero mag nindruok e skunde ne 116.
Somali: Jooji GBV! Warbixi rabshadaha jinsiga ku salaysan ee iskuulada 116.

English: Stop GBV! Report school violence to authorities or call 116.
Kiswahili: Acha Unyanyasaji wa Kijinsia! Ripoti vurugu shuleni kwa mamlaka au piga simu 116.
Ekegusii: Tenenia ogokorera bobe abande (GBV)! Manyia ogokorera bobe abande ase esukuru ase abateteneri gose rangeria 116.
Dholuo: Weuru timbe mag gero! Lando wach timbe gero e skul ne joma nigi teko mar loch, kata luongo namba 116.
Somali: Jooji rabshadaha iskuulka ama wac 116.

Kiswahili: Wanafunzi waliopata alama ya C- na chini katika mtihani wao wa Cheti cha Elimu ya Sekondari cha Kenya (KCSE) cha 2023 wanaweza kufuata kozi za diploma na cheti katika uwanja wa matibabu. Kozi hizo zinatolewa katika Kenya Me...
Ekegusii: Abana baria banyorete egeredi gia C- na inse ase amatemwa omwaka 2023 esekenderi (KCSE) nabo barasomere chikoso chiesatificate ase ase obobwenia ao ao. Chikosi echi nigo chikorwegwa ase chikorechi Chiobonyagitari...
Dholuo: Jopuonjre ma ne oyudo alama mar C- kata matin ne mano e penj margi mar Kenya Certificate of Secondary Education (KCSE) mar 2023 nyalo luwo somo mar diploma kod certificate e weche thieth. Puonjruokgi itimo e Kenya Me...
Somali: Ardayda ku guuleystay dhibcaha C- iyo kuwa ka hooseeya imtixaanka 2023 Kenya Certificate of Secondary Education (KCSE) waxay raaci karaan koorsooyinka shahaadooyinka iyo shahaadooyinka dhakhtarka. Koorsooyinka waxaa lagu bixiyaa Kenya Me...

English: Students who scored D+ and D (plain) in Kenya Certificate of Secondary Education (KCSE) will be eligible to pursue a certificate course of their choice in 2024. The certificates are offered in various...
Kiswahili: Wanafunzi waliopata alama za D+ na D (wazi) katika Cheti cha Elimu ya Sekondari ya Kenya (KCSE) watastahiki kufuata kozi ya cheti wanayoipenda mwaka wa 2024. Vyeti hivyo hutolewa katika aina mbalimbali...
Ekegusii: Ababana baria banyorete egeredi gia D+ na D (bosa) ase amatemwa abo eskenderi (KCSE) mbare neribaga riogosoa chikosi ao ao chiogwancha kwabo omwaka 2024. Chikosi echi nigo chikorwegwa ase chikorechi chinke ao ao...
Dholuo: Jopuonjre mane oyudo alama mag D+ kod D (plain) e Kenya Certificate of Secondary Education (KCSE) biro bedo gi ratiro mar luwo somo mar certificate ma giyiero e higa mar 2024. Satifiketgo ichiwo e yore mopogore opogore...
Somali: Ardayda ku guuleystay dhibcaha D + iyo D (plain) ee Shahaadada Waxbarashada Dhexe ee Kenya (KCSE) waxay xaq u yeelan doonaan inay raacaan koorso shahaado ah oo ay doortaan sanadka 2024.

English: Study from home! Access online education platforms for rural students.
Kiswahili: Jifunze kutoka nyumbani! Pata majukwaa ya elimu mtandaoni kwa wanafunzi wa vijijini.
Ekegusii: Soma korwa inka! Nyora amasomo goetra eintaneti ase abana baria ba risabu.
Dholuo: Puonjri Muma ka in pacho! Yud thuolo mar somo e intanet ne jopuonjre ma odak e gwenge.
Somali: Waxbarashada guriga! Hel barnaamijyo waxbarasho oo internetka ah oo loogu talagalay ardayda reer miyiga ah.

English: Submit TPAD by June 30 to avoid delays.
Kiswahili: Tuma TPAD ifikapo Juni 30 ili kuepuka ucheleweshaji.
Ekegusii: Toma buna ogokora emeremo yao buna ogosomia buya gochia (TPAD)nyuma yechitariki 30 chiomotienyi 6 tonyoria emeroberio.
Dholuo: Chiw TPAD kapok tarik 30 Jun ochopo mondo kik iketh kinde.
Somali: Soo gudbi TPAD 30-ka Juun si looga fogaado dib u dhac.

English: Submit TPAD data by June 30 to avoid delays.
Kiswahili: Tuma data ya TPAD ifikapo Juni 30 ili kuepuka ucheleweshaji.
Ekegusii: Toma buna ogokora emeremo yao buna ogosomia buya (TPAD) nyuma yechitariki 30 chiomotienyi 6 gotanyorwa.
Dholuo: Chiw weche mag TPAD kapok tarik 30 Jun ochopo mondo kik bed gi deko.
Somali: Soo gudbi xogta TPAD 30-ka Juun si looga fogaado dib u dhac.

English: Submit TPAD data by June 30 to avoid payroll delays.
Kiswahili: Wasilisha data ya TPAD ifikapo Juni 30 ili kuepuka ucheleweshaji wa mishahara.
Ekegusii: Toma buna ogokora emeremo yao buna ogosomia buya (TPAD) nyuma yechitariki 30 chiomotienyi 6  gotanyoria ogochererigwa gwokobanga emeroberio yemesara.
Dholuo: Chiw weche mag TPAD kapok tarik 30 Jun ochopo mondo omi kik bed gi pek mar chulo jotich.
Somali: Soo gudbi xogta TPAD 30-ka Juun si looga fogaado dib u dhac mushaharka.

English: Summit on Institutional Clean Cooking.
Kiswahili: Mkutano kuhusu Upishi Safi wa Kitaasisi.
Ekegusii: Okoumerana okonene igoro  yogotumia egasi, esora gose esitima korosia endagera.
Dholuo: Chokruok Maduong' e wi tedo e yo maler.
Somali: Shirweynaha ku saabsan karinta nadiifka ah ee hay'adaha.

English: Support adult literacy programs 2025.
Kiswahili: Saidia programu za kusoma na kuandika za watu wazima 2025.
Ekegusii: Kinya emeroberio yechisemi chiabanto abanene omwaka 2025.
Dholuo: Kony program mag somo ne joma dongo 2025.
Somali: Taageer barnaamijyada akhriska dadka waaweyn ee 2025.

English: Support alumni networks 2025.
Kiswahili: Saidia mitandao ya wahitimu 2025.
Ekegusii: Segeta emeroberio yabana baria bakorete korwa esukuru omwaka 2025.
Dholuo: Konyuru joma osetieko tiegruok margi e higa mar 2025.
Somali: Taageero shabakadaha ardayda qalinjabisay 2025.

English: Support distance learning 2024.
Kiswahili: Saidia kujifunza kwa umbali 2024.
Ekegusii: Segeta amasomo goetera eintaneti omwaka 2024.
Dholuo: Konyuru ji opuonjre ka gin mabor e higa mar 2024.
Somali: Taageerada waxbarashada masaafada 2024.

English: Support early childhood development 2020.
Kiswahili: Kusaidia maendeleo ya utotoni 2020.
Ekegusii: Suira chisemi chioboroso chia'bana benasari omwaka 2020.
Dholuo: Konyuru nyithindo ma pod tindo mondo odong maber e higa mar 2020.
Somali: Taageero horumarinta caruurnimada hore 2020.

English: Support education! Communities, fund school fees.
Kiswahili: Saidia elimu! Jamii, fadhili ada za shule.
Ekegusii: Sira chisemi! Ebinyoro, konya korwa esukuru fisi.
Dholuo: Konyuru e weche mag somo! Kanyakla onego ochiw pesa ne chudo mag skul.
Somali: Taageero waxbarasho! Bulshooyinka, maalgelinta kharashaadka dugsiga.

English: Support education! Pay school fees to keep learning alive.
Kiswahili: Saidia elimu! Lipa karo za shule ili uendelee kujifunza.
Ekegusii: Sira chisemi! Akana esukuru fisi erio amasomo agenderere.
Dholuo: Konyuru e weche mag somo! Chulo osuru mar skul mondo omi puonjruok obed masiko.
Somali: Taageero waxbarasho! Bixi lacagta dugsiga si aad u sii noolaato barashada.

English: Support e-learning platforms 2021.
Kiswahili: Saidia mifumo ya kujifunza mtandaoni 2021.
Ekegusii: Sire emeroberio yamasomo gioetera eintaneti omwaka 2021.
Dholuo: Konyuru e-puonjruok 2021.
Somali: Taageerada barnaamijyada barashada elektaroonigga ah ee 2021.

English: Support girls' education in rural areas 2022.
Kiswahili: Kuunga mkono elimu ya wasichana katika maeneo ya vijijini 2022.
Ekegusii: Sira chisemi chiabana abanyaroka barisabu omwaka 2022.
Dholuo: Konyuru nyithindo ma nyiri mondo oyud somo e gwenge mag gweng' e higa mar 2022.
Somali: Taageero waxbarashada gabdhaha ee deegaannada miyiga 2022.

English: Support inclusion! Ensure schools have ramps and aids for disabled students.
Kiswahili: Saidia ujumuishaji! Hakikisha shule zina njia panda na vifaa vya kusaidia wanafunzi wenye ulemavu.
Ekegusii: Sira emeroberio ya bonsi! Rora nga chisukuru nchibwate ebisirero na biria bigokobakonya koigwa ase abana bare noboremaru ao ao.
Dholuo: Konyuru ji mondo oriwgi lwedo! Ne ni skunde nigi kuonde ma nyithindo ma nigi midekre nyalo idhogo.
Somali: Taageero ka qaybgalka! Hubi in dugsiyada ay leeyihiin xarumo iyo caawimaad loogu talagalay ardayda naafada ah.

English: Support learning! Provide meals in drought-affected schools.
Kiswahili: Saidia kujifunza! Toa milo katika shule zilizoathiriwa na ukame.
Ekegusii: Sira amasomo! Karwe endagera gokonya chisukuru chiria chire ase chingongo chinyomo.
Dholuo: Konyuru jopuonjre! Chiw chiemo e skunde ma nokethore nikech oro.
Somali: Taageero waxbarasho! Cuntada u siiya dugsiyada ay abaartu saameysay.

English: Support learning! Provide visual aids for blind students.
Kiswahili: Saidia kujifunza! Toa vifaa vya kuona kwa wanafunzi wasioona.
Ekegusii: Sira amasomo eintaneti! Karwe ebinto bigokonya abana emeoko.
Dholuo: Konyuru jopuonjre! Chiw gik makonyo nyithindo ma muofni neno.
Somali: Taageero barashada! Kaalmada muuqaalka u siiya ardayda indha la'aanta ah.

English: Support marginalized communities 2022.
Kiswahili: Saidia jamii zilizotengwa 2022.
Ekegusii: Sira chingongo chiria chitigarete magega omwaka 2022.
Dholuo: Konyuru joma ok nyal yudo kony e higa mar 2022.
Somali: Ku taageero bulshooyinka marginalized 2022.

English: Support nomadic education 2022.
Kiswahili: Saidia elimu ya kuhamahama 2022.
Ekegusii: Sira chisemi chiabana baria bakong'anyang'anya omwaka 2022.
Dholuo: Riw lwedo somo mar jowuoth 2022.
Somali: Taageero waxbarashada qowmiyadda 2022.

English: Support nomadic learners 2023.
Kiswahili: Wasaidie wanafunzi wa kuhamahama 2023.
Ekegusii: Sira amasomo yabana baria bakonganyanganya omwaka 2023.
Dholuo: Kony jopuonjre mawuok e pinje maoko 2023.
Somali: Taageero ardayda qowmiyadaha ah sanadka 2023.

English: Support nomads! Fund mobile schools for pastoralists.
Kiswahili: Saidia wahamaji! Fadhili shule zinazohamishika kwa wafugaji.
Ekegusii: Sira baria bakong'anyang'anya! Karwe chibesa ase abatugi bokong'anyang'anya .
Dholuo: Konyuru jowuoth! Chiw pesa ne skunde mag kwath ma ji wuothoe.
Somali: Taageero u yeelo qowmiyadaha! Taageero u yeelo dugsiyada dhaqdhaqaaqa ah ee loogu talagalay adhijirrada.

English: Support nomads! Fund programs for nomadic schools.
Kiswahili: Saidia wahamaji! Fadhili programu kwa shule za wahamaji.
Ekegusii: Sira abakong'anyang'anya! Karwe chibesa ase emeroberio yechisukuru chia abakong'anyang'anya.
Dholuo: Konyuru jowuoth! Chiwo pesa ne skunde mag jodak.
Somali: Taageero dadka u soo guura, taageero barnaamijyo loogu talagalay dugsiyada u soo guura.

English: Support orphans! Apply for education scholarships in your county.
Kiswahili: Saidia yatima! Omba ufadhili wa masomo katika kaunti yako.
Ekegusii: Konya chintakana! Toma ogosaba kwogokonywa chibesa chiogosomera eskaonti yao.
Dholuo: Konyuru nyithi kiye! Many thuolo mar dhi e skul e gweng'u.
Somali: Taageero agoonta! Codso deeqaha waxbarasho ee degmadaada.

English: Support refugee education 2021.
Kiswahili: Saidia elimu ya wakimbizi 2021.
Ekegusii: Sira chisemi chia baria batamire chisegi korwa sobo omwaka 2021.
Dholuo: Konyuru joma oringo thuchegi 2021.
Somali: Taageer waxbarashada qaxootiga 2021.

English: Support refugees! Provide learning materials for refugee students.
Kiswahili: Wasaidie wakimbizi! Toa vifaa vya kujifunzia kwa wanafunzi wakimbizi.
Ekegusii: Sira baria batamire chisegi korwa sobo! Karwe ebinto biogosomera ase abana ba baria batamire chisegi korwa sobo.
Dholuo: Konyuru joma oringo thuchegi! Chiwo gige puonjruok ne jopuonjre moringo thuchegi.
Somali: Taageero qaxootiga! Waxbarasho u siiya ardayda qaxootiga ah.

English: Support research grants 2025.
Kiswahili: Ruzuku za utafiti za usaidizi 2025.
Ekegusii: Sira emeroberio yechibesa chiokorigia obomanyi oboyia omwaka 2025.
Dholuo: Kony e timo nonro e higa mar 2025.

English: Universities collaborate to provide virtual library resources universally accessible to all enrolled students.
Kiswahili: Vyuo vikuu vinashirikiana kutoa rasilimali za maktaba pepe zinazopatikana kwa wanafunzi wote waliojiandikisha.

English: Universities encouraged to develop and utilize Open Educational Resources (OER) for wider access to learning materials.

Dholuo: Ne ojiw yunivasiti mondo olos kendo oti gi Open Educational Resources (OER) mondo giyud gik ma ginyalo puonjorego.
Somali: Jaamacadaha waxaa lagu dhiirigelinayaa inay horumariyaan oo ay adeegsadaan kheyraadka waxbarasho ee furan (OER) si ay u helaan waxyaabo waxbarasho oo ballaaran.

English: Universities encouraged to develop and utilize Open Educational Resources (OER) for wider access to learning materials.
Kiswahili: Vyuo vikuu vinahimizwa kutoa mafunzo kuhusu teknolojia zinazoibuka ili kuwaandaa wanafunzi kwa ajili ya masoko ya kazi ya siku zijazo.

English: YouÃ¢â‚¬TMre not alone! Visit school counselors for support.

English:
We are advising all health workers to ensure they are wearing masks and PPEs at all times. 
Please take all the measures we have announced seriously.
Kiswahili:
Tunawashauri wafanyakazi wote wa afya kuhakikisha wamevaa barakoa na vifaa vya kujikinga wakati wote.

Tafadhali chukua hatua zote ambazo tumetangaza kwa uzito.
Ekegusii: Nigo tokobasemia abakori emeremo bonsi ba nyagitari kobeka ebikoneri/chimaski amo n'ebinto biogwetanga chingaki chionsi
Dholuo: Wachiwo paro ne jotich duto mag thieth mondo gine ni girwako abuog rombe kod PPEs kinde duto. Yie mondo ukaw okenge duto ma waselando kaka gik madongo.
Somali: Waxaan kula talineynaa dhammaan shaqaalaha caafimaadka inay hubiyaan inay xirtaan maaskaro iyo PPE markasta. Fadlan si dhab ah u qaad dhammaan tallaabooyinka aan ku dhawaaqnay.

Ekegusii: Chinsemo chiokoragera; 1. chiikeranie obochenu bwe'chindagera, amo n'ebibekerero, amo n'echinsemo chiokooneria. 2. Beka amache aisaine ase chibeseni chiogwesaba, chiranyare goikerwa na kera omonto, ase ebisieri bioosoa, na gosoka.
Dholuo: Ute chiemo nyaka; 1. neno ni chiemo nigi ber kendo nigi arita maber, lwoko kendo loso kuonde ma chiemo oromoe, keto gik ma nyalo ketho gik moko, piny kod kaunta. 2. Ket pi ma nyalo ting'o ma oromo kod gik ma nyalo chopo e lwoko lwedo, e dhoot mar donjo kod kuonde ma wuok.
Somali: Makhaayadaha waa inay: 1. xaqiijiyaan tayada & badbaadada cuntada, ku maydhaan & nadiifiyaan dusha sare ee la xiriira cuntada, ku nadiifiyaan dusha sare, dabaqyada & xisaabaadka. 2.Ku rakib biyo qulqulaya oo la qaadi karo oo ku habboon & baashaal lagu maydho oo la heli karo ujeeddooyinka gacmaha lagu maydho, meelaha gelitaanka & bixitaanka.

English:
We are advising members of the public to put on masks when getting into a matatu one is advised to put on a mask.
Local production of masks and PPEs has began
Kiswahili:
Tunawashauri wananchi kuvaa barakoa wanapoingia kwenye matatu, mtu anashauriwa kuvaa barakoa.

Uzalishaji wa barakoa na vifaa vya kujikinga umeanza.
Ekegusii: Nigo tokobasemia abamenyi ense kobeka ebikoneri kekero bagosoa ase chimatatu, omonto nigo agosemigwa kobeka egekoneri/emaski. Oboroisia bw'ebinto biogwetanga bwachakire.
Dholuo: Wachiwo paro ne jopiny mondo orwak abuog rombe sama odonjo e matatu ng'ato opuonjore mondo orwak abuog rombe. Loso abuog rombe kod PPEs e pinyno osechako
Somali: Waxaan kula talineynaa shacabka inay xirtaan maaskaro marka ay galaan matatu waxaa lagula talinayaa in ay xirtaan maaskaro.

English:
This are the first steps to keeping your family safe from Covid 19;
1.Wash your hands regularly with soap & running water
2. Cover your mouth and nose with a flexed elbow or tissue, when coughing or sneezing.
3.Avoid close contact with anyone who has cold or flu-like symptoms
Kiswahili:
Hizi ni hatua za kwanza za kulinda familia yako kutokana na Covid 19;
1. Osha mikono yako mara kwa mara kwa sabuni na maji yanayotiririka
2. Funika mdomo na pua yako kwa kiwiko au tishu iliyokunjwa, unapokohoa au kupiga chafya.
3. Epuka kugusana kwa karibu na mtu yeyote ambaye ana dalili za mafua au mafua.
Ekegusii:
Ebi nabio ebitambokero ebitangani b i'okorenda enyomba yao korwa ase Covid 19;
 1.Esibie amaboko ao ase n’amache y’egetacho, n’esabuni.
 2.Tuba omonu ne’chimioro kogotumia ekegokoro kiao gose egetambaa ekero ogokorora gose goasimora.
 3.Toba ang’e na omonto o nde bwensi obwate rikuba.
Dholuo: Magi gin yore mokwongo mag rito joodu mondo kik giyud Covid 19; 1. Luok lweteni pile ka pile gi sabun kod pi ma ng'ich 2. Uum dhogi kod okumbo  ni kata tishu, ka igoyo kata iting'o. 3. Wek tudruok machiegni gi ng'ato ang'ata man kod tuoche mag hoyo kata athung'a.
Somali: Kuwani waa tallaabooyinka ugu horreeya si qoyskaaga looga ilaaliyo COVID 19; 1. Gacmaha si joogto ah ugu maydho saabuun iyo biyo socdo 2. Afka iyo sanka ku daboolo lafdhabarta la jiifay ama dhar, marka aad suuxdo ama suuxdo. 3. Ka fogow xiriir dhow qof kasta oo qaba calaamadaha qabowga ama hargabka

English: Alcohol and Smoking will increase the risks of having high blood pressure. While you STAY AT HOME reduce alcohol intake and smoking.
Kiswahili: Pombe na Uvutaji Sigara vitaongeza hatari za kuwa na shinikizo la damu. Unapokaa NYUMBANI punguza unywaji wa pombe na uvutaji sigara.
Ekegusii: Amarwa n’esigara nigo bikomenta obokong’u bw’okonyora riberera riamanyinga. Ekero ore inka, keia konywa amaru gose konywa esigara.
Dholuo: Kongo kod madho ndawa biro medo nyalo mar bedo gi presa mamalo mar remo. Ka ibedo e ot, duok piny madho kong’o kod madho ndawa.
Somali: Cabitaanka khamriga iyo sigaarka ayaa kordhin doona khatarta cadaadiska dhiigga sare.Marka aad guriga jogto iska yarey isticmalka khamriga iyo sigarka.

English:
Be safe from coronavirus.Washing your hands is the most important way to stop transmission.
1.Wet hands
2.Apply enough soap
3.Scrub all surfaces of the hands for 20-30 seconds.
4.Rinse thoroughly with running water
5.Dry hands with a clean cloth or single-use towel
Kiswahili:
Kuwa salama kutokana na virusi vya corona. Kuosha mikono yako ndiyo njia muhimu zaidi ya kuzuia maambukizi.

1. Lowesha mikono
2. Paka sabuni ya kutosha
3. Sugua sehemu zote za mikono kwa sekunde 20-30.

4. Suuza vizuri na maji yanayotiririka
5. Kausha mikono kwa kitambaa safi au taulo ya matumizi moja
Ekegusii:
Etange n’ebinyinyi bia Corona. Gosibia amaboko nenchera ya bene yogotanga ogoetia kwebinyinyi.
 1.Esibi amaboko
 2.Eyake esabuni
 3.Sugua kera ensemo yokoboko ase chisekunde 20-30
 4.Sibi amaboko ase amache egetacho
 5.Etinyi n’egetambaa ekerabu
Dholuo: Bed gi arita maber kuom korona. Lwoko lweteni en yo maduong' mogik mar geng'o lando tuwo. 1. Lwoko lweteni gi pi 2. Ket sabun moromo 3. Goch lweteni duto kuom sekon 20-30. 4. Luw lweteni maber gi pi moting'o 5. Luw lweteni gi nanga maler kata matiyo go dichiel.
Somali: Iska ilaali cudurka Coronavirus. Gacmahaada maydhka ayaa ah habka ugu muhiimsan ee lagu joojin karo gudbinta. 1. Gacmaha qoyan 2.Sabayl ku filan ku dheji 3.Dadka oo dhan 20-30 ilbidhiqsi ku tirtir. 4. Biyaha qulqulaya si fiican u maydho 5. Gacmaha qalalan dhar nadiif ah ama tuulo hal mar loo isticmaalo

English:
How to boost your immune system against the COVID-19;
1. Stay hydrated - drink 3-4 litres of water daily.
2. Take antioxidant-rich diet - amla, guava, green leafy veggies, spinach, garlic, green tea, peppers, turmeric
3. Exercise
4. Meditation
5. Quality sleep
Kiswahili:
Jinsi ya kuimarisha kinga yako dhidi ya COVID-19;
1. Endelea kuwa na maji mwilini - kunywa lita 3-4 za maji kila siku.
2. Chukua lishe yenye vioksidishaji vingi - amla, guava, mboga za majani mabichi, mchicha, kitunguu saumu, chai ya kijani, pilipili hoho, manjano
3. Mazoezi
4. Kutafakari
5. Usingizi bora
Ekegusii:
Enchera yokomenta ogwetanga korwa Covid 19
 1.Kanywe amache amange - chilita 3-4 kera rituko
 2.Kari chindagera buna amapera, chinyeni chiekegusii, egetunguo saumu, n.k
 3.Tarataria omobere
 4.Okoiranerera
 5.Chitoro chiisaine
Dholuo:
Kaka inyalo medo teko mar geng'o tuo mar COVID-19;
1. Bed gi pi moromo - metho lita 3-4 mag pi pile ka pile.
2. Kaw chiemo ma nigi antioxidant mang'eny - amla, guava, alode ma nigi oboke, spinach, garlic, green tea, peppers, turmeric
3. Timo gik matego del
4. Paro matut
5. Nindo e yor chuny
Somali: Sida loo xoojiyo nidaamka difaaca jirka ee ka dhanka ah COVID-19; 1. Noqo mid qoyan - cab 3-4 litir oo biyo ah maalin kasta. 2. Qaado cunto antioxidant hodan ah - amla, guava, khudradda caleemaha cagaaran, spinach, basasha, shaaha cagaaran, qumbaha, 3. Jimicsi 4. Fadhiga 5. Hurdo tayo leh

English: You have to be registered to get the COVID-19 vaccine.  You can do this at the nearest health facility or be registering on the MOH_Kenya website (http://health.go.ke). All you need is your ID card. Kindly assist your elderly relatives to get registered
Kiswahili: Lazima uwe umesajiliwa ili kupata chanjo ya COVID-19. Unaweza kufanya hivi katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu au kujiandikisha kwenye tovuti ya MOH_Kenya (http://health.go.ke). Unachohitaji ni kitambulisho chako. Tafadhali wasaidie jamaa zako wazee kujiandikisha.
Ekegusii: Goika bwerike erio konyora esindani ya Covid 19. Nabo okwerika ase enyagitari ere ang’e nasore, gose ase etuvuti ya MOH_Kenya (http://health.go.ke). Ekio oganetie nekebande kiao. Konya abakoro kwerika.
Dholuo: Nyaka iket nyingi e kad mar yudo chanjo mar COVID-19. Inyalo timo kamano e kar thieth ma ni machiegni kodi kata inyalo ndiko e websait mar MOH_Kenya (http://health.go.ke). Gima dwarore en mana kad mar in iwuon. Kony wedeni moseti mondo ondik nyingegi e kad
Somali: Waa inaad iska diiwaangelisaa si aad u hesho tallaalka COVID-19. Waxaad ku sameyn kartaa xarunta caafimaadka ee kuugu dhow ama waxaad iska diiwaangelin kartaa websaydhka MOH_Kenya (http://health.go.ke). Waxa kaliya ee aad u baahan tahay waa kaarka aqoonsigaaga. Fadlan ka caawi qaraabadaada waayeelka ah inay iska diiwaangeliyaan

English: Health CS Mutahi Kagwe says total lockdown on the table if coronavirus cases escalate, urges Kenyans to limit social interactions.
Kiswahili: Waziri wa Afya Mutahi Kagwe anasema amri ya kutotoka nje ikiwa visa vya virusi vya corona vitaongezeka, anawahimiza Wakenya kupunguza mwingiliano wa kijamii.
Ekegusii: Omowaziri o Afya, Mutahi Kagwe otebire richiko riogotasoka isiko ndietigwe onye ebinyinyi bia Coronavirus bikomentekana, obasabire abakenya gokeania okoumerana na abande.
Dholuo: Jatend migao mar thieth, Mutahi Kagwe wacho ni ka kwan mar joma nigi tuo mar coronavirus omedore, inyalo twe ji duto e ot, kendo ojiwo Jo-Kenya mondo kik gibed gi tudruok gi ji mang'eny.
Somali: CS Caafimaadka Mutahi Kagwe ayaa sheegay in xiritaanka guud ee miiska haddii kiisaska coronavirus ay sii kordhaan, wuxuu ugu baaqay dadka Kenya inay xaddidaan isdhexgalka bulshada.

English: Covid-19 variant from India detected in Kenya, MoH says the case was reported in Kisumu.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya inasema kisa hicho kiliripotiwa Kisumu, aina ya Covid-19 kutoka India ikigunduliwa nchini Kenya.
Ekegusii: Ewizara yoborwaria yatebire ebinyinyi bia Covid 19 koru India biatokire Kisumu
Dholuo: Kit tuo mar Covid-19 moa India ne ofweny e Kenya, Migawo mar Thieth wacho ni ne oyud kit tuoni Kisumu.
Somali: Kala duwanaanta COVID-19 ee ka timid Hindiya ayaa laga helay Kenya, Wasiirka Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa sheegay in kiiska laga soo sheegay Kisumu.

English: A small number of vaccinated people may get infected with COVID-19 after vaccination; this is called a breakthrough infection, but they are likely to have milder symptoms than if they were not vaccinated.
Kiswahili: Idadi ndogo ya watu waliochanjwa wanaweza kuambukizwa COVID-19 baada ya chanjo; hii inaitwa maambukizi ya mafanikio, lakini kuna uwezekano wa kuwa na dalili ndogo kuliko kama hawakuchanjwa.
Ekegusii: Enamba enke ya abanto mbakageire konyora oborwaire bwa Covid 19 magega yokonyora esindani yogwetanga. Eye nigo ekorokwa okoambokerigwa kwobobui, nonya abanto aba bagotwara ebimanyererio ebike kobua bari bataranyora esindani.
Dholuo: Kwan matin mar ji moseyudo chanjo nyalo yudo tuo mar COVID-19 bang' yudo chanjo; mano iluongo ni tuo mar breakthrough, to nyalo bedo ni gin gi ranyisi matin moloyo ka dine bed ni ok omigi chanjo.
Somali: Tirada yar ee dadka la tallaalay ayaa laga yaabaa inay ku dhacaan COVID-19 tallaalka ka dib; tani waxaa loo yaqaan cudurka horumarinta, laakiin waxay u badan tahay inay la kulmaan calaamado fudud marka loo eego haddii aan la tallaalin.

English: All COVID-19 vaccines are safe for use by adults, breastfeeding mothers and as per current WHO guidelines, can also be used by pregnant women upon recommendation by a qualified physician.
Kiswahili: Chanjo zote za COVID-19 ni salama kwa matumizi ya watu wazima, akina mama wanaonyonyesha na kulingana na miongozo ya sasa ya WHO, zinaweza pia kutumiwa na wanawake wajawazito kwa mapendekezo ya daktari aliyehitimu.
Ekegusii: Chisindani chia Covid 19 chionsi nechingiya ase okobetwa abanto abanene, abang’ina/abakungu bakogonkia kobwatekana namorokererio arure na WHO. Nabo chikoegwa abakungu bare morito, koreng’ana nogoetia k w’omonyagitari.
Dholuo: Geng'o mag COVID-19 duto ni kare ne joma dongo, mine mapidho nyithindo, kendo kaluwore gi chike mag riwruok mar piny mangima mar thieth, mon ma yach bende nyalo tiyo kodgi ka laktar okonyogi.
Somali: Dhammaan tallaallada COVID-19 waxay ammaan u yihiin dadka waaweyn, hooyooyinka naas nuujinaya iyo sida ku cad tilmaamaha WHO ee hadda jira, haweenka uurka leh ayaa sidoo kale isticmaali kara talobixinta dhakhtarka aqoonta leh.

English: Taking different types of vaccines is not recommended. After being fully vaccinated you will obtain your COVID-19 certificate  from the MOH website https://portal.health.go.ke.
Kiswahili: Kuchukua aina tofauti za chanjo haipendekezwi. Baada ya kuchanjwa kikamilifu utapata cheti chako cha COVID-19 kutoka kwa tovuti ya MOH https://portal.health.go.ke.
Ekegusii: Kobetwa chisindani cao ao teancheiri. Ekero kwanyorire esindani, nabo okonyora esatibigeti yao ya COVI-19 korwa ase omtandao o MOH https://portal.health.go.ke
Dholuo: Tiyo gi yore mopogore mag yudo thieth ok en gima owinjore. Bang' yudo chanjo duto ibiro yudo satifiket mar COVID-19 e websait mar MOH https://portal.health.go.ke.
Somali: Qaadashada noocyo kala duwan oo tallaal ah laguma talinayo. Ka dib markaad si buuxda u tallaasho waxaad shahaadadaada COVID-19 ka heli doontaa websaydhka wasaaradda caafimaadka https://portal.health.go.ke.

English: Five new Mpox cases detected in Kenya, one patient in isolation
Kiswahili: Visa vitano vipya vya Mpox vyagunduliwa nchini Kenya, mgonjwa mmoja akiwa ametengwa
Ekegusii: Abanto batano batokire babwate oborwaire bwa Mpox igaa Kenya. Omorwaire oyomo orusananigwe
Dholuo: Jotuo abich manyien mag Mpox ne ofweny Kenya, jatuo achiel ne oket kar kende
Somali: Shan kiis oo cusub oo Mpox ah ayaa laga helay Kenya, hal bukaan oo go'doomin ah

English: Key causes of TB include undernutrition, HIV, alcohol use disorders, smoking, and diabetes. Get the word out! We can eradicate TB together
Kiswahili: Sababu kuu za Kifua Kikuu ni pamoja na lishe duni, VVU, matatizo ya matumizi ya pombe, uvutaji sigara, na kisukari. Fahamu! Tunaweza kutokomeza Kifua Kikuu pamoja
Ekegusii: Esese nigo ekorentwa na ogotaragera buya, enyamoreo, obotindu bwa amaru, esigara amo noborwaire bwesukari. Raria eng’ana eye! Ase oboamo nabo togokora esese
Dholuo: Moko kuom gik madongo makelo TB gin kaka kech, ayaki, mer, madho ndawa, koda tuwo mar sukari. Landuru wachno! Wanyalo tieko tuwo mar kahera kanyachiel
Somali: Sababaha ugu waaweyn ee cudurka TB waxaa ka mid ah nafaqo la'aanta, HIV, cudurrada khamriga, sigaarka iyo sonkorowga.

English: Coughing! Fever! Night sweats! Chest pains! Weight loss! You could have TB. Testing and treatment are free at all public hospitals!Get tested today!
Kiswahili: Kikohozi! Homa! Jasho la usiku! Maumivu ya kifua! Kupunguza uzito! Unaweza kuwa na TB. Upimaji na matibabu ni bure katika hospitali zote za umma! Pima leo!
Ekegusii: Ogokorora! Riberera! Kogiramora botuko! Goatigwa egekuba! Gokea omobere! Nabo oratware Esese. Ogopimwa na oborwaria nigo bokoenanwa bosa ase chinyagitari chieserekali! Pimwa rero!
Dholuo: Ywak! Tuwo! Kuyo mar otieno! Owinjo ka chunye lit! Duoko kilo chien! Inyalo bedo gi tuwo mar kahera. Nonro kod thieth gin nono e osiptande duto mag sirkal! Tim nonro kawuono!
Somali: Duufaanta, hargabka, dareenka, xanuunka laabta, miisaanka luminta, cudurka TB, baaritaanka iyo daaweynta waa lacag la'aan dhamaan isbitaalada dadweynaha.

English: To get cured of TB, you must complete the entire course of treatment as advised by the health worker.
Kiswahili: Ili kupona kifua kikuu, ni lazima ukamilishe matibabu yote kama ilivyoshauriwa na mfanyakazi wa afya.
Ekegusii: Erio obwene esese, goika okore oborwaria buna ogosemigwa nomonyagitaro oo.
Dholuo: Mondo thieth mar TB ochangi, nyaka itiek kit thieth duto kaka laktar owacho.
Somali: Si aad u bogsato cudurka TB, waa inaad dhameystirtaa daaweynta oo dhan sida uu kugula talinayo shaqaalaha caafimaadka.

English: Key points to stop Mpox spread: Avoid close contact with individuals showing symptoms. Do not share personal items like towels, utensils, or clothing. Maintain good hygiene by washing hands frequently.
Kiswahili: Mambo muhimu ya kuzuia kuenea kwa Mpox: Epuka kugusana kwa karibu na watu wanaoonyesha dalili. Usishiriki vitu vya kibinafsi kama vile taulo, vyombo, au nguo. Dumisha usafi mzuri kwa kunawa mikono mara kwa mara.
Ekegusii: Amang’ana yengencho yogotanga Mpox: Tiga goikana ang’e nabanto babwate ebimanyererio bioborwaire obo. Timosanga ebinto bia ime buna chitauro, ebinto biendagera, gose chianga. Kaba omochenu ase ogwesibi amaboko ao kera chingaki.
Dholuo: Weche madongo mag geng'o landruok mar Mpox: Kik ibed machiegni gi joma nigi ranyisi mag tuwono. Kik inyis ng'at machielo gik ma in-go, kaka togo, sende, kata lewni. Bed ng'ama ler kuom luoko lweteni kinde ka kinde.
Somali: Waxyaabaha ugu muhiimsan ee lagu joojin karo faafitaanka Mpox: Ka fogow inaad xiriir dhow la yeelato dadka muujinaya calaamadaha cudurka. Ha la wadaagin waxyaabaha shakhsi ahaaneed sida tuulooyinka, weelasha, ama dharka.

English: Mpox symptoms include fever, rash, and swollen lymph nodes. Seek medical care immediately if you notice any of these.
Kiswahili: Dalili za Mpox ni pamoja na homa, upele, na uvimbe wa tezi za limfu. Tafuta huduma ya matibabu mara moja ikiwa utagundua yoyote kati ya haya.
Ekegusii: Ebimanyererio bia Mpox nigo bire buna rikuba, upele, okobimba chingw’eno. Genda nyagitari kegima ekero kwarorire ebimanyererio ebi ase ore.
Dholuo: Ranyisi mag Mpox oriwo tuo mar midhusi, chwat, kod chwoyo mar lymph nodes. Kapo ni ineno moro amora kuom gigo, ne laktar.
Somali: Calaamadaha Mpox waxaa ka mid ah hargabka, ciribtirka, iyo qanjirka lymph node ee bararka.

English: Mpox outbreak in Mombasa. Two people have died from Monkey Pox disease. Mombasa County has reported 98 Monkey Pox cases. There is a lot of active community transmission
Kiswahili: Mlipuko wa Mpox Mombasa. Watu wawili wamefariki kutokana na ugonjwa wa Tumbili. Kaunti ya Mombasa imeripoti visa 98 vya Tumbili. Kuna maambukizi mengi ya kijamii yanayoendelea
Ekegusii:
Oborwaire bwa bwatokire MPOX Mombasa 
  Ekaunti ya Mombasa yaripotiri abanto emerongo kianda na isano isato gotwara oborwaire Bwa MPOX naboigo babere gosira kobwatia oborwaire obo na kogenderera koambokera abande abange.
Dholuo: Tuwo mar Mpox ne ochakore Mombasa. Ji ariyo osetho nikech tuo mar Monkey Pox. Kaunti mar Mombasa osechiwo ripot mar ji 98 ma nigi tuo mar Monkey Pox. Nitie kwan mang'eny mag tuoche mayudo ji e alworano
Somali: Faafaha Mpox ee Mombasa. Labo qof ayaa u dhintay cudurka Monkey Pox. Gobolka Mombasa ayaa soo sheegay 98 kiis oo Monkey Pox ah. Waxaa jira tiro badan oo gudbinta bulshada firfircoon

English: Ban on all public gatherings extended to May 29 to curb the spread of Covid-19.
Kiswahili: Marufuku ya mikusanyiko yote ya umma yaongezwa hadi Mei 29 ili kupunguza kuenea kwa Covid-19.
Ekegusii: Ogokanwa kwemesangererekano ao ao gosukigwa goika omotienyi o gatano 29, erio gokeyia Covid 19
Dholuo: Geng'o chokruok duto mag ji ne omed nyaka Mei 29 mondo ogeng' landruok mar Covid-19.
Somali: Mamnuucidda dhammaan isu imaatinka dadweynaha ayaa la kordhiyay illaa May 29 si loo xakameeyo faafitaanka COVID-19.

English: Kenya confirms 10 more Covid-19 cases bringing the total number of confirmed infections to 384, nine of the new cases are from Mombasa and one from Nairobi
Kiswahili: Kenya yathibitisha visa 10 zaidi vya Covid-19 na kufikisha jumla ya maambukizi 384, tisa kati ya visa vipya ni kutoka Mombasa na kimoja kutoka Nairobi.
Ekegusii: Kenya koenekia abanto 10 komentekana ase okoambokerigwa oborwaire bwa COVID19 bonsi amo goika abanto 384. Ase abwo, 109 nigo bakorwa Mombasa na oyomo korwa Nairobi.
Dholuo: Kenya onyiso ni nitie ji 10 kendo ma nigi tuo mar Covid-19 mamiyo kwan jogo duto ma nigi tuwono omedore nyaka 384, ochiko kuom jogo manyien owuok Mombasa to achiel owuok Nairobi
Somali: Kenya ayaa xaqiijisay 10 kiis oo dheeraad ah oo ka mid ah cudurka Covid-19, taasoo keentay in tirada guud ee cudurrada la xaqiijiyay ay gaarto 384, sagaal ka mid ah kiisaska cusub ayaa ka yimid Mombasa iyo mid ka yimid Nairobi

English: I have invoked the public health act after it was declared a pandemic. Thoroughly wash hands and use alcohol based sanitizers. Keep 1-meter distance from a person who is sneezing or coughing. A person who is coughing or sneezing should stay at home and avoid crowds
Kiswahili: Nimeitisha sheria ya afya ya umma baada ya kutangazwa kuwa janga. Osha mikono vizuri na utumie vitakasa mikono vyenye pombe. Weka umbali wa mita 1 kutoka kwa mtu anayepiga chafya au kukohoa. Mtu anayekohoa au kupiga chafya anapaswa kukaa nyumbani na kuepuka misongamano ya watu.
Ekegusii: Natianirie richiko riobochenu bwensekobwatekana nogotangaswa kwegiateko. Esabe amaboko gotumia chisanitaisa. Tenena oboare bwemita eyemo koru ase omonto ogokorora na goasimora. Omonto ogokorora na goasimora nigo agwenerete kobera nyomba, aare nemesangererekano yabanto.
Dholuo: Asetiyo gi chik mar thieth mar oganda bang' kane oland ni en tuwo malandore. Luok lweteni maber kendo iti gi gik ma geng'o tuoche ma nigi kong'o. Bed mita 1 mabor gi ng'at ma ng'ol kata ma ywak. Ng'at ma ywak kata ng'ol onego osik e pacho kendo kik odhi kama ji ng'enyie.
Somali: Waxaan ku baaqay sharciga caafimaadka dadweynaha ka dib markii lagu dhawaaqay cudurka faafa. Gacmaha si taxadar leh u maydho oo isticmaal daawooyinka nadiifinta khamriga ku saleysan. ka fogaada 1 mitir qofkii qiiqaya ama qiiqaya. Qofka qiiqaya ama qiiqaya waa inuu guriga joogaa oo ka fogaadaa dadweynaha

English: Kenya on high alert over new and deadly mosquito. Anopheles Stephensi causes the deadliest type of Malaria. Health researchers have found the mosquito in Mandera. Mosquito spreads Malaria in both urban and rural areas
Kiswahili: Kenya iko macho kuhusu mbu mpya na hatari. Anopheles Stephensi husababisha aina mbaya zaidi ya Malaria. Watafiti wa afya wamegundua mbu huko Mandera. Mbu hueneza Malaria katika maeneo ya mijini na vijijini
Ekegusii: Kenya yakureire eumbu yachire embe. Anopheles Stephensi nigo ekoreta esosera embe. Abakori emeremo boborwaria banyorire eumbu eye aaria Mandera. Chiumbu nigo chikoenana esosera ase chinsemo ao ao ime y’emechi, n’ebinyoro.
Dholuo: Piny Kenya ni e bwo rit maduong' nikech kute manyien ma nego ji mang'eny. Anopheles Stephensi en tuwo mar malaria makelo tho ahinya. Jotim nonro e weche thieth oseyudo kutego e Mandera. Tunge keyo malaria e taonde koda e gwenge
Somali: Kenya waxay ku jirtaa feejignaan sare oo ku saabsan cayayaanka cusub ee dilaaga ah. Anopheles Stephensi waxay keentaa nooca ugu dilaaga ah ee Malaria. Cilmi-baadhayaasha caafimaadka waxay ka heleen cayayaanka Mandera.

English: Kisumu Governor Nyong'o orders all restaurants shut in the county for failing to adhere to MoH measures against Covid-19.
Kiswahili: Gavana wa Kisumu Nyong'o aamuru migahawa yote ifungwe katika kaunti hiyo kwa kushindwa kufuata sheria za Wizara ya Afya dhidi ya Covid-19.
Ekegusii: Omogabana o Kisumu, Nyong’o, orure richiko riogosieka chinsemo chiokoragera magega yogotaigwera amachiko arure na MOH yokorwania COVID 19
Dholuo: Gavana mar Kisumu Nyong'o ochiko mondo odiechienge mag chiemo duto olor e kaunti nikech ok giluw chike mag Migawo mar Thieth e kedo gi Covid-19.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha Kisumu Nyong'o ayaa amar ku bixiyay in dhammaan makhaayadaha gobolka la xiro sababtoo ah ma raacaan tallaabooyinka Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ee ka dhanka ah COVID-19.

English: CDC launches a campaign promoting hand hygiene to prevent disease spread.
Kiswahili: CDC yazindua kampeni ya kuhimiza usafi wa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa magonjwa.
Ekegusii: CDC gochaka ekampeini ya ogosiira gosibia amaboko erio gotanga okoambokeria amarwaire.
Dholuo: CDC chako kampen mar jiwo ler mar lwedo mondo ogeng'o landruok mar tuoche.
Somali: CDC waxay bilawday olole dhiirrigelinaya nadaafadda gacmaha si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurka.

English: State launches Kenya National Public Health Institute to bolster disease prevention
Kiswahili: Serikali yazindua Taasisi ya Kitaifa ya Afya ya Umma ya Kenya ili kuimarisha kinga dhidi ya magonjwa
Ekegusii: Eserekali yachakirie etaasisi yoborwaria ime ya Kenya yogokinia ogotanga kw'amarwaire
Dholuo: Sirkal chako Kenya National Public Health Institute mondo okony e geng'o tuoche
Somali: Dowladdu waxay billowday Machadka Caafimaadka Dadweynaha ee Kenya si loo xoojiyo ka hortagga cudurrada

English: If you fee unweel, have a cold, a cough or fever, please call 719 or text *719#
Kiswahili: Ikiwa unajisikia vibaya, una mafua, kikohozi au homa, tafadhali piga simu 719 au tuma ujumbe mfupi *719#
Ekegusii: Onye koigwete bobe omobere, obwate rikuba gose ogokorora, gaki aka esimi gochia 719 gose otome riuko gochia *719#
Dholuo: Kapo ni iwinjo ka ok iwinj maber, ka ituwo, ikayo, kata ibedo gi tuwo mar ndulme, tudri gi namba 719 kata oro sms *719#
Somali: Haddii aad qabtid qabow, qandho ama harraad, fadlan wac 719 ama text *719#

English: During this time, prisoners and remandees will not be presented to court.
Kiswahili: Wakati huu, wafungwa na mahabusu hawatafikishwa mahakamani.
Ekegusii: Ebiro ebi, abasibwa namabusi bonsi tibakoirwa bosio bwekegambero.
Dholuo: E kindego, ok bi ter joma otwe kod joma otwe e kot.
Somali: Inta lagu jiro muddadaas, maxaabiista iyo maxaabiista maxkamadda loo haysto lama soo bandhigi doono.

English: Courts will continue to handle certificates of urgency and taking plea for serious cases.
Kiswahili: Mahakama zitaendelea kushughulikia vyeti vya dharura na kupokea malalamiko ya kesi kubwa.
Ekegusii: Ebigambero biagendereire kobwata chisatibigeti chiobwango na korwa ebirero ase ebina ebinene
Dholuo: Kot biro dhi nyime tiyo gi gik manyiso ni weche okethore mapiyo, kendo biro yie gi kes ma korgi tek.
Somali: Maxkamaduhu waxay sii wadi doonaan in ay wax ka qabtaan shahaadooyinka xaaladaha degdegga ah iyo in ay ka jawaabaan kiisaska culus.

English: Judges in all stations will in the meantime review the deserving cases already identified by Prisons authorities and issue appropriate revision orders in an effort to decongest the prisons. Magistrate Courts will also review bail terms for those in remand.
Kiswahili: Majaji katika vituo vyote kwa wakati huo huo watapitia kesi zinazostahili ambazo tayari zimetambuliwa na mamlaka ya Magereza na kutoa amri zinazofaa za marekebisho katika juhudi za kupunguza msongamano wa magereza. Mahakama za Mahakimu pia zitapitia masharti ya dhamana kwa wale walio mahabusu.
Ekegusii: Abanachi ebina ase ebitaseni bionsi, ase chingaki echio, nigo baraetere ebina biganeiri korigererigwa, biancheraneirwe nobogambi bwechichera, na korua amachiko agwenerete yoboonchoreria, erio gokeania ogoichorerana ime yechichera. Ebigambero bia abanachi ebina abake mbaetere amachiko yechibondi ase bari bare oromande
Dholuo: Jong'ad bura e stesen duto biro nono weche mag joma owinjore ma jotelo mag jela oseyudo kendo biro chiwo chike mowinjore mag timo nonro e temo duoko chien pek mag joma nie jela. Kot mag Magistrate bende biro nono weche mag bond ne jogo ma ne nie remand.
Somali: Garsoorayaasha dhamaan saldhigyada ayaa intaas gudaheeda dib u eegi doona kiisaska mudan ee ay horey u aqoonsadeen mas'uuliyiinta xabsiyada waxayna soo saari doonaan amarro dib u eegis oo ku habboon si loo yareeyo qiiqa xabsiyada.

English: The Nyeri ELRC is closed from 24th August to 7th September 2020 due to two confirmed COVID-19 cases, with fumigation and staff self-quarantine underway. No certificates will be processed during this period. The court will reopen for virtual hearings on 21st September, with physical hearings expected to resume under the Presiding Judge’s supervision in early October.
Kiswahili: Kituo cha ELRC cha Nyeri kimefungwa kuanzia tarehe 24 Agosti hadi 7 Septemba 2020 kutokana na visa viwili vilivyothibitishwa vya COVID-19, huku dawa ya kufukiza na kujitenga kwa wafanyakazi kukiwa kunaendelea. Hakuna vyeti vitakavyoshughulikiwa katika kipindi hiki. Mahakama itafunguliwa tena kwa ajili ya vikao vya mtandaoni tarehe 21 Septemba, huku vikao vya kimwili vikitarajiwa kuanza tena chini ya usimamizi wa Jaji Mkuu mapema Oktoba.
Ekegusii:
Egetuo kia ELCR kia Nyeri giasiekirwe gochakera chitariki 24 Agosti goika 7 Septemba 2020 magega yogotoka abarwaire babere ba COVID-19, ogosiara eriogo na gwesiekerera kogendererete.
 Chisatibigeti tichirikorosigwa chingaki echi. Abigambero nkoigora bire ogotegerera ebina ase embeo 21 Septemba, ekero ogotegerera ebina ase ebigambero gokageire koirana, inse yoboteneneri bwomogambi omonene, Oktoba kegochaka.
Dholuo: Nyeri ELRC ne olor e tarik 24 Agost nyaka tarik 7 Septemba 2020 nikech ji ariyo ma ne oyudi ni nigi tuo mar COVID-19, kendo joma tiyo kanyo ne oketore kar kendgi. E kindego, onge gima ibiro ng'e kuom gima ng'ato wacho kata timo. Od bura biro chako winjo weche e yo mayot tarik 21 Septemba, ka ichano mondo giwinj weche e yo masie e bwo jang'ad bura matayo e chak dwe mar Oktoba.
Somali: Xafiiska ELRC ee Nyeri ayaa la xiray laga bilaabo 24ka Agoosto ilaa 7ka Sebtember 2020 sababo la xiriira laba kiis oo la xaqiijiyay COVID-19, iyadoo la socdo qiiqa iyo is-goynta shaqaalaha. Ma jiraan wax shahaadooyin ah oo lagu shaqeyn doono muddadan. Maxkamaddu waxay dib u furi doontaa dhageysiyada dalwaddii 21-ka Sebtember, iyadoo la filayo in dhageysiyada jireed ay dib u bilaabaan kormeerka Garsoorka Bilowga Oktoobar.

English: Kenya reports record daily jump in Covid-19 cases; 123 new infections from 3,077 samples tested.
Kiswahili: Kenya inaripoti ongezeko kubwa la visa vya Covid-19 kila siku; maambukizi mapya 123 kutoka kwa sampuli 3,077 zilizopimwa.
Ekegusii: Kenya koripoti okomentekana okonene ase okoambokera gwa COVID-19 kera rituko; Ase ebipimo 3,077,123 biatokire koba na ebinyinyi bia COVID -19
Dholuo: Kenya chiwo ripot mar medruok mar kwan mar joma nigi Covid-19 pile ka pile; ji 123 ma nigi tuo manyien kuom sampul 3,077 ma ne otem.
Somali: Kenya waxay soo bandhigtay kororka maalinlaha ah ee kiisaska COVID-19; 123 cudurrood oo cusub oo laga soo qaatay 3,077 shaybaar oo la tijaabiyay.

English: Trump’s policy hits Kenyan health initiatives. Policy halts supply of HIV, Malaria and TB drugs. Move also affects medical supplies of newborn babies. Barasa: We’ll look for funding elsewhere if US pulls ou
Kiswahili: Sera ya Trump inaathiri mipango ya afya ya Kenya. Sera inasimamisha usambazaji wa dawa za VVU, Malaria na TB. Hatua hiyo pia inaathiri vifaa vya matibabu vya watoto wachanga. Barasa: Tutatafuta ufadhili kwingineko ikiwa Marekani itaondoa
Ekegusii: Richiko ria Trump, gosaria emeroberio ya oborwaria ya Kenya. Richiko erio nigo rigotenenia obokonyi bwokoenana amariogo ya esese amo na enyamoreo ,naboigo amariogo ya abana ebing'werere. Barasa: Ntorigie obokonyi ase ang'ao Amerika keratenenie obokonyi gocha ase tore.
Dholuo: Chenro mar Trump oketho chenro mag Kenya e weche mag thieth. Chenrono chungo chiwo mag yedhe mag ayaki, malaria kod kahera. Wuoyo gi ng'at machielo bende nyalo ketho gik mitiyogo e thiedho nyithindo. Barasa: Wabiro manyo pesa kamoro machielo ka Amerka oweyowa
Somali: Siyaasadda Trump waxay ku dhufatay mashaariicda caafimaadka ee Kenya. Siyaasadda ayaa joojineysa bixinta daawooyinka HIV, Malaria iyo TB. Dhaqdhaqaaqa ayaa sidoo kale saameyn ku yeelanaya alaabada caafimaadka ee dhallaanka cusub. Barasa: Waxaan ka raadin doonnaa maalgelin meelo kale haddii Mareykanka uu ka baxo

English: Nigerian company to make HIV, malaria test kits after US funding cut
Kiswahili: Kampuni ya Nigeria kutengeneza vifaa vya kupima VVU na malaria baada ya ufadhili wa Marekani kupunguzwa
Ekegusii: Ekambani ya Nigeria korosia ebikoreri biokorenga oborwaire bw'Enyamoreo na Esosera kobwatekania na Amerika gotenenia obokonyi.
Dholuo: Kambi mar Nigeria biro loso gik mitiyogo e pimo kute mag ayaki kod malaria bang' ka pesa ma ne imiyogi e piny Amerka osedok chien
Somali: Shirkad Nigeria ah oo soo saari doonta qalab lagu tijaabiyo HIV, Malaria kadib markii la yareeyo maalgelinta Mareykanka

English: Global Fund CEO requests Ruto to mobilise funds for HIV, TB & malaria
Kiswahili: Mkurugenzi Mtendaji wa Mfuko wa Kimataifa amtaka Ruto kuchangisha fedha kwa ajili ya VVU, Kifua Kikuu na Malaria
Ekegusii: Omonene o Global Fund komosaba omonene bwe ense Ruto,gochanga chibesa ase okorwania Enyamoreo,Esese na Esosera.
Dholuo: Jatend riwruok mar Global Fund kwayo Ruto mondo ochok pesa mar kedo gi tuo mar Ayaki, TB kod malaria
Somali: Agaasimaha Guud ee Sanduuqa Caalamiga ah ayaa ka codsaday Ruto in uu dhaqaale u soo uruuriyo cudurrada HIV, TB & Maleriya

English: Kenya faces crisis as Trump’s Executive Order to cut supply of HIV, malaria drugs
Kiswahili: Kenya inakabiliwa na mgogoro huku amri ya Trump ikipunguza usambazaji wa dawa za HIV na malaria
Ekegusii: Kenya konyora obokongu kobuatia richiko ria Trump rgotenenia obokonyi bwamariogo ya Esosera na Enyamoreo
Dholuo: Kenya romo gi chandruok nikech Chik mar Trump mar ng'ado chiwo mag yedhe mag AYAKI, malaria
Somali: Kenya waxay la kulantaa xiisad iyada oo amarkii fulinta ee Trump uu ku jarayo bixinta daawooyinka HIV, malaria

English: KEMRI study shows ivermectin significantly reduces malaria transmission
Kiswahili: Utafiti wa KEMRI unaonyesha ivermectin hupunguza kwa kiasi kikubwa maambukizi ya malaria
Ekegusii: Oboringoria bwa KEMRI bwaenekirie ing'a Ivermectin nigo egokeania okwambokeria gw'Esosera ase engecho enene.
Dholuo: Nonro mar KEMRI nyiso ni ivermectin konyo ahinya e geng'o malaria
Somali: Daraasad KEMRI ah ayaa muujineysa in ivermectin ay si weyn u yareyneyso gudbinta malaria

English: Health PS distributes mosquito nets in Busia County. Malaria prevalence in Busia stands at 39%. 22 counties targeted in latest campaign
Kiswahili: Katibu Mkuu wa Afya asambaza vyandarua katika Kaunti ya Busia. Kiwango cha malaria huko Busia kimefikia 39%. Kaunti 22 zimelengwa katika kampeni ya hivi karibuni
Ekegusii: Omoriki omonene bw'ewizara y'Oborwaria koenana chineti ase ekaunti ya Busia.Ogoichora Kwa Esosera ase ekaunti ya Busia gwaikeire 39%.Chikaunti 22 chirengire ase chikampeini chia ang,'e iga.
Dholuo: Health PS pogo net mag monj e Kaunti mar Busia. Kwan mar tuo mar malaria e Busia en 39%.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka PS waxay qaybiso shabagyada cayayaanka ee degmada Busia. Faa'iidada Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka C

English: The cost of targeted testing for Covid-19 and government quarantine facilities shall be met by the government effective today. Kenyans should not be afraid to get tested
Kiswahili: Gharama ya upimaji unaolengwa wa Covid-19 na vituo vya karantini vya serikali italipwa na serikali kuanzia leo. Wakenya hawapaswi kuogopa kupimwa.
Ekegusii: Rigori riogopimwa naboigo ebitaseni bia COVID-19, mbiakanerwe na eserekari gochaka rero ase igo bakenya mbabwenereti gotwara bwoba gopimwa.
Dholuo: Pesa ma itiyogo e timo nonro mar Covid-19 kod keto ji kar kendgi biro dhi ne sirkal chakre kawuono. Jo-Kenya ok onego oluor dhi e nonro
Somali: Qiimaha baaritaanka bartilmaameedka ah ee COVID-19 iyo xarumaha karantiil ee dowladda ayaa ay xukuumaddu bixin doontaa maanta laga bilaabo maanta. Dadka Kenya waa inaysan ka baqin inay tijaabiyaan

English: Cessation of movement in Nairobi Metropolitan Area, Mombasa and Mandera extended by a month, bars to remain closed for another 30 days
Kiswahili: Kusitishwa kwa usafiri katika Eneo la Jiji la Nairobi, Mombasa na Mandera kwaongezwa kwa mwezi mmoja, baa zitaendelea kufungwa kwa siku 30 zaidi
Ekegusii: Ogotenenenigwa bw'obosombi ase emechi ya Nairobi ,Mombasa na Mandera komentwa omotienyi oyomo. Chibaa kogenderera gosiekwa ase amatuko 30 ande.
Dholuo: Geng'o wuoth e Nairobi Metropolitan Area, Mombasa kod Mandera ne omed kuom dwe achiel, kendo kuonde madho kong'o ne dhi siko ka olor kuom ndalo mamoko 30
Somali: Joojinta dhaqdhaqaaqa Magaalada Nairobi, Mombasa iyo Mandera oo muddo bil ah la kordhiyay, qolalka ayaa xiran doona 30 maalmood oo dheeraad ah

English: Today, we have recorded 447 new positive cases out of 3803 samples bringing the total of positive cases in the country to 8,975. Tested samples in the country are now over 200,000
Kiswahili: Leo, tumerekodi visa vipya 447 chanya kati ya sampuli 3803 na kufikisha jumla ya visa chanya nchini kufikia 8,975. Sampuli zilizojaribiwa nchini sasa zina zaidi ya 200,000.
Ekegusii: Rero, twanyorire abarwaire 447 ase abanto 3803 banyarire gopimwa, bonsi banyarire goikia abarwaire 8,975. Chisampuli chionsi chiapimirwe ime y’nse yaito engima chiaetanirie 200,000
Dholuo: Kawuono, waseyudo jotuo 447 kuom jotuo 3803 ma ne otimnegi nonro, to mano miyo kwan mar jotuo duto e pinyno chopo 8,975. Sani kwan mar joma osetem e pinyno okalo 200,000
Somali: Maanta, waxaan diiwaangelinnay 447 kiis oo cusub oo wanaagsan oo ka mid ah 3803 muunad, taasoo keentay in wadarta guud ee kiisaska wanaagsan ee dalka ay gaarayaan 8,975.

English: Gov’t extends nationwide curfew, ban on public gatherings until May 29
Kiswahili: Serikali yaongeza muda wa kutotoka nje nchini kote, kupiga marufuku mikusanyiko ya umma hadi Mei 29
Ekegusii: Eserekali komenta amatuko y’ekafyu, na gotenenia emesangererekano ao ao goika May 29
Dholuo: Sirkal medo kinde mar bedo oko mar pacho e piny mangima, mar goyo marfuk chokruok mag ji duto nyaka Mei 29
Somali: Dowladdu waxay kordhisay bandowga dalka oo dhan, waxay mamnuucday isu imaatinka dadweynaha ilaa May 29

English: 2,169 people test positive for COVID-19 from 9,428 samples, positivity rate at 23pc; MoH says no death recorded
Kiswahili: Watu 2,169 wamepatikana na virusi vya COVID-19 kutoka kwa sampuli 9,428, kiwango cha walioambukizwa kikiwa asilimia 23; Wizara ya Afya yasema hakuna kifo kilichorekodiwa
Ekegusii: Abanto 2,169 banyorekanire babwate ebinyinyi bia COVID-19, korwa ase chisampuli 9,428, ekerengo kia abaambokerigwe kere 23%; Ewizara y’Oborwaria yatebire gokwa nkoiyo kwabeire.
Dholuo: Ji 2,169 nonwang'o ni nigi tuo mar COVID-19 kuom ji 9,428 ma ne otimnegi nonro, kwan mar joma nigi tuo mar COVID-19 ne en pasent 23; Migawo mar Osiptende wacho ni onge ng'at ma ne otho.
Somali: 2,169 qof ayaa laga helay COVID-19 9,428 muunad, heerka cudurka ayaa ahaa 23 boqolkiiba; Wasiirka Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa sheegay in aan la diiwaangelin dhimashada

English: Magoha says Ksh.1B needed to buy masks for schools
Kiswahili: Magoha anasema Ksh.1B zinahitajika kununua barakoa kwa ajili ya shule
Ekegusii: Magoha otebire Ksh.1B chiganeirie kogorera chisukuru ebikoneri/chimaski
Dholuo: Magoha wacho ni Ksh.1B ne dwarore mondo ng'ato ong'iew gik ma ng'icho ne skul
Somali: Magoha ayaa sheegay in Ksh.1B ay u baahan tahay inay iibsato maaskaro dugsiyada

English: There will be no air-lifting people from counties to Nairobi…There will be no capacity to be brought to Nairobi for treatment as Nairobi itself will be already overwhelmed…Where we are heading is unpredictable. It is better to be ready than to be sorry
Kiswahili: Hakutakuwa na watu wanaosafiri kwa ndege kutoka kaunti hadi Nairobi…Hakutakuwa na uwezo wa kuletwa Nairobi kwa matibabu kwani Nairobi yenyewe itakuwa tayari imezidiwa…Tunakoelekea hakutabiriki. Ni bora kuwa tayari kuliko kujuta.
Ekegusii: Obosombi bwa abanto g oetera chindege gocha Nairobi tikoiyo. Okonyara tigokoba aroro gwokorentwa Nairobi erio konyora oborwari, asengencho Nairobi yoka yanyarekire. Ase torochi tarikonyara kobanwa. Nigo ere buya kwebanga kobua gweitia.
Dholuo: Onge ndege mabiro ting'o ji koa e counties nyaka Nairobi...Onge teko mar tero ji Nairobi mondo oyud thieth nimar Nairobi owuon biro bedo ni opong' gi ji...Kama wachomoe ok ong'ere. Ber bedo moikore kar bedo gi chuny malit
Somali: ma jiri doonto dad ka soo jeeda degmooyinka Nairobi ma jiri doonto wax awood ah oo lagu keeno Nairobi daaweynta maadaama Nairobi lafteeda ay mar hore ka buuxsantay iyadoo meesha aan u soconeyno ay tahay mid aan la saadaalin karin.

English: Nationwide dusk to dawn curfew extended by 21 days in a bid to tame Covid-19 spread
Kiswahili: Amri ya kutotoka nje ya nchi nzima kuanzia jioni hadi alfajiri yaongezwa kwa siku 21 ili kupunguza kuenea kwa Covid-19
Ekegusii: Richiko riogotasoka isiko ase ense engima, gochakera morogoba, goika bwakiire, riamentirwe amatuko 21 erio gokeani okoambokerigwa gwa Covid-19
Dholuo: Chik mar dar nyaka wuok chieng' e piny mangima omed kuom ndalo 21 e temo geng'o landruok mar Covid-19
Somali: Qaranka oo dhan waxaa lagu kordhiyay 21 maalmood xannibaadda habeenka illaa waaberiga si loo xakameeyo faafitaanka COVID-19

English: 20 doctors from Cuba set to arrive in Nairobi tonight, Health CS Kagwe says they will be stationed at Kenyatta University Hospital for 6 months to help manage the Covid-19 pandemic.
Kiswahili: Madaktari 20 kutoka Cuba wanatarajiwa kuwasili Nairobi usiku wa leo, Waziri wa Afya Kagwe anasema watakuwa katika Hospitali ya Chuo Kikuu cha Kenyatta kwa miezi 6 ili kusaidia kudhibiti janga la Covid-19.
Ekegusii: Abanyagitari 20 korwa Cuba mbakageire goika Nairobi obotuko bwa rero, Omowaziri bw’Oborwaria, Kagwe, otebire ing’a nigo barabe ase enyagitari ya Kenyatta University, ime y’emetienyi 6 erio gokonya gokeania oborwaire bwa Covid-19.
Dholuo: Lakteche 20 moa Cuba ochano chopo Nairobi otieno ma kawuononi, Health CS Kagwe wacho ni gibiro dak e Kenyatta University Hospital kuom dweche 6 mondo gikony e kedo gi tuo mar Covid-19.
Somali: 20 dhakhtar oo ka yimid Cuba ayaa la filayaa inay gaaraan Nairobi caawa, Health CS Kagwe ayaa sheegay inay 6 bilood ku joogi doonaan Isbitaalka Jaamacadda Kenyatta si ay uga caawiyaan maareynta cudurka faafa ee Covid-19.

English: Launch of fortified maize, soy blend distributed across primary schools to address undernutrition.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa mchanganyiko wa mahindi na soya ulioimarishwa umesambazwa katika shule za msingi ili kukabiliana na utapiamlo.
Ekegusii: Okorentwa kw’ebituma biburukaine esoya kwararigwe chisukuru chia premari erio gokeania oborwaire bwokoborwa afya
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chamo ng'or kod mza ma opong' gi gik mang'eny, kod mza mopong' gi soya ma ipogo e skunde duto mag praimari mondo otiek chandruok mar kech mar chiemo.
Somali: Bixinta hadhuudhka xoojinta, isku darka sooyada ee loo qaybiyay dugsiyada hoose si looga hortago nafaqada yaraanta.

English: Launch of voluntary certification recognizing employers who implement nutrition, mental health, and fitness standards.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa cheti cha hiari kinachowatambua waajiri wanaotekeleza viwango vya lishe, afya ya akili, na siha.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa gw’esatibigeti yokwerwa eyio egoancherana abariki emeremo abare bagoikerania ebirengo biechindagera, oborwari bw’obongo, amo na okoba nechinguru kemobere.
Dholuo: Chakruok mar timo nonro ma ng'ato owuon timo mondo ong'e joma tiyo gi chike mag chiemo, paro, kod bedo gi del maber.
Somali: Bilowga shahaadada iskaa u doonista ah ee aqoonsanaya shaqo-bixiyeyaasha hirgelinaya heerarka nafaqada, caafimaadka dhimirka, iyo jimicsiga.

English: Introduction of postpartum exercise and nutrition support groups led by physiotherapists and dietitians.
Kiswahili: Utangulizi wa mazoezi ya baada ya kujifungua na vikundi vya usaidizi wa lishe vinavyoongozwa na wataalamu wa tiba ya viungo na wataalamu wa lishe.
