Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa amazoezi/ogotarataria omobere amo na ebiombe bigokonya chisemi chiechindagera, bikorawa na abanyagitari bogotarataria amo na bari bechindagera
Dholuo: Tiyo gi grube mag tiegruok e weche mag rieyo del kod mag chiemo e kinde ma dhako osechako nyuol, ma ichiko gi lakteche mag thieth kod lakteche ma nono weche mag chiemo.
Somali: Soo bandhigida jimicsiga dhalmada kadib iyo kooxaha taageerada nafaqada ee ay hogaamiyaan dhakhaatiirta jirka iyo dhakhaatiirta cuntada.

English: Announcement encouraging daily consumption of five fruit/veg portions for wellness and disease prevention.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la kuhimiza ulaji wa kila siku wa sehemu tano za matunda/mboga kwa ajili ya ustawi na kinga dhidi ya magonjwa.
Ekegusii: Okoraria kwogosegeta gwa kera rituko, gwokoria amatunda keboikeranu/ching’eni erio kkoba buya kemobere na gotanga amarwaire.
Dholuo: Weche mag lendo majiwo ji mondo ocham olemo/olembe abich e odiechieng' mondo omi gibed gi ngima maber kendo geng'o tuoche.
Somali: Ogeysiis lagu dhiirigelinayo isticmaalka maalinlaha ah ee shan qaybood oo midho / khudaar ah si loo ilaaliyo caafimaadka iyo ka hortagga cudurrada.

English: Pilot providing mobile seed kits and training to women's groups to grow nutritious food in informal settlements.
Kiswahili: Pilot akitoa vifaa vya mbegu vinavyohamishika na mafunzo kwa vikundi vya wanawake ili kukuza chakula chenye lishe katika makazi yasiyo rasmi.
Ekegusii: Omorundi chindege okorwa ebikoreri biechintetere am na koegeria ebiombe bia abakungu gosimeka chindagera chibwate amadini ase babegete obomenyo.
Dholuo: Chenro mar pimo chiwo kodhi mag cham kod tiegruok ne grube mag mon e pidho chiemo maber e kuonde ma ji odakie.
Somali: Tijaabada Tijaabada ah ee bixinta qalabka abuurka ee dhaqdhaqaaqa iyo tababarka kooxaha haweenka si ay u koraan cuntooyin nafaqo leh degmooyinka aan rasmiga ahayn.

English: The government has imposed a raft of new drastic measures after cases of the new coronavirus in Kenya jumped to 15 in the last 72 hours. The new directives came after eight more people tested positive for COVID-19
Kiswahili: Serikali imeweka hatua kadhaa kali baada ya visa vya virusi vipya vya korona nchini Kenya kupanda hadi 15 katika saa 72 zilizopita. Maagizo hayo mapya yalikuja baada ya watu wengine wanane kupimwa na kupatikana na COVID-19.
Ekegusii: Eserekali yabekireebitambokero ekero ebinyinyi ebinyia bia Korona biamentekanete goika 15 ime ye’chinsa 72 chiaetire. Amachiko amayia nigo achete magega yabanto bande batano na batato gopimwa na konyorekana na COVID-19.
Dholuo: Sirkal osechako tiyo gi yore manyien mag thieth bang' ka kwan mar joma nigi tuo mar coronavirus e Kenya omedore nyaka 15 e seche 72 mokalo. Chike manyien ne obiro bang' ka ji aboro ne oyudo ni nigi COVID-19
Somali: Dowladda Kenya ayaa soo saartay tallaabooyin cusub oo adag kadib markii kiisaska coronavirus-ka cusub ee Kenya ay kor u kaceen 15 saacadood ee la soo dhaafay. Tilmaamaha cusub waxay yimaadeen ka dib markii siddeed qof oo kale ay ku baareen COVID-19

English: Kenya confirms three cases of Covid-19 Omicron variant; Health CS Kagwe says it has been detected among travelers who have been quarantined
Kiswahili: Kenya yathibitisha visa vitatu vya Covid-19 Omicron; Waziri wa Afya Kagwe anasema imegunduliwa miongoni mwa wasafiri ambao wametengwa
Ekegusii: Kenya yaenekirie ebinyinyi bitato ao ao bia Covid-19 Omicron; omowaziri bwoborwaria CS Kagwe otebire nigo biarorekanete ase abanto barenge chisafari abare babekire karantini.
Dholuo: Kenya nyiso ni ji adek nigi kit tuo mar Covid-19 Omicron; Kagwe wacho ni oseyude kuom jowuoth ma oseketi kar kendgi
Somali: Kenya ayaa xaqiijisay saddex kiis oo ka mid ah noocyada Covid-19 Omicron; Health CS Kagwe ayaa sheegtay in lagu ogaaday dadka safarka ah ee ku jiray karantiil

English: Kakamega County gov't orders closure of all public mortuaries, Governor Oparanya advises residents to bury their dead immediately.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti ya Kakamega yaamuru kufungwa kwa vyumba vyote vya kuhifadhia maiti vya umma, Gavana Oparanya awashauri wakazi kuzika wafu wao mara moja.
Ekegusii: Eserekali y’ekaunti ya Kakamega yarure ogochika kwogosieka chimocheri chi’echinyagitari chieserekali, Omogabana Oparanya oboririe abamenyi gotindeka abakure kegima.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar Kakamega County ochiko ni mondo olor kuonde duto mag kano ringre jomotho, kendo Gavana Oparanya jiwo jodala mondo oiki jomothogi mapiyo.
Somali: Maamulka Gobolka Kakamega ayaa amar ku bixiyay in la xiro dhamaan goobaha meydka ee dadweynaha, Guddoomiye Oparanya wuxuu dadka deggan kula talinayaa inay si deg deg ah u aaseen meydadkooda.

English: Education CS Magoha says colleges and universities to remain closed until January 2021 as they are not Covid-19 compliant
Kiswahili: Waziri wa Elimu Magoha asema vyuo vikuu vitafungwa hadi Januari 2021 kwani havifuati sheria za Covid-19
Ekegusii: Omowaziri bwe’Chisemi Magoha otebire chi’yunibasiti tichirikoigorwa goika January 2021 ase eng’encho tibarabwatia amachiko a Covid-19
Dholuo: CS Magoha wacho ni kolej kod yunivasiti biro siko ka olor nyaka Januar 2021 nikech ok giluw chike mag Covid-19
Somali: Waxbarashada CS Magoha ayaa sheegtay in kulliyadaha iyo jaamacadaha la xiro ilaa Janaayo 2021 maadaama aysan u hoggaansamin COVID-19

English: Gov’t orders Mama Mbogas to stop chopping vegetables for customers over COVID-19 fears
Kiswahili: Serikali yamwagiza Mama Mbogas kuacha kukata mboga kwa ajili ya wateja wake kutokana na hofu ya COVID-19
Ekegusii: Eserekali yatebiririe mama mboga gotiga gokenyeri abanto ching’eni ase eng’encho y’obwoba bwa COVID-19
Dholuo: Sirkal ochiko Mama Mbogas mondo owere kod ng'ado alot ne jonyiewo nikech luoro mar COVID-19
Somali: Dowladda ayaa amartay Mama Mbogas inay joojiso goynta khudradda macaamiisha cabsida COVID-19

English: For now, open bars and test social distancing. KCPE and KCSE are not a ticket to heaven
Kiswahili: Kwa sasa, fungua baa na jaribu umbali wa kijamii. KCPE na KCSE si tiketi ya kwenda mbinguni
Ekegusii: Ase bonoiga, toigore chibaa, amo na kobera are korwa ase abaminto. KCPE na KCSE tibiri tikiti chiokogenda igoro.
Dholuo: Gie sani, yaw kuonde madho kong'o kendo temuru bedo mabor gi jomoko. KCPE kod KCSE ok gin tiketi mar dhi e polo
Somali: Waqtigan xaadirka ah, baararka furan iyo imtixaanka masaafada bulshada. KCPE iyo KCSE ma aha tigidhka jannada

English: Gov't now calls for wearing of masks, vaccination as Kenya faces 6th COVID-19 wave
Kiswahili: Serikali sasa yatoa wito wa kuvaa barakoa na chanjo huku Kenya ikikabiliwa na wimbi la 6 la COVID-19
Ekegusii: Eserekali yabasabire abanto kobeka chimaski na konyora chanjo, ekero Kenya yatubirwe ne’rire ria COVID-19
Dholuo: Sirkal koro dwaro ni ji orwak lep lak, kendo gichiw thieth e kinde ma Kenya romo gi COVID-19 mar auchiel
Somali: Dowladda ayaa hadda ku baaqeysa in la xidho maaskaro, la tallaalo maadaama Kenya ay wajahdo hirkii lixaad ee COVID-19

English:
Mombasa Covid-19 Booths: 
Contactless testing booths to be distributed in 6 constituencies. Booths have zero contact between the medic and patient. Contactless booths allow for safer, faster mass testing. The locally assembled booths are a game changer
Kiswahili:
Vibanda vya Mombasa Covid-19:

Vibanda vya kupima bila kugusa vitasambazwa katika majimbo 6 ya uchaguzi. Vibanda havina mguso wowote kati ya daktari na mgonjwa. Vibanda visivyogusa vinaruhusu upimaji salama na wa haraka wa wingi. Vibanda vilivyokusanyika ndani ya eneo husika vinabadilisha mchezo.
Ekegusii:
Ebisa bia Mombasa Covid-19:
 Ebisa biogopimwa otarigokunwa nkoenanu bire ase amajimbo 6 y’obochori. Ebisa tibibwati gokunana konde gwonsi gati y’omonyagitari amo n’omorwaire. Ebisa ebi nigo bigoachera ogopimwa kobwate oborendi naende kwa bwango na obonge. Ebisa ebi biroseiri ime y’ensemo eyuo biaonchorire egosori.
Dholuo:
Mombasa Covid-19 Booths:
Kembe mag pimo ma ok ochom gi ng'ato ibiro pog e kidienje auchiel. Kuondego onge tudruok moro amora e kind laktar kod jatuwo. Kuonde ma ok nyal tudore gi ng'ato, konyo e timo nonro mang'eny e yo mapiyo kendo maonge hinyruok. Sanduge molos e alworawa kelo lokruok maduong' ahinya
Somali: Mombasa COVID-19 Booths: Goobaha tijaabada ah ee aan xiriir laheyn ayaa lagu qaybin doonaa 6 goobood. Goobaha tijaabada ah waxay leeyihiin xiriir eber u dhexeeya dhakhtarka iyo bukaanka. Goobaha tijaabada ah ee aan xiriir laheyn waxay u oggolaanayaan tijaabooyin badan oo ammaan ah oo dhakhso badan. Goobaha tijaabada ah ee lagu soo ururiyay deegaanka ayaa beddelaya ciyaarta

English: Schools to remain open despite a surge in Covid-19 infection rates
Kiswahili: Shule zitabaki wazi licha ya ongezeko la viwango vya maambukizi ya Covid-19
Ekegusii: Chisukuru nchigenderere koigorwa nonya ebiwango biokoambokerigwa gwa Covid-19 bigendererete gokiina
Dholuo: Skunde biro siko ka oyawore kata obedo ni kwan mag tuo mar Covid-19 medore ahinya
Somali: Dugsiyada ayaa la furi doonaa inkasta oo heerarka cudurka COVID-19 ay kordheen

English: Kenya suspends all public gatherings, games, events, and church crusades; inter school games banned after first covid-19 case in Nairobi
Kiswahili: Kenya yasimamisha mikusanyiko yote ya umma, michezo, matukio, na mikutano ya kanisa; michezo ya shule imepigwa marufuku baada ya kisa cha kwanza cha COVID-19 jijini Nairobi
Ekegusii: Kenya yatenenirie emesangererekano yonsi, emechieso/chigosori, ebipindi, n’emesangererekano ye’chikanisa; chigosori chiechisukuru chiakanirwe, magega yogotoka ekesi egetang’ani gia COVID-19 ime y’omochie o Nairobi
Dholuo: Kenya ogoyo oko chokruok duto mag ji, tuke, gik matimore, kod wuoth mag kanisa; tuke mag kind skunde ogol oko bang' ng'at mokwongo moyud gi COVID-19 e Nairobi
Somali: Kenya ayaa joojisay dhammaan isu imaatinka dadweynaha, ciyaaraha, dhacdooyinka, iyo safarada iskutallaabta ee kaniisadda; Ciyaaraha iskuulada ayaa la mamnuucay kadib kiiska koowaad ee COVID-19 ee Nairobi

English: Coronavirus: A lockdown in Kenya is an option, but taxes won’t be lifted
Kiswahili: Virusi vya Korona: Kufungiwa nchini Kenya ni chaguo, lakini kodi hazitaondolewa
Ekegusii: Ebinyinyi bia Korona: Gosiekerwa nyomba ime ya ense ya Kenya n’ogochora, korende goakana ekodi tigokorusigwa.
Dholuo: Coronavirus: Geng'o ji e piny Kenya en yiero, to osuru ok bi gol
Somali: Coronavirus: Xannibaadda Kenya waa ikhtiyaar, laakiin canshuuraha lama qaadi doono

English: Governor Joho sets up sanitizing booths for pedestrians in Mombasa.
Kiswahili: Gavana Joho aweka vibanda vya usafi kwa watembea kwa miguu Mombasa.
Ekegusii: Omogabana Joho obekeire ebisa bi’obochenu ase abanto bagotara namagoro Mombasa
Dholuo: Gavana Joho ochano kuonde ma ji nyalo tiyoe gi gik ma miyo del bedo maler ne joma wuotho gi tiendgi e Mombasa.
Somali: Guddoomiye Joho wuxuu ka dhigayaa goobaha nadiifinta dadka socotada ah ee Mombasa.

English: Over 80% of patients are asymptomatic and can be treated from home. MoH has completed process of home-based care protocols. I appeal to Kenyans, that when we release the protocols and we see people coming home, there is no need for stigmatization
Kiswahili: Zaidi ya 80% ya wagonjwa hawana dalili na wanaweza kutibiwa nyumbani. Wizara ya Afya imekamilisha mchakato wa itifaki za utunzaji wa nyumbani. Ninawasihi Wakenya, kwamba tunapotoa itifaki hizo na tunaona watu wakirudi nyumbani, hakuna haja ya unyanyapaa.
Ekegusii: Abarwairengoetania 80% mbabwati biorokererio naende nabo bakorwarigwa bagende chinka. Ewizara y’Oborwari yakorire korosia amachiko y’obokonyi bwa inka. Nigo nkobasaba abakenya, ekero torarwe omoroberio oyo naende torore abanto bakoirana inka, titobachecheria.
Dholuo: Maloyo 80% mag jotuo onge gi ranyisi kendo inyalo thiedhogi e pacho. Migawo mar Weche Thieth osetieko chenro mag thieth e pacho. Akwayo jo Kenya, ni ka waweyo chike mag thieth kendo waneno ka ji duogo pacho, onge tiende mar chayo ji
Somali: In ka badan 80% bukaanka ayaa calaamado la'aan ah waxaana laga daaweyn karaa guriga. Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa dhameystirtay nidaamyada daryeelka guriga ku saleysan. Waxaan ugu baaqayaa dadka Kenya in marka aan sii dayno nidaamyada oo aan aragno dadka guriga imanaya, aysan jirin baahi loo qabo in la calaamadeeyo

English: Nairobi, Kajiado, Machakos, Kiambu & Nakuru counties are individually and collectively declared a disease infected area. There shall be a cessation of movement by road, rail, air in to & out of these areas effective midnight
Kiswahili: Kaunti za Nairobi, Kajiado, Machakos, Kiambu na Nakuru zimetangazwa kuwa eneo lililoathiriwa na magonjwa moja moja na kwa pamoja. Kutakuwa na kusimamishwa kwa usafiri kwa barabara, reli, hewa kuingia na kutoka katika maeneo haya kuanzia saa sita usiku.
Ekegusii: Chikaunti chia Nairobi, Kajiado, Machakos na Nakuru chiatangasirwe koba chinsemo ase amarwaire akwambokera mono. Ogotenenigwa gw’okoira gwa para, egari yomorero, chindege gwatenenigwe gochakera chinsa isano na emo chia botuko.
Dholuo: Kaunti mag Nairobi, Kajiado, Machakos, Kiambu kod Nakuru, ka ng'ato ka ng'ato kuomgi, kod ka gin kanyachiel, oseyudo ni gin kuonde ma tuwono landoree. Dhano ok nyal wuotho e nderni, e gach reru, kata e ndege ka gidonjo kata ka gia e alworago chakre sa auchiel otieno
Somali: Gobollada Nairobi, Kajiado, Machakos, Kiambu & Nakuru ayaa si gaar ah iyo si wadajir ah loogu dhawaaqay inay yihiin aagag cudurku ku dhacay.

English: Uganda declares Ebola outbreak after the Health Ministry confirmed a 24-year-old man showed symptoms and later died
Kiswahili: Uganda yatangaza mlipuko wa Ebola baada ya Wizara ya Afya kuthibitisha kuwa mwanaume wa miaka 24 alionyesha dalili na baadaye akafariki
Ekegusii: Uganda yatangasire egiateko kioborwaire bwa Ebola, ekero Ewizara y’Oborwaria yaenegeti omosacha bwemiaka 24 kabwate ebimanyererio bioborwaire obwo magega yaye agakwa.
Dholuo: Uganda wacho ni Ebola osewuok bang' ka Ministri mar Thieth ne oseyie ni jal moro ma jahigini 24 ne nigi ranyisi mag tuwono to bang'e ne otho.
Somali: Uganda ayaa ku dhawaaqday cudurka Ebola kadib markii Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ay xaqiijisay in nin 24 jir ah uu muujiyay calaamado kadibna uu geeriyooday

English: Tiaty worst hit with 40% of residents affected. 2 people lost their lives last month due to Malaria. Govt distributing long-lasting treated mosquito nets
Kiswahili: Tiaty imeathiriwa zaidi na 40% ya wakazi walioathiriwa. Watu 2 walipoteza maisha yao mwezi uliopita kutokana na Malaria. Serikali yasambaza vyandarua vilivyotibiwa kwa muda mrefu
Ekegusii: Tiaty yanyorire egesusuro ekenene ase 40% ya abamenyi baye koambokerigwa. Abanto 2 basiririe amagima abo goetera oborwaire bw’Esosera. Eserekali nkoenana ere chineti chirwariri.
Dholuo: Tiaty ema ne ohinyore moloyo gi pasent 40 mar joma odak kanyo. Ji ariyo ne otho dwe mokalo nikech malaria. Sirkal pogo net mag kwiri ma tiyo kuom ndalo mang'eny
Somali: Tiaty ayaa ah tii ugu daran ee ay saameysay 40% dadka deggan. Laba qof ayaa ku dhintay bishii la soo dhaafay sababtoo ah Malaria. Dowladda ayaa qeybinaysa shabagyada cayayaanka ee muddo dheer lagu daaweeyey

English: War on malaria gets a major boost. New drug Argesun deployed in Nyanza. Drug to help ICU patients, children with Malaria
Kiswahili: Vita dhidi ya malaria vyaongezeka sana. Dawa mpya ya Argesun yatumika Nyanza. Dawa ya kuwasaidia wagonjwa wa ICU, watoto wenye Malaria
Ekegusii: Esegi yokobua Malaria yamentekanire. Eriogo rigeni ria Argesun riatumekire Nyanza. Eriogo riogokonya abarwaire bare ICU, abana babwate Malaria.
Dholuo: Lweny mar kedo gi malaria medo nya ahinya. Yath manyien miluongo ni Argesun ne ochak tiyo Nyanza. Yath mar konyo jotuo man e ICU, nyithindo man kod malaria
Somali: Dagaalka ka dhanka ah duumada ayaa sii xoogeysanaya. Dawada cusub ee Argesun ayaa lagu isticmaalay Nyanza. Daawadu waxay caawin doontaa bukaanada ku jira qaybta daryeelka degdega ah, carruurta qaba Duumada

English: Govt kicks of distribution of mosquito nets. Govt aims at distributing 15.3M treated nets
Kiswahili: Serikali yazindua usambazaji wa vyandarua. Serikali inalenga kusambaza vyandarua milioni 15.3 vilivyotibiwa
Ekegusii: Eserekali yang’eire koenana chineti. Eserekali nigo erengete koenana chineti chirwariri 15.3M
Dholuo: Sirkal chako pogo net mag kwiri. Sirkal dwaro ni opog ne ji net milion 15.3 mosetigo
Somali: Dowladda waxay bilaabaneysaa qaybinta shabagyada cayayaanka. Dowladda waxay higsaneysaa in loo qaybiyo 15.3M shabagyada la daaweeyey

English: Health officials deploy drones to combat malaria in Busia County
Kiswahili: Maafisa wa afya watuma ndege zisizo na rubani kupambana na malaria katika Kaunti ya Busia
Ekegusii: Aboobisa ba Afya/Oborwaria batumekire chindege erio korwania Malaria ase ekaunti ya Busia
Dholuo: Jotelo mag thieth tiyo gi drones e kedo gi malaria e Kaunti mar Busia
Somali: Saraakiisha Caafimaadka ayaa diyaaradaha aan duuliyaha laheyn u adeegsanaya inay la dagaallamaan Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Busia County

English: Kenya among 12 African countries to get 18 million doses of malaria vaccine by 2025, WHO says priority will go to countries with the greatest need.
Kiswahili: Kenya miongoni mwa nchi 12 za Afrika kupata dozi milioni 18 za chanjo ya malaria ifikapo mwaka 2025, WHO inasema kipaumbele kitaelekezwa kwa nchi zenye uhitaji mkubwa zaidi.
Ekegusii: Kenya nigo ere gati ye’chinse 12 chia Afrika chiranyore chodosi chomilioni 18 chia chanjo ya Malaria goikera omwaka o 2025, WHI nigo egoteba egotang’ana koa chinse chiria chibwate okogania okonene.
Dholuo: Kenya en achiel kuom pinje 12 mag Afrika ma biro yudo doje milion 18 mag yadh malaria e higa mar 2025, WHO wacho ni ibiro keto mokwongo pinje ma dwaro yadhno ahinya.
Somali: Kenya ayaa ka mid ah 12 dal oo Afrikaan ah oo heli doona 18 milyan oo qiyaasood oo tallaal ah oo ka mid ah tallaalka malaria marka la gaaro 2025, WHO waxay sheegtay in mudnaanta loo siin doono dalalka ugu baahan.

English: Malaria vaccine advisory: More children in malaria endemic counties to be vaccinated. WHO has given an approval for expanded use of the vaccine. 275,000 children partially jabbed, 45,000 are fully vaccinated. Data shows the number of malaria cases has gone down
Kiswahili: Ushauri wa chanjo ya malaria: Watoto zaidi katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na malaria watachanjwa. WHO imetoa idhini ya matumizi ya chanjo hiyo kwa upana zaidi. Watoto 275,000 wachapwa sehemu, 45,000 wamechanjwa kikamilifu. Data inaonyesha idadi ya visa vya malaria imepungua
Ekegusii: Obosemia bwa esindani ya Malaria: Abana abange ase chikaunti chikunire na malaria mbanyore esindani. WHO yaetirie ogotumeka mono gwesindani eyuo. Abana 275,000 babetirwe ake, 45,000 babetirwe yonsi. Data yaorokirie ing’a malaria yakeire.
Dholuo: Giko mar chanjo mar malaria: Nyithindo mang'eny e gwenge ma malaria opong'o ibiro chanjo. WHO osechiwo thuolo mar tiyo gi chanjo mar Corona e okang' momedore. Nyithindo 275,000 osemi chanjo mar Corona e okang' matin, kendo nyithindo 45,000 osemi chanjo mar Corona chuth. Nonro nyiso ni kwan mar joma nigi malaria osedok chien
Somali: Talo-bixinta tallaalka Malaria: Caruur badan oo ku nool degmooyinka dalalka dalalka kala duwan ayaa la tallaali doonaa. WHO ayaa ogolaatay in la ballaariyo isticmaalka tallaalka. 275,000 oo caruur ah ayaa qayb ahaan la tallaalay, 45,000 oo caruur ah ayaa si buuxda loo tallaalay. Xogta ayaa muujineysa in tirada kiisaska malaria ay hoos u dhacday

English: We encourage people to seek treatment at health care facilities once they experience any symptoms.  When you seek treatment early, you protect yourself against severe malaria.
Kiswahili: Tunawahimiza watu kutafuta matibabu katika vituo vya afya mara tu wanapopata dalili zozote. Unapotafuta matibabu mapema, unajikinga dhidi ya malaria kali.
Ekegusii: Nigo tokobaa omoyo abanto bachi kirigia oborwari ase chinyagitari nsa chinde chionsi bagotwara ebimanyererio binde bionsi. Ekero okorigia oborwari mapema, nigo ogwetanga konyora esosera embe.
Dholuo: Wajiwo ji mondo omany thieth e kuonde thieth mapiyo bang' fwenyo ni gin gi ranyisi mag tuwono. Ka ichako yudo thieth chon, inyalo geng'o malaria.
Somali: Waxaan dadka ku dhiirigelinaynaa inay daryeel caafimaad ka raadsadaan marka ay soo muuqdaan calaamado.

English: The Ministry of Health aims to scale the uptake of the malaria vaccine among children aged between 6 months to 14 years.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya inalenga kuongeza idadi ya watoto wanaotumia chanjo ya malaria miongoni mwa watoto wenye umri kati ya miezi 6 hadi miaka 14.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya Afya yarigiri komenta enamba ya abana bagotumia esindani y’Esosera/malaria ime ya abana bare emetienyi 6 goika emiaka 14.
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth dwaro ni mondo ji omed yudo chanjo mar malaria e kind nyithindo ma hikgi nie kind dweche 6 nyaka 14.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay higsaneysaa in la ballaariyo qaadashada tallaalka malaria ee carruurta da'doodu u dhaxayso 6 bilood illaa 14 sano.

English: MoH dispatches 10 Cuban experts to Kakamega, Siaya, Kisumu, Bungoma, Busia, Vihiga, Homa Bay and Migori counties in the fight against malaria with biological methods.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya yatuma wataalamu 10 wa Cuba katika kaunti za Kakamega, Siaya, Kisumu, Bungoma, Busia, Vihiga, Homa Bay na Migori katika mapambano dhidi ya malaria kwa njia za kibiolojia.
Ekegusii: MOH yatomire abaataalamu 10 ba Cuba gochi chikaunti chia Kakamega, Siaya, Kisumu, Bungoma, Busia, Vihiga, Homabay na Migori ase esegi yogokora Esosera ase ogotumia chinchera chia kibayolojia.
Dholuo: Migawo mar Thieth oro josomo 10 mag Cuba e gwenge mag Kakamega, Siaya, Kisumu, Bungoma, Busia, Vihiga, Homa Bay kod Migori e kedo gi malaria ka gitiyo gi yore mag thieth.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa 10 khabiir oo reer Cuba ah u dirtay degmooyinka Kakamega, Siaya, Kisumu, Bungoma, Busia, Vihiga, Homa Bay iyo Migori si ay ula dagaallamaan bakteeriyada iyadoo la adeegsanayo hababka noolaha.

English: Happy World Malaria Day! Here’s to raising awareness, protecting our communities, and pushing closer to a world free from malaria.
Kiswahili: Heri ya Siku ya Malaria Duniani! Hapa ni kwa ajili ya kuongeza uelewa, kulinda jamii zetu, na kusukuma karibu na ulimwengu usio na malaria.
Ekegusii: Rituko rigiya ria Malaria ase Ense! Igaa n’ase eng’encho yokomenta obomanyi, korenda ebisaku biaito, na gosuguma gochia ase ense ebwate obosibore korwa ase Malaria.
Dholuo: Moruru Nikech Odiechieng Maler mar Piny Mangima! Wagoyo erokamano ne ji duto kuom ng'eyo, rito ogandawa, kendo medo jiwo piny maonge malaria.
Somali: Maalinta Duumada Adduunka ee Farxada leh! Tani waa in aan kor u qaadno wacyiga, ilaalinta bulshooyinkayada, oo aan ugu dhowaanno adduunka iyada oo la adeegsanayo Duumada.

English:
Did you know the Kenya Red Cross Society offers free on-call counselling services 24/7? Call us on 1199 and we will be there for you.

Since January-June 2019, our Mental Health and Psychosocial Support Services team attended to 513 calls.
Kiswahili:
Je, unajua kwamba Chama cha Msalaba Mwekundu cha Kenya kinatoa huduma za ushauri nasaha bila malipo masaa 24 kwa siku, siku 7 kwa wiki? Tupigie simu kwa 1199 nasi tutakuwepo kwa ajili yako.

Tangu Januari-Juni 2019, timu yetu ya Huduma za Afya ya Akili na Usaidizi wa Kisaikolojia ilihudhuria simu 513.
Ekegusii:
Inee, nomanyete ing’a Kenya Red Cross Society mbabwate obosemia bwa bosa goetera esimi 24/7? Toakere esimi ase 1199 nao tore ase eng’encho yao.
 
 Koru Januari-Juni 2019, chitimu chiaito chia Afya y’obongo amo na Obokonyi bwa kisaikolojia nchiabwatire chisimi 513
Dholuo:
Be ing'eyo ni Kenya Red Cross Society chiwo kony maonge chudo odiechieng' gotieno? Wuo kodwa e namba 1199 mondo wakonyi.

Chakre Januar-Juni 2019, riwruok marwa mar Mental Health and Psychosocial Support Services ne orwako luong 513.
Somali: Ma ogtahay in Kenya Red Cross Society ay bixiso adeegyo la-talin ah oo bilaash ah 24/7? Nala soo wac 1199 waxaanan kuu caawin doonnaa. Tan iyo Janaayo-Juun 2019, kooxdeena Adeegyada Taageerada Caafimaadka Maskaxda iyo Caafimaadka Maskaxda waxay ka qeyb galeen 513 wicitaan.

English: When we open up and talk about what is affecting our mental health, those issues become bearable. They become less distressing, less overwhelming and less worrying. Reach out to us on 1199 and we will be there for you.
Kiswahili: Tunapofungua na kuzungumzia kinachoathiri afya yetu ya akili, masuala hayo yanakuwa rahisi kuyavumilia. Yanakuwa hayana usumbufu mwingi, hayalemei sana na hayana wasiwasi mwingi. Wasiliana nasi kwa 1199 nasi tutakuwepo kwa ajili yako.
Ekegusii:
Ekero tokoigoka twakwana igoro y’ebinto bigochanga afya y’amongo aito, ching’ana echi nigo chikogusua. Nigo chigotiga goichania, tichiri koritoa naende tichirigotwara omoichano omonge.
 KWana n aintwe ase 1199 naintwe ntweariganie ase eng’encho yao.
Dholuo: Sama wawuoyo ayanga kuom gima chando pachwa, wanyalo nyagore gi chandruogego e yo maber. Chandruogego bedo matin, ok gibed madongo ahinya, kendo ok gibed gi parruok mang'eny. Tudri kodwa e 1199 mondo wayud konyruok.
Somali: Marka aan furno oo aan ka wada hadalno waxa saameynaya caafimaadka maskaxdeena, arrimahan waxay noqdaan kuwo la dulqaadan karo. Waxay noqdaan kuwo ka yar dhibta, ka yar dhib iyo ka yar welwel. Nala soo xiriir lambarka 1199 waxaanan kuu caawin doonnaa.

English: Connect with others and be part of positive relationships.Building positive associations with people is good for your mental well-being
Kiswahili: Ungana na wengine na uwe sehemu ya mahusiano chanya. Kujenga mahusiano chanya na watu ni jambo zuri kwa ustawi wako wa akili.
Ekegusii: Umerana n’abande erio obe ensemo y’obogisanio obuya. Okoagacha obogisangio obuya n’abanto nigo kore okuya ase afya yao y’obongo.
Dholuo: Bed gi winjruok maber gi jomoko. Bedo gi osiepe mabeyo nyalo konyi mondo ibed gi paro mowinjore
Somali: La xiriir dadka kale oo qayb ka noqo xiriirka wanaagsan. Xiriirka wanaagsan ee aad la yeelato dadka ayaa faa'iido u leh caafimaadkaaga maskaxda

English: Its not unmanly to struggle.Check on the men in your life.
Kiswahili: Si jambo la kiume kujitahidi. Waangalie wanaume katika maisha yako.
Ekegusii: Tiriri ing’ana ria kebosacha gochandeka. Barigererie abasacha bare ase obogima bwao.
Dholuo: Ok en gima nyiso achaya ka ng'ato kedo. Non ane chwo ma in - go.
Somali: Ma aha wax aan ragga ahayn in la dagaallamo. Fiiri ragga noloshaada ku jira.

English: Definitition of schizophrenia,causes,symptoms,diagnostic tools and treatment.
Kiswahili: Ufafanuzi wa skizofrenia, sababu, dalili, vifaa vya uchunguzi na matibabu.
Ekegusii: Eng’encho ya skizofrenia, egekorenta, ebimanyererio, ebifaa biokorenga amo na oborwaria.
Dholuo: Tiend schizophrenia, gik makelo, ranyisi mag tuono, yore mag fwenyo tuo kod thieth.
Somali: Qeexida cudurka 'schizophrenia', sababaha, calaamadaha, qalabka cudurka iyo daaweynta.

English: Definitition of bipolar,causes,symptoms,diagnostic tools and treatment.
Kiswahili: Ufafanuzi wa bipolar, sababu, dalili, vifaa vya uchunguzi na matibabu.
Ekegusii: Eng’encho ya bipolar, ebimanyererio, ebifaa biokorenga amo na oborwaria.
Dholuo: Tiyo gi yore mag pimo tuwo mar bipolar, gik ma kelo tuwono, ranyisi mag tuwono, yore mag thiedho tuwono kod kaka inyalo thiedhe.
Somali: Qeexida cudurka 'bipolar', sababaha, calaamadaha, qalabka baaritaanka iyo daaweynta.

English: Indicators of stress:easily irritable,anxious,panic attacks,sleeping problems,social withdrawal,irritability
Kiswahili: Viashiria vya msongo wa mawazo: kukasirika kwa urahisi, wasiwasi, mashambulizi ya hofu, matatizo ya usingizi, kujitenga na watu, kuwashwa
Ekegusii: Ebiorokererio bi’ebirengererio: okokgechigwa bwango, enda egotera amache, chimbaa/obwoba, obokong’u korara, gweatanana na abande, okoromwa.
Dholuo: Gik manyiso ni ng'ato nigi parruok: ich wang' mayot, parruok, luoro, chandruok e nindo, bedo kar kende, bedo gi mirima
Somali: Calaamadaha stress:si fudud u kacsan, walaac,bararka cabsida, dhibaatooyinka hurdada,qaboojinta bulshada,qaboojinta

English: Techniques like deep breathing,walking or time outdoors are universal tools for managing daily stressors.
Kiswahili: Mbinu kama vile kupumua kwa kina, kutembea au kutumia muda nje ni zana zinazotumika kwa wote katika kudhibiti msongo wa mawazo wa kila siku.
Ekegusii: Chingencho buna koeyana mono, gotara gose kobuta isiko n’ebikoreri biogotenenera ebirengererio bia kera rituko.
Dholuo: Yore kaka yueyo matut, wuotho, kata bedo oko, gin yore ma ji duto tiyogo e loyo parruok ma pile.
Somali: Farsamooyinka sida neefsashada qoto dheer, socodka ama waqtiga banaanka waa qalab caalami ah oo lagu maareeyo walxaha cadaadiska ah ee maalinlaha ah.

English: Mental health conditions like depression can lead to physical symptoms such as fatigue and illness, highlighting the strong mind-body connection
Kiswahili: Hali za afya ya akili kama vile mfadhaiko zinaweza kusababisha dalili za kimwili kama vile uchovu na ugonjwa, na hivyo kuonyesha uhusiano mkubwa kati ya akili na mwili.
Ekegusii: Ebiorokererio bia Afya y’obongo buna ebirengererio nabo bikorenta ebimanyererio bia kemobere buna omoroso na oborwaire, na igo kworokia okobwatana gati ya obongo na omobere.
Dholuo: Tuwo mag paro kaka parruok nyalo kelo tuoche mag del kaka olo kod tuoche, ka mano nyiso tudruok motegno mantie e kind paro kod del
Somali: Xaaladaha caafimaadka maskaxda sida niyadjabku waxay keeni karaan calaamado jireed sida daal iyo cudur, taas oo muujineysa xiriirka xooggan ee maskaxda iyo jirka

English: This World Mental Health Day, lets prioritize mental well-being at work! A supportive environment is key to a healthy workplace. Check in on your colleagues today!
Kiswahili: Siku hii ya Afya ya Akili Duniani, hebu tuweke kipaumbele ustawi wa akili kazini! Mazingira yanayounga mkono ni muhimu kwa afya mahali pa kazi. Wasiliana na wenzako leo!
Ekegusii: Rituko eri ria Afya y’Obongo ase Ense, tiga totang’anie ogokina gwa kebongo ase emeremo! Amazingira amaya nigo are ay’eng’encho ase afya, ase chinsemo chiemeremo. Kwana nabamino rero!
Dholuo: E Odiechieng' mar Paro e Piny Mangima, weuru waket paro mar bedo gi ngima maber mar paro e kar tich obed motelo! Bedo gi alwora maber mar tich en gima dwarore ahinya mondo omi ji obed gi ngima maber kar tich. Tim nonro kuom jotich weteni kawuono!
Somali: Maalinta Caafimaadka Maskaxda Adduunka, aan mudnaanta siino caafimaadka maskaxda ee shaqada! Jawi taageero leh ayaa muhiim u ah goobta shaqada ee caafimaad leh. Ka fiirso asxaabtaada maanta!

English: Mental well-being is essential for a productive and healthy workplace. Prioritize mental health just as you would physical health.
Kiswahili: Ustawi wa akili ni muhimu kwa mahali pa kazi penye tija na afya. Panga afya ya akili kama vile unavyoweza kuipa kipaumbele afya ya mwili.
Ekegusii: Okoba buya kw’obongo nigo kore okw’engencho gotwara chinsemo chiemeremo chibwate okobioka na afya. Tang’ania afya y’obongo buna oratanganie eya kemobere.
Dholuo: Bedo gi paro maber en gima dwarore ahinya mondo ng'ato obed gi ngima maber e kar tich. Par ni bedo gi paro mowinjore en gima duong' ahinya mana kaka rito dendi.
Somali: Caafimaadka maskaxdu waa mid muhiim u ah goobta shaqada oo wax soo saar iyo caafimaad leh.

English: Talking about mental health breaks the stigma and helps others open up. Lets create a supportive environment for all.
Kiswahili: Kuzungumzia afya ya akili huvunja unyanyapaa na kuwasaidia wengine kufunguka. Tujenge mazingira ya usaidizi kwa wote.
Ekegusii: Gokwanera igoro ya afya y’obongo nigo kogokonya gosaria obochayi na gokonya abande gosiboka. Tiga toagache amazingira y’obokonyi ase bonsi.
Dholuo: Wuoyo e wi tuoche mag paro ketho wichkuot kendo konyo jomoko mondo owach gima nie chunygi. Weuru mondo walos kamoro maber ma ji duto nyalo dakie.
Somali: Ka hadalka caafimaadka dhimirka ayaa burburinaya cayayaanka wuxuuna ka caawiyaa dadka kale inay furaan. Aan abuurnay jawi taageero u leh qof walba.

English: Government distributes mosquito nets in malaria fight. Kilifi County is one of the beneficiaries. Nets program was flagged over procurement irregularities. MOH wants to distribute 15M nets in 22 counties
Kiswahili: Serikali yasambaza vyandarua katika mapambano dhidi ya malaria. Kaunti ya Kilifi ni mojawapo ya wanufaika. Programu ya vyandarua iliangaziwa kwa ukiukwaji wa sheria za ununuzi. Wizara ya Afya inataka kusambaza vyandarua milioni 15 katika kaunti 22
Ekegusii: Eserekali yaenanire chineti as esegi ya Malaria. Ekaunti ya Kilifi neyemo yabo ase chiria chigochi konyora. Omoroberio bwe’chineti nigo oetwe oborabu igoro ya ogotabwati amachiko y’ogochigora. Ewizara ya Afya nigo etagete koenana chineti milioni 15 ase chikaunti 22
Dholuo: Sirkal pogo net mag kwiri e kedo gi malaria. Kaunti mar Kilifi en achiel kuom joma yudo kony. Chenro mar Nets ne oket e bwo chik nikech gik ma ok kare ma ne timore e chenro mag ng'iewo. MOH dwaro pogo net 15M e counties 22
Somali: Xukuumadu waxay qaybiso shabagyada cayayaanka ee la dagaalanka cudurka malaria. Gobolka Kilifi waa mid ka mid ah dadka ka faa'iideystay. Barnaamijka shabagyada waxaa lagu calaamadeeyay khaladaadka iibsiga. Wasaaradda caafimaadka ayaa dooneysa in 15M shabagyada lagu qaybiyo 22 gobol

English: Kenya confirms 12 more COVID-19 cases bringing total number to 246. Health CS Mutahi Kagwe says 5 of them are hotel workers.
Kiswahili: Kenya yathibitisha visa 12 zaidi vya COVID-19 na kufanya jumla ya idadi kufikia 246. Waziri wa Afya Mutahi Kagwe anasema 5 kati yao ni wafanyakazi wa hoteli.
Ekegusii:
Kenya koenekia okomentekana Kwa abwarwaire 12 bande ba COVID-19, bonsi ase oboamo goika 246 .
 Omoteneneri Bwa obochenu agoteba buna batano ase ana,nawakori egasi ba omobogani/hoteli.
Dholuo: Kenya nyiso ni nitie ji 12 kendo ma nigi COVID-19 mamiyo kwan duto mar jogo omedore nyaka 246. Jatend migao mar thieth miluongo ni Mutahi Kagwe wacho ni abich kuomgi gin jotich ma otel.
Somali: Kenya ayaa xaqiijisay 12 kiis oo kale oo COVID-19 ah, taasoo wadarta tirada ay gaartay 246. CS Caafimaadka Mutahi Kagwe ayaa sheegay in 5 ka mid ah ay yihiin shaqaale hoteel ah.

English: Over the last 24 hours we have tested over 300 Kenyans, out of those 22 have tested positive for covid-19 (13-males, 9-females). 21 out of the 22 cases are people who are currently in quarantine
Kiswahili: Katika saa 24 zilizopita tumewapima Wakenya zaidi ya 300, kati ya hao 22 wamepimwa na kukutwa na virusi vya covid-19 (wanaume 13, wanawake 9). Visa 21 kati ya 22 ni watu ambao kwa sasa wako karantini.
Ekegusii:
Ase chinsa 24 chiaetire, twarengire abakenya goetania 300, ase abwo, abanto 22 baenekigwe gotwara COVID -19 (13-abasacha, 9,abasubati).
 Ase abwarwaire abwo 22,21 mbaria babekire ensemo na gotangwa gotara ase' engecho ya ogotanga kombwakera.
Dholuo: Kuom seche 24 mosekalo, wasenono jo Kenya mokalo 300, kuom jogo 22 oseyudo ni nigi tuo mar covid-19 (13- chwo, 9 mon). 21 kuom ji 22 ma nigi tuono gin joma sani ni e kar kendgi.
Somali: 24kii saac ee la soo dhaafay waxaan tijaabinay in ka badan 300 oo reer Kenya ah, kuwaas oo 22 ka mid ah ay u baareen COVID-19 (13 lab, 9 dumar). 21 ka mid ah 22 kiis ayaa ah dadka hadda ku jira karantiil

English: Religious leaders under World Council of Churches urge governments and donor countries to increase Global Fund support, to aid sustainable responses to HIV, tuberculosis, and malaria.
Kiswahili: Viongozi wa kidini chini ya Baraza la Makanisa Duniani wanahimiza serikali na nchi wafadhili kuongeza usaidizi wa Mfuko wa Dunia, ili kusaidia majibu endelevu kwa VVU, kifua kikuu, na malaria.
Ekegusii: Abarai be chidini nse' ya oborai bwe chikanisa ase ense engima,bakoboria chiserekari na Chinse chia okorwa obokonyi,komenta obokonyi Bwa ekegancha Kia ense erinde gondereria emeroberio ya oborwaria Bwa enyamoreo,Esese na Esosera.
Dholuo: Jotend din manie bwo riwruok mar World Council of Churches jiwo sirkande koda pinje machiwo kony mondo omed kony ma riwruok mar Global Fund chiwo, mondo okony e kedo gi AYAKI, kahera, kod malaria.
Somali: Hogaamiyaasha Diimaha ee Golaha Kaniisadaha Adduunka waxay dowladaha iyo dalalka deeqda bixiya ku boorinayaan inay kordhiyaan taageerada Hay'adda Global Fund, si ay u caawiyaan jawaab celinta joogtada ah ee HIV, cudurka hargabka, iyo makaraayada.

English: The US government’s freeze on foreign aid, especially through USAid has caused major disruptions in Kenya’s health sector, particularly in HIV, malaria, and tuberculosis programmes that heavily rely on donor support.
Kiswahili: Kusitishwa kwa misaada ya kigeni na serikali ya Marekani, hasa kupitia USAid, kumesababisha usumbufu mkubwa katika sekta ya afya ya Kenya, hasa katika programu za VVU, malaria, na kifua kikuu ambazo hutegemea sana msaada wa wafadhili.
Ekegusii: Gotenenia obokonyi gochia chinse chia isiko gw'Eserekali ya America mono goetera USAID kwaretire obotutukanu ase ensemo ya obochenu ase ense ya kenya,monomono ase emeroberio ya oborwaria Bwa Enyamoreo, Esese na Esosera,eyio egosemeria ase obokonyi obwo.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar Amerka chungo kony mag pinje mamoko, to moloyo kokalo kuom USAid, osekelo chandruok maduong' e yore mag thieth e piny Kenya, to moloyo e chenro mag thieth mag AYAKI, malaria, kod kahera ma ne otenore ahinya kuom kony mar jochiwo.
Somali: Xukuumadda Maraykanka oo qaboojiyay gargaarka shisheeye, gaar ahaan iyada oo loo marayo USAid waxay sababtay dhibaatooyin waaweyn oo ku saabsan qaybta caafimaadka ee Kenya, gaar ahaan barnaamijyada HIV, malaria, iyo cudurka hargabka oo si weyn ugu tiirsan taageerada deeq bixiyeyaasha.

English: There is no local transmission of malaria in Nairobi. If you have been a full time resident of Nairobi and you get sick with fever the probability that it is malaria is close to zero.
Kiswahili: Hakuna maambukizi ya malaria jijini Nairobi. Kama umekuwa mkazi wa Nairobi kwa muda wote na unaugua homa, uwezekano kwamba ni malaria ni karibu sifuri.
Ekegusii: Koambokera kwa Esosera tikoiyo, ime ya ensemo ya Nairobi. Onye kore omomenyi o Nairobi rioka ase engaki entambe na enyarekane kwarwarire na gotwara riberera,okonyarekana gwa okoba ne Esosera tikoiyo.
Dholuo: Onge tuo mar malaria ma landore e Nairobi. Kapo ni isebedo ka idak Nairobi kuom kinde malach to tuwo mar malaria omaki, nyalo bedo ni en malaria.
Somali: Haddii aad joogtay magaalada Nairobi waqti buuxa oo aad ku xanuunsato hargabka, suurtagalnimada in ay tahay malaria waxay u dhow tahay eber.

English: Rising temperatures elevate the risk to Nairobi's malaria-free status
Kiswahili: Kuongezeka kwa joto huongeza hatari ya kutokuwepo kwa malaria jijini Nairobi
Ekegusii: Ogokina Kwa riberera,gokomenta okonyarekana Kwa Esosera gotabao ase ensemo ya Nairobi
Dholuo: Medruok mar liet miyo Nairobi bedo kama tuwo mar malaria ok yudie
Somali: Heerkulka sii kordhaya ayaa khatarta ka dhigeysa in Nairobi ay ka baxdo Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka (malaria)

English: Malaria mortality rate rises to pre-pandemic levels, WHO report shows at least 597,000 people succumbed to the disease last year.
Kiswahili: Ripoti ya WHO inaonyesha kuwa kiwango cha vifo kutokana na malaria kinaongezeka hadi viwango vya kabla ya janga, kwa mujibu wa ripoti hiyo.
Ekegusii: Eripoti koru ase WHO nigo ekoorokia buna amakweri korua ase Esosera amentekanire goetania ebirengo magega ya ogoateka . Ase nse pi abanto 597,000,mbasiretie amagima kobwatekana na Esosera omwaka oera.
Dholuo: Kwan mar joma tho nikech malaria idho malo nyaka e okang' ma ne entie kapok tuwo mar malaria ogoyo piny, ripot mar WHO nyiso ni ji ma kwan-gi ok tin ne 597,000 ne otho gi tuwono higa mokalo.
Somali: Tirada dhimashada cudurka Malaria waxay kor u kacdaa heerarka kahor cudurka faafa, warbixinta WHO waxay muujineysaa in ugu yaraan 597,000 oo qof ay u dhinteen cudurka sanadkii la soo dhaafay.

English: Mission for Essential Drugs and Supplies suspends orders for USAID-funded essential drugs, move likely to affect the distribution of HIV and malaria drugs
Kiswahili: Shirika la Misheni ya Dawa na Ugavi Muhimu lasimamisha oda za dawa muhimu zinazofadhiliwa na USAID, hatua ambayo inaweza kuathiri usambazaji wa dawa za VVU na malaria
Ekegusii: Ekeombe Kia Amariogo aria aganirie mono, gotenenia okobagwa Kwa amariogo ye eng'echo korua ase USAID, egetambokero keranyare koreta obokong'u ase okobagwa Kwa amariogo a Esosera na Enyamoreo.
Dholuo: Migawo mar Yath kod Gik Madwarore e Piny Oweyo oko kwayo mag yadh madwarore ma USAID ema chiwo, okang' manyalo kelo pek e pogo yadh AYAKI kod malaria
Somali: Howlgalka Daawooyinka Muhiimka ah iyo Alaabada ayaa joojinaya amarrada daawooyinka muhiimka ah ee USAID ay maalgeliso, tallaabo ay u badan tahay inay saameyn ku yeelato qaybinta daawooyinka HIV iyo malaria

English: Devastating flooding in South Sudan is affecting around 1.4 million people, with more than 379,000 displaced, according to a United Nations update that warned about an upsurge in malaria.
Kiswahili: Mafuriko makubwa nchini Sudan Kusini yanaathiri takriban watu milioni 1.4, huku zaidi ya watu 379,000 wakimbizi, kulingana na taarifa mpya ya Umoja wa Mataifa iliyoonya kuhusu ongezeko la malaria.
Ekegusii: Embura embe y'eora ase ense ya south Sudan yaretire obokong'u ase abanto 1.4million na goetania 379,000 baborirwe ase okomenya kobwatekana na okoraria gwa ekeombe Kia Obomo Bwa Chinse ekio kiabete kegokurera okomentekana ase Esosera.
Dholuo: Ataro mar pi e piny South Sudan, osemiyo ji madirom milion 1.4 oyudo masira, kendo ji mokalo 379,000 oseweyo miechgi, kaluwore gi nonro manyien mar Riwruok mar Pinje ma ne ochiwo siem ni malaria biro medore.
Somali: Daadad burburin ah oo ka dhacay Koonfurta Suudaan ayaa saameyn ku leh qiyaastii 1.4 milyan oo qof, iyadoo in ka badan 379,000 oo qof ay barakaceen, sida ku cad warbixinta Qaramada Midoobay oo ka digtay kororka cudurka malaria.

English: The Ministry of Health has reassured the public that there will be no shortage of essential drugs, including those for malaria, HIV/AIDS and TB for at least the next one year.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya imewahakikishia umma kwamba hakutakuwa na uhaba wa dawa muhimu, ikiwa ni pamoja na zile za malaria, VVU/UKIMWI na Kifua Kikuu kwa angalau mwaka mmoja ujao.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya Afya yabaenekeirie abakenya buna amariogo ye ng'echo takobora gose gokea amo na aya Enyamoreo na esese ase omoaka oyomo okobwatia.
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth osenyiso ji ni ok bi bedo gi nok mar yedhe madwarore ahinya, moriwo koda mago mag malaria, HIV/AIDS, kod TB, kuom higini madirom achiel mabiro.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa shacabka u xaqiijisay in aysan jirin daawooyin lagama maarmaan ah oo la heli karo, oo ay ka mid yihiin kuwa daaweynta malaria, HIV/AIDS iyo TB ugu yaraan hal sano ee soo socota.

English: Kenya to release genetically modified mosquitoes to fight malaria
Kiswahili: Kenya kutoa mbu waliobadilishwa vinasaba ili kupambana na malaria
Ekegusii: Kenya gosokia chiumbu chionchoire amanyinga/DNA chinyare korwania malaria
Dholuo: Kenya biro gonyo ochunglo molos gi kute mag ayaki mondo oked gi malaria
Somali: Kenya ayaa sii dayn doonta cayayaanka lagu beddelay genetically si looga hortago Cudurka Cudurka Maleriya

English: To lower cases of HIV/AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria, and enhance the vaccines and immunisation programme in the country, I have proposed Sh28.7bn for the Global Fund and Sh4.6bn for vaccines and immunisation programmes.
Kiswahili: Ili kupunguza visa vya VVU/UKIMWI, Kifua Kikuu na Malaria, na kuboresha mpango wa chanjo na chanjo nchini, nimependekeza Sh28.7 bilioni kwa ajili ya Mfuko wa Dunia na Sh4.6 bilioni kwa ajili ya chanjo na programu za chanjo.
Ekegusii: Gokeiyia oborwaire bwa Enyamoreo, Esese na Esosera na kogendereria emeroberio ye'chisindani chia ogotanga amarwaire aya, ase okorora kwane ndatebe, sh28.7 billion ase ekegancha gi'Ense na sh4.6bilion ase emeroberio ya chisindani chia ogotanga amarwaire.
Dholuo: Mondo odwok piny tuoche mag AYAKI/AIDS, Tuberculosis kod malaria, kendo medo chenro mag chanjo kod thieth e piny, asechiwo Sh28.7 billion ne Global Fund kod Sh4.6 billion ne chanjo kod chenro mag thieth.
Somali: Si loo yareeyo kiisaska HIV/AIDS, Tuberculosis iyo Malaria, loona xoojiyo barnaamijka tallaalka iyo tallaalka ee dalka, waxaan u soo jeediyay Sh28.7bn ee Sanduuqa Caalamiga ah iyo Sh4.6bn ee tallaalka iyo barnaamijyada tallaalka.

English: You are six times more likely to get malaria if you visit Busia, Tana River, Kakamega, Bungoma, Kilifi, Kisumu, Trans Nzoia, Elgeyo Marakwet and Nandi counties, according to the latest data from the Ministry of Health.
Kiswahili: Una uwezekano mara sita zaidi wa kupata malaria ukitembelea kaunti za Busia, Tana River, Kakamega, Bungoma, Kilifi, Kisumu, Trans Nzoia, Elgeyo Marakwet na Nandi, kulingana na data ya hivi karibuni kutoka Wizara ya Afya.
Ekegusii: Kobwatekana na eripoti ya bwango iga korua ase Ewizara ya Afya, nabo ekonyarekana mara gatano na rimo aye korwara malaria ,koratarere chikaunti chya ,Busia,Tana River,Kakamega,Bungoma,Kilifi, Kisumu,Trans Nzoia,Elgeyo Marakwet na Nandi.
Dholuo: Kaluwore gi weche ma nyocha owuok e Migawo mar Weche Thieth, inyalo yudo malaria nyadi auchiel ka idhi e gwenge mag Busia, Tana River, Kakamega, Bungoma, Kilifi, Kisumu, Trans Nzoia, Elgeyo Marakwet kod Nandi.
Somali: Haddii aad booqato degmooyinka Busia, Tana River, Kakamega, Bungoma, Kilifi, Kisumu, Trans Nzoia, Elgeyo Marakwet iyo Nandi, waxaad lix jeer u badan tahay inaad qabato makaraayada, sida ku cad xogta ugu dambeysa ee Wasaaradda Caafimaadka.

English: Scientists have found that a mosquito species blamed for malaria transmission in eastern and southern Africa has developed resistance to a long-used insecticide in the region.
Kiswahili: Wanasayansi wamegundua kwamba aina ya mbu inayolaumiwa kwa maambukizi ya malaria mashariki na kusini mwa Afrika imekua na upinzani dhidi ya dawa ya kuua wadudu ambayo imekuwa ikitumika kwa muda mrefu katika eneo hilo.
Ekegusii: Abanasayansi banyorire ng'a eumbu ekoambokeria Esosera Africa ya mocha na irianyi, yatwarire okonara na korwania eriogo ria ogoita chiumbu erio riatumekire ase engaki entambe ase chinsemo echio.
Dholuo: Josayans osefwenyo ni nitie kit kute moko ma miyo ji yudo malaria e pinje mag Afrika ma ugwe kod ma milambo, to sani gisenyagore gi yedhe mag nego kute ma nosebedo ka itiyogo e alworano kuom higini mang'eny.
Somali: Cilmi-baadhayaashu waxay ogaadeen in nooc ka mid ah cayayaanka lagu eedeeyay in ay keenaan cudurka maleriya ee bariga iyo koonfurta Afrika uu ka hortagay cayayaanka muddo dheer loo isticmaalo gobolkaas.

English: Malaria's gendered burden: Recent floods heighten risk for women, girls
Kiswahili: Mzigo wa Malaria kwa jinsia: Mafuriko ya hivi karibuni yaongeza hatari kwa wanawake na wasichana
Ekegusii:
Omosigo Bwa Esosera ase abakungu/abasacha:
 Embura enyinge nigo ekomenta okonyarekana Kwa obobe gokorekana ase abasubati na chinyaroka
Dholuo: Pek mar malaria kaluwore gi chwo gi mon: Ataro ma nyocha otimore medo hinyruok ne mon kod nyiri
Somali: Culayska jinsiga ee Duumada: fatahaadihii dhawaa waxay kordhiyaan khatarta haweenka iyo gabdhaha

English: The Health Ministry also said the 2023/2024 mass net distribution campaign was launched in Homa Bay County on November 15, 2023, with 830,862 nets distributed, covering 91 percent of registered households.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya pia ilisema kampeni ya usambazaji wa vyandarua kwa wingi ya 2023/2024 ilizinduliwa katika Kaunti ya Homa Bay mnamo Novemba 15, 2023, huku vyandarua 830,862 vikisambazwa, vikijumuisha asilimia 91 ya kaya zilizosajiliwa.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu nigo yateba ,omoroberio Bwa okoenana chineti ase obonge nigo ochagetwe ase ekaunti ya Homabay chitariki 15, November 2023, na chineti kobagwa goika 830,862, igo goikerania ekerengo Kia 91% ase chinyomba chiarigetwe.
Dholuo: Migawo mar thieth bende ne owacho ni kampen mar chiwo net e okang' malach mar 2023/2024 ne ochaki e Homa Bay County e Novemba 15, 2023, ka ne opog net 830,862, ma ne oriwo pasent 91 mag udi ma ne osendik.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa sidoo kale sheegtay in ololaha qaybinta shabakadda 2023/2024 lagu bilaabay degmada Homa Bay 15-kii Nofeembar, 2023, iyadoo 830,862 shabakadood la qaybiyay, oo daboolaya 91 boqolkiiba qoysaska diiwaangashan.

English: Communities in Baringo fight back against malaria with local solutions and mosquito nets
Kiswahili: Jamii huko Baringo zinapambana na malaria kwa kutumia suluhisho za kienyeji na vyandarua
Ekegusii: Ebinyoro ime ya Baringo korwania oborwaire bwa Esosera ase ogotumia ching'encho chiabo amo na chineti.
Dholuo: Joma odak e gwenge mag Baringo kedo gi malaria ka gitiyo gi yore mag geng'o kute mag ayaki
Somali: Bulshooyinka ku nool Baringo ayaa la dagaallamaya duumada iyagoo isticmaalaya xalal maxalli ah iyo maro kaneeco

English: A malaria vaccine tested in Kenya gains WHO prequalification, costing as low as Sh300, becoming the world's second vaccine on the global prequalified list.
Kiswahili: Chanjo ya malaria iliyojaribiwa nchini Kenya yapata sifa ya awali ya WHO, ikigharimu hadi Sh300, na kuwa chanjo ya pili duniani kwenye orodha ya chanjo zilizoidhinishwa awali duniani.
Ekegusii: Eriogo ria esindani y'ogotanga Esosera, riabeire rigotemwa ase Ense ya Kenya rianyarire goancherwa na goetigwa ase ekerengo egetang'ani na WHO. Nigo rikoonigwa sh.300, naende riabeire esindani ya kabere ase amariogo aria aetirigwe ase ekerengo ekio .
Dholuo: Yath mar malaria ma ne otem e piny Kenya ne oyudo mar WHO, ma nengone ne ni piny mar Sh300, kendo mano ne omiyo obedo yath mar ariyo e piny mangima e list mar yadhno ma ne otem.
Somali: Tallaalka duumada ee lagu tijaabiyey Kenya ayaa helay shahaadada WHO, qiimihiisu wuxuu gaadhay Sh300, taasoo ka dhigaysa tallaalka labaad ee adduunka ee ku jira liiska caalamiga ah ee shahaadada.

English: Global Fund, through the Kenya Medical Supplies Agency, is distributing mosquito nets in malaria-endemic regions across the country
Kiswahili: Mfuko wa Kimataifa, kupitia Shirika la Ugavi wa Dawa la Kenya, unasambaza vyandarua vya mbu katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na malaria kote nchini.
Ekegusii: Ekegancha gi'ense, goetera ase ekampuni y'okobaga amariogo amo na ebinto ao ao bi'oborwaria, nkobagakere chineti ase chinsemo ao ao chi'Ense ya Kenya chiria chibwate Esosera kera engaki .
Dholuo: Global Fund, kokalo kuom Kenya Medical Supplies Agency, pogo net mag geng'o kute e gwenge ma malaria opong'o e pinyno
Somali: Sanduuqa Caalamiga ah, iyada oo loo marayo Hay'adda Qalabka Caafimaadka ee Kenya, ayaa qaybinaya shabagyada cayayaanka ee gobollada dalalka oo dhan ee ay ku jirto malaria

English: Malaria mortality has fallen back to levels seen before the Covid-19 crisis, the WHO said Wednesday, but called for faster progress against the disease that killed nearly some 597,000 people last year.
Kiswahili: Vifo vya malaria vimeshuka hadi viwango vilivyoonekana kabla ya janga la Covid-19, WHO ilisema Jumatano, lakini ilitaka maendeleo ya haraka dhidi ya ugonjwa huo ulioua karibu watu 597,000 mwaka jana.
Ekegusii: Ogosiri obogima goetera ase oborwaire bw'Esosera gwakeire goikera ekerengo kiarenge nyuma ya Ogoateka gwa COVID-19, WHO yatebete rituko ria tichi gatato, korende gekagania amagenderero abwango korwania endwari eye, yagerete abanto 597,000 gosiria amagima abo,omwaka oera.
Dholuo: Kwan mar joma tho nikech malaria osedok chien nyaka e okang' ma ne entie kapok masira mar Covid-19 ochakore, mana kaka WHO nowacho chieng' Tich Adek, kata kamano, ne gikwayo mondo otim dongruok mapiyo e kedo gi tuwo ma ne onego chiegni ji 597,000 higa mokalo.
Somali: Dhimashadu waxay dib ugu dhacday heerarka la arkay kahor dhibaatada COVID-19, WHO waxay sheegtay Arbacadii, laakiin waxay ku baaqday horumar degdeg ah oo ka dhan ah cudurka oo ku dhintay ku dhowaad 597,000 oo qof sanadkii hore.

English: 10.9m treated mosquito nets to be distributed across 22 counties in fight against Malaria
Kiswahili: Vyandarua milioni 10.9 vilivyotibiwa vitasambazwa katika kaunti 22 ili kupambana na Malaria
Ekegusii: Chineti chie'chiumbu 10.9m chibekire eriogo ,kobagwa ase chikaunti 22 ase esegi ya okorwania Esosera.
Dholuo: Net mag kweth mag kute ma osetigo ma romo milion 10.9 ibiro pog e gwenge 22 e kedo gi malaria
Somali: 10.9 milyan oo shabagyada cayayaanka lagu daaweeyey ayaa lagu qaybin doonaa 22 degmo si looga hortago Cudurka Cudurka Cudurka (Malaria)

English: Kenya signs six Global Fund grants amounting to Sh59.7 billion to support HIV, TB and malaria interventions; funding to strengthen health and community systems over three years.
Kiswahili: Kenya yasaini ruzuku sita za Mfuko wa Kimataifa zenye thamani ya Sh59.7 bilioni kusaidia uingiliaji kati wa VVU, Kifua Kikuu na malaria; ufadhili wa kuimarisha mifumo ya afya na jamii kwa miaka mitatu.
Ekegusii: Kenya kobeka eseii obokonyi bwa chibilioni sh.59.7 korua ase ekegancha gi'ense'/Global Fund, echio chigokonya gosira emeroberio ya oborwaria Bwa Enyamoreo Esese na Esosera, ogoakana oko nigo kogokong'ia oborwaria naboigo chitini chiebisaku ase emiaka etato
Dholuo: Kenya oketo sei e chiwo mar pesa mar Global Fund maromo Sh59.7 billion mar siro yore mag thieth mag HIV, TB kod malaria; chiwo pesa mar tego yore mag thieth kod mag oganda kuom higni adek.
Somali: Kenya waxay saxiixday lix deeq oo ka timid Sanduuqa Caalamiga ah oo dhan Sh59.7 bilyan si ay u taageerto talaabooyinka HIV, TB iyo malaria; maalgelinta si loo xoojiyo nidaamyada caafimaadka iyo bulshada muddo saddex sano ah.

English: World Malaria Day: Kenya Joins the World in Commemorating Malaria Day.
Kiswahili: Siku ya Malaria Duniani: Kenya Yaungana na Dunia Kuadhimisha Siku ya Malaria.
Ekegusii: Rituko ria Esosera ase Ense: Kenya kobwatekana na ense engima ase okoarigania na gochengera rituko ria Esosera ria Ense .
Dholuo: Odiechieng Maleria e Piny: Kenya Riwore gi Piny e Paro Odiechieng Maleria.
Somali: Maalinta Caalamiga ah ee Cudurka Cudurka Malaria: Kenya ayaa ku biirtay maalinta caalamiga ah ee Cudurka Malaria.

English: There is a silver lining in the fight against malaria after Kenya was listed alongside 12 other African countries set to receive 18 million doses of the first-ever malaria vaccine in the next two years
Kiswahili: Kuna mwelekeo mzuri katika vita dhidi ya malaria baada ya Kenya kuorodheshwa pamoja na nchi zingine 12 za Afrika zinazotarajiwa kupokea dozi milioni 18 za chanjo ya kwanza kabisa ya malaria katika miaka miwili ijayo.
Ekegusii: Amagenderero amaya nareo ase esegi y'okorwania Esosera kobwatia Kenya kobarwa amo na Chinse chinde 12 chia Afrika echio chirengire koegwa chidosi 18million chia esindani entang'ani ya eriogo ri'ogotanga Esosera ase emiaka ebere ekobwatia.
Dholuo: Nitie wach maber e kedo gi malaria bang' Kenya bedo achiel kuom pinje 12 mag Afrika ma biro yudo doje milion 18 mag yadh malaria mokwongo e higini ariyo mabiro.
Somali: Waxaa jirta rajo laga qabo dagaalka ka dhanka ah duumada kadib markii Kenya lagu daray 12 wadan oo kale oo Afrikaan ah kuwaas oo qorsheynayay in ay qaataan 18 milyan oo qiyaasood oo ah tallaalka duumada.

English: Counties in the northern part of Kenya are recording a high prevalence of malaria, a trend that is worrying scientists, especially with the invasion of a new species of mosquito in the country.
Kiswahili: Kaunti katika sehemu ya kaskazini mwa Kenya zinarekodi kiwango kikubwa cha malaria, hali ambayo inawatia wasiwasi wanasayansi, hasa kutokana na uvamizi wa aina mpya ya mbu nchini.
Ekegusii: Chikaunti ase ensemo ya Sugusu ya Kenya korikia okomentekana okonene ase Esosera, eng'ana yaretire ogoichana ase abaringoria, mono kobwatia ogotoka gwe'chiumbu chingeni ime y'ense.
Dholuo: E gwenge moko man yo nyandwat mar Kenya, kwan mar joma nigi malaria osemedore ahinya, to mano en gima miyo josayans bedo gi parruok ahinya, to moloyo nikech kweth moro manyien mar kute osechopo e pinyno.
Somali: Degmooyinka waqooyiga Kenya waxay diiwaangeliyaan heerar aad u sarreeya oo cudurka malaria ah, oo ah isbeddel ka walaacsan saynisyahannada, gaar ahaan weerarka nooc cusub oo cayayaanka ah ee dalka.

English: The Ministry of Health is planning to conduct a massive malaria vaccination drive after the WHO warned of a surge in mosquito-borne diseases due to global warming
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya inapanga kufanya kampeni kubwa ya chanjo ya malaria baada ya WHO kuonya kuhusu ongezeko la magonjwa yanayoenezwa na mbu kutokana na ongezeko la joto duniani.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya Obochenu yarobeirie ekampeini enene ya esindani ya eriogo ria ogotanga Esosera nyuma ya WHO koraria okomentekana ase amarwaire aria akoambokerigwa na chiumbu kobuatia ogokina Kwa riberera ase Ense.
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth chano mar timo kampen maduong ' mar chanjo malaria bang ' ka riwruok mar WHO nosiemo ni tuoche mikelo gi kute biro medore nikech liet mar piny.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa qorsheyneysa inay qabato olole ballaaran oo tallaal ah oo ka dhan ah malaria ka dib markii WHO ay ka digtay kororka cudurrada lagu faafiyo cayayaanka sababo la xiriira kuleylka caalamiga ah

English: Fight against malaria faces fresh threat from new deadly mosquito species
Kiswahili: Mapambano dhidi ya malaria yanakabiliwa na tishio jipya kutoka kwa aina mpya za mbu hatari
Ekegusii: Esegi ya okorwania Esosera gotwara esosobe enyia koru ase chiumbu chingeni echire chimbe mono.
Dholuo: E kedo gi malaria, nitie kit kute moko manyien makelo hinyruok

English: The Kenya Medical Research Institute (Kemri) has dispatched a team of experts to Marsabit to collect samples for tests after nine people died.
Kiswahili: Taasisi ya Utafiti wa Kimatibabu ya Kenya (Kemri) imetuma timu ya wataalamu kwenda Marsabit kukusanya sampuli kwa ajili ya vipimo baada ya watu tisa kufariki.
Ekegusii: Ekiombe kiobotuki bw’obonyagitari (KEMRI) giatomire abanto babo marsabit korenga abanto magega ya abanto kianda gosiria amagima abo.
Dholuo: Kenya Medical Research Institute (Kemri) oseoro jotim nonro e Marsabit mondo ochok ranyisi mag tuoche mondo onon bang' ka ji ochiko osetho.
Somali: Machadka Cilmi-baarista Caafimaadka ee Kenya (Kemri) ayaa koox khubaro ah u diray Marsabit si ay u soo ururiyaan muunado baaritaanno kadib dhimashada sagaal qof.

English: Kenya receives 10,700 doses of Mpox vaccine to curb disease spread, Health Ministry says; 67 cases confirmed since July 2024.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya inasema Kenya yapokea dozi 10,700 za chanjo ya Mpox ili kupunguza kuenea kwa ugonjwa huo; visa 67 vimethibitishwa tangu Julai 2024.
Ekegusii: Kenya yanyorire chidosi 10,700 chiesindani ya ogotanga Mpox erinde gotanga okoambokeria .Ewizara y’Oborwaria nigo yateba koru omotienyi o gatano na kabere, abanto 67 banyorire oborwaire obo.
Dholuo: Kenya oyudo doje 10,700 mag chanjo mar Mpox mar geng'o landruok mar tuoche, Ministry mar Thieth wacho; ji 67 oseyudo ni nigi tuono chakre Julai 2024.
Somali: Kenya waxay heshay 10,700 qiyaasood oo ah tallaalka Mpox si loo xakameeyo faafitaanka cudurka, Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa sheegtay; 67 kiis ayaa la xaqiijiyay tan iyo bishii Luulyo 2024.

English: Kenya confirms surge in Mpox cases, tally now at 137 with Busia, Mombasa and Nakuru counties leading with highest number of infections.
Kiswahili: Kenya yathibitisha kuongezeka kwa visa vya Mpox, ambapo sasa vimefikia 137 huku kaunti za Busia, Mombasa na Nakuru zikiongoza kwa kuwa na idadi kubwa zaidi ya maambukizi.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaenekirie okomenteka ase okoambokera Kwa Mpox, na goikera bono, abarwaire nigo bare 137 ase chikaunti chia Busia,Mombasa na Nakuru chitang’aine ase okoambokera kwa igoro.
Dholuo: Kenya nyiso medruok mar joma nigi tuwo mar Mpox, ma sani gin 137 ka kaunti mag Busia, Mombasa kod Nakuru ema nigi kwan mamalo moloyo mar joma nigi tuono.
Somali: Kenya waxay xaqiijineysaa kororka kiisaska Mpox, oo hadda gaaraya 137 iyadoo degmooyinka Busia, Mombasa iyo Nakuru ay hogaaminayaan tirada ugu badan ee cudurrada.

English: 36 cases of Mpox reported so far in Kenya, two persons admitted and one patient receiving home-based care.
Kiswahili: Visa 36 vya Mpox vimeripotiwa hadi sasa nchini Kenya, watu wawili waliolazwa na mgonjwa mmoja anayepatiwa huduma ya nyumbani.
Ekegusii: Goikera bonoiga, abanto 36 baenekigwe gotwara oborwaire bwa MPOX ime ya Kenya, abanto babere batangire nyagitari na oyomo akorwarerigwa nyomba .
Dholuo: E Kenya, ji 36 oseyudo tuwo mar Mpox, ji ariyo ne orwak e osiptal to jatuwo achiel ne yudo thieth e pacho.
Somali: 36 kiis oo Mpox ah ayaa illaa iyo hadda laga soo sheegay Kenya, labo qof ayaa la geliyey iyo hal bukaan oo daryeel guriga laga helayo.

English: Kenya confirms three new Mpox cases in Busia; Health Ministry warns of a high risk of importing Marburg and Ebola viruses from neighboring Tanzania and Sudan.
Kiswahili: Kenya yathibitisha visa vitatu vipya vya Mpox huko Busia; Wizara ya Afya yaonya kuhusu hatari kubwa ya kuagiza virusi vya Marburg na Ebola kutoka nchi jirani za Tanzania na Sudan.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaenekirie abanto batato gotwara oborwaire bwa MPOX ase ekaunti ya Busia. Ewizara ya Afya yakureire okonyarekana gw'okwambokeria ebirusi bya Marburg na Ebola korwa Chinse jirani chia Tanzania na Sudan.
Dholuo: Kenya nyiso ni nitie ji adek manyien ma nigi tuwo mar Mpox e Busia; Migawo mar Thieth chiwo siem ni nitie masira maduong' mar kelo tuo mar Marburg kod Ebola koa Tanzania kod Sudan.
Somali: Kenya ayaa xaqiijisay saddex kiis oo cusub oo Mpox ah oo ka dhacay Busia; Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka digtay khatarta sare ee soo dejinta fayrasyada Marburg iyo Ebola ee ka imanaya Tanzania iyo Suudaan ee deriska ah.

English: WHO extends Mpox alert, says virus remains public health emergency of international concern, 37,000 cases recorded with 125 deaths since 2024.
Kiswahili: WHO yaongeza tahadhari ya Mpox, yasema virusi hivyo vinasalia kuwa dharura ya afya ya umma inayotia wasiwasi kimataifa, visa 37,000 vimerekodiwa na vifo 125 tangu 2024.
Ekegusii: WHO yamentire gokurera igoro ya Mpox, yatebire ng’a ebinyinyi ebio nigo biatigaire koba omoaganano ase oborwaria ense engima, okoambokerigwa 37,000 kwarekotigwe na abanto bakure 125 koru 2024
Dholuo: WHO medo kwan mar Mpox alert, owacho ni tuono pod en masira mar thieth mar oganda ma kelo parruok e piny mangima, jii 37,000 ma nigi tuono osendik kod ji 125 ma osetho chakre 2024.
Somali: WHO waxay kordhisay digniinta Mpox, waxay sheegtay in fayraska uu weli yahay xaalad degdeg ah oo caafimaad oo dadweyne ah oo welwel caalami ah leh, 37,000 kiis ayaa la diiwaangeliyey iyadoo 125 qof ay dhinteen tan iyo 2024.

English: The Ministry of Health has confirmed three new Mpox cases in Busia County, bringing the total number to 42 since the outbreak in July 2024.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya imethibitisha visa vitatu vipya vya Mpox katika Kaunti ya Busia, na kufikisha jumla ya visa 42 tangu mlipuko wa virusi hivyo Julai 2024.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya Oborwaria yaenekirie abanto bande batato korwara MPOX ase ekaunti ya Busia, yaikirie enamba y'abarwaire goika 42 koru ogoateka Kwa Mpox,julai 2024
Dholuo: Migawo mar Thieth oseyie ni ji adek manyien nigi tuwo mar Mpox e Kaunti mar Busia, ma kelo kwan duto mar ji 42 nyaka ne tuwo ochakore e dwe mar Julai 2024.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa xaqiijisay saddex kiis oo cusub oo Mpox ah oo ka dhacay degmada Busia, taasoo wadarta tirada u kordhisay 42 tan iyo markii uu dillaacay bishii Luulyo 2024.

English: The Ministry of Health has confirmed two new Mpox cases, bringing the total number of infections to 33 since the outbreak began.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya imethibitisha visa viwili vipya vya Mpox, na kufanya jumla ya maambukizi kufikia 33 tangu mlipuko huo uanze.
Ekegusii: Ewizara y'Oborwaria yaenekirie abanto bande babere gotwara MPOX , yamentire esabu yonsi koba 33 koru ogoateka.
Dholuo: Migawo mar Thieth oseyie ni nitie ji ariyo manyien ma nigi Mpox, ma kelo kwan mar joma nigi tuwono e 33 nyaka ne tuwono chakore.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa xaqiijisay laba kiis oo cusub oo Mpox ah, taasoo keentay in tirada guud ee cudurrada laga helay 33 tan iyo markii uu bilaabmay cudurka.

English: Every day, we are vulnerable to a new outbreak, disease, pandemic or virus. Recent ones include the Marburg virus, Mpox, Ebola, Zika and the nightmarish experience we faced during the Covid-19 pandemic.
Kiswahili: Kila siku, tuko katika hatari ya kupata mlipuko mpya, ugonjwa, janga au virusi. Vipya ni pamoja na virusi vya Marburg, Mpox, Ebola, Zika na tukio baya tulilokabiliana nalo wakati wa janga la Covid-19.
Ekegusii:
Kera rituko, ntore ase obokong'u bwokonyora oborwaire obonyia,gose ogoateka Kwa oborwaire bonde bwensi .
 Chindwari chia ange iga ng'amo na Mpox, Ebola, Zika na obokong'u obobe twaetera engaki ya ogoateka Kwa COVID-19
Dholuo: Odiechieng' kodiechieng', waromo gi tuoche, tuoche ma landore, kata kute mag ayaki. Moko kuom gik ma nyocha otimore oriwo Marburg virus, Mpox, Ebola, Zika kod masira malich ma ne wayudo e kinde mar Covid-19.
Somali: Maalin kasta, waxaan u nugul nahay cudur cusub, cudur, masiibo ama fayras. Kuwa ugu dambeeyay waxaa ka mid ah fayraska Marburg, Mpox, Ebola, Zika iyo khibradda masiibada ah ee aan la kulanay intii lagu jiray masiibada Covid-19.

English: Five new Mpox cases confirmed in 12 counties, including Nakuru and Mombasa, raising the total to 28; Health CS Deborah Barasa reports one death and eight under care.
Kiswahili: Visa vitano vipya vya Mpox vimethibitishwa katika kaunti 12, ikiwa ni pamoja na Nakuru na Mombasa, na kufanya jumla ya visa kufikia 28; Waziri wa Afya Deborah Barasa anaripoti kifo kimoja na wanane wakiwa chini ya uangalizi.
Ekegusii:
Abwarwaire bande batano koenekigwa koambokerigwa Mpox ase chikaunti 12,ase echio Nakuru na Mombasa kobao.
 Omoriki o botambe bw'Oborwaria CS Deborah Barasa otebire ase abwo,oyomo osiriri obogima bwaye na 8,mbagenderetete korwarigwa.
Dholuo: Jotuo abich manyien mag Mpox ne oyangi e gwenge 12, moriwo Nakuru kod Mombasa, ka mano miyo kwan duto mar jogo ma nigi tuwono omedore mochopo 28, Health CS Deborah Barasa wacho ni ng'at achiel ne otho kendo ji aboro ne orit.
Somali: Shan kiis oo cusub oo Mpox ah ayaa lagu xaqiijiyay 12 degmo, oo ay ku jiraan Nakuru iyo Mombasa, taasoo wadarta u kordhisay 28; CS Health Deborah Barasa ayaa soo sheegtay hal dhimasho iyo siddeed daryeel.

English: Kenya confirms two new Mpox cases in Kericho and Taita Taveta counties, raising total to 33; Health Ministry urges schools to enhance safety measures to curb spread.
Kiswahili: Kenya yathibitisha visa viwili vipya vya Mpox katika kaunti za Kericho na Taita Taveta, na kuongeza jumla ya visa hivyo kufikia 33; Wizara ya Afya yahimiza shule kuimarisha hatua za usalama ili kupunguza kuenea kwa virusi hivyo.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaenekirie abanto babere bande koambokerigwa Mpox ase chikaunti chia Kericho na Taita Taveta goikia enamba yonsi ase amo abarwaire 33.Ewizara y'Oborwaria yasabire chisukuru gokong'ia emeroberio y'ogotanga okoambokerigwa.
Dholuo: Kenya nyiso ni nitie ji ariyo manyien ma nigi tuwo mar Mpox e gwenge mag Kericho kod Taita Taveta, ka mano miyo kwan mar jogo duto omedore nyaka 33; Migawo mar Thieth jiwo skunde mondo omed tiyo gi yore mag ritruok mondo ogeng' landruokno.
Somali: Kenya ayaa xaqiijisay laba kiis oo cusub oo Mpox ah oo ka dhacay degmooyinka Kericho iyo Taita Taveta, taasoo wadarta guud u kordhisay 33; Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ku boorineysaa dugsiyada inay xoojiyaan tallaabooyinka amniga si loo xakameeyo faafitaanka.

English: Kenya's Ministry of Health has urged citizens to strictly adhere to mpox preventive measures as the number of cases continues to rise, with children being particularly vulnerable.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya ya Kenya imewasihi raia kuzingatia kwa makini hatua za kinga za mpox huku idadi ya visa ikiendelea kuongezeka, huku watoto wakiwa katika hatari zaidi.
Ekegusii: Ewizara y'Oborwaria yabasabire abakenya kobwatereria mono ebitambokero bia ogotanga okoambokera Kwa Mpox, kobwatia okomentekana Kwa abanto barwarete,na abana koba ase obokong'u mono bw'okwambokerigwa.
Dholuo: Migawo mar Thieth e piny Kenya osekwayo raia mondo oluw ahinya yore mag geng'o tuo mar mpox nikech kwan mar joma nigi tuwono siko ka medore, to nyithindo e ma nigi tuwono moloyo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka Kenya ayaa muwaadiniinta ugu baaqday inay si adag u hoggaansamaan tallaabooyinka ka hortagga mpox maadaama tirada kiisaska ay sii kordhayaan, iyadoo carruurta ay si gaar ah u nugul yihiin.

English: A healthy mind drives workplace success. Prioritizing mental health boosts morale, reduces stress, and improves productivity
Kiswahili: Akili yenye afya huchochea mafanikio mahali pa kazi. Kuweka kipaumbele katika afya ya akili huongeza ari, hupunguza msongo wa mawazo, na huboresha tija
Ekegusii:
Obongo bobwate afya engiya nigo bokorenta obobui as'emeremo ogokora.
 Gotang'ania afya y'obongo nigo gokomenta omokia as obogima, gwakeania ebirengererio, na komenta ebitoki/amagenderero.
Dholuo: Bedo gi paro makare miyo ng'ato dhi maber e tich. Keto paro mag tuoche mag paro obed motelo miyo ng'ato bedo gi chuny mokuwe, parruok bedo matin, kendo tich bedo maber
Somali: Maskax caafimaad qaba ayaa guusha ka dhigeysa goobta shaqada. Caafimaadka maskaxdu waxay kor u qaadeysaa niyadda, waxay yareyneysaa walwalka, waxayna hagaajineysaa wax soo saarka

English: Taking care of your mental health is as important as your physical health. A healthy mind leads to a happier, healthier life.
Kiswahili: Kutunza afya yako ya akili ni muhimu kama vile afya yako ya kimwili. Akili yenye afya inaongoza kwenye maisha yenye furaha na afya njema.
Ekegusii:
Korenda afya y'ebirengererio biao nabo ebwate oborito buna korenda afya y'omobere oo.
 Obongo bobwate afya engiya nigo bokorenta obogima obuya bobwate afya.
Dholuo: Rito pachi en gima dwarore ahinya mana kaka rito dendi. Paro makare miyo ng'ato bedo gi ngima maber.
Somali: Daryeelka caafimaadkaaga maskaxda waa muhiim sida caafimaadkaaga jirka. Maskax caafimaad leh waxay keenaysaa nolol faraxsan oo caafimaad leh.

English:
What do you do to prioritize mental health?
Talking about it is a great first step.
Kiswahili:
Unafanya nini ili kuweka kipaumbele afya ya akili?
Kuzungumzia kuhusu hilo ni hatua nzuri ya kwanza.
Ekegusii:
Ninki orakore koa afya y'obongo ribaga rigiya?
 Gotwara chinkwana igoro yaye nase agiya yogochakera.
Dholuo:
Ang'o minyalo timo mondo omi ibed gi paro mowinjore kuom tuoche mag paro?
Wuoyo kuom wechego e okang' mokwongo en gima ber.
Somali: Waa maxay waxa aad sameyneyso si aad u mudnaato caafimaadka maskaxda?

English: Ministry of health has confirmed the first coronavirus case in Kenya. The Kenyan citizen returning from the US to Nairobi via London on 5th March. She was confirmed positive by the national influenza lab. However, the patient is stable
Kiswahili: Wizara ya afya imethibitisha kisa cha kwanza cha virusi vya corona nchini Kenya. Raia huyo wa Kenya anarudi kutoka Marekani hadi Nairobi kupitia London mnamo Machi 5. Alithibitishwa kuwa na virusi hivyo na maabara ya kitaifa ya mafua. Hata hivyo, mgonjwa huyo yuko imara.
Ekegusii: Ewizara y'Oborwaria okwambokerigwa ogotang'ani kw'ebinyinyi bia Korona ime ya Kenya. Omokenya oyuo orenge koirana koru US goetera London aike Nairobi chitariki 5 Machi. Nigo atogete n'ebinyinyi magega y'okorengwa n'enyomba y'oborengi bw'ebinyinyi y'eserekari. Nonya nabo, omorwaire oyuo mbuya are.
Dholuo: Migawo mar thieth oseyie ni nitie ng'at mokwongo ma nigi tuo mar coronavirus e piny Kenya. Ja-Kenya ma ne odok Nairobi kowuok Amerka kowuok London tarik 5 dwe mar adek. Lab mar piny owacho mar kute mag ayaki ne onyiso ni en gi kutego. Kata kamano, chal mar jatuo osiko maber.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa xaqiijisay kiiskii ugu horreeyay ee cudurka Coronavirus ee Kenya. Muwaadinka reer Kenya oo ka soo laabtay Mareykanka oo ku soo laabtay Nairobi iyada oo loo marayo London 5-kii Maarso. Waxaa xaqiijisay in ay qabatay shaybaarka caabuqa ee qaranka. Si kastaba ha noqotee, bukaanku waa xasilloon yahay.

English: Gov't calls for wearing of masks as country battles 6th Covid-19 wave
Kiswahili: Serikali yatoa wito wa kuvaa barakoa huku nchi ikipambana na wimbi la 6 la Covid-19
Ekegusii: Eserekari yarure ogochika kobeka chimaski buna ense egendererete korwani omorindo o 6 o Covid-19
Dholuo: Sirkal dwaro ni ji orwak lep lak sama piny kedo gi tuwo mar 6 mar Covid-19.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay ku baaqeysaa xirashada maaskaro maadaama waddanku la dagaallamo hirka lixaad ee COVID-19

English: All public gatherings meetings, games, events, church crusades have been suspended. Churches can have services as long as they have sanitizer. Schools to remain open but inter school games are cancelled
Kiswahili: Mikutano yote ya hadhara, michezo, matukio, mikutano ya kanisa imesimamishwa. Makanisa yanaweza kuwa na ibada mradi tu yana vitakasa mikono. Shule zitaendelea kufunguliwa lakini michezo kati ya shule imefutwa
Ekegusii: Emesangererekano yonsi, chigosori, emeyega amo na emesangererekano yechikanisa yatenenigwe. Chikanisa nabo chikoba ne chimisa chiabo onye rioka chikobeka esabuni yogosibia amaboko. Chisukuru nabo chigotigara koigorwa korende chigosori gati ye chisukuru chiatenenigwe.
Dholuo: Chokruoge mag ji duto, tuke, gik matimore, koda wuodh kanisa, osegol oko. Kanise nyalo bedo gi chokruok mag lamo, to mana ka gin gi sanitizer. Skunde dhi siko ka oyawore to tuke mag skul ok dhi dhi nyime
Somali: Dhammaan shirarka dadweynaha, kulamada, dhacdooyinka, ciidamada kaniisadda ayaa la joojiyay. Kaniisadaha waxay qaban karaan adeegyadooda illaa inta ay haystaan nadiifinta. Iskuulada ayaa la furay laakiin ciyaaraha iskuulada ayaa la joojiyay

English: Mandatory wearing of masks in public and open spaces is now lifted
Kiswahili: Uvaaji wa lazima wa barakoa katika maeneo ya umma na wazi sasa umeondolewa
Ekegusii: Richiko ri'okobeka chimaski ase abanto abange na isiko riarusigwe aroro.
Dholuo: Tiyo gi abuog rombee e lela kod kuonde ma ji ng'enyie koro ogol oko
Somali: Qasabka ah ee xirashada maaskaro meelaha dadweynaha iyo bannaanka ayaa hadda la joojiyay

English:
Your health is our priority! No one should face TB alone. Get tested early and access FREE treatment at your nearest public health facility.
Together, we can end TB in Kenya!
Kiswahili:
Afya yako ndiyo kipaumbele chetu! Hakuna mtu anayepaswa kukabiliana na TB peke yake. Pima mapema na upate matibabu BURE katika kituo cha afya cha umma kilicho karibu nawe.
Kwa pamoja, tunaweza kukomesha TB nchini Kenya!
Ekegusii: Afya yao ney'eng'encho ase tore. Onde taiyo oganeire korwani TB ere bweka. Rengwa mapema onyore okogwenigwa kwa bosa ase enyomba y'oborwaria ere ang'e naye. Ase obomo nabo tokonyara gokora TB ime ya Kenya.
Dholuo:
Wageno ni ngimau biro bedo maber moloyo! Onge ng'ama onego okaw ting' mar kedo gi tuwo mar kahera kende owuon. Tim nonro chon kendo iyud thieth MAOK CHUL e kar thieth mar oganda machiegni kodi.
Ka wariwore kanyachiel, wanyalo tieko chuth tuo mar kahera e piny Kenya!
Somali: Caafimaadkaaga ayaa ah mudnaantaada! Qofna waa inuusan keligiis la kulmi karin cudurka TB. Tijaabi si dhakhso ah oo u hel daaweyn BILAASH ah xarunta caafimaadka dadweynaha ee kuugu dhow. Wadajir, waxaan joojin karnaa cudurka TB Kenya!

English:
By recognizing the humanity of individuals with mental illnesses, we can cultivate a more compassionate and understanding society.
If you or someone you know needs psychosocial support, please don't hesitate to reach out to us at our toll-free number, 1199
Kiswahili:
Kwa kutambua ubinadamu wa watu wenye magonjwa ya akili, tunaweza kukuza jamii yenye huruma na uelewa zaidi.

Ikiwa wewe au mtu unayemjua anahitaji usaidizi wa kisaikolojia, tafadhali usisite kuwasiliana nasi kwa nambari yetu ya simu isiyolipishwa, 1199.
Ekegusii:
Ase okomanya obonyamwanabanto bw'abanto abare na amarwaire y'obongo, ntonyare gokinia eamate ebwate amabera na obomanyi obonge. 
 Onye aye gose omonto omanyete naganetie obokonyi bw'ebirengererio, koranche tonyorwa gokwana naintwe goetera ase e'namba yaito y'esimi etari goakanerwa, 1199
Dholuo:
Ka wang'eyo ni joma nigi tuoche mag paro gin dhano kaka wan, wanyalo miyo oganda obed mang'won kendo mawinjo lit mar jomoko.
Ka in kata ng'at ming'eyo dwaro kony mar paro, kik iluor luongowa e namba maonge nengo, 1199
Somali: Marka aan aqoonsano bani'aadamnimada shakhsiyaadka qaba cudurrada maskaxda, waxaan horumarin karnaa bulsho naxariis iyo faham badan. Haddii adiga ama qof aad taqaanid u baahan tahay taageero maskaxeed, fadlan ha ka waaban inaad nala soo xiriirto lambarkayaga lacag la'aanta ah, 1199

English: Educate yourself on mental health issues, so that you can be an ambassador of change, speaking against mental health stigma. Stigma & discrimination are major barriers to accessing mental health services. Choose to live an empowered life, fight the stigma.
Kiswahili: Jielimishe kuhusu masuala ya afya ya akili, ili uweze kuwa balozi wa mabadiliko, ukipinga unyanyapaa wa afya ya akili. Unyanyapaa na ubaguzi ni vikwazo vikubwa vya kupata huduma za afya ya akili. Chagua kuishi maisha yenye uwezo, pambana na unyanyapaa.
Ekegusii:
Esemie ase amang'ana ya oborwaria bw'obongo, erinde obe omoteneneri bw'oboonchoreria, okonengeta ase amang'ana ya oborwaria bw'obongo. Okonengeta ne eyemo ase ebikongo ebinene ase abanto korigia korwarigwa oborwaire bw'obongo.
 Chora komenya obogima Bwe chinguru ,rwania okonengeta.
Dholuo: Puonjri weche mag tuoche mag paro, mondo ibed jaland lokruok, kiwuoyo e wi tuoche mag paro. Buono ji kod achaya gin gik madongo ma geng'o ji yudo kony mag thieth mar paro. Yier dak e ngima ma nigi teko, kedo gi wich kuot.
Somali: Iska baro arrimaha caafimaadka dhimirka, si aad u noqotid safiir isbedel ah, adigoo ka hadlaya caymiska caafimaadka dhimirka. Xadgudubka iyo takoorka ayaa ah caqabadaha ugu waaweyn ee helitaanka adeegyada caafimaadka dhimirka. Dooro inaad ku noolaato nolol awood leh, la dagaallanto caymiska.

English:
Take a journal and note down how your days are and how you're feeling.

Examine your thoughts written over time and soon they become clearer and hidden thoughts and feelings come to the surface to bring a more complete light to the situation.
Kiswahili:
Chukua shajara na uandike jinsi siku zako zilivyo na jinsi unavyohisi.

Chunguza mawazo yako yaliyoandikwa baada ya muda na hivi karibuni yanakuwa wazi zaidi na mawazo na hisia zilizofichwa huja juu ili kuleta mwanga kamili zaidi kwa hali hiyo.
Ekegusii:
Bwata egetabu,rika inaki amatuko ao are, nakomenta buna oigwete.
 Erigererie na gotuka ebirengererio biago biria kwarigete korua nyuma na bwango iga ebirengererio ebio bikogusua na biria biebisete biarorekana naboigo yarenta oborabu ase eng'ana eyio.
Dholuo:
Bed gi buk moro ma isomo gik ma timore e ngimani kod kaka iwinjo.

Non ane paro ma in-go bang' kinde, kendo mapiyo nono gibiro nenore maler, kendo paro kod paro mopondo biro nenore, mondo okonyi ng'eyo weche e yo maber moloyo.
Somali: Qaado qoraal qoraal ah oo qor sida ay u socdaan maalmahaaga iyo sida aad dareento. Tijaabi fikradahaada qoraalka ah waqtiga ka dibna si dhakhso ah ayay u noqdaan kuwo cad oo fikradaha iyo dareenka qarsoon ay soo baxaan si ay u keenaan iftiin dhammaystiran xaaladda.

English: There is no health without mental health
Kiswahili: Hakuna afya bila afya ya akili
Ekegusii: Borwaria tiboiyo one oborwaria bw'obongo tiboiyo
Dholuo: Ngima ok nyal bedo maber ka onge tuoche mag paro
Somali: Caafimaad la'aan caafimaad maskaxeed ma jirto.

English: Take a deep breath and relax. Listen to your body. If youre really tired, give yourself time to sleep. Without good sleep, our mental health suffers and our concentration goes downhill. Sometimes the world can wait.
Kiswahili: Vuta pumzi ndefu na upumzike. Sikiliza mwili wako. Ikiwa umechoka sana, jipe ​​muda wa kulala. Bila usingizi mzuri, afya yetu ya akili huharibika na umakini wetu hupungua. Wakati mwingine ulimwengu unaweza kusubiri.
