Ekegusii: Ng'usa omoeso omana gotoerera.Tegerera omobere oo.Onye kwarosire mono,twara chingaki chi’ogotimoka. Kero totarikonyora chitoro boikeranu, ebirengererio biato nigo bigochandeka. Ebirengererio biato nigo bikogenda inse. Chinsa chinde tiga ebinto binde biratimoka.
Dholuo: Kaw muya matin kae to ibed mokuwe. Chik iti ne gima iwacho. Kapo ni in gi chuny monyosore gadier, kaw thuolo mondo inind matin. Ka ok wanindo moromo, pachwa ok ti maber, kendo ok wanyal keto pachwa e gima watimo. Seche moko piny nyalo rito.
Somali: Hagaag, neefso qoto dheer oo nasato. Dhageyso jirkaaga. Haddii aad si dhab ah u daalan tahay, naftaada u sii wakhti aad ku seexato. Hurdo wanaagsan la'aan, caafimaadka maskaxdeenu wuu xanuunsanayaa oo diiradeenu wuu hoos u dhacayaa. Mararka qaarkood adduunku wuu sugi karaa.

English: Responding to mental health issues for people with disabilities is critical.Do you know someone who would need someone to talk to?SMS support to 20767 to get access to a counsellor.
Kiswahili: Kushughulikia masuala ya afya ya akili kwa watu wenye ulemavu ni muhimu. Je, unamjua mtu ambaye atahitaji mtu wa kuzungumza naye? Tuma ujumbe mfupi wa usaidizi kwa 20767 ili kupata mshauri nasaha.
Ekegusii: Goikerania amagania y’oborwaria ase abanto babwate ebirema nokw’engencho mono. Inee, nomanyete monto onde oganetie oyo agokwanera? Toma emesechi “support” gochia 20767 erio onyore omosemia.
Dholuo: Dwoko kuom weche mag tuoche mag paro ne joma nigi midekre en gima dwarore ahinya. Be ing'eyo ng'at manyalo dwaro ng'at ma ginyalo wuoyogo? Or ne joma konyo kitiyo gi SMS e namba 20767 mondo iyud kony mar laktar.
Somali: Ka jawaabista arrimaha caafimaadka maskaxda ee dadka naafada ah waa mid muhiim ah. Ma taqaanaa qof aad u baahan tahay qof aad la hadasho?

English: Healthy minds create healthy workplaces. Lets foster environments that prioritize mental health and support employees well-being
Kiswahili: Akili zenye afya huunda sehemu za kazi zenye afya. Tukuze mazingira yanayopa kipaumbele afya ya akili na kusaidia ustawi wa wafanyakazi.
Ekegusii:
Ebirengererio bichenegete, ebigokonya korenta obuya ase ogokora egasi .
 Tiga torosie ase emeremo agaya tosire oborwaria bw'obongo na abakoria egasi bachenegete na baikeranete ase chinsemo chionsi.
Dholuo: Paro makare miyo ji bedo gi ngima maber kuonde ma gitiyoe. Weuru mondo warit kuonde ma miyo ji paro mar rito ngimagi obed maber, kendo konyo jotich mondo obed gi ngima maber.
Somali: Maskaxda caafimaad leh waxay abuureysaa goobo shaqo oo caafimaad qaba. Aan kor u qaadno jawi dhiirigelinaya caafimaadka maskaxda iyo taageerada caafimaadka shaqaalaha

English:
Mental Health Check-Up Time!Mental Health Check-Up Time!
Your mental health is just as important as your physical health. Take a moment to check in with yourself today.
1. How are you feeling emotionally?
2. Are you getting enough rest?
3. Are you eating well?
4. Have you been active lately?
5. Do you need to talk to someone?
Remember, it's okay to seek help if you need it. Your mental well-being matters!
Kiswahili:
Wakati wa Kuchunguza Afya ya Akili! Wakati wa Kuchunguza Afya ya Akili!

Afya yako ya akili ni muhimu kama vile afya yako ya kimwili. Chukua muda kujichunguza leo.

1. Unajisikiaje kihisia?
2. Je, unapata mapumziko ya kutosha?
3. Je, unakula vizuri?
4. Je, umekuwa ukifanya mazoezi hivi karibuni?
5. Je, unahitaji kuzungumza na mtu?
Kumbuka, ni sawa kutafuta msaada ikiwa unahitaji. Ustawi wako wa akili ni muhimu!
Ekegusii:
Oborwaria bw’obongo bwao nigo bore obw’engencho buna oborwaria bwa kemobere. Ira chinaki bwe’ringorie rero.
 
 1.Naki bweigwete enkoro?
 2.2. Inee, nkonyora ore ogotimoka goisaine?
 3.Inee, nkoragera ore buya?
 4.Inee, kwabeire kogokora a masoesi bwango iga?
 5.Inee, noganetie gokwana n’omonto?
 Inyora ng’a, mbuya korigia obokonyi ekero oboganetie. Obongo bwao oboikeranu n’egento kiengencho!
Dholuo:
Kinde mar Nono Timbe Dhano! Kinde mar Nono Timbe Dhano
Paro ma in-go kuom ngima jaodi en gima duong' mana kaka rito dendi. Kaw kinde mondo ipar matut kuom kaka ngimani chalo sani.
1. In iwinjo nade e chunyi?
2. Be inindo moromo?
3. Be ichamo chiemo moromo?
4. Be isebedo katiyo matek e tij lendo?
5. Be nitie ng'ama diher mondo awuo kode?
Ng'e ni, ok rach manyo kony kapo ni in gi chandruok. Paro ma in-go e ma dwarore!
Somali: Waqtigii la hubin lahaa caafimaadka maskaxda! Waqtigii la hubin lahaa caafimaadka maskaxda! Caafimaadkaaga maskaxda ayaa muhiim ah sida caafimaadkaaga jirka. Saacad u qaad inaad iska hubiso naftaada maanta. 1. sidee ayaad dareemeysaa? 2. Ma si ku filan u nasataa? 3. Ma cunaysaa si fiican? 4. Ma jirtay dhaqdhaqaaq dhawaan? 5. Ma u baahan tahay inaad la hadasho qof? Xusuusnow, waa haboon tahay inaad caawimaad raadiso haddii aad u baahan tahay. Caafimaadkaaga maskaxda ayaa muhiim ah!

English: Safe walking and cycling contributes to healthier lives preventing Non- Communicable diseases such Cancer, diabetes and hypertension and improves ones mental health
Kiswahili: Kutembea salama na kuendesha baiskeli huchangia maisha yenye afya njema kuzuia magonjwa yasiyoambukiza kama vile Saratani, kisukari na shinikizo la damu na kuboresha afya ya akili ya mtu.
Ekegusii: Ogotara okuya na okorundia enyange nigo bigosiira obogima obuya, biatanga amarwaire atarikoambokera buna Cancer,Esukari na presha naboigo koreta oborwaria bw'obongo ase omonto .

Somali: Socodka amaanka ah iyo baaskiil wadista waxay gacan ka geysaneysaa nolol caafimaad leh ka hortagga cudurrada aan faafa ahayn sida Kansarka, sonkorowga iyo cadaadiska sare waxayna hagaajineysaa caafimaadka maskaxda

English: Alcohol addiction is a severe issue affecting many Kenyans, and the prevalence of illicit brews in the Mt. Kenya region exacerbates this problem. Local health facilities need to be well-equipped to handle mental health issues, which can drive people into alcohol addiction
Kiswahili: Uraibu wa pombe ni tatizo kubwa linalowaathiri Wakenya wengi, na kuenea kwa pombe haramu katika eneo la Mlima Kenya kunazidisha tatizo hili. Vituo vya afya vya eneo hilo vinahitaji kuwa na vifaa vya kutosha kushughulikia masuala ya afya ya akili, ambayo yanaweza kuwasukuma watu katika uraibu wa pombe.
Ekegusii: Okonywa amarwa goetania, n’omochando omonene ase Abakenya abange, na amarwa amatari ase chinsemo chia Mt. Kenya nigo akomenta omochando oyo. Chinyagitari nchibwenerete gotwara ebinto bia obokonyi na koebanga gokonya emechando ya obirengererio ebio bikogera abanto gosoa ase okonywa amarwa goetania.
Dholuo: Madho kong'o ahinya en gima chando Jo Kenya mang'eny, kendo madho kong'o e yo ma ok owinjore e gweng' mar Mt. Alwora mar Kenya medo mana bedo marach moloyo. Chenro mag thieth madwarore ni otim kuonde ma ji nyalo yudoe ritruok kuom tuoche mag paro, manyalo miyo ji obed wasumb kong'o
Somali: Khilaafka khamriga waa arrin culus oo saameyn ku yeelata dadka badan oo reer Kenya ah, iyo faafitaanka cabitaanada sharci darrada ah ee gobolka Mount Kenya ayaa sii daraya dhibaatadan. Xarumaha caafimaadka ee deegaanka waxay u baahan yihiin inay si fiican u qalabeeyaan si ay ula qabsadaan arrimaha caafimaadka maskaxda, taas oo dadka u horseedi karta inay ku xiran yihiin khamriga

English: Women face unique challenges in addiction treatment such as trauma, mental health, stigma & caregiving roles. Gender responsive care are is not optional, it is essential
Kiswahili: Wanawake wanakabiliwa na changamoto za kipekee katika matibabu ya uraibu kama vile majeraha, afya ya akili, unyanyapaa na majukumu ya ulezi. Huduma inayozingatia jinsia si ya hiari, ni muhimu
Ekegusii: Abasubati nigo bakonyora emechando ya bene ase oborwaria bw'oboswanya, buna ogochandeka ebirengererio, oborwaria bw'obongo, okonengetwa naboigo na egasi ya korenda abanto bande. Obokonyi botarigwancherera basacha gose abakungu tari ng'ana riogochora, neriengencho mono.
Dholuo: Mon romo gi pek moko makende e thieth mag yedhe mamero kaka tuoche mag adundo, tuoche mag paro, wichkuot kod ting' mar rito nyithindo. Chenro mar rito nyithindo e yo mowinjore ok en gima ng'ato oyiero kende, en gima dwarore ahinya
Somali: Haweenka waxay la kulmaan caqabado gaar ah oo ku saabsan daaweynta balwadda sida dhaawaca, caafimaadka maskaxda, cayayaanka & doorka daryeelka. Daryeelka ka jawaabaya jinsiga ma aha ikhtiyaar, waa mid lagama maarmaan ah

English:
This Mens Mental Health Awareness Month, lets break the silence. Society often tells men to "be strong," but real strength lies in acknowledging your struggles and reaching out.

1. Speaking up isnt weaknessits courage.
2. Your feelings are valid.
3.You dont have to face it alone.

Whether its stress, anxiety, depression, or just feeling overwhelmed your mental health matters. Talk to a friend, a counselor, or a support group. Asking for help is a sign of strength, not failure.
 You are human. You deserve support. You are not alone.
Kiswahili:
Mwezi huu wa Uhamasishaji wa Afya ya Akili ya Wanaume, hebu tuvunje ukimya. Mara nyingi jamii huwaambia wanaume "kuwa imara," lakini nguvu halisi iko katika kutambua mapambano yako na kufikia lengo.

1. Kuzungumza si udhaifu - ni ujasiri.

2. Hisia zako ni halali.

3. Huna haja ya kukabiliana nayo peke yako.

Iwe ni msongo wa mawazo, wasiwasi, mfadhaiko, au kuhisi tu kuzidiwa - afya yako ya akili ni muhimu. Zungumza na rafiki, mshauri, au kikundi cha usaidizi. Kuomba msaada ni ishara ya nguvu, si kushindwa.

Wewe ni binadamu. Unastahili usaidizi. Hauko peke yako.
Ekegusii:
Ase Omotienyi oyo bwokoraria obosemia igoro ya oborwaria bw'obongo bwa Abasacha,Totige gokira,tokwane.Twanarire gotebia Abasacha babe abakong'u ,korende ogokong'a boronge nogoitaba emechando na korigia obokonyi.
 
 1.Gosanga gose gokwana tari borosu, ne'chinguru
 2.Nchera ende yonsi okoigwa ,mboronge.
 3.Torwania emechando yao aye bweka. 
 
 Oborwaria bw'obongo bwao nigo bore bw'engencho, neba n'ebirengererio, gose omoroso. Kwana n'omosani, omosemia, gose ekeombe ki'obokonyi. Koboria obokonyi nokworokia chinguru, tari okogwa.
Dholuo: E Dwe mar Paro e Wi Tuoche mag Chuny, weuru wawuo kuom wachni. Kinde mang'eny, oganda ji wacho ne chwo ni, beduru motegno, "" to teko madier otenore kuom ng'eyo chandruok ma un-go, kendo temo matek mondo ubed gi nyalo mar nyagruok gi pekgo.
Somali: Bishii wacyigelinta Caafimaadka Maskaxda Ragga, aan aaminnimada jebinno. Bulshadu badanaa waxay ragga ku tidhaahdaa "si xoog leh u noqo", laakiin xoogga dhabta ah wuxuu ku jiraa aqoonsashada halgankaaga iyo gacan qaadashada. 1. Hadalka ma aha daciifnimo - waa dhiirigelin. 2. Dareenkaagu waa sax. 3. Ma aha inaad keligaa la kulanto. Haddii ay tahay stress, walaac, niyad jab, ama kaliya dareen culus - caafimaadkaaga maskaxda ayaa muhiim ah. La hadal saaxiib, lataliye, ama koox taageero. Weyddiisashada caawimaad waa calaamad xoog, ma aha guuldarro. Waxaad tahay bini'aadam. Waxaad mudan tahay taageero. Kaligiis ma tihid.

English:
Did you know? Your sleep quality directly affects your mental health!

1.Aim for 7-9 hours of restful sleep each night.
2. Avoid stimulants like caffeine or drugs before bed they disrupt your Zzzs!
Prioritize your rest, recharge your mind, and wake up refreshed!
Kiswahili:
Ulijua? Ubora wa usingizi wako huathiri moja kwa moja afya yako ya akili!

1. Lenga kulala kwa saa 7-9 kila usiku.

2. Epuka vichocheo kama vile kafeini au dawa za kulevya kabla ya kulala - vinavyovuruga hisia zako za Zzz!
Zipe kipaumbele pumziko lako, chaji akili yako, na uamke ukiwa umeburudika!
Ekegusii:
Nomanyete? Enchera okorara chitoro nigo chigokuna oborwaria bwebirengererio biago.
 
 1.Renga korara ase chinsa7-9 kera obotuko.
 
 2.Etange na amariogo amo na ebinyugwa buna ekahawa nyuma otarara, ebikogosareria chitoro
 Beka motwe ogotimoka kwago, chaji obongo bwango ,erio oboke gosasogete!
Somali: Ma ogtahay? Tayada hurdadaadu waxay si toos ah u saameyneysaa caafimaadka maskaxdaada! 1. Isku day inaad hurdo 7-9 saacadood oo nasasho ah habeen kasta. 2. Ka fogow waxyaabaha kiciya sida kafeyn ama daroogada ka hor intaadan seexan - waxay burburinayaan Zzz-kaaga!

English: Sports and exercise offer a multifaceted approach to preventing substance use during school breaks. They provide structure, boost mental health, foster social connections and help students build healthy habits that protect against risky behaviors
Kiswahili: Michezo na mazoezi hutoa mbinu mbalimbali za kuzuia matumizi ya dawa za kulevya wakati wa mapumziko ya shule. Hutoa muundo, huimarisha afya ya akili, hukuza miunganisho ya kijamii na huwasaidia wanafunzi kujenga tabia zenye afya zinazowalinda dhidi ya tabia hatarishi.
Ekegusii:
Chigosori na ebisaisi nigo bikonya ase chinchera ao ao,gotanga obokoreri bw’amariogo ya oborebi chingaki chi’erusa yechisukuru.
 Ebigokonya korenta omoroberio, gosira oborwaria bw’ebirengererio,korosia oboamate Obuya na gokonya abana be’chisukuru koagacha chingencho chindonge echio chikobatangakoru ase chitabi chimbe.
Dholuo: 2. Paro ma in-go kuom wachni nikare.
Somali: Ciyaaraha iyo jimicsiga waxay bixiyaan hab dhinacyo badan leh oo looga hortago isticmaalka maadooyinka inta lagu jiro fasaxyada dugsiga. Waxay bixiyaan qaab dhismeedka, kor u qaadaan caafimaadka maskaxda, kor u qaadaan xiriirka bulshada waxayna ka caawiyaan ardayda inay abuuraan caadooyin caafimaad oo ka ilaalinaya dabeecadaha halista ah

English: Just like your annual doctors visit, your mind deserves a check-up too
Kiswahili: Kama vile ziara yako ya kila mwaka ya daktari, akili yako pia inastahili kuchunguzwa
Ekegusii: Buna ekero okogenda nyagitari kera omwaka korora omonyagitari, obongo bwao nabwo mboganeti korengwa.

English:
Feeling low?  Reaching for alcohol wont lift you up  its a depressant that can make things worse.

Choose real healing: talk to a counselor, join a support group, or reach out for help.
Kiswahili:
Kuhisi umekata tamaa? Kunywa pombe hakutakuinua - ni dawa ya kufadhaisha ambayo inaweza kufanya mambo kuwa mabaya zaidi.

Chagua uponyaji halisi: zungumza na mshauri, jiunge na kikundi cha usaidizi, au wasiliana nasi kwa msaada.
Ekegusii:
Ochandegete ebirengererio? Konywa amarwa tikogokoa chinguru, neriogorigosaria amang'ana mono.
 
 Chora okogwena okoronge, Gamba na omosemia na kwebeka amo na ekeombe Kia ogokonyana, boigo Nabo ogokwana naintwe ase obokonyi
Somali: inaad dareento inaad hoos u dhacday? Cabitaanka khamriga ma kicin doono - waa mid niyad jab ah oo arrimaha sii xumeyn kara. Dooro daaweynta dhabta ah: la hadal lataliye, ku biir koox taageero, ama caawimaad.

English:
Fuel your body, feed your mind!
What you eat, how you move, and what you avoid directly shapes your mental health.

Choose clean eating, stay active, and say NO to harmful substances.

Your future self will thank you!
Kiswahili:
Tia nguvu mwili wako, lisha akili yako!

Kile unachokula, jinsi unavyotembea, na kile unachoepuka huunda moja kwa moja afya yako ya akili.

Chagua kula safi, endelea kufanya mazoezi, na useme HAPANA kwa vitu vyenye madhara.

Utu wako wa baadaye utakushukuru!
Ekegusii:
Kae omobere oo chinguru, rageria obongo bwao!
 
 Keria okoria, orogendo rwao na keria otari gokora nigo bikwagacha afya y'ebirengererio. 
 Chora koria obochena, genderera gokora amasoesi na otebe YAYA ase ebinto birarete amakong'u.
 Obomonto bwao bwa bosio mbokoiraneria mbuya.
Dholuo: Bed ni en parruok, parruok mang'eny, parruok, kata mana winjo ka chunyi onyosore ahinya, parruok nyalo ketho pach ng'ato. Wuo gi osiepni migeno, kata ng'at moro manyalo konyi gi paro. Kwayo kony en gima nyiso ni ng'ato nigi teko, to ok ni ng'ato oloyo nyawadgi.
Somali: Jirkaaga quudi, maskaxdaada quudi! waxa aad cuntid, sida aad u dhaqmayso, iyo waxa aad ka fogaato waxay si toos ah u qaabeeyaan caafimaadkaaga maskaxda. Cuntada nadiifka ah doorato, firfircoon noqo, oo waxyaabaha waxyeelada leh NO sheeg. naftaada mustaqbalka ayaa kugu mahadcelin doonta!

English:
Stressed about money? Dont gamble with your mental health!
When finances feel overwhelming, its tempting to chase "quick fixes" like gambling or substance usebut these only make things worse. Instead, take control by seeking free financial counseling and building healthy money habits.
Your mental health matters. Choose smart solutions over short-term risks.
Kiswahili:
Una msongo wa mawazo kuhusu pesa? Usicheze kamari na afya yako ya akili!
Wakati fedha zinapozidi, inakuvutia kutafuta "suluhisho la haraka" kama vile kamari au matumizi ya dawa za kulevya - lakini hizi hufanya mambo kuwa mabaya zaidi. Badala yake, chukua udhibiti kwa kutafuta ushauri wa kifedha bila malipo na kujenga tabia nzuri za pesa.
Afya yako ya akili ni muhimu. Chagua suluhisho bora badala ya hatari za muda mfupi.
Ekegusii:
Nobwate ebirengererio igoro ye chibesa? Toaka oboche na afya yao y'obongo. 
 Ekero chibesa chiaichoire, nigo chigokoa ebirengererio bia "chinchera chia bwango" buna oboche gose gotumeka amariogo yogotindi-korende ebi nigo bigokora amangana koba amabe goetereria. Ribaka riaye rigia chinguru chi'okorigia obomanyi bwe chibesa otari gwakanera na koagacha chingencho chingiya chie chibesa..
 Afya yao y'obongo ney'engencho. Chora chinchera chingiya kobua obokongu bw'engaki enke.
Dholuo: In bende in mana dhano. Owinjore wariwgi lwedo. Ok in kendi".
Somali: Dhibaatooyinka lacagta? Ha ku khamaarin caafimaadkaaga maskaxda! Marka dhaqaalaha aad dareento in ay aad u culus tahay, waxaa jilicsan in la raaco "xawaareyn degdeg ah" sida khamaarka ama isticmaalka maandooriyaha - laakiin taasi waxay sii daraysaa arrimaha. Taa bedelkeeda, gacanta ku hay adoo raadinaya la talin maaliyadeed oo bilaash ah iyo sameynta caadooyin caafimaad leh oo lacag ah. Caafimaadkaaga maskaxda ayaa muhiim ah. Xulashada xalalka caqliga leh ee khatarta muddada gaaban.

English: Consider therapy or counseling. A mental health professional can provide strategies to cope with stigma and help you develop a positive self-image
Kiswahili: Fikiria tiba au ushauri nasaha. Mtaalamu wa afya ya akili anaweza kutoa mikakati ya kukabiliana na unyanyapaa na kukusaidia kukuza taswira chanya ya wewe mwenyewe
Ekegusii: Rengereria obogwenia gose ogokwanerwa kw’obosemia. Omomanyi bw’oborwaria bw'obongo nabo akorwa chinchera chi'okorwania obokongu obo na gokonya kwemanya buya aye omonyene.
Dholuo:
YOUTH IN CRISIS: WHY PREVENTION CANT WAIT [Rowere Manie Chandruok: Gimomiyo Geng'o Tuoche Ok Nyal Rito]

Rowerewa ihinyo monjo.

Tuwo mar paro. Tiyo marach gi yedhe mamero. Lwenje ma ling'ling' ma ne dhi nyime e kind josiasa kod joma ne ok ong'eyo wach moro.
Kata kamano, wan gi geno.
Geng'o tuoche ok en mana gima ng'ato nyalo timo kende, en mana yo achiel kende mar tieko chandruogego. Ka watimo gik moko chon, mano miyo wabedo gi ngima maber e kinde mabiro.

1. Tieg ji.
2. Konyo.
Somali: Tixgeli daaweynta ama la talinta. Khabiir caafimaad maskaxeed ayaa ku siin kara xeelado lagu xakameyn karo cayayaanka oo kaa caawin kara inaad horumariso dareenka wanaagsan ee naftaada

English: Societal pressures and gender-based discrimination can contribute to stress and mental health challenges.
Kiswahili: Shinikizo la kijamii na ubaguzi wa kijinsia vinaweza kuchangia msongo wa mawazo na changamoto za afya ya akili.
Ekegusii: Okobetererigwa korwa ase eamate na ogwanchereria gw'ensemo eyemo yoroiboro nabo bikorenta ebirengererio ebinge na obokong'u bwe'eafya y'obongo.
Dholuo: Tugo koda timo tuke miyo ji thuolo mar tiyo gi yore mopogore opogore e geng'o tiyo gi yedhe mamero e kinde yueyo mar skul. Gikonyo e loso chenro, jiwo paro maber, jiwo tudruok e kind ji, kendo konyo jopuonjre bedo gi timbe mabeyo makonyogi kwedo timbe manyalo kelo hinyruok
Somali: Dhibaatooyinka bulshada iyo takoorka jinsiga ku salaysan waxay gacan ka geysan karaan stress iyo dhibaatooyinka caafimaadka dhimirka.

English: Understanding mental health issues can empower you to challenge misconceptions. Share accurate information with friends and family to promote awareness and reduce stigma
Kiswahili: Kuelewa masuala ya afya ya akili kunaweza kukuwezesha kupinga dhana potofu. Shiriki taarifa sahihi na marafiki na familia ili kukuza uelewa na kupunguza unyanyapaa.
Ekegusii: Koba n'obomanyi bw'amangana y’oborwaria bw'obongo nkonyare kogokonya gokona ebirengererio bio gosiria. Sanga chinkwana chingiya na abasani na efamilia egere ekinie koigwanana na gokeania esekererio.
Dholuo:
Iwinjo ka chunyi onyosore? Madho kong'o ok bi miyi chuny mor. Onyalo mana medo ketho winjruok manie kindu.

Yier kit thieth maber: wuo gi ng'at manyalo konyi, riwri gi joma nyalo konyi, kata many kony.
Somali: Markaad fahamto arrimaha caafimaadka dhimirka waxaad awood u yeelan kartaa inaad ka hortagto fikradaha qaldan.

English: Engage in activities that promote mental health awareness and advocacy. This can help create a sense of belonging and purpose.
Kiswahili: Shiriki katika shughuli zinazokuza ufahamu na utetezi wa afya ya akili. Hii inaweza kusaidia kujenga hisia ya kuwa wa kipekee na kusudi.
Ekegusii: Sanga amokoro ayare agokinia obomanyi na okorwanerera oborwaria bw'obongo. Eye nabo egokonya gokonya koagacha okoeigwa kwabene na gokonya.
Dholuo:
Miyo ringreni obed gi teko, pachi bende obed gi teko!
Gik ma ichamo, kaka itimo, koda gigo ma ok itimo chiko pach ng'ato.

Yier chiemo maler, bed ng'at matiyo matek, kendo kik imak kong'o kata gik mamoko manyalo hinyi.

In iwuon e ma ibiro bedo mamor!
Somali: Ka qaybqaad hawlaha kor u qaadaya wacyiga caafimaadka dhimirka iyo u doodida. Tani waxay kaa caawin kartaa inaad dareento inaad ka tirsan tahay iyo ujeedo.

English: Communities can come together to support individuals facing both mental health issues and substance use challenges through several strategies
Kiswahili: Jamii zinaweza kukusanyika pamoja ili kuwasaidia watu wanaokabiliwa na matatizo ya afya ya akili na changamoto za matumizi ya dawa za kulevya kupitia mikakati kadhaa.
Ekegusii: Chiamate nabo chigocha amo ase kobakonya abanto babwate emechando ya afya y'obongo na obokong'u bw'amariogo yogotindi goetera emeroberio emenge.
Dholuo: Dibed ni chandruogeni en pesa? Kik ibed ng'ama chich gi paro ma ok owinjore!
Somali: Bulshooyinka ayaa isu imaan kara si ay u taageeraan shakhsiyaadka la kulma dhibaatooyinka caafimaadka dhimirka iyo dhibaatooyinka isticmaalka maandooriyaha iyada oo loo marayo istaraatijiyadyo dhowr ah

English: Employers can identify signs of mental health issues in the workplace by observing changes in behavior, such as increased absenteeism, decreased productivity, or withdrawal from colleagues
Kiswahili: Waajiri wanaweza kutambua dalili za matatizo ya afya ya akili mahali pa kazi kwa kuona mabadiliko katika tabia, kama vile kuongezeka kwa kutokuwepo kazini, kupungua kwa tija, au kujiondoa kutoka kwa wafanyakazi wenzao.
Ekegusii: Abariki chigasi nabo bakonyara komanya ebiorokereri bi’obokong'u bw’oborwaria bw'obongo ase egasi egokoru ase okorora oboonchoreria bw'etabi, buna okoriya emeremo, ogokea kw'emeremo emiya gose kwerusanania korwa ase abokori emeremo bamwabo.
Dholuo: Sama wan gi pek mag yuto, yot luwo yore mag loyo pekgo mapiyo kaka tuke mag loyo mich kuom hawi, kata tiyo gi yedhe mamero, to magi medo mana ketho weche. Kar mano, bed gi paro mowinjore kuom kaka inyalo tiyo gi pesa, kendo tem ng'eyo kaka inyalo tiyo gi pesa e yo maber.
Somali: Shaqo-bixiyeyaashu waxay aqoonsan karaan calaamadaha dhibaatooyinka caafimaadka maskaxda ee goobta shaqada iyagoo arki doona isbeddellada dabeecadda, sida kororka maqnaanshaha, hoos u dhaca wax soo saarka, ama ka bixitaanka asxaabta

English: Ensure there are confidential channels for employees to seek mental health support without fear of retaliation or judgment
Kiswahili: Hakikisha kuna njia za siri kwa wafanyakazi kutafuta msaada wa afya ya akili bila hofu ya kulipiza kisasi au hukumu.
Ekegusii: Enekia ng'a chinchera chi'ibobisia nchireo ase abakori emeremo korigia obokonyi bw'afya y'obongo batari na obwoba bw'ogoakana egesiomba gose gosibu.
Dholuo: Mon nyalo romo gi pek moko makende e yudo thieth, moriwo ting' mag rito nyithindo, pek mag yuto, kod luoro mar wichkuot, manyalo ketho pachgi.
Somali: Hubi in ay jiraan habab qarsoodi ah oo shaqaalaha ay u raadsadaan taageero caafimaad maskaxeed iyagoo aan ka baqin aargoosi ama xukun

English: Make sure employees are aware of resources available to them, such as Employee Assistance Programs (EAPs), mental health hotlines, or counseling services
Kiswahili: Hakikisha wafanyakazi wanafahamu rasilimali zinazopatikana kwao, kama vile Programu za Usaidizi kwa Wafanyakazi (EAPs), simu za dharura za afya ya akili, au huduma za ushauri nasaha.
Ekegusii: Enekia ng'a abakori emeremo mbamanyete chintobokia chiobokonyi chikonyorekana ase bare, buna omoroberio bw'obokonyi ase abakori emeremo (eaps), chisimi chia bwango chi'afya y'obongo gose obokoreri bw'okomanyigwa kwa oboikeranu.
Dholuo: Par ane kony ma inyalo yudo kuom lakteche. Lakteche nyalo konyi ng'eyo kaka inyalo nyagori gi paro ma ok owinjore ma ji nigo kuomi kendo ginyalo konyi bedo gi paro mowinjore kuomi
Somali: Hubi in shaqaalaha ay yaqaanaan kheyraadka ay heli karaan, sida Barnaamijyada Caawimaadda Shaqaalaha (EAPs), khadadka tooska ah ee caafimaadka dhimirka, ama adeegyada la talinta

English: As Kenya records rising malaria cases due to climate variability, the just ended World Malaria Day serves as a critical reminder of the need to transform public health initiatives to meet these evolving challenges
Kiswahili: Huku Kenya ikirekodi ongezeko la visa vya malaria kutokana na mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa, Siku ya Malaria Duniani iliyomalizika hivi punde inatumika kama ukumbusho muhimu wa hitaji la kubadilisha mipango ya afya ya umma ili kukabiliana na changamoto hizi zinazoendelea.
Ekegusii: Kenya kegendererete korika okomentakana gw’esosera ekorentwa n'obwonchoreria bw'embeo, Rituko Riesosera Ense Engima erio rierete bwango iga nigo rigotumeka buna okoinyora obuya bw'okogania go'onchora emeroberio y'eafya y'abanto bonsi egere enyare korwani amakong'u aya agendererete.
Dholuo: Pek ma oganda kelo koda achaya ma chwo gi mon nigo, nyalo miyo ng'ato obed gi parruok mang'eny e ngimane kendo miyo obed gi tuoche mag paro.
Somali: Iyada oo Kenya ay diiwaangeliso kiisaska cudurka daacuunka oo sii kordhaya sababo la xiriira kala duwanaanshaha cimilada, maalinta caalamiga ah ee daacuunka ee dhowaan la soo gabagabeeyay waxay u adeegtaa sidii xasuusin muhiim ah oo ku saabsan baahida loo qabo in la beddelo dadaallada caafimaadka dadweynaha si loo daboolo caqabadaha soo koraya

English: Communities in Baringo fight back against malaria with local solutions and mosquito nets
Kiswahili: Jamii huko Baringo zinapambana na malaria kwa kutumia suluhisho za kienyeji na vyandarua
Ekegusii: Eamate ya Baringo nigo ekorwania esosera goetera chinchera ch'egekoro amo ne chineti.
Dholuo: Kuom tiyo gi yoregi, mon nyalo bedo gi teko mar nyagruok kendo dwoko chien lit ma bedo gi wich kuot kelo e ngimagi mar paro.
Somali: Bulshooyinka ku nool Baringo ayaa la dagaallamaya duumada iyagoo isticmaalaya xalal maxalli ah iyo maro kaneeco

English: Kenya-tested malaria vaccine gets WHO approval
Kiswahili: Chanjo ya malaria iliyojaribiwa Kenya yaidhinishwa na WHO
Ekegusii: Eriogo ri’esosera erio riatemetwe Kenya riancheranirwe na WHO
Dholuo: Ng'eyo tiend midekre mag paro nyalo miyo ibed gi teko mar kwedo paro maok kare. Wuo gi osiepeni koda joodu kuom weche makare mondo okonygi ng'eyo kendo dwoko chien achaye ma ji nigo
Somali: Tallaalka Cudurka Malaria ee Kenya lagu tijaabiyey ayaa helay ogolaanshaha WHO

English: WHO approves second malaria jab for children, to cost as low as Sh300
Kiswahili: WHO yaidhinisha chanjo ya pili ya malaria kwa watoto, kuwa na gharama ya chini ya Sh300
Ekegusii: WHO yancheranire okoegwa eriogo ria kabere ria esosera ase abana, koba ne rigori ria inse ya sh. 300
Dholuo: Bed modich e timo gik ma jiwo ji mondo ong'e tuoche mag obwongo. Timo kamano nyalo miyo ng'ato one ni orwake kendo ni ngimane nigi tiende.
Somali: Ururka Caafimaadka Adduunka ayaa aqbala cirbadeynta labaad ee duumada ee carruurta, waxay ku kici doontaa wax yar Sh300

English: Womens mental health can be influenced by hormonal changes related to the menstrual cycle, pregnancy, and menopause. Substance use can disrupt these hormonal balances, potentially intensifying mental health symptoms
Kiswahili: Afya ya akili ya wanawake inaweza kuathiriwa na mabadiliko ya homoni yanayohusiana na mzunguko wa hedhi, ujauzito, na kukoma hedhi. Matumizi ya dawa za kulevya yanaweza kuvuruga mizania hii ya homoni, na hivyo kuongeza dalili za afya ya akili.
Ekegusii: Afya y'obongo bwa abakungu nabo bogoturubanigwa na amaonchoreri yo obonyamasi bokobwaterana na okorora erangi, oborito na gotiga korora erangi. Ogotumekwa kwa amariogo yo ogotindi nobo kogoturubani ebirengo abio bio obonyamasi na komenta okororekana koba ne emechando y'eafya y'obongo.
Dholuo: Dhano manie alwora nyalo riwore kanyachiel mondo gikony joma nigi tuoche mag paro koda joma tiyo gi yedhe mamero kokalo kuom yore mopogore opogore
Somali: Caafimaadka maskaxda dumarka waxaa saameyn ku yeelan kara isbeddellada hoormoonka ee la xiriira wareegga caadada, uurka, iyo menopause.

English: Long-term substance use can impair cognitive functions such as memory and decision-making, which can further complicate mental health issues and affect daily functioning
Kiswahili: Matumizi ya dawa za kulevya kwa muda mrefu yanaweza kuathiri utendaji kazi wa utambuzi kama vile kumbukumbu na kufanya maamuzi, ambayo yanaweza kuzidisha matatizo ya afya ya akili na kuathiri utendaji kazi wa kila siku.
Ekegusii: Ogotumeka kwa amariogo y'ogotindi ase chingaki chintambe nabo agosaria okomanya obokori egasi emeremo buna okoinyora na gokora okonacha koramente obokongu bw'eafya y'obongo na gosaria obokori bw'emeremo ya kira rituko.
Dholuo: Joma ondiko ji tich nyalo fwenyo ranyisi mag tuoche mag paro ka gineno lokruok ma ji timo e timbegi, kaka bedo maonge e tich pile, bedo gi tich matin, kata weyo tudruok gi jowetegi.
Somali: Isticmaalka daroogada muddada dheer waxay saameyn ku yeelan kartaa howlaha garashada sida xusuusta iyo go'aan qaadashada, taas oo sii adkeyn karta arrimaha caafimaadka dhimirka waxayna saameyn ku yeelan kartaa shaqada maalinlaha ah

English: Goal-setting is subjective. It is important to create goals that make sense for you during your recovery journey. If you need assistance in creating realistic and achievable goals, reach out to your mentor, peer, or another mental health professional for guidance and tips
Kiswahili: Kuweka malengo ni jambo la kibinafsi. Ni muhimu kuunda malengo yanayokufaa wakati wa safari yako ya kupona. Ikiwa unahitaji usaidizi katika kuunda malengo halisi na yanayoweza kufikiwa, wasiliana na mshauri wako, mwenzako, au mtaalamu mwingine wa afya ya akili kwa mwongozo na vidokezo.
Ekegusii: Kobeka ebirenga n’engana ya bene. N’egento ki engencho korosia ebirenga bikogwenerete ekero ore a se esabari y’okogwena. Onye g otagete obokonyi korosia ebirenga ebiya bigoikereka, rigia omosemia oo, oyomino, gose omomanyi onde b w’oborwaria, gose omomanyi b w’oborwaria bw’obongo omomanyi, orakoe obomanyi.
Dholuo: Keto chenro mar timo gimoro en gima ng'ato timo owuon. En gima dwarore ahinya mondo iket chenro minyalo chopo e kinde ma idwaro duogo. Kapo ni idwaro mondo okonyi bedo gi chenro ma inyalo chopo, inyalo wuoyo gi ng'at ma nyalo konyi, kata ng'at machielo molony e weche thieth mondo okonyi
Somali: Hadafku waa mid madax banaan. Waa muhiim in la abuuro himilooyin macno leh inta lagu jiro safarkaaga soo kabashada. Haddii aad u baahan tahay caawimaad sameynta himilooyin macquul ah oo la gaari karo, la xiriir tababarahaaga, asxaabtaada ama xirfadle kale oo caafimaadka dhimirka ah si aad u hesho hagitaan iyo talooyin

English: Look at your family history of mental illness and addiction, several studies have shown that this disease tends to run in the family, but can be prevented. The more you are aware of your biological, environmental and physical risk factors the more likely you are to overcome them
Kiswahili: Angalia historia ya familia yako ya ugonjwa wa akili na uraibu, tafiti kadhaa zimeonyesha kuwa ugonjwa huu huwa unaenea katika familia, lakini unaweza kuzuiwa. Kadiri unavyofahamu zaidi mambo yako ya hatari ya kibiolojia, kimazingira na kimwili, ndivyo unavyozidi kuwa na uwezekano wa kuyashinda.
Ekegusii: Rigereria omogano bw'oborwaire bw'obongo amo nokonarereria ase enyomba yaino, obotuki obonge bwaorokirie ng'a oborwaire obo nigo bogotara ase enyomba, korende nabo bogotangwa. Buna okomanya mono igoro y'amang’ana aya are n’obobe ase oboibori, ase obomenyo, na ase omobere, nario oramanye enchera yokoyabua.Rigereria omogano bw'oborwaire bw'obongo amo nokonarereria ase enyomba yaino, obotuki obonge bwaorokirie ng'a oborwaire obo nigo bogotara ase enyomba, korende nabo bogotangwa. Buna okomanya mono igoro y'amang’ana aya are n’obobe ase oboibori, ase obomenyo, na ase omobere, nario oramanye enchera yokoyabua.
Dholuo: Non ane chal mar joodu kodok korka tuoche mag paro koda tiyo gi yedhe mamero, nonro mang'eny osenyiso ni tuwoni en tuwo mayudore e anyuola, kata kamano inyalo geng'e. Kaka imedo ng'eyo gigo manyalo hinyo ngimani, e kaka imedo bedo gi nyalo mar kedo kodgi
Somali: Fiiri taariikhda qoyskaaga ee cudurrada maskaxda iyo balwadda, daraasado dhowr ah ayaa muujisay in cudurkan uu u muuqdo inuu ku socdo qoyska, laakiin waa la hortagi karaa.

English: Develop routines for nutrition, exercise, and sleep. This promotes physical and mental health, contributing to a balanced lifestyle.
Kiswahili: Tengeneza utaratibu wa lishe, mazoezi, na usingizi. Hii inakuza afya ya kimwili na kiakili, na kuchangia mtindo wa maisha wenye usawa.
Ekegusii: Rosia chinchera chiokoragera okuya, gokora amasoesi na korara. Eye nigo egokinia oborwaria bw'omobere n'obongo, erio gosiira komenya obogima oboikeranu.
Dholuo: Bed gi chenro mar chiemo, rieyo dendi, kod nindo. Timo kamano miyo wabedo gi ngima maber mar del koda paro, kendo miyo wadak e ngima maok kal tong'.
Somali: Cuntada, jimicsiga iyo hurdada caadiga ah samee, taasoo kaa caawineysa inaad caafimaad qabtid jidh ahaan iyo maskax ahaan, taasoo kaa caawineysa inaad nolol dheelitirsan yeelatid.

English: Expectant mothers are urged to start antenatal care visits during the first trimester of pregnancy to monitor both mother and babys health. Early check-ups help identify risks and ensure safe delivery.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wajawazito wanahimizwa kuanza ziara za utunzaji wa ujauzito wakati wa miezi mitatu ya kwanza ya ujauzito ili kufuatilia afya ya mama na mtoto. Uchunguzi wa mapema husaidia kutambua hatari na kuhakikisha kujifungua salama.
Ekegusii: Abasubati bebwateranetie basoroirwe gochaka kogenda ekeriniki ase emetienyi emetang’ani etato y’oborito, erio korenga afya y’omwana na ng’ina
Dholuo: Ijiwo mine mapod nie ich mondo ochak dhi e osiptal e dweche adek mokwongo kapok onyuol nyathi mondo ging'e chal mar min nyathi koda mar nyathine. Nono janyuol chon konyo e fwenyo hinyruok manyalo betie kendo miyo onyuol maber.
Somali: Hooyooyinka uurka leh waxaa lagula talinayaa inay bilaabaan booqashooyinka daryeelka uurka kahor inta aysan dhalin intii lagu jiray saddexdii bilood ee ugu horreysay ee uurka si ay ula socdaan caafimaadka hooyada iyo ilmaha.

English: Health centers are offering free iron and folic acid supplements to all pregnant women to prevent anemia and birth defects. Visit your nearest facility today.
Kiswahili: Vituo vya afya vinatoa virutubisho vya chuma na foliki bila malipo kwa wanawake wote wajawazito ili kuzuia upungufu wa damu na kasoro za kuzaliwa. Tembelea kituo kilicho karibu nawe leo.
Ekegusii: Ebitaseni bi'obogwenia bono nkoenana bire amadini y'echuma na foliki ase abang'ina bonsi bebwateranetie erio gotanga Anemia/ogokeea kw'amanyinga omobere na gotanga oborema bw'okoiborwa. Tarera egetaseni ki'obogwenia kere ang'e naye rero.
Dholuo: Ute thieth chiwo gige thieth mag chuma kod folic acid ne mine duto ma nigi ich mondo okonygi geng'o tuo mar anemia kod nyuol gi tuoche moko. Dhi e osiptal manie machiegni kodi.
Somali: Xarumaha caafimaadka waxay haweenka uurka leh oo dhan u soo bandhigaan daawooyin lacag la'aan ah oo bir ah iyo folic acid si looga hortago dhiig yaraanta iyo cillad dhalashada. Maanta booqo xaruntaada ugu dhow.

English: All deliveries should be conducted by skilled birth attendants at health facilities. This ensures safer births and immediate care in case of complications.
Kiswahili: Uzazi wote unapaswa kufanywa na wakunga wenye ujuzi katika vituo vya afya. Hii inahakikisha uzazi salama na huduma ya haraka iwapo kutatokea matatizo.
Ekegusii: Okoiborigwa kogwenerete gokoru na'bamanyi ase chinyagitari .Eye nigo ekoenekia okoiboirigwa okuya na obokonyi bwa bwango obokong'u boisa kobao
Dholuo: Nyithindo duto onego onyuol gi joma olony e weche mag thieth. Timo kamano miyo nyuol bedo maonge hinyruok kendo rito janyuol mapiyo kapo ni nitie chandruok moro.
Somali: Dhammaan dhalmada waa in ay sameeyaan kalkaaliyayaal xirfadlayaal ah oo ka shaqeeya xarumaha caafimaadka. Tani waxay hubisaa dhalmada ammaan ah iyo daryeelka degdegga ah haddii ay dhacdo dhibaatooyin.

English: Mothers are advised to exclusively breastfeed their babies for the first six months without giving water or food. Breastmilk provides all the nutrients and protection a baby needs.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wanashauriwa kuwanyonyesha watoto wao pekee kwa miezi sita ya kwanza bila kuwapa maji au chakula. Maziwa ya mama hutoa virutubisho na ulinzi wote ambao mtoto anahitaji.
Ekegusii: Abang’ina nigo bakoborigwa kogonkia abaana babo amabere ooka ase emetienyi etano nomo batari kobaa amache gose endagera. Amabere ayokogonkigwa nigo akoa omwana amadini onsi amo na oborendi atakaeire gotwara.
Dholuo: Inyiso mine mondo opidh nyithindgi mana gi chak mar minegi kuom dweche auchiel mokwongo, maok gimiyogi pi kata chiemo. Kodhi mar miyo miyo miyo nyathi chiemo koda ritruok madwarore.
Somali: Hooyooyinka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay carruurtooda naasnuujiso oo keliya lixdii bilood ee ugu horeysa, iyaga oo aan siin biyo ama cunto.

English: All pregnant women are encouraged to create a birth preparedness plan including identifying a health facility, arranging transport, and saving funds.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wote wajawazito wanahimizwa kuunda mpango wa maandalizi ya kujifungua ikiwa ni pamoja na kutambua kituo cha afya, kupanga usafiri, na kuweka akiba ya fedha.
Ekegusii: Abakungu bonsi bebwateranetie nigo bairwe omoyo barosie omopango bwo’gochi kobiara, amo na gochora enyagitari, kobanga esafari na kogacha chibesa .
Dholuo: Ijiwo mon duto ma nigi ich mondo olos chenro mar ikruok ne nyuol moriwo nyaka manyo kuonde thieth, loso yore mag wuoth, kod kano pesa.
Somali: Dhamaan haweenka uurka leh waxaa lagu dhiiri geliyaa inay sameeyaan qorshe diyaar u ah dhalashada oo ay ku jiraan aqoonsashada xarun caafimaad, abaabulka gaadiidka, iyo keydinta lacag.

English: Caregivers should follow the national immunization schedule to protect children against deadly diseases such as measles, polio, and tuberculosis.
Kiswahili: Walezi wanapaswa kufuata ratiba ya kitaifa ya chanjo ili kuwalinda watoto dhidi ya magonjwa hatari kama vile surua, polio, na kifua kikuu.
Ekegusii: Abareri nigo bagwenerete kobwatia omoroberio bw'ense bw'echanjo erio korenda abana korwa ase amarwaire amabe buna measles, polio na Esese
Dholuo: Joma rito nyithindo onego oluw chenro moketi mar kano yedhe mag geng'o tuoche kaka, ayaki, polio, kod kahera.
Somali: Daryeelayaashu waa inay raacaan jadwalka tallaalka qaranka si ay caruurta uga ilaaliyaan cudurrada dilaaga ah sida suuxdinta, cudurka booliiska, iyo cudurka hargabka.

English: For low birth weight babies, Kangaroo Mother Care  skin-to-skin contact  is recommended to regulate body temperature, improve breastfeeding, and boost survival.
Kiswahili: Kwa watoto waliozaliwa na uzito mdogo, Huduma ya Mama ya Kangaroo - mguso wa ngozi kwa ngozi - unapendekezwa ili kudhibiti joto la mwili, kuboresha unyonyeshaji, na kuongeza maisha.
Ekegusii: Ase abana bari baiboire nechikiro chinke,Huduma ya Mama ya Kangaroo - ogokunana kw'omobere nkoganeirie erio komenta riberera riomobere,okogonka okuya, na komenta obogima.
Dholuo: Kuom nyithindo ma nyuol ka nigi del mapek, ich-ng'ol mar Kangaroo Mother Care ijiwo mondo orit liet mar dendgi, miyo gidhedhre maber, kendo miyo gitony.
Somali: Carruurta culeyskoodu hooseeyo marka ay dhasho waxaa lagula talinayaa in la sameeyo daryeelka hooyooyinka kangaroo - oo ah xidhiidhka maqaarka ilaa maqaarka - si loo xakameeyo heerkulka jirka, loo hagaajiyo naas nuujinta, loona kordhiyo badbaadada.

English: Pregnant women should seek immediate care if they experience severe headaches, swelling, blurred vision, or bleeding. These may be signs of serious complications.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito wanapaswa kutafuta huduma ya haraka ikiwa watapata maumivu makali ya kichwa, uvimbe, kutoona vizuri, au kutokwa na damu. Hizi zinaweza kuwa ishara za matatizo makubwa.
Ekegusii: Abakungu bebwateraneti mbagwenerete korigi oborendi bwa bwango ekero bagoatigu omotu ,okobimba omobere ,okoriba amaiso naboigo okorwa amanyinga. Ebi nabo birabe ebimanyererio biobokongu obonene.
Dholuo: Mon man gi ich onego omany kony mapiyo kapo ni giwinjo wich malit, giwinjo ka dendgi ng'ich, gineno gik moko e yo ma ok nenre maler, kata ka remo wuok. Mago nyalo bedo ranyisi mag tuoche madongo.
Somali: Haweenka uurka leh waxay u baahan yihiin daryeel degdeg ah haddii ay qabaan madax xanuun daran, caabuq, aragti murugsan, ama dhiig bax, kuwaas oo calaamad u noqon kara dhibaatooyin culus.

English: Mothers and newborns should attend postnatal check-ups within 48 hours after birth to detect any complications and promote healthy recovery.
Kiswahili: Akina mama na watoto wachanga wanapaswa kuhudhuria uchunguzi wa baada ya kujifungua ndani ya saa 48 baada ya kujifungua ili kugundua matatizo yoyote na kukuza afya njema.
Ekegusii: Abang'ina amo n'abana abake bagwenerete kogenda oborengi nyagitari chinsa 48 koru okoibora banyare korengwa erio korigia bobe bonde bwonsi na korotota okobwena kwa bwango.
Dholuo: Min nyithindo kaachiel gi nyithindo ma eka oa nyuol onego odhi one janyuolgi bang' nyuolgi bang' seche 48 mondo gine ni onge midekre manyalo bedoe kendo mondo omi janyuol ong'e ni nyathine dhi maber.
Somali: Hooyooyinka iyo dhallaanka cusub waa inay ka qeybgalaan baaritaano dhalashada kadib 48 saacadood ka dib dhalashada si loo ogaado wax dhibaato ah loona horumariyo soo kabashada caafimaad.

English: Pregnant women are encouraged to sleep under insecticide-treated nets and take preventive medication to avoid malaria, which poses risks to both mother and baby.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito wanahimizwa kulala chini ya vyandarua vilivyotibiwa na dawa za kuua wadudu na kutumia dawa za kuzuia malaria ili kuepuka malaria, ambayo inahatarisha maisha ya mama na mtoto.
Ekegusii: Abakungu bebwateraneti nigo bagosegetwa korara ime yechineti chirwariri goita chiumbu, na konyora amariogo yogotanga Esosera eywo ekobeka omwana na ng'ina ase abe.
Dholuo: Ijiwo mon ma yach mondo onind e bwo net ma osetwang' gi yedhe mag nego kute kendo mondo gikaw yedhe mag geng'o malaria, ma en tuwo manyalo hinyo mama koda nyathi.
Somali: Haweenka uurka leh waxaa lagu dhiirigelinayaa inay ku seexdaan shabagyada lagu daaweeyo cayayaanka iyo inay qaataan daawooyin ka hortag ah si looga fogaado makaraariya, taas oo khatar u ah hooyada iyo ilmaha.

English: Men are encouraged to accompany their partners to antenatal clinics and support them during pregnancy and after childbirth. Male involvement improves outcomes.
Kiswahili: Wanaume wanahimizwa kuandamana na wenzi wao kwenye kliniki za ujauzito na kuwasaidia wakati wa ujauzito na baada ya kujifungua. Ushiriki wa wanaume huboresha matokeo.
Ekegusii: Abasacha baborigwe kogenda n'abakungu babo ase chikliniki na kobakonya ekero bebwateraneirie na ekero baiboire abana. Okoba aroro kw'abasacha nigo kogokinia amatokeo.
Dholuo: Ijiwo chwo mondo odhi gi mondegi e osiptande mag nyuol kendo konyogi e kinde ma gin gi ich koda bang' nyuol. Bedo gi chwo mang'eny konyo ahinya.
Somali: Ragga waxaa lagu dhiirigelinayaa inay la socdaan lammaanahooda rugta caafimaad ee uurka ka hor iyo taageero inta lagu jiro uurka iyo dhalmada kadib.

English: Pregnant women should consume a balanced diet rich in iron, protein, and vitamins to support fetal development and maternal health.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito wanapaswa kula lishe bora yenye madini ya chuma, protini, na vitamini ili kusaidia ukuaji wa fetasi na afya ya mama.
Ekegusii: Abakungu bebwateranetie mbagwenerete koria chindagera chireng’anirie, chibwate amadini y’echuma, chiproteini, amo na evitamini erio gosiira okoba buya kw’omwana ore inda, n’oborwaria bw’oborito.
Dholuo: Mon ma yach onego ocham chiemo moting'o gik mang'eny kaka iron, protein, kod vitamin mondo okony nyathi mapok onyuol kod min mare obed gi ngima maber.
Somali: Dumarka uurka leh waa inay cuntaan cunto isku dheelitiran oo hodan ku ah birta, borotiinka, iyo fitamiinada si ay u taageeraan horumarka uurka iyo caafimaadka hooyada.

English: Children aged 1 to 5 should be dewormed every six months to prevent worm infections that can lead to malnutrition and stunted growth.
Kiswahili: Watoto wenye umri wa miaka 1 hadi 5 wanapaswa kusafishwa minyoo kila baada ya miezi sita ili kuzuia maambukizi ya minyoo ambayo yanaweza kusababisha utapiamlo na ukuaji wa kudumaa.
Ekegusii: Abana b’omwaka 1 goika 5 mbagwenerete gosibigwa ebianda ase kera emetienyi etano n’omo, erio gotanga okoambokeria kw’ebianda ebio biranyare korenta enchara na ogotakina buya.
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma hikgi nie kind 1 gi 5 onego ogol kudni e dendgi bang' dweche auchiel ka dweche auchiel, mondo ogeng' tuwo mar kute manyalo kelo kech koda dongo e okang' mamalo.
Somali: Carruurta da'doodu u dhaxayso 1 illaa 5 sano waa in la daaweeyaa lixdii biloodba mar si looga hortago cudurrada cayayaanka ee keeni kara nafaqo la'aanta iyo koritaanka gaabis ah.

English: Caregivers are advised to keep the umbilical cord clean and dry. Do not apply substances like ash or herbs as they may cause infections.
Kiswahili: Walezi wanashauriwa kuweka kitovu kikiwa safi na kikavu. Usipake vitu kama majivu au mimea kwani vinaweza kusababisha maambukizi.
Ekegusii: Abareri nigo baborigwe korenda ekenyogu ki'omwana kebe ekerabu naende gekamogete. Mbabaisa goaka ebinto buna ribu gose emete yorosana ekiagera nigo birarente amarwaire
Dholuo: Ijiwo joma rito jatuo mondo obed maler kendo obed kama otwo. Kik iti gi gik machalo gi buru kata yath moro amora nikech ginyalo kelo tuoche.
Somali: Daryeelada waxaa lagula talinayaa in xadhkaha burburka uu ahaado mid nadiif ah oo qalalan. Ha isticmaalin waxyaabo sida dambas ama dalagyo sababtoo ah waxay sababi karaan cudurro.

English: Communities should educate and support adolescents to avoid early pregnancies through life skills, counseling, and access to reproductive health services.
Kiswahili: Jamii zinapaswa kuwaelimisha na kuwasaidia vijana kuepuka mimba za mapema kupitia ujuzi wa maisha, ushauri nasaha, na upatikanaji wa huduma za afya ya uzazi.
Ekegusii: Eamate negwenerete okegeria na gokoonya abana abasae gotanga oborito bwa mapema goetera kobaegeria obomanyi bw'obogima, obosemia, na goikera oborwari bw'oroiboro.
Dholuo: Pinje onego opuonj kendo okony rowere ma rowere mondo kik gikaw ich e kinde ma pod gitindo kokalo kuom lony e ngima, kony, kod yudo yore mag thieth mag nyuol.
Somali: Bulshooyinka waa inay bartaan oo taageeraan dhalinyarada si ay uga fogaadaan uurka hore iyada oo loo marayo xirfadaha nolosha, la talinta, iyo helitaanka adeegyada caafimaadka taranka.

English: Children under five should receive vitamin A drops every six months to boost immunity and reduce child mortality.
Kiswahili: Watoto walio chini ya miaka mitano wanapaswa kupokea matone ya vitamini A kila baada ya miezi sita ili kuongeza kinga na kupunguza vifo vya watoto.
Ekegusii: Abana bare nse y'emiaka etano baganerigwe konyora amadini a Vitamini A ya monu kera emetienyi etano n'omo, erio korenda ogokina kwomwana na gokei amakweri
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma johigini abich kadok chien onego ocham vitamin A bang' dweche auchiel ka dweche auchiel, mondo okonygi geng'o tuoche kendo geng'o nyithindo kik tho.
Somali: Carruurta ka yar shan sano waa inay helaan dhibicyo fitamiin A lixdii biloodba mar si loo xoojiyo difaaca jirka loona yareeyo dhimashada carruurta.

English: Some cultural practices during pregnancy and childbirth may endanger lives. Communities are urged to adopt evidence-based health practices.
Kiswahili: Baadhi ya desturi za kitamaduni wakati wa ujauzito na kujifungua zinaweza kuhatarisha maisha. Jamii zinahimizwa kufuata desturi za kiafya zinazotegemea ushahidi.
Ekegusii: Chingencho chinde chia kare ekero giokwebwaterani amo na okoibora nabo bikobeka amagima akong’u . Eamate yasoroirwe koegia chingencho chi’oborwaria chienekirie.
Dholuo: Timbe moko mag anyuola e kinde mag nyuol nyalo kelo hinyruok. Ijiwo ji mondo oluw yore mag thieth motenore kuom nonro mosetim.
Somali: Caadooyinka dhaqanka qaarkood inta lagu jiro uurka iyo dhalmada ayaa khatar gelin kara nolosha. Bulshooyinka waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay qaataan caadooyin caafimaad oo ku saleysan caddaynta.

English: Caregivers should wash hands with soap before handling babies, after changing diapers, and before feeding to prevent infections.
Kiswahili: Walezi wanapaswa kunawa mikono kwa sabuni kabla ya kuwashughulikia watoto, baada ya kubadilisha nepi, na kabla ya kuwalisha ili kuzuia maambukizi.
Ekegusii: Abareri nigo babwenerete gosibia amaboko amo n’esabuni, batarabwata abana, ekero bakorire kobarusia ebitangachabu na ekero batarabarageria erinde gotanga chindwari.
Dholuo: Joma rito nyithindo onego olwok lwetegi gi sabun kapok gimako nyithindo, bang' loko popegi, kendo kapok gichiemo mondo kik giyud tuoche.
Somali: Daryeelayaashu waa inay gacmaha ku maydhaan saabuun ka hor intaanay xidhin ilmaha, ka dib markay beddelaan boorsooyinka, iyo ka hor inta aan la quudin si looga hortago cudurrada.

English: Fast breathing and chest indrawing in children may signal pneumonia. Seek medical care immediately.
Kiswahili: Kupumua haraka na kuvuta kifua kwa watoto kunaweza kuashiria nimonia. Tafuta huduma ya matibabu mara moja.
Ekegusii:
Okoeyana bwango, na okong'usa egekuba gochia ime ase abana nabo korabe ekemanyererio gi’ekeuno/nimonia.
 Rigia okorwarigwa bwango.
Dholuo: Yueyo mar muya e yo mapiyo kod bedo gi rem e kor nyithindo nyalo nyiso ni gin gi tuwo mar nyumonia. Dwar mapiyo thieth.
Somali: Carruurta oo neefsashada degdegga ah iyo xajinta laabta waxay calaamad u noqon karaan cudurka sanbabada.

English: Parents should register the birth of their child at the nearest civil registration office. A birth certificate secures a childs legal identity and access to services.
Kiswahili: Wazazi wanapaswa kusajili kuzaliwa kwa mtoto wao katika ofisi ya usajili wa kiraia iliyo karibu. Cheti cha kuzaliwa kinahakikisha utambulisho wa kisheria wa mtoto na upatikanaji wa huduma.
Ekegusii:
Abaibori mbagwenerete korikia okoibora Kwa abana babo ase obisi ya korikia ere ang'e.
 Esatibigeti ya okoibora nigo ekorenda richiko riokomanyekana kw’omwana na konyora obokoreri.
Dholuo: Jonyuol onego ondik nying nyathigi e rejistari mar anyuola machiegni kodgi. Satifiket mar nyuol miyo nyathi bedo ng'at ma sirkal oyiego, kendo miyo oyudo kony.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay dhalashada ilmahooda ka diiwaangeliyaan xafiiska diiwaangelinta rayidka ee ugu dhow.Shahaadada dhalashada waxay xaqiijineysaa aqoonsiga sharciga ah ee ilmaha iyo helitaanka adeegyada.

English: Delivering at home without skilled help puts both mother and baby at risk. Always deliver at a health facility with trained personnel.
Kiswahili: Kujifungua nyumbani bila msaada wa kitaalamu kunamweka mama na mtoto katika hatari. Daima jifungulie katika kituo cha afya chenye wafanyakazi waliofunzwa.
Ekegusii: Okoiborera nka otabwati obokonyi bw’omomanyi nigo gokobeka omwana na ng’ina ase obobe. Botambe, iborera nyagitari ase abakori emeremo abamanyi bare basomerete.
Dholuo: Nywolo nyathi e pacho ma onge ng'at molony e weche mag thieth keto ngima mar min nyathi koda mar nyathine kama rach. Kinde duto ter nyithindi e osiptal ma nigi joma olony.
Somali: Haddii ilmaha guriga lagu dhaliyo iyada oo aan la helin caawimaad xirfad leh, hooyada iyo ilmahaba khatar bay ku jiraan.

English: Pregnant women living with HIV should attend clinic early to receive antiretroviral therapy and prevent transmission to the baby.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito wanaoishi na VVU wanapaswa kuhudhuria kliniki mapema ili kupata tiba ya kupunguza makali ya virusi vya ukimwi na kuzuia maambukizi kwa mtoto.
Ekegusii: Abakungu abare morito, naende bamenyete na ebirusi bia HIV,nigo babwenerete gochaka ekeriniki mapema banyore amariogo ya ogokeiyia ebirusi bia Enyamoreo, na gotanga okoambokeria Omwana.
Dholuo: Mon ma yach ma nigi AYAKI onego odhi e klinik chon mondo oyud thieth mar anti- retroviral kendo geng'o nyathinino kik yud tuwono.
Somali: Haweenka uurka leh ee qaba cudurka HIV waxay u baahan yihiin inay si dhakhso leh u tagaan rugta caafimaadka si ay u helaan daaweynta antiretroviral iyo ka hortagga gudbinta ilmaha.

English: Pregnant women in their second trimester should receive deworming medication to improve nutrition and reduce complications.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito katika miezi mitatu yao ya pili ya ujauzito wanapaswa kupokea dawa za minyoo ili kuboresha lishe na kupunguza matatizo.
Ekegusii: Abang’ina abageni nigo bakoegwa omoyo, gokwanera okobanga oroiboro amo na abakoreri na abamanyi erinde korwa ribaga risaine ase oborito erio koenekia okogwena buya ekero baiboire.
Dholuo: Mon ma yach e trimester mar ariyo onego oyud yedhe mag geng'o kute mag kute mondo omi gimed chamo chiemo maber kendo geng'o midekre.
Somali: Haweenka uurka leh ee saddexda bilood ee labaad waa inay helaan daawooyinka ka hortagga cayayaanka si loo hagaajiyo nafaqada loona yareeyo dhibaatooyinka.

English: New mothers are encouraged to discuss family planning options with health providers to allow proper spacing of pregnancies and ensure maternal recovery.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wapya wanahimizwa kujadili chaguzi za uzazi wa mpango na watoa huduma za afya ili kuruhusu nafasi nzuri ya ujauzito na kuhakikisha mama anaendelea kupona.
Ekegusii: Abang’ina abageni baairwe omoyo, gotwara enkwanaigoro y’okobanga oroiboro amo na abakoreri b’oborwari, erio korwa ribaga risaine ase okoba morito na koenekia okogwena ekero baiboire
Dholuo: Miyo mapod nyien ijiwo mondo owuo kod joma chiwo thieth e wi yore mag chano mar bedo gi nyithindo mondo omi gibed gi thuolo mowinjore e kind ich kod nyuol, kendo mondo gibed gadier ni minegi biro chango.
Somali: Hooyooyinka cusub waxaa lagu dhiirigelinayaa inay ka wada hadlaan fursadaha qorshaynta qoyska bixiyeyaasha caafimaadka si ay u oggolaadaan kala duwanaanshaha uurka si sax ah loona hubiyo soo kabashada hooyada.

English: At six months, introduce soft, nutrient-rich foods while continuing breastfeeding. Avoid sugary snacks and ensure hygiene during feeding.
Kiswahili: Katika miezi sita, mtangulie vyakula laini na vyenye virutubisho vingi huku ukiendelea kunyonyesha. Epuka vitafunio vyenye sukari na hakikisha usafi wakati wa kunyonyesha.
Ekegusii: Goika emetienyi etano n’omo,,chakia endagera eng'oo ebwate amadini kogendererete kogonkia. Etange koria ebitoki bibwate Esukari enyinge na enekia obochenu engaki y’okorageria.
Dholuo: Ka en ja dweche auchiel, chak miye chiemo mayom kendo maber, ka pod idhi nyime pidho nyathino gi min. Kik ucham chiemo moting'o sukari mang'eny kendo rituru ler e kinde ma upidho nyithindu.
Somali: Markaad lix bilood jirtid, cuntada jilicsan ee nafaqooyinka badan leh ku dar intaad naas nuujineyso. Ka fogow cuntooyinka macaan iyo nadiifinta intaad quudineyso.

English: Adolescent mothers need extra emotional, nutritional, and medical support. Communities are urged to reduce stigma and promote inclusive care.
Kiswahili: Akina mama vijana wanahitaji msaada wa ziada wa kihisia, lishe, na matibabu. Jamii zinahimizwa kupunguza unyanyapaa na kukuza utunzaji jumuishi.
Ekegusii: Abang'ina abasae mbaganatie obokonyi bwa ebirengererio,endagera na oborwaria.Ebisaku biasabirwe gokeia oboiroku na gosira oborendi bwa amo.
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma nigi mine ma rowere dwarore oyud kony momedore kuom weche mag chuny, mag chiemo, koda mag thieth. Kanyakla ijiwo mondo odwok chien wich kuot kendo ojiw mondo orit ji duto.
Somali: Hooyooyinka dhallinyarada ah waxay u baahan yihiin taageero dheeraad ah oo dareen, nafaqo iyo caafimaad. Bulshooyinka waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay yareeyaan caymiska iyo inay horumariyaan daryeelka oo dhan.

English: Pregnant women should receive tetanus toxoid vaccination to protect themselves and their babies from neonatal tetanus.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito wanapaswa kupata chanjo ya pepopunda ili kujikinga na watoto wao kutokana na pepopunda ya watoto wachanga.
Ekegusii: Abasubati bebwateranetie mbaganeirie konyora esindani ya tetanus erinde koerenda amo na abana korua ase endwari eyio ya tetanus.
Dholuo: Mon ma yach onego ocham yadh anti-tetanus toxoid mondo oritgi kaachiel gi nyithindgi kuom tuo mar tetanus.
Somali: Haweenka uurka leh waa inay helaan tallaalka tetanus toxoid si ay naftooda iyo carruurtooda uga ilaaliyaan tetanus-ka dhalmada cusub.

English: New mothers experiencing sadness, withdrawal, or hopelessness should seek mental health support. Postpartum depression is treatable.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wapya wanaopitia huzuni, kujitenga, au kukata tamaa wanapaswa kutafuta msaada wa afya ya akili. Mfadhaiko baada ya kujifungua unaweza kutibiwa.
Ekegusii:
Abasubati bagonkirie na koigwa kobea, kobera are na abanto na gosiria ogosemeria mbabwenerete korigia obokonyi na gosiirwa ase ebirengererio.
 Oborwaire bwa ebirengererio kobwatia okogonkia nkorwarigwa bore na kogwena.
Dholuo: Mon ma eka obedo mine, ma chunygi onyosore, ma chunygi ool, kata ma chunygi ool, onego omany kony e weche thieth. Chandruok mabedoe bang' nyuol inyalo thiedhi.
Somali: Hooyooyinka cusub ee caloolxumo la kulma, oo ka baxsan, ama rajo la'aan ah waxay u baahan yihiin inay raadsadaan taageero caafimaad maskaxeed.

English: Regular weight checks at clinics help detect growth issues early. Caregivers are encouraged to attend monthly child welfare clinics.
Kiswahili: Kupima uzito mara kwa mara katika kliniki husaidia kugundua matatizo ya ukuaji mapema. Walezi wanahimizwa kuhudhuria kliniki za ustawi wa watoto kila mwezi.
Ekegusii:
Okorengwa kwa botambe kw’oborito ase ekliniki nigo kogokonya komanya obokong'u mapema.
 Abareri babekirwe chinguru bagende ekeriniki Kia ogokina Kwa abana kera omotienyi
Dholuo: Nono pek mar del pile e klinik konyo e fwenyo chon pek mag dongo. Ijiwo joma rito nyithindo mondo odhi e klinik mag nyithindo dwe ka dwe.
Somali: Imtixaanka miisaanka ee joogtada ah ee xarumaha caafimaadka ayaa gacan ka geysanaya in la ogaado dhibaatooyinka koritaanka ka hor.

English: A toll-free maternal health helpline is available for advice and emergency referrals. Dial 1195 anytime.
Kiswahili: Simu ya usaidizi wa afya ya mama bila malipo inapatikana kwa ushauri na rufaa za dharura. Piga 1195 wakati wowote.
Ekegusii: Esimi ya okonyora obokonyi ase abasubati bakogonkia,nere aroro ase okoegwa obosemia na gokonywa Kwa obwango. Aka 1195 chinsa chinde chionsi
Dholuo: Nitiere namba maonge chudo mar simo mar weche thieth ne mine mondo okonygi gi paro kod weche mag thieth madwarore mapiyo. Go namba 1195 sa asaya midwaro.
Somali: Telefoonka caafimaadka hooyada ee lacag la'aanta ah ayaa la heli karaa la talinta iyo tixraacyada degdegga ah. Waqti kasta wac 1195.

English: Families are encouraged to identify emergency transport options in advance, in case labor begins unexpectedly. Delays in reaching the hospital can lead to complications.
Kiswahili: Familia zinahimizwa kutambua njia za usafiri wa dharura mapema, iwapo uchungu wa kujifungua utaanza bila kutarajia. Kuchelewa kufika hospitalini kunaweza kusababisha matatizo.
Ekegusii:
Chinyomba chiairwe omoyo korigia enchera y'obosombi mapema, Obororo Bwa okoibora kiborache mobasokano.
 Okonyorwa goika nyagitari Nabo gokoreta emechando.
Dholuo: Ijiwo joot mondo ong'e motelo yore ma ginyalo tiyogo e kinde ma masira moro oyudogi, kapo ni masira ma kamano otimore apoya. Deko me donyo i ot yat twero kelo peko mapol.
Somali: Qoysaska waxaa lagu dhiirigelinayaa inay horay u ogaadaan xulashooyinka gaadiidka xaaladaha degdegga ah, haddii dhalmada ay bilaabato si lama filaan ah.

English: Mothers who express breast milk should ensure clean containers, proper refrigeration, and correct warming procedures to prevent contamination.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wanaokamua maziwa ya mama wanapaswa kuhakikisha vyombo vinasafishwa, vinahifadhiwa vizuri kwenye jokofu, na taratibu sahihi za kupasha joto ili kuzuia uchafuzi.
Ekegusii: Abang'ina bari bagokamera abana amabere, nigo babwenerete koenekia ng'a ebinto bi'okobekerera mbisibirie, okogacha buya ase efriji na kobwatia buya erinde gotanga ogotiringa.
Dholuo: Minegi ma gidhiro chak onego orit mondo gik ma gipidhogo chak obed maler, giketgi e frij maber, kendo giketgi e ot ma ok okethore mondo kik gikethre.
Somali: Hooyooyinka nuujinaya caano hooyadeed waa inay hubiyaan in weelasha ay yihiin kuwo nadiif ah, qaboojinta saxda ah, iyo nidaamyada kuleylka saxda ah si looga hortago wasakheynta.

English: Community maternal support groups provide peer education, emotional support, and help connect women to health services during pregnancy and postpartum.
Kiswahili: Vikundi vya usaidizi wa akina mama katika jamii hutoa elimu ya rika, usaidizi wa kihisia, na husaidia kuwaunganisha wanawake na huduma za afya wakati wa ujauzito na baada ya kujifungua.
Ekegusii: Ebiombe bi'ogokonya abasubati ase eamate igo bikoru chisemi ase ebigori, obokonyi bw'oboremu naboigo gokonya kobeka amo abakungu na emeroberio y'eafya chingaki bare barito nonya nekero babiarire
Dholuo: Grube mag konyo mine e gweng' chiwo tiegruok ne jowetegi, kony e paro, kendo konyo joma mine yudo kony mag thieth e kinde ma gin gi ich koda bang' nyuol.
Somali: Kooxaha taageerada hooyooyinka ee bulshada waxay bixiyaan waxbarashada asxaabta, taageerada shucuurta, waxayna gacan ka geystaan xiriirka haweenka adeegyada caafimaadka inta lagu jiro uurka iyo dhalmada ka dib.

English: A high fever in a child could be a sign of malaria or infection. Visit the nearest clinic without delay to prevent complications.
Kiswahili: Homa kali kwa mtoto inaweza kuwa ishara ya malaria au maambukizi. Tembelea kliniki iliyo karibu bila kuchelewa ili kuzuia matatizo.
Ekegusii: Rikuba ritindi ase omwana nabo rirabe ekemanyererio kiesosera gose okoambokerigwa. Tarera enyomba y'oboringoria ere ange naye otari konyorwa erio otange obokong'u obwo.
Dholuo: Ka nyathi nigi tuo mar midhusi kata malaria, mano nyalo nyiso ni en gi kute moko. Dhi mapiyo e klinik man machiegni kodi mondo kik iyud chandruok.
Somali: Haddii ilmaha uu qandho weyn qabto waxay calaamad u noqon kartaa cudurka malaria ama cudurka faafa.

English: Skin-to-skin care helps stabilize small or preterm babies and promotes weight gain and bonding.
Kiswahili: Utunzaji wa ngozi kwa ngozi husaidia kuimarisha watoto wadogo au waliozaliwa kabla ya wakati na kukuza ongezeko la uzito na mshikamano.
Ekegusii: Oborendi bwe risankwa ase risankwa rigokonya koba kwa abana abake gose abare baiboretwe chingaki chitaraika na komenta oborito n'okomanyana.
Dholuo: Rwako nyathi e dendi miyo nyathino bedo motegno kendo miyo omedo bedo gi del mapek kendo bedo gi winjruok maber gi jonyuolne.
Somali: Daryeelka maqaarka ilaa maqaarka wuxuu ka caawiyaa xasiloonida carruurta yaryar ama ka hor dhasha, wuxuuna dhiirrigeliyaa miisaanka iyo xidhiidhka.

English: Postpartum women should take deworming medication to improve nutrition and milk quality.
Kiswahili: Wanawake baada ya kujifungua wanapaswa kutumia dawa za minyoo ili kuboresha lishe na ubora wa maziwa.
Ekegusii: Abakungu mbabwenerete gotumeka amariogo yogoita ebianda ekero baiboire nario barakongie endagera n'obuya bw'amabere.
Dholuo: Mon ma osenyuol bang' nyuol onego omadh yedhe mag geng'o kute mag kute mondo omi gimed chamo chiemo maber kendo miyo chak obed mang'ich.
Somali: Haweenka dhalmada ka dib waa inay qaataan daawooyinka ka hortagga cayayaanka si loo hagaajiyo nafaqada iyo tayada caanaha.

English: Babies under six months get all the hydration they need from breast milk. Giving water increases infection risk.
Kiswahili: Watoto walio chini ya miezi sita hupata maji yote wanayohitaji kutoka kwa maziwa ya mama. Kumpa mtoto maji huongeza hatari ya kuambukizwa.
Ekegusii: Abana abare inse yemetienyi etano noyomo nigo bakonyora amache onsi ayare aganeirie korwa ase amabere akorwa ase abangina. Kobaa amache nigo gokomenta obokong'u bokwambokerigwa.
Dholuo: Nyithindo mapok ochopo dweche auchiel yudo pi modwaro e chak. Miyo ji pi medo hinyo ng'ato.
Somali: Carruurta da'doodu ka yar tahay lix bilood waxay caano hooyada ka helayaan qoyaan badan oo ay u baahan yihiin. Biyaha la siiyo ayaa kordhinaya halista cudurka.

English: Sleeping under insecticide-treated nets protects expectant mothers and their unborn babies from malaria.
Kiswahili: Kulala chini ya vyandarua vilivyotibiwa dawa za kuua wadudu huwalinda akina mama wajawazito na watoto wao ambao hawajazaliwa kutokana na malaria.
Ekegusii: Korara ime yechineti chisibirie namariogo yogoita chinkoromba nigo chikorenda abasubati bare barito na abana babo bataraiborwa korwa ase esosera.
Dholuo: Nindo e bwo net mosewir gi kute mag nego kutego rito mine mapod ni e ich koda nyithindgi mapok onyuol kuom malaria.
Somali: Hooyooyinka uurka leh iyo carruurtooda aan dhalan waxay ka ilaaliyaan cudurka malaria marka ay ku seexdaan shabagyada lagu daaweeyo cayayaanka.

English: Swollen feet, thin limbs, or constant fatigue in a child may be signs of malnutrition. Seek help immediately.
Kiswahili: Miguu iliyovimba, miguu myembamba, au uchovu wa kila mara kwa mtoto inaweza kuwa dalili za utapiamlo. Tafuta msaada mara moja.
Ekegusii: Amagoro abimbete, amagoro amanyerere gose okorosa gwa kera chinsa ase omwana nabo erabe ekiorokererio kia okorwara. Rigia obokonyi bwango.
Dholuo: Tiend nyathi ma nigi tuwo mar ndulme, tiendene kod tiendene ma nyosore, kata ma ool pile, nyalo nyiso ni ok ochiem maber. Dwar kony mapiyo.
Somali: Cunuga cagihiisa oo caabuqa, xubnihiisa khafiifka ah ama daalka joogtada ah ayaa calaamad u noqon kara nafaqo la'aanta.

English: Do not apply substances to the cord. Keep it dry and clean until it falls off naturally.
Kiswahili: Usipake vitu kwenye kamba. Iweke kavu na safi hadi ianguke kiasili.
Ekegusii: Tobaisa goaka ebinto binde bionsi ase omogoyo. Onyebeke ebe enkamoku naende endabu goika egwe yoka.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi gimoro amora e ng'ulo nanga. Ketgi kama otwo kendo gibed maler nyaka chop kama gipodho.
Somali: Ha ku rakibin walxaha xadhkaha, qalalan oo nadiif ah ilaa ay si dabiici ah u dhacdo.

English: Severe headaches, swelling, or bleeding during pregnancy require immediate medical attention.
Kiswahili: Maumivu makali ya kichwa, uvimbe, au kutokwa na damu wakati wa ujauzito kunahitaji matibabu ya haraka.
Ekegusii: Ogoatigwa ogotindi kw'omotwe, okobimba gose amanyinga korwa chingaki chia oborito nkoganetie oborwari bwa bwango kegima.
Dholuo: Pich wich mager, chwoyo, kata chwero remo e kinde ma dhako nie ich, dwaro ni oyud thieth mapiyo.
Somali: Madax xanuun daran, caabuq, ama dhiig bax inta uurka leh waxay u baahan yihiin daryeel caafimaad oo degdeg ah.

English: Always keep your childs health card and birth certificate safe for school, healthcare, and legal needs.
Kiswahili: Daima weka kadi ya afya ya mtoto wako na cheti cha kuzaliwa salama kwa mahitaji ya shule, huduma ya afya, na kisheria.
Ekegusii: Botambe gacha risakara ri’oborwaria ri'omwana oo, na risakara riokoiborwa buya ase amagania y'esukuru, chingaki ch'okorwarigwa ne'richiko ri ense.
Dholuo: Kinde duto kan nyithindo kad mar thieth kod satifiket mar nyuol maber ne skunde, thieth, kod weche mag chike.
Somali: Had iyo jeer kaarka caafimaadka ilmahaaga iyo shahaadada dhalashada si ammaan ah u ilaali dugsiga, daryeelka caafimaadka, iyo shuruudaha sharciga.

English: New mothers may experience sadness or anxiety. Counseling and support groups can help.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wapya wanaweza kupata huzuni au wasiwasi. Ushauri nasaha na vikundi vya usaidizi vinaweza kusaidia.
Ekegusii: Abasubati abageni ase oboibori nabo bakonyora omoichano gose obwoba. Gokwanerwa okuya n'ebiombe bie obokonyi nabo kogokonya.
Dholuo: Min nyithindo nyalo bedo gi kuyo kata bedo gi parruok. Grube mag kony nyalo konyo.
Somali: Hooyooyinka cusub waxay dareemi karaan murugo ama walaac.

English: If your child is not sitting, crawling, or speaking by the expected age, visit a pediatric clinic for evaluation
Kiswahili: Ikiwa mtoto wako hajakaa, hajatambaa, au hajazungumza kwa umri unaotarajiwa, tembelea kliniki ya watoto kwa ajili ya tathmini.
Ekegusii: Onye omwana oo taraikaransa, tari kwagora, gose tari gokwana ase chingaki chibwenerete, tarera enyagitari y'abana igere onyore obomanyi.
Dholuo: Kapo ni nyathini ok winj ka onyalo bet piny, ok owuo, kata ok onyal ringo, dhi e klinik mar lakteche mag nyithindo mondo onone
Somali: Haddii ilmahaagu uusan fadhiisan karin, ku duuli karin ama uusan hadlin da'da la filayo, booqo rugta caafimaadka carruurta si loo qiimeeyo

English: Taking over-the-counter or herbal medicines without a prescription during pregnancy can be dangerous.
Kiswahili: Kuchukua dawa za mitishamba au zilizoagizwa bila agizo la daktari wakati wa ujauzito kunaweza kuwa hatari.
Ekegusii: Konywa amariogo yemete yorosana gose amariogo yokogorwa atabwati obomanyi bw'omoringoria chingaki chioborito nabo gokoba okobe kegima.
Dholuo: Nyalo bedo gima rach ka dhako ma omako ich okawo yedhe moko ma ok ondikne laktar.
Somali: Qaadashada daawooyinka aan la qori karin ama daawooyinka dhirta lagu daro inta lagu jiro uurka waxay noqon kartaa mid khatar ah.

English: Teen mothers should be encouraged and supported to continue their education after childbirth.
Kiswahili: Akina mama vijana wanapaswa kutiwa moyo na kuungwa mkono ili kuendelea na masomo yao baada ya kujifungua.
Ekegusii: Abasubati abaibori abake mbabwenerete koremigwa naende kobwatwa amaboko egere bagenderere nechisemi chiabo ekero baiboire.
Dholuo: Onego ojiw kendo okony mine ma rowere mondo odhi nyime gi sombgi bang' nyuol.
Somali: Hooyooyinka dhallinyarada ah waa in lagu dhiiri geliyaa oo lagu taageeraa inay waxbarashadooda sii wadaan dhalmada kadib.

English: Expectant mothers are strongly advised to avoid all alcohol. Drinking during pregnancy can lead to fetal alcohol syndrome and developmental delays.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wajawazito wanashauriwa sana kuepuka pombe kabisa. Kunywa pombe wakati wa ujauzito kunaweza kusababisha ugonjwa wa pombe ya fetasi na kuchelewa kwa ukuaji.
Ekegusii: Abasubati bebwateranete baborigwe mono gotigana amarwa. Gotinda ekere ki'oborito nabo ekoreta oborwaire bw'amarwa naboigo gotebania ogokina kw'omwana otaraiborwa.
Dholuo: Ijiwo ahinya mine ma yach ni kik gimadh kong'o e yo moro amora. Madho kong'o e kinde ma dhako omako ich nyalo miyo nyathi ma eka oa nyuol obed gi chandruok mar madho kong'o mokalo tong' kendo miyo dongo mar nyathino odog chien.
Somali: Hooyooyinka uurka leh waxaa si adag loogu talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan khamriga oo dhan.

English: Hormonal changes during pregnancy can affect oral health. Visit a dentist for check-ups and maintain oral hygiene.
Kiswahili: Mabadiliko ya homoni wakati wa ujauzito yanaweza kuathiri afya ya kinywa. Mtembelee daktari wa meno kwa uchunguzi na udumishe usafi wa kinywa.
Ekegusii: Ogoonchoka kw'obonyamasi chingaki chi'oroiboro nabo korarente obokong'u ase afya y'omonwa. Motarere omoringori bwa amaino egere origererigwe nainde orende obochenu bwa omonwa.
Dholuo: Lokruok mag hormone e kinde ma dhako nie ich nyalo ketho dend dhoge. Dhi ir laktar mondo onon dendi, kendo rit ler mar dhogi.
Somali: Isbeddellada hoormoonka ee uurka ku jira waxay saameyn ku yeelan karaan caafimaadka afka.

English: Yellowing of the skin and eyes in newborns should be checked by a health worker. Severe jaundice can affect brain development.
Kiswahili: Kuwa na rangi ya njano kwenye ngozi na macho kwa watoto wachanga kunapaswa kuchunguzwa na mfanyakazi wa afya. Homa kali ya manjano inaweza kuathiri ukuaji wa ubongo.
Ekegusii: Risankwa amo n'amaiso y'abana ebingwerere kagwansa koba mayaye nkobwenerete korigererigwa n'omokori emeremo onyagitari. Rikuba ritindi riamayaye nabo rigosaria ogokina kw'obongo.
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma eka oa nyuol onego one ni dendgi kod wengegi olokore mar rachar. Tuwo mar jaundice nyalo ketho kaka obwongo dongo.
Somali: Dhalashada maqaarka iyo indhaha ee dhallaanka cusub waa in la hubiyaa shaqaale caafimaad. Dhalashada daran waxay saameyn ku yeelan kartaa horumarka maskaxda.

English: Health facilities offer family planning counseling to couples and individuals to support informed decisions about spacing and limiting births.
Kiswahili: Vituo vya afya hutoa ushauri nasaha wa uzazi wa mpango kwa wanandoa na watu binafsi ili kusaidia maamuzi sahihi kuhusu nafasi na kupunguza uzazi.
Ekegusii: Chnyagitari nkorwa chire amaorokererio amaya yo obonyomba ase abanyuomaine na abanto bande bonsi egere gokonya ogochora okuya igoro yeribaga na gokei oboibori.
Dholuo: Ofise mag thieth chiwo paro ne joma okendore koda ng'ato ka ng'ato kuom wach chano nyuol, mondo okonygi ng'ado paro e yo maber kuom wach keto tong' e kind nyuol koda nyuol.
Somali: Xarumaha caafimaadka waxay la talin ku bixiyaan qorsheynta qoyska lamaanaha iyo shakhsiyaadka si ay u taageeraan go'aamada la og yahay ee ku saabsan kala duwanaanshaha iyo xaddidaadda dhalmada.

English: Caregivers should change diapers frequently and clean the babys skin gently to avoid rashes and infections.
Kiswahili: Walezi wanapaswa kubadilisha nepi mara kwa mara na kusafisha ngozi ya mtoto kwa upole ili kuepuka vipele na maambukizi.
Ekegusii: Abareri mbabwenerete kobaonchoreri abana ebitangachabu kera chingaki na gosibia amasankwa ya abana ng'oora nario batange amarwairea yerisankwa n'okoambokeria.
Dholuo: Joma rito nyathi onego olokie lewni kinde ka kinde kendo lwoko dende mos mondo kik obed gi mbala kata yudo tuoche.
Somali: Daryeelayaashu waa inay si joogto ah u beddelaan qaboojiyaha iyo inay si tartiib tartiib ah u nadiifiyaan maqaarka ilmaha si looga fogaado cirbadeynta iyo caabuqaha.

English: Pregnant women should eat small meals several times a day to manage nausea and maintain energy levels.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito wanapaswa kula milo midogo mara kadhaa kwa siku ili kudhibiti kichefuchefu na kudumisha viwango vya nishati.
Ekegusii: Abasubati bebwateranete mbabwenerete koria chindagera chinke chinke kera chingaki ase rituko egere gotanga ekiegeso na goikerania ebirengo bie chunguru chiomobere.
Dholuo: Mon ma nigi ich onego ocham chiemo matin nyading'eny e odiechieng' mondo omi ginyagre gi wich bar kendo rito teko ma gin-go.
Somali: Dumarka uurka leh waa inay cunaan cunto yar yar dhowr jeer maalintii si ay ula qabsadaan caloolxumada oo ay u ilaaliyaan heerarka tamarta.

English: Using simple hand signs helps babies express needs early, reducing frustration for both caregiver and child.
Kiswahili: Kutumia ishara rahisi za mikono huwasaidia watoto kueleza mahitaji yao mapema, na hivyo kupunguza kuchanganyikiwa kwa mlezi na mtoto.
Ekegusii: Gotumia ebiorokererio bi'amaboko nigo egokonya abana abake komanya eki baganeti bwango, erio gokei obokongu ase omoreri n'omwana .
Dholuo: Tiyo gi ranyisi mag lwedo konyo nyithindo fwenyo gik ma gidwaro chon, kendo mano miyo janyuol gi nyathi ok bed gi parruok mang'eny.
Somali: Isticmaalka calaamadaha gacmaha fudud waxay ilmaha ka caawiyaan inay u muujiyaan waxyaabaha ay u baahan yihiin ka hor, taasoo yareynaysa niyadjabka daryeelaha iyo ilmaha labadaba.

English: Fathers are encouraged to be active in bathing, changing, and comforting their newborns to promote bonding and family well-being.
Kiswahili: Akina baba wanahimizwa kuwa hai katika kuwaogesha, kuwabadilisha, na kuwafariji watoto wao wachanga ili kukuza uhusiano na ustawi wa familia.
Ekegusii: Abaise bana nigo bakoborigwa banyare kobasibi, kobachenchia chianga nakobagombi abana baiboirwe erio bamanyane naboigo koenekea eamate ere boronge
Dholuo: Ijiwo wuone mondo gibed gi kinda mar lwoko, loko lewni, kendo hoyo nyithindgi ma eka oa nyuol, mondo omi gimed bedo gi winjruok maber e kindgi kendo miyo ngima mar joot obed maber.
Somali: Aabbayaashu waxaa lagu dhiiri geliyaa inay si firfircoon u dhaqmaan, u beddelaan, oo u qalbi qaboojiyaan carruurtooda cusub si ay u horumariyaan xidhiidhka iyo farxadda qoyska.

English: Mothers are urged to visit immunization booths during market days for convenient access to childhood vaccines.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wanahimizwa kutembelea vibanda vya chanjo wakati wa siku za soko ili kupata chanjo za watoto kwa urahisi.
Ekegusii: Abang'ina baborigwe goika ase ebituo biechisindani chia abana amatuko y'echiro koenekia konyora bwango chisindani chiabana
Dholuo: Ijiwo mine mondo odhi e kuonde ma itimoe thieth mag geng'o tuoche e kinde mag chiro mondo giyud thieth mag geng'o tuoche mag nyithindo.
Somali: Hooyooyinka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay booqdaan goobaha tallaalka inta lagu jiro maalmaha suuqa si ay u helaan tallaallada carruurta.

English: Children struggling to speak or recognize sounds may have learning difficulties. Seek assessment from child specialists early.
Kiswahili: Watoto wanaojitahidi kuzungumza au kutambua sauti wanaweza kuwa na matatizo ya kujifunza. Tafuta tathmini kutoka kwa wataalamu wa watoto mapema.
Ekegusii: Abana bari babwate obokongu ase ogokwana gose goatora amang'ana nigo baratware obokongu bw'ogosoma . Rigia oboringori korwa a se omonyagitari bwa bana bwango.
Dholuo: Nyithindo matemo ahinya wuoyo kata ng'eyo kit dwol moko nyalo bedo gi pek mar puonjruok. Tem manyo kony kuom lakteche molony e weche mag nyithindo.
Somali: Carruurta ku dhibtoonaya inay hadlaan ama ay aqoonsadaan dhawaaqyada waxay la kulmi karaan dhibaatooyin barashada.

English: New mothers can begin light exercises after consulting their doctor to improve recovery and mental health.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wapya wanaweza kuanza mazoezi mepesi baada ya kushauriana na daktari wao ili kuboresha kupona na afya ya akili.
Ekegusii: Abang'ina abake mbagwenerete bachake gokora ebisaisi ebigusu agusu nyuma yokorora omonyagitari obo erio koenekia okogwena kwa bwango amo na oborwaria bw'obongo.
Dholuo: Min nyithindo nyalo chako timo tiegruok moko matindo tindo bang' wuoyo gi laktar mondo omi gichiwre kendo bedo gi paro maber.
Somali: Hooyooyinka cusub waxay bilaabi karaan jimicsi fudud ka dib markay la tashadaan dhakhtarkooda si loo hagaajiyo soo kabashada iyo caafimaadka maskaxda.

English: Babies should never be exposed to cigarette smoke. Secondhand smoke increases the risk of asthma and sudden infant death syndrome.
Kiswahili: Watoto wachanga hawapaswi kamwe kuathiriwa na moshi wa sigara. Moshi wa sigara unaotoka kwa mtu mwingine huongeza hatari ya pumu na ugonjwa wa kifo cha ghafla cha watoto wachanga.
Ekegusii: Ebingwerere tibigwenereti koorokigwa ase amarioki ye'sigara Okonywa gwa kabere kwa amarioki ngosegeta are obobe ase amayaa na ogokwa kwa mobasokanao ase abana abake
Dholuo: Nyithindo matindo ok onego owang' gi iro mar ndawa. Madho ndawa bende nyalo miyo ng'ato oyud asthma kod sudden infant death syndrome.
Somali: Ilmaha waa inuusan u soo bandhigin qiiqa sigaarka. qiiqa labaad wuxuu kordhinayaa halista asma iyo cudurka dhimashada gabarta ee degdegga ah.

English: Handwashing with soap before feeding and after diaper changes prevents infections in children and mothers.
Kiswahili: Kunawa mikono kwa sabuni kabla ya kulisha na baada ya kubadilisha nepi huzuia maambukizi kwa watoto na akina mama.
