Ekegusii: Gwesibia amaboko nesabuni otaragera na ekero ogoonchoreria ebisena biomwana ngotanga ere kwambokera ebinyinyi ase abana na abangina
Dholuo: Luok lwedo gi sabun kapok ochako pidho nyathi koda bang' loko lewni ma nyithindo tiyogo konyo e geng'o tuoche kuom nyithindo koda mine.
Somali: Gacmaha lagu maydho saabuun ka hor intaadan quudin iyo ka dib markaad bedesho qaboojiyaha waxay ka hortagtaa cudurrada carruurta iyo hooyooyinka.

English: Keeping newborns in skin-to-skin contact with mothers helps regulate temperature, heartbeat, and supports immune development.
Kiswahili: Kuwaweka watoto wachanga katika mgusano wa ngozi na mama husaidia kudhibiti halijoto, mapigo ya moyo, na kusaidia ukuaji wa kinga mwilini.
Ekegusii: Kobeka ebingwerere risankwa ase risankwa ria ngina ngokonya ere korengani riberera, ogoaka gwenkoro na gokonya obonyamasi gokina
Dholuo: Keto nyithindo mapod tindo machiegni gi minegi konyo e miyo dendgi obed gi liet mowinjore, miyo chunygi ok bi goyo matek, kendo konyo e miyo dendgi obed gi nyalo mar kedo gi tuoche.
Somali: Marka ilmaha cusub la xiriiro hooyooyinka maqaarka ilaa maqaarka waxay ka caawisaa xakamaynta heerkulka, garaaca wadnaha, waxayna taageertaa horumarinta difaaca jirka.

English: Deworming children every six months improves their growth, energy levels, and school performance.
Kiswahili: Kutoa dawa za minyoo kwa watoto kila baada ya miezi sita huboresha ukuaji wao, viwango vya nishati, na utendaji wao shuleni.
Ekegusii: Goita ebianda asè ebingwerere kera emetienyi etano nomo ngosegeta kore ogokina, ebirengo biechinguru na gokora buya amasomo
Dholuo: Pwodho nyithindo dweche auchiel ka dweche auchiel miyo gidongo maber, gibedo gi teko, kendo gibedo gi nyak e skul.
Somali: Carruurta lixdii biloodba mar in la baabi'iyo cayayaanka waxay kordhiyaan koritaanka, tamarta, iyo waxqabadka dugsiga.

English: Pregnant women should start antenatal care in the first trimester to detect and manage any health concerns early.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito wanapaswa kuanza huduma ya ujauzito katika trimester ya kwanza ili kugundua na kudhibiti matatizo yoyote ya kiafya mapema.
Ekegusii: Abangina baberegete goika bachake ebiriniki ataraibora ase emetienyi etato kobwatekani korora kogayana bokongu bonde borabeo
Dholuo: Mon ma nigi ich onego ochak thieth kapok onyuolgi e trimester mokwongo mar nyuol, mondo omi ofweny kendo thiedh tuoche ma kamago e kinde mowinjore.
Somali: Haweenka uurka leh waa inay bilaabaan daryeelka kahor dhalmada saddexda bilood ee ugu horreeya si ay u ogaadaan oo ay u maareeyaan dhibaatooyinka caafimaad ee hore.

English: Help children understand the arrival of a new sibling to reduce jealousy and promote bonding.
Kiswahili: Wasaidie watoto kuelewa ujio wa ndugu mpya ili kupunguza wivu na kukuza uhusiano wa karibu.
Ekegusii: Konya abana bamanye ogotoka kwa abana bande bamwabo erio gokeani engareka na gotingia okoigwanana
Dholuo: Kony nyithindi mondo ong'e gimomiyo ng'ato nigi nyaminwa kata owadwa manyien mondo kik nyiego makgi, kendo mondo gibed osiepe.
Somali: Carruurta ka caawi inay fahmaan in walaal cusub yimaado si ay u yareeyaan hinaasta oo ay u horumariyaan xidhiidhka.

English: Mobile health clinics bring vital prenatal and postnatal services closer to remote communities.
Kiswahili: Kliniki za afya zinazohamishika huleta huduma muhimu za ujauzito na baada ya kujifungua karibu na jamii za mbali.
Ekegusii: Chinyagitari chiogotara nkorenta chire obokoreri bwengencho omwana ataràiborwa na nyuma àiboirwe ange ase ebinyoro
Dholuo: Klinik mag thieth mawuotho kelo thieth madwarore ahinya mag thieth kapok onyuolo nyathi koda bang' nyuol, e gwenge maboyo.
Somali: Rugta caafimaadka ee mobile-ka ah waxay adeegyada muhiimka ah ee dhalmada ka hor iyo dhalmada ka dib u keenaan bulshooyinka fog.

English: Working mothers can express and store breast milk to ensure continued breastfeeding support while away.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wanaofanya kazi wanaweza kukamua na kuhifadhi maziwa ya mama ili kuhakikisha unyonyeshaji unaoendelea wakiwa mbali.
Ekegusii: Abàngina bakogonkia nabo bagokàma àmabere na koyagacha abanà bagenederere kogonka nonya nekero bare are
Dholuo: Mine matiyo nyalo olo kendo kano chak mondo omi gibed gi nyalo mar medo pidho nyithindgi ka gin mabor gi dala.
Somali: Hooyooyinka shaqada ka shaqeeya waxay soo bandhigi karaan caanaha hooyada waxayna kaydin karaan si loo hubiyo in ay sii wadaan taageerada naasnuujinta inta ay maqnaadaan.

English: Babies born before 37 weeks require warmth, feeding support, and regular health checkups for proper development.
Kiswahili: Watoto waliozaliwa kabla ya wiki 37 wanahitaji kupashwa joto, usaidizi wa kulisha, na uchunguzi wa afya mara kwa mara kwa ajili ya ukuaji sahihi.
Ekegusii: Ebingwerere bibooire inse yamatuko emerongo etato na etano nebere mbaganetie ribrera, gokonyu koragera na okorengwa kwàbwango kweneki ogokinà okuya
Dholuo: Nyithindo mayudo nyuol kapok jumbe 37 orumo, dwarore ni oritgi maber, opidhgi, kendo onon-gi kinde ka kinde.
Somali: Carruurta 37 toddobaad ka hor dhashay waxay u baahan yihiin diirimaad, taageero quudinta, iyo baaritaano caafimaad oo joogto ah si ay u horumariyaan si sax ah.

English: Men,its okay to talk about your mental health.Speaking up is a sign of strength.
Kiswahili: Wanaume, ni sawa kuzungumzia afya yako ya akili. Kuzungumza ni ishara ya nguvu.
Ekegusii: Abasacha, mbuya gokwana igoro yobochenu bwobongo Ogokwana nekemanyererio gia chinguru
Dholuo: Un chwo, ok rach wuoyo kuom kaka uneno weche mag tuoche mag paro. Wacho gima ineno ni ber nyiso ni in gi teko.
Somali: Ragga, waa hagaag inaad ka hadasho caafimaadkaaga maskaxda. Hadalka waa calaamad xoog leh.

English: Taking time for yourself is not a luxury, it's a necessity. Remember to prioritize your mental, emotional, and physical health.
Kiswahili: Kuchukua muda kwa ajili yako mwenyewe si anasa, ni lazima. Kumbuka kuweka kipaumbele kwa afya yako ya kiakili, kihisia, na kimwili.
Ekegusii: Koira chiangaki aseogwekorera tari gosaria chingaki, mboronge Inyora koa ribaga ritangani ebirengereri biago, oboitongo na chigosori
Dholuo: Bedo gi thuolo mar timo gik moko en gima dwarore ahinya. Ng'e ni, rito pachi, chunyi, koda dendi en gima dwarore ahinya.
Somali: Waqtiga aad naftaada u qaadatid ma aha raaxo, laakiin waa baahi. Xusuusnow inaad mudnaanta siiso caafimaadkaaga maskaxda, shucuurta iyo jirka.

English: Did you know suicide is the 3rd leading cause of death among 15-29 year olds? Its time to raise awareness and support mental health.
Kiswahili: Je, unajua kujiua ni chanzo cha tatu cha vifo miongoni mwa vijana wa miaka 15-29? Ni wakati wa kuongeza uelewa na kusaidia afya ya akili.
Ekegusii: Nomanyete okoengete nakwo okwa gatato gotàngaine gokorenta amakweri egati ya abànto bare emiaka ikomi na etàno goika emerongo ebere na kianda? Chingaki chiabeire togosemia na gokonya obochenu bwobongo
Dholuo: Be ing'eyo ni inegruok e gima duong' mar adek makelo tho ne joma hikgi nie kind 15 gi 29? Magi e kinde mag medo ng'eyo e wi tuoche mag paro kendo konyogi.
Somali: Ma ogtahay in isdilku yahay sababta saddexaad ee ugu weyn ee dhimashada dadka da'doodu u dhaxayso 15-29 sano? Waa waqtigii loo kordhin lahaa wacyiga iyo taageerada caafimaadka dhimirka.

English: This Fathers Day, lets shine a light on mens mental health. To all the dads out there, your well-being matters. Take time to prioritize your mental health and reach out for support when needed.
Kiswahili: Siku hii ya Baba, hebu tuangazie afya ya akili ya wanaume. Kwa akina baba wote, ustawi wako ni muhimu. Chukua muda wa kuweka kipaumbele afya yako ya akili na uwasiliane na usaidizi unapohitajika.
Ekegusii: Riruko eri ria'abatata, tigà tomorekere obochenu bwobongo ase abagàka Ase abatata bonsi, koba kwao buya nokwengecho Ira ribaga rinene ase obochenu bwobongo na korigia ogokonya ekero koganeirie
Dholuo: E odiechieng'ni mar Wuone, weuru mondo wapuonjre kuom tuoche mag paro ma chwo nigo. Ne wuone duto, ngimau en gimaduong '. Kaw kinde mondo iket pachi kuom tuoche mag paro, kendo many kony sama mano dwarore.
Somali: Maalinta Aabbaha, aan iftiin ku iftiiminno caafimaadka maskaxda ragga. Aabbayaashaan oo dhan, wanaagaaga ayaa muhiim ah. Waqti qaado si aad u mudnaato caafimaadkaaga maskaxda iyo caawimaad marka loo baahdo.

English:
It's Okay to Talk. June is Men's Mental Health Month.

Men, it's okay to talk about your mental health. Sharing your feelings can be the first step toward healing
Kiswahili:
Ni Sawa Kuzungumza. Juni ni Mwezi wa Afya ya Akili kwa Wanaume.

Wanaume, ni sawa kuzungumzia afya yako ya akili. Kushiriki hisia zako kunaweza kuwa hatua ya kwanza kuelekea uponyaji.
Ekegusii: Mbuya gokwanakwana Omorienyi ogatana na rimo, nomotienyi bwobochenu bwobongo ase abagaka
Dholuo:
Wuoyo Wuoyo Ber. Dwe mar auchiel en Dwe mar Paro mar Chwo.

Un chwo, onge rach wuoyo kuom kaka uneno weche mag tuoche mag paro. Wuoyo kuom kaka iwinjo e chunyi nyalo bedo okang' mokwongo mar loso winjruok manie kindu
Somali: Waa hagaag in la hadlo. Juun waa Bisha Caafimaadka Maskaxda ee Ragga. Ragga, waa hagaag inaad ka hadasho caafimaadkaaga maskaxda. La wadaagista dareenkaagu waxay noqon kartaa tallaabada ugu horreysa ee ku saabsan bogsashada.

English: You are not alone. Reach out to loved ones or mental health professionals for support.
Kiswahili: Hauko peke yako. Wasiliana na wapendwa au wataalamu wa afya ya akili kwa usaidizi.
Ekegusii: Tori aye bweka Ikera abanchwa bago na abasemi bàndè bobonchenu bobongo ase obokonyi
Dholuo: Ok in kendi. Many kony kuom wedeni kata kuom lakteche molony e weche thieth mag paro.
Somali: Kaligiin ma tihid, dadka aad jeceshahay ama xirfadlayaasha caafimaadka dhimirka la xiriir si aad u hesho taageero.

English: Take care of your mental health by practicing self-care, maintaining healthy relationships, and seeking professional help when needed
Kiswahili: Tunza afya yako ya akili kwa kujitunza, kudumisha mahusiano mazuri, na kutafuta msaada wa kitaalamu inapohitajika
Ekegusii: Renda obochenu bwobongo aye omonyene, oboamate bwobochenu na korigia obokonyi kero boganeiri
Dholuo: Rit pachi kuom bedo ng'at ma dewo jowetene, bedo gi winjruok maber gi jomoko, kendo manyo kony kuom lakteche
Somali: Caafimaadkaaga maskaxda ka taxaddar adigoo daryeelaya naftaada, xiriir wanaagsan la yeesha iyo caawimaad xirfadle ah marka loo baahdo

English: List of common mental disorders: anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, PTSD, schizophrenia
Kiswahili: Orodha ya matatizo ya akili ya kawaida: wasiwasi, mfadhaiko, ugonjwa wa bipolar, PTSD, skizofrenia
Ekegusii: Ebimanyererio ase oborwaire bwobongo: engareka, okoererwa chinguru,ogotarora buya, oborwaire kegima,okonyegerigwa nyuma yokogoswa, obongo borwaire
Dholuo: List mar tuoche mapile mag paro: parruok, depression, bipolar disorder, PTSD, schizophrenia
Somali: Liiska cudurrada maskaxda ee caadiga ah: walwalka, niyadjabka, cudurka laba-geesoodka ah, PTSD, schizophrenia

English: May is a reminder to prioritize self-care and nurture your mental health. Practice mindfulness, engage in activities that bring you joy, and seek support when needed
Kiswahili: Mei ni ukumbusho wa kuweka kipaumbele utunzaji wa kibinafsi na kukuza afya yako ya akili. Fanya mazoezi ya kuzingatia, shiriki katika shughuli zinazokuletea furaha, na utafute msaada inapohitajika.
Ekegusii: Omotiènyi ogatano nekeinyorio giokoroberia okwerenda omonyene na obochenu bwobongo Enari kwerenda
Dholuo: Dwe mar Mei paronwa mondo waket ritruok kod paro e yo maduong' moloyo. Bed ng'at ma keto pache kuom gik ma dwarore, tim gik ma keloni mor, kendo many kony sama mano dwarore
Somali: May waxay xasuusinaysaa inaad naftaada daryeesho oo aad daryeesho caafimaadkaaga maskaxda.

English: In our pursuit of a healthier society, let's not forget that there is no health without mental health! As we prioritize physical well-being, it is equally important to prioritize our mental and emotional well-being.
Kiswahili: Katika kutafuta jamii yenye afya njema, tusisahau kwamba hakuna afya bila afya ya akili! Tunapoweka kipaumbele ustawi wa kimwili, ni muhimu pia kuweka kipaumbele ustawi wetu wa kiakili na kihisia.
Ekegusii: Ase okoreanerera obochenu bwechinka, titeeba inga bochenu tiboiyo onye obochenu bwobongo tiboiyo
Dholuo: Sama watemo matek mondo wabed gi ngima maber mar del, kik wiwa wil ni ngima ok nyal bedo maber ka onge tuoche mag paro! Mana kaka waketo ting'wa mag ringruok ema obed motelo, e kaka dwarore bende ni waket pachwa koda chunywa obed motelo.
Somali: Marka aynu raadinayno bulsho caafimaad leh, ha iloobinno in caafimaad aan caafimaad maskaxeed lahayn la'aantiis aysan jirin!

English: Mental health is the state of wellbeing in which the individual realises their own abilities,can cope with normal sttresses of life,can work pproductively or fruitfully,and is able to make contribution to their community
Kiswahili: Afya ya akili ni hali ya ustawi ambapo mtu hutambua uwezo wake mwenyewe, anaweza kukabiliana na matatizo ya kawaida ya maisha, anaweza kufanya kazi kwa tija au kwa matunda, na anaweza kutoa mchango kwa jamii yake.
Ekegusii: Obochenu bwobongo nekero omonto akomanyà chinguru chiaye omonyene, akoremereri amakongu yobogima, agokora emeremo eisaine,na gosanga ase ekenyoro
Dholuo: Ngima mar paro en ngima maber ma ng'ato yudoe ka ong'eyo nyalo ma en-go, onyalo nyagore gi pek mapile e ngima, onyalo tiyo tich maber, kendo onyalo konyo e ngima mar oganda.
Somali: Caafimaadka maskaxda waa xaaladda caafimaad ee qofka uu aqoonsan yahay awoodiisa, wuxuu la qabsan karaa dhibaatooyinka nolosha ee caadiga ah, wuxuu shaqeyn karaa si wax soo saar leh ama midho leh, wuxuuna awood u leeyahay inuu gacan ka geysto bulshada.

English: Mothers should return for postnatal checkups within 48 hours, 7 days, and 6 weeks after delivery.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wanapaswa kurudi kwa uchunguzi baada ya kujifungua ndani ya saa 48, siku 7, na wiki 6 baada ya kujifungua.
Ekegusii: Abangina goika bairane baringorigwa nyuma yokoibora ase chinsa emerongo enne na isato, amatuko atano na abere na emekubio etano noyomo
Dholuo: Min nyithindo onego odog e osiptal bang' seche 48, ndalo 7, kod jumbe 6 bang' nyuol.
Somali: Hooyooyinka waa inay dib ugu soo noqdaan baaritaanka dhalmada kadib 48 saacadood, 7 maalmood, iyo 6 toddobaad ka dib dhalmada.

English: Daily iron supplements help prevent anemia in pregnancy and ensure healthy fetal development.
Kiswahili: Virutubisho vya chuma vya kila siku husaidia kuzuia upungufu wa damu wakati wa ujauzito na kuhakikisha ukuaji mzuri wa fetasi.
Ekegusii: Koria chindàgera botambe chibwate ayoni ngotanga chire ogokeà kwamànyinga ekero omongina akogonkia naende yaeneki ogokinà ase omorwanda
Dholuo: Ka ng'ato omedo nyadundo pile ka pile, mano biro geng'o tuo mar anemia e kinde ma dhako nie ich kendo biro miyo nyathine odong maber.
Somali: Kaabista birta maalinlaha ah waxay ka caawineysaa ka hortagga dhiigla'aanta uurka iyo in la hubiyo horumarka uurka ee caafimaad qaba.

English: Regularly talking and singing to your baby strengthens their brain development and early language skills.
Kiswahili: Kuzungumza na kumwimbia mtoto wako mara kwa mara huimarisha ukuaji wa ubongo wake na ujuzi wake wa lugha ya awali.
Ekegusii: Chingaki chinyinge ase ogokwana na goterera omwana ngokongia bore ogokina kwa obongo nà chinkwana
Dholuo: Wuoyo kod wer kanyachiel gi nyathini kinde ka kinde, tego obwongone koda nyalo ma en-go mar ng'eyo dhok.
Somali: Markaad ilmahaaga si joogto ah ula hadasho oo u gabyi waxaad xoojineysaa horumarka maskaxda iyo aqoonta luqadda hore.

English: Some traditional herbs can be harmful during pregnancy. Always consult a qualified health worker before use.
Kiswahili: Baadhi ya mimea ya kitamaduni inaweza kuwa na madhara wakati wa ujauzito. Daima wasiliana na mtaalamu wa afya aliyehitimu kabla ya kutumia.
Ekegusii: Amariogo ande yegenka namabe ekero omongina akogonkià Botambe rigia obosemia korwa abàkoreri bobochènu bancheire otarayayatema
Dholuo: Nitie yedhe moko ma ji tiyogo ahinya e thieth to ginyalo hinyo ng'ato ka en gi ich. Kinde duto, penj laktar molony kapok itiyo kode.
Somali: Dhirta caadiga ah qaarkood waxay waxyeelo u geysan karaan uurka. had iyo jeer la tasho shaqaale caafimaad oo aqoon u leh ka hor intaadan isticmaalin.

English: Breastfeeding is natural and should be supported in public. Communities should offer safe, clean spaces for mothers.
Kiswahili: Kunyonyesha ni jambo la kawaida na linapaswa kuungwa mkono hadharani. Jamii zinapaswa kutoa nafasi salama na safi kwa akina mama.
Ekegusii: Okogonkia nokwabotambe na gwancherwa maiso marore Ebinyoro biarwa ribaga risaine rigiya ase abàngina bakogonkia
Dholuo: Nyithindo yudo thuolo mar miyo jonyuolgi mana chiemo kende, to mano en gima dwarore ahinya. Alwora ma ji odakie onego obed kama ler kendo ma onge hinyruok ne mine.
Somali: Quudinta naas nuujinta waa mid dabiici ah waana in lagu taageeraa dadweynaha. Bulshooyinka waa in ay siiyaan hooyooyinka meelo ammaan ah oo nadiif ah.

English: At six months, introduce soft foods while continuing to breastfeed. Ensure food is safe, nutritious, and age-appropriate.
Kiswahili: Katika miezi sita, anza kula vyakula laini huku ukiendelea kunyonyesha. Hakikisha chakula ni salama, chenye lishe, na kinafaa kwa umri.
Ekegusii: Ase emetienyi etano nomo, chakia chindagera chinyororo kogendererete kogonkia Enekia endagera nerendire, engiya na erengete emiaka boronge
Dholuo: Ka en ja dweche auchiel, chak miye chiemo mayom ka pod idhi nyime pidho nyathino gi min. Tem neno ni chiemo ma ichiwo nigi chiemb chuny, ok oketh del, kendo owinjore gi hik ng'ato.
Somali: Markaad lix bilood jirtid, cuntooyinka jilicsan soo geli intaad naasnuujinayso.

English: Teenage mothers are at higher risk of complications. Encourage young girls to stay in school and delay pregnancy.
Kiswahili: Akina mama vijana wako katika hatari kubwa ya kupata matatizo. Wahimize wasichana wadogo kuendelea na shule na kuchelewesha ujauzito.
Ekegusii: Abaiseke bakogonkia mbakageire konyora obokongu semia àbàiseke babe chisukuru na gotebàna kobwata amarito
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma mine ma pod rowere nyalo bedo gi tuoche mang'eny. Jiw nyiri matindo mondo odhi nyime gi skul kendo giduok nyuol chien.
Somali: Hooyooyinka dhallinyarada ah waxay halis ugu jiraan inay qabaan dhibaatooyin badan. Gabdhaha dhalinyarada ah ku dhiiri geli inay iskuulka sii joogaan oo ay uurka dib u dhigaan.

English: Mothers should receive vitamin A after delivery to boost immunity and improve breast milk quality.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wanapaswa kupokea vitamini A baada ya kujifungua ili kuongeza kinga na kuboresha ubora wa maziwa ya mama.
Ekegusii: Abangina goika bànyore ebitamini A nyuma yokoibora gotingia obonyamasi na kobochia àmabere
Dholuo: Min nyithindo onego oyud vitamin A bang' nyuol mondo omi ogeng' tuoche kendo omed miyo pi ma dhakono dhodho obed maber.
Somali: Hooyooyinka waa inay helaan fitamiin A ka dib dhalmada si kor loogu qaado difaaca iyo hagaajinta tayada caanaha hooyada.

English: Wrap babies in warm clothes and avoid exposing them to cold air, especially in early months.
Kiswahili: Wafunge watoto nguo za joto na epuka kuwaweka kwenye hewa baridi, hasa katika miezi ya mwanzo.
Ekegusii: Boyia abana chiyànga chigosegeta riberera na etànge kobatenenki ase embeo enkendu, na emetienyi emetangàni
Dholuo: Bed gi lewni maliet mondo irwakgi, kendo kik iketgi kama ng'ich ahinya, to moloyo e dweche mokwongo.
Somali: Carruurta dhar kulul ku duub oo iska ilaali hawada qabow, gaar ahaan bilaha ugu horreeya.

English: Foods like beans, greens, and liver prevent anemia and support child development.
Kiswahili: Vyakula kama vile maharagwe, mboga za majani, na ini huzuia upungufu wa damu na husaidia ukuaji wa mtoto.
Ekegusii: Chindagera buna chingende, chinyeni machani, na erini ngotanga chire ogokeana kwa amanyingà na gokongia ogokina kwa abana
Dholuo: Chiemo machalo kaka oganda, alode, koda makate, geng'o rem mar remo kendo konyo dongo mar nyathi.
Somali: Cuntada sida beelaha, khudradda iyo beerka waxay ka hortagaan dhiig yaraanta waxayna taageeraan horumarka ilmaha.

English: Store sharp, toxic, or breakable items out of childrens reach to prevent injuries.
Kiswahili: Hifadhi vitu vyenye ncha kali, sumu, au vinavyoweza kuvunjika mbali na watoto ili kuzuia majeraha.
Ekegusii: Gacha ebinto ebioge, chisumu gose ebinto ebiororo kobunekana are korwa ase abana gotanga
Dholuo: Geng' gik ma nyalo ng'ado, ma nigi sum, kata ma nyalo kethore mayot mondo nyithindo kik hinyre.
Somali: Waxyaabaha xasaasiga ah, sunta leh, ama burburka leh ka ilaali carruurta si looga hortago dhaawacyada.

English: Employers should provide breastfeeding breaks and spaces to support maternal and child health.
Kiswahili: Waajiri wanapaswa kutoa mapumziko ya kunyonyesha na nafasi ili kusaidia afya ya mama na mtoto.
Ekegusii: Àbàriku barwa amabaga yokogonkia na gosegeta abangina bakogonkia
Dholuo: Jotich onego ochiw thuolo mag yueyo kod kuonde ma nyithindo nyalo nindoe mondo okonygi rito ngima mine kod nyithindgi.
Somali: Shaqo-bixiyeyaashu waa inay bixiyaan fasaxyo naasnuujinta iyo meelo lagu taageero caafimaadka hooyada iyo ilmaha.

English: Sugary juices and sodas are harmful to babies and increase the risk of obesity and tooth decay.
Kiswahili: Juisi na soda zenye sukari ni hatari kwa watoto wachanga na huongeza hatari ya unene kupita kiasi na kuoza kwa meno.
Ekegusii: Ebinyugwa bigwansa nechisota neɓibe ase abana naende binkomenta ekenoro na ogosareka amaino
Dholuo: Juices kod soda ma nigi sukari hinyo nyithindo kendo miyo gibedo gi tuwo mar ng'ich ahinya kod tuoche mag lak.
Somali: Cunnada sonkorta leh iyo soda-yada ayaa waxyeello u geysta dhallaanka waxayna kordhinayaan khatarta cayilka iyo ilkaha burburka.

English: Community forums help address cultural barriers and promote health-seeking behavior among mothers.
Kiswahili: Mabaraza ya jamii husaidia kushughulikia vikwazo vya kitamaduni na kukuza tabia ya kutafuta afya miongoni mwa akina mama.
Ekegusii: Chibarasà chi egenka ngokonya chire korusià ebitàngo ase emegiro na gosegetà chiumbu chinguya ase abàngina
Dholuo: Chokruoge ma kamago konyo e tieko ywaruok mantie e kind ogendini, kendo miyo mine bedo gi timbe mabeyo makonyogi rito ngimagi.
Somali: Madasha bulshada waxay gacan ka geystaan ka hortagga caqabadaha dhaqanka iyo kor u qaadista habdhaqanka caafimaadka ee hooyooyinka.

English: Always use boiled or treated water when preparing infant food to prevent diarrhea.
Kiswahili: Tumia maji yaliyochemshwa au yaliyotibiwa kila wakati unapoandaa chakula cha watoto wachanga ili kuzuia kuhara.
Ekegusii: Botambe tumika àmache amorero koroseria chindàgera chia omwana gitanga ogosaa
Dholuo: Kinde duto, ti gi pi moketie chumbi kata pi motimgo yath sama iloso chiemo ne nyithindo matindo mondo ogeng'o tuwo mar nyolruok.
Somali: Had iyo jeer isticmaal biyo karkaray ama la daaweeyey marka la diyaarinayo cuntada dhallaanka si looga hortago ciribta.

English: Each child must have a vaccination card. Keep it safe and bring it to every health visit.
Kiswahili: Kila mtoto lazima awe na kadi ya chanjo. Itunze salama na uipeleke kwenye kila ziara ya afya.
Ekegusii: Kera omwana goika atware ekadi yokorwarigwà Nyegache buya na koyesoki krogionsi ogotàrera enyagitari
Dholuo: Nyathi ka nyathi nyaka bed gi kad mar chanjo. Ritgi maber kendo kelgi e kinde duto mag thieth.
Somali: Carruur kastaa waa inay haysataa kaarka tallaalka.

English: Tight clothes can interfere with circulation and cause discomfort. Choose loose, breathable attire.
Kiswahili: Nguo zinazobana zinaweza kuingilia mzunguko wa damu na kusababisha usumbufu. Chagua mavazi legevu na yanayoweza kupumuliwa.
Ekegusii: Chianga ebinànti ngotorana chire buna amanyinga agotara omobere Chira chiyànga chinßibore embèo egoeta buya
Dholuo: Lewni mapek nyalo mono remo ringo maber e del kendo miyo ng'ato owinj marach. Bed gi lewni morwakore maber.
Somali: Dharka qallafsan wuxuu carqaladeyn karaa wareegga dhiigga wuxuuna keeni karaa xanuun.

English: Fathers are encouraged to accompany partners to ANC and child wellness clinics.
Kiswahili: Akina baba wanahimizwa kuandamana na washirika wao kwenye kliniki za ANC na ustawi wa watoto.
Ekegusii: Abagàka nere buya kobwaterana omwana ataraiborwa ase ekiriniki na okoomerana kwa abana abake
Dholuo: Ijiwo wuone mondo odhi gi jowetegi e ANC kod kuonde thieth mag nyithindo.
Somali: Aabbayaashu waxaa lagu dhiirigelinayaa inay la socdaan la-hawlgalayaashooda rugta caafimaadka ee ANC iyo rugta caafimaadka carruurta.

English: Applying herbs or substances to the babys soft spot is dangerous and should be avoided.
Kiswahili: Kupaka mimea au vitu kwenye sehemu laini ya mtoto ni hatari na kunapaswa kuepukwa.
Ekegusii: Goàka emete ase atoto yomwana mbobe naende etigwe
Dholuo: Tiyo gi yedhe kata gik mamoko e yo marach nyalo kelo hinyruok ne nyathi, omiyo ok onego otim kamano.
Somali: Isticmaalka dhirta ama maaddooyinka ku jira meesha jilicsan ee ilmaha waa mid khatar ah waana in laga fogaadaa.

English: Keep hot drinks and cooking pots away from childrens reach to prevent burn injuries.
Kiswahili: Weka vinywaji vya moto na vyungu vya kupikia mbali na watoto ili kuzuia majeraha ya kuungua.
Ekegusii: Beka are ebinyugwa bire morero na chisuguria chiokorugerwa korwa ase abana gotanga emebasokano
Dholuo: Geng' gik mimadho maliet koda agulni kik chop kama nyithindo nyalo chopoe mondo kik giwang'.
Somali: Cabitaanada kulul iyo dhalooyinka cuntada lagu kariyo ka ilaali carruurta si looga hortago dhaawacyada gubashada.

English: Use a calendar or reminder app to keep track of ANC appointments and medications.
Kiswahili: Tumia kalenda au programu ya ukumbusho ili kufuatilia miadi na dawa za ANC.
Ekegusii: Tumika ekarenda gose ekeinyorio kende komanya rituko okogenda ebiriniki na korwarigwa
Dholuo: Ti gi kalenda kata app mar paro mondo ing'e seche mag ANC kod yedhe mitiyogo.
Somali: Isticmaal jadwalka ama barnaamijka xusuusinta si aad ula socoto ballanqaadyada ANC iyo daawooyinka.

English: Protect your babys hearing by keeping them away from loud environments.
Kiswahili: Linda usikivu wa mtoto wako kwa kumzuia asisikie mazingira yenye kelele.
Ekegusii: Renda amato yomwana korwa ase amriogi amanene
Dholuo: Rit it nyithindi kuom ritogi kik giwinj koko.
Somali: U ilaali maqalka ilmahaaga adoo ka fogaynaya jawiyo qaylo badan.

English: Excessive screen use affects attention and sleep in young children. Encourage physical play instead.
Kiswahili: Matumizi ya skrini kupita kiasi huathiri umakini na usingizi kwa watoto wadogo. Himiza kucheza kimwili badala yake.
Ekegusii: Amatuko amange ase etelevision ngootorana kere ogokina na okorara kwomwana Ribaga riaye tema chigosori
Dholuo: Tiyo gi kompyuta e yo mokalo tong' nyalo mono nyithindo bedo motang' kendo ketho nindo. Kar mano, jiwgi mondo gitim gik ma kelonegi mor.
Somali: Isticmaalka xad dhaafka ah ee shaashadda ayaa saameyn ku leh dareenka iyo hurdada carruurta yaryar.

English: Secondhand smoke harms both the mother and the unborn baby. Keep homes and public spaces smoke-free.
Kiswahili: Moshi wa mtu mwingine hudhuru mama na mtoto ambaye hajazaliwa. Weka nyumba na maeneo ya umma bila moshi.
Ekegusii: Amarioki namabe ase abangina na abana bataraiborwa Beka chinka are nàmarioki
Dholuo: Madho ndawa hinyo miyo ngima bedo matek ne dhako kod nyathine mapok onyuol. Kik ibed gi tim mar madho ndawa e odi kata kamoro amora.
Somali: Qaadka labaad wuxuu waxyeeleynayaa hooyada iyo ilmaha aan dhalan.

English: All medications should be kept out of reach to prevent accidental poisoning in children.
Kiswahili: Dawa zote zinapaswa kuwekwa mbali na watoto ili kuzuia sumu ya bahati mbaya.
Ekegusii: Amariogo onsi abekwe are na abana gotanga okonywega gotaganeirie
Dholuo: Yore duto mag thieth onego oket kama nyithindo ok nyal chopoe mondo kik gichiw tuoche ne nyithindo.
Somali: Dhammaan daawooyinka waa in la ilaaliyaa meel aan la gaari karin si looga hortago sunta shilka ah ee carruurta.

English: Expectant mothers should pack a clean birth kit by the 7th month of pregnancy for emergencies.
Kiswahili: Akina mama wajawazito wanapaswa kufunga vifaa vya kujifungulia vilivyo safi ifikapo mwezi wa 7 wa ujauzito kwa dharura.
Ekegusii: Abangina bagochia kogonkia babeke ange ebinto bionsi biomwana omotiènyi ogatano na kabere ase omobasokano orabe
Dholuo: Mon ma nigi ich onego oting' gik moko maler mag nyuol kapok ochopo dwe mar 7 mar nyuol, mondo okonygi e kinde mag masira.
Somali: Hooyooyinka uurka leh waxay u baahan yihiin inay xirtaan xirmo dhalashada nadiif ah bisha 7aad ee uurka ee xaaladaha degdegga ah.

English: Never shake a baby. It can cause brain injury or death. Comfort them gently instead.
Kiswahili: Usimtikise mtoto kamwe. Inaweza kusababisha jeraha la ubongo au kifo. Badala yake mfariji kwa upole.
Ekegusii: Timonyegeri omwana Nabo omwana arakwe Babwate ngoora
Dholuo: Kik iling' nyathino. Onyalo kelo hinyruok ne obwongo kata tho. Kar mano, jiwgi gi weche mang'won.
Somali: Weligaa ha gariirin ilmaha, wuxuu keeni karaa dhaawac maskaxeed ama geeri.

English: Continue breastfeeding during the night to meet babys nutrition needs and maintain milk supply.
Kiswahili: Endelea kunyonyesha usiku ili kukidhi mahitaji ya lishe ya mtoto na kudumisha utoaji wa maziwa.
Ekegusii: Genderera kogonkia omwana botuko na komenta amabere
Dholuo: Dhi nyime pidho nyathini gotieno mondo omiyi chiemo moromo kendo mondo omiye chak moromo.
Somali: Hagaajinta ka sii wad habeenkii si loo daboolo baahida cuntada ee ilmaha iyo in la ilaaliyo quudinta caanaha.

English: Always wash and boil baby bottles and nipples to kill germs before each use
Kiswahili: Osha na chemsha chupa za watoto na chuchu kila wakati ili kuua vijidudu kabla ya kila matumizi.
Ekegusii: Botambe sibia na koberia chichupa chia abana na amagonki goita ebinyinyi otaraera omwana endagera
Dholuo: Pile, lwok kendo ilwok chupa mag nyithindo koda tong' mag nyuol mondo omi ineg kute kapok itiyo kodgi
Somali: Had iyo jeer maydho oo ku kari dhalooyinka ilmaha iyo naas-nuujinta si loo dilo bakteeriyada ka hor isticmaalka

English: Children thrive when caregivers offer consistent affection, attention, and routines.
Kiswahili: Watoto hustawi wakati walezi wanapowapa upendo, uangalifu, na utaratibu unaoendelea.
Ekegusii: Abana bagokina buya ekero bakogokrerwa, kororwa botambe
Dholuo: Nyithindo timo maber ka jonyuolgi oherogi, odewogi, kendo oketonegi chenro ma biro konyogi kinde duto.
Somali: Carruurtu way barwaaqoobaan marka daryeelayaashu si joogto ah u muujiyaan jacayl, daryeel iyo dhaqdhaqaaqyo.

English: High blood pressure in pregnancy can lead to preeclampsia. Regular check-ups are essential for early detection.
Kiswahili: Shinikizo la damu kubwa wakati wa ujauzito linaweza kusababisha preeclampsia. Uchunguzi wa mara kwa mara ni muhimu kwa ugunduzi wa mapema.
Ekegusii: Amanyinga kominyoka mono kero omongina are mosigi nabo ekorenta oborwaire Koringorigwa botamba mbuya komanyiabkendabu
Dholuo: Duoko mar remo malo e kinde ma dhako ni gi ich nyalo kelo preeclampsia. Nono jatuwo kinde ka kinde en gima dwarore ahinya mondo omi ofweny tuwono chon.
Somali: Cadaadiska dhiigga sare ee uurka ayaa keeni kara preeclampsia. baaritaano joogto ah ayaa lagama maarmaan u ah ogaanshaha hore.

English: Use proper baby carriers to support babys neck and hips. Always ensure babys face is visible and uncovered.
Kiswahili: Tumia vifaa vya kubeba mtoto vinavyofaa ili kushikilia shingo na nyonga za mtoto. Hakikisha uso wa mtoto unaonekana na haujafunikwa.
Ekegusii: Bogoreria omwana ebibekerero bigosegeta ebigoti na ebinema Botambe obosio bwo'mwana bororekane tibotubwa
Dholuo: Ti gi gik ma ting'o nyithindo mondo okonygi ting'o ng'utgi kod ofunjgi. Kinde duto, ne ni wang' nyathi nenore maler kendo ok oum.
Somali: Isticmaal xamuulka ilmaha ee saxda ah si aad u taageerto qoorta iyo qoorta ilmaha. Had iyo jeer hubi in wajiga ilmaha uu muuqdo oo aan la daboolin.

English: Delay bathing a newborn for at least 24 hours to protect the skins natural defenses.
Kiswahili: Chelewesha kumwogesha mtoto mchanga kwa angalau saa 24 ili kulinda kinga asilia za ngozi.
Ekegusii: GoTebana gosibià omwanà ase chinsa emerongo ebere na inye ngokonya ere risankwa gwetanga na marwaire ande a botambe
Dholuo: Ket thuolo moromo ne nyathi ma eka oa nyuol mondo oyud pi kuom seche 24, mondo omi orit ringre.
Somali: Si loo ilaaliyo difaaca dabiiciga ah ee maqaarka ugu yaraan 24 saacadood dib u dhigi mayso.

English: Reading to children daily boosts language development, imagination, and bonding.
Kiswahili: Kusomea watoto kila siku huongeza ukuaji wa lugha, mawazo, na uhusiano.
Ekegusii: Gosomera omwana botambe koagacha kore chinkwana, ebirengereri na obomo
Dholuo: Somo ne nyithindo pile miyo dhok ma giwacho dongo, pachgi tiyo maber, kendo miyo gibedo gi winjruok maber gi jomoko.
Somali: Carruurta maalin kasta u akhrinta waxay kor u qaadeysaa horumarinta luqadda, mala-awaalka, iyo xidhiidhka.

English: Persistent nausea and vomiting during pregnancy can lead to dehydration and weight loss. Seek medical care.
Kiswahili: Kichefuchefu na kutapika mara kwa mara wakati wa ujauzito kunaweza kusababisha upungufu wa maji mwilini na kupunguza uzito. Tafuta huduma ya matibabu.
Ekegusii: Ekengerangera na koroka kero bwebwateraneti kogokora anache mobere na chikiro gokea Rigia oborwari
Dholuo: Chuny ma ng'ichno koda ng'ur ma siko ka dhi nyime e kinde ma dhako nie ich, nyalo miyo ng'ato obed gi tuwo mar dehydration, kendo onyalo lalo kilo. Dhi e osiptal mapiyo.
Somali: Xanuunka iyo qallalanka joogtada ah ee uurka ku jira waxay keeni karaan biyo la'aan iyo miisaanka lumis.

English: Start with mashed fruits and vegetables. Introduce one new food at a time to watch for allergies.
Kiswahili: Anza na matunda na mboga zilizosagwa. Anzisha chakula kipya kimoja baada ya kingine ili uangalie mizio.
Ekegusii: Chaka na amatunda na chinyeni chisire Chakia endagera eyemo engeni ase engaki gokorigereria boonchoreria bonde
Dholuo: Chak gi chamo alot mar olembe gi alot mamoko. Chiem achiel bang' machielo mondo kik ichak chamo chiemo ma nyalo miyo ng'ato odok chien.
Somali: Ka bilow midhaha iyo khudaarta la qasiyey, cuntooyin cusub soo bandhig si aad uga taxaddarto cudurrada xasaasiga ah.

English: Wash hands with soap and water before handling a baby to prevent infections.
Kiswahili: Osha mikono kwa sabuni na maji kabla ya kumshika mtoto ili kuzuia maambukizi.
Ekegusii: Sibia amaboko nesabuni na amache otaràbwata omwana gotànga oborwaire
Dholuo: Luok lweteni gi sabun kod pi kapok iloso nyathi mondo ogeng' tuoche.
Somali: Gacmaha ku maydho saabuun iyo biyo ka hor intaadan taaban ilmaha si looga hortago cudurrada.

English: Take your child for regular weight and height checks to detect growth issues early.
Kiswahili: Mpeleke mtoto wako kwa ajili ya uchunguzi wa uzito na urefu mara kwa mara ili kugundua matatizo ya ukuaji mapema.
Ekegusii: Ira omwana orengwa chiratiri botambe na obotambe omanye gose bokongu mboreo bwogokina
Dholuo: Kaw nyathini mondo inon pek kod borne kinde ka kinde, mondo ifweny chon kapo ni nitie gimoro ma ok dhi maber e dongo.
Somali: Wiilkaaga u qaado baaritaano joogto ah oo miisaanka iyo dhererka ah si aad u ogaato dhibaatooyinka koritaanka ka hor.

English: Excessive bleeding after childbirth is life-threatening. Seek immediate emergency care.
Kiswahili: Kutokwa na damu nyingi baada ya kujifungua kunahatarisha maisha. Tafuta huduma ya dharura mara moja.
Ekegusii: Okorwa kwa amanyinga ase obonge nyuma yakogonkia nekogoso ase obogima Nyora obwarairi kegima
Dholuo: Rembruok mokalo tong' bang' nyuol en gima nyalo kelo tho. Dwar mapiyo jogo manyalo hinyi.
Somali: Dhiigxinta xad dhaafka ah ee dhalashada ka dib waxay khatar ku tahay nolosha.

English: Register your childs birth early to secure legal identity and access to services.
Kiswahili: Sajili kuzaliwa kwa mtoto wako mapema ili kupata utambulisho halali na upatikanaji wa huduma.
Ekegusii: Rika omwana amanyekane nebigambero naende anyore obokonyi ao ao
Dholuo: Inyalo ndiko nyuol mar nyathini chon mondo omi iyud ni en ng'at mane kaluwore gi chik, kendo mondo iyud kony madwarore.
Somali: Si aad u diiwaangeliso dhalashada ilmahaaga si aad u hubiso aqoonsiga sharciga ah iyo helitaanka adeegyada.

English: Fast breathing, chest indrawing, or cough may signal pneumonia. Take the child to a clinic.
Kiswahili: Kupumua haraka, kuvuta kifua, au kukohoa kunaweza kuashiria nimonia. Mpeleke mtoto kliniki.
Ekegusii: Okoeyana kwa bwangobwango, egekuba keguotota, or ogokorora nebimanyererio biekeuno Ira omwana ekiriniki
Dholuo: Chuny ma ng'ato gamo piyo, bedo gi rem e kor ng'ato, kata yuto, nyalo nyiso ni en gi tuwo mar adundo. Kaw nyathino kendo idhi kode e osiptal.
Somali: Neefsashada degdegga ah, quluubta ka soo baxda ama qoorta ayaa calaamad u noqon karta cudurka sanbabada.

English: Breast milk contains nutrients vital for a babys brain development.
Kiswahili: Maziwa ya mama yana virutubisho muhimu kwa ukuaji wa ubongo wa mtoto.
Ekegusii: Amàbere angina nabwate obuya bwengecho ase okoagacha ogokina kwa obongo
Dholuo: Kodhi mar miyo nigi gik makonyo nyathi mondo obwongone obed motegno.
Somali: Caanaha hooyada waxaa ku jira nafaqooyin muhiim u ah koritaanka maskaxda ilmaha.

English: Announcing launch of Nutrition Portal that offers online modules and webinars to equip CHVs with counseling tools and referral pathways.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza uzinduzi wa Tovuti ya Lishe inayotoa moduli za mtandaoni na semina za mtandaoni ili kuwapa wagonjwa wa CHV zana za ushauri nasaha na njia za rufaa.
Ekegusii: Koraria ogocha gwe chindagera ao ao ase omotandao amo namosomo, mbikonye abakoreri bobochenu begenka nobomanyi na gotebereria ase abatari konyara
Dholuo: Walando chakruok mar Nutrition Portal ma chiwo modules kod webinars e intanet mondo omi CHVs gik ma konyogi kod yore ma ginyalo luwogo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida bilowga bogga nafaqada oo bixiya modules iyo webinars internetka si loogu qalabeeyo CHVs qalabka la talinta iyo wadooyinka gudbinta.

English: Announcing a national digital drive using reels, community challenges and influencer content to promote fruit and vegetable intake.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza kampeni ya kitaifa ya kidijitali kwa kutumia reli, changamoto za jamii na maudhui ya watu wenye ushawishi ili kukuza ulaji wa matunda na mboga.
Ekegusii: Koraria ase orongo orogima ase ereli ya dijitol, amakongu yegenka, na abasegeti ase okoria amatunda nechinyeni
Dholuo: Lando chenro mar dhial e piny mangima ka itiyo gi vidio, weche ma ji wacho e wi oganda, kod weche ma ji wacho mondo ojiw ji omed chamo olembe kod alot.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida olole dhijitaal ah oo qaran oo adeegsanaya reels, caqabadaha bulshada iyo waxyaabaha saameynaya si kor loogu qaado cunnada miraha iyo khudaarta.

English: Announces how Community clubs in multiple counties share recipes and nutrition tips using fortified cereals and snacks.
Kiswahili: Hutangaza jinsi vilabu vya Jumuiya katika kaunti nyingi vinavyoshiriki mapishi na vidokezo vya lishe kwa kutumia nafaka zilizoongezwa virutubisho na vitafunio.
Ekegusii: Okorari goetera jijumuiya ase chikaunti chinyinge buna chikorosia chindagera ao ao na obosemi igoro yechindagera chingiya chimentire obuya botingiri na ebitakunero
Dholuo: Ilando kaka riwruoge mag Community e counties mang'eny chiwo yore mag tedo koda paro mag chiemo ka gitiyo gi chiemb cham kod chiemb ng'ich ng'ich.
Somali: Waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa sida kooxaha bulshada ee gobollada kala duwan ay u wadaagaan cuntooyin iyo talooyin nafaqada iyagoo adeegsanaya hadhuudhka xoojinta iyo cuntada fudud.

English: A community cooking contests elevate indigenous nutritious dishes and household dietary knowledge.
Kiswahili: Mashindano ya upishi wa jamii huinua vyakula vyenye lishe vya asili na ujuzi wa lishe ya nyumbani.
Ekegusii: Amaamereranio yoborugi ase ekenyoro ngosegeta are oborosia bwechindagera chiakoro chingansu na obomanyi bwe chindagera chinka
Dholuo: Kinda mar loso chiemo e alworawa miyo ji ng'eyo kit chiemo ma ne yudore e alworano, kendo mano miyo joot bedo gi lony e weche mag chiemo.
Somali: Tartanka cuntada lagu kariyo ee bulshada ayaa kor u qaadi doona cuntooyinka nafaqada leh ee dadka deegaanka iyo aqoonta cuntada ee qoysaska.

English: A GAIN-led campaign in Mombasa that improves access to affordable fruits and vegetables in urban market zones.
Kiswahili: Kampeni inayoongozwa na GAIN huko Mombasa ambayo inaboresha upatikanaji wa matunda na mboga za bei nafuu katika maeneo ya soko la mijini.
Ekegusii: Ekampeni ikoraagwa na GAIN Mombasa igosegeta ogotoka kwa matunda na chinyeni chia rigori rike mbarabare yechiro
Dholuo: Kampen mar GAIN e Mombasa ma konyo ji yudo olembe kod alot ma nengogi yot e kuonde ma ji timoe ohala e taonde.
Somali: Olole ay hogaaminayaan GAIN oo ka socda Mombasa oo hagaajinaysa helitaanka miraha iyo khudaarta la awoodi karo ee ku yaal meelaha suuqyada magaalooyinka.

English: IGAD commits to improving food and nutrition security in Africa. Data shows 21% of people across IGAD member states are food insecure
Kiswahili: IGAD imejitolea kuboresha usalama wa chakula na lishe barani Afrika. Takwimu zinaonyesha 21% ya watu katika nchi wanachama wa IGAD hawana uhakika wa chakula
Ekegusii: IGAD yerure gosegeta endagera enyonge orogongo rwa Afrika Chisabu chiarokiri emerongo ebere na eyemo ase emià yabamo be chinse chia IGAD mbabwati ndagera eisaine
Dholuo: Riwruok mar IGAD osingo mar miyo chiemo kod chiemo obed maber e Afrika. Nonro nyiso ni pasent 21 mar ji e pinje mag IGAD ok yud chiemo moromo
Somali: IGAD waxay ka go'an tahay in la wanaajiyo ammaanka cuntada iyo nafaqada ee Afrika.

English: Waiting a minute before clamping the cord improves babys iron levels and immunity.
Kiswahili: Kusubiri dakika moja kabla ya kubana kitovu huboresha viwango vya chuma na kinga ya mtoto.
Ekegusii: Kuganya edagika eyemo otasieka ekenyogu, nkoimokia ere ebirengo bià echuma na obonyamasi
Dholuo: Rito kata mana dakika achiel kapok ichako tweyo nyolono, miyo nyathino bedo gi teko mar geng'o tuoche.
Somali: Sugitaanka daqiiqad ka hor intaadan xidhin xadhkaha waxay hagaajineysaa heerarka birta ee ilmaha iyo difaaca.

English: Jerky movements or eye twitching in newborns may indicate seizures. Seek urgent care.
Kiswahili: Miendo mikali au kutetemeka kwa macho kwa watoto wachanga kunaweza kuonyesha kifafa. Tafuta huduma ya haraka.
Ekegusii: Okonyegerigwa gose ogotngecha kwa eriso ase ebingwerere nekemanyererio kia endururume Rigia obogwenia ase obwango
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma eka oa nyuol ka ging'iyore kata ka wengegi chwanyore, nyalo nyiso ni gin gi tuwo mar ndulme. Many kony mapiyo.
Somali: Dhaqdhaqaaqyada xasaasiga ah ama indhaha la'aanta ee dhallaanka cusub waxay tilmaami karaan garaacyo.

English: Households should provide safe, low-level toilets to encourage hygiene in toddlers.
Kiswahili: Kaya zinapaswa kutoa vyoo salama na vya kiwango cha chini ili kuhimiza usafi kwa watoto wachanga.
Ekegusii: Chinka chirosie ase agaya,chichoo chianse gosegeta obochenu ase ebingwerere
Dholuo: Joot onego ochiw kuonde yweyo ma nigi pi ma ni piny mondo gijiw ler e kind nyithindo matindo.
Somali: Qoysaska waa inay bixiyaan musqusha ammaanka ah ee heerka hooseeya si loo dhiirrigeliyo nadaafadda carruurta yaryar.

English: Learn correct positioning and latching techniques from health workers during pregnancy.
Kiswahili: Jifunze mbinu sahihi za kuweka na kushikilia kutoka kwa wafanyakazi wa afya wakati wa ujauzito.
Ekegusii: Egera chingecho chindonge chiokobeka na kobwaterera korwa ase abakori egasi ya obochenu
Dholuo: Puonjri kaka onego iket ng'ato e yo makare kod kaka inyalo tweye e kinde ma en gi ich kuom lakteche.
Somali: Baro farsamooyinka saxda ah ee booska iyo xiritaanka shaqaalaha caafimaadka inta lagu jiro uurka.

English: Children exposed to smoke are more likely to develop asthma and respiratory infections.
Kiswahili: Watoto wanaovuta moshi wana uwezekano mkubwa wa kupata pumu na maambukizi ya njia ya upumuaji.
Ekegusii: Abana bakongusa amarioki nkonyora bare amarwaire ya amayaa na okoeyana
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma madho ndawa hinyo bedo gi tuoche mag yueyo kaka ayaki.
Somali: Carruurta qiiqa la taaban karo waxay u badan yihiin inay qabaan asthma iyo cudurrada neefsashada.

English: Announcement that Kenya is tracking midterm progress in five food system transformation pathways ahead of UNFSS+4.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kwamba Kenya inafuatilia maendeleo ya katikati ya muhula katika njia tano za mabadiliko ya mfumo wa chakula kabla ya UNFSS+4.
Ekegusii: Okoraria nga Kenya nkobwatereri obogatagati bwamagenderero na obonchoreri ase chindagera isano
Dholuo: Lando ni Kenya luwo dongruok e kinde machuok e yore abich mag loko chenro mag chiemo e nyim UNFSS+4.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida in Kenya ay raadineyso horumarka dhexdhexaadka ah ee shan siyaabood oo loogu talagalay isbeddelka nidaamka cuntada ka hor UNFSS+4.

English: State Department unveils pilot of e-voucher and digital tools to monitor input delivery, production and dietary outcomes.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Mambo ya Nje yazindua majaribio ya vocha za kielektroniki na zana za kidijitali ili kufuatilia utoaji wa pembejeo, uzalishaji na matokeo ya lishe.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya màngana a isiko, yatemere korenta evocha ase chikomputa na ebiogwe vya dichitol erio gosegeta rikomera, korenta chinyeke na rigesa ase chindagera
Dholuo: Migawo mar piny owacho olero chenro mar tiyo gi e-voucher kod gige tich mag digital e nono kaka gik mitiyogo e loso chiemo tiyo, kod kaka chiemo ng'eny.
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda waxay soo bandhigtay tijaabada tijaabada ah ee gunnooyinka elektaroonigga ah iyo aaladaha dijitaalka ah si loo kormeero bixinta wax soo saarka, wax soo saarka iyo natiijooyinka cuntada.

English: Announcement of expansion plan sourcing school meals from local farmers while integrating climate-resilient crops.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la mpango wa upanuzi wa kutafuta chakula cha shule kutoka kwa wakulima wa eneo hilo huku ukijumuisha mazao yanayostahimili mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa.
Ekegusii: Okoraria kwarurwe inga chindagera chikoregwa chisukuru chirwe ase abaremi begenka na gosangania chindagera chikoremereria okoonchoka kwe rire
Dholuo: Lando chenro mar medo chiemo e skunde koa kuom jopur mag alworano, kendo tiyo gi puothe ma nyagore gi lokruok mar kit yamo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida qorshaha ballaarinta bixinta cuntooyinka dugsiga ee beeraleyda maxalliga ah iyadoo la isku darayo dalagyo u adkaysta cimilada.

English: State Dept. affirming expansion of labs to enforce fortification and nutrient profiling in major food markets.
Kiswahili: Idara ya Jimbo ikithibitisha upanuzi wa maabara ili kutekeleza uimarishaji na uainishaji wa virutubisho katika masoko makubwa ya chakula.
Ekegusii: Orosagia rwa eserekali, ekongie chinyomba chi oboringoria erio gotingia na koroberia chindagera ase chichiro chinene chiechindagera
Dholuo: Migawo mar Piny owacho mar Amerka ne oyie ni omed kuonde mag timo nonro mondo omi omed tiyo gi teko mar medo chiemo e chiemo kod nonro mar gik mamiyo chiemo bedo gi ngima maber.
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda oo xaqiijisay ballaarinta shaybaarada si loo xoojiyo xoojinta iyo qaabeynta nafaqada suuqyada waaweyn ee cuntada.

English: Nutrition Portal unveils real-time dashboards for tracking indicators under KNAP and county CNAPs.
Kiswahili: Lango la Lishe hufunua dashibodi za wakati halisi za viashiria vya ufuatiliaji chini ya KNAP na CNAP za kaunti.
Ekegusii: Egesieri gia chindagera nkorenta ere ebigorero ebinge ase okobwati kegima ebimanyererio inse ya KNAP na CNAP ase ekaunti
Dholuo: Portal mar Nutrition elonwa dashboards mag real-time mar luwo gik ma nyiso e bwo KNAP kod county CNAPs.
Somali: Bogga nafaqada wuxuu soo bandhigayaa shabakadaha waqtiga dhabta ah ee raadraaca tilmaamayaasha ku jira KNAP iyo CNAPs ee degmooyinka.

English: Nutrition Portal invites submissions recognising counties reporting CNAP outcomes under the new monitoring framework.
Kiswahili: Lango la Lishe linaalika mawasilisho yanayotambua kaunti zinazoripoti matokeo ya CNAP chini ya mfumo mpya wa ufuatiliaji.
Ekegusii: Egesieri gia chindagera giachikire ogokwanerana gwaitabirwe ase chikaunti chiripotia inse ya CNAP
Dholuo: Nutrition Portal gwelo ji mondo ochiw ripot manyiso kaka counties ma chiwo ripot mar CNAP kaluwore gi chenro manyien mar nono chal mar chiemo.
Somali: Bogga nafaqada wuxuu ku martiqaadey qoraallo aqoonsan gobollada soo sheegaya natiijooyinka CNAP ee ku jira qaab-dhismeedka cusub ee kormeerka.

English: State Dept. commitingto subsidizing solar-powered storage for perishable nutrient-rich crops.
Kiswahili: Idara ya Jimbo imejitolea kutoa ruzuku kwa hifadhi inayotumia nishati ya jua kwa mazao yanayoharibika na yenye virutubisho vingi.
Ekegusii: Orosagia rwa eserekali, rwerure gosegeta obotumeki bwe chinguru chia omobaso ase okogacha chindagera bwango naende chibwate obuya obonge
Dholuo: Migawo mar Piny owacho ne osingore mar chiwo kony ne kembe ma tiyo gi teko mar chieng' e kano cham ma nyalo kethore piyo kendo ma nigi chiemo mang'eny.
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda waxay ballanqaadeysaa in ay deeq ka bixiso kaydinta qorraxda ee dalagga dalagga ah ee dalagga ah ee nafaqooyinka badan.

English: WHO African office releases commendatory brief supporting Kenya’s nutrition labeling reforms.
Kiswahili: Ofisi ya WHO barani Afrika yatoa muhtasari wa pongezi unaounga mkono mageuzi ya uainishaji wa lishe nchini Kenya.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe ekenene kiobochenu ense engima, ase orogongo rwa Afrika barure ogoaka inga mbuya mono ase oboonchoreri bogosegeta emeroberio yokoragera okuya
Dholuo: Ofis mar WHO e Afrika golo barua mar pwoch mar siro lokruok ma Kenya osetimo e weche mag chiemo.
Somali: Xafiiska WHO ee Afrika ayaa soo saaray warbixin ammaan ah oo taageeraya dib-u-habaynta calaamadaha nafaqada ee Kenya.

English: Health Ministry launching SMS alert to inform citizens when foods exceed sugar/salt/fat thresholds.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya yazindua tahadhari ya SMS ili kuwafahamisha raia wakati vyakula vinazidi viwango vya sukari/chumvi/mafuta.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu yarentire ogokurerwa gwetera SMS ase abànto, ekero endagera egetumana ebirengo bia esukari/ omonyo/ amaguta
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth chako chiwo siem e yor SMS mondo onyis raia sama chiemo okalo tong' mar sukari, chumbi, kata mo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka oo soo saartay digniin SMS ah si loo wargeliyo muwaadiniinta marka cuntooyinka ay ka badan yihiin heerarka sonkorta / cusbada / dufanka.

English: State Dept. promoting millet and sorghum blends as pilot menu in adaptation to climate-resilient diets.
Kiswahili: Idara ya Jimbo inakuza mchanganyiko wa mtama na mtama kama menyu ya majaribio katika kukabiliana na lishe zinazostahimili mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa.
Ekegusii: Orosagia rwa eserekali ngosegeta ere oboremi rwa obori na amaemba komentwa ase chindagera chia amatemwa korwana na ogoonchoka kwa erire
Dholuo: State Dept. jiwo millet kod sorghum miwako kaka chiemo mar jorit e timo lokruok e kit chiemo ma nyagruok gi lokruok mar piny.
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda oo dhiirrigelisay isku darka miir iyo sorghum oo ah liiska tijaabada ah ee u hoggaansanaanta cuntooyinka u adkaysta cimilada.

English: Announcement that hospitals will include African indigenous vegetables (e.g., amaranth, spider plant, African nightshade) in patient meals to improve nutrition.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kwamba hospitali zitajumuisha mboga za asili za Kiafrika (k.m., mchicha, mmea wa buibui, mti wa mtu wa Kiafrika) katika milo ya wagonjwa ili kuboresha lishe.
Ekegusii: Okorari kwarurwe inga chinyagitari inchebeke chinyeni chia abakoro buna (amanagu, chinsaga chimboga) ase abarwaire batangire kobamentera obuya ase chindagera
Dholuo: Lando ni osiptande biro keto alode mag Afrika (kaka amaranth, spider plant, African nightshade) e chiemo ma jotuo chamo mondo okonygi yudo chiemo maber.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida in isbitaalada ay ku dari doonaan khudradda dabiiciga ah ee Afrika (tusaale ahaan, amaranth, geedka cawska, nightshade Afrikaanka) cuntada bukaanka si loo hagaajiyo nafaqada.

English: Government announces scaling of biofortified crop distribution to schools and households for improved maternal-child nutrition.
Kiswahili: Serikali yatangaza kuongeza usambazaji wa mazao biofuti kwa shule na kaya kwa ajili ya kuboresha lishe ya mama na mtoto.
Ekegusii: Eserekali yararirie okoenana chindagera chitingiri ase chisukuru na chinka ase okorenda omwana okogonka
Dholuo: Sirkal olando ni ibiro pog ne skunde kod udi duto gik ma osepidh gi gik mang'eny mag ngima dhano mondo omed miyo mine gi nyithindgi chiemo maber.
Somali: Dowladda ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyo qaybinta dalagyada biofortified ee dugsiyada iyo qoysaska si loo hagaajiyo nafaqada hooyada iyo ilmaha.

English: Announcement that local farmer cooperatives are now contracted to supply nutritious meals directly to schools under new pilot model.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kwamba vyama vya ushirika vya wakulima wa eneo hilo sasa vimepewa mkataba wa kusambaza milo yenye lishe moja kwa moja shuleni chini ya mfumo mpya wa majaribio.
Ekegusii: Okoraria kwarurwe ase ebiombe biàbaremi koira chindagera ao ao eyemo ase eyemo gochia chisukuru ase omoroberio omoyia
Dholuo: Wacho ni riwruoge mag jopur ma jopur koro oseketnegi chenro mar chiwo chiemo maber e skunde e bwo chenro manyien mar temo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida in iskaashiyada beeraleyda deegaanka ay hadda qandaraas la galeen si ay si toos ah u siiyaan cuntada nafaqada leh dugsiyada iyada oo loo marayo qaabka tijaabada cusub.

English: County launches mass supplementation reaching over 12,000 children aged 6–59 months with Vitamin A and deworming to enhance immunity and nutrition.
Kiswahili: Kaunti yazindua virutubisho vingi vinavyowafikia zaidi ya watoto 12,000 wenye umri wa miezi 6-59 kwa kutumia Vitamini A na dawa za minyoo ili kuongeza kinga na lishe.
Ekegusii: Kaunti gochakia chindagera ase obonge goikera abana chirifu ikomi na ibere egati yemetienyi etano noyomo na emerongo etano na kianda ase okoenana Vitamin A na amariogo yogoita ebianda erio gotingia obonyamasi na endagera
Dholuo: Kaunti ochako chiwo chiemo ne nyithindo mokalo 12,000 ma hikgi nie kind dweche 6 gi 59 gi Vitamin A kod deworming mondo omed geng'o tuoche kendo omedgi chiemo.
Somali: Degmadu waxay bilaabeysaa qaadashada tiro badan oo ka badan 12,000 oo caruur ah oo da'doodu u dhaxayso 6-59 bilood oo leh Vitamin?A iyo daaweynta si loo xoojiyo difaaca iyo nafaqada.

English: Nairobi County to provide daily lunches to 400,000 primary school pupils via new kitchens to eliminate hunger and support local farmers.
Kiswahili: Kaunti ya Nairobi kutoa chakula cha mchana cha kila siku kwa wanafunzi 400,000 wa shule za msingi kupitia jikoni mpya ili kuondoa njaa na kuwasaidia wakulima wa eneo hilo.
Ekegusii: Ekaunti ya Nairobi korwa chindagera chia mobaso kera rituko ase aborokigwa chirifu chimii inye goetera amariko amayia gokeani enchara na gokonya abaremi basaywe
Dholuo: Kaunti mar Nairobi biro chiwo chiemo mar odiechieng' ne jopuonjre 400,000 mag praimari kokalo kuom kitegi manyien mondo otiek kech kendo konyo jopur.
Somali: Gobolka Nairobi wuxuu ku siin doonaa qadada maalinlaha ah 400,000 arday oo dugsi hoose ah iyada oo loo marayo jikada cusub si looga takhaluso abaarta loona taageero beeraleyda deegaanka.

English: MoH announces that 86% of children received Vitamin A supplementation during COVID-19 through mobile outreach, improving coverage significantly.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba 86% ya watoto walipokea virutubisho vya Vitamini A wakati wa COVID-19 kupitia huduma za simu, na hivyo kuboresha huduma kwa kiasi kikubwa.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu yararirie inga 86% ya abana mbanyorà ebitàmunusi A ebiro bia korona goetera chisimi na igo goikera abange
Dholuo: Migawo mar Thieth ne olando ni pasent 86 mag nyithindo ne oyudo Vitamin A e kinde mar COVID-19 kokalo kuom yore mag tudruok e simo, kendo mano ne omiyo kwan mar nyithindo ma ne yudo thieth ne omedore ahinya.
Somali: Wasaaradda caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in 86% caruurta ay qaateen Vitamin?A inta lagu gudajiray COVID-19 iyada oo loo marayo gaarsiinta mobilada, taasoo si weyn u hagaajisay daboolka.

English: Pregnant women need calcium for strong bones and teeth for both themselves and the baby.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wajawazito wanahitaji kalsiamu kwa mifupa na meno yenye nguvu - kwa wao wenyewe na mtoto.
Ekegusii: Abangina bebwateraneti mbagànetie karisiamu ase ogotingia amauga na amaino abo amo na abana
Dholuo: Mon ma yach dwarore ni oyud calcium mondo omi chokegi koda lekegi obed motegno.
Somali: Dumarka uurka leh waxay u baahan yihiin kalsiyum si ay u helaan lafaha iyo ilkaha xoogga leh - naftooda iyo ilmahaba.

English: Place babies on their tummies while awake and supervised to build neck and motor strength.
Kiswahili: Waweke watoto kwenye matumbo yao wakiwa macho na uwaangalie ili kujenga nguvu ya shingo na mwendo.
Ekegusii: Bekerera abàna ase chinda chiabo kobabogete na kobarorà erio koagachà ebigoti na orogendo
Dholuo: Ket nyithindo e kitanda ka gineno kendo inon-gi mondo omi gibed gi teko mar tiyo gi ng'utgi kod fuondgi.
Somali: Carruurta ku rid caloosha iyaga oo toos ah oo la kormeero si loo dhiso qoorta iyo xoogga dhaqdhaqaaqa.

English: Coughing for more than two weeks? Pregnant women should get tested for TB early.
Kiswahili: Kukohoa kwa zaidi ya wiki mbili? Wanawake wajawazito wanapaswa kupimwa kifua kikuu mapema.
Ekegusii: Gokorora inse yemekubio ebere? Abangina baberegete goika barengwe esese kendabu
Dholuo: Be dibed ni gisedak kuom jumbe ariyo? Mon man gi ich onego otim nonro mar TB chon.
Somali: Haweeneyda uurka leh waxay u baahan yihiin inay horay u sameeyaan baaritaanka cudurka TB.

English: Cracked bottles can harbor germs. Replace damaged feeding equipment promptly.
Kiswahili: Chupa zilizopasuka zinaweza kuhifadhi vijidudu. Badilisha vifaa vya kulishia vilivyoharibika haraka.
Ekegusii: Chichuba chiategete chikogacha obobe Oronchoreria chichuba chiasarekire
Dholuo: Yath motop nyalo ting'o kute moko. Lok gik ma okethore mapiyo.
Somali: Dhalooyinka jeexjeexan waxay keeni karaan bakteeriyo, qalabka quudinta ee dhaawacmayna si dhakhso leh u beddela.

English: Sleeping under treated nets reduces malaria risk for pregnant women and unborn babies.
Kiswahili: Kulala chini ya vyandarua vilivyotibiwa hupunguza hatari ya malaria kwa wanawake wajawazito na watoto ambao hawajazaliwa.
Ekegusii: Korara ime yechineti chibekire amariogo ngokeani chire ekeugoso kia esosera ase abàngina bebwateraneti na abana bataraiborwa
Dholuo: Nindo e bwo obumbego nyalo dwoko piny tuo mar malaria kuom mine ma yach kod nyithindo mapok onyuol.
Somali: Hordhaca shabagyada la daaweeyey wuxuu yareeyaa khatarta cudurka malaria ee haweenka uurka leh iyo dhallaanka aan dhalan.

English: Before 6 months, breast milk provides all the fluids a baby needs.
Kiswahili: Kabla ya miezi 6, maziwa ya mama hutoa maji yote ambayo mtoto anahitaji.
Ekegusii: Inse yemetienyi etano noyomo, amabere nigo abwate chindagera chionsi omwana agànetie
Dholuo: Kapok ochopo dweche auchiel, chak mar min miyo nyathi duto pi modwaro.
Somali: Ka hor inta aan la gaarin 6 bilood, caanaha hooyada wuxuu siinayaa dhallaanka dhammaan dareeraha uu u baahan yahay.

English: Strong soaps can irritate babys skin. Use mild, unscented options.
Kiswahili: Sabuni kali zinaweza kuwasha ngozi ya mtoto. Tumia chaguo laini, zisizo na harufu.
Ekegusii: Chisabuni chigotioka bokongu nabo chikorenta ebiagaso ase ekengwerere Tumia esabuni enyororo, etabwati rimisu
Dholuo: Saponi motegno nyalo chwanyo pien nyathi. Ti gi gik mayom maok ng'we ng'ar.
Somali: Saabuunta xoogga leh waxay kicin kartaa maqaarka ilmaha.

English: Repeated ear infections can cause hearing loss. Visit a health worker promptly.
Kiswahili: Maambukizi ya sikio yanayorudiwa yanaweza kusababisha upotevu wa kusikia. Mtembelee mfanyakazi wa afya haraka.
Ekegusii: Oborwaire ase amato nabo oratine Rora omonyagitari kengima
Dholuo: Tuwo mag it ma nyadinwoya nyalo miyo ng'ato obed gi it maok winj maber. Dhi mapiyo ir laktar.
Somali: Dhibaatooyinka dhegaha ee soo noqnoqda waxay keeni karaan maqla la'aan.

English: If the cord stump bleeds or oozes pus, seek medical attention immediately.
Kiswahili: Ikiwa kisiki cha kamba kitatoka damu au kutoa usaha, tafuta matibabu mara moja.
Ekegusii: Onye ekenyogu gekorwa amanyinga gose amaira, rora omonyagitari bwango
Dholuo: Kapo ni ng'ato nigi tuwo moro ma ok nyal chango, onego odhi mapiyo e osiptal.
Somali: Haddii kurtidu ay dhiigbaxdo ama malax ka soo baxayso, isla markiiba raadso daryeel caafimaad.

English: Play is vital for a childs emotional, physical, and cognitive development.
Kiswahili: Kucheza ni muhimu kwa ukuaji wa kihisia, kimwili, na kiakili wa mtoto.
Ekegusii: Chigosori nechingiya ase ogokina kwa abana, kemobere nà gotingia obongo
Dholuo: Tugo konyo nyathi ahinya e dongo e paro, e del, koda e bedo gi nyalo mar paro.
Somali: Ciyaarku waa mid muhiim u ah horumarka dareenka, jirka iyo garashada ilmaha.

English: If sharing a bed with a baby, ensure the space is firm, flat, and free of pillows or loose bedding.
Kiswahili: Ikiwa unashiriki kitanda kimoja na mtoto, hakikisha nafasi hiyo ni imara, tambarare, na haina mito au matandiko yaliyolegea.
Ekegusii: Gosanga egetanda na omwana, enekia ribaga ritingi, omoeya, chipilo chitaiyo gose ebirarero bitàriri
Dholuo: Kapo ni inindo e otanda achiel gi nyathi, ne ni otano kendo ok opong' gi pilni kata gi lewni motue.
Somali: Haddii aad sariirta la wadaagto ilmahaaga, hubso in meelku yahay mid adag, oo siman, oo aan lahayn cusbooyin ama sariiro furan.

English: Guide older children to handle babies gently to prevent unintentional harm.
Kiswahili: Waongoze watoto wakubwa kuwashughulikia watoto kwa upole ili kuzuia madhara yasiyokusudiwa.
Ekegusii: Semia abana abanenè korenda ebingwerere tibaumia batancheti
Dholuo: Puonj nyithindo madongo kaka ginyalo rito nyithindo matindo mondo kik hinygi.
Somali: Carruurta da'da weyn ha u hoggaamiyaan ilmaha si jilicsan si looga hortago waxyeelada aan ula kac ahayn.

English: A mothers diet during pregnancy influences her childs long-term health. Eat diverse, nutritious foods.
Kiswahili: Lishe ya mama wakati wa ujauzito huathiri afya ya muda mrefu ya mtoto wake. Kula vyakula mbalimbali na vyenye lishe.
Ekegusii: Chindagera ao ao ase omongina bwebwateraneti ngoseta chire obochenu ase omwana egeka egetambe
Dholuo: Chiemo ma miyo chamo e kinde ma en gi ich, nyalo miyo nyathine obed gi ngima maber e kinde mabiro. Chiemuru chiemo moting'o gik mopogore opogore kendo mabeyo.
Somali: Cunnooyinka hooyada uurka leh waxay saameyn ku yeeshaan caafimaadka ilmaheeda muddada dheer.

English: Even for a moment, leaving a baby on a bed or table unattended can lead to falls and injuries.
Kiswahili: Hata kwa muda mfupi, kumwacha mtoto kitandani au mezani bila mtu anayemtunza kunaweza kusababisha kuanguka na majeraha.
Ekegusii: Nonya negeka egeke, gotiga omwana bwekà nabo aragwe na kweya chingoma
Dholuo: Kata mana weyo nyathi matin e otanda kata e mesa ka onge ng'ama rite, nyalo miyo odonj e masira kendo ohinyre.
Somali: Xitaa in yar oo ilmaha lagu daydo sariirta ama miiska iyada oo aan la kormeerin waxay keeni kartaa hoos u dhac iyo dhaawac.

English: Select toys that are safe and suitable for your childs age to prevent choking and injury.
Kiswahili: Chagua vitu vya kuchezea ambavyo ni salama na vinafaa kwa umri wa mtoto wako ili kuzuia kusongwa na kuumia.
Ekegusii: Chora ebigosererio ebiya ase emiaka yomwana gotanga gotokrwa gose koumia
Dholuo: Yier gik tugo maok hiny nyathi kendo mowinjore gi hik nyathino mondo kik onind kata hinyore.
Somali: Xulo alaabta lagu ciyaaro ee ku haboon da'da ilmahaaga si looga hortago qaniinyada iyo dhaawaca.

English: Stay calm, call for help, and follow safe delivery steps if birth begins unexpectedly.
Kiswahili: Tulia, piga simu kuomba msaada, na fuata hatua salama za kujifungua ikiwa kujifungua kutaanza bila kutarajia.
Ekegusii: Kànyeka, rangeria ogokonya na bwatia ebitambokero biancheire onye oborito bogoncha otàkagerete
Dholuo: Bed gi chuny mokuwe, many kony, kendo luw okenge madwarore sama ichako nyuol apoya.
Somali: Iska daaya, caawimaad u yeedha, oo raac tallaabooyinka badbaadada dhalmada haddii dhalmada ay bilaabato si lama filaan ah.

English: Give children aged 6 months to 5 years vitamin A supplements every 6 months to strengthen immunity.
Kiswahili: Wape watoto wenye umri wa miezi 6 hadi miaka 5 virutubisho vya vitamini A kila baada ya miezi 6 ili kuimarisha kinga.
Ekegusii: Bae abana emetienyi etano nomo goika emiaka etano ebitàmunusi A kera emetienyi etano noyomo gotingia obonyamasi
Dholuo: Chiw ne nyithindo ma johigini 6 dwe ka dwe kata ma johigini 5 vitamin A mondo omed geng'o tuoche.
Somali: Carruurta da'doodu u dhaxayso 6 bilood ilaa 5 sano si ay u xoojiyaan ka hortagga difaaca u siiya fiitamiin A 6dii biloodba mar.

English: Some over-the-counter drugs can harm your unborn baby. Always consult a health worker.
Kiswahili: Baadhi ya dawa zinazouzwa bila agizo la daktari zinaweza kumdhuru mtoto wako ambaye hajazaliwa. Daima wasiliana na mfanyakazi wa afya.
Ekegusii: Amariogo akoonerigwa chituka na araotorane obochenu bwa abana Botambe boria omonyagitari
Dholuo: Nitie yedhe moko ma ng'ato nyalo nyiewo ma hinyo nyathine mapok onyuol. Kinde duto dhi ir laktar.
Somali: Daawooyinka la iibiyo qaarkood waxay waxyeeleyn karaan ilmahaaga aan dhalan.

English: Include iron-rich foods like spinach, liver, and beans in the diet to prevent anemia.
Kiswahili: Jumuisha vyakula vyenye madini mengi kama vile mchicha, ini, na maharagwe katika lishe ili kuzuia upungufu wa damu.
Ekegusii: Sangia chindagera chibwate ayoni buna esipinachi, rini na chingende gotanga ogokea kwamanyinga
Dholuo: Chiemo chiemo ma nigi gik mang'eny mag nyinyo kaka spinach, kong'o, kod oganda nyalo geng'o tuo mar anemia.
Somali: Cuntooyinka hodanka ah ee birta ah sida spinach, beeraha iyo beeraha ku dar cuntadaada si looga hortago dhiig yaraanta.

English: Bleeding, severe headaches, blurred vision, or swelling are danger signs seek care immediately.
Kiswahili: Kutokwa na damu, maumivu makali ya kichwa, kuona vibaya, au uvimbe ni dalili za hatari - tafuta huduma mara moja.
Ekegusii: Ogoiteka amanyinga, omotwe ogwatia,korora rikongori nebigoso,rigia oborwari
Dholuo: Rembruok, wich malit, neno ma ok nen maber, kata chwoyo gin ranyisi mag masira.
Somali: Dhiig, madax xanuun daran, aragti murugsan, ama bararka ayaa ah calaamado khatar ah - si deg deg ah u raadi daryeel.

English: Stick to the national immunization schedule to protect children from deadly diseases.
Kiswahili: Zingatia ratiba ya kitaifa ya chanjo ili kuwalinda watoto dhidi ya magonjwa hatari.
Ekegusii: Bwatia emeroberio yarogongo ogotingia obonyamasi gotanga abana korwa amarwaire agoita
Dholuo: Luw chenro moketi mar kano yedhe mag geng'o tuoche e piny mangima mondo irit nyithindi kuom tuoche manyalo negogi.
Somali: U hoggaansama jadwalka tallaalka qaranka si aad caruurta uga ilaaliso cudurrada dilaaga ah.

English: Postpartum depression is real. Encourage new mothers to seek help and talk openly.
Kiswahili: Msongo wa mawazo baada ya kujifungua ni halisi. Wahimize akina mama wapya kutafuta msaada na kuzungumza waziwazi.
Ekegusii: Ogoichorerana kwa obongo nyuma ya koibora nobomaene Abàibori abageni basemigwe korigia obokonyi na gokwana maiso marore
Dholuo: Chandruok mabedoe bang' nyuol en gima nitie adier. Jiw mine mapod nyien mondo omany kony kendo giwuo ayanga kuom gima chandogi.
Somali: Dhibaatada dhalmada ka dib waa mid dhab ah. Hooyooyinka cusub ku dhiirigeliso inay caawimaad raadsadaan oo ay si furan u hadlaan.

English: Feed your baby when they show hunger signs, not on a strict schedule. Watch for cues.
Kiswahili: Lisha mtoto wako anapoonyesha dalili za njaa, si kwa ratiba kali. Kuwa mwangalifu kwa vidokezo.
Ekegusii: Rageri abana ekero baorokire ebimanyerio bia enchara, tari kobakongeri chinsa chia endagera Egera ebimanyererio
Dholuo: Mi nyathini chiemo sama odwaro chiemo to ok kaluwore gi chenro moketi. Bed motang' gi gik manyalo nyisi ni onego itim kamano.
Somali: Carruurtaada quudi marka ay muujiyaan calaamado gaajo ah, oo aanay ku jirin jadwal adag.

English: Always boil and cool water used for preparing baby formula to avoid infections.
Kiswahili: Chemsha na upoeze maji yanayotumika kutayarisha maziwa ya mtoto ili kuepuka maambukizi.
Ekegusii: Botambe beria na gokendi amache, okoroiseria omwana endagerà gotanga amarwaire
Dholuo: Kinde duto, biye gi pi ma itiyogo e loso chiemb nyithindo mondo kik iyud tuoche.
Somali: Had iyo jeer ku kari oo ku qabooji biyaha loo isticmaalo diyaarinta cuntada ilmaha si looga fogaado cudurrada.

English: Partner involvement during antenatal and postnatal care improves family health outcomes.
Kiswahili: Ushiriki wa mshirika wakati wa utunzaji wa ujauzito na baada ya kujifungua huboresha matokeo ya afya ya familia.
Ekegusii: Gosango amo mwenzi omwana ataràiborwa na nyuma aiboirwe koagacha ere enyomba kebochenu
Dholuo: Bedo gi dichwo kata dhako e kinde mag thieth kapok onyuolo nyathi kod bang' nyuol miyo ngima joot bedo maber.
Somali: Ka qaybgalka lammaanaha inta lagu jiro daryeelka kahor iyo ka dib dhalashada waxay hagaajineysaa natiijooyinka caafimaadka qoyska.

English: Wash baby feeding items with soap and clean water to prevent diarrheal diseases.
Kiswahili: Osha vitu vya kunyonyesha mtoto kwa sabuni na maji safi ili kuzuia magonjwa ya kuhara.
Ekegusii: Sibia ebinto imwana akoriera nesabuni gotanga oborwàire bwa ogosaa
Dholuo: Lwok gik mitiyogo e pidho nyithindo gi sabun kod pi maler mondo ogeng' midekre ma nyathino yudo nikech diep.
Somali: Qalabka cuntada ee ilmaha lagu quudiyo ku maydho saabuun iyo biyo nadiif ah si looga hortago cudurada ciridka.

English: Sunken eyes, dry mouth, and less urine may indicate dehydration. Give fluids and seek care.
Kiswahili: Macho yaliyozama, mdomo mkavu, na mkojo mdogo vinaweza kuonyesha upungufu wa maji mwilini. Mpe maji na utafute huduma.
Ekegusii: Amaiso are egetogomera, omonwa bwomete na amasinyoro amake nebanyererio inga amache akeire onobere Enana amache na rigia obogwenia
Dholuo: Wang' ma ok nen maber, dho ma ok ng'ich, kod pi matin nyalo nyiso ni ng'ato nigi tuwo mar dehydration. Chiw gik mang'eny e dendi kendo many kony.
Somali: Indhaha hoos u dhaca, afka qalalan iyo urin yar ayaa calaamad u noqon kara biyo la'aanta.

English: Giving herbs to infants can delay proper treatment and worsen illness. Seek medical advice.
Kiswahili: Kuwapa watoto wachanga mimea kunaweza kuchelewesha matibabu sahihi na kuzidisha ugonjwa. Tafuta ushauri wa daktari.
Ekegusii: Koenana amariogovyemete ase ebingwerere nabo egotebania okorwarigwa okoronge na gosegetà okorwara mono Rigia obosemi bwabanyagitari
Dholuo: Miyo nyithindo yath nyalo deko thiedhogi e yo mowinjore kendo ketho tuwono. Dhi ir laktar mondo okonyi.
Somali: Daaweynta dhallaanka waxay dib u dhigi kartaa daaweynta saxda ah waxayna sii xumaan kartaa cudurka.

English: Keep the umbilical cord stump dry and clean to prevent infection.
Kiswahili: Weka kisiki cha kitovu kikavu na kisafi ili kuzuia maambukizi.
Ekegusii: Beka ekenyogu gekamogete na keràbete gotanga oborwaire
Dholuo: Rituru ofuko mar nyundo obed mayom kendo maler mondo kik omake.
Somali: Si looga hortago infekshanka u ilaali qolofka xarkaha qolofka in uu qalalan yahay oo nadiif ah.

English: Early testing helps protect the unborn baby from HIV transmission.
Kiswahili: Kupima mapema husaidia kumlinda mtoto ambaye hajazaliwa kutokana na maambukizi ya VVU.
Ekegusii: Okorengwa kwa bwango ngokonye omwana ataraiborwa tombokerigwa enyamorao
Dholuo: Pimruok chon konyo e rito nyathi mapok onyuol kuom yudo tuo mar HIV.
Somali: Imtixaanka hore wuxuu ka caawiyaa in ilmaha aan dhalan laga ilaaliyo cudurka HIV.

English: Violence harms pregnant women physically and mentally. Support and refer survivors for help.
Kiswahili: Vurugu huwadhuru wanawake wajawazito kimwili na kiakili. Wasaidie na uwape rufaa manusura kwa msaada.
Ekegusii: Chiburaburu nechimbe ase omongina bwebwateraneti kemobere na kebongo Konya na gotebereria ababwate chingoma bakonyeke
Dholuo: Timbe gero hinyo joma mine ma nigi ich, e ringruok koda e paro. Kony joma otony kendo konygi.
Somali: Dagaalku wuxuu haweenka uurka leh waxyeelo u geystaa jireed iyo maskaxeed.

English: Teach girls about periods, hygiene, and body changes before puberty starts.
Kiswahili: Wafundishe wasichana kuhusu hedhi, usafi, na mabadiliko ya mwili kabla ya kubalehe kuanza.
Ekegusii: Somia abaiseke igo ya amatuko abo yomotienyi, obochenu na ogoonchoreria kw' omobere amatuko obosae atarachaka
Dholuo: Puonj nyithindo ma nyiri wach rito ler mar del, koda lokruok matimore e dendgi kapok gibedo rowere mandhowe.
Somali: Gabdhaha baro caadooyinka, nadaafadda, iyo isbeddellada jidhka ka hor inta aan la bilaabin dhalinyarada.

English: Support from fathers, grandparents, and siblings strengthens outcomes for mother and baby.
Kiswahili: Usaidizi kutoka kwa baba, babu na bibi, na ndugu huimarisha matokeo kwa mama na mtoto.
Ekegusii: Okobwatesigwa korwa ase omogaka, chisokoro na abamwabo ngotinia kere obwamate bwa ngina amo nomwana
Dholuo: Kony ma jonyuol, kwere, koda owete koda nyimine chiwo, tego winjruok e kind miyo gi nyathi.
Somali: Taageerada aabbayaasha, awoowayaasha, iyo walaalaha waxay xoojisaa natiijooyinka hooyada iyo ilmaha.

English: Ministry annoucning  unveiling agenda for Multiple Micronutrient Supplementation (MMS) to reduce maternal anaemia and improve birth outcomes.
Kiswahili: Wizara yatangaza ajenda ya kufichua ajenda ya virutubisho vingi (MMS) ili kupunguza upungufu wa damu kwa mama na kuboresha matokeo ya uzazi.
Ekegusii: Ewizara yararirie omoroberio bwe chindagera chire nobotobu ao ao gokeania okoborws kwa amanyinga na gosetgetavokoibora okuya
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth ne olando chenro mar medo chiemo e yore mopogore opogore mondo odwok piny tuo mar anemia kuom mine kendo miyo nyuol obed maber.
Somali: Wasaaraddu waxay soo bandhigtay ajandaha dheeraadka ah ee Micronutrient Supplementation (MMS) si loo yareeyo dhiigla'aanta hooyooyinka loona hagaajiyo natiijooyinka dhalmada.

English: Announing meeting to reaffirm East African leadership in food labelling, marketing restrictions and nutrition reform.
Kiswahili: Mkutano wa kutangaza kuthibitisha uongozi wa Afrika Mashariki katika uwekaji lebo za vyakula, vikwazo vya masoko na mageuzi ya lishe.
Ekegusii: Okoomerana koraria ogotingi oborai ase Orogongo rwa Afrika ya Mocha ase okoraa kobeka echapa chindagera, kobeka ebitango ase chichiro na amaonchereri ase chindagera
Dholuo: Chokruok mar lando mondo ojiw loch ma Afrika ma Ugwe nigo e weche mag keto chiemo e otese, keto chike e ohala kod timo lokruok e weche mag chiemo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida kulan lagu xaqiijinayo hoggaanka Bariga Afrika ee ku saabsan calaamadaha cuntada, xaddidaadaha suuqgeynta iyo dib-u-habeynta nafaqada.

English: Announcing Nationwide training to improve acute malnutrition treatment protocols across counties.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza mafunzo ya Kitaifa kote ili kuboresha itifaki za matibabu ya utapiamlo mkali katika kaunti zote.
Ekegusii: Koraria amaegeria orogongo orogima erio gosegeta emeroberio yoborwari bw' okoria orachi ase chikaunti
Dholuo: Lando tiegruok mar piny mangima mar bero yore mag thieth mag tuo mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre mar midekre.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida tababar caalami ah si loo hagaajiyo nidaamyada daaweynta nafaqada xun ee degmooyinka.

English: Announcing  meeting to create strategy for post‑2025 nutrition programs.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza mkutano wa kuunda mkakati wa programu za lishe baada ya 2025.
Ekegusii: Koraria okoomerana korosia chinchera chiomoberio yechindagera nyuma ya 2025
Dholuo: Chokruok mar lando chenro mag chenro mag chiemo bang' higa mar 2025.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida kulanka si loo abuuro istaraatijiyad loogu talagalay barnaamijyada nafaqada ee ka dambeeya 2025.

English: Ministry announcing awareness sessions to address stunting reduction  and new fortification and regulatory measures.
Kiswahili: Wizara yatangaza vikao vya uhamasishaji ili kushughulikia upunguzaji wa udumavu na hatua mpya za kuimarisha na kudhibiti.
Ekegusii: Ewizara koraria obomànyi igo ya ogatikana gose oguto na chingencho chingeni chigotingia na gotanga
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche mag thieth ne olando chenro mag tiego ji mondo ging'e kaka inyalo geng' nyuol mar nyithindo mosedong' chien kod yore manyien mag thieth.
Somali: Wasaaradda oo ku dhawaaqday fadhiyada wacyiga si loo xaliyo hoos u dhaca daahfurka iyo tallaabooyinka cusub ee qalcadaha iyo xeerarka.

English: Government annmounncing a National Nutrition Symposium to share strategies on universal health care (UHC) and community nutrition.
Kiswahili: Serikali yatangaza Kongamano la Kitaifa la Lishe ili kushiriki mikakati kuhusu huduma ya afya kwa wote (UHC) na lishe ya jamii.
Ekegusii: Eserekali koraria okoumrana okonene ase orogongo rwa Kenya igoro yechindagera erio gosangà ase emeroberio ya obochenu ase bonsi ase ebinyoro
Dholuo: Sirkal lando National Nutrition Symposium mar chiwo paro e wi yore mag thieth ne ji duto (UHC) kod chiemo ne oganda.
Somali: Xukuumadda ayaa ku dhawaaqday in lagu qaban doono Shirweyne Qaran oo ku saabsan nafaqada si loo wadaago istaraatijiyadaha daryeelka caafimaadka ee caalamiga ah (UHC) iyo nafaqada bulshada.

English: Announinng meeting where the country  formally signs UNSDCF Nutrition Joint Programme to support multisector work.
Kiswahili: Mkutano wa kutangaza ambapo nchi inasaini rasmi Programu ya Pamoja ya Lishe ya UNSDCF ili kusaidia kazi za sekta mbalimbali.
Ekegusii: Okoomerana koraria kobeka chisei chie omoroberio oyomo oyo UNSDCF gosegeta chisegita ao ao
Dholuo: Chokruok mar lando kama pinyno biro riwo lwedo chenro mar UNSDCF mar chiemo mondo okony tije mopogore opogore.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida kulan ay dalku si rasmi ah u saxiixdo Barnaamijka wadajirka ah ee UNSDCF ee nafaqada si loo taageero hawlaha qaybaha badan.

English: Ministry updating training module  to strengthen response to malnutrition at community level.
Kiswahili: Wizara inasasisha moduli ya mafunzo ili kuimarisha mwitikio wa utapiamlo katika ngazi ya jamii.
Ekegusii: Ewizara goikarania amaorokererio gotingia okoria orachi ase ebinyoro
Dholuo: Migawo manyien mar tiegruok dhi nyime mondo omed jiwo yore mag kedo gi midekre mar chiemo e okang' mar oganda.
Somali: Wasaaraddu waxay cusbooneysiineysaa qaab-dhismeedka tababarka si loo xoojiyo jawaab celinta quudinta hoose ee heer bulshada.

English: Cross-sector validation meeting held to align county and national nutrition strategies under KNAP.
Kiswahili: Mkutano wa uthibitishaji wa sekta mtambuka ulifanyika ili kuoanisha mikakati ya lishe ya kaunti na kitaifa chini ya KNAP.
Ekegusii: Okoomerana gotingia orosagia rookobekà amo chikaunti na orogongo rwa Kenya ase chindagera inse ya KNAP
Dholuo: Chokruok mar pimo weche e kind migepe ne otim mondo ochan chenro mag county kod mag piny e bwo KNAP.
Somali: Kulan xaqiijinta qaybaha kala duwan oo la qabtay si loo iswaafajiyo istaraatijiyadaha nafaqada ee gobollada iyo kuwa qaranka ee ku hoos jira KNAP.

English: Nationwide campaign to deliver Vitamin A to children under 5 and coordinate with routine immunization services.
Kiswahili: Kampeni ya kitaifa ya kutoa VitaminiA kwa watoto walio chini ya miaka 5 na kuratibu huduma za kawaida za chanjo.
Ekegusii: Ekampeni ya orogongo rwa Kenya korwa ebitàmunusi A ase abana inse miaka etano na echanjo ya botambe
Dholuo: Kampen mar piny mangima mar chiwo Vitamin A ne nyithindo ma hikgi okalo 5 kendo riwo lwedo chenro mag thieth.
Somali: Olole caalami ah oo lagu gaarsiinayo Vitamin?A carruurta da'doodu ka yar tahay 5 sano oo lagu mideeyo adeegyada tallaalka caadiga ah.
