English: Announcing how public dashboards now show county-level nutrition trends and indicators in real-time.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza jinsi dashibodi za umma sasa zinavyoonyesha mitindo na viashiria vya lishe katika ngazi ya kaunti kwa wakati halisi.
Ekegusii: Koraria ase oboagare buna chikaunti chikoorokia chindagera ao ao na ebimanyererio kengimakengima
Dholuo: Ka gilando kaka kuonde ma ji ng'enyie sani nyiso kit chiemo ma ji yudo e alwora ma gidakie e kinde ma wechego timore.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida sida looxyada dadweynaha ay hadda u muujiyaan isbeddellada nafaqada ee gobolka iyo tilmaamayaasha waqtiga dhabta ah.

English: Annoucing lauch of National roadmap for nutrition interventions at county and national levels.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza mpango wa kitaifa wa uingiliaji kati wa lishe katika ngazi za kaunti na kitaifa.
Ekegusii: Okoraria omoroberio ase orogongo igoro yechindagera ase ekaunti naboigo ense yonsi
Dholuo: Lando wach chenro mar piny mangima mar yore mag chiemo e okang' mar counties kod piny mangima.
Somali: Soo bandhigida khariidadda waddooyinka qaranka ee tallaabooyinka nafaqada ee heer gobol iyo heer qaran.

English: Announing launch of framework to guide data collection and reporting of nutrition outcomes.
Kiswahili: Kuzindua mfumo wa kuongoza ukusanyaji na utoaji wa taarifa za matokeo ya lishe.
Ekegusii: Ogochakia omoroberio bw'ogosangereria na gosokia chiropoti igoro yechindagera
Dholuo: Lando chakruok mar chenro mar tayo choko weche kod chiwo ripot kuom nyak mag chiemo.
Somali: In la shaaciyo in la bilaabay qaab-dhismeed lagu haginayo ururinta xogta iyo warbixinta natiijooyinka nafaqada.

English: Announcement of launch of “ENOUGH” campaign which aims to end child hunger by expanding school meals, climate-smart agriculture, and nutrition advocacy.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la uzinduzi wa kampeni ya “INATOSHA” ambayo inalenga kukomesha njaa ya watoto kwa kupanua milo shuleni, kilimo kinachozingatia hali ya hewa, na utetezi wa lishe.
Ekegusii: Okoraria omochakano bw' ekampeini " ENGIKERANU" erengete gokanya enchara ase abana chisukuru, oboremi boigwanaine ne rire na oboegereri chindagera
Dholuo: Lando mar chako kampen mar "ENOUGH" ma dwaro tieko kech mar nyithindo kuom medo chiemo e skunde, pur mar neno chal mar kor lwasi, kod jiwo weche mag chiemo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida bilowga ololaha "ENOUGH" kaas oo ujeedkiisu yahay in la joojiyo gaajooyinka carruurta iyada oo la ballaarinayo cuntada dugsiga, beeraha cimilada u habboon, iyo taageerada nafaqada.

English: Announcing roll out of countywide Vitamin A supplementation & deworming for 12,000+ children under five with outreach and ECD support in Kiambu County
Kiswahili: Kutangaza uzinduzi wa nyongeza ya Vitamini A na dawa za minyoo katika kaunti nzima kwa watoto zaidi ya 12,000 walio chini ya umri wa miaka mitano kwa usaidizi wa uhamasishaji na ECD katika Kaunti ya Kiambu
Ekegusii: Okorari ogochaki ebitàmunusi A na amariogo yogoita ebianda ase ekaunti engima ase abana goetani 12,000 bare inse yemiaka etano kobwaterana ase obosemi na ECD, ase ekaunti ya Kiambu
Dholuo: Lando mar chako tiyo gi Vitamin A e gwenge duto kod thieth mar chango kute mag kute ne nyithindo mokalo 12,000 ma hikgi okalo abich ka ikonyogi gi chenro mar ECD e Kaunti ma Kiambu
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida bixinta kaabista Vitamin A ee gobolka oo dhan & ka saarista cayayaanka 12,000 + caruur ah oo ka yar shan sano oo leh taageero wacyi galineed iyo ECD ee degmada Kiambu

English: Ministry inviting community service organizations via SUNCSA to plan public nutrition messaging and sanitation strategy (Epuka Uchafu).
Kiswahili: Wizara inaalika mashirika ya huduma kwa jamii kupitia SUNCSA kupanga mkakati wa ujumbe wa lishe kwa umma na usafi wa mazingira (Epuka Uchafu).
Ekegusii: Ewizara yachikire abakoreri ase ebinyoro goetera SUNCSA koroberia amangana yokoragera buya ase bonsi na obochenu bwe'binto bitoetanaine Eatanane neubi
Dholuo: Migawo mar gwelo riwruoge matiyo ne oganda kokalo kuom SUNCSA mondo gichan chenro mar chiwo weche mag chiemo ne oganda kod yore mag rito ler (Epuka Uchafu).
Somali: Wasaaraddu waxay ku casuumaysaa ururada adeegga bulshada iyada oo loo marayo SUNCSA inay qorsheeyaan farriimaha nafaqada dadweynaha iyo istiraatiijiyadda nadaafadda (Epuka Uchafu).

English: Ministry highlighting role of community health workers in delivering nutrition services as part of Universal Health Coverage.
Kiswahili: Wizara ikiangazia jukumu la wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii katika kutoa huduma za lishe kama sehemu ya Bima ya Afya kwa Wote.
Ekegusii: Ewizara komorekera emeremo ya abakori emeremo yobochenu bwegenka ase okoenana amaegerio yechindagera buna ensemo yogosira obochenu ase bonsi
Dholuo: Migawo mar Migawo Mochung'ne Weche mag Thieth jiwo tich ma jotich mag thieth e alworano timo e chiwo weche mag thieth kaka achiel kuom yore mag thieth madwarore ne ji duto.
Somali: Wasaaradda oo tilmaamay kaalinta shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ee bixinta adeegyada nafaqada ee qayb ka ah daboolka Caafimaadka Caalamiga ah.

English: National ACSM strategy introduced to promote nutrition messaging and public awareness across sectors.
Kiswahili: Mkakati wa kitaifa wa ACSM ulianzishwa ili kukuza ujumbe wa lishe na uelewa wa umma katika sekta mbalimbali.
Ekegusii: Emeroberio yorogongo ase ACSM gochakia na gokinia amangana yokoragera okuya na obomanyi ase chinsagia ao ao
Dholuo: Chenro mar ACSM mar piny owacho ne ochaki mondo ojiw weche mag chiemo kod ng'eyo mar oganda e yore mopogore opogore.
Somali: Istaraatiijiyadda Qaranka ee ACSM ayaa la soo bandhigay si loo dhiirrigeliyo fariimaha nafaqada iyo wacyiga dadweynaha ee dhinacyada kala duwan.

English: Announcing the lauch of Country plan that prioritizes maternal-child nutrition, agriculture‑education integration and multisector tracking.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza uzinduzi wa mpango wa Nchi unaoweka kipaumbele lishe ya mama na mtoto, ujumuishaji wa elimu ya kilimo na ufuatiliaji wa sekta nyingi.
Ekegusii: Okoraria omochakano kobeka chindagera chia abangina amo na abana, gosangiwa amaegerio yoboremi na gotunyana ase chinsagia chinyinge
Dholuo: Lando chenro manyien mar piny ma keto wach chiemo mar mine kod nyithindo, pur kod somo e rang'iny ma malo, kod luwo yore mopogore opogore.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida qorshaha waddanka ee mudnaanta siinaya nafaqada hooyada iyo ilmaha, isdhexgalka waxbarashada beeraha iyo la socodka qaybaha badan.

English: Announing a nutrition education & weekly iron–folic acid supplementation delivered to adolescents across Busia, Kitui & Nakuru.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza elimu ya lishe na nyongeza ya kila wiki ya asidi ya chuma-foliki inayotolewa kwa vijana kote Busia, Kitui na Nakuru.
Ekegusii: Koraria chisemi igoro yechindagera na okomenteru kera omokubio igoro ya asiti yechuma ya foliki ekorwegwa ase abasae bonsi Busia, Kitui na Nakuru
Dholuo: Lando wach tiegruok e weche mag chiemo kod medo yedhe mag iron ⁇ folic acid juma ka juma ne rowere e gwenge mag Busia, Kitui kod Nakuru.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida waxbarashada nafaqada & qaadashada toddobaadlaha ah ee iron-folic acid ee dhalinyarada ku nool Busia, Kitui & Nakuru.

English: Announcing Nairobi county initiative to fund vegetable gardens in primary schools to improve diet diversity and learning.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza mpango wa kaunti ya Nairobi wa kufadhili bustani za mboga katika shule za msingi ili kuboresha utofauti wa lishe na ujifunzaji.
Ekegusii: Koraria omoroberio bwe' kaunti ya Nairobi gosegeta oboremi bwe'biticha chinyeni ase chisukuru chi'oboroso erio gwatanana chindagera na amaegerio
Dholuo: Lando chenro mar county ma Nairobi mar chiwo pesa ne puothe mag alot e skunde mag praimari mondo okony e miyo chiemo obed mopogore opogore kod puonjruok.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida dadaalka degmada Nairobi ee lagu maalgelinayo beeraha khudradda ee dugsiyada hoose si loo wanaajiyo kala duwanaanta cuntada iyo barashada.

English: Announcing a New opt-in SMS platform sends weekly advice on healthy diets, food safety, and portion control.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza jukwaa jipya la SMS la kujiandikisha hutuma ushauri wa kila wiki kuhusu lishe bora, usalama wa chakula, na udhibiti wa ulaji.
Ekegusii: Koraria orosagia oroiyia ase amariko yesimi kwerikia konyora obosemi kera omokubio igoro yokoragera okuya, oborendi bwechindagera na gotinia omoigoto
Dholuo: Lando chenro manyien mar SMS ma ng'ato nyalo yiero tiyogo, ma oro paro juma ka juma e wi chiemo maber, ritruok e chiemo, kod kaka ng'ato nyalo tiyo gi chiemo morome.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida barnaamij cusub oo SMS ah oo lagu codsan karo ayaa soo diraya talooyin toddobaadle ah oo ku saabsan cuntooyinka caafimaad qaba, badbaadada cuntada, iyo xakamaynta qaybaha.

English: Java to offer nutrition to national teams. Men and women teams in camp for Africa Games
Kiswahili: Java kutoa lishe kwa timu za taifa. Timu za wanaume na wanawake kambini kwa ajili ya Michezo ya Afrika
Ekegusii: Java korwa chindagera ase abagosoria borogongo Chitimu chia abasacha na abakungu chikambi ase chigosori ime ya Afrika
Dholuo: Java mondo ochiw chiemo ne jotugo mag pinyno. Jotim tuke mag chwo gi mon e kambi mar tuke mag Afrika
Somali: Java si ay u bixiso nafaqo kooxaha qaranka. kooxaha ragga iyo dumarka xerada ciyaaraha Afrika

English: Kenya, UNICEF, World Bank unveil Nutrition Improvement. Through Cash and Health Education programme in 11 counties
Kiswahili: Kenya, UNICEF, Benki ya Dunia yafichua Uboreshaji wa Lishe. Kupitia mpango wa Fedha na Elimu ya Afya katika kaunti 11
Ekegusii: Kenya, UNICEF, ebengi enene ense engima, baasioriri okoragera okuya Goetare omoroberio bwe chiropia na amaegerio Afrika chikaunti 11
Dholuo: Kenya, UNICEF, kod World Bank elo dongruok e yore mag chiemo. Kokalo kuom chenro mar Cash and Health Education program e counties 11
Somali: Kenya, UNICEF, Bangiga Adduunka waxay soo bandhigeen horumarinta nafaqada iyada oo loo marayo barnaamijka Waxbarashada Lacagta iyo Caafimaadka ee 11 degmo

English: Blue band kicks off the campaign in Nairobi. Campaign aims at promoting good nutrition
Kiswahili: Bendi ya Bluu yaanza kampeni jijini Nairobi. Kampeni inalenga kukuza lishe bora
Ekegusii: Epandi ya Blue Band yachakire ekampeini omochi omonene o' Nairobi
Dholuo: Blue band chako kampen e Nairobi. Kampenno dwaro jiwo wach chiemo maber
Somali: Shirkadda Blue Band ayaa ololahan ka bilaabaysa Nairobi. Ololuhu waxa uu higsanayaa in lagu horumariyo nafaqada caafimaadka leh.

English: Kenya’s Push To Promote Traditional Food Is Good For Nutrition And Cultural Heritage
Kiswahili: Shinikizo la Kenya la Kukuza Chakula cha Jadi ni Nzuri kwa Lishe na Urithi wa Utamaduni
Ekegusii: Erango yogosegeta chindagera chia abakoro mbuya na koererani egekoro
Dholuo: Chenro mar Kenya mar jiwo chiemo ma ne chon itiyogo konyo e miyo ji chiemo maber kod rito mwandu mag oganda
Somali: Kenya oo ku dadaaleysa in la horumariyo cuntada dhaqanka ayaa faa'iido u leh nafaqada iyo dhaxalka dhaqanka

English: Announcing launch of a multi-county project to reinforce nutritious food availability during shocks and crises.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza uzinduzi wa mradi wa kaunti nyingi ili kuimarisha upatikanaji wa chakula chenye lishe wakati wa mishtuko na migogoro.
Ekegusii: Ogoraria gochakigwa omoroberio ase ekaunti erio gotingia ogotoka gwechindagera ekero kia eburaburu na chisegi
Dholuo: Lando wach chako chenro mar gwenge mang'eny mar medo chiemo maber e kinde mag chandruok kod chandruok.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida bilowga mashruuc ka kooban degmooyin badan si loo xoojiyo helitaanka cuntooyinka nafaqada leh inta lagu jiro qalalaasaha iyo xiisadaha.

English: Launch of a pilot to provide free milk twice weekly to primary school children in Migori and Nakuru counties.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa majaribio ya kutoa maziwa ya bure mara mbili kwa wiki kwa watoto wa shule za msingi katika kaunti za Migori na Nakuru.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa amatemu koenana amabere atarigwakanerewa, kabere ase omokubio ase abana chisukuru chia oboroso ime ya Migori na Nakuru
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chenro mar chiwo chak maonge chudo nyadiriyo juma ka juma ne nyithindo ma dhi e skunde mag praimari e counties mag Migori kod Nakuru.
Somali: Bilowga barnaamij tijaabo ah oo lagu siinayo caano bilaash ah laba jeer usbuucii carruurta dugsiga hoose ee degmooyinka Migori iyo Nakuru.

English: Introduction of MoreMilk 2, aimed at improving milk safety and incomes via standards, training, and market access in central/western Kenya.
Kiswahili: Utangulizi wa MoreMilk2, unaolenga kuboresha usalama wa maziwa na mapato kupitia viwango, mafunzo, na ufikiaji wa soko katikati/magharibi mwa Kenya.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwa MoreMilk2 orengete gokongia oborendi bwa amabere na ebitoki, goetera amaegerio na ogoikereka gwechiro gatigati ya Bosongo ya Kenya
Dholuo: Tiyo gi MoreMilk 2, ma dwaro ni omed geng'o tuoche mag chak kod kelo yuto kokalo kuom chike, tiegruok, kod yudo thuolo mar dhi e chiro e Kenya.
Somali: Soo bandhigida MoreMilk?2, oo loogu talagalay hagaajinta badbaadada caanaha iyo dakhliga iyada oo loo marayo heerarka, tababarka iyo marin u helka suuqa bartamaha / galbeedka Kenya.

English: National target set to raise annual milk yield from 5.2B to 10B liters, boosting smallholder farmer incomes.
Kiswahili: Lengo la kitaifa limewekwa kuongeza mavuno ya maziwa ya kila mwaka kutoka lita bilioni 5.2 hadi bilioni 10, na hivyo kuongeza kipato cha wakulima wadogo.
Ekegusii: Orogongo rwairwe enengo yerigesa riamabere kera omwaka korwa chirita ebilion 5 2 goika chibilion 10, naboigo komenta okonyora ase abaremi abake
Dholuo: Chenro mar piny owacho mar medo nyak mar chak higa ka higa koa e lita bilion 5.2 nyaka bilion 10, kendo medo pesa ma jopur matindo yudo.
Somali: Ujeedada qaranka ayaa ah in la kordhiyo wax soo saarka caanaha sanadlaha ah 5.2B illaa 10B litir, taas oo kordhin doonta dakhliga beeraleyda yaryar.

English: Launch of the MaziwaPlus initiative in Nyeri County to reduce mastitis incidence and curb antibiotic overuse in dairy cattle.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa mpango wa MaziwaPlus katika Kaunti ya Nyeri ili kupunguza matukio ya ugonjwa wa mastitis na kupunguza matumizi ya dawa za kuua vijidudu kupita kiasi kwa ng'ombe wa maziwa.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwa'Omoroberio ase MaziwaPlus ase ekaunti ya Nyeri eeio gokeiya oborwaire rwa' chingokero na gokeiya oborwire ase engombe yamabere
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chenro mar MaziwaPlus e kaunti mar Nyeri mar duoko piny tuo mar mastitis kod geng'o tiyo gi antibayotik mokalo tong' e dhok mag chak.
Somali: Bilowga mashruuca MaziwaPlus ee Gobolka Nyeri si loo yareeyo dhacdada mastitis iyo xakameynta isticmaalka xad dhaafka ah ee antibiyootikada lo'da caanaha.

English: Announcement that MoH and SUNCSA coalition will launch public health campaign integrating sanitation and nutrition messaging.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kwamba muungano wa Wizara ya Afya na SUNCSA utazindua kampeni ya afya ya umma inayojumuisha ujumbe wa usafi na lishe.
Ekegusii: Okoraria ogocha amo ewizara yobochenu amo na SUNCSA nakobokie ekampeni yobochenu ase mwanyabanto egosangani amangana yobochenu nechindagera
Dholuo: Lando ni riwruok mar MoH kod SUNCSA biro chako kampen mar thieth mar oganda ka oriwo weche mag ler kod chiemo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida in MoH iyo isbahaysiga SUNCSA ay bilaabi doonaan olole caafimaad oo dadweyne ah oo isku daraya fariimaha nadaafadda iyo nafaqada.

English: Official statement reaffirming Kenya’s commitment to front-of-pack labeling, food marketing restrictions, and cross-border policy coordination.
Kiswahili: Taarifa rasmi inayothibitisha tena kujitolea kwa Kenya katika uwekaji lebo wa bidhaa za chakula, vikwazo vya uuzaji wa chakula, na uratibu wa sera za mipakani.
Ekegusii: Eropoti yabene ekwenekia okwerwa rwa Kenya ase okobeka ebimanyererio ase chindagera, ebitango ase okoonigwa na gochika amachiko ase chimbebe
Dholuo: Wach mowuok kuom joloch mag Kenya ma jiwo kaka Kenya oseng'ado mar keto alama e nyim chiemo, keto chike mag keto chiemo e chiro, kod chano yore mag kelo winjruok e kind pinje.
Somali: War-murtiyeed rasmi ah oo dib u xaqiijinaya ballanqaadka Kenya ee ku saabsan calaamadeynta hore ee baakadaha, xaddidaadaha suuq-geynta cuntada, iyo is-dhexgalka siyaasadda xad dhaafka ah.

English: Announcement of multi-sector collaboration to support school nutrition and small-scale dairy livelihoods through public procurement.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la ushirikiano wa sekta mbalimbali ili kusaidia lishe shuleni na riziki ndogo za maziwa kupitia ununuzi wa umma.
Ekegusii: Okoraria ase okobwaterana chinsagia ao ao erio gokonya okragera akuya ase chisukuru na ebitoki gwetera okoonigwa kwa amabere
Dholuo: Lando mar tudruok e kind migepe mopogore opogore mondo okony chiemo e skunde kod yore mag dak mar joma tiyo gi chak e okang' matin kokalo kuom chenro mar ng'iewo gik moko.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida iskaashiga qaybaha badan si loo taageero nafaqada dugsiyada iyo nolol maalmeedka caanaha ee yar yar iyada oo loo marayo qandaraasyada dadweynaha.

English: Public launch event held to introduce the MoreMilk 2 initiative intended to enhance milk handling and market access in key milk-producing counties.
Kiswahili: Hafla ya uzinduzi wa hadhara ilifanyika ili kutambulisha mpango wa MoreMilk2 unaolenga kuboresha utunzaji wa maziwa na upatikanaji wa soko katika kaunti muhimu zinazozalisha maziwa.
Ekegusii: Okoomerana okonene kwabete erio komanyereria emeroberio ya MoreMilk2, orengete oborendu rwa' amabere na ogitoka gwe'chichiro na mono ase chikaunti chikogesa amabere ase obonge
Dholuo: Chokruok ma ne itimo e lela mar chako chenro mar MoreMilk 2 ma ne dhi konyo ji ng'iewo chak e gwenge ma nigi chak mang'eny.
Somali: Munaasabadda hordhaca dadweynaha ee lagu soo bandhigay hindisaha MoreMilk?2 oo loogu talagalay in lagu xoojiyo maaraynta caanaha iyo helitaanka suuqa ee degmooyinka muhiimka ah ee caanaha soo saara.

English: Announcement that pre‑service nursing curriculum now includes nutrition and wellness modules for community care.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kwamba mtaala wa uuguzi wa kabla ya huduma sasa unajumuisha moduli za lishe na ustawi kwa ajili ya utunzaji wa jamii.
Ekegusii: Okoraria igoro yamasomo nyuma yobokoreri kobekwa amo nechisemi chiokoragera okuya na okorereta ase chunka
Dholuo: Ng'eyo ni program mar tiegruok e weche thieth sani oriwo weche mag chiemo kod ngima maber mar joma odak e alwora.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida in barnaamijka kalkaalisada caafimaadka ee adeegga ka hor uu hadda ka kooban yahay qaybaha nafaqada iyo caafimaadka ee daryeelka bulshada.

English: Public statement endorsing millet, sorghum and legumes for sustainability and dietary resilience.
Kiswahili: Taarifa ya umma inayounga mkono mtama, mtama na kunde kwa ajili ya uendelevu na ustahimilivu wa lishe.
Ekegusii: Okoraria ase abanto bonsi nemeroberio yancheire koa okoboko emiogo, chinyeni chiegesare ase okogendereri na okoremereri kw' endagera
Dholuo: Wach ma ji duto ong'eyo ma jiwo ni mondo chiemo ma ji chamo obed ma siko kendo okethre, dwarore ni ji duto ocham millet, sorghum, kod alode.
Somali: Bayaanka dadweynaha ee ku taageeraya millet, sorghum iyo cawska si loo ilaaliyo cimri dhererka iyo adkeysiga cuntada.

English: Announcement that clubs will offer peer-led education, counseling referrals and healthy cafeteria initiatives.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kwamba vilabu vitatoa elimu inayoongozwa na wenzao, marejeleo ya ushauri nasaha na mipango ya mkahawa yenye afya.
Ekegusii: Okoraria inga ebirabu mbirente amasomo akoraagwa na abanyene, ogitebererigwa na gokanywa na emeroberio ya ekaagwa ere na' afia
Dholuo: Ng'eyo ni Clubs biro chiwo tiegruok ma jowetegi ema tayo, chiwo paro e weche mag thieth kod chenro mag kuonde chiemo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida in kooxaha ay bixin doonaan waxbarasho la-hawlgalayaal ah, la-talin la-talin ah iyo dadaal caafimaad leh oo ku saabsan makhaayadaha.

English: Release of national media campaign explaining new front-of-pack labelling to consumers.
Kiswahili: Kutolewa kwa kampeni ya kitaifa ya vyombo vya habari inayoelezea lebo mpya za mbele kwa watumiaji.
Ekegusii: Okosokigwa gwe' kampeni yorogongo ase chinyomba chioraria chikoerera ebimanyererio ebiyia bia bosio ase abakoreri
Dholuo: Goyo kampen mar lando weche e okang' malach e piny mangima ka ilero ne joma tiyo gi gik moko weche manyien e nyim gik moko.
Somali: Daabacaadda ololaha warbaahinta qaranka ee sharaxaya calaamadaha cusub ee xirmada hore ee macaamiisha.

English: Campaign encouraging edible oil producers to reduce sodium content through voluntary pledge scheme.
Kiswahili: Kampeni ya kuwahimiza wazalishaji wa mafuta ya kula kupunguza kiwango cha sodiamu kupitia mpango wa ahadi ya hiari.
Ekegusii: Ekampeni yogosegeta abarosia amaguta na gokeania ebirengo bia sodiamu gwetera chiira chigwancha
Dholuo: Kampen ma jiwo joma loso mo mar chiemo mondo odwok chien sodium ma gin - go kokalo kuom chenro mar chiwruok ma onge achune.
Somali: Olole lagu dhiirigelinayo soosaarayaasha saliida la cuno inay yareeyaan waxyaabaha ku jira sodium iyada oo loo marayo nidaamka ballanqaadka iskaa ah.

English: Announcement of influencer-led digital media campaign promoting self-care, destigmatization, and helpline awareness in mental wellness week.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la kampeni ya vyombo vya habari vya kidijitali inayoongozwa na watu wenye ushawishi inayokuza utunzaji binafsi, udhalilishaji, na ufahamu wa simu ya usaidizi katika wiki ya ustawi wa akili.
Ekegusii: Okoraria gwekampeni na eɓokoreri bia amangana ekoragwa nabanyene babwate riosa ase okwerenda aye omonyene, okonengetwa na obomanyi gwetera chisimi gati yomokubio bwogokinia obongo
Dholuo: Lando mar kampen mar digital media mitayo gi joma nigi teko mar jiwo ritruok ma ng'ato owuon timo, tieko wichkuot, kendo konyo ji ng'eyo kaka ginyalo rito ngimagi e kinde mar juma mar paro.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida olole warbaahinta dhijitaalka ah oo ay hogaamiyaan saameynayaashu si kor loogu qaado daryeelka naftiisa, ka-hortagga, iyo wacyi-gelinta khadka caawimaadda toddobaadka caafimaadka maskaxda.

English: Launch of hydroponic garden pilot to supply fresh vegetables in school cafeterias in dry areas.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa majaribio ya bustani ya hydroponic ili kusambaza mboga mbichi katika mikahawa ya shule katika maeneo makavu.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwa oboremi bwamatemu bwebikombe ebikeebike bweprakitis, na koranda goika chisukuru ase eroro
Dholuo: Chakruok mar tiyo gi puothe mag hydroponic e chiwo alot manyien e kafeteria mag skunde e gwenge motwo.
Somali: Bilowga barnaamijka tijaabada ah ee beerta hydroponic si loo bixiyo khudradda cusub ee maqaayadaha dugsiga ee meelaha qalalan.

English: Announcement of AI-based nutrition and wellness advice service tailored for elderly citizens and caregivers.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la huduma ya ushauri wa lishe na ustawi inayotegemea akili bandia iliyoundwa kwa ajili ya wazee na walezi.
Ekegusii: Okoraria kwobokoreri bwechindagera na okogenderera na obomanyi kebonde yarosigwa ase 'ngecho ya abagaka na abareri
Dholuo: Lando mar AI-based nutrition and wellness advice service molos ne jodongo kod joma ritogi.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida adeegga la talinta nafaqada iyo caafimaadka ee ku saleysan AI oo loogu talagalay muwaadiniinta waayeelka ah iyo daryeelayaasha.

English: Announcement of SMS service sending tailored postpartum diet and wellness tips to new mothers.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la huduma ya SMS inayotuma vidokezo vya lishe na ustawi vilivyoundwa mahususi kwa akina mama wapya.
Ekegusii: Okoraria goetera SMS gotoma amangana igoro yechindagera na okorereta, arosire bene ase abangina abageni
Dholuo: Lando mar SMS mar oro paro mag chiemo kod ngima maber ne mine mapod nyien.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida adeegga SMS-ka ee u diraya hooyooyinka cusub talooyin nafaqo iyo caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhalmada ka dib.

English: Population Services Kenya launches Iron-Folate supplement and nutrition education sessions for adolescents in Busia, Kitui & Nakuru.
Kiswahili: Huduma za Idadi ya Watu Kenya zazindua vikao vya elimu ya virutubisho vya Iron-Folate na lishe kwa vijana huko Busia, Kitui na Nakuru.
Ekegusii: Obokoreri aae ekeombe kia obonge bwa abanto Kenya, bachakiri amasomo borengete chindagera buna Ayoni-folate ase abasae chinsemo chia Busia, Kitui amo na Nakuru
Dholuo: Population Services Kenya ochako chenro mar Iron-Folate supplement kod tiegruok e weche mag chiemo ne rowere e Busia, Kitui & Nakuru.
Somali: Adeegyada Deegaanka Kenya ayaa bilaabay kalfadhiyo waxbarasho oo ku saabsan dheeriga ah ee Iron-Folate iyo nafaqada dhalinyarada ku nool Busia, Kitui & Nakuru.

English: Official launch of $5 billion FNRP to support food security across 24 ASAL counties, targeting 5M vulnerable Kenyans.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi rasmi wa FNRP ya dola bilioni 5 ili kusaidia usalama wa chakula katika kaunti 24 za ASAL, ukilenga Wakenya milioni 5 walio katika mazingira magumu.
Ekegusii: Ogochakiwa bene kwa omoroberio oyo FNRP bwe chidola chibilioni 5 erio gokonya okoba gwe chindagera ase chikaunti 24 ase eroro na chinsemo chinyomo, barengete abakenya chomirioni 5
Dholuo: Chiwo mar pesa mar bilion 5 mar FNRP mar siro chiemo e gwenge 24 mag ASAL, ka ichano ne jo Kenya 5M ma ok nyal kony.
Somali: Bilowga rasmiga ah ee $ 5 bilyan oo FNRP ah si loo taageero amniga cuntada 24 degmo oo ASAL ah, oo bartilmaameedsanaya 5 milyan oo reer Kenya ah oo nugul.

English: Announcement of series of county learning forums emphasizing breastfeeding support, community hygiene, and infant diet education.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la mfululizo wa mabaraza ya kujifunza ya kaunti yanayosisitiza usaidizi wa kunyonyesha, usafi wa jamii, na elimu ya lishe ya watoto wachanga.
Ekegusii: Okoraria amaegerio ase chibarasa ase chikaunti chirengete obokonyi ase okogonkia,obochenu bwegenka na chisemi chiokoragera okuya ase ebingwerere
Dholuo: Lando chenro mar romo mag county mar puonjruok ka gijiwo kony mar miyo nyithindo ma nyiri chiemo gi kanyono, rito ler mar alwora, kod puonjo nyithindo e wi chiemo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida taxane ka mid ah goobaha barashada ee gobolka oo ku adkeysanaya taageerada naasnuujinta, nadaafadda bulshada, iyo waxbarashada cuntada ilmaha.

English: Celebrations as Kenya surpasses the WHO target with exclusive breastfeeding rates rising above 50%; commitment extended to sustain improvements.
Kiswahili: Sherehe huku Kenya ikizidi lengo la WHO huku viwango vya unyonyeshaji pekee vikiongezeka zaidi ya 50%; ahadi imeongezwa ili kudumisha maboresho.
Ekegusii: Omochengo aiga Kenya ase ogoetania ebirengo bia Ekeombe ekenene ense engima, biamentekire goetani emerongo etano ase emia;eira eyio yementirwe na gokina
Dholuo: Nyasi kaka Kenya okalo tarig mar WHO ka kwan mar nyithindo ma nyiri ma nyiri kende ema pidho nyithindgi gi minegi omedore mokalo 50%; chiwruok omed mondo okony dongruok.
Somali: Xafladaha Kenya ayaa ka sarreeya bartilmaameedka WHO iyadoo heerarka naasnuujinta gaarka loo leeyahay ay kor u kacayso 50%; ballanqaadka la kordhiyay si loo sii wado hagaajinta.

English: Announcement of TOT training initiative for 26 health workers from four counties under BFHI supported by USAID.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la mpango wa mafunzo ya TOT kwa wafanyakazi 26 wa afya kutoka kaunti nne chini ya BFHI inayoungwa mkono na USAID.
Ekegusii: Okoraria kuomoroberio bwa amaegerio ase abaorokia abanene ase abakori emeremo 26, ase chikaunti inye inse ya BFHi eire okoboko na USAID
Dholuo: Chenro mar tiegruok mar TOT ne jotich mag thieth 26 moa e kaunti ang'wen e bwo BFHI ka USAID riwo lwedo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida dadaalka tababarka TOT ee loogu talagalay 26 shaqaale caafimaad oo ka socda afar degmo oo hoos yimaada BFHI oo ay taageerto USAID.

English: Elgeyo Marakwet County officially rolls out CNAP targeting a reduction of child stunting from 30% to 22%.
Kiswahili: Kaunti ya Elgeyo Marakwet yazindua rasmi mpango wa CNAP unaolenga kupunguza udumavu wa watoto kutoka 30% hadi 22%.
Ekegusii: Ekaunti ya Elgeyo Marakwet ya chakiri bene omoroberio o CNAP orengete gokeani ogotakìa kwa abana korwa 30% goika 22%
Dholuo: Kaunti mar Elgeyo Marakwet oseloso chenro mar CNAP ma dwaro ni odwok chien kwan mar nyithindo ma ok dhi maber kowuok 30% nyaka 22%.
Somali: Degmada Elgeyo Marakwet ayaa si rasmi ah u soo bandhigtay CNAP oo ujeedkeedu yahay in la yareeyo yaraanta yaraanta 30% ilaa 22%.

English: Announcement of free school milk program for primary pupils in Migori and Nakuru to improve child nutrition and school attendance.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la mpango wa maziwa ya bure kwa wanafunzi wa shule za msingi huko Migori na Nakuru ili kuboresha lishe ya watoto na mahudhurio shuleni.
Ekegusii: Okorari gwokoenana amabere abosa ase chisikuru chioboroso ekaunti ya Migori na Nakuru erio komenta okorereta na komenta abana bagosoa chisukuru
Dholuo: Lando mar chenro mar nono chak e skul maonge chudo ne jopuonjre e primari e Migori kod Nakuru mondo omed miyo nyithindo chiemo kod dhi e skul.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida barnaamijka caanaha dugsiga ee bilaashka ah ee ardayda dugsiga hoose ee Migori iyo Nakuru si loo hagaajiyo nafaqada carruurta iyo ka qaybgalka dugsiga.

English: Launch of four-year dairy quality improvement initiative in central and western Kenya targeting smallholder producers.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa mpango wa miaka minne wa kuboresha ubora wa maziwa katikati na magharibi mwa Kenya unaolenga wazalishaji wadogo.
Ekegusii: Ogochaki omoroberio bwemiaka ene korosia amabere amaya gatigati na bosongo ya Kenya orengete abaremi abakeabake
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chenro mar higni ang'wen mar medo lony e yore mag loso chak e Kenya ma yo milambo kod ma dier pinyno, ma oket ne jopur matindo.
Somali: Bilowga olole afar sano ah oo lagu hagaajinayo tayada caanaha ee bartamaha iyo galbeedka Kenya oo loogu talagalay soo saarayaasha beeraleyda yaryar.

English: Announcement setting national target to increase milk production to 10 billion liters, supporting dairy livelihoods and nutrition.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la kuweka lengo la kitaifa la kuongeza uzalishaji wa maziwa hadi lita bilioni 10, kusaidia maisha ya maziwa na lishe.
Ekegusii: Okoraria kobeka ekerenga ase orogongo rwa Kenya komenta eberengo bia amabere goika chirita chibirioni ikomi, gokonya obogima bwa amabere na chindagera
Dholuo: Lando mar keto chenro mar piny mangima mar medo chak mar chak nyaka bilion 10 lita, ka gikonyo yore mag yuto kod chiemo mag joma loso chak.
Somali: Ogeysiis ku saabsan hadafka qaran ee ah in la kordhiyo wax soo saarka caanaha illaa 10 bilyan oo litir, taageerada nolosha caanaha iyo nafaqada.

English: Official launch of a campaign integrating sanitation and nutrition messaging, coordinated via civil society coalitions.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi rasmi wa kampeni inayojumuisha usafi wa mazingira na ujumbe wa lishe, iliyoratibiwa kupitia miungano ya asasi za kiraia.
Ekegusii: Okorari bene ekampeni ekorenta amo obochenu ase atoetanaine, na chiesmi chiechindagera buna chiraroberetwe ime ya ebiombe bia mwanyabanto
Dholuo: Chiwruok mar kampen mar chiwo weche mag ler kod chiemo, ma itimo kokalo kuom riwruoge mag oganda.
Somali: Bilowga rasmiga ah ee olole isku dhafan oo ku saabsan fariimaha nadaafadda iyo nafaqada, oo lagu mideeyo isbahaysiyada bulshada rayidka ah.

English: Launch of national Advocacy, Communication & Social Mobilization plan for better public understanding of nutrition.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa mpango wa kitaifa wa Utetezi, Mawasiliano na Uhamasishaji wa Kijamii kwa ajili ya uelewa bora wa umma kuhusu lishe.
Ekegusii: Ogochaki bene kuomoroberio orogongo rwa Kenya igoro yoboegereri, chinkwana na obosemi bwegenka, komenta obomanyi oboikeranu ase abamenyi
Dholuo: Chako chenro mar lando weche mag chiemo e okang' ma malo e piny mangima.
Somali: Bixinta qorshe qaran oo ku saabsan wacyi galinta, isgaarsiinta & dhaqdhaqaaqa bulshada si loo helo faham wanaagsan oo dadweynaha ku saabsan nafaqada.

English: Official announcement of adolescent iron–folic acid supplementation program reaching over 160,000 youth.
Kiswahili: Tangazo rasmi la mpango wa kuongeza asidi ya chuma-foliki kwa vijana linawafikia zaidi ya vijana 160,000.
Ekegusii: Okoraria kwa bene gwokomenta chindagera chibwate foliki ase abasae goetani 160,000
Dholuo: Wach motim ayanga mar program mar medo iron ⁇ folic acid ne rowere ma kwan-gi okalo 160,000.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida rasmiga ah ee barnaamijka kaabista da'da dhalinyarada ah ee loo yaqaan 'iron-folic acid supplementation programme' oo gaadhay in ka badan 160,000 oo dhalinyaro ah.

English: Ministry of Health hosts forum with media partners to promote breastfeeding benefits for working parents.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya huandaa jukwaa na washirika wa vyombo vya habari ili kutangaza faida za kunyonyesha kwa wazazi wanaofanya kazi.
Ekegusii: Ewizara yocheni korosia chibarasa kobwarerana na abariki ba'amangana, erio bararie obuya bwokonkia ase abangina bare emeremo
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth ochano romo gi jofwamb weche mondo gijiw ber mar nyodo ne jonyuol matiyo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa martigelinaysa madal ay la wadaagaan warbaahinta si loo dhiirrigeliyo faa'iidooyinka naas nuujinta ee waalidiinta shaqeeya.

English: Official media brief on latest DHS findings showing decline; call to re-invest in maternity supports and lactation facilities.
Kiswahili: Taarifa rasmi kwa vyombo vya habari kuhusu matokeo ya hivi karibuni ya DHS yanayoonyesha kupungua; wito wa kuwekeza tena katika vituo vya usaidizi wa uzazi na unyonyeshaji.
Ekegusii: Okoraria bene goetera ebiombo bia amangana chiroboto chia DHS yaenekire ogokeana; ogokurerwa kwarurwe bwokomenta obokoreri ase ebitaseni biobokonyi na okogonkia
Dholuo: Jofwamb weche mag sirkal chiwo ripot machuok e wi weche manyien ma DHS osefwenyo manyiso ni kwan mar joma nigi midekre mar kansa osedok chien; kwayo mondo ochak oket pesa kendo e yore mag konyo mine e nyuol koda e kuonde ma nyithindo thiewoe.
Somali: Warbaahinta rasmiga ah waxay soo bandhigtay aragtidii ugu dambeysay ee DHS oo muujineysa hoos u dhac; codsi dib loogu maalgashiyo taageerada hooyada iyo daryeelka naas nuujinta.

English: Announcement of Minitry of Health, private sector, NGOs pledge to strengthen school meals, market nutrition, and community gardens.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la Wizara ya Afya, sekta binafsi, mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali yaahidi kuimarisha milo shuleni, lishe ya sokoni, na bustani za jamii.
Ekegusii: Okoraria korwa ewizara ya obochenu, chisegita chia abanyene, na ebiombe bitari ebieserekari barure chiira gotingia chindagera chisukuru, okoragera ase chichiro na okogonkia nase chinka
Dholuo: Chenro mar Ministry of Health, private sector, NGOs osingore mar tego chiemo e skunde, chiemo e chiro, kod puothe mag ji.
Somali: Ogeysiiska Wasaaradda Caafimaadka, qaybta gaarka loo leeyahay, ururada aan dowliga ahayn waxay ballanqaadeen inay xoojiyaan cuntada dugsiga, nafaqada suuqa, iyo beeraha bulshada.

English: Official roll-out of grant scheme to support vegetable gardens and school nutrition across Nairobi's public primary schools.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi rasmi wa mpango wa ruzuku ili kusaidia bustani za mboga na lishe shuleni katika shule za msingi za umma jijini Nairobi.
Ekegusii: Ogochigwa kwa bene kw'omoroberio kwa bosa gochia ebiticha bwechinyeni na okoragera okuya ase chisukuru chi'oboroso chieserekari omochie o Nairobi
Dholuo: Loso chenro mar chiwo kony mar konyo puothe mag alot kod chiemo e skunde e skunde duto mag Nairobi.
Somali: Hirgelinta rasmiga ah ee nidaamka deeqaha si loo taageero beeraha khudradda iyo nafaqada dugsiyada dugsiyada hoose ee magaalada Nairobi.

English: Announcement of new SMS service sending weekly nutrition tips, food safety alerts and diet guidance to subscribers.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la huduma mpya ya SMS inayotuma vidokezo vya lishe vya kila wiki, arifa za usalama wa chakula na mwongozo wa lishe kwa waliojisajili.
Ekegusii: Okoraria okoyia ase SMS chigotomwa chibwate obosemi bokeboke igoro yechiumbu chingya chiokoragera kera omokubio, oborendi bwe chindagera na omoroberio ase abanto berikire
Dholuo: Chiwruok mar SMS manyien mar oro paro mag chiemo juma ka juma, siem mag chiemo kod weche mag chiemo ne joma ondikogi.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida adeeg cusub oo SMS ah oo soo diraya talooyinka nafaqada toddobaadlaha ah, digniinta badbaadada cuntada iyo tilmaamaha cuntada macaamiisha.

English: Ministry releasing comprehensive strategy following success of KNAP 2018–2022, targeting multisectoral interventions to further reduce malnutrition rates.
Kiswahili: Wizara ikitoa mkakati kamili kufuatia mafanikio ya KNAP 2018–2022, ikilenga uingiliaji kati wa sekta mbalimbali ili kupunguza zaidi viwango vya utapiamlo.
Ekegusii: Ewizara korenta omoroberio omotingu kobwatia chiroboti chingiya chia KNAP 2018-2022, buna chisoanana nechinsagia ao ao gokeani okori orachi
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche mag chiemo ne ogolo chenro moro maduong' bang' KNAP 2018 ⁇ 2022, ma ne oriwo yore mopogore opogore mag konyo ji mondo kik gichak chamo chiemo moromo.
Somali: Wasaaraddu waxay soo saartay istiraatiijiyad dhamaystiran ka dib guusha KNAP 2018-2022, oo bartilmaameedsanaysa faragelinta qaybaha badan si loo yareeyo heerarka nafaqada xun.

English: Announcement about SNV pledging continued support to Kenya’s food systems transformation during Nairobi National Summit.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kuhusu SNV kuahidi kuendelea kuunga mkono mabadiliko ya mifumo ya chakula nchini Kenya wakati wa Mkutano wa Kitaifa wa Nairobi.
Ekegusii: Okorari korwa SNV koria chiira kogenderera gokonya oboonchorerio ase chindagera orogongo rwa Kenya chingaki chia okoomerana okonene Nairobi
Dholuo: Wach mar SNV mar dhi nyime gi kony ne Kenya e loko chenro mag chiemo e kinde Nairobi National Summit.
Somali: Ogeysiis ku saabsan SNV oo ballanqaaday inay sii wadi doonto taageerada beddelidda nidaamyada cuntada ee Kenya intii lagu jiray Shirweynaha Qaranka ee Nairobi.

English: Formal launch of digital advocacy initiative mobilizing influencers and civil society to promote nutrient profiling, FOP labelling, and policy change.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi rasmi wa mpango wa utetezi wa kidijitali unaowahamasisha watu wenye ushawishi na asasi za kiraia ili kukuza uainishaji wa virutubisho, uwekaji lebo wa FOP, na mabadiliko ya sera.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwa omoroberio bwokoegerera dichito, gosegeta abatiotereri okuya amo nebiombe bia abanyo erio koaranani chindagera, okobeka amangana ya FOP, Na oboonchoreri bwamachiko
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chenro mar digital advocacy mar choko jogo ma nigi teko kod oganda mar oganda mondo gijiw weche mag chiemo, keto alama mag FOP, kod loko chike.
Somali: Bilowga rasmiga ah ee dadaalka dhiirrigelinta dhijitaalka ah ee soo uruurinaya saameeyayaasha iyo bulshada rayidka ah si loo dhiirrigeliyo qaabeynta nafaqada, sumadda FOP, iyo isbedelka siyaasadda.

English: Announcing the launch of Kenya Market Assessment highlighting need for warning labels under new nutrient profiling model.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza uzinduzi wa Tathmini ya Soko la Kenya ikiangazia hitaji la lebo za tahadhari chini ya mfumo mpya wa uainishaji wa virutubisho.
Ekegusii: Koraria ogochaki gwe' chichiro Kenya komorekera okogania kobeka ebimanyererio inse yomoreberio omoyia ase chindagera
Dholuo: Lando wach chako nono mar Kenya Market Assessment ka ginyiso ni dwarore ni ondik weche mag siem kaluwore gi chenro manyien mar nono gik ma miyo chiemo bedo maber.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida bilowga Qiimaynta Suuqa Kenya oo muujineysa baahida loo qabo calaamadaha digniinta ee ku jira qaabka cusub ee qiimeynta nafaqada.

English: MoH reaffirms Kenya’s commitment to spearheading East African food environment policies including front-of-pack labeling.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya inathibitisha tena kujitolea kwa Kenya katika kuongoza sera za mazingira ya chakula za Afrika Mashariki ikiwa ni pamoja na uwekaji lebo kwenye pakiti.
Ekegusii: Ewizara yobochenu yatingiri okoerwa kwaye ime ya Kenya koraa emeroberio ase ebinto bitoetananete, sse orogongo rwa Afrika ya Mocha amo okobeka amangana make ase chipagiti
Dholuo: Migawo mar Thieth jiwo kinda mar Kenya mar telo e weche mag alwora mar chiemo e Afrika ma Ugwe, moriwo nyaka keto alama e nyim chiemo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Wasaaradda Caafimaadka Kenya waxay dib u xaqiijineysaa ballanqaadka Kenya in ay hormuud ka noqoto siyaasadaha deegaanka cuntada ee Bariga Afrika oo ay ku jiraan calaamadeynta hore ee baakadaha.

English: Government and dairy sector jointly announcing reviving school milk distribution to enhance child nutrition and support local dairy industry.
Kiswahili: Serikali na sekta ya maziwa kwa pamoja wanatangaza kufufua usambazaji wa maziwa shuleni ili kuboresha lishe ya watoto na kusaidia tasnia ya maziwa ya ndani.
Ekegusii: Eserekari na esegita ya'amabere ase obomo bararirie gochakia obosombi bwa amabere chisukuru erio gotingia okoragera okuya ase abana
Dholuo: Sirkal kod joma tiyo e kembe mag loso chak kaachiel gi joma tiyo e kembe mag loso chak, lando e yo moriere ni gibiro duoko chien chenro mar pogo chak e skunde mondo gimed konyo nyithindo yudo chiemo maber kendo konyo joma tiyo e kembe mag loso chak.
Somali: Dowladda iyo qaybta caanaha ayaa si wadajir ah ugu dhawaaqday in dib loo soo celiyo qaybinta caanaha dugsiga si loo xoojiyo nafaqada carruurta loona taageero warshadaha caanaha ee deegaanka.

English: Announcing official ratification of United Nations framework for coordinated multisector nutrition interventions to tackle malnutrition nationwide.
Kiswahili: Kutangaza kuidhinishwa rasmi kwa mfumo wa Umoja wa Mataifa kwa ajili ya uingiliaji kati wa lishe wa sekta mbalimbali ili kukabiliana na utapiamlo kote nchini.
Ekegusii: Koraria ogoancherwa bene na obomo bwe Chinse igoro yogosoanana egati yokoragera okuya negisegita ao ao korwania okori bobe orogongo rwa Kenya
Dholuo: Lando ratiro mar riwruok mar pinje mag ogendini e wi chenro mar riwruok mar pinje mag ogendini e weche mag chiemo e yore mopogore opogore mondo okony e kedo gi midekre mar chiemo e piny mangima.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida ansixinta rasmiga ah ee qaab-dhismeedka Qaramada Midoobay ee tallaabooyinka nafaqada ee la isku xidhay ee qaybaha badan si looga hortago quudin la'aanta dalka oo dhan.

English: Public launch of irrigated crop and fodder production in Naoros, where malnutrition cases among under-fives declined by 41% thanks to integrated agricultural-nutrition interventions.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa umma wa uzalishaji wa mazao ya umwagiliaji na malisho ya mifugo huko Naoros, ambapo visa vya utapiamlo miongoni mwa watoto walio chini ya umri wa miaka mitano vilipungua kwa 41% kutokana na hatua jumuishi za kilimo na lishe.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa ase abaremi komenta ebitoki ase oboremi ase okonyorokeria amache na chitugo aaria Naoros, ase okoria orachi kwarorekana ase abana inse yemiaka etano egakea ase 41% onye tari ogosoanana gwa okoragera okuya
Dholuo: Ne ochak tich mar pidho puothe kod pidho jamni e piny Naoros, kama kwan mar nyithindo ma nigi midekre mar yuto ne odok chien gi pasent 41 nikech chenro mag pur gi chiemo.
Somali: Bilowga dadweynaha ee soo saarista dalagyada waraabinta iyo quudinta Naoros, halkaas oo kiisaska quudinta ka yar shan sano ay hoos u dhaceen 41% iyada oo ay ugu wacan tahay tallaabooyinka nafaqada beeraha ee isdhexgalka.

English: Public announcement of national campaign targeting rice, flour and oil millers to adhere to micronutrient fortification standards, including awards for top performers.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la umma la kampeni ya kitaifa inayolenga wasagaji wa mchele, unga na mafuta kuzingatia viwango vya urutubishaji wa virutubisho, ikiwa ni pamoja na tuzo kwa waliofanya vyema.
Ekegusii: Okoraria ekampeni ase mwanyabanto erengete abaremi bomochere, obosie na amaguta gotingia ebirengo biobochenu,amo nebiegwa ase abakori amaya
Dholuo: Lando ne ji duto mar kampen mar piny mangima mar jiwo jo molos osuru, mogo, kod mo mondo oluw chike mag medo chiemo e gik matindo, moriwo nyaka chiwo mich ne joma timo maber moloyo.
Somali: Ogeysiiska dadweynaha ee olole qaran oo lagu beegsanayo shiidaalayaasha bariiska, dufanka iyo saliidda si ay u hoggaansamaan heerarka xoojinta nafaqooyinka yaryar, oo ay ku jiraan abaalmarino loogu talagalay kuwa waxqabadka ugu sarreeya.

English: Official launch of program training villagers including women for home gardens supplying nutrient-dense produce for households and schools.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi rasmi wa programu ya mafunzo kwa wanakijiji wakiwemo wanawake kwa ajili ya bustani za nyumbani zinazotoa mazao yenye virutubisho vingi kwa kaya na shule.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa bene omoroberio bwa' amaegerio ase abanyakenyoro ase bare abangina abaremi ebiticha chinka komenta rigesa chindagera ao ao ne' chisukuru
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chenro mar tiego jopiny moriwo nyaka mon e tij pidho puothe mag udi ka gichiwo chiemo ma nigi chiemo mang'eny ne udi koda ne skunde.
Somali: Bilowga rasmiga ah ee barnaamijka tababarka tuulooyinka oo ay ku jiraan haweenka beeraha guryaha siinta wax soo saarka nafaqada badan ee guryaha iyo dugsiyada.

English: Announcement of millet and sorghum adoption to promote climate-smart, nutrient-rich diets at national policy forum.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la kupitishwa kwa mtama na mtama ili kukuza lishe bora na zenye virutubisho vinavyozingatia hali ya hewa katika jukwaa la kitaifa la sera.
Ekegusii: Koraria oboremi bwamaemba komenta chindagera chikoigwana nerire, bosio bwe' chingongo chinde
Dholuo: Lando wach mar kawo millet kod sorghum mondo ojiw kit chiemo ma miyo piny bedo gi lokruok e kit yamo, kod chiemo mopong' gi gik ma miyo del bedo gi ngima maber e kinde chokruok maduong' mar piny mangima.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida la-qabsashada millet iyo sorghum si loo dhiirrigeliyo cuntooyinka cimilada ee caqli-galka ah ee nafaqooyinka badan ee ku jira madasha siyaasadda qaranka.

English: Public launch of rice products fortified with iron, folic acid, B-vitamins, iodine and zinc, aligned with government fortification standards.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa umma wa bidhaa za mchele zilizoongezewa madini ya chuma, asidi ya foliki, vitamini B, iodini na zinki, unaoendana na viwango vya serikali vya urutubishaji.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa gwechindagera chinde chire ase omochere omentire ebioma bia asidi ya foliki, ebitamunusi B, ayodini na zinki, gochia amo neserekari erobereti
Dholuo: Chiwruok ne ji duto mar chiemo mowuok e cham mowir gi chuma, folic acid, B-vitamins, iodine kod zinc, kaluwore gi chike mag sirkal.
Somali: Soo bandhigida dadweynaha ee badeecadaha bariiska ee lagu xoojiyay bir, folic acid, B-vitamins, iodine iyo zinc, oo la jaan qaadaya heerarka xoojinta dawladda.

English: Announcement of staff health screening (BMI, blood pressure, blood sugar) and wellness baseline to shape ongoing workplace wellness programming.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la uchunguzi wa afya ya wafanyakazi (BMI, shinikizo la damu, sukari ya damu) na msingi wa ustawi ili kuunda programu zinazoendelea za ustawi mahali pa kazi.
Ekegusii: Okoraria okorenga obochenu ase abakori obochenu( BMI, ogoaka kwa amanyinga,esukari ase amanyinga) na korosia oboroso eeio korosia omoroberio yokoigwana ase emeremo
Dholuo: Lando mar thieth mar jotich (BMI, blood pressure, blood sugar) kod ngima maber mondo okony e loso chenro mag ngima maber e kuonde tich.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida baaritaanka caafimaadka shaqaalaha (BMI, cadaadiska dhiigga, sonkorta dhiigga) iyo saldhigga caafimaadka si loo qaabeeyo barnaamijka caafimaadka ee ka socda goobta shaqada.

English: Call for small food vendors to reformulate products to meet nutrition standards and enter competition for rewards.
Kiswahili: Wito kwa wachuuzi wadogo wa vyakula kurekebisha bidhaa ili zikidhi viwango vya lishe na kuingia katika ushindani wa zawadi.
Ekegusii: Okorangerigwa kwa abaonchoreri abakeabake be' chindagera korengani na goetani ebirengo bio okoragera okuya na gochaka amaamererani bwechigutwa
Dholuo: Luong jo ohala matindo mag chiemo mondo gilok kitgi mar loso chiemo mondo ochop chike mag chiemo kendo gichak piem mondo giyud mich.
Somali: Ku baaqo alaab-qeybiyeyaasha cuntada yaryar inay dib u qaabeeyaan alaabada si ay u buuxiyaan heerarka nafaqada iyo inay tartamaan abaalmarinta.

English: Official launch of biofertilizer to increase micronutrient content in crops grown in six counties.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi rasmi wa mbolea ya kibiolojia ili kuongeza kiwango cha virutubisho katika mazao yanayolimwa katika kaunti sita.
Ekegusii: Ogochakiwa bene bw' obwoyo bokorosigwa komenta obotobu ase ebimeria bikoremwa ase chikaunti isano nemo
Dholuo: Loso chenro mar tiyo gi biofertilizer mondo omed gik makonyo e loso chiemo e pinje auchiel.
Somali: Bilowga rasmiga ah ee bacriminta dabiiciga ah si loo kordhiyo nuxurka nafaqada yar ee dalagga lagu beeray lix degmo.

English: Announcement opening applications for grants to employers to establish gyms or fitness zones for staff.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la kufungua maombi ya ruzuku kwa waajiri ili kuanzisha maeneo ya mazoezi ya viungo au mazoezi ya viungo kwa wafanyakazi.
Ekegusii: Okoraria bw'ogochakia amasabo yokoenana obokonyi botari gwakanerwa ase abariki, gochakia chinsemo chiamaegerio gose amatemu ase ebimo ase abakori emeremo
Dholuo: Chenro mar chako kwayo mar kony ne joma ondiko tich mondo olos kuonde timo tuke mag rieyo del kata kuonde timo tiegruok mag del ne jotich.
Somali: Ogeysiiska furitaanka codsiyada deeqaha loo siiyo shaqo-bixiyayaasha si loo dhiso jimicsiyada ama goobaha jimicsiga shaqaalaha.

English: Public announcement of competition to promote local nutritious recipes using fortified or indigenous ingredients.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la umma la shindano la kutangaza mapishi yenye virutubisho vya kienyeji kwa kutumia viungo vilivyoongezwa virutubisho au vya asili.
Ekegusii: Okorari amaamereranio ase oborugi ase abanto, ase chindagera chia egekoro gotumia ebinto bikomenta obotobu gose ebikoro
Dholuo: Lando ne ji duto wach piem mar lando yore mag loso chiemo mabeyo e alworano kitiyo gi gik ma ne oket e alworano.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida tartanka si loo dhiirrigeliyo cuntooyinka nafaqada leh ee maxalliga ah iyadoo la adeegsanayo maaddooyin la xoojiyay ama dabiici ah.

English: Launch of smartphone app to track daily steps, hydration, dietary intake, and stress levels with community leaderboards.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa programu ya simu mahiri ili kufuatilia hatua za kila siku, unyevu, ulaji wa chakula, na viwango vya msongo wa mawazo kwa kutumia ubao wa viongozi wa jamii.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwo'moroberio ase esimi entingu kobwatia chimbaratero chia kera rituko,obonyiu, okoragera na eberengo biogochorerana kwa ebirengrrerio ase ekerore gwe' chinka
Dholuo: Chakruok mar app mar smartphone mar nono okenge ma ng'ato kawo pile, pi, chiemo ma ng'ato chamo, kod pek ma ng'ato nigo kaluwore gi joma nie kanyakla.
Somali: Bixinta barnaamijka casriga ah si loo socdo tallaabooyinka maalinlaha ah, qoyaan, qaadashada cuntada, iyo heerarka walwalka iyada oo la adeegsanayo liiska koowaad ee bulshada.

Kiswahili: Uzinduzi rasmi wa mbolea ya kibiolojia ili kuongeza kiwango cha virutubisho katika mazao yanayolimwa katika kaunti sita.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwa obwoyo bokomenta obotobu ase ebimeri ime yechikaunti isano nemo
Dholuo: Loso chenro mar tiyo gi biofertilizer mondo omed gik makonyo e loso chiemo e pinje auchiel.
Somali: Bilowga rasmiga ah ee bacriminta dabiiciga ah si loo kordhiyo nuxurka nafaqada yar ee dalagga lagu beeray lix degmo.

Kiswahili: Tangazo la kufungua maombi ya ruzuku kwa waajiri ili kuanzisha maeneo ya mazoezi ya viungo au mazoezi ya viungo kwa wafanyakazi.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa bene obokonyi bwa bosa ase abariki gochaka chigosori chia ebimo ase abarikwa
Dholuo: Chenro mar elo kwayo mag kony ne joma ondiko ji tich mondo gichak kuonde timo tuke mag rieyo del kata kuonde timo tuke mag rieyo del ne jotich.
Somali: Ogeysiiska furitaanka codsiyada deeqaha loo siiyo shaqo-bixiyayaasha si loo dhiso jimicsiyada ama goobaha jimicsiga shaqaalaha.

Kiswahili: Tangazo la umma la shindano la kutangaza mapishi yenye virutubisho vya kienyeji kwa kutumia viungo vilivyoongezwa virutubisho au vya asili.
Ekegusii: Okoraria ase abanto bonsi amaamereri yoborugi gotumika chindagera chia egekoro
Dholuo: Lando ne ji duto wach piem mar lando yore mag loso chiemo mabeyo e alworano kitiyo gi gik ma olos gi lowo kata gik ma ne olosgo e pinyno.
