Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa programu ya simu mahiri ili kufuatilia hatua za kila siku, unyevu, ulaji wa chakula, na viwango vya msongo wa mawazo kwa kutumia ubao wa viongozi wa jamii.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwo'moroberio ase esimi entingu kobwatia chimbaratero chia kera rituko,obonyiu, okoragera na eberengo biogochorerana kwa ebirengrrerio ase ekerore gwe' chinka
Dholuo: Chakruok mar app mar smartphone mar nono okenge ma ng'ato kawo pile, pi, chiemo ma ng'ato chamo, kod pek ma ng'ato nigo kaluwore gi joma nie kanyakla.
Somali: Bixinta barnaamijka casriga ah si loo socdo tallaabooyinka maalinlaha ah, qoyaan, qaadashada cuntada, iyo heerarka walwalka iyada oo la adeegsanayo liiska koowaad ee bulshada.

English: Public declaration of stress management, substance abuse, workplace safety, and wellness training for employers via FKE curriculum.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la umma la usimamizi wa msongo wa mawazo, matumizi mabaya ya dawa za kulevya, usalama mahali pa kazi, na mafunzo ya ustawi kwa waajiri kupitia mtaala wa FKE.
Ekegusii: Okoraria inga ogochorerana kwe ebingererio, ogotimia ebinyugwa bigotindia, oborendi chinsemo chia emeremo, na amaegerio yokogendereria ase abariki gotumia amarago aya Ekeombe Ekenene Giokorika abanto (FKE)
Dholuo: Lando ne ji duto kuom tiegruok e weche mag kedo gi parruok, tiyo marach gi yedhe mamero, ritruok kar tich, kod ngima maber ne joma tiyo kokalo kuom chenro mar somo mar FKE.
Somali: Ogeysiiska dadweynaha ee maareynta stress, xadgudubka maadooyinka, ammaanka goobta shaqada, iyo tababarka caafimaadka ee loo shaqeeyaha iyada oo loo marayo manhajka FKE.

English: Launch of a customizable wellness approach combining psychoeducation, screenings, group sessions, and organizational policy consulting for employee wellbeing.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa mbinu ya ustawi inayoweza kubadilishwa inayochanganya elimu ya kisaikolojia, uchunguzi, vikao vya kikundi, na ushauri wa sera za shirika kwa ajili ya ustawi wa wafanyakazi.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwamagenderero aranyare goochororegwa egosangani amasomo ya obongo, oboringori, ebiombe na obosemi kw'obomo ase abasomba
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chenro mar ngima maber ma ng'ato owuon nyalo luwo ka oriwo tiegruok mar paro, nonro mag tuoche, romo mag grube, kod paro e wi chike mag riwruok mag jotich.
Somali: Bilowga habka caafimaad ee loo habeyn karo oo isku daraya cilmu-nafsiga, baaritaanka, fadhiyada kooxaha, iyo la-talinta siyaasadda ururka ee caafimaadka shaqaalaha.

English: Announcement of Kenya’s first AI‑powered mental health & wellness platform offering tailored self-care, assessments, and access to professional counselling.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la jukwaa la kwanza la afya ya akili na ustawi linaloendeshwa na akili bandia nchini Kenya linalotoa huduma ya kujitunza, tathmini, na ufikiaji wa ushauri nasaha wa kitaalamu.
Ekegusii: Okorari egetii kiobochenu bw'obongo na kogendereri na obongo botari bwobomaene orogongo rwa Kenya buna orebwate buya, okoeneki nga mbuya, na ogoikera obosemi bwa ekerengo kiaigoro
Dholuo: Lando mar Kenya's mokwongo mar AI-powered mental health & wellness platform ma chiwo ritruok ma ng'ato owuon, nonro, kod yudo kony mag joma olony.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida barnaamijka ugu horreeya ee caafimaadka dhimirka & wanaagga ee AI ee Kenya oo bixiya daryeel shaqsiyeed, qiimeyn, iyo helitaanka la talinta xirfadeed.

English: Announcement that public service will now provide tele and in-person counselling services through Huduma Centres and hotline 1919.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kwamba huduma ya umma sasa itatoa huduma za ushauri nasaha kwa njia ya simu na ana kwa ana kupitia Vituo vya Huduma na simu ya dharura 1919.
Ekegusii: Okorari inga obokoreri ase mwanyabanto goikerwa nechisimi naboigo obosio ase obosio na chinsagia chinde gotumika enamba ya mobasokano 1919
Dholuo: Lando ni sirkal koro biro chiwo tele kod weche mag ng'ato ka ng'ato kokalo kuom Huduma Centres kod hotline 1919.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida in adeegga dadweynaha uu hadda bixin doono adeegyo la-talin telefishan iyo shakhsi ahaan iyada oo loo marayo Xarumaha Huduma iyo khadka tooska ah 1919.

English: Public invitation and details for October 2025 national conference themed “Securing the Future” on holistic mental health.
Kiswahili: Mwaliko wa umma na maelezo ya mkutano wa kitaifa wa Oktoba 2025 wenye mada "Kulinda Mustakabali" kuhusu afya ya akili kamili.
Ekegusii: Ogochika mwanyabanto na amoorokererio ya'orogongo omotiènyi o'ikomi 2025 ore nekerenga " Korenda Amarago" igoro ya obochenu bw'obongo oboikeranu
Dholuo: Luong mar ji duto kod weche ma nyiso kaka ibiro tim chokruok mar piny mangima e dwe mar Oktoba 2025 ma wiye wacho ni "Bedo gi Geno Maber ne Kinde Mabiro" ma wuoyo e wi tuoche mag paro.
Somali: Martiqaadka dadweynaha iyo faahfaahinta shirka qaranka ee Oktoobar 2025 ee mawduuca "Aaminka Mustaqbalka" ee caafimaadka dhimirka oo dhammaystiran.

English: Gertrudes Cancer Walk: Walk held to raise funds for children with Cancer. Thousands turned up for the walk in Nairobi
Kiswahili: Matembezi ya Saratani ya Gertrudes: Matembezi yafanyika ili kuchangisha fedha kwa ajili ya watoto wenye Saratani. Maelfu walijitokeza kwa ajili ya matembezi hayo jijini Nairobi
Ekegusii: Etaro ya Kansa ase Gertrudes: etaro eyio nekonye ogosangereria ebitoki ase engencho yabana babwate Kansa Abange mbesogeti ase ogosira etaro eyio Nairobi
Dholuo: Wuoth mar Gertrudes Cancer Walk: Wuoth ma itimo mondo ochok pesa ne nyithindo ma nigi tuo mar Cancer. Ji gana gi gana nobiro e wuodhno Nairobi
Somali: Gertrudes Cancer Walk: Socdaal lagu soo ururiyay maalgelinta carruurta qaba Kansarka. Kumanaan qof ayaa u soo baxay socodka Nairobi

English: Gov't increases SHA benefits for Cancer patients, adds real-time claims tracking
Kiswahili: Serikali haiongezi faida za SHA kwa wagonjwa wa Saratani, inaongeza ufuatiliaji wa madai ya wakati halisi
Ekegusii: Eserekali yamentire obuya obonge ase ogotumika SHA ase abarwaire ba kansa, obuya bonde mboria aya onsi agikoreka ase ebiro ebitingu agwe agwe Rituko rinene riogochengera kansa ense engima, amangana amamwamu
Dholuo: Sirkal medo kony mag SHA ne joma nigi tuo mar kansa, medo luwo kwayo e sa mowinjore
Somali: Dowladdu waxay kordhisay faa'iidooyinka SHA ee bukaanka Kansarka, waxay ku dartay raadinta sheegashada waqtiga dhabta ah

English:
World cancer day themed 'united by unique'. Experts emphasize on individualized patient-centered care. Govt called upon to ensure easy accessibility to cancer services  
Rising burden of cancer considered a threat to the economy
Kiswahili:
Siku ya saratani duniani yenye mada 'kuunganishwa na kipekee'. Wataalamu wanasisitiza huduma ya kibinafsi inayolenga mgonjwa. Serikali imeomba kuhakikisha upatikanaji rahisi wa huduma za saratani.
Mzigo unaoongezeka wa saratani unachukuliwa kuwa tishio kwa uchumi
Ekegusii: Abaringori babetereire obokoreri ase omonto omonyene Ebigambero biaborigu koeneki okonyorekana kwa obokoreri bwango ase kansa
Dholuo:
Odiechieng' mar thieth mar kansa e piny mangima ne dhi bedo gi wich mawacho ni, 'Winjruok e kind gik mopogore opogore.' Lakteche jiwo ahinya wach rito jatuwo ka luwore gi chal mare. Ne okwa sirkal mondo omi ji thuolo mar yudo thieth mar kansa e yo mayot
Medruok mar tuo mar kansa en gima kelo hinyruok ne yuto mar piny
Somali: Maalinta caalamiga ah ee kansarka ee mawduuca 'midnimada by gaar ah'. Khubaradu waxay ku adkeystaan daryeelka bukaanka ee shaqsiyadeed. Dowladda ayaa ku baaqday in la hubiyo helitaanka adeegyada kansarka si fudud.

English: Oncology clinic launched in Samburu County 10 cases of cancer reported monthly in Samburu. Barasa Centre makes cancer treatment accessible. We have been able to treat four patients
Kiswahili: Kliniki ya saratani yazinduliwa katika Kaunti ya Samburu. Visa 10 vya saratani vinaripotiwa kila mwezi huko Samburu. Kituo cha Barasa hufanya matibabu ya saratani yapatikane. Tumeweza kuwatibu wagonjwa wanne.
Ekegusii: Ekiriniki gia kansa giachakigwe ekaunyi ya Samburu Chikansa ikomi chiatokire Samburu kera omotiènyi Egetaseni gia barasa yagerire kansa komanyekana
Dholuo: Klinik mar oncology ne ochak e Samburu County ji 10 ma nigi tuo mar kansa ne oyud dwe ka dwe e Samburu. Barasa Centre miyo thieth mar kansa bedo mayot. Wasetiyo gi yore ang'wen mag thieth
Somali: Caafimaadka kansarka ayaa laga bilaabay gobolka Samburu 10 kiis oo kansar ah ayaa laga soo sheegaa bishiiba Samburu. Xarunta Barasa waxay ka dhigeysaa daaweynta kansarka mid la heli karo. Waxaan awoodnay inaan daaweyno afar bukaan

English: Government calling on employers to integrate mental wellness supports into occupational safety standards.
Kiswahili: Serikali inatoa wito kwa waajiri kuunganisha usaidizi wa afya ya akili katika viwango vya usalama kazini.
Ekegusii: Eserekali yarure ogokurera ase abariki kobwaterani obikonyi na obochenu bw'obongo ase oborendi obuya ase emeremo
Dholuo: Sirkal ne okwayo jotend tich mondo oriw kony mag thieth mar paro gi chike mag rito ngima e tich.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay shaqo-bixiyeyaasha ugu baaqeysaa inay ku darsadaan taageerada caafimaadka maskaxda heerarka badbaadada shaqada.

English: Public communication campaign across radio and TV networks during national mental health month.
Kiswahili: Kampeni ya mawasiliano ya umma katika mitandao ya redio na televisheni wakati wa mwezi wa kitaifa wa afya ya akili.
Ekegusii: Okoraria ekampeni yokoererania ase chiretio ne chitivi kero kuomotienyi bwokararia oborwaire bw'obongo
Dholuo: Kampen mar tudruok gi oganda e redio kod TV e dwe mar thieth mar paro.
Somali: Ololaha isgaarsiinta dadweynaha ee shabakadaha raadiyaha iyo telefishanka inta lagu jiro bisha caafimaadka dhimirka ee qaranka.

English: Announcement of wellness zones offering balanced diets, counselling, and stress-relief services in major facilities.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la maeneo ya ustawi yanayotoa lishe bora, ushauri nasaha, na huduma za kupunguza msongo wa mawazo katika vituo vikuu.
Ekegusii: Okorari gwechinsemo chiobuya na chindagera cherenganaine, obosemi oboikeranu na obokoreri bwogokeani ogoichorerana kw'obongo ase ebitaseni ebinene
Dholuo: Lando mar kuonde ma ji nyalo yudoe ritruok maber ma chiwo chiemo mowinjore, kony, kod yore mag duoko parruok chien e kuonde madongo.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida goobaha caafimaad ee bixiya cuntooyin isku dheelitiran, la-talin, iyo adeegyada ka-hortagga stress ee xarumaha waaweyn.

English: Health Ministry mandating provision of fruit-based snacks instead of sugary options in public primary schools by 2026.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya ikiagiza utoaji wa vitafunio vyenye matunda badala ya vyakula vyenye sukari katika shule za msingi za umma ifikapo mwaka 2026.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu yachikire okorwegwa chindagera chia amatunda ao ao ribaga rie chindagera chibwate esukari ase chisukuru chi'oboroso goika omwaka 2026
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth dwaro ni mondo ochiw chiemo mayudore e olembe kar chiemo moting'o sukari e skunde mag sirkal e higa mar 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka oo amar ku bixisay bixinta cuntooyinka khafiifka ah ee ku saleysan miraha halkii laga heli lahaa xulashooyinka sonkorta ah ee dugsiyada hoose ee dadweynaha sanadka 2026.

English: Announcement that CHV-led malnutrition screenings will now include mental wellbeing checks.
Kiswahili: Tangazo kwamba uchunguzi wa utapiamlo unaoongozwa na CHV sasa utajumuisha uchunguzi wa ustawi wa akili.
Ekegusii: Okoraria inga oboringori bwokoragera bobe koraagwa na abanyagitari begenka, bamente obochenu bwobongo
Dholuo: Lando ni CHV-led malnutrition screening koro biro riwo nyaka paro mag paro.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida in baaritaannada nafaqada xun ee uu hoggaaminayo CHV ay hada ka mid noqon doonaan baaritaano caafimaad maskaxeed.

English: New policy by the government mandating flexible scheduling, stress management training, and wellness breaks in government offices.
Kiswahili: Sera mpya ya serikali inayoagiza ratiba inayobadilika, mafunzo ya usimamizi wa msongo wa mawazo, na mapumziko ya ustawi katika ofisi za serikali.
Ekegusii: Ogochika okwororo okoyia,amaegerioigoro ogoichorerana kwa obongo na omotimoko omoya ase chiafisi chia eserekari
Dholuo: Chenro manyien mar sirkal madwaro ni ng'ato obed gi thuolo mar timo tije mopogore opogore, tiegruok e weche mag kedo gi parruok, kod yueyo mar ritruok e ofise mag sirkal.
Somali: Siyaasadda cusub ee ay dowladdu u baahan tahay jadwalka jilicsan, tababarka maaraynta stress, iyo fasaxyada caafimaad ee xafiisyada dowladda.

English: Government promoting daily exercise challenge across all counties, emphasizing movement for health.
Kiswahili: Serikali inakuza changamoto ya mazoezi ya kila siku katika kaunti zote, ikisisitiza harakati za afya.
Ekegusii: Eserekari gochakia chigosori chia kera rituko egosingerera obochenu ase chikaunti chionsi
Dholuo: Sirkal jiwo chenro mar timo tiegruok mag rieyo del pile e kaunti duto, ka gijiwo mondo ji obed gi ngima maber.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay horumarineysaa caqabadda jimicsiga maalinlaha ah ee dhammaan degmooyinka, iyadoo lagu adkeynayo dhaqdhaqaaqa caafimaadka.

English: Announcement promoting community-based mental health outreach as anchor to Kenya’s Mental Health Awareness Month theme of “Community for Support”.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la kukuza uhamasishaji wa afya ya akili unaozingatia jamii kama mhimili wa kaulimbiu ya Mwezi wa Uhamasishaji wa Afya ya Akili nchini Kenya ya "Jumuiya ya Usaidizi".
Ekegusii: Okorari gosegeta amaegerio igoro yobochenu bwobongo erengete amariko amamwamu kero kiomotienyi bwa obosemi ase obochenu bwobongo orogongo rwa Kenya na "Ekeombe ekenene Kiobokonyi"
Dholuo: Lando mar jiwo weche mag thieth mar paro e kind oganda kaka gima biro konyo Kenya's Mental Health Awareness Month theme mar "Community for Support".
Somali: Ogeysiis lagu dhiirigelinayo wacyi galinta caafimaadka dhimirka ee ku saleysan bulshadda sidii saldhig u ah mawduuca Kenya's Mental Health Awareness Month ee "Community for Support".

English: National Coordinating Committee affirming Kenya’s pledges on food system reform, nutrition financing, and wellness pathways.
Kiswahili: Kamati ya Kitaifa ya Uratibu ikithibitisha ahadi za Kenya kuhusu mageuzi ya mfumo wa chakula, ufadhili wa lishe, na njia za ustawi.
Ekegusii: Ekomiti enene yokobwaterani,gotingia chiira chia Kenya igoro ya oboonchereria ase chindagera, obokonyi bwe chindagera nechingecho chiokogenderera
Dholuo: Komiti mar National Coordinating Committee mar Kenya ma jiwo singo mag Kenya e wach loso chenro mag chiemo, yuto mag chiemo, kod yore mag ngima maber.
Somali: Guddiga Isuduwaha Qaranka oo xaqiijinaya ballanqaadyada Kenya ee ku saabsan dib u habeynta nidaamka cuntada, maalgelinta nafaqada, iyo wadooyinka caafimaadka.

English: Annoucement by Kenya National Commission on Human Rights  calling recognizing mental health as a universal human right.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la Tume ya Kitaifa ya Haki za Kibinadamu ya Kenya likitaka kutambua afya ya akili kama haki ya binadamu kwa wote.
Ekegusii: Okorari inga Ekeombe Ekenene Giokoegerera Mwanyabanto kemente obochenu bwobongo buna obomaene bwa mwanyabanto
Dholuo: Chenro mar Kenya National Commission on Human Rights dwaro ni mondo ong'e ni tuoche mag paro en ratiro ma dhano duto nigo.
Somali: Warbixin ay soo saartay Guddiga Qaranka Kenya ee Xuquuqda Aadanaha oo ku baaqay in la aqoonsado caafimaadka dhimirka inuu yahay xuquuqda aadanaha ee caalamiga ah.

English: KEMRI  unveiling pilot program training religious figures in suicide prevention as mental wellbeing outreach.
Kiswahili: KEMRI yazindua programu ya majaribio ya mafunzo kwa watu mashuhuri wa kidini katika kuzuia kujiua kama uhamasishaji wa ustawi wa akili.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe Ekenene Kiobotuki bwa Amariogo yachakiri amaegerio yamatemu ase abarai abanene bechidini ase ogotanga okwengete buna amasomo gokinia obongo
Dholuo: KEMRI lando chenro mar tiego jotend din e geng'o nek kaka yor thieth mar paro.
Somali: KEMRI waxay soo bandhigtay barnaamij tijaabo ah oo lagu tababarayo dadka diinta ah ee ka hortagga ismiidaaminta sida caawinta caafimaadka maskaxda.

English: Launch of digitized supply chain tool connecting farmers, schools and vendors to improve nutrition transparency in school feeding.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa zana ya ugavi ya kidijitali inayowaunganisha wakulima, shule na wachuuzi ili kuboresha uwazi wa lishe katika kulisha shuleni.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwa oboereri ase dichitol kwabatani abaremi, chisukuru na abaonchoreria kobeka teneni okoragera okuya ase chisukuru
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chenro mar chiwo chiemo e yo ma digitized ma riwo jopur, skunde kod jouso mondo omed miyo chiemo obed malong'o e chiemo michiwo e skunde.
Somali: Bilowga qalabka sahayda sahayda ee dhijitaalka ah ee isku xiraya beeraleyda, dugsiyada iyo ganacsatada si loo wanaajiyo hufnaanta nafaqada ee quudinta dugsiyada.

English: Launch of Jifunze Lishe SMS service sending weekly nutrition and wellness tips to 2M subscribers.
Kiswahili: Uzinduzi wa huduma ya Jifunze Lishe ya kutuma vidokezo vya lishe na ustawi wa kila wiki kwa wanachama milioni 2.
Ekegusii: Ogochakigwa kwa amariko amake yechisimi igoro yokoragera okuya kera omokubio ase abanyene ekeombe chimirioni ibere
Dholuo: Chakruok mar chenro mar Jifunze Lishe SMS mar oro paro mag chiemo kod ngima maber juma ka juma ne ji 2M.
Somali: Bilowga adeegga Jifunze Lishe SMS oo soo diraya talooyinka nafaqada iyo caafimaadka toddobaadlaha ah ee 2M macaamiisha.

English: Announcement of first public wellness zone offering outdoor fitness equipment, dietary kiosks, and mental wellness pods at Nairobi's stadium.
Kiswahili: Tangazo la eneo la kwanza la ustawi wa umma linalotoa vifaa vya mazoezi ya nje, vibanda vya lishe, na vifaa vya afya ya akili katika uwanja wa michezo wa Nairobi.
Ekegusii: Okorari ogotangani gwechigosori chia isiko yebitii, ebitaseni bia chindagera na ebikorerio biobochenu bwobongo ase egetii giachigosori Nairobi
Dholuo: Lando mar kar rito ngima maber mar ji mokwongo ma chiwo gige timo tiegruok oko mar pacho, kuonde michiwoe chiemo, kod kuonde michiwoe paro maber e pap mar Nairobi.
Somali: Ku dhawaaqida aagga caafimaadka dadweynaha ee ugu horreeya ee bixiya qalabka jimicsiga banaanka, kioskooyinka cuntada, iyo boodhadhka caafimaadka maskaxda ee garoonka Nairobi.

English: Kenya confirms three new Mpox cases from Nairobi, Nakuru and Mombasa counties, this brings the total to 17, Health CS Barasa says.
Kiswahili: Kenya yathibitisha visa vitatu vipya vya Mpox kutoka kaunti za Nairobi, Nakuru na Mombasa, hii inafikisha jumla ya visa 17, Waziri wa Afya Barasa anasema.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaenekiri abarwaire batato banyorekana na Mpox ase chikaunti chia Nairobi, Nakuru na Mombasa, baikire abarware ikomi na batano babere, omonogeri ewizara Barasa otebire
Dholuo: Kenya onyiso ji adek manyien ma nigi tuwo mar Mpox koa Nairobi, Nakuru kod Mombasa, ma kelo kwan duto mar ji 17, Health CS Barasa wacho.
Somali: Kenya ayaa xaqiijisay saddex kiis oo cusub oo Mpox ah oo ka yimid degmooyinka Nairobi, Nakuru iyo Mombasa, taasoo wadarta guud u kordhineysa 17, sida ay sheegtay Health CS Barasa.

English: The Ministry of Health has assured the public that the Mpox situation in the country is not comparable to the COVID-19 pandemic.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya imewahakikishia umma kwamba hali ya Mpox nchini hailinganishwi na janga la COVID-19.
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu yaenekeiri ase mwanyabanto obobe bwa Mpox mbokorenganigwa na Korona
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth osenyiso oganda ni chal mar Mpox e piny ok nyal pim gi mar tuo mar COVID-19.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa shacabka u xaqiijisay in xaaladda Mpox ee dalka aysan la barbar dhigin cudurka faafa ee COVID-19.

English: Kenyans have been urged to desist from handling or consuming bush meat to avoid possible contraction of Mpox disease.
Kiswahili: Wakenya wamehimizwa kuacha kushughulikia au kula nyama ya porini ili kuepuka uwezekano wa kupata ugonjwa wa Mpox.
Ekegusii: Abakenya bakureirwe batige koria chingiti chia orosana erio gwetanga kwambokrigwa obirwaire bwa ebikondo(Mpox)
Dholuo: Jo-Kenya osekwa mondo owe mako kata chamo ring le mag bungu mondo kik giyud tuo mar Mpox.
Somali: Dadka reer Kenya ayaa lagu booriyay inay ka fogaadaan in ay gacanta ku hayaan ama ay cunaan hilibka bush si looga fogaado in cudurka Mpox uu soo dhaco.

English: As concerns rise over Mpox outbreak, the Ministry of Health has pledged to procure two million vaccines before the end of the year.
Kiswahili: Huku wasiwasi ukiongezeka kuhusu mlipuko wa Mpox, Wizara ya Afya imeahidi kupata chanjo milioni mbili kabla ya mwisho wa mwaka.
Ekegusii: Buna ogokumia kogendererete igoro yogoateka kwoborwaire bwebikondo, Ewizara yobochenu yarure eira korwa echancho chimirioni ibere nyuma yomwaka
Dholuo: Kaka parruok medore nikech tuo mar Mpox, Migawo mar Thieth osesingore ni obiro ng'iewo chanjo milion ariyo kapok higa orumo.
Somali: Iyada oo walaac ay sii kordhayaan cudurka Mpox, Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ballanqaaday inay soo iibsato laba milyan oo tallaal ka hor dhammaadka sanadka.

English: Ministry of Health launches HIV\AIDS marathon to be held on December 1, as it targets to eradicate the disease by 2030
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya yazindua mbio za marathon za VVU/UKIMWI zitakazofanyika Desemba 1, huku ikilenga kutokomeza ugonjwa huo ifikapo mwaka 2030
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu yachakirie chimbero chia Marathoni chia oborwaire bwenyamoreo chirakoreke omotiènyi o'ikomi na kabere, etariki eyemo, erengete gosiria oborwaire egoekera omwaka 2030
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth chako piem mar HIV/AIDS mabiro timore Desemba 1, nikech en chenro mar tieko tuo mar HIV/AIDS e higa mar 2030
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa billowday marathonka HIV\AIDS oo la qaban doono 1-da Diseembar, iyada oo ujeedkeedu yahay in la baabi'iyo cudurka illaa 2030

English: Empowering farmers living with HIV/AIDS a crucial step towards sustainable agriculture, community well-being
Kiswahili: Kuwawezesha wakulima wanaoishi na VVU/UKIMWI ni hatua muhimu kuelekea kilimo endelevu, ustawi wa jamii
Ekegusii: Gosegeta abaremi bamenyete na enyamoreo negetambokero kiengencho ase okogendereri oboremi nechinka
Dholuo: Miyo jopur ma nigi AYAKI/AIDS teko en okang' maduong' e yor pur masiko, ngima maber mar oganda
Somali: Xoojinta beeraleyda ku nool HIV/AIDS waa tallaabo muhiim u ah beeraha joogtada ah, wanaagga bulshada

English: There is no shame in seeking help for depression. In fact, seeking help is a sign of strength, not weakness. If you or someone you know is struggling with depression, please reach out to a mental health professional or a crisis hotline
Kiswahili: Hakuna aibu kutafuta msaada kwa ajili ya mfadhaiko. Kwa kweli, kutafuta msaada ni ishara ya nguvu, si udhaifu. Ikiwa wewe au mtu unayemjua anapambana na mfadhaiko, tafadhali wasiliana na mtaalamu wa afya ya akili au simu ya dharura ya dharura.
Ekegusii: Obosoku tiboiyo ekero okorigia obokonyi kore' nemechando Korigia obokonyi tari oboreu, korende mekemanyererio giachinguru Onye nomanyete omonto ogoetera amakungu ao ao
Dholuo: Onge wichkuot moro amora ka ng'ato dwaro kony kuom tuwo mar parruok. Kuom adier, kwayo kony en gima nyiso ni ng'ato otegno, to ok en gima nyiso nyawo. Kapo ni in kata ng'at ming'eyo nigi tuwo mar parruok, tudri gi laktar molony e weche mag tuoche mag paro kata tudri gi ng'at manyalo konyi
Somali: Haddii adiga ama qof aad taqaanid uu la halgamayo niyadjab, fadlan la xiriir xirfadle caafimaad maskaxeed ama khadka tooska ah ee xaaladaha dhibaatada.

English: The COVID-19 pandemic may be causing extra stress for many people. Learn the common signs of a mental health crisis and ways you can help.
Kiswahili: Janga la COVID-19 linaweza kusababisha msongo wa mawazo zaidi kwa watu wengi. Jifunze dalili za kawaida za mgogoro wa afya ya akili na njia unazoweza kusaidia.
Ekegusii: Obokongu bwa korona mbwarenta ogoichorerana kwa obongo ase abànto abange Egera ebimanyererio biogosareria obochenu bwobongo na chinchera oranyare gokonya Inyora inga gosegeta obochenu bwobongo ritangani nkore nengencho enene buna obochenu bwomobere
Dholuo: Tuo mar COVID-19 nyalo kelo parruok momedore ne ji mang'eny. Puonjri gik ma nyalo nyiso ni ng'ato nigi tuoche mag paro kod kaka inyalo konyogi.
Somali: Cudurka faafa ee COVID-19 ayaa sababi kara walwal dheeri ah dad badan. Baro calaamadaha caadiga ah ee dhibaatada caafimaadka dhimirka iyo siyaabaha aad caawin karto.

English:
Always remember that Mental Health first aid is just as important as physical first aid.
St John Ambulance is here for you!
Kiswahili:
Kumbuka kila wakati kwamba huduma ya kwanza ya Afya ya Akili ni muhimu kama vile huduma ya kwanza ya kimwili.
St John Ambulance iko hapa kwa ajili yako!
Ekegusii: Ekeombe gia St John's Ambulance nao kere aroro asengencho yago!
Dholuo:
Kinde duto ng'e ni chiwo kony madwarore ne tuwo mar paro en gima dwarore ahinya mana kaka chiwo kony madwarore ne tuwo mar del.
St. John Ambulance ni ka mondo okonyi!
Somali: Had iyo jeer xusuusnow in gargaarka koowaad ee caafimaadka dhimirka uu muhiim u yahay sida gargaarka koowaad ee jirka.

English: Depression is a common mental disorder and one of the main causes of disability worldwide. WHO estimates that globally 264 million people are affected by depression.
Kiswahili: Msongo wa mawazo ni ugonjwa wa kawaida wa akili na mojawapo ya sababu kuu za ulemavu duniani kote. WHO inakadiria kuwa duniani kote watu milioni 264 wameathiriwa na msongo wa mawazo.
Ekegusii: Ogoichorerana kwa obongo noborwaire bwabotambe ase obongo na ensemo yechisababu chinde chioboremaru ense engima Ekeombe ekenene ense engima nekagerete buna abanto chimirioni 264 banyorirwe nogoichoreru nobongo
Dholuo: Parruok en tuwo ma landore ahinya kendo en achiel kuom gik madongo makelo midekre e piny mangima. WHO wacho ni ji milion 264 nigi tuwo mar parruok.
Somali: Dhibaatadu waa cudur maskaxeed oo caadi ah oo ah mid ka mid ah sababaha ugu waaweyn ee naafonimada adduunka.

English: 1 in 3 Kenyans will experience a mental health proplem at somepoint. Recognize and understand the symptoms.
Kiswahili: Mkenya 1 kati ya 3 atapitia tatizo la afya ya akili wakati fulani. Tambua na uelewe dalili.
Ekegusii: Omokenya oyomo ase batato baeteire ogoichorerana kwa obongo Tema komanya ebimanyererio biaye
Dholuo: 1 kuom ji 3 e piny Kenya biro bedo gi chandruok mar paro e kinde moro. Ng'e gik ma chandogi kendo ing'e kaka ginyalo konyi.
Somali: 1 qof oo ka mid ah 3 qof oo Kenya ah ayaa la kulmi doona dhibaato caafimaad maskaxeed waqti uun.

English: Let's talk mental health! If they stopped talking, please check on them.
Kiswahili: Tuzungumzie afya ya akili! Ikiwa waliacha kuzungumza, tafadhali waangalie.
Ekegusii: Tokwanere obochenu bwobongo! Konye batigete gokwanera, koranche barigie
Dholuo: We wawuo ane kuom tuoche mag paro! Kapo ni ne giweyo wuoyo, ng'i ane chal margi.
Somali: Aan ka hadalno caafimaadka dhimirka haddii ay joojiyeen inay hadlaan, fadlan iska hubi.

English: Cancer patients stranded at KNH. Patients left stranded after radio-therapy machine breakdown. Frustrated patients camp at the hospital for second week. KNH announces cobalt radio-therapy machine has been restored
Kiswahili: Wagonjwa wa saratani wamekwama KNH. Wagonjwa wamekwama baada ya mashine ya tiba ya mionzi kuharibika. Wagonjwa waliokata tamaa wamepiga kambi hospitalini kwa wiki ya pili. KNH yatangaza kuwa mashine ya tiba ya mionzi ya kobalti imerejeshwa.
Ekegusii: Abarwaire ba kansa baraterire ase enyagitari enene ya Kenyatta Abarwaire bakwamire nyuma yechimashini kogira emeremo Abarwaire bakure emioyo nao bare nyagitari emekubio ebere
Dholuo: Jotuo ma nigi kansa ma odong' e KNH. Jotuo ma ne odong' e osiptal bang' masinde mag thieth tiyo marach. Jotuo ma chunygi onyosore osebedo e osiptal kuom juma mar ariyo. KNH lando ni masin mar radiotherapy mar cobalt oseduok kendo
Somali: Bukaannada qaba kansarka ayaa ku xayiran KNH. Bukaannada ayaa ku xayiran kadib markii mashiinka daaweynta raadiyaha uu burburay. Bukaannada niyadjabka ah waxay ku sii joogaan isbitaalka toddobaadkii labaad. KNH waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa in mashiinka daaweynta raadiyaha ee kobalt la soo celiyay

English: Garissa governor sounds alarm on cancer surge, links it to alleged nuclear waste dumping
Kiswahili: Gavana wa Garissa atoa tahadhari kuhusu ongezeko la saratani, akihusisha na madai ya utupaji taka za nyuklia
Ekegusii: Egavana ya Garissa orure igokurerwa ase okomentekana gwa kansa, ekero ekio akomenta inga eubi egotugutwa ewate niuklia egobeteka
Dholuo: Gavana mar Garissa chiwo siem e wi tuo mar kansa, kendo otudogi gi wach ni yugi mag nyuklia ne owit e lowo
Somali: Guddoomiyaha Garissa ayaa ka cabsi qaatay kororka cudurka kansarka, wuxuuna ku xidhay qashinka nukliyeerka

English: MTRH conducts its first Stereotactic Radiosurgery on brain cancer patient
Kiswahili: MTRH yafanya upasuaji wake wa kwanza wa mionzi wa stereotactic kwa mgonjwa wa saratani ya ubongo
Ekegusii: Enyagitari enene ya Moi,yakora okomanwa kwaye ogotangani goetra chinsase chia eredio kwa stereotactic ase omorwaire okansa yobongo
Dholuo: MTRH otimo yeng'o mar radiochirurgi mokwongo mar stereotactic kuom jatuwo ma nigi kansa mar obwongo
Somali: MTRH waxay sameysay qalliinka ugu horeeya ee loo yaqaan 'Stereotactic Radiosurgery' ee bukaanka qaba kansarka maskaxda

English: Air pollution fuels lung cancer among non-smokers
Kiswahili: Uchafuzi wa hewa huchochea saratani ya mapafu miongoni mwa wasiovuta sigara
Ekegusii: Ogosarigwa kwa embeo ngosegeta kore kansa ya amayaa ase abanto batari konywa esigara
Dholuo: Dhano ma ok madh ndawa bedo gi kansa mar obo nikech muya mochido
Somali: Qiiqa hawada wuxuu u horseedaa kansarka sanbabada dadka aan sigaarka cabin

English: Cervical cancer is one of the most preventable and treatable cancers when detected early. This month, let’s join hands to raise awareness, encourage regular screenings, and support initiatives for prevention and early diagnosis
Kiswahili: Saratani ya shingo ya kizazi ni mojawapo ya saratani zinazoweza kuzuilika na kutibika zaidi inapogunduliwa mapema. Mwezi huu, tuungane pamoja ili kuongeza uelewa, kuhimiza uchunguzi wa mara kwa mara, na kuunga mkono mipango ya kuzuia na utambuzi wa mapema.
Ekegusii: Kansa yenchera yoroiboro nensemo eyemo egotangeka kero yamanyiru kendabu Omotiènyi oyoiga, tubekane amo komenta obomanyi, gosegeta oboringoria mara aange, na gosegeta emeroberio yogotanga na okomanya ritangani mbuya
Dholuo: Tuwo mar cervical cancer en achiel kuom tuoche mag kansa minyalo geng', kendo minyalo thiedh, kapo ni ofwenygi chon. Dwe ma kawuononi, weuru wariw lwedo e medo ng'eyo, jiwo chenro mar nono jotuwo pile, kendo riwo lwedo chenro mag geng'o tuoche kendo fwenyo chon tuoche
Somali: Kansarka qoorta hooyada iyo dhallaanka waa mid ka mid ah kansarada ugu hortagga iyo daaweynta badan marka la ogaado goor hore. bishaan, aynu isku wada shaqeyno si loo kordhiyo wacyiga, dhiirrigeliyo baaritaanka joogtada ah, iyo taageerada ololaha ka hortagga iyo daaweynta hore

English: Polio, BCG vaccines to arrive in June after Gov’t releases Ksh.900M
Kiswahili: Chanjo za Polio na BCG zitafika Juni baada ya Serikali kutoa Ksh.900M
Ekegusii: Echancho ya polio na BCG neikarane omotiènyi ogatano narimo nyuma yesekari korwa chimirioni amagana kianda
Dholuo: Tuwo mar polio, BCG biro chopo e dwe mar auchiel bang' sirkal golo Ksh.900M
Somali: Tallaalka Polio, BCG ayaa imaan doona bisha Juun kadib markii Dowladda ay soo saartay Ksh.900M

English: MoH assures parents of vaccine safety after two children died from polio shot
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya inawahakikishia wazazi usalama wa chanjo baada ya watoto wawili kufariki kutokana na chanjo ya polio
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu yaenekeire abaibori obuya bwa oborendi ase echancho nyuma yabana babere gokwa korwa echacho ya polio
Dholuo: Migawo mar Yath jiwo jonyuol kuom ritruok mar chanjo bang ' nyithindo ariyo tho nikech tuo mar polio
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa waalidiinta u xaqiijisay badbaadada tallaalka kadib markii laba carruur ah ay ku dhinteen tallaalka polio

English: MoH announces 5-day Polio vaccination campaign from October 2 to 6, 2024
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza kampeni ya chanjo ya polio ya siku 5 kuanzia Oktoba 2 hadi 6, 2024
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu nyararia ekampeini ye chancho ya polio ase amako atano gochakera omotienyi ikomi chitariki ibere goika isano nemo, 2024
Dholuo: Migawo mar Weche Thieth lando kampen mar ndalo abich mar chanjo tuo mar polio kochakore Oktoba 2 nyaka 6, 2024.
Somali: Wasiirka Wasaaradda Caafimaadka wuxuu ku dhawaaqay olole tallaal oo 5-maalmood ah oo ka socda 2-da ilaa 6-da Oktoobar, 2024

English: Ministry of Health confirms polio vaccines are safe after investigation into recent child deaths
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya yathibitisha chanjo za polio ni salama baada ya uchunguzi wa vifo vya watoto hivi karibuni
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu yaenekiri inga echancho ya polio mbuya ere nyuma yoboringori ase ogosira kwa abana bwango iga
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche thieth wacho ni chanjo mag tuo mar polio ok nyal kelo hinyruok bang' nonro mosetim kuom nyithindo ma nyocha otho
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa xaqiijisay in tallaallada cudurka Polio ay yihiin kuwo ammaan ah kadib baaritaano lagu sameeyay dhimashada caruurta dhawaan

English: Health experts from Kenya and Somalia devise ways to fight polio. Many cases of polio reported in Kenya coming from Somalia
Kiswahili: Wataalamu wa afya kutoka Kenya na Somalia hubuni njia za kupambana na polio. Visa vingi vya polio vilivyoripotiwa nchini Kenya vinatoka Somalia
Ekegusii: Abamanyi korwa Kenya na Somalia mbachakia chinchera chiokorwani polio Abarwaire abange ba polio nkorwa Somalia
Dholuo: Lakteche molony mawuok Kenya kod Somalia manyo yore mag kedo gi tuo mar polio. Thoth joma nigi tuwo mar polio e piny Kenya owuok Somalia
Somali: Khubarada Caafimaadka ee Kenya iyo Soomaaliya ayaa soo saaray siyaabo looga hortago cudurka Polio.

English: MoH to begin third round of polio vaccination in Mandera, Wajir and Garissa
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya kuanza awamu ya tatu ya chanjo ya polio huko Mandera, Wajir na Garissa
Ekegusii: Ewizara ya obochenu gochakia entunda yagatato yechancho ya polio aaria Mandera, Wajir na Garissa
Dholuo: Migawo mar Thieth chako chanjo mar adek mar tuo mar polio e gwenge mag Mandera, Wajir kod Garissa
Somali: Wasaaradda caafimaadka ayaa bilaabi doonta wareegga saddexaad ee tallaalka cudurka Polio ee Mandera, Wajir iyo Garissa

English: Gov't targets to administer polio vaccine to 7.4 million children below 5 years during the vaccination campaign set to begin on Thursday
Kiswahili: Serikali inalenga kutoa chanjo ya polio kwa watoto milioni 7.4 walio chini ya umri wa miaka 5 wakati wa kampeni ya chanjo inayotarajiwa kuanza Alhamisi
Ekegusii: Eserekari yarengire koa echancho ya polio ase abana chimirioni 7 4 inse yemiaka etano ebiro bie kampeni ye chancho ekageire gochaka etichi gatano
Dholuo: Sirkal oketo chenro mar chiwo chanjo mar polio ne nyithindo milion 7.4 ma hikgi okalo 5 e kinde kampen mar chanjo mabiro chakore Tich Ang'wen
Somali: Dowladda ayaa bartilmaameedsaneysa in tallaalka cudurka Polio lagu daro 7.4 milyan oo caruur ah oo da'doodu ka yar tahay 5 sano inta lagu jiro ololaha tallaalka oo la qorsheeyay inuu bilaabo Khamiista

English: Everyone deserves respect and support in their mental health journey. Let's break the stigma and build a world where we prioritize well-being for all.
Kiswahili: Kila mtu anastahili heshima na usaidizi katika safari yake ya afya ya akili. Tuvunje unyanyapaa na tujenge ulimwengu ambapo tunaweka kipaumbele ustawi kwa wote.
Ekegusii: Kera omonto naganeiri esiko na obokonyi ase orogendo rwaye rwobochenu bwobongo Tobunabune ogochecheriwa na toagache orogongo gatokobeka bosio okwendereria kera oyomo
Dholuo: Ng'ato ka ng'ato onego omi luor kendo oriw lwedo e wuodhe mar rito ngimane mar paro. Weuru walos piny ma ji duto nyalo dakie maber.
Somali: Qof kastaa wuxuu mudan yahay ixtiraam iyo taageero safarkiisa caafimaadka maskaxda. Aan jebinno cayayaanka oo aan dhisno aduun aan mudnaanta siinno wanaagga dadka oo dhan.

English:
It's okay not to be okay!
There is no health without mental health!
Kiswahili:
Ni sawa kutokuwa sawa!

Hakuna afya bila afya ya akili!
Ekegusii: Mbuya gotaba buya!
Dholuo:
Ok rach bedo ng'at ma ok ng'at maber!

Ngima ok nyal bedo maber ka ok watang' gi tuoche mag paro!
Somali: Ma jirto caafimaad caafimaad la'aan caafimaadka maskaxda!

English: FGM is a traumatic experience that leaves a lasting psychological mark & may adversely affect the mental health of the victims
Kiswahili: Ukeketaji ni tukio la kiwewe ambalo huacha alama ya kisaikolojia ya kudumu na linaweza kuathiri vibaya afya ya akili ya waathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Okoarokigwa negetambokero kiobororo kegotiga magega ebirengereri bitakoera na eranyarekane korenta oborwaire bwobongo
Dholuo: Tuwo mar FGM en gima kelo lit ahinya e chuny ng'ato kendo mano nyalo ketho paro mar ng'at motimne timno
Somali: FGM waa waayo aragnimo dhaawac ah oo ka tagaysa calaamado maskaxeed oo waarta & waxay saameyn xun ku yeelan kartaa caafimaadka maskaxda ee dhibbanaha

English: As we stay home & celebrate Easter holiday, we are reminded about our mental health. Be keen on what you consume as information during these troubled times, be mindful about your health & that of others. Share love, not panic & fear
Kiswahili: Tunapokaa nyumbani na kusherehekea sikukuu ya Pasaka, tunakumbushwa kuhusu afya yetu ya akili. Kuwa makini na kile unachotumia kama taarifa wakati huu wa matatizo, kuwa makini na afya yako na ya wengine. Shiriki upendo, si hofu na hofu.
Ekegusii: Gatore chinka gochengera Epasaka,tuanyorigwe igoro yobochenu bwobongo Torende mono ninki togokorera chingaki chiemechando,renda kegima obuya bwago na abaamate bago Sanga obwanchani, tari obwoba ase obwoba
Dholuo: Sama wasiko e pacho kendo timo nyasi mar Ista, waparo kaka pachwa nyalo bedo gi tuoche. Bed motang' gi weche mipuonjori e kinde mag chandruokgi, kendo ibed motang' gi midekre ma in-go koda mag jomamoko. Nyis ji hera, to ok luoro
Somali: Marka aan guriga joogno oo aan dabaaldegno ciidaha Easter, waxaan xusuusaneynaa caafimaadka maskaxdeena. Ka taxaddar waxa aad u cuntid sida macluumaad inta lagu jiro waqtiyadaas dhibaatada leh, ka taxaddar caafimaadkaaga & kuwa kale. La wadaag jacayl, ma aha baqdin & cabsi

English: Measles jab drive: Immunization drive to focus on children aged between 9-18 months
Kiswahili: Kichocheo cha chanjo dhidi ya surua: Kichocheo cha chanjo kitalenga watoto wenye umri kati ya miezi 9-18
Ekegusii: Esindani ya misols: Echancho erengete abana egati yemetienyi kianda goika ikomi na gatano gatato
Dholuo: Campaign mar chamo adhola: Campaign mar kano adhola ne nyithindo ma hikgi nie kind dweche 9-18.
Somali: Dhiirrigelinta tallaalka: Dhiirrigelinta tallaalka si loo diiradda saaro carruurta da'doodu u dhaxayso 9-18 bilood

English: The ongoing measles-rubella, tetanus vaccination drive enters the fourth day
Kiswahili: Kampeni inayoendelea ya chanjo ya surua-rubela, pepopunda inaingia siku ya nne
Ekegusii: Ekampeni egenderereta yechancho ya misols-rubela,oborwire rwepunda na tetenasi yosoire rituko ria kane
Dholuo: Chenro mar chanjo mar measles-rubella, tetanus donjo e odiechieng' mar ang'wen
Somali: Tallaabada tallaalka ee hadda socda ee suuxdinta-xanuunka, tetanus-ka ayaa soo galaya maalinta afaraad

English: Men's mental health awareness is critically important because they face unique challenges and pressures from society. Research shows that men are less likely to ask for help with mental health issues than women. This is often because society expects men not to show vulnerability or emotions. This can lead to serious problems, including a higher rate of suicide among men, who are almost four times more likely to die by suicide than women
Kiswahili: Uelewa wa afya ya akili ya wanaume ni muhimu sana kwa sababu wanakabiliwa na changamoto na shinikizo la kipekee kutoka kwa jamii. Utafiti unaonyesha kuwa wanaume wana uwezekano mdogo wa kuomba msaada kuhusu masuala ya afya ya akili kuliko wanawake. Hii mara nyingi ni kwa sababu jamii inatarajia wanaume kutoonyesha udhaifu au hisia. Hii inaweza kusababisha matatizo makubwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kiwango cha juu cha kujiua miongoni mwa wanaume, ambao wana uwezekano wa karibu mara nne zaidi wa kufa kwa kujiua kuliko wanawake.
Ekegusii: Obomanyi bwoborwaire bwobongo ase abasacha nobwengencho enene ekiagera nabwo bakoomerana na amangana amange ase chinka Obotuki bwakirirwe bokoorokia inga abasacha naboro ase ogosaba obokonyi ase obochenu bwobongo kobua abangina Neye mara aange abasacha mbari gwasioka koorokia obworo bwabo
Dholuo: Bedo gi chuny mar ng'eyo tuoche mag paro kuom chwo en gima dwarore ahinya nikech chwo romo gi pek moko makende kod tembe mawuok kuom oganda. Nonro nyiso ni joma chwo ok ohero kwayo kony kuom weche mag tuoche mag paro maloyo joma mon. Kinde mang'eny, mano en nikech oganda ji dwaro ni chwo kik nyis ni gin joma yomyom kata maok nyal kony. Mano nyalo kelo chandruoge madongo, moriwo nyaka kwan momedore mar chwo matemo negore, kwanno chiegni nyading'wen maloyo mar mon matemo negore
Somali: Aqoonta caafimaadka maskaxda ee ragga waa mid aad muhiim u ah sababtoo ah waxay la kulmaan caqabado gaar ah iyo cadaadis ka yimid bulshada. Cilmi-baarista ayaa muujineysa in ragga ay ka yar yihiin haweenka inay caawimaad ka codsadaan arrimaha caafimaadka maskaxda. Tani badanaa waa sababta oo ah bulshada waxay ka filaysaa ragga inaysan muujin xasaasiyad ama shucuur. Tani waxay keeni kartaa dhibaatooyin halis ah, oo ay ku jiraan heer sare oo ismiidaaminta ragga, kuwaas oo ku dhowaad afar jeer ka badan haweenka inay ku dhintaan is-miidaaminta

English: By paying attention to those around you, you might save a life! Prioritising mental health in the workplace is just as crucial for those working from home. Mental health challenges can affect anyone; they don't discriminate. Wherever you are working from, taking care of your mental health can improve your productivity and overall happiness. Lets break the stigma and make mental health a priority!
Kiswahili: Kwa kuwajali wale walio karibu nawe, unaweza kuokoa maisha! Kuweka kipaumbele katika afya ya akili mahali pa kazi ni muhimu vile vile kwa wale wanaofanya kazi kutoka nyumbani. Changamoto za afya ya akili zinaweza kumathiri mtu yeyote; hazibagui. Popote unapofanyia kazi, kutunza afya yako ya akili kunaweza kuboresha uzalishaji wako na furaha yako kwa ujumla. Tuvunje unyanyapaa na tufanye afya ya akili kuwa kipaumbele!
Ekegusii: Ase okobarengereri baria bagoetanaine, nabo ogokonya obogima! Nengencho engiya kobeka amangana aya motwemotwe obochenu bwobongo ensemo yemeremo na baria bagokora emeremo korwa chinka Obokongu bworwaire bwobongo nabo bokonyora onde bwensi; mbori gwanchereria Ande onsi ogokora emeremo, korenda obochenu bwobongo mbonyare gosegeta okwama okuya asegasi yago na omogoko oogo ase obwagare
Dholuo: Kuom dewo joma ni machiegni kodi, inyalo reso ngima ng'ato! Keto ngima mar paro obed motelo e kar tich en gima dwarore ahinya ne jogo matiyo e pacho. Chandruoge mag paro nyalo yudo ng'ato ang'ata; ok ginyal yudo ng'at machielo. Kata bed ni itiyo kanye, rito pachi nyalo miyo iti maber kendo ibed mamor. Weuru waketh kido mar wichkuot, kendo wami ngima mar paro obed gimaduong' moloyo!
Somali: Adigoo fiiro gaar ah u leh dadka kugu xeeran, waxaad badbaadin kartaa nolol! Horumarinta caafimaadka maskaxda ee goobta shaqada ayaa sidoo kale muhiim u ah kuwa ka shaqeeya guriga. Caqabadaha caafimaadka maskaxda waxay saameyn ku yeelan karaan qof kasta; ma takoorayaan. English: Certified seed potatoesGrown in Nakuru KenyaUsed all over Eastern Africa Maize has been Kenyaâ€™s main crop for decades. However, it has also been under constant threat from disease ever since. This has occasionally resulted in massive yield losses and jeopardised food security in Kenya. Hence, around 2008, the Kenyan authorities decided to find a substitute for its dependency on maize and chose potato.
Kiswahili: Viazi vya mbegu vilivyoidhinishwa Vilivyopandwa Nakuru Kenya Hutumika kote Afrika Mashariki Mahindi yamekuwa zao kuu la Kenya kwa miongo kadhaa. Hata hivyo, pia yamekuwa chini ya tishio la mara kwa mara kutokana na magonjwa tangu wakati huo. Hili mara kwa mara limesababisha hasara kubwa ya mavuno na kuhatarisha usalama wa chakula nchini Kenya. Kwa hivyo, karibu mwaka wa 2008, mamlaka ya Kenya iliamua kutafuta mbadala wa utegemezi wake kwa mahindi na kuchagua viazi.
Ekegusii: Embusuro engiya yamarabwoni agosimekwa aria Nakuru Kenya nigo akoriegwa Afrika ya mocha engima.Ebituma nabio endagera enene ase emiaka amagicho . Korende, oboremi obo ase engaki entambe bwebibituma bwagosirwe nendwari . Goetera endwari eye rigesa riebutuma riakeanire na igo komenta enhara. Ase igo, korwa omwaka 2008, borai bweserakari ya Kenya nogendereta korigwa endagera rika rie bituma na goikera oboremi bwa amarabwoni buna obwengencho.
Dholuo: E piny Nakuru Kenya, yien ma ne oloki e kitegi ne en achiel kuom yien madongo ma ne ogol e East Africa, kata kamano, sirkal mar Kenya oseng'ado mar keto yien e kar chamo kodhi.
Somali: Baradho shinni ah oo la xaqiijiyay oo lagu beeray Nakuru Kenya laga isticmaalo Bariga Afrika oo dhan Galleyda ayaa ahayd dalagga ugu weyn ee Kenya muddo tobanaan sano ah. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxay sidoo kale ku jirtay khatar joogto ah oo ka imanaysa cudur ilaa hadda. Tani waxay mararka qaar keentay khasaare badan oo wax soo saarka iyo sugnaanta cuntada ee Kenya. Sidaa darteed, qiyaastii 2008dii, mas'uuliyiinta Kenya waxay go'aansadeen inay raadiyaan beddelka ku tiirsanaanta galleyda waxayna doorteen baradhada.

English: Integrating Nutrition Sensitive Agriculture (NSA) into Agricultural value chains for improved dietary diversity and nutrition behaviors in Africa.
Kiswahili: Kuunganisha Kilimo Kinachozingatia Lishe (NSA) katika minyororo ya thamani ya Kilimo kwa ajili ya kuboresha utofauti wa lishe na tabia za lishe barani Afrika.
Ekegusii: Kora oboremi borengete chindara chiria chikoagacha omobere (NSA) ase oboremi bwaoerio gokinia endagera engiya ase oboagare eyio ekorenda omobere erio koreta oggonchoreria engencho buna abano bakoragera aiga Afrika.
Dholuo: Tij Lemo Makelo Chiemo (NSA) en gima duong' ahinya e yore mopogore opogore mag chiemo kod chiemo ma ji ohero chamo e piny Afrika.
Somali: Isku-darka beeraha nafaqada u nugul (NSA) silsiladaha qiimaha beeraha si loo hagaajiyo kala duwanaanta cuntada iyo habdhaqanka nafaqada ee Afrika.

Ekegusii: Kenya yaangoirie omoroberio ogendererete bwokomanya na gotanga amarwaire yetugo.
Dholuo: Kenya medo timo nonro kuom fwenyo ni nitie tuoche mag jamni.
Somali: Kenya waxay xoojineysaa nidaamyada kormeerka cudurrada si loo ogaado cudurrada xoolaha.

English: Kenya launches a nationwide livestock vaccination program to combat diseases like foot-and-mouth disease, enhancing animal health and meat exports.
Kiswahili: Kenya yazindua mpango wa chanjo ya mifugo kitaifa ili kupambana na magonjwa kama vile ugonjwa wa miguu na midomo, na kuimarisha afya ya wanyama na usafirishaji wa nyama nje ya nchi.

Dholuo: Kenya timo chenro mar rito kit ngima mag jamni mondo kik tuoche mag jamni landre.
Somali: Kenya waxay dhiirrigelisay tallaabooyinka amniga noolaha si looga hortago cudurrada xoolaha.

English: Learn how agriculture can contribute to school feeding programmes by supplying fresh, local produce like kales.
Kiswahili: Jifunze jinsi kilimo kinavyoweza kuchangia katika programu za kulisha watoto shuleni kwa kusambaza mazao mapya ya ndani kama vile kale.
Ekegusii: Egera komanya buna oboremi boranyare goikerania omoroberio korageria chisukuru goetera obobagi bwendara korwa mogondo etarasereka, rigesa ria nka buna ebikeri .
Dholuo: Ne ane kaka inyalo puonjori  kaka pur nyalo konyo e loso chiemo e sikunde kuom tiyo kod yore manyien machalo kaka pidho cham manyasani mar pidho alode machalo sikuma.
Somali: Baro sida beeraha u gacan ka geysan karo barnaamijyada quudinta dugsiyada adoo siinaya badeecooyin cusub oo maxalliga ah sida kales.

English: Learn how farmers can earn carbon credits by adopting practices on the dairy farm that remove carbon dioxide from the atmosphere.
Kiswahili: Jifunze jinsi wakulima wanavyoweza kupata mikopo ya kaboni kwa kutumia mbinu za kilimo cha maziwa zinazoondoa kaboni dioksidi kutoka angani.
Ekegusii: Egera komanya buna abaremi baranyore goakanwa chibesa korwa ogotanga embeo eria egosaria rire ase akobwata chingencho chiria chioborisia obuya  bogokeyia embeo eyio gochia ase rire.
Dholuo: Ne ane kaka jopur nyalo tiyo gi yore mag pidho chak ma golo carbon dioxide e kor lwasi mondo gibed gi kido mar timo gik ma kelo muya.
Somali: Baro sida beeraleyda u heli karaan faa'iidooyinka kaarboonka iyagoo qaata hababka beeraha caanaha ah ee ka saaraya kaarboonka kaarboonka hawada.

English: Learn how farmers can participate in carbon credit programs by adopting practices that sequester carbon in dairy farm.

Ekegusii: Egera komanya buna  abaremi baranyare korwa ebirengererio biabo igoro yokonyora chibesa chiria chiogotanga embeo eria egosaria rire ase okwegera chingencho chiria chigokeania embeo eyio korwa obweri bwetugo.
Dholuo: Ne ane kaka jopur nyalo tiyo gi yorno kaka riwre e chenro mag ahola e loso gik ma kelo muya e puothe mag dhok ma kelo chak.
Somali: Baro sida beeraleyda ay uga qaybqaadan karaan barnaamijyada deynta kaarboon iyaga oo qaata hababka ka hortagga kaarboon ee beeraha caanaha.

English: Learn how farmers can participate in carbon credit programs by adopting practices that sequester carbon in poultry unit.

Somali: Baro sida beeraleyda ay uga qaybqaadan karaan barnaamijyada deynta kaarboon iyagoo qaadanaya hababka ka hortagga kaarboon ee unugyada digaagga.

English: Sustainable Farming Services Africa (SFSA) is an advisory, training and consulting firm working within the agriculture sector in Kenya and elsewhere in Africa. We exist to promote the concepts of sustainability in farming practices in order to ensure profitability from agribusiness today while securing productivity of the same resources for future generations.
Kiswahili: Huduma za Kilimo Endelevu Afrika (SFSA) ni kampuni ya ushauri, mafunzo na ushauri inayofanya kazi ndani ya sekta ya kilimo nchini Kenya na kwingineko barani Afrika. Tupo ili kukuza dhana za uendelevu katika mbinu za kilimo ili kuhakikisha faida kutokana na kilimo biashara leo huku tukihakikisha uzalishaji wa rasilimali zile zile kwa vizazi vijavyo.
Ekegusii: Enchera engiya yoboremi agia Africa (SFSA) nigo gekorwa obosemia, amo nechisemi buna baria bakorwa obotebereria na bagokora nabaremi aiga Kenya na ande onsi aiga Africa. nao tore erio tosegete engencho ya oboremi obuya erio korora ng'a abaremi nafaida korwa ebigeri biabo bioboremi arero nabo gosangereria rigesa tore narirorio ase ebigori biamotwe.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar kambi ma African Sustainable Agricultural Services (SFSA) en riwruok mar joma riwo lwedo tijno e piny Kenya kod kuonde mamoko e Afrika. Wantiere mondo wamedo keto yore ma odongore kar weche mag pur kod pith  ma medo kelo mwandu maber ko yaa kuom ohala mar pur kawuono kaluwore ni wamedo yudo sir mag gik pur maber mabiro konyo anyuola mabiro.

Waxaan u jirnaa inaan kor u qaadno fikradaha joogtada ah ee dhaqanka beeraha si loo hubiyo faa'iidada ganacsiga beeraha maanta iyadoo la xaqiijinayo wax soo saarka isla kheyraadka jiilalka mustaqbalka.

Somali: Abaaruhu wuxuu baabi'inayaa xoolaha iyo noloshooda.

English: Though rare, earthquakes can occur. Drop, Cover, and Hold during tremors. Avoid buildings with cracks and report structural weaknesses to authorities.
Kiswahili: Ingawa ni nadra, matetemeko ya ardhi yanaweza kutokea. Kuanguka, Kufunika, na Kushikilia wakati wa mitetemeko. Epuka majengo yenye nyufa na uripoti udhaifu wa kimuundo kwa mamlaka.
Ekegusii: Nonya omotengencho tori koba mono,nabo ekanyerekana ochiche.Tuba omotwe oo na ekumbe gose kunama namagako ao gochia inse,ekero kiomotengencho.Kabe are nechinyomba chitandogete,gose gose chiekumbete na manyia abateneri bamaagacho igoro yobogongeru bwechinyomba echio.
Dholuo: Kata obedo ni yiengni mag piny ok nyal timore ahinya, buog e ute motegno kendo ichop wach ne migao mochungne arita mag yiengni piny
Somali: Inkastoo ay dhif tahay, dhulgariir ayaa dhici kara.  Ka fogow dhismayaasha leh dildilaacyada oo u sheeg hay'adaha daciifnimada qaab-dhismeedka.

English: Save critical numbers: *719# for Red Cross, 999 for police, and 112 for ambulance services during disasters. Share with family and neighbors.
Kiswahili: Hifadhi nambari muhimu: *719# kwa Msalaba Mwekundu, 999 kwa polisi, na 112 kwa huduma za ambulensi wakati wa majanga. Shiriki na familia na majirani.
Ekegusii: Kabe nechinamba chikorigia ogokonya:*719# ase ekeombe kiomosaraba omobariri,999 asee porisi na 112 ase chorori chiria chiogokonya ekero kiomochando.Manyania chinamba echi nabanto baino na abaamate.
Dholuo: Ndik namba mag sime: *719# ne Red Cross, 999 ne polis, kod 112 ne ambulans e kinde masira, kendo ikon osiepe kod wede
Somali: Ka badbaadi tirada ugu badan: *719# ee Laanqeyrta Cas, 999 ee booliiska, iyo 112 ee adeegyada degdegga ah.

English: Hilly areas like Murang'a are prone to landslides. Avoid building on steep slopes and heed evacuation warnings during heavy rains.
Kiswahili: Maeneo yenye vilima kama Murang'a yanakabiliwa na maporomoko ya ardhi. Epuka kujenga kwenye miteremko mikali na zingatia maonyo ya uokoaji wakati wa mvua kubwa.
Ekegusii: Chinsemo chimogete iguru buna Murang'a naororo konyora okwanyoka kweriroba.Kabe are nechinyomba chiagachire ase aimogete igoro naende igwera chinchera chigokurera ekero kiembura enene.
Dholuo: Lowo nyalo twal kuonde gode gode kaka Murang'a, omiyo kik igedi e kor gode madongo kendo iketh saa ma ok iringo ka lendo mag masira ochoponi
Somali: Meelaha buuraha ku yaal sida Murang'a waxay u nugul yihiin dhulgariir.

English: During floods, cholera spreads through contaminated water. Boil drinking water, wash hands, and report symptoms to health facilities immediately.
Kiswahili: Wakati wa mafuriko, kipindupindu huenea kupitia maji machafu. Chemsha maji ya kunywa, osha mikono, na uripoti dalili kwa vituo vya afya mara moja.
Ekegusii: Chingakj chiamache nemegoko emenene,obworwaire bwa gepindapindu nigo bokwambokerana bwango goetera ebinyinyi ase amache.Beria amache okonywa,esibie amaboko buya,na manyia abakoreri bobochenu bwango.
Dholuo: Sama ataro otimore, tuwo mar cholera landore kokalo kuom pi mochido. Omyo ne laktar mapiyo kichich ni in gi tuo cholera
Somali: Inta lagu jiro daadka, cudurka dacuunka ayaa ku faafa biyaha wasakhda ah.

English: Human activities cause most wildfires. Avoid open flames in forests and report smoke sightings to Kenya Forest Service.
Kiswahili: Shughuli za kibinadamu husababisha moto mwingi wa porini. Epuka miale ya moto iliyo wazi katika misitu na uripoti moshi kwa Huduma ya Misitu ya Kenya.
Ekegusii: Engencho abanto bagokora ebinto biabo nero egwokia omorero ase chingaki chinyinge.
Dholuo: Timbe mag dhano ema kelo mach mang'eny e bunge. Tem kik ichwe mach e bunge kendo iter ripot ne Kenya Forest Service ka ineno iro e bungu
Somali: Ka fogaada dabka kaynta oo ka warbixi in qiiqa ay keento Hay'adda Kaynta Kenya.

English: Coastal communities should recognize tsunami warning signs (receding water) and move to higher ground immediately.
Kiswahili: Jamii za pwani zinapaswa kutambua ishara za onyo la tsunami (maji yanapungua) na kuhamia kwenye ardhi ya juu mara moja.
Ekegusii: Abamenyi baonchokanete enyancha nere buya babe nobomanyi bwokomanya ekero omwaga omonene bwesunami okare gocha (obwango bwa amache enyancha agocha na kogenda)erio batame gochia ase aimokerete igoro bwango kegima.
Dholuo: Joma odak e dho nam onego ong'e ranyisi mag tsunami (pi dok chien) kendo gidonj e kuonde maboyo mapiyo.
Somali: Bulshooyinka xeebta ku nool waa inay ogaadaan calaamadaha tsunami (biyo daadsan) isla markaana isla markiiba tagaan meelaha sare.

English: Basic first aid saves lives during disasters. Free training is available through St. John Ambulance and Kenya Red Cross.
Kiswahili: Huduma ya kwanza ya msingi huokoa maisha wakati wa majanga. Mafunzo ya bure yanapatikana kupitia St. John Ambulance na Kenya Red Cross.
Ekegusii: Ayabwenerete gokorwa ritangani chingaki chimobasekano.Okwegerigwa kwa bosa na St.John Ambulance and Kenya Red cross.
Dholuo: Tiegruok ma onge chudo ma yudore e St. John Ambulance kod Kenya Red Cross konyo e reso ngima ji sama masira otimore.
Somali: Taageerada aasaasiga ah waxay badbaadinaysaa nolosha musiibooyinka. Tababbarka bilaashka ah waxaa laga helaa St. John Ambulance iyo Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya.

English: Disasters disproportionately affect people with disabilities. Families should plan accessible evacuation routes in advance.
Kiswahili: Maafa huathiri watu wenye ulemavu kwa kiasi kikubwa. Familia zinapaswa kupanga njia za uokoaji zinazopatikana mapema.
Ekegusii: Emesabeka no nigo ere omochando omonene ase abanto bare noborema.Abanto benyomba eyemo nere buya koroberia igoro yenchera yogwekonya baranyare goetera nyuma yomobasekano oyio.
Dholuo: Masiche hinyo joma nigi ng'ol e okang' malach, omiyo onego ochan chon yore ma ginyalo tiyogo e golo joma nigi ng'ol mopogore opogore.
Somali: Dadka naafada ah waxaa ku dhaca musiibooyin aan horay loo arag.

English: Survivors of disasters often face trauma. Free counseling is available at government health centers and through NGOs.
Kiswahili: Mara nyingi manusura wa majanga hukabiliwa na kiwewe. Ushauri nasaha wa bure unapatikana katika vituo vya afya vya serikali na kupitia mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali.
Ekegusii: Abatigari bemebasekano chingaki chinyinge nigo bakweiranana.Obotebereria na obokonyi bwa bosa mboreo ase chinyagitari chieserikari na goetera ebiombe biria bitari bieserikari(NGOs).
Dholuo: Joma yudo masira bedoga gi buok mang'eny nikech masira magikale.  Mano emomiyo ute thieth mag sirikal kod NGOs golo kony
Somali: Talobixinta lacag la'aanta ah waxaa laga helaa xarumaha caafimaadka dawladda iyo hay'adaha aan dawladda ahayn.

English: Drought-affected families can access government relief food. Report hunger cases to the National Drought Management Authority.
Kiswahili: Familia zilizoathiriwa na ukame zinaweza kupata chakula cha msaada cha serikali. Ripoti visa vya njaa kwa Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame.
Ekegusii: Baria banyorirwe nomochando bweguragura enene nabo bakonyora endagera korwa eserikari.Karwe amang'ana igoro yabanto bare nchara gochia eserikari ensemo ya baria batenenerete ogokonya igoro yokorwa obokonyi chingaki chieguragura enene.
Dholuo: miere ma okale oro nyalo yudo chiemo ma sirkal chiwo. Onego chiw ripot mar oro e migao mar National Drought Management Authority
Somali: Qoysaska abaaruhu saameyn ku yeesheen waxay heli karaan raashinka dawladda. Warbixin ku saabsan kiisaska abaaraha ee Hay'adda Maareynta Abaaraha Qaranka.

English: Homes and schools in disaster-prone areas should meet safety standards to withstand floods, earthquakes, and storms.
Kiswahili: Nyumba na shule katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na majanga zinapaswa kufikia viwango vya usalama ili kustahimili mafuriko, matetemeko ya ardhi, na dhoruba.
Ekegusii: Chinka nechisukuru chire chingongo chiriachibwate rinaga rinene ria emechando goika chitwatre oborendi bore igoro konua emetengecho nee chikoba
Dholuo: Ute kod skunde manie alwora ma masiche nyalo yudo onego obed ma nigi rit maber mondo omi kik yiengni mag pi, yiengni mag piny, kod yamo mager omedre.
Somali: Guryaha iyo dugsiyada meelaha musiibada ka dhacdo waa in la ilaaliyaa heerarka amniga si ay u adkeystaan fatahaadaha, dhulgariirrada iyo duufaannada.

English: Counties have designated evacuation centers. Locate your nearest shelter and keep emergency kits ready.
Kiswahili: Kaunti zina vituo maalum vya uokoaji. Tafuta makazi yako ya karibu na weka vifaa vya dharura tayari.
Ekegusii: Counties chibegete chinsemo chio obotamero bera ange nase ayie beka ebinto bio'bokonyi ang'e.
Dholuo: Kaunti oseyiero kuonde ma ji nyalo yueyoe, temuru manyo kar dak machiegni kodu kendo rituru gik ma dwarore ni utiyogo e konyo joma dwaro thieth.
Somali: Tirakoobka ayaa go'aamiyay saldhigyada degdegga ah ee loogu talagalay dadka degdegga ah.

English: After floods, water sources may be contaminated. Use water purification tablets or boil water before drinking.
Kiswahili: Baada ya mafuriko, vyanzo vya maji vinaweza kuwa vimechafuliwa. Tumia vidonge vya kusafisha maji au chemsha maji kabla ya kunywa.
Ekegusii: Nyuma yetoigo,chisoko chia amache nabo chirasareke tumia chitetere chia ogosibia amache ose oberie.
Dholuo: Bang' koth maduong', pi nyalo bedo ma ok ler. Chuak pi modho kata uti gi yath manego kute mag pi
Somali: Biyaha daadka ka dib waxaa laga yaabaa inay wasakheeyaan.

English: Schools should conduct regular fire drills and have emergency plans for floods, fires, and conflicts.
Kiswahili: Shule zinapaswa kufanya mazoezi ya mara kwa mara ya kuzima moto na kuwa na mipango ya dharura kwa ajili ya mafuriko, moto, na migogoro.
Ekegusii: Nere buya ase chisukuru korenda ogwateka kwemerero ase chisukuru chiabo nomoroberio bwokwerenda igoro yetoigo,emerero,nechisegi.
Dholuo: Skunde onego otim tiegruok mapile mar tieko mach kendo onego gibed gi chenro mag timo mapiyo sama pi opong', mach, kod ywaruok moro otimore.
Somali: Iskuullada waa inay sameeyaan tababar joogto ah oo dab daminta ah oo ay sameeyaan barnaamijyo deg deg ah oo ku saabsan fatahaadaha, dabka, iyo dagaalada.

English: Subscribe to SMS alerts from the Meteorological Department to receive real-time flood warnings in your area.
Kiswahili: Jisajili kwa arifa za SMS kutoka Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ili upokee maonyo ya mafuriko ya wakati halisi katika eneo lako.
Ekegusii: Erike nomoroberio oria okorwa ogokurera igoro bwabsemi berire erio konyora ogosemia kwa beene igoro yembura eneene egocha netoigo ase ekenyoro kiao.
Dholuo: Som weche ma biro e gaset mar Meteorological Department mondo iyud siem e wi pi ma biro e alworau.
Somali: Hoos ka daawo fariimaha telefoonka ee Xafiiska saadaasha cimilada si aad u hesho digniino dhab ah oo ku saabsan fatahaadaha deegaankaada.

English: Local committees help coordinate rescue efforts and resource distribution during emergencies. Volunteer with your village committee.
Kiswahili: Kamati za mitaa husaidia kuratibu juhudi za uokoaji na usambazaji wa rasilimali wakati wa dharura. Jitolee na kamati ya kijiji chako.
Ekegusii: Chikomiti chi nka ase okomanyania na kobwaterana igoro yobokonyi na kobga obokonyi chinaki chiomobasekano.Erwe gokomora emeremo yokwerwa.
Dholuo: Komiti mag alwora konyo e chano yore mag reso ngima kod pogo mwandu mag dhano e kinde mag chandruok.
Somali: Guddiyada maxalliga ah waxay ka caawiyaan isku xirka gargaarka iyo qeybinta khayraadka xaaladaha degdegga ah.

English: Improper handling of corpses risks disease outbreaks. Follow Textlines from health authorities during mass fatalities.
Kiswahili: Utunzaji usiofaa wa maiti unahatarisha mlipuko wa magonjwa. Fuata Ujumbe wa maandishi kutoka kwa mamlaka za afya wakati wa vifo vya watu wengi.
Ekegusii: Enhera etabwenereti buna etugo ekwete egotindekwa nenchera eyemo yogwateka kwendwari.Bwatita ayarikire korwa baria bakoraa obochenu ekero endwari yatekire.
Dholuo: Ka ng'ato ok tim maber gi ringre jomotho, mano nyalo miyo tuwoche omedre. Lu chike mogol kod ute thieth mondo uchor ringre jomotho
Somali: Isticmaalka xun ee meydadka ayaa khatar ku ah cudurrada faafa.

English: Criminals may exploit chaos. Secure your property and report looters to police immediately.
Kiswahili: Wahalifu wanaweza kutumia machafuko. Linda mali yako na uripoti waporaji kwa polisi mara moja.
Ekegusii: Abasaria nigo bagotumia omoburukano gokora obosareku.Gacha buya enibo yao na karwe yabasaria gochia ase abasikari bwango kegima.
Dholuo: Jomahundu nyalo tiyo gi thuolo ma masira otimoree e yo marach, omiyo inyalo rito mwanduni kendo nyiso polis mapiyo
Somali: Dambiilayaashu waxay si nabadgelyo leh u isticmaali karaan hantidaada waxayna isla markiiba u soo sheegaan booliska.

English: Livestock are critical for livelihoods. Report distressed animals to veterinary officers for feed and medical support.
Kiswahili: Mifugo ni muhimu kwa riziki. Waripoti wanyama walio katika hali ngumu kwa maafisa wa mifugo kwa ajili ya chakula na usaidizi wa kimatibabu.
Ekegusii: Etugo negento iiengencho ase endangera.Manyia abanyagitari betugo yetugo eria ere ase obokong'u kobwenia nagochirageria amo nobokonyi boganeirie.
Dholuo: Chiaye ber e medo yuto mar ng'ato. Omiyo ter wach ne lakteche chiaye mondo okony matuo gi modenyo e yoo makare
Somali: Warbixinta ayaa aad ugu murugooday xayawaanka ay dhakhaatiirtu u keeneen cunto iyo daryeel caafimaad.

English: Use flashlights instead of candles to prevent fires during blackouts. Report downed power lines to Kenya Power.
Kiswahili: Tumia tochi badala ya mishumaa ili kuzuia moto wakati wa kuzimwa kwa umeme. Ripoti nyaya za umeme zilizoanguka kwa Kenya Power.
Ekegusii: Tumia chitoci ase oborabu erio gotanga ogwateka kwomorero ekero esitima etaiyo.Manyia abanto besitima igoro yemerande yesitima eyio egwete inse.
Dholuo: Ti gi torch e mudho kar msuma mondo igeng' mach e seche mag mudho.  Kow wach mar mudho ne Kenya Power
Somali: Shumacyada halkii aad ku isticmaali lahayd toosh u adeegso si aad dabka uga hortagto marka korontada la damiyo.

English: Avoid driving through flooded roads. Just 30cm of water can sweep away vehicles. Use alternative routes.
Kiswahili: Epuka kuendesha gari kupitia barabara zilizojaa maji. Maji ya sentimita 30 pekee yanaweza kufyonza magari. Tumia njia mbadala.
Ekegusii: Renda togendia egari ase emegeko yamache gose epara etubire namache.Ekerengo kia amache 30cm nabo kerayengeyie na gokorora erori.Etera chinchera ching'ao.
Dholuo: Kik idonj e nderni ma pi opong'o, nikech pi matin ma romo sentimita 30 nyalo ywayo mtokni.
Somali: Ka fogow waddooyinka buuxsamay.

English: Companies should have continuity plans, backup generators, and employee safety training for emergencies.
Kiswahili: Makampuni yanapaswa kuwa na mipango ya mwendelezo, jenereta mbadala, na mafunzo ya usalama wa wafanyakazi kwa dharura.
Ekegusii: Chikampani nchibwenerete koba nomoroberio bwokogenderera,koba nebinto buna chichenereta chiomorero,na gosimia abakori emerebo baye igoro yemebasekano.
Dholuo: Kuonde ohala onego obed gi chenro mag dhi nyime, gi masinde mag loso gik moko, kendo tiego jotich e weche mag ritruok e kinde mag chandruok.
Somali: Shirkadaha waa inay lahaadaan qorshe joogto ah, matoorro dib u dhiska ah, iyo tababar ku saabsan badbaadada shaqaalaha xaaladaha degdegga ah.

English: Internally Displaced Persons (IDPs) are vulnerable to diseases. Ensure clean water, sanitation, and medical supplies in camps.
Kiswahili: Watu Waliohamishwa Ndani ya Nchi (IDPs) wako katika hatari ya kupata magonjwa. Hakikisha maji safi, usafi wa mazingira, na vifaa vya matibabu katika kambi.
Ekegusii: Abanto baria baseretigwe korwa ase bare gokora emeremo ekero kieminano yechikura chibopresidenti omwaka 2007/2008 na korenta egegi embe yebiama biegesiasa nebisaku, igo ere obwororo ase bare konyorwa namarwaire. Bakonye konyora amache amaya, chichoo, namariogo aaria chikambi chiabo.
Dholuo: Joma odak e kuonde jot (IDPs) nyalo yudo tuoche mapiyo. Rituru ler mar pi kod alwora kendo chiwuru yedhe
Somali: Gudaha dadka guryaha la'aanta ah (IPPP) si fudud ayey u xanuunsan karaan cudurrada.

English: Improper generator use causes carbon monoxide poisoning. Operate generators outdoors and away from windows.
Kiswahili: Matumizi yasiyofaa ya jenereta husababisha sumu ya monoksidi kaboni. Huendesha jenereta nje na mbali na madirisha.
Ekegusii: Gotumia echenereta etarosirie buya namakanika esambe ediseli gose epetiroli buya ekero okoyetumia konyora chunguru chiesuitima nigo egosokia erioki ribabwate esumu ekero kwayeeyanire yaba esumu ase omobere oo. Okia echenereta are korwa ase emerangu nechitirisa erioki tirisoa nyoma.
Dholuo: Tiyo gi generator e yo maok owinjore nyalo kaw ngima ng'ato kluwore gi carbon monoxide. Ti gi generator e laro mabor gi dirishni mag ot
Somali: Isticmaalka qalabka korontada ee aan habboonayn wuxuu keenaa in la soo saaro carbon monoxide.

English: Trained volunteers assist in rescue operations. Register with Kenya Red Cross or local disaster committees.
Kiswahili: Wajitolea waliofunzwa husaidia katika shughuli za uokoaji. Jisajili na kamati za Msalaba Mwekundu wa Kenya au kamati za maafa za eneo husika.
Ekegusii: Tabanto begeirie bokwerwa nigo bagokonya ekero kiemesekano. Erike byuna oyomo obo nekeombe ekebariri (Red Cross) gose ecomiti eria yanka eusikaine nemeremo eyio.
Dholuo: Joma otiegore konyo e tije mag reso ji. Ndikri gi Kenya Red Cross kata migepe mar reso joma masira omako
Somali: Shaqaale tababaran ayaa ka caawiya hawsha gurmadka.

English: Children are highly vulnerable. Ensure they know emergency contacts and have identification tags in crowded shelters.
Kiswahili: Watoto wako katika hatari kubwa. Hakikisha wanawajua watu wa dharura na wana vitambulisho katika makazi yaliyojaa watu.
Ekegusii: Nigo ere aororo aase abana konyora emechando yemebasekano. Tema kobamanyia chinamba chiesimi chiemebasekano baranyare korangeria nakobaa chipachi chibwate amarieta abo aase abanto bare abange.
Dholuo: Nyithindo nyalo bedo joma yom yom ahinya, omiyo nyaka ine ni ging'eyo joma ginyalo tudorego e saa masira, kendo ni gin gi kalatese ma nyiso kuma giwuoke
Somali: Carruurtu si sahlan ayey u qabsadaan, sidaas awgeed waxay u yaqaanaan xaaladaha degdegga ah waxayna haystaan aqoonsiyo meelaha dadku ku badan yihiin.

English: After floods, disinfect homes to prevent mold and diseases. Wear protective gear during cleanup.
Kiswahili: Baada ya mafuriko, safisha nyumba ili kuzuia ukungu na magonjwa. Vaa vifaa vya kujikinga wakati wa usafi.
Ekegusii: Nyuma yetoigo, siarera omochie ariogo riogoita abinyinyi gotanga amatosi namarwaire. Beka chianga chiogwetanga gotonyerwa neriogo.
Dholuo: Bang' koth, go udi yedhe mageng'o tuoche kiruako jwala e lweti
Somali: Daadka ka dib guriga nadiifiso si looga hortago fangaska iyo cudurrada.

English: During prolonged disasters, preserve food by drying, salting, or using airtight containers to avoid spoilage.
Kiswahili: Wakati wa majanga ya muda mrefu, hifadhi chakula kwa kukausha, kutia chumvi, au kutumia vyombo visivyopitisha hewa ili kuepuka kuharibika.
Ekegusii: Ekero kiechando emetambe buna omogaso gose embura enyinge, gacha endagera ase okoyiomia, koyebeka omonyo, goge koyesiba ime yebibekerero embeo etari gosoa ime koyerenda tegunda.
Dholuo: Sama masira moro otimore kuom kinde malach, ket chiemo e bwo yiengni ma ok nyal kethore.
Somali: Marka ay dhacdo musiibooyin muddo dheer soconaya, cuntooyinka ku badbaadi adigoo qalajinaya, ku qallajinaya, ama isticmaalaya qalab hawada la'aan ah si looga hortago in la burburiyo.

English: Rumors worsen panic. Rely on official updates from government agencies and verified media outlets.
Kiswahili: Uvumi unazidisha hofu. Tegemea masasisho rasmi kutoka kwa mashirika ya serikali na vyombo vya habari vilivyothibitishwa.
Ekegusii: Amangana oborimo nigo akogesa obororo. Nyora amangana korwa aase aronge buna eserikari amo nabariki na abamanyi amangana bokwegenwa.
Dholuo: Weche mag miriambo miyo ji bedo gi luoro ahinya, kendo mano miyo giweyo weche ma sirkal wacho kod weche ma gipuonjore e wi weche ma timore e piny.
Somali: Wararka xukuumadda iyo warbaahinta la xaqiijiyay waxay ku tiirsan yihiin wararka rasmiga ah.

English: Snakes seek shelter in homes during floods. Use torches at night and avoid walking barefoot.
Kiswahili: Nyoka hutafuta makazi majumbani wakati wa mafuriko. Tumia mienge usiku na epuka kutembea bila viatu.
Ekegusii: Chingiti ching'enda'nse origia chire obomenyo chinka chiaito ekero chietoigo. Tumia etochi botuko na erende gotatacha inse namagoro amasa aotabegeti ebiato.
Dholuo: Sama pi opong'o piny, thuonde manyo kar buok e utegi, giti gi mach gotieno, kendo kik giwuothi gi tiendgi nono.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta ciidamada amniga ayaa sheegay in xilliyada ciidamada amniga ay ka fuliyeen ciidamo ka tirsan ciidamada AMISOM.

English: Insurance mitigates financial losses from floods, fires, or storms. Explore affordable micro-insurance options.
Kiswahili: Bima hupunguza hasara za kifedha kutokana na mafuriko, moto, au dhoruba. Gundua chaguzi za bima ndogo za bei nafuu.
Ekegusii: Chinsuarensi nigo chigotanga babanto konyora asara ekero kiembura enyinge nemegoko, emerero, gose emerindo. Rigia komanya ebiombe ebike bikorwa ogokonya ekero kiemebasekano yoboremi bwao ekobe ase rigori rianse.
Dholuo: Insuarans konyo e chulo gik makelo hinyruok nikech pi, mach, kata yamo mager. Ndikri kar insurance mondo iyud kony e saa masira
Somali: Caymiska waxaa lagu daboolaa khasaaraha dhaqaale ee fatahaadaha, dabka ama duufaannada.

English: Vulnerable families can access government cash aid during disasters via mobile money platforms.
Kiswahili: Familia zilizo katika mazingira magumu zinaweza kupata msaada wa pesa taslimu wa serikali wakati wa majanga kupitia mifumo ya pesa za simu.
Ekegusii: Chifamiri chiria chitari kwenyara gose chintaka mbwango konyorwa nemechando, tema goikera ogokonya gweserikari goetera omoroberio (o'cash aid) ekero kiemechando goetera esimi yao.
Dholuo: Joot ma nigi chandruok nyalo yudo kony ma sirkal chiwo e kinde masiche kokalo kuom chenro mag pesa mitimo gi simo.
Somali: Qoysaska khatarta ku dhaca waxay caawimaad dhaqaale ka heli karaan dowladda markii ay musiibo dhacdo iyada oo loo marayo barnaamijyada lacag bixinta.

English: Avoid rebuilding in landslide-prone areas. Government offers alternative land for affected families.
Kiswahili: Epuka kujenga upya katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi. Serikali inatoa ardhi mbadala kwa familia zilizoathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Tiga koirorera kwoagacha ase riroba rikoanyoka. Eserikari nkorwa ere emegondo emao ase oyio oo ase chifamilia chianyorirwe nomochando oyio.
Dholuo: Kik uger kuonde ma lowo olwar ahinya, nikech sirkal chiwo lowo ma nyalo konyo joodgi ma masira mar yiengni omako.
Somali: Ka fogow dib u dhiska meelaha ay dhaceen dhulgariirada. Dowladdu waxay siinaysaa dhul kale qoysaska dhaawacmay.

English: Free fire safety training is available for communities to prevent and respond to fire outbreaks.
Kiswahili: Mafunzo ya usalama wa moto bila malipo yanapatikana kwa jamii ili kuzuia na kukabiliana na milipuko ya moto.
Ekegusii: Amasomo abosa igoro yokwerenda ekero kiomorero nareo ase ebinyoro gotanga nagokonya chingaki omorero ogwateka.
Dholuo: Tiegruok ma onge chudo mar mach yudore mondo omi oganda ogeng'o kendo odwokgi e yo maber.
Somali: Waxaa jira tababar cad oo ku saabsan badbaadada dabka ee bulshooyinka kala duwan si looga hortago iyo looga hortago qaraxyada dabka.

English: Water conducts electricity. Avoid touching power lines or electrical appliances during floods.
Kiswahili: Maji hupitisha umeme. Epuka kugusa nyaya za umeme au vifaa vya umeme wakati wa mafuriko.
Ekegusii: Chinguru chiomorero bwesitima ngoeta chire ase amache. Tiga kobwata ebitanke biesitima gose ebinto biesitima chingaki chietoigo gose amache ateremete.
Dholuo: Pi miyo ga sitima muoch, omiyo kik imul sitima kata masinde mamoko mag sitima sama pi opong'o piny.
Somali: Biyaha waxaa ku jira koronto waxayna ka fogaadaan inay taabtaan fiilooyinka korontada ama qalabka korontada inta lagu jiro daadka.

English: Farmers should adopt drought-resistant crops and water conservation techniques to mitigate climate shocks.
Kiswahili: Wakulima wanapaswa kutumia mazao yanayostahimili ukame na mbinu za kuhifadhi maji ili kupunguza mishtuko ya hali ya hewa.
Ekegusii: Nere buya ase abaremi gosimeka ebimeri bikoremereria omogaso omnene amo nenchera yokogacha na gotumia buya amache na gotanga konyorwa gose gokeania konyorwa nemechando eyio .
Dholuo: jopur onego opidh yiende ma ok oluoro oro kendo giti gi yore mag rito pi mondo kik giwit yuto e saa masira
Somali: Beeralayda waa inay horumariyaan dalagyo abaaro ah iyo habab biyo lagu kaydiyo si loo yareeyo saameynta cimilada.

English: Learn to build temporary shelters using locally available materials for displaced families.
Kiswahili: Jifunze kujenga makazi ya muda kwa kutumia vifaa vinavyopatikana katika eneo husika kwa ajili ya familia zilizopoteza makazi.
Ekegusii: Egera koacha chinyomba ogtumia ebinto bigotoka inka ase bari baseretigwe korwa aase bare abwo nyuma.
Dholuo: Puonjri gero ute jot ma ji dakie ndalo masir, kitiyo gi gik ma yudore e alwora ma gidakie mondo okonygo joma masira oyudo
Somali: Baro sida loo dhiso guryo ku meelgaar ah adoo adeegsanaya qalabka deegaankaada loogu talagalay qoysaska guryahooda lumay.

English: Stampedes worsen disasters. Follow authorities' instructions and avoid panic during mass evacuations.
Kiswahili: Kukanyagana huzidisha majanga. Fuata maagizo ya mamlaka na epuka hofu wakati wa uhamishaji wa watu wengi.
Ekegusii: Ekere omobasekano obeire ekero abanto bakomigererania gotama nogo gokogesa emechando ende emenene. Bwatia ekere abarai bagoteba gokonya okomagamaga chingaki chiogokonya kwabanto abange.
Dholuo: Luw chike ma sirkal chiko kendo kik ibed maluor sama itimo chenro mar golo ji e kuonde masira
Somali: Daabacaadda waxay sii kordhisaa masiibooyinka waxayna raacdaa tilmaamaha maamulka waxayna ka baxsataa cabsida marka dad badani ka guuraan.

English: Learn to recognize trauma symptoms and provide psychological first aid to disaster survivors.
Kiswahili: Jifunze kutambua dalili za kiwewe na kutoa huduma ya kwanza ya kisaikolojia kwa manusura wa majanga.
Ekegusii: Tema komanya buna obwoba gose ogwechanda kwa abanto banyorirwe nomobasekano erio kobakonya korwania obwoba obwo goetera obosemia bwebirengererio na kobasira nchera ende yonsi erio banyare gotenenana kogenderera.
Dholuo: Puonjri fwenyo chal mar tuwo moro ma ne oyudo ng'ato ka en e masira kendo ikony joma oyudo masira.
Somali: Baro sida loo aqoonsado calaamadaha cudurka xanuunka maskaxda iyo sida looga caawiyo dadka ka badbaaday musiibada.

English: Ensure LPG cylinders are stored in well-ventilated areas and check for leaks regularly.
Kiswahili: Hakikisha mitungi ya LPG imehifadhiwa katika maeneo yenye hewa ya kutosha na angalia uvujaji mara kwa mara.
Ekegusii: Rora ng'a omotungi bwegasi yokorugera mbuya egachiire na aase agiya are nerigaba riembeo gosoa ime, na rigereria kera chingaki komanya gose egasi nkominchoria ere korwa omotungi oyesokie bwango buna enchera eyemo yogotanga emebasekano.
Dholuo: Keturu osikni mag LPG e kuonde ma yamo nitie maber kendo ng'iuru machuer.
Somali: Daabacaadaha LPG waxaa lagu kaydiyaa meelo si fiican loo ilaaliyo oo si joogto ah loo hubiyaa in ay baxayaan.

English: Older adults need tailored evacuation plans. Identify caregivers and accessible shelters in advance.
Kiswahili: Wazee wanahitaji mipango maalum ya uokoaji. Tambua walezi na makazi yanayoweza kufikiwa mapema.
Ekegusii: Abanto abagotu mbaganetie enchera yabeene kobatamia korwa emebasekano. Beka abatenereri babo amo nase oraibaire kobera motwe yokobatania korwa omobasekano.
Dholuo: Joma hikgi ng'eny onego otim chenro mar wuok e utegi, kendo onego ging'e joma rito nyithindgi kod kuonde dak ma ginyalo dhiye chon.
Somali: Dadka qaangaarka ah waxay u baahan yihiin qorshe lagu wareejiyo dadka.

English: Village loudspeakers, SMS alerts, and radio broadcasts help disseminate disaster warnings quickly.
Kiswahili: Vipaza sauti vya kijijini, arifa za SMS, na matangazo ya redio husaidia kusambaza maonyo ya maafa haraka.
Ekegusii: Beka amakondo komanyia abanto, tima amangana amenge goetera esimi, nechiredi gokonya komanyia abanto ase oboagare nogokurerwa bwango igoro yomobasekano.
Dholuo: Auja, weche ma ji oroga kokalo kuom SMS, kod nyakalondo konyo e lando siem mag masiche mapiyo.
Somali: Codadka tuulooyinka, farriimaha taleefanka gacanta, iyo baahinta raadiyaha waxay gacan ka geystaan in digniinta masiibada si dhakhso leh loo faafiyo.
