English: Chemicals and fuels should be stored away from homes to prevent fires and environmental contamination.
Kiswahili: Kemikali na mafuta yanapaswa kuhifadhiwa mbali na nyumba ili kuzuia moto na uchafuzi wa mazingira.
Ekegusii: Chikemiko naguta nere buya kogachwa are korwa chinka na ase engencho ebwenerete eri ogotanga ogwateka kwemerero na ogosaria amasingira.
Dholuo: Mondo omi mach kik chakre kendo keth alwora, gik makelo chuk kod petrol onego okan mabor gi udi.
Somali: Kiimikada iyo shidaalka waa in guriga laga saaraa si looga hortago dabka iyo wasakheynta.

English: Lost family members can be traced through Kenya Red Cross and social media platforms.
Kiswahili: Wanafamilia waliopotea wanaweza kufuatiliwa kupitia majukwaa ya Msalaba Mwekundu wa Kenya na mitandao ya kijamii.
Ekegusii: Abanto basirete nnabo barabwatigwe goetera ekeombe ekebariri (Red Cross) amo nabariki amangana na komanyia abanto amang'ana.
Dholuo: Joma olal bang' masira inyalo yud kuonde ma gintie kokalo kuom riwruok mar Kenya Red Cross kod social media.
Somali: Xubnaha qoyska ee lumay waxaa lagu raad raaci karaa Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya iyo baraha bulshada.

English: Stagnant water breeds mosquitoes. Use bed nets and report mosquito infestations to health authorities.
Kiswahili: Maji yaliyotuama huzaa mbu. Tumia vyandarua na uripoti maambukizi ya mbu kwa mamlaka za afya.
Ekegusii: Chiumbu nigo chikoiborerana ase amache atereime. Tumia chineti chiebitanda korara na manyia abanyagitari igoro yokoromwa nechiumbu na buna abanto barwarete.
Dholuo: Pi ma ok mol miyo suna nywolore, omiyo ti gi net mag nindo kendo inyis jotelo mag thieth ni suna ngeny e aluora ma intie
Somali: Isticmaal shaashadda, oo u sheeg in cayayaanka ay soo weeraraan xirfadlayaasha caafimaadka.

English: Communities should invest in boreholes and rainwater harvesting to ensure water access during droughts.
Kiswahili: Jamii zinapaswa kuwekeza katika visima na uvunaji wa maji ya mvua ili kuhakikisha upatikanaji wa maji wakati wa ukame.
Ekegusii: Nere buya ebinyoro kobeka chinguri chiabo ase okorema ebisima ebinene bia abanto abange nomoroberion bwogotacha amache erio koba namache aisaine chingaki chieguragura.
Dholuo: Ji onego onyiew gige ywayo kod choko pi koth mondo omi ji obed gi pi e ndalo kech gi oro
Somali: Bulshooyinka waa inay isticmaalaan ceelasha iyo biyaha roobka si ay u kaydiyaan biyaha xilliga abaarta.

English: Kenya's policy framework ensures coordinated disaster management. Understand your rights and government obligations.
Kiswahili: Mfumo wa sera wa Kenya unahakikisha usimamizi wa maafa ulioratibiwa. Elewa haki zako na majukumu ya serikali.
Ekegusii: Amachiko aKenya igoro yobokoreri ekero kia omobasekano nkoenekia are ng'a okobeaterana nekomoti yemebasekano. Manya aboronge bwao neki eserikari ebwenerete kogokorera.
Dholuo: Chenro mar Kenya mar timo lokruok e weche mag siasa miyo ji bedo gi chenro maber mar rito masiche.
Somali: Qaab dhismeedka siyaasadda Kenya wuxuu hubiyaa in masiibooyinka la maareeyo si habsami leh.

English: The national helpline 1195 is available at all times to provide immediate assistance to survivors of sexual and gender-based violence.
Kiswahili: Simu ya usaidizi ya kitaifa 1195 inapatikana wakati wote ili kutoa msaada wa haraka kwa manusura wa unyanyasaji wa kingono na kijinsia.
Ekegusii: Enamba yesimi yogokonya 1195 inao ere ase chingaki chionsi ase ogokonya bari batarareirwe, gotibonwa gose komocherwa nchera ende yonsi koreng'ana na eki ore.
Dholuo: namba sime milandoe masich dhaw e kind dichwo gi dhako, en namba 1195 ma yudore e piny mangima.
Somali: Taageerada qaranka ee 1195 ayaa had iyo jeer la heli karaa si degdeg ah loogu caawiyo dhibanayaasha xadgudubka galmada iyo galmada.

English: Intimate partner violence often escalates gradually. Early recognition and training for frontline professionals support prevention and safe referrals.
Kiswahili: Vurugu za wapenzi wa karibu mara nyingi huongezeka polepole. Utambuzi wa mapema na mafunzo kwa wataalamu wa mstari wa mbele husaidia kuzuia na rufaa salama.
Ekegusii: Eminano gose ogokurarana gati yomosacha nomokungu oye mara aanga nigo gokogenderera kogesekana na koba boke ng'orang'ora. Mbuya komanya ayio bwango na kwegeria abakoreri baria bare motwe gokonya ase okobaikera na kobakonya ebirengererio na kobaraa gochia nyagitari ase kobwenigwa.
Dholuo: Kinde mang'eny dhap dhako gi dichuo modak kanyakla medo bedo marach mosmos. Omiyo chop lendo mag dhao e migepe mohangi ne jopiny
Somali: Dagaalka lamaanaha ayaa si tartiib tartiib ah u sii kordhaya.

English: Prompt reporting of gender-based violence protects survivors and preserves evidence. Specialized Gender Desks handle cases sensitively and survivors have rights to medical care, protection, and legal support.
Kiswahili: Kuripoti haraka kuhusu ukatili wa kijinsia huwalinda waathiriwa na kuhifadhi ushahidi. Madawati Maalum ya Jinsia hushughulikia kesi kwa usikivu na waathiriwa wana haki ya kupata huduma ya matibabu, ulinzi, na usaidizi wa kisheria.
Ekegusii: Komanyia ase obwango amang'ana eminano gose ogokorerwa bobe egekogera eki ore ngokonya kore baria bakoreirwe bobe, na gacha obosaidi igoro yayio. Egetengo kia beene ase Chinyagitari na Porisi nao amangana ogokorerwa bobe ase engencho yeki ore agokonyerwa, na baria bakoreirwe bobe mbare noboronge bwabo konyora obobwenia, korenda kemachiko na gokonya kemachiko.
Dholuo: Ka ng'ato olando mapiyo weche mag mahundu ekind dichwo gi dhako, mano nyalo miyo orit joma notony. Sirikal miyo joma otony rit e buo chik kod ratiro mar yedhe
Somali: Warbixinta degdegga ah ee ku saabsan xadgudubka galmada ayaa badbaadiyayaasha ilaalinaysa waxayna keentaa markhaati.

English: All public health facilities in Kenya offer free medical services for gender-based violence survivors.
Kiswahili: Vituo vyote vya afya vya umma nchini Kenya hutoa huduma za matibabu bila malipo kwa waathiriwa wa unyanyasaji wa kijinsia.
Ekegusii: Chinyagitari chionsi chieserikari aiga nka Kenya nkorwa chire obobwenia ao ao bogokorerwa bobe bosa ase baria bamocheirwe.
Dholuo: Ute thieth duto mag Kenya chiwo thieth maonge chudo ne joma osetho nikech timbe gero.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka dadweynaha ee Kenya waxay bixiyaan daryeel caafimaad oo lacag la'aan ah dhibanayaasha rabshadaha galmada.

English: Personal safety plans help individuals prepare for dangerous situations by identifying safe locations and strategies for protection.
Kiswahili: Mipango ya usalama wa kibinafsi huwasaidia watu kujiandaa kwa hali hatari kwa kutambua maeneo salama na mikakati ya ulinzi.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio oo aye omonyene kwerenda ngokonya ore kwebanga chingaki chiokong'u ase okomanya boronge ase ogotamera gochia na buna okwerenda.
Dholuo: Chenro mag rito ngima konyo ng'ato mondo oikre ne chal matek kuom fwenyo kuonde ma ginyalo dakie kendo tiyo gi yore ma ginyalo ritogo ng'ato.
Somali: Nidaamyada ammaanka shaqsiyadeed waxay dadka ka caawiyaan inay u diyaargaroobaan xaaladaha khatarta ah iyagoo aqoonsan meelaha ammaanka ah iyo hababka lagu ilaalin karo.

English: Community support networks assist survivors by providing safe spaces, trained volunteers, empowerment programs, and coordinated referrals while prioritizing safety and confidentiality.
Kiswahili: Mitandao ya usaidizi wa jamii huwasaidia waathirika kwa kutoa nafasi salama, watu wa kujitolea waliofunzwa, programu za uwezeshaji, na marejeleo yaliyoratibiwa huku ikipa kipaumbele usalama na usiri.
Ekegusii: Ebokundi biogosira ase ebinyoro nigo bigokonya baria bakoreirwe bobe ase enchera yokobaa aase bakobera atari namochando onde bwonsi goetera abakonyi babo bokwerwa begeirie buya, kobasira goetera ebinto bike bike bikobakonya, na kobwaterana gochia ase baranyare konyora obokonyi ao ao, oborendi bwaigoro nobobisi bwabo.
Dholuo: Oganda ma konyo ji konyo joma otony kuom chiwo kuonde ma ginyalo dakie, joma otiego, koda chenro mag konyo ji mondo obed gi teko, kendo gikonyogi e yo mochanore ka giketo weche motudore gi ritruok kod weche mopondo obed motelo.
Somali: Nidaamyada taageerada bulshada waxay ka caawiyaan dadka badbaaday iyagoo siinaya meelo ammaan ah, mutadawiciin la tababaray, barnaamijyo xoojin ah, iyo waqtiyo maamul oo la abaabulay iyadoo ammaanka iyo asturnaanta ay mudnaanta koowaad siinayaan.

English: Workplace policies and training prevent sexual harassment by establishing clear definitions, reporting channels, investigations, and support services based on national legal frameworks.
Kiswahili: Sera na mafunzo mahali pa kazi huzuia unyanyasaji wa kijinsia kwa kuweka ufafanuzi ulio wazi, njia za kuripoti, uchunguzi, na huduma za usaidizi kulingana na mifumo ya kisheria ya kitaifa.
Ekegusii: Koba namachiko ase abanto bagokora emeremo na kobaegeria igor yoboronge bwa mwanyabanto ngokonya ere gokorerwa bobe kebwanchani egekogera kera omokori emeremo amanyete buya nga ogokora eke gose keria aya naria naro aramonyore, chinchera omonto akomanyeria abane igoro yayio, obotuki, amo nemeroberio yokomosira korengna nerichiko riense.
Dholuo: Puonj migolo kuonde tich kod tiegruok mag geng'o timbe mag nindruok, yore mag chiwo ripot, timo nonro, kod konyo ji oketi kaluwore gi chike mag piny.
Somali: Siyaasadaha iyo xeerarka shaqada waxay ka hortagaan dhibaatada galmada iyagoo xaqiijinaya sharaxaadda cad, warbixinta warbaahinta, baaritaannada, iyo adeegyada taageerada shaqada ee ku saleysan nidaamyada sharciga qaranka.

English: Child protection systems must prevent sexual abuse and exploitation and provide full support for affected children.
Kiswahili: Mifumo ya ulinzi wa watoto lazima izuie unyanyasaji wa kingono na unyonyaji na kutoa msaada kamili kwa watoto walioathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Nebwenerete nga ebitengo bionsi bire bikorenda abana gtanga na abana gotibonwa na bosomba bonde bwonsi goetera okobaa ogokonya gwa kera engencho.
Dholuo: Migepe kod dwonde mag rito nyithindo nyaka geng' timbe mag nindruok kendo nyaka giriw lwedo mar konyo nyithindo ma chandore.
Somali: Nidaamyada difaaca carruurta waa inay ka hortagaan xadgudubka galmada iyo xadgudubka waxayna bixiyaan taageero buuxda carruurta dhibaatada ku dhaca.

English: Healthcare workers require specialized training in trauma-informed care, evidence collection, mandatory reporting, and coordinated referrals for survivors.
Kiswahili: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanahitaji mafunzo maalum katika utunzaji unaozingatia majeraha, ukusanyaji wa ushahidi, kuripoti kwa lazima, na rufaa zilizoratibiwa kwa waathirika.
Ekegusii: Abakori emeremo bobochenu mbaganeirie amaorokererio abeene ase ogokonya barwaire babo komanya emechando nagekong'ia koyerwania, kobeka amo obosaiti , kobeka eripoti as ebitabu, na na okobwatera kobatoma gochia baranyore obokonyi bwa beene.
Dholuo: Joma tiyo e weche thieth dwaro tiegruok makende e weche mag rito joma oyudo masira, choko gik manyiso ni githo, chiwo ripot e yo ma ratiro, kod chiwo paro e yo mochanore ne joma otony.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka waxay u baahan yihiin tababar gaar ah oo ku saabsan daryeelka degdegga ah, ururinta caddaymaha, warbixinta lagama maarmaanka u ah, iyo waqtiyada loogu talagalay dadka badbaaday.

English: Safe houses and shelters offer secure temporary accommodation for survivors and their children.
Kiswahili: Nyumba na makazi salama hutoa malazi salama ya muda kwa manusura na watoto wao.
Ekegusii: Aase agiya neyomba yokomenya nensemo eyemo yoborendi ase baria bakoreirwe bobe nabana babo.
Dholuo: Ute jot miyo jomotony kuom mahundu matimore e kind dichuo gi chiege kar dak
Somali: Guryaha ammaanka ah iyo goobaha la dhigto waxay badbaadiyayaasha iyo carruurtooda u siiyaan hoy amaan ah oo ku meelgaar ah.

English: Digital spaces can expose individuals to online abuse. Laws criminalize cyberviolence and support services help survivors secure devices, report incidents, and remove harmful content.
Kiswahili: Nafasi za kidijitali zinaweza kuwaweka watu katika hatari ya unyanyasaji mtandaoni. Sheria zinaharamisha vurugu za mtandaoni na huduma za usaidizi huwasaidia walionusurika kupata vifaa salama, kuripoti matukio, na kuondoa maudhui hatari.
Ekegusii: Goetera obokonyi bwedichitari nkonyarekana ere gosioria baria bagokorera bobe abande goetera eintaneti. Amachiko nkorenda are abanto tobakorerwa bobe goetera eintaneti na kobakonya korenda chisimi nechikombiuta chiabo neintaneti korwa ebibago, korwa eripoti yokogoserwa, na gotinyia amangana aria akogechia.
Dholuo: Omiyo oseket chike mag rito twak ewi mbui
Somali: Shirkadaha tikniyoolajiyadu waxay soo bandhigi karaan xadgudubyada internetka. Sharciyada ka hortagga rabshadaha internetka iyo adeegyada taageerada isgaarsiinta waxay ka caawiyaan dadka badbaaday inay helaan qalabka amniga, fiisooyinka warbixinta, iyo macluumaadka waxyeelada leh.

English: Engaging men and boys in prevention programs promotes healthy relationships and challenges harmful gender norms.
Kiswahili: Kuwashirikisha wanaume na wavulana katika programu za kuzuia maambukizi huendeleza mahusiano yenye afya na hupinga kanuni hatari za kijinsia.
Ekegusii: Renta abasacha nabura amo ase emeroberio yogosegeta oboamate obuya ase abanto na orokereria buna ogotareng'anana kwa banto ase engencho yebimira ere bobe.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar chwo gi yawuowi e chenro mag geng'o chwanyruok  e kind mon gi chuo miyo winjruok bedo maber kendo kelo pek e chike motelone kwe e kind chwo gi mon.
Somali: Ka qaybgalka ragga iyo wiilasha barnaamijyada ka hortagga khatarta waxay horumariyaan xiriir wanaagsan iyo dhibaatooyinka galmada ee caadiga ah ee waxyeelada leh.

English: Legal aid services ensure survivors access justice through free or subsidized representation.
Kiswahili: Huduma za usaidizi wa kisheria zinahakikisha walionusurika wanapata haki kupitia uwakilishi huru au ruzuku.
Ekegusii: Ogokonya abanto kemachiko nigo korengete korora nga goikera ekeene goeera gokonywa bosa otari korwa kende gose ogoaka pesa inke igo omogambi bwebina gokogambera kotini.
Dholuo: Kony mar ratiro miyo wa thuolo mar yalo e kot.
Somali: Adeegyada caawimaadda sharciga waxay u oggolaanayaan dadka badbaaday inay xaq u helaan wakiilada lacag la'aanta ah ama dowladda.

English: Educational institutions must implement prevention programs that address harassment, assault, and exploitation in learning environments.
Kiswahili: Taasisi za elimu lazima zitekeleze programu za kuzuia zinazoshughulikia unyanyasaji, unyanyasaji, na unyonyaji katika mazingira ya kujifunzia.
Ekegusii: Chisukuru razima chiikeranie emeroberio gotanga gokorerwa bobe kobasuguma gose kobagechi, kobarwania ngose komiga oboronge bwabo ase engencho bare abagongeru ase chisukuru.
Dholuo: Skunde mag somo nyaka ket chenro mag geng'o chandruok, timbe mahundu, kod tiyo gi mwandu marach e kuonde tiegruok.
Somali: Machadyada waxbarashada waa inay sameeyaan barnaamijyo looga hortago dhibaatada, weerarka iyo xadgudubka deegaanka.

English: Economic abuse limits financial independence. Financial institutions should recognize warning signs and support affected customers.
Kiswahili: Unyanyasaji wa kiuchumi hupunguza uhuru wa kifedha. Taasisi za fedha zinapaswa kutambua ishara za onyo na kuwasaidia wateja walioathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Obosaria bwobogoko nigo bokomiga okwenyara nogwetenenera gwechibesa. Ebiombe baria bionsi bigokora nechibesa nere buya asebire komanya bwango emechando ere motwe na buna baranyare gokonya baria bakogachera chibesa chiabo.
Dholuo: Tiyo gi mwandu marach dwoko chien chenro mag yuto
Somali: Hay'adaha maaliyadeed waa inay ogaadaan calaamadaha digniinta iyo taageerada macaamiisha ay saameynayaan.

English: Human trafficking for sexual exploitation is a serious crime. National laws provide strong penalties and survivor protections.
Kiswahili: Usafirishaji haramu wa binadamu kwa ajili ya unyonyaji wa kingono ni uhalifu mkubwa. Sheria za kitaifa hutoa adhabu kali na ulinzi kwa walionusurika.
Ekegusii: Enchera yokobetereria gose koira abanto ase egete ase engencho yokobaonia ase ebiasara biobwanchani konyora chibesa okomocha okobe mono. Amachiko yense nkorwa are egesusuro ekerito na gokonya baria bakoreirwe bobe.
Dholuo: Goyo ohand dhano mondo oti kodgi e timbe nindruok en ketho maduong'.  Chiike nitie mag geng'o ohalago
Somali: Dhibaatada galmada waa dembi weyn.

English: Risk assessment tools help identify individuals at high risk of experiencing or perpetrating violence to enable targeted interventions.
Kiswahili: Zana za tathmini ya hatari husaidia kutambua watu walio katika hatari kubwa ya kupitia au kufanya vurugu ili kuwezesha hatua zinazolengwa.
Ekegusii: Amasakara abwate amaborio na buna abanto bakoiraneria ebigokonya korora na komanya buna abanto baria bare ase ekonyarekana gokorerwa bobe gose kogenderera gokorerwa bobe erio gokonya kobeka emeroberio yogotanga ebwenerete.
Dholuo: nonro mag chal mar chandruok konyo e fwenyo joma kale mahundu kod ywarruok mondo omi okonygi yudo kony mowinjore.
Somali: Qalabka kormeerka khatarta ayaa ka caawiya in la aqoonsado dadka khatarta ugu weyn u ah in la qabto ama la sameeyo rabshad si loo fududeeyo gelitaanka bartilmaameedka.

English: Survivor-centered approaches uphold safety, dignity, and autonomy in all decisions about reporting and service use.
Kiswahili: Mbinu zinazozingatia walionusurika zinaunga mkono usalama, heshima, na uhuru katika maamuzi yote kuhusu kuripoti na matumizi ya huduma.
Ekegusii: Emeroberio yokobakonya baria bakoreirwe bobe nigo ekoimokereria igoro oborendi, amasikani, obobisi, nobosibore bwomonto korwa ebirengerio biaye neko aganeti gokorerwa.
Dholuo: Yore mag konyo joma otony e masiche, miyo gibedo gi ritruok, luor, kod thuolo mar timo yiero e wi weche duto motudore gi chiwo ripot
Somali: Xiriirada aan xasilloonayn waxay taageerayaan amniga, sharafta, iyo xorriyadda dhammaan go'aamada ku saabsan macluumaadka iyo isticmaalka adeegyada.

English: Emergency settings heighten gender-based violence risks and require specialized prevention and response planning.
Kiswahili: Mipangilio ya dharura huongeza hatari za unyanyasaji wa kijinsia na inahitaji mipango maalum ya kuzuia na kukabiliana na hali hiyo.
Ekegusii: Chingaki chiemebasekano gose obokongu nigo chikogesa ribaga abanto gokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki bare naya ekero abeire neganeirie chinchera chigotanga abanto gokorerwa bobe chaiabeene na emeroberio buna baranyare gokonywa.
Dholuo: masira nyalo miyo timbe mahundu omedre kendo mano dwaro ni migepe mag arita kwe otim chenro mar geng'o chandruok.
Somali: Xaaladaha degdegga ah waxay kordhiyaan khatarta xadgudubka galmada waxayna u baahan yihiin ka hortag iyo qorshe gaar ah oo looga hortago.

English: Reliable data systems track violence trends and service use to inform evidence-based policies and programs.
Kiswahili: Mifumo ya data inayoaminika hufuatilia mitindo ya vurugu na matumizi ya huduma ili kutoa taarifa kuhusu sera na programu zinazotegemea ushahidi.
Ekegusii: Amangana aria arikire amaikeranu buna chiripoti chiabasikari, chianyagitari na NGOs chikworokia buna abanto bagokorerwa bobe erio gokonya korosia amachiko nemeroberio yokobakonya.
Dholuo: Sistem mag mag  fwambo gi keyo nyiso kaka timbe gero timore kod chiwo ripot e wi chike koda program mageng'o mahundu gi
Somali: Nidaamyada xogta la isku halleyn karo waxay la socdaan isbeddellada rabshadaha iyo isticmaalka adeegyada si ay u soo saaraan warbixinno siyaasadeed iyo barnaamijyo caddaynaya.

English: Strategic communication campaigns promote non-violent norms and responsible media coverage of gender-based violence.
Kiswahili: Kampeni za mawasiliano ya kimkakati zinakuza kanuni zisizo za vurugu na uandishi wa habari unaowajibika kuhusu vurugu zinazotokana na jinsia kwenye vyombo vya habari.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio bwoboamo obangire buya komanyia na gosomia abanto korengete gosegeta abanto goonchoreria na kwanga gokorera abanto bande bobe na korwa eripoti igoro ya baria bakoreirwe bobe otarikonyorwa, amo noboriki na komanyia abanto amang'ana goetera chiredio na amagaseti ase enchewra etari koeneria gokwanrera obobe bwogokorera aband bobe.
Dholuo: Chenro mag tieko ywarruok e kind mon gi chuo  onego osir mbaka e wi wechegi
Somali: Warbaahinta bulshada waxay kor u qaadeysaa dhaqanka aan rabshadaha lahayn iyo warbaahinta rabshadaha galmada.

English: Persons with disabilities face higher risks of violence. Services must meet accessibility needs and provide inclusive support.
Kiswahili: Watu wenye ulemavu wanakabiliwa na hatari kubwa zaidi za vurugu. Huduma lazima zikidhi mahitaji ya ufikiaji na kutoa usaidizi jumuishi.
Ekegusii: Abanto abaremaru nigo bagokorerwa bobe kobua abanto bande. Ogokonywa kobarengete goika goikeranie buna bagoikerwa nokogania kwabo ase bonsi.
Dholuo: Joma odak kod ng'ol romo gi pek mang'eny e geng'o ywarruok. Omiyo chike nyaka bedi mapuodho ratiro gi
Somali: Adeegyada waa inay daboolaan baahiyaha dadka naafada ah ee khatarta ugu weyn ee rabshadaha la kulmi karo waxayna bixiyaan taageero buuxda.

English: Refugee and displaced populations require protection measures and community involvement to reduce violence risks.
Kiswahili: Wakimbizi na watu waliohamishwa makazi yao wanahitaji hatua za ulinzi na ushirikishwaji wa jamii ili kupunguza hatari za vurugu.
Ekegusii: Abanto baria abatemete chisegi korwa sobo na baria baseretigwe korwa ase abrenge ase chisegi chigesiasa nobogekaku mbaganetie chinhera buna bakorendwa ase okobwaterana nebinyoro gokeania gokorerwa bobe.
Dholuo: Joma oringo thuchegi onego omi arita kue margi kuonde mag gidake
Somali: Qaxootiga iyo dadka hoy la'aanta ah waxay u baahan yihiin tallaabooyin difaaca iyo ka qaybgalka bulshada si loo yareeyo khatarta rabshadaha.

English: Correctional facilities must prevent sexual violence and respond effectively to any incidents.
Kiswahili: Vituo vya kurekebisha tabia lazima vizuie unyanyasaji wa kijinsia na vishughulikie kwa ufanisi matukio yoyote.
Ekegusii: Chichera goika chitange ogokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki oro na korwa egusuro korengana nokomocha kwabamochi.
Dholuo: Ute mag twech nyaka geng' timbe mahundu mag nindruok
Somali: Qalabka isbeddelka habdhaqanka waa in laga hortagaa rabshadaha galmada iyo in wax laga qabto dhacdo kasta.

English: Technology-facilitated abuse requires digital security training and documentation skills for affected individuals.
Kiswahili: Matumizi mabaya yanayowezeshwa na teknolojia yanahitaji mafunzo ya usalama wa kidijitali na ujuzi wa uandishi wa nyaraka kwa watu walioathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Ogokorerwa bobe goetra eintaneti neganetie oborendi bwegedichitari goetera ogosomia nenchera engiya yokorika na kogacha amang'ana ase bari bakoreire bobe.
Dholuo: Tiego joma tiyo gi mbui en yo maber mar geng'o ywarruok kata dhao manyalowuok kuonde gi
Somali: Dhibaatooyinka tikniyoolajiyadda waxay u baahan yihiin tababar ku saabsan amniga dijitaalka ah iyo aqoonta qoraalka dadka ay saameyn ku yeelatay.

English: Community-based prevention programs mobilize local leaders and groups to create safer environments.
Kiswahili: Programu za kuzuia zinazozingatia jamii huhamasisha viongozi wa eneo husika na vikundi ili kuunda mazingira salama zaidi.
Ekegusii: Oborendi goetera emeroberio yebinyoro goetra okoreta abarai nebiombe amo korora nga abanto bonsi mbuya bare kera ase bare.
Dholuo: Chenro mag geng'o ywarruok e gwenge nyala chwal jotelo mondo giriwre e kwedo dhao kod achaya
Somali: Barnaamijyada ka hortagga bulshada waxay isu keenaan hoggaamiyeyaasha deegaanka iyo kooxaha bulshada si ay u abuuraan jawi ammaan badan.

English: Institutions must coordinate across sectors to provide effective, compassionate responses to survivors.
Kiswahili: Taasisi lazima ziratibu katika sekta mbalimbali ili kutoa majibu yenye ufanisi na huruma kwa waathirika.
Ekegusii: Chinsemo chiserikari ao ao goika kobwaterana korwa obokonyi obuya nobwanchani ase abakoreirwe bobe.
Dholuo: Oganda onego oriw lwedo tije mopogore opogore mondo ojiw joma osekale masira
Somali: Hay'adaha waa inay isugu yimaadaan qaybaha kala duwan si ay uga jawaabaan dadka badbaaday.

English: Research strengthens program design and policy by generating evidence on effective prevention and response strategies.
Kiswahili: Utafiti huimarisha muundo na sera za programu kwa kutoa ushahidi kuhusu mikakati madhubuti ya kuzuia na kukabiliana na athari.
Ekegusii: Amasomo okorigia chisemi chinyia, kobanga emeroberio na korosia amachiko goetera obomanyi obwo koba nechinguru gotanga gokorerwa bobe.
Dholuo: Nonro jiwo chenro kod chike mag geng'o ywarruok kod yore mag geng'ogi
Somali: Cilmi-baaristu waxay xoojineysaa qorsheynta barnaamijyada iyo siyaasadaha iyada oo la siinayo caddayn ku saabsan hababka wax ku oolka ah ee ka hortagga iyo falcelinta.

English: Women in politics face violence aimed at limiting participation. Electoral laws protect candidates and voters from gender-based harm.
Kiswahili: Wanawake katika siasa wanakabiliwa na vurugu zinazolenga kupunguza ushiriki. Sheria za uchaguzi huwalinda wagombea na wapiga kura kutokana na madhara yanayotokana na jinsia.
Ekegusii: Obakungu bagokora siasa nigo bagokorerwa bobe korengete gokeania esiasa yabo gochia ase abasqacha. Amachiko obochori nkorenda are abarigia chikura nabaaki chikura korwa gokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki bare.
Dholuo: Mon ma tiyo e siasa kale ywarruok mokel kod achaya omiyo nitie chike mag konyogi tiyo gi kue
Somali: Haweenka ku jira siyaasadda waxay la kulmaan rabshado lagu doonayo inay yareeyaan ka qaybgalka. Xeerarka doorashooyinka waxay ka ilaaliyaan musharaxiinta iyo codbixiyayaasha waxyeelada galmada.

English: Healthcare facilities must screen for violence and provide safe and comprehensive responses for survivors.
Kiswahili: Vituo vya huduma ya afya lazima vichunguze vurugu na kutoa majibu salama na ya kina kwa waathirika.
Ekegusii: Ase abanto bakobwenerigwa goikbapime ekerengo omonto okoreire bobe na korwa obobwenia boisaine naende obuya.
Dholuo: Ute mag thieth nyaka non joma kale mahundu kendo chiwo dwoko makare mag kaka kinyalo yudo kony
Somali: Xarumaha daryeelka caafimaadka waa inay lahaadaan shaashad ka hortagga rabshadaha waxayna bixiyaan jawaab ammaan ah oo wax ku ool ah kuwa ka badbaaday.

English: Public transport systems must address harassment through staff training and appropriate response measures.
Kiswahili: Mifumo ya usafiri wa umma lazima ishughulikie unyanyasaji kupitia mafunzo ya wafanyakazi na hatua zinazofaa za kukabiliana.
Ekegusii: Abarai bechirori chikobogori abanto goika chitange ebikoru biokogosereria goetera ogosomia bakori emeremo babo na korwa egesusuro ase abamochi.
Dholuo: Nyamburko mag raia nyaka tim kinda mondo gitiek ywarruok kod dhaw kuom tiego jotich kendo kawo okang' mowinjore
Somali: Nidaamyada gaadiidka dadweynaha waa inay wax ka qabtaan dhibaatada tababarka shaqaalaha iyo tallaabooyinka saxda ah ee looga jawaabi karo.

English: Women in agriculture face distinct risks. Cooperatives should adopt prevention policies and reporting options.
Kiswahili: Wanawake katika kilimo wanakabiliwa na hatari tofauti. Vyama vya ushirika vinapaswa kupitisha sera za kuzuia na chaguzi za kuripoti.
Ekegusii: Abakungu bagokora emeremo ase oboremi nigo bare ase okonyorwa nemechando yabeene. Ebiombe bioboremi nere buya bitabe amachiko yogotanga nenchera yokorwa chiripoti.
Dholuo: Mon ma tiyo e tij pur romo gi pek mopogore opogore. Migepe pur nyaka jiw arito jopur mamon
Somali: Haweenka beeraha ah waxay la kulmaan khataro kala duwan. Xisbiyadu waa inay isticmaalaan siyaasadaha ka hortagga iyo warbixinta doorashooyinka kala duwan.

English: High-density informal settlements require community-led safety efforts to reduce violence.
Kiswahili: Makazi yasiyo rasmi yenye msongamano mkubwa yanahitaji juhudi za usalama zinazoongozwa na jamii ili kupunguza vurugu.
Ekegusii: Abanto bamenyete chirandi mabaganetie okobwaterana newbinyoro erio gokeania chiburaburu.
Dholuo: Joma odak e mier ma nigi ji mang'eny ahinya dwaro ni ji otim kinda mondo gikony e tieko timbe mahundu.
Somali: Guryaha qaaliga ah ee aan rasmi ahayn waxay u baahan yihiin dadaal ammaan ah si loo yareeyo rabshadaha.

English: Older women experience specific forms of abuse. Caregiver training supports prevention and protection.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wazee hupata aina maalum za unyanyasaji. Mafunzo ya walezi husaidia kuzuia na kulinda.
Ekegusii: Abangina abagotu nigo bagokorerwa bobe enchera ching'ao. Egeria baria babarendete buna enchera eyemo yogotanga gokorerwa bobe na kobarenda.
Dholuo: Ng'eny deye kale mahundu e, kendo tiego joma ritogi konyo e geng'o timbe maricho
Somali: Dumarka waayeelka ah waxaa lagu xadgudbaa noocyo kala duwan.

English: Religious institutions influence community norms. Clergy training and counseling support safe and equitable environments.
Kiswahili: Taasisi za kidini zinaathiri kanuni za jamii. Mafunzo na ushauri nasaha wa makasisi huunga mkono mazingira salama na yenye usawa.
Ekegusii: Chidini ngosegeta chire buna ebinyoro bikorosia amachiko ekemira. Gosomia barai bechidini nigo egokonya gosegeta ababwatai babo korenda amasingira.
Dholuo: Riwruok mag dinde chiko chike mag oganda. Tiego jotend din kendo chiwo puonj konyo mondo ji obed gi ngima maber.
Somali: Ururada diintu waxay saameyn ku yeeshaan dhaqanka bulshada, tababarka wadaaddana wuxuu dhiirigelinayaa jawi ammaan ah oo ku habboon.

English: Sports programs must prevent harassment, abuse, and hazing through clear boundaries and reporting procedures.
Kiswahili: Programu za michezo lazima zizuie unyanyasaji, unyanyasaji, na unyanyasaji kupitia mipaka iliyo wazi na taratibu za kuripoti.
Ekegusii: Emeroberio yechigori goika ekonye gotanga ebikoru bikogosereri agose bikogechi, gose bikorasimisa omonto gosoa na chinchera chiokoripoti ayio.
Dholuo: Chenro mag tuke onego ne ni hinyruok onge, kendo onego oket chenro mar chiwo ripot.
Somali: Barnaamijyada isboortiga waa inay ka hortagaan dhibaataynta, xadgudubka, iyo in ay ku xadgudbaan xuduudaha iyo warbixinnada si tartiib tartiib ah loo sameeyo.

English: Hospitality venues should recognize and address risks such as trafficking and harassment while protecting guests and staff.
Kiswahili: Maeneo ya ukarimu yanapaswa kutambua na kushughulikia hatari kama vile usafirishaji haramu wa binadamu na unyanyasaji huku yakiwalinda wageni na wafanyakazi.
Ekegusii: Aase abanto bakoriera chindagera buna emebogani nere buya komanya na gotanga emechado eyio buna kobetereria gose kobasoi ase obosomba bwechinguru, kobatumia ase chinchera chiogokora obwanchani koegwa chibesa nayande, kobarenda abageni and nabakori emeremo babo.
Dholuo: Kembe mag rwako welo onego ong'e kendo oti gi yore mopogore opogore mag rito welo kod jotichgi.
Somali: Goobaha martigelinta waa inay aqoonsadaan khataraha sida xadgudubka iyo xadgudubka isla markaana ay ilaaliyaan martida iyo shaqaalaha.

English: Fishing industry environments pose risks of exploitation. Safety improvements at docks support worker protection.
Kiswahili: Mazingira ya tasnia ya uvuvi yana hatari ya unyonyaji. Maboresho ya usalama kwenye gati yanaunga mkono ulinzi wa wafanyakazi.
Ekegusii: Emeremo yoborubi chinswe yaretire obwoba bwokorerwa bobe na koriananigwa. Gokongia oborendi aaria ase chinswe chigoikerigwa korwa obwato ngosira ere oborendi bwabokori emeremo.
Dholuo: ohala mar lupo nyalo ting'o jonjore moloyo ka onge chike mageng'o timbe mahundu
Somali: Meelaha kalluumeysiga ayaa khatar ku ah isticmaalka xadgudubka, horumarinta amniga dekedda ayaa taageeraya ilaalinta shaqaalaha.

English: Women living with HIV face increased risks and barriers. Integrated health, counseling, and legal services provide essential support.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wanaoishi na VVU wanakabiliwa na hatari na vikwazo vilivyoongezeka. Huduma jumuishi za afya, ushauri nasaha, na sheria hutoa msaada muhimu.
Ekegusii: Abakungi bawate endwari yenyamoreo mbwango konyorwa nobobe nebitango. Obobwenia ase oboamo, obosemia, amo nogokonywa kemachiko nkorwabire ogokonya kwabeene.
Dholuo: Mon ma nigi tuo mar HIV yudo pek mang'eny minyalogeng' gi chik kod chenro marito ngima gi
Somali: Haweenka qaba fayraska AIDS waxay la kulmaan khataro iyo caqabado badan.

English: Mining areas require strict policies and safety measures to prevent harassment and exploitation.
Kiswahili: Maeneo ya uchimbaji madini yanahitaji sera kali na hatua za usalama ili kuzuia unyanyasaji na unyonyaji.
Ekegusii: Okorema amadini nigo koganetie amachiko amaikeranu noborendi gotanga okorera abande bobe, kogechi gose gochaya nakobarianania .
Dholuo: Kuonde mag kunyo mwandu dwaro ni ji oluw chike kod rit motegno mondo ogeng' ywarruok
Somali: Goobaha macdanta lagu qodo waxay u baahan yihiin siyaasado adag iyo tallaabooyin ammaan ah si looga hortago dhibaatada iyo xadgudubka.

English: Market environments must establish reporting systems and committees to prevent harassment and extortion.
Kiswahili: Mazingira ya soko lazima yaanzishe mifumo na kamati za kuripoti ili kuzuia unyanyasaji na ulaghai.
Ekegusii: Chichiro goika chibe nemeroberio egokonya abanyabiasara korwa okwemurangania kwabo gotanga gokorerwa bobe, kiogechigwa, kogosererigwa gose kobetererigwa gkorwa chibesa.
Dholuo: Mondo omi kik hiny ji kendo kik gimi ji thuolo mar timo kamano, dwarore ni olos chenro mag chiwo ripot kod komiti.
Somali: Ganacsigu waa inuu abuuraa nidaamyada warbixinta iyo guddiyada kala duwan si looga hortago dhibaatada khayaaliga.

English: Residential facilities for persons with disabilities require strong safeguards and accessible education on rights and reporting.
Kiswahili: Vifaa vya makazi kwa watu wenye ulemavu vinahitaji ulinzi mkali na elimu inayopatikana kwa urahisi kuhusu haki na utoaji wa taarifa.
Ekegusii: Aase abanto bamenyete na mono baria bare noborema chinchera chiokobarenda chingiya nchiganeirie na kobakonya goikera chisemi chioboronge na buna baranyare goteba ekero bakoreirwe bobe.
Dholuo: Ute oma odak gi ng'ol onego obed gi rit motegno kendo gibed gi thuolo mar yudo puonj e wi wach ratiro mag gi kod chiwo ripot.
Somali: Qalabka muhiimka ah ee dadka naafada ah waxay u baahan yihiin ilaalinta adag iyo waxbarasho la heli karo oo ku saabsan caddaaladda iyo warbixinta.

English: Higher education institutions must address campus sexual violence through comprehensive strategies and anonymous reporting.
Kiswahili: Taasisi za elimu ya juu lazima zishughulikie unyanyasaji wa kijinsia chuoni kupitia mikakati kamili na kuripoti bila majina.
Ekegusii: Chiyunifasiti goika chitange okobetereria, okogosereria gose gokorera abande bobe ekiagera eki bare goetera okomanyia abarai beyunifasiti otari kwemanyekani.
Dholuo: Skunde mag tiegruok nyaka ti gi yore mag puonjo mahundu mag nindruok e skunde ka gitiyo gi yore ma ok nyis nying.
Somali: Hay'adaha tacliinta sare waa in ay ka hortagaan rabshadaha galmada ee jaamacadaha iyagoo adeegsanaya farsamooyin casri ah oo ay soo sheegaan dhacdooyinka aan la garanayn.

English: Refugee camps must prioritize safety planning, adequate lighting, and women’s participation in governance.
Kiswahili: Kambi za wakimbizi lazima zitoe kipaumbele katika kupanga usalama, taa za kutosha, na ushiriki wa wanawake katika utawala.
Ekegusii: Aaria chikambi chia baria batamire chisegi korwa chinsobo goika baroberie igoro yoborendi, oborabu boisaine ase chikambi chiabo, na gosangia abangina ase emeroberio yoborendi bwabo.
Dholuo: Kampe mag joma oringo thuchegi nyaka ket motelo chenro mar rito ngima, ler mowinjore, koda konyo mon e locho.
Somali: Xeryaha qaxootiga waa inay horay u sameeyaan qorshe ammaan ah, nalal ku filan, iyo haweenka wadaadada ah inay ka qaybqaataan maamulka.

English: Government workplaces must maintain zero tolerance for harassment through training, accountability, and independent reporting systems.
Kiswahili: Sehemu za kazi za serikali lazima zidumishe uvumilivu wowote kwa unyanyasaji kupitia mafunzo, uwajibikaji, na mifumo huru ya kuripoti.
Ekegusii: Aaria chiofisi chieserikari ase abanto bagokorera emeremo goika chitange ogokorerwa bobe, kobabetereria gose kobagosereria oetera okobasomia, obotenereri, nechinchera chiokorwa okwemurangania kwabo.
Dholuo: Ofise mag sirkal nyaka geng' sand ma dhi mbele kuonde tich, ka gitiyo gi tiegruok, timo migepe, kod chenro mag chiwo ripot ma onge gi ratiro.
Somali: Goobaha shaqada dawladdu waa inay sii wadaan dulqaadka dhibaatada iyada oo loo marayo tababar, mas'uuliyad, iyo nidaamyada warbixinta ee xor ah.

English: Climate disasters increase risks of violence. Preparedness must include violence risk assessments and mitigation actions.
Kiswahili: Maafa ya hali ya hewa huongeza hatari za vurugu. Utayari lazima ujumuishe tathmini za hatari za vurugu na hatua za kupunguza athari.
Ekegusii: Emechando yogoonchoreria kwerire nigo egosegeta abanto gokorerwa bobe. Emeroberio yogwetanga nayio goika erigererie ebinto biragere ogkorerwa bobe gose kogosererigwa na buna baranyare gotangwa.
Dholuo: Masira mabiro kaluwore gi lokruok yamo medo mahundu. Ikruok nyaka ng'I yore mag geng'o mahundu
Somali: Musiibada cimilada waxay kordhineysaa khatarta rabshadaha.

English: Children face online risks. Parents should monitor use, apply controls, and teach safe behavior.
Kiswahili: Watoto wanakabiliwa na hatari mtandaoni. Wazazi wanapaswa kufuatilia matumizi, kutumia vidhibiti, na kuwafundisha tabia salama.
Ekegusii: Abana mbare ase hatari goetera eintaneti. Abaibori goika bamongere buna abana babo bagotumia eintaneti, batabge na komanyia abana babo chinchera chingiya chibaretere emechando.
Dholuo: Jonyuol onego onon kaka nyithindo tiyo gi Intanet, gibed gi ritruok, kendo gipuonj nyithindgi bedo gi timbe mabeyo.
Somali: Carruurtu waxay khatar ku yihiin Internetka.

English: Suspected child abuse should be reported immediately to police or through the *116# anonymous helpline.
Kiswahili: Unyanyasaji unaoshukiwa kwa watoto unapaswa kuripotiwa mara moja kwa polisi au kupitia simu ya usaidizi ya *116# isiyojulikana.
Ekegusii: Abana ekageire gokorerwa bobe gose gotibongwa goika eripoti erugwe gotachererwa gochia ase abasikari goetera enamba eye yesimi *116# otari kwemanyekania.
Dholuo: Ka ng'ato paro ni osetimne nyithindo timbe maricho, onego onyis polis mapiyo kata kokalo kuom simo mar kony mar *116#.
Somali: Xadgudubka carruurta waa in isla markiiba la soo sheegaa booliska ama bogga aan la garanayn *116 #.

English: Child trafficking remains a major threat. Communities should report suspicious activity to authorities.
Kiswahili: Usafirishaji haramu wa watoto bado ni tishio kubwa. Jamii zinapaswa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa mamlaka.
Ekegusii: Ogosoi abana ase ebinto bitancheiri, kobatamia gose kobabisa erio kobatumia ase chinchera chitabwenereti neringa rinene riokogosia. Ebinyoro goika birwe amang'ana igiro yebinto bare nechitangutangu ase abagambi gose abasikari.
Dholuo: Dhano ma tiyo gi nyithindo kaka joma terore pod dhi nyime bedo gi chandruok maduong'.
Somali: Ganacsiga caruurta ayaa weli ah khatar weyn, bulshooyinka waa inay u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada shakiga leh mas'uuliyiinta.

English: Schools must implement protection policies, anti-bullying systems, and counseling services to safeguard learners.
Kiswahili: Shule lazima zitekeleze sera za ulinzi, mifumo ya kupambana na uonevu, na huduma za ushauri nasaha ili kuwalinda wanafunzi.
Ekegusii: Chisukuru goika chiikerania amachiko oborendi, gokorera abana abande bobe, na korwa obosemia erio korenda abana buya.
Dholuo: Skunde onego oket chenro mag rito nyithindo, chenro mag kedo gi ichwanyruok, koda chiwo puonj mondo oritgo nyithindgi.
Somali: Dugsiyada waa inay adeegsadaan siyaasadaha difaaca, nidaamyada ka hortagga burburka, iyo adeegyada la-talinta ardayda.

English: Foster caregivers must be vetted to ensure safe environments for vulnerable children.
Kiswahili: Walezi wa watoto wa kulea lazima wachunguzwe ili kuhakikisha mazingira salama kwa watoto walio katika mazingira magumu.
Ekegusii: Abaibori abarendi babana barigererigwa buya bataraegwa abana korenda erio korenda nga abana baria abake batanyare kwerenda.
Dholuo: Onego onon joma rito nyithindo ma ok nyal yudo kony mondo omi nyithindgi obed gi ngima maber.
Somali: Dadka daryeela xubnaha jirka waa in la shaqeeyaa si loo hubiyo in caruurta si fudud u dhaawacmay ay u helaan meel ammaan ah.

English: Child marriage harms children’s health and future. Communities must report cases and support girls’ education.
Kiswahili: Ndoa za utotoni hudhuru afya na mustakabali wa watoto. Jamii lazima ziripoti visa na kuunga mkono elimu ya wasichana.
Ekegusii: Enywomo yabana abake nigo egosaria afia yabana nobogima bwabo bwa motwe. Abanto goika barwe eripoti igoro yobobe obwo na gosira chisemi chiomwana omonyaroka.
Dholuo: Kend mar nyithindo nyalo ketho ngima nyithindo e kinde mabiro.
Somali: Guurka carruurtu waxay dhaawac u geystaan caafimaadka iyo mustaqbalka carruurta Rasuullada.

English: Children experiencing trauma need psychological support available through free counseling services.
Kiswahili: Watoto wanaopitia kiwewe wanahitaji usaidizi wa kisaikolojia unaopatikana kupitia huduma za ushauri nasaha bila malipo.
Ekegusii: Abana bare ase ogochandeka bwebirengererio mbagabeti ogokonywa kobakonya gokinania omochando oyio bosa goetera chinkwana nomonyagitari konyora chinguru chiogokinana nebirengererio.
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma nigi tuwo mar obwongo dwaro kony ma ginyalo yudo kuom weche mag paro kokalo kuom kony ma onge chudo.
Somali: Carruurta niyadjabka qaba waxay u baahan yihiin caawimaad maskaxeed oo la heli karo adeegyada la-talinta bilaashka ah.

English: Street-connected children require shelters, education, and reintegration programs for safety and development.
Kiswahili: Watoto wanaohusiana na mitaa wanahitaji malazi, elimu, na programu za kuwaunganisha tena na jamii kwa ajili ya usalama na maendeleo.
Ekegusii: Abana baria banarete obogima bwokobera ebisona ase chitaoni mbaganetie ase bakorara, chisemi, nemeroberio yokobairania chinka chiabo ase oborendi namagenderero.
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma onge kuonde dak dwaro kuonde dak, somo, koda chenro mag duogo e ngima mar joot mondo gibed gi ritruok kod dongruok.
Somali: Carruurta waddooyinka ku nool waxay u baahan yihiin hoy, waxbarasho, iyo barnaamijyo si ay dib u xoojiyaan nabadgelyada iyo horumarka.

English: Child labor is illegal. Report hazardous child work to the Labour Department or call 0800220444.
Kiswahili: Ajira kwa watoto ni kinyume cha sheria. Ripoti kazi hatarishi kwa watoto kwa Idara ya Kazi au piga simu 0800220444.
Ekegusii: Obosomba bwabana mamincha yerichiko. Karwe eripoti igoro yabana bare ase emeremo eranyare kobaretera emechando gochia chiofisi chitenererete obokori emeremo gose goaka esimi 0800220444.
Dholuo: Miyo nyithindo tije matek manyalo geng'o dongruokgi en wach ma chik odagi. Chiw ripot e namba 0800220444
Somali: Warbixin ku saabsan shaqada khatarta ah ee carruurta ee Wasaaradda Shaqaalaha ama wac 082204444.

English: Children involved in legal processes should receive specialized legal aid through the Office of the Director of Public Prosecutions.
Kiswahili: Watoto wanaohusika katika michakato ya kisheria wanapaswa kupokea msaada maalum wa kisheria kupitia Ofisi ya Mkurugenzi wa Mashtaka ya Umma.
Ekegusii: Abana abwo bare ase okoariganigwa gotamigwa mamincha yerichiko neganeirie konyora obokonyi mwachiko bosa goetera ofisi yomoteneneri bwobosoi ebina (ODPP).
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma wechegi iloso gi jood bura mag nyithindo onego oyud kony ma ichiwo kokalo kuom ofis mar Jatend Josed bura.
Somali: Carruurta ku lug leh nidaamyada sharciga waa inay helaan caawimaad sharci oo gaar ah Xafiiska Xeer Ilaaliyaha Dadweynaha.

English: Children should learn to protect personal information online and report suspicious interactions to trusted adults.
Kiswahili: Watoto wanapaswa kujifunza kulinda taarifa binafsi mtandaoni na kuripoti miingiliano inayotiliwa shaka kwa watu wazima wanaowaamini.
Ekegusii: Nere buya abana kwegera buna baranyare korenda amangana abo arikire are ase eintaneti na komanyia oyo begenete igoro yechitang'utang'u.
Dholuo: Nyithindo onego opuonjre rito weche ma gin-go e Intanet kendo ginyis joma dongo ma gigeno weche ma kamago.
Somali: Carruurtu waa inay bartaan sida loo ilaaliyo macluumaadka shakhsi ahaaneed ee internetka iyo inay xiriirka shakiga leh u sheegaan dadka waaweyn ee la isku halleyn karo.

English: Domestic violence harms children. Report incidents to local authorities or child helplines.
Kiswahili: Vurugu za nyumbani huwadhuru watoto. Ripoti matukio kwa mamlaka za mitaa au simu za usaidizi kwa watoto.
Ekegusii: Chiburaburu chiekenyomba nigo chikoumisa gose gosaria abana. Karwe amangana igoro yaya gochia abagambi gose chiofosi chieserikari chirendete abana.
Dholuo: Dhaw e udi nyalo hinyo nyithindo. Omiyo jonyuol onego ochiw ripot kagiparo ni nitie nyithindo misando
Somali: Rabshadaha guryaha ayaa carruurta waxyeeleeya.

English: Government and NGOs support orphaned children with essential services. Adoption and foster care follow legal guidelines.
Kiswahili: Serikali na mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali huwasaidia watoto yatima kwa huduma muhimu. Uasili na malezi ya watoto wa kambo hufuata miongozo ya kisheria.
Ekegusii: Eserikari na NGOs ngokonya chire abana chitankana ase okobakonya ase chinchera ao ao chiengencho. Buna okogora abana ase enchera yamachiko gochia abaibiri bakabere na kobabwatia kemachiko komanya ng'a mbuya barendete abana abwo.
Dholuo: Sirkal kod riwruoge maok mag sirkal konyo nyithindo ma nyithi kiye gi tije madwarore.
Somali: Dowladaha iyo Hay'adaha aan dawliga ahayn waxay carruurta agoonta ah u taageeraan daryeel muhiim ah.

English: Every child has rights to education, healthcare, and protection. Communities must report violations.
Kiswahili: Kila mtoto ana haki ya kupata elimu, huduma ya afya, na ulinzi. Jamii lazima ziripoti ukiukwaji.
Ekegusii: Kera omwana nare noboronge bwokonyora chisemi, obobwenia, na oborendi. Abanto goika barwe eripoti igoro yotaikeranigwa kwayio.
Dholuo: Nyathi ka nyathi nigi ratiro mar yudo somo, thieth, kod rit.
Somali: Cunug kastaa wuxuu xaq u leeyahay waxbarasho, daryeel caafimaad, iyo ilaalinta. Bulshadu waa inay soo sheegaan xadgudubyada sharciga.

English: Bullying leads to depression and school dropouts. Schools must enforce strict anti-bullying policies and provide counseling for affected children.
Kiswahili: Unyanyasaji husababisha mfadhaiko na kuacha shule. Shule lazima zitekeleze sera kali za kupambana na uonevu na kutoa ushauri nasaha kwa watoto walioathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Ogokorera abande bobe nigo gokoreta ogochandeka kwebirengererio, ogoichania goika gotiga amasomo. Chisukuru nere buya kobeka amachiko amakong'u gotanga ogokorera abande bobe na korwa obosemia ase abana baria bakoreirwe bobe.
Dholuo: Sando nyithindo e skunde miyo giweyo somo. Omiyo nyaka mi nyithindo puon mabeyo ewi rach ma sandruok kelo
Somali: Xadgudubku wuxuu keenaa niyad jab iyo joojinta dugsiga. Dugsiyada waa inay hirgeliyaan siyaasado adag oo ka hortagga burburka iyo inay la talinayaan carruurta ay waxyeeladu saameysay.

English: In disasters (floods, fires), children are most vulnerable. Ensure they are evacuated safely and receive psychosocial support.
Kiswahili: Katika majanga (mafuriko, moto), watoto ndio walio hatarini zaidi. Hakikisha wanahamishwa salama na wanapata usaidizi wa kisaikolojia.
Ekegusii: Ekero kiemebasekano buna (etoigo, nopgwateka kwemerero), abana nabwo bagochandeka mono ekiagera batari naguru chigokonya. Rora ng'a batammigwe gose korusigwa aroro buya na bae ogokonywa kwebirengererio goetra okobakwanera.
Dholuo: Sama masira moro otimore (yamo, mach, kod mamoko), nyithindo ema nyalo bedo gi chandruok ahinya.
Somali: Haddii ay dhacdo musiibooyin (dhacdooyin, dab), carruurta ayaa ugu nugul inay waxyeelo u geystaan.

English: Sexual predators target children online and offline. Parents should monitor interactions and teach children about body safety.
Kiswahili: Wanyanyasaji wa kingono huwalenga watoto mtandaoni na nje ya mtandao. Wazazi wanapaswa kufuatilia mwingiliano na kuwafundisha watoto kuhusu usalama wa miili yao.
Ekegusii: Ebibago bitagete gokoria abana chingencho chiobonyaka nigo bikembete abana goetera eintaneti gose kobaikera abanyene. Nere buya abaibori komongera okoererania chinkwana chiabo na kobanyia igoro yoborendi bwomebere yabo.
Dholuo: Jonyuol onego onon tudruok ma nyithindo nigo e mbui gi jomamoko kendo gipuonj nyithindgi gik ma nyalo miyo gibed gi ngima maber.
Somali: Dhibaatooyinka galmada waxaa lagu beegsadaa carruurta iyada oo loo marayo Internetka iyo si aan toos ahayn.

English: Children with disabilities face higher risks of abuse. Ensure inclusive education and accessible reporting mechanisms for their protection.
Kiswahili: Watoto wenye ulemavu wanakabiliwa na hatari kubwa zaidi za unyanyasaji. Hakikisha elimu jumuishi na mifumo ya kuripoti inayopatikana kwa urahisi kwa ajili ya ulinzi wao.
Ekegusii: Abana bare noborema nigo ere raisi ase bare gokorerwa bobe. Rora nga abana bonsi ba kera engencho banyorire chisemi na buna baranyare komanyia igoro yogokorerwa bobe ase oborendi bwabo.
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma nigi midekre yudo pek mang'eny e kwedo timbe njore.
Somali: Carruurta naafada ah ayaa khatarta ugu weyn ee lagu xadgudbo.

English: Local communities should establish child protection committees to monitor and report abuse cases, working closely with government agencies.
Kiswahili: Jamii za wenyeji zinapaswa kuanzisha kamati za ulinzi wa watoto ili kufuatilia na kuripoti kesi za unyanyasaji, zikifanya kazi kwa karibu na mashirika ya serikali.
Ekegusii: Nere buya ebinyoro koba nechikomiti igoro yoborendi bwa abana chikomongera na koripoti buna abana kogorerwa bobe, gokora emeremo yabo ase ase okobwaterana nebiombe bieserikari.
Dholuo: Oganda manie alwora onego ochak komiti mag rito nyithindo kuom weche mag nindruok, ka gitiyo machiegni gi migepe mag sirkal.
Somali: Bulshooyinka deegaanka waa inay sameeyaan guddiyada ilaalinta carruurta si ay u baartaan oo u soo sheegaan dhacdooyinka xadgudubka, iyagoo si dhow ula shaqeeya hay'adaha dowladda.

English: The Kenya Police have specialized desks to handle child-related cases with sensitivity and confidentiality. Report cases at any police station.
Kiswahili: Polisi wa Kenya wana madawati maalum ya kushughulikia kesi zinazohusiana na watoto kwa unyeti na usiri. Ripoti kesi katika kituo chochote cha polisi.
Ekegusii: Chipori stesheni nchire negetengo kiabeen kegosugurikia buna abana bakomecherwa buna ogoakwa, ogotibongwa, obosomba, okoiba gose gokengania abana ase enchera chiobosani nabana na erendete obobisi bwabana. Karwe eripoti ase porisi stesheni ende yonsi.
Dholuo: Polise ma Kenya nigi grube makende motieg ne konyo weche motudore gi nyithindo, kow ripot ka polis mondo nyithindo makale masiragi oyud konyruok
Somali: Booliska Kenya waxay leeyihiin xafiisyo gaar ah oo lagu xakameynayo kiisaska caruurta si xasaasi ah oo qarsoodi ah.

English: Neglect harms a child's development. Parents and guardians must provide basic needs, love, and security to prevent long-term trauma.
Kiswahili: Kupuuza huharibu ukuaji wa mtoto. Wazazi na walezi lazima watoe mahitaji ya msingi, upendo, na usalama ili kuzuia majeraha ya muda mrefu.
Ekegusii: Ogotarenda gose koa omwana ebinto atagete nigo ekogocha ogokina na okogenderera kwomwana. Abaibori nabarendi babana goika bae abana babo ebi bakonyara, buna obwanchani, noborendi gotanga mechando yebirengererio nogochandeka ase engaki entambe.
Dholuo: Ka ng'ato ok dew nyathi, mano nyalo miyo odong gi chuny mangi lit.   Jonyuol kod jopuonj nyaka mi nyithindo arita kod hera
Somali: Haddii la dayaco waxay waxyeeleyneysaa koritaanka ilmaha. Waalidiinta iyo daryeelayaashu waa inay bixiyaan baahida aasaasiga ah, jacaylka, iyo badbaadada si looga hortago rabshadaha muddo dheer soconaya.

English: Refugee children are vulnerable to abuse and trafficking. Humanitarian agencies provide safe shelters and education in camps.
Kiswahili: Watoto wakimbizi wako katika hatari ya kudhulumiwa na kuuzwa nje ya nchi. Mashirika ya kibinadamu hutoa makazi salama na elimu katika kambi.
Ekegusii: Abana ba baria batamete chisegi korwa sobo igo ere raisi ase bare gokorerwa bobe gokenganigwa gose koibwa. Ebiombe bikorwanerera oboronge bwekemwanyabanto bieserikari nkorwa bire obomenyo obuya nechisemi aaria ase chikambi.
Dholuo: Oganda ma konyo joma oringo thuchegi nyalo yudo kuonde dak kod tiegruok e kambi.
Somali: Ururada xuquuqda aadanaha waxay xeryaha ku siiyaan hoy ammaan ah iyo waxbarasho.

English: Some communities still practice harmful traditions involving children. Report such cases to authorities immediately.
Kiswahili: Baadhi ya jamii bado zinafuata mila hatari zinazowahusisha watoto. Ripoti visa kama hivyo kwa mamlaka mara moja.
Ekegusii: Abanto bande mbagenderete gokora ebienyechi buna ogekeba abanyaroka ebio bire mamincha noboronge bwa abana. Karwe eripoti yamang'ana ayio gochia ase abambi otari konyorwa.
Dholuo: Nitie ogendini mapod luwo chike kod timbe manyalo hinyo nyithindo
Somali: Bulshooyinka qaarkood weli waxay raacaan caadooyin waxyeello u geysta carruurta.

English: Positive parenting reduces abuse risks. Attend government-sponsored parenting programs to learn child protection strategies.
Kiswahili: Uzazi chanya hupunguza hatari za unyanyasaji. Hudhuria programu za uzazi zinazofadhiliwa na serikali ili kujifunza mikakati ya ulinzi wa watoto.
Ekegusii: Oboreri obuya nigo bogokeania abana gokorerwa bobe. Soa gose kabe oyomo ase omoroberio bweserikari gosomigwa chinchera buna oranyare korenda abana.
Dholuo: Bedo janyuol maber miyo nyithindo dongo e yo makare nikech puonj kod hera magiyudo
Somali: Waalidiinta wanaagsan waxay yareeyaan khatarta xadgudubka.

English: Children involved in legal matters should go through specialized courts to ensure fair and trauma-sensitive proceedings.
Kiswahili: Watoto wanaohusika katika masuala ya kisheria wanapaswa kupitia mahakama maalum ili kuhakikisha kesi zinazowahusu watoto kwa haki na zinazowahusu kiwewe.
Ekegusii: Ebina birengete abana goika ebina biabo bigamberwe ase chikoti chiabeene korora ng'a biagendiigwe buya birendete gotatubania obongo naende korwa obobe bwabete.
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma nigi kes mopogore opogore onego odhi e kot makende mondo omi sirkal okaw okang' makare kendo ma ok okelo hinyruok.
Somali: Carruurta ku lug leh arrimaha sharciga waa inay u tagaan maxkamadaha gaarka ah si ay u xaqiijiyaan tallaabooyinka caddaaladda iyo ka hortagga dhacdooyinka rasmiga ah.

English: Underage drug use leads to crime and health issues. Schools and parents should educate children on substance abuse dangers.
Kiswahili: Matumizi ya dawa za kulevya kwa watoto wachanga husababisha uhalifu na matatizo ya kiafya. Shule na wazazi wanapaswa kuwaelimisha watoto kuhusu hatari za matumizi mabaya ya dawa za kulevya.
Ekegusii: Abana abake konywa amarwa nigo gokogesa obosaria nemechando ya afia. Nere buya chisukuru nabaibori basomie abana igoro yemachando yokonywa amarwa.
Dholuo: Miyo nyithindo yedhe mamero miyo gibed gi timbe mahundu kod chandruoge mag ngima.
Somali: Isticmaalka daroogada wuxuu keenaa dambiyo iyo dhibaatooyin caafimaad.

English: Dial 116 (Child Helpline) or 999 (Emergency) to report child abuse, neglect, or exploitation for immediate assistance.
Kiswahili: Piga 116 (Nambari ya Msaada kwa Mtoto) au 999 (Dharura) ili kuripoti unyanyasaji, kutelekezwa, au unyonyaji wa mtoto kwa msaada wa haraka.
Ekegusii: Aka esimi 116 (Obokonyi ase Abana) gose 999 (Emebasekano) komnyia igoro yogokorerwa bobe kwomwana, ogoserigwa gose okwangwa, gose koba ase obosomba erio onyore ogokonya kegima.
Dholuo: Ti gi namba 116 (Child Helpline) kata 999 (Emergency) mondo ichiw report mamulo wach nyithindo misando kata mojwang'ogi,  mondo ikonygi mapiyo.
Somali: Wac 116 ama 999 si aad u soo sheegto in carruurta lagu xadgudbay, la dayacay ama si xun loo adeegsaday.

English: Children in areas like Northern Kenya face abduction and recruitment into armed groups. Security agencies must prioritize their safety.
Kiswahili: Watoto katika maeneo kama Kaskazini mwa Kenya wanakabiliwa na utekaji nyara na kuajiriwa katika vikundi vyenye silaha. Mashirika ya usalama lazima yape kipaumbele usalama wao.
Ekegusii: Abana bare chinsemo chiria buna Kenya ya Irianyi nigo ere raisi ase bare koibwa na gosoigwa ase ebiombe biobokebago. Ebiombe bieserikari goika birwe birigerie ayio ase okobarenda.
Dholuo: Nyithindo manie alwora kaka Northern Kenya yudo ka ikwalo kendo iketo e grube mag lweny.
Somali: Carruurta ku nool gobollada sida Waqooyiga Kenya ayaa lagu afduubayaa loona diiwaangeliyaa kooxaha hubaysan.

English: Perpetrators of child abuse face severe penalties, including life imprisonment. Report offenders to ensure justice for victims.
Kiswahili: Wahalifu wa unyanyasaji wa watoto wanakabiliwa na adhabu kali, ikiwa ni pamoja na kifungo cha maisha jela. Waripoti wahalifu ili kuhakikisha haki kwa waathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Ebibago biria bigosaria abana mbirigereririe negesusuro ekenene, gosse giibwa maisa. Ripoti ebibago ebio ase okorigia ekeene ase baria bokoreirwe bobe.
Dholuo: Joma timbegi richo nyalo yudo kum mager moriwo nyaka twech mar ngima.
Somali: Kuwa caruurta ku xadgudba waxaa lagu ciqaabaa ciqaab daran, oo ay ku jiraan xabsi daa'in.

English: Schools in high-risk areas should have security measures to protect children from terrorist threats and abductions.
Kiswahili: Shule zilizo katika maeneo yenye hatari kubwa zinapaswa kuwa na hatua za usalama ili kuwalinda watoto dhidi ya vitisho vya kigaidi na utekaji nyara.
Ekegusii: Chisukuru chiria chire aase ere raisi abana gokorerwa bobe mbuya chibe nomoroberio omuya bwoborendi korenda abana korwa obwoba bwebibago koruta chipomu noboibi bwechiombe.
Dholuo: Skunde manie alwora ma makale masiche mang'eny onego obed gi chenro mag rito nyithindo kuom luoro mag jo mahundu
Somali: Dugsiyada gobollada sare waa in ay sameeyaan tallaabooyin ammaan ah si looga ilaaliyo carruurta khatarta argagixisada iyo afduubka.

English: Children's identities can be stolen for fraud. Parents should safeguard birth certificates and monitor credit reports.
Kiswahili: Utambulisho wa watoto unaweza kuibiwa kwa udanganyifu. Wazazi wanapaswa kulinda vyeti vya kuzaliwa na kufuatilia ripoti za mikopo.
Ekegusii: nabo ekonyarekana nga ebiband biabana bibwe gokorera obongainereria. Abaibori brende buya chisatificate chiokoiborwa chia abana babo no komongera buna chibesa chigosao chisimi chiabo.
Dholuo: Jonyuol onego otang' gi omahundu manyalotiyo gi satifiket nyithindgi mag nyuol e kwalo pesa
Somali: Carruurta waxaa laga qaadi karaa aqoonsiyada si ay u been abuuraan, waalidkuna waa inay ilaaliyaan shahaadooyinka dhalashada iyo warbixinnada amaahda.

English: Victims of sexual abuse need medical, legal, and psychological support. Specialized centers offer free services nationwide.
Kiswahili: Waathiriwa wa unyanyasaji wa kijinsia wanahitaji usaidizi wa kimatibabu, kisheria, na kisaikolojia. Vituo maalum hutoa huduma za bure kote nchini.
Ekegusii: Baria bakoreirwe bobe gose gotibongwa nere buya konyora obokonyi bwobobwenia, kemachiko, anakebirengererio. Chisenta chiegeirie gokora emeremo eyio nkorwa chire obokonyi bwa bosa Kenya engima.
Dholuo: Joma isando e yor nindruok dwaro kony mar thieth, chike, kod weche mag thieth.
Somali: Kuwa lagu xadgudbo galmada waxay u baahan yihiin caawimaad caafimaad, sharci iyo maskaxeed.

English: Many children drown in open water sources. Parents should supervise kids near pools, rivers, and wells.
Kiswahili: Watoto wengi huzama kwenye vyanzo vya maji vilivyo wazi. Wazazi wanapaswa kuwasimamia watoto karibu na madimbwi ya maji, mito, na visima.
Ekegusii: Abana abange nigo bkogwa nagokwera ime yechinsemo chiamache. Abaibiri goika barande abana babio ekero bare ange nase aria agoakerwa ontimbu, chindoche, amo nechinsoko.
Dholuo: Nyithindo mang'eny thoga e pi ma yudore e dho nam, kendo jonyuol onego orit nyithindgi machiegni gi yawo, aore, kod sokni.
Somali: Waalidiintu waxay u baahan yihiin inay carruurtooda ku ilaaliyaan meelaha ay ku yaalliin biyaha, webiyada iyo ceelasha.

English: Churches and mosques must vet staff and implement policies to prevent child abuse within their facilities.
Kiswahili: Makanisa na misikiti lazima yachunguze wafanyakazi na kutekeleza sera za kuzuia unyanyasaji wa watoto ndani ya vituo vyao.
Ekegusii: Chikanisa nemesikiti goika bakongori abakori emeremo babo na goikerania amachiko agotanga gokorera abana bobe imse yechinyomba chiikanisa gose emesikiti.
Dholuo: Kanise kod kuonde mag lemo nyaka non jotich kendo gitim chenro mar geng'o timbe mag nindruok e kind nyithindo.
Somali: Kaniisadaha iyo masaajidda waa in la isticmaalaa oo la hirgeliyaa siyaasadaha looga hortago in carruurta lagu xadgudbo guryahooda.

English: Media should avoid exposing children to harmful content and respect their privacy when reporting on abuse cases.
Kiswahili: Vyombo vya habari vinapaswa kuepuka kuwaweka watoto katika hatari ya kupata maudhui hatari na kuheshimu faragha yao wanaporipoti visa vya unyanyasaji.
Ekegusii: Abariki na baria bagotangasa amang'ana goika barende gotanga nga amangana agosaria abana ase ogotatora amarieta abo nase barwete ekero bakomanyia amangan buna abana bagokorerwa bobe.
Dholuo: Joot mag weche midwaro nyiso onego kik ginyis nyithindo gik manyalo hinyogi kendo onego giwinj pachgi sama giwuoyo e wi weche ma nyiso ni gitimonegi marach.
Somali: Warbaahinta waa inay ka fogaadaan inay carruurta u soo bandhigaan waxyaalo waxyeello leh waxayna ixtiraamaan asturnaantooda marka ay soo sheegaan dhacdooyinka xadgudubka.

English: Criminal gangs exploit children for begging. Report such cases to the police for rescue and rehabilitation.
Kiswahili: Magenge ya wahalifu huwanyanyasa watoto kwa kuombaomba. Ripoti kesi kama hizo kwa polisi kwa ajili ya uokoaji na ukarabati.
Ekegusii: Ebibago nigo bigotumia ribaga riabana gotenyara ase ogosaberera. Manyia abasikari kobakonya na kobarongei.
Dholuo: Jomahundu tiyo marach gi nyithindo ka gichunogi kwayo kony, omiyo onego ginyis polis wachno mondo oresgi .
Somali: Kooxaha dambiilayaashu waxay si xun u adeegsadaan carruurta inay tukadaan.

English: Ensure school vans are properly licensed and drivers vetted to prevent accidents and kidnappings.
Kiswahili: Hakikisha magari ya shule yana leseni ipasavyo na madereva wamechunguzwa ili kuzuia ajali na utekaji nyara.
Ekegusii: Rora nga chirori chisukuru nchuibwate chirensesi buya nomotereba buya achoretwe korenga gotanga emebasekano na koibwa kwa abana.
Dholuo: ng'iuru ni mtokni mag skul nigi ratiro mar ringo  kendo ni derebe nigi ratiro mar tiegruok  mondo kik gitim aksident
Somali: Gawaarida dugsiyadu waxay leeyihiin ruqsado wanaagsan, darawaladiina waxay ka hortagaan shilalka iyo afduubka.

English: Extremist groups target vulnerable children. Communities should report suspicious recruitment activities.
Kiswahili: Makundi yenye msimamo mkali yanawalenga watoto walio katika mazingira magumu. Jamii zinapaswa kuripoti shughuli za kuajiri zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Ebiobago biria bigosaria amongo abanto na kobaira obokebago bwokotuta chipomu nigo nigo birengete abana baria batari kwenyara gose korwa emchie emetaka . Abanto gioka barwe eripoti igoro yebinto bare nechitang'utang'u nabirobio gose okorikwa gosoa obokebago obwo.
Dholuo: Oganda ma kwedo Nyasaye temo ahinya mondo oso nyithindo e grube mahundu
Somali: Kooxaha sharci darada ah waxay bartilmaameedsadaan carruurta aan la ilaalin karin.

English: Hospitals should have trained staff to handle child abuse cases with confidentiality and care.
Kiswahili: Hospitali zinapaswa kuwa na wafanyakazi waliofunzwa kushughulikia kesi za unyanyasaji wa watoto kwa usiri na utunzaji.
Ekegusii: Chinyagitari mbuya koba nabakori emeremo begeirie gosugurikia ogokorerwa bobe kwabana ase obobisi obonene noborendi boisaine.
Dholuo: Osiptende onego obed gi joma otieg e kaka irito nyithindo e yo mariek kendo maonge luoro.
Somali: Isbitaalada waxaa loo baahan yahay inay shaqaalaha u tababaraan sidii ay uga hortagi lahaayeen kiisaska xadgudubka carruurta iyagoo sirta iyo daryeelka u haysta.

English: Teach children fire safety measures and ensure homes have working smoke detectors to prevent tragedies.
Kiswahili: Wafundishe watoto hatua za usalama wa moto na hakikisha nyumba zina vifaa vya kugundua moshi vinavyofanya kazi ili kuzuia majanga.
Ekegusii: Somia abana chinhera chiokwerenda nomorero na rora ng'a chinka chibwate egento keria gekomanya ekero erioki rireo erio gokonya gotanga emerero gwateka.
Dholuo: Puonj nyithindo kaka ginyalo rito mach mondo gigeng'  masiche.
Somali: Carruurta ku bar tallaabooyinka ammaanka iyo hubinta in guryaha ay leeyihiin qalab lagu ogaado qiiqa si looga hortago musiibooyinka.

English: Online games can expose children to predators. Parents should monitor gaming interactions and set time limits.
Kiswahili: Michezo ya mtandaoni inaweza kuwaweka watoto katika hatari ya kushambuliwa na wanyama wanaowawinda. Wazazi wanapaswa kufuatilia miingiliano ya michezo ya kubahatisha na kuweka mipaka ya muda.
Ekegusii: Chigosori chieintaneti nigo chigosuguma abana ang'e gochia ase ebibago biabo. Abaibori goika bamongere chingaki abana bakorrigereria chigosori na ase chinsa gete.
Dholuo: Tuke mitugo e mbui nyalo miyo nyithindo obed gi timbe maricho, omiyo jonyuol onego onon kaka nyithindgi tugo kodgi kendo ketnegi tong'
Somali: Ciyaaraha Internetka waxay caruurta u dhigi karaan xayawaan faraxsan.

English: Families should include children in disaster drills and ensure they know emergency contacts.
Kiswahili: Familia zinapaswa kuwajumuisha watoto katika mazoezi ya majanga na kuhakikisha wanawajua watu wa dharura.
Ekegusii: Chifamiri goika chisangie abana babo amo koroberia buna baranyare gotange omorero tibwateka sobo na ekero bwatekire ase bagotamera gochia nechinamba chiesimi barangerie konyora ogokonya.
Dholuo: Joot onego oriw nyithindo e tiegruok mag masiche kendo nyaka ging'e joma ginyalo tudorego gi joma nigi chandruok.
Somali: Qoysaska waa inay carruurtooda ku darsadaan tababarka musiibada iyo inay hubiyaan inay yaqaanaan xaaladaha degdegga ah.

English: Teach children stranger danger rules and ensure they travel in groups. Report missing children immediately.
Kiswahili: Wafundishe watoto sheria za hatari wageni na hakikisha wanasafiri kwa vikundi. Watoe taarifa kwa watoto waliopotea mara moja.
Ekegusii: Somia abana tibakwana omonto batamanyeti gose kobwatia amang'ana yomonto batamanyeti buna enchere engiya yokwerenda na gotara amo abanto abange. Karwe amangana igoro yomonto otaoyi otari konyorwa gochia ase abambi gose porisi.
Dholuo: Puonj nyithindo chike mag loso gi joma ok ging'eyo kendo iketgi e grube.
Somali: Carruurtu waa inay bartaan xeerarka khatarta ah ee aan caadiga ahayn oo ay hubiyaan in ay ku safraan kooxo.

English: Businesses must avoid employing children and support initiatives for their education instead.
Kiswahili: Biashara lazima ziepuke kuajiri watoto na badala yake ziunge mkono mipango ya elimu yao.
Ekegusii: Abanyabiasara goika barende tibarika abana buna abkori emeremo yabo korende basire emeroberio yogokonya ng'a bachire esukuru gosoma.
Dholuo: Ute ohala onego owe ndiko nyithindo tich. Ber ka gikonyo yor tiegruokgi
Somali: Ganacsigu waa in ay ka fogaadaan carruurta iyo mashaariicda lagu taageero waxbarashada.

English: Sports academies must have policies against physical and sexual abuse of young athletes.
Kiswahili: Vyuo vikuu vya michezo lazima viwe na sera dhidi ya unyanyasaji wa kimwili na kingono wa wanariadha wachanga.
Ekegusii: Aaria ase abanto bagosomera gokora chogosori goika babe namachiko agotanga gokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki ore gose ogotabatabwa ase abanyagosori abasae.
Dholuo: kuonde tiegruok mag tugo nyaka ket chenro mar geng'o timbe mag nindruok ekind rowere
Somali: Jaamacadaha isboortiga waa inay lahaadaan siyaasad looga hortago xadgudubka jirka iyo galmada ee ciyaartoyda dhalinyarada ah.

English: Keep medicines and chemicals out of children's reach to avoid accidental poisoning incidents.
Kiswahili: Weka dawa na kemikali mbali na watoto ili kuepuka matukio ya sumu kwa bahati mbaya.
Ekegusii: Beka amariogo mo nebinto biria bionsi bire hatari ase abana are korwa ase bare buna enchera eyemo yogotanga abana konywa chisumu ase egesio ekebe.
Dholuo: Kek yedhe gi kemikols mabor gi nyithindomondo kik gibed gi tuwoche kata hinyruok
Somali: Daawooyinka iyo kiimikooyinka ka fogaada carruurta si looga fogaado shil.

English: Event organizers should provide child-safe spaces and lost-child protocols during large gatherings.
Kiswahili: Waandaaji wa matukio wanapaswa kutoa nafasi salama kwa watoto na taratibu za watoto waliopotea wakati wa mikusanyiko mikubwa.
Ekegusii: Baria bakoroberria emeyega nere buya kobekaase abana basirete bakobekwa negento abaibiri basireriigwe nabana babo babwenerete gokora ekero kiesangerekano emenene.
Dholuo: Joma chano chokruoge onego omi nyithindo kuonde ma ginyalo betie, kendo girit nyithindo sama nitie romo
Somali: Qabanqaabiyayaashu waa inay meel ammaan ah u siiyaan carruurta iyo carruurta lumay xilliyada shirarka waaweyn.

English: Tourist hotspots sometimes exploit children for labor or sex. Report such cases to the Tourism Regulatory Authority.
Kiswahili: Maeneo yenye watalii wengi wakati mwingine huwanyanyasa watoto kwa ajili ya uchungu wa uzazi au ngono. Ripoti visa kama hivyo kwa Mamlaka ya Udhibiti wa Utalii.
Ekegusii: Aase abanto bakorwa isiko (abatari) bagotarera chingaki chinyinge nigo akoba aase abana bagokorigwa egasi gose gotibongi. Karwe eripoti gochia baria batenenerete obotari.
Dholuo: Kinde moko welo moa pinje mamoko tiyo gi nyithindo marach e yor tich kata nindruok.
Somali: Mararka qaarkood dalxiisayaashu waxay carruur u kireystaan inay shaqeeyaan ama galmo sameeyaan.

English: Kenya's laws are evolving to better protect children's rights. Stay informed on legal changes affecting child welfare.
Kiswahili: Sheria za Kenya zinabadilika ili kulinda haki za watoto vyema. Endelea kupata taarifa kuhusu mabadiliko ya kisheria yanayoathiri ustawi wa watoto.
Ekegusii: machiko a Kenya akongiigwe erio korenda abana baria batari konyara kwerenda gose korwa emechie emetaka erio korenda oboronge bwa abana. Kabe gokomanyigwa igoro yamaonchorerio arengete ebiombe biabana.
Dholuo: Timuru gik moko duto ma dwarore mondo omi chike mag Kenya orit ratiro mag nyithindo.
Somali: Sharciga Kenya wuxuu doonayaa inuu si fiican u ilaaliyo xuquuqda carruurta.

English: Neighbors, teachers, and relatives must speak up against child abuse to create safer environments for children.
Kiswahili: Majirani, walimu, na jamaa lazima wazungumze dhidi ya unyanyasaji wa watoto ili kuunda mazingira salama kwa watoto.
Ekegusii: Abaamate,abarimu, na abairi goika bakwenere ringana igoro yabana gokorerwa bobe erio korora ng'a abana tibari ase hatari yogokorerwa bobe.
Dholuo: Joma odak machiegni kod nyithindo, jopuonj, kod wedegi nyaka kwed timbe mag nindruok mondo nyithindgi obed gi ngima maber.
Somali: Deriska, macalimiinta iyo qaraabada waa inay si geesinimo leh uga hadlaan xadgudubka carruurta si ay u abuuraan jawi badbaado leh.

English: Livestock theft remains a challenge in pastoralist regions. Communities should form watch programs, brand animals, and report suspicious activities.
Kiswahili: Wizi wa mifugo bado ni changamoto katika maeneo ya wafugaji. Jamii zinapaswa kuunda programu za kufuatilia, kuchapisha wanyama, na kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Oboibi bwechiombe nabo botigarete koba omochando aaria chinsemo chiobotugi. Nere buya ebinyoro koba nemeroberio yobomongeri, basambererie chiombe chiabo chinamba, na korwa eripoti igoro yamangana bare nechitangutangu naro.
Dholuo: Kata kamano, joma kwayo jamni pod nitie pek mang'eny geng'o kuo, kendo dwarore ni ji otim chenro mar rito le, onyis ni gigolo le e yor alama, kendo ginyis ni gitimo gik ma ok kare.
Somali: Xadgudubka caadiga ah weli waa dhibaato ku jirta beeraleyda.

English: Regular vaccination protects livestock from major diseases. Veterinary services offer free campaigns during high-risk seasons and farmers should keep records.
Kiswahili: Chanjo ya mara kwa mara hulinda mifugo kutokana na magonjwa makubwa. Huduma za mifugo hutoa kampeni za bure wakati wa misimu yenye hatari kubwa na wakulima wanapaswa kuweka kumbukumbu.
Ekegusii: Ogochancha etugo ase chingaki chionsi nigo egotanga amarwaire yetugo korwa amanene. Abanyagitari betugo nkoba bare negeseto chingaki endwari yetugo egwateks na mbuya abaremi koba nomobaro bwetugo yabo.
Dholuo: Thiedho dhok pile rito jamni kuom tuoche madongo. Tij thieth mar le chiwo kampen maonge chudo e kinde mag chandruok kendo jopur onego orit weche mag ngima.
Somali: Tallaalka caadiga ah wuxuu xoolaha ka ilaaliyaa cudurrada daran. Adeegyada aaska waxay bixiyaan ololeyo lacag la'aan ah xagaaga, beeralaydana waa inay diiwaan geliyaan.

English: Water scarcity during droughts causes losses. Farmers should adopt water harvesting methods such as dams, pans, and subsurface storage.
Kiswahili: Uhaba wa maji wakati wa ukame husababisha hasara. Wakulima wanapaswa kutumia mbinu za kuvuna maji kama vile mabwawa, sufuria, na hifadhi ya chini ya ardhi.
Ekegusii: Ogokeana kwamache chingaki chieguragura nigo ekorenta asara Nere buya abaremi kwegera gotacha na kogacha amache ase okorema chingoro, kogora ebibuyu ebinene, koagacha chitangi chia'mahe inse yeriraba.
Dholuo: Nikech pi onge e kinde ma kech nitie, jopur onego oti gi yore mag ywayo pi kod ma kano pi e bwo lowo.
Somali: Biyo la'aanta abaarta waxay keentaa khasaaro.

English: Biosecurity prevents disease outbreaks. Disinfect footbaths, quarantine new animals, control wildlife access, and report sick animals promptly. Proper carcass disposal is essential.
Kiswahili: Usalama wa kibiolojia huzuia milipuko ya magonjwa. Safisha vijidudu kwenye bafu za miguu, karantini wanyama wapya, dhibiti ufikiaji wa wanyamapori, na toa ripoti kwa wanyama wagonjwa haraka. Utupaji sahihi wa mizoga ni muhimu.
Ekegusii: Gotanga okoererania etugo korwa ensemo eyemo gochia eyende nigo egotana okwambokerana kwamarwaire yetugo nabanto. Beta chiombe esindani yoborwaire bwomonwa namagoro, chiombe chikorwaa gochia aria chichanche, renda chingiti chiorosana tichiika ange, na karwe eripoti ioro yetugo erwarete otrikonyorwa. Tindeka etugo eri yakure inse kabisa.
Dholuo: Yie mar rito ngima dhano miyo tuoche ok landre. Golo remo e tiende, keto le manyien e kar kende, rito ngima mar le kod le ma tuo, kendo nyiso le ma tuo mapiyo.
Somali: La'aanta ammaanka waxay ka hortagtaa cudurrada.

English: The Kenya Livestock Identification and Traceability System assigns herd numbers and ear tags to support theft prevention and disease control.
Kiswahili: Mfumo wa Utambuzi na Ufuatiliaji wa Mifugo wa Kenya hugawa idadi ya mifugo na vitambulisho vya masikio ili kusaidia kuzuia wizi na kudhibiti magonjwa.
Ekegusii: Omoreoberio o'Kenya komanya etugo, na komanya ase yarwete ngosambereria ore chiombe chinamba gose gochikera chinamba ase amato buna enchera yogotanga oboibi.
Dholuo: Migao mar Kenya Animal Identification and Traceability System keto kwan mag jamni e itgi mondo okony e geng'o kuo kod geng'o tuoche.
Somali: Hay'adda Kenya Livestock Identification and Tacecy System waxay bixisaa lambarrada kooxaha iyo aqoonsiyada dhegaha si ay u taageeraan ka hortagga tuugada iyo xakamaynta cudurrada.

English: Wildlife predation causes losses. Farmers should construct predator-proof enclosures and use guard animals. Compensation is available for verified cases.
Kiswahili: Uwindaji wa wanyamapori husababisha hasara. Wakulima wanapaswa kujenga vizimba visivyoweza kuwindwa na wanyama waharibifu na kutumia wanyama wa ulinzi. Fidia inapatikana kwa visa vilivyothibitishwa.
Ekegusii: Ogoitwa gwetugo nechingiti chiorosana buna endagera yabo nigo gokoreta asara ase omoremi. Nere buya abaremi koagacha gose kogitera etugo yabo buya gotanga chingiti chiorosana goikera etugo yabo na koyeita bua endagera yabo. Ogoakanwa ase baria etugo yabo yaitetwe nechingiti chiorosana nereo ase baria bagitere etugo yabo buya.
Dholuo: le modake bunge nyalo kelo lal maduong', jopur nyaka gerne jamni kuonde ma le okdonje
Somali: Xayawaanka duurjoogta ah waxay keenaan khasaare. Beeraleyda waa inay dhisaan xayawaanka badbaadada iyo xayawaanka xayawaanka.

English: Index-based livestock insurance protects pastoralists from drought losses using satellite data triggers.
Kiswahili: Bima ya mifugo inayotegemea faharasa huwalinda wafugaji kutokana na upotevu wa ukame kwa kutumia vichocheo vya data vya setilaiti.
Ekegusii: Ensuarence erendete abaremi bobotugi nereo ekero rioka yamanyakinire nga omobaso omonene gose etoigo gose ogwateka kwendwari etare konyarekana ekorenda abatugi gotera ebimoreki bieintenet igoro aa ase rire bokorenga ekerengo omochando ore gokonys chiinsuarence komanya nechibesa irenga bagoakana omoremi.
Dholuo: Inshuarens konyo geng'o lal ma jopith nyalo yudo ka jamni othoo ndalo kech
Somali: Caymiska xoolaha caadiga ah wuxuu xoolaha ka ilaaliyaa khasaaraha abaaraha iyadoo la adeegsanayo xogta satellite.

English: Unauthorized livestock movement spreads disease. Farmers should demand permits and follow quarantine notices.
Kiswahili: Uhamaji usioidhinishwa wa mifugo hueneza magonjwa. Wakulima wanapaswa kudai vibali na kufuata notisi za karantini.
Ekegusii: Okoererania gwetugo gotancheirie nigo kogotaria amarwaire. Nere buya abaremi basabe rirube rikobanchera goetia etugo korwa aa gochia aari na kobwatia amachiko ogochancha chitugo chiabo.
Dholuo: Wuotho kata kwayo jamni maonge chenro maler miyo tuoche landore, omiyo jopur onego okwa rusa kendo giluw chike mag bedo e karantin.
Somali: Beeralayda waa inay dalbadaan ogolaansho waxayna raacaan calaamadaha kala soocidda bulshada.

English: Proper slaughter methods protect meat safety. Only use licensed slaughterhouses or follow public health guidelines for home slaughter.
Kiswahili: Njia sahihi za kuchinja hulinda usalama wa nyama. Tumia vichinjio vilivyoidhinishwa pekee au fuata miongozo ya afya ya umma kwa ajili ya kuchinja nyumbani.
Ekegusii: Obonyenyi etugo obuya na gacha enyama buya protect. Tumia ebichinchio biria biancheire gose bwatia amachiko yobochenu ekero okonyenya etugo yao nka.
Dholuo: Yore mowinjore mag nego ring'o rito ritruok mar ring'o. Ti gi kuonde ma ji negoe ring'o kende, kata luw chike mag thieth mar oganda e weche mag ring'o.
Somali: Waxaa loo isticmaalaa goobaha lagu dilo oo keliya ama waxaa la raacaa tilmaamaha caafimaadka dadweynaha ee lagu dilo guryaha.

English: Certain plants poison livestock. Farmers should remove toxic plants and provide alternative fodder during drought. Veterinary analysis supports diagnosis.
Kiswahili: Mimea fulani huwa na sumu kwa mifugo. Wakulima wanapaswa kuondoa mimea yenye sumu na kutoa chakula mbadala wakati wa ukame. Uchambuzi wa mifugo unasaidia utambuzi.
Ekegusii: Ekero etugo yarire emete gete nigo ekoba esumu mebere yabo. Nere buya abaremi batogore emete buna eyio yonsi na koa chitugo chiabo obonyansi obuya chinaki chiguragura. Ogopima etugo yao nomonyagitari bwetugo nabio bikoenekia ayio.
Dholuo: Nitie yiende moko manyalonego jamni kod sum. Jo-pith onego ogol yiende ma nigi sum kendo gimi ji chiemb dhok mamoko e kinde ma kech nitie.
Somali: Dhirta qaarkood waxay sunta u dhigaan xoolaha, beeralaydana waa inay ka saaraan dhirta sunta leh oo ay u diyaariyaan cunto kale xilliga abaarta.

English: Ticks spread deadly diseases. Regular dipping, chemical rotation, and daily inspections protect livestock.
Kiswahili: Kupe hueneza magonjwa hatari. Kuogesha mara kwa mara, mzunguko wa kemikali, na ukaguzi wa kila siku hulinda mifugo.
Ekegusii: Amagecha nigo agotambokeri amairwaire amabe ase etugo. Koira etugo chidipu, gochenchia amariogo ase edipu, gose goyesibia ase okoyesiarera eriogo riogoita amagecha nepambu, na korigereria kera rituko nga etugo yao tebwati amagecha.
Dholuo: Okuodo lando tuo dhok mapiyo, omiyo chanjo kod rito alwora nyalo konyo e geng'o tuochego
