Somali: Quudinta, wareegga kiimikada, iyo baaritaanka maalinlaha ah ayaa xoolaha ilaalinaya.

English: Drought requires special management. Provide minerals, reduce herd size early, and conserve water.
Kiswahili: Ukame unahitaji usimamizi maalum. Toa madini, punguza ukubwa wa kundi mapema, na uhifadhi maji.
Ekegusii: Eguragura nego eganitie emeroberio emeikernu korenda amache, gosiarera ebimeri amache, na koa etugo amache okonywa. Karwe amache echichuba, keania obonge bwetugo yao genkioy, na gacha amache.
Dholuo: Rito dhok ndalo oro dwaro ikruok motedgno, ka tiyo gi pi e yo maber.
Somali: Biyo la'aanta jirka waxay u baahan tahay daryeel gaar ah.

English: Proper feed storage prevents aflatoxin contamination. Keep grains dry, mold-free, and securely stored.
Kiswahili: Uhifadhi mzuri wa malisho huzuia uchafuzi wa sumu ya aflatoxin. Weka nafaka kavu, zisizo na ukungu, na zihifadhiwe kwa usalama.
Ekegusii: Kogacha endagrera buya nigo egokonya ogotabosa kwendagera.
Dholuo: Kano chiemo makare miyo ok wabed gi tuwoche mikelo gi aflatoxin
Somali: Cuntada si sax ah loo kaydiyo waxay ka hortagtaa wasakheynta sunta ah.

English: Early reporting prevents outbreaks. Contact veterinary officers or the Toll-Free Animal Disease Hotline 0800721313.
Kiswahili: Kuripoti mapema huzuia milipuko. Wasiliana na maafisa wa mifugo au Simu ya Bure ya Magonjwa ya Wanyama 0800721313.
Ekegusii: Korwa eripoti bwango igoro yamarwaire gochia ase abanyagitari nigo egotanga oborwaire kwambokerana/koranda. Manyia omonyagitari bwetugo rangeria esimi eye yamorero 0800721313 otari goakana kende.
Dholuo: chiwo ripot chon nyalo geng'o tuoche mopogore opogore
Somali: Warbixinnada hore waxay ka hortagaan qaraxyada.

English: Climate change increases animal risks. Provide shade, drainage, windbreaks, and use early warning systems.
Kiswahili: Mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa huongeza hatari za wanyama. Toa kivuli, mifereji ya maji, vizuizi vya upepo, na tumia mifumo ya tahadhari ya mapema.
Ekegusii: Ogoonchoreria kwerire nigo gokogesa emechando ase atugo. Beka etugo yao inse yekiriri, emetaro yogosokia amache amachafu, chimbago gotanga embeo, na komanya bwango igoro yogoonchoreria kwerire bwebage.
Dholuo: Lokruok mar alwora miyo le bedo gi hinyruok mang'eny, omiyo onego omiye tipo, omiye pi, omiye yamo ok rum, kendo oti gi chenro mar chiwo siem chon.
Somali: Isbeddelka cimilada ayaa khatarta xayawaanka sii kordhaya.

English: Milk safety requires hygiene. Wash udders, use clean containers, cool milk, and sell only to licensed processors.
Kiswahili: Usalama wa maziwa unahitaji usafi. Osha viwele, tumia vyombo safi, poza maziwa, na uyauze kwa wasindikaji walioidhinishwa pekee.
Ekegusii: Okogacha amere buya neganetie obochenu. Sibia enyeri nechimbere buya, beka amabere ase egento ekerabu, kendia amabere, na yaoneri bari bawete amarube yokobanchera koonia amabere boke.
Dholuo: Mondo chak obed maler, nyaka jopur rit ler e kuonde nyiedho kgiluoko thund dhing' gi pi maler
Somali: Si aad u ilaaliso nadaafadda caanaha, waxaad u baahan tahay inaad dharka maydho, weelasha nadiifka ah isticmaasho, caanaha qabow, iyo inaad iibiso alaabada ruqsadda leh oo keliya.

English: Internal parasites reduce productivity. Deworm regularly, rotate grazing, and test fecal samples.
Kiswahili: Vimelea vya ndani hupunguza uzalishaji. Ondoa minyoo mara kwa mara, zungusha malisho, na jaribu sampuli za kinyesi.
Ekegusii: Ebianda nigo bikei amabere. Kae etugo yao eriogo riebianda, onchoreria ase okorisia etugo yao korwa aa gochia aaria, na pima esike yetugo yao komanya gose nere nebianda.
Dholuo: kute modak ei jamni miyo gibedo gi nyak matin, ti gi yedhe manego kutegi mondo kik gikel midekre.
Somali: Xayawaanka guriga ku nool waxay yareeyaan wax soo saarka.

English: Pastoralist migrations need planning. Obtain permits, choose safe routes, and avoid conflict areas.
Kiswahili: Uhamiaji wa wafugaji unahitaji mipango. Pata vibali, chagua njia salama, na epuka maeneo yenye migogoro.
Ekegusii: Okonganya korwa aa gochia aaria kwa abatugi nkoganetie emeroberio emiya. Nyora ogwancherwa gwokong'anya netugo yao, etera ase atari nemechando, kabe are korwa chingongo chiria chire neminano.
Dholuo: dar gi jamni dwaro chenro, nyaka jorit chiaye yud rusa kendo yier yore maonge lweny
Somali: Si aad u hesho rukhsad, u doorato waddo ammaan ah, oo aad uga fogaato meelaha khilaafaadka ka jira, dadka waxay u baahan yihiin inay sameeyaan qorshe socdaal ah.

English: Misuse of veterinary drugs creates resistance. Buy from licensed sources and follow prescriptions.
Kiswahili: Matumizi mabaya ya dawa za mifugo husababisha upinzani. Nunua kutoka kwa vyanzo vilivyoidhinishwa na ufuate maagizo ya daktari.
Ekegusii: Koa etugo amriogo otabirie nabanyagitari betugo nigo egosaria obonyamasi bwetugo gose amariogo atari gokora egasi buya ase etugo. Gora amariogo korwa amonyagitari omoronge eriogo ribwate amalezo buya.
Dholuo: Tiyo marach gi yedhe mamero chando ji miyo ng'ato bedo gi chuny mar kwedo yedhe mamero.
Somali: Isticmaalka xadgudubka ah ee daawooyinka xayawaanka waxay keentaa diidmo. waxay ka iibsadaan ilo ruqsad leh waxayna raacaan tilmaamaha dhakhtarka.

English: Accurate records improve management. Track births, deaths, treatments, and vaccinations.
Kiswahili: Kumbukumbu sahihi huboresha usimamizi. Fuatilia kuzaliwa, vifo, matibabu, na chanjo.
Ekegusii: Amariko abwate maeleso yoboremi bwetugo yao nigo akogokonya ase emeroberio yao. Bwatia komanya chitariki chia kera etugo ekero yabiaretwe, ogokwa, buna kwarure obobwenia, na gochichancha.
Dholuo: Ripot moriere mag tuo kata thoo jamni, miyo pith bedo mayot
Somali: Diiwaangelinta saxda ah waxay hagaajineysaa maaraynta.

English: Beehive theft is rising. Secure apiaries, mark hives, and report suspicious buyers.
Kiswahili: Wizi wa mizinga ya nyuki unaongezeka. Linda nyuki, weka alama kwenye mizinga, na uripoti wanunuzi wanaotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Oboibi bwemetana yechinchoke mbogendererete kogeseka. Renda buya emetana, yebeka chinamba, na manyia igoro yabagori bakengeka.
Dholuo: Kuo mar ute kich medore, omiyo ket nying e kor utegi kendo iter ripot mag jomahundu makwalo mor kich
Somali: Xadgudubyada wax lagu xado ayaa sii kordhaya, xadgudubyada ammaanka, calaamadaha taangiyada, iyo warbixinnada iibsadayaasha shakiga leh.

English: Industrial pollutants harm animals. Report dumping, fence off contaminated sites, and test water.
Kiswahili: Uchafuzi wa viwandani huwadhuru wanyama. Ripoti utupaji taka, uzio mbali na maeneo yaliyochafuliwa, na jaribu maji.
Ekegusii: Obochafu bokorwa ase chifakitori nigo bokorentera etugo obokongu. Karwe eripoti igoro gotuguta obochafu bwabo ase enchera etari engiya, gita aase eubochafu bogotugutwa, na pima amche komanya gose nabwate ebinyinyi.
Dholuo: Gik ma chido ngima mag dhano nyalo hinyo le.
Somali: Wasakheynta warshadaha ayaa waxyeelada u geysata xayawaanka.

English: Floods kill animals and spread disease. Move herds to higher ground and disinfect pens after floods.
Kiswahili: Mafuriko huua wanyama na kueneza magonjwa. Huhamisha makundi hadi kwenye maeneo ya juu na kuua vijidudu baada ya mafuriko.
Ekegusii: Omogoko omonene nigo ogoita etugo na okoranda kwendwarim yetugo. Siarera obweri eriogo motwe yemegoko.
Dholuo: Ataro nego le kendo landonegi tuoche, kendo gologi e wi lowo kendo giduogo gi tuoche bang' ataro.
Somali: Daadadku waxay dilaan xayawaanka waxayna faafiyaan cudurrada.

English: Community policing reduces livestock theft. Share intelligence and support police investigations.
Kiswahili: Polisi jamii hupunguza wizi wa mifugo. Shiriki akili na usaidie uchunguzi wa polisi.
Ekegusii: Oborendi bwebinyoro nogo bogokeania oboibi bwetugo. Karwe amanagana obotuki na bwatisia porisi kobeka oborendi.
Dholuo: Tiyo kod oganda konyo geng'o kuo mar dhok. Tiuru kod obila e mako jokuo
Somali: Diiwaangelinta bulshada waxay yareyneysaa dhacda xoolaha.

English: Proper manure handling prevents disease. Compost before use and store away from water sources.
Kiswahili: Utunzaji sahihi wa mbolea huzuia magonjwa. Mbolea kabla ya matumizi na uhifadhi mbali na vyanzo vya maji.
Ekegusii: Kogacha na gotumia bobe obwoyo buya nigo kogokeania amarwaire. Karwe ribaga risaine ase eubo koguna na goonchoreria koba obwoyo omanye kobotumia na bobeke are korwa ase amache.
Dholuo: Ka itiyo gi yien e yo makare, inyalo geng'o tuoche.
Somali: Bacriminta saxda ah waxay ka hortagtaa cudurrada kahor isticmaalka iyo kaydinta biyaha.

English: Snakes bite animals in dry seasons. Clear bushes and seek immediate treatment for bites.
Kiswahili: Nyoka huuma wanyama wakati wa kiangazi. Safisha vichaka na utafute matibabu ya haraka kwa kuumwa.
Ekegusii: Chingiti chingenda nse nkorasa chire etugo aaria chingongo chinyomo. Rabia orsana na rigia obowenia bwa bwango ase etugo yao rasirwe neng'iti engenda nse.
Dholuo: Thuol kayo le ndalo oro, omiyo jopur onego wuog e bunge kendo many thieth mapiyo.
Somali: Xilliga xagaaga abeesooyinka ayaa cunaya xayawaanka.

English: Poor transport harms animals. Ensure ventilation, avoid extreme heat, and inspect animals after transport.
Kiswahili: Usafiri mbaya hudhuru wanyama. Hakikisha uingizaji hewa, epuka joto kali, na kagua wanyama baada ya usafiri.
Ekegusii: Okobogoria etugo bobe nechirori nigo akoumisa etugo. Rora nga erori okobogoreria etugo yao nebwate ebigorero bisaine koreta embeo ime, renda nga riberera tibucha erori ime, na rigereria buya nga etugo mbuya ere magega goika ase kware koyeira.
Dholuo: Yie mondo le obed gi muya maber, kik ichwe gi liet ahinya, kendo nyaka inon le bang' wuoth.
Somali: Gaadiidka xun wuxuu waxyeeleynayaa xayawaanka.

English: Auction yards attract criminals. Use licensed yards, verify buyers, and maintain registers.
Kiswahili: Viwanja vya mnada huvutia wahalifu. Tumia viwanja vilivyoidhinishwa, thibitisha wanunuzi, na utunze rejista.
Ekegusii: Ase ebinto bigoakerwa omonada nigo akongusa ebibago. Akera omonada aase aitabire neserikari, rigereria buya abagori baino, na gacha buya amariko buna ogoaka omonada ebinto ebio.
Dholuo: jomahundu ohero kuonde migoye sei. Omiyo nyaka ket arita e chirnigi
Somali: Waxaad isticmaashaa mitiryo ruqsad leh, iibsadayaal hubsan, iyo diiwaanada diiwaangelinta.

English: Contaminated feed causes losses. Test for aflatoxins and store feed safely.
Kiswahili: Chakula kilichochafuliwa husababisha hasara. Jaribu sumu ya aflatoxins na uhifadhi chakula kwa usalama.
Ekegusii: Endaera enchafu yetugo nigo ekorenta asara. Pima komanya gose engaera eyio nebwae obobosu na gacha endagera eyio buya.
Dholuo: Keto chiemo marach kelo lal. Tem pimo ka chiemo nigi aflatoxins kaka yor geng'o tuoche
Somali: Baadhitaanka sunta iyo dukaamada cuntada wasakhda leh waxay keenaan khasaare.

English: Large birds prey on young livestock. Use scare devices and provide sheltered pens.
Kiswahili: Ndege wakubwa huwinda mifugo midogo. Tumia vifaa vya kutisha na uweke zizi zilizofunikwa.
Ekegusii: Ebibaki na makotu nigo akira ebichichu buna endagera yabo. Gitera etugoyao buya na rosia ebinto binga buna omonto obogoretie enyimbo gochia igoro na koyeka aroro kogosa ebinto ebio bitgete koira etugo.
Dholuo: Winy madongo ohero chamo jamni matindo, ti kod gige buogo winy
Somali: Shimbiraha waaweyn waxay ugaadhsadaan xoolaha yaryar waxayna adeegsadaan qalab ay ku cabsi galiyaan shimbiraha oo ay u sameeyaan daaqado qarsoodi ah.

English: Disaster preparedness reduces losses. Identify evacuation routes and store emergency supplies.
Kiswahili: Utayari wa maafa hupunguza hasara. Tambua njia za uokoaji na uhifadhi vifaa vya dharura.
Ekegusii: Kweroberia buya nyuma yemechando nigo ogotanga asara. Orokia chinchera chiokominchoreria ekero kiemebasekano na gacha endagera orarie ekero kiemebasekano.
Dholuo: Bedo moikore ne masiche miyo ji ok lal, kendo dwarore ni ng'ato ong'e yore ma onyalo wuokie e masira kendo okan gik mochuno.
Somali: Diyaarinta musiibada waxay yareyneysaa khasaaraha.

English: Water points attract thieves. Water animals by day and patrol high-risk areas.
Kiswahili: Vituo vya maji huvutia wezi. Wanyama hunyweshwa maji mchana na hulinda maeneo yenye hatari kubwa.
Ekegusii: Ase amache akobucherwa nigo akongusa ebibago. Ira chiombe kere mobaso konywa amache animals no mokera buya aase okagerete abaibi barabaise korwera.
Dholuo: jomahundu ohero bede kuonde miyo chiaye. Omiyo ter chiaye modho pi odiechieng' kendo uket arita
Somali: Qalabka biyaha ayaa soo jiidanaya tuugada.

English: Animal noise disturbs communities. Proper housing reduces noise and prevents complaints.
Kiswahili: Kelele za wanyama husumbua jamii. Makazi mazuri hupunguza kelele na kuzuia malalamiko.
Ekegusii: Okwana gwechiombe nigo gokogechia abanto. Koagacha obweri obuya nigo bogotanga eriogi riokwana na igo gotanga abanto kwemurangania.
Dholuo: Chiaye nyalo kelo koko kuonde ma ji odakie. Keto ute chiaye dwoko koko piny
Somali: Dhawaaqa xayawaanku wuxuu dhibiyaa bulshooyinka, guryaha habboonna waxay yareeyaan qaylada iyo ka hortagga cabashooyinka.

English: Stray animals destroy property. Maintain secure fencing and report damage promptly.
Kiswahili: Wanyama waliopotea huharibu mali. Dumisha uzio imara na uripoti uharibifu haraka.
Ekegusii: Etugo yabagoire nigo egosari ebimeri biabanto. Gitera buya etugo yao na manyia abanyene ekero etugo yao yasaririe ebinto bia bande.
Dholuo: Nyithindo ma onge gi ng'ato onego oketh mwandu, kendo girit ute ma nigi ute ma nigi ute ma kamago, kendo ginyis ji gik ma ne otimore.
Somali: Dagaalku wuxuu burburinayaa hantida.

English: Dry season fires threaten grazing areas. Create firebreaks and report arson incidents.
Kiswahili: Moto wa msimu wa kiangazi unatishia maeneo ya malisho. Hutengeneza njia za kuzuia moto na kuripoti matukio ya uchomaji moto.
Ekegusii: Omorero chingaki chieguragura nigo okorenta obokongu ase oborisia bwetugo. Onye omogondo bwendagera gose rinani ore omonene, yobarore gati gati na koyatiga atri namete gose obonyansi gotanga omorere gotamboka gochia asande na manyia abarai onye nomonto bwogetie obomorero eyio makusudi.
Dholuo: mach machakore ndalo oro ketho kuonde kwayo chiaye. Chiw report mondo oneg mach mapiyo
Somali: Dabka xagaaga ayaa khatar ku ah daaqadaha.

English: Proper breeding management prevents injuries. Use healthy stock, maintain hygiene, and record breeding dates.
Kiswahili: Usimamizi sahihi wa ufugaji huzuia majeraha. Tumia mifugo yenye afya, tunza usafi, na uandike tarehe za ufugaji.
Ekegusii: Renda korora nga ekero etugo yao ekobwata embego yakorirwe ase enchera engiya etarikoumisa etugo eria ekobwata embego. Tumia eeri ebwate afia engiya , renda obochenu, na rika inse chitariki kwaete etugo yao embego.
Dholuo: Ti gi dhok ma ngimagi ber e komo kodhi
Somali: U isticmaal xoolaha caafimaad qaba, nadaafadda ilaali, iyo taariikhda wax soo saarka diiwaangelinta.

English: Equipment theft affects productivity. Secure tools and machinery and report theft immediately.
Kiswahili: Wizi wa vifaa huathiri tija. Hakikisha vifaa na mashine zinapatikana na uripoti wizi mara moja.
Ekegusii: Oboibi bwebinto bioboremi buna chitinga chiokorem nebinde nigo bikoirania magega gose gokei rigesa. Gacha buya ebinto biao biogokora oboremi buya na manyia abagambi igoro yoboibi biebinto biao bioboremi bwngo.
Dholuo: kuo masin mag tich duoko yuto piny
Somali: Xadgudubka qalabka wasakheynta ayaa saameyn ku leh wax soo saarka, qalabka shaqada iyo mashiinnada ammaanka, isla markaana si deg deg ah ayey u soo sheegaan.

English: Lightning kills grazing animals. Install lightning rods and avoid tying animals to isolated trees.
Kiswahili: Umeme huua wanyama wanaochunga. Weka fimbo za umeme na epuka kuwafunga wanyama kwenye miti iliyotengwa.
Ekegusii: Enkoba nigo egoita etugo ere getii korisia. Beka ebinto biria bikobwata enkoba na tiga gosiba etugo ase omote ore oymo.
Dholuo: Mil polo nego chiaye, omiyo kik itwegi but yiende mabor.
Somali: Hillaacyada ayaa dilaya xayawaanada quudinta leh; qalabka korontada ku dheji oo ka fogaada xayawaanada u duulaya geedaha fog.

English: Misuse of antibiotics creates resistance. Follow prescriptions and dispose of drugs safely.
Kiswahili: Matumizi mabaya ya viuavijasumu husababisha usugu. Fuata maagizo ya daktari na utupe dawa kwa usalama.
Ekegusii: Ekero amariogo aria agotanga ebinyinyi komenta omobere ime agotumeka bobe, nigo akoa ebinyinyi chinguru goika eriogo riasinywa gokora egasi yobobwenia buya. Bwatia amereso omonyagitari buya na tuguta amariogo ase enchera engiya buna eyokoyatindeka.
Dholuo: Ka itiyo marach gi yedhe mamero ji, teko mar geng'o tuoche dok piny
Somali: Isticmaalka xun ee bakteeriyada ayaa kicinaya diidmo.

English: Large gatherings increase theft risks. Supervise herds and coordinate with security agencies.
Kiswahili: Mikusanyiko mikubwa huongeza hatari za wizi. Simamia makundi ya wanyama na uratibu na vyombo vya usalama.
Ekegusii: Omoganda omonenenbwabanto nigo okongusa abaibi. Renda etugo yao buya na bwaterana nabarendi boborendi.
Dholuo: Chokruoge madongo miyo ji bedo gi luoro mar kwalo gik moko
Somali: Shirarka waaweyn waxay kordhiyaan khatarta tuugada.

English: Plan feed supplies to avoid shortages. Preserve fodder and use drought-resistant varieties.
Kiswahili: Panga vifaa vya kulisha ili kuepuka uhaba. Hifadhi malisho na tumia aina zinazostahimili ukame.
Ekegusii: Rosia na kogacha endagera yetugo yao genkio gotanyorwa nobokongu abwo motwe. Gacha endagera yetugo yao buya na simeka endagera yetugo eria ekoremereria omogaso omonene.
Dholuo: Tim chenro mar kungo chiemo mondo kik chiaye bed kech
Somali: Qorshooyinku waxay ku quudiyaan alaabada looga hortago abaarta, kaydinta cuntada iyo isticmaalka abaaraha kala duwan.

English: Blue-green algae poison animals. Avoid contaminated water sources and report cases.
Kiswahili: Mwani wa kijani kibichi huwadhuru wanyama. Epuka vyanzo vya maji vilivyochafuliwa na uripoti visa.
Ekegusii: Esosera ime yamache rooche nigo ere esumu ase etugo ekero yayenyure. Renda korora nga ebiberero biamache nebirabu. Renda nga etugo yao terikonywa amache korwa aase achafu na manyia abangagitari betugo ekero etugo yarwarire.
Dholuo: blue-green algae nikod sum manego chiaye
Somali: Ka fogow ilaha biyaha wasakhda ah oo ka warbixi xaaladaha xayawaanada cudurka ku dhaca cagaarka cagaaran.

English: Multiple identification methods enhance security. Brands, tags, and microchips support recovery.
Kiswahili: Mbinu nyingi za utambuzi huongeza usalama. Chapa, lebo, na microchips husaidia urejeshaji.
Ekegusii: Beka etugo yao ebimanyererio ao ao gokonya kobirenda korwa oboibi. Chisambererie ekemanyererio, beka chipachi amato, and Kobekera chiombe ekagento gete ime yerisankwa riabo nechera eyemo yogotanga oboibi bwetugo ekiagera ekero yaibirwe egento keria kebisire ime yerisankwa nabo gekoorokia goetera eintaneti ase etugo eyio ere nakoyebwatia bwango.
Dholuo: Yo mopogore opogore mag fwenyo chiaye miyo wabedo gi ritruok maber.
Somali: Habab kala duwan oo lagu aqoonsado dadka ayaa ammaanka kor u qaada.

English: Poor handling causes stress and injury. Use non-slip floors and proper restraint equipment.
Kiswahili: Ushughulikiaji mbaya husababisha msongo wa mawazo na majeraha. Tumia sakafu zisizoteleza na vifaa sahihi vya kuzuia.
Ekegusii: Ekero etugo ekoirwa ase enchera etari engiya nigo ekoba nobwoba, ogochandeka ebirengererio an koumia. Beka etugo aase atari noboterere na yesibe buya.
Dholuo: Tiyo gi gik moko e yo maber, mano nyalo miyo ng'ato obed gi hinyruok
Somali: Amaan la'aantu waxay keentaa walwal iyo dhaawac.

English: Faulty electrical systems harm animals. Inspect wiring and test for stray voltage regularly.
Kiswahili: Mifumo ya umeme yenye hitilafu huwadhuru wanyama. Kagua nyaya za umeme na ujaribu volteji iliyopotea mara kwa mara.
Ekegusii: Esitima etbikirie buya nabo are hatari ase etugo. Rora gose chigwaya nchiererete inse na gopima gose nchire nomorero kera engaki erio korenda etugo teakwa nesisitima.
Dholuo: Ka nitie gik ma ok kare ma nyalo miyo le okethre, onego inon gik ma ok ler ma ne nitie kendo item matek mondo ine kabe nitie gik ma nyalo ketho teko mar sitima.
Somali: Nidaamyada korontada ee qalalaasaha ah waxay waxyeelo u geystaan xayawaanka.

English: Steep water edges trap animals. Install gentle slopes and fence dangerous areas.
Kiswahili: Kingo zenye maji marefu hunasa wanyama. Weka miteremko laini na uzio maeneo hatari.
Ekegusii: Koira etugo rooche konya amache aase are egetionko nabo etugo aranyare gotereria na kogwa amache ime ekwe. Rosia buya aase etugo yao ekonywera amache na gita aase are atari ase etugo.
Dholuo: dho pi mapoth nyalo kiero le  ma donje, ket chiel mondo le okal mabor
Somali: Xeebta biyaha jilicsan waxay qabtaan xayawaanka oo waxay dhigaan meelo jilicsan oo khatar ah.

English: Research farms need strict security. Use CCTV, controlled access, and patrols.
Kiswahili: Mashamba ya utafiti yanahitaji ulinzi mkali. Tumia CCTV, ufikiaji unaodhibitiwa, na doria.
Ekegusii: Aaria ase oboremi bogokorerwa amasomo ogotema ao ao naganetie oborendi obuya. Tumia ebimoreki biria biekamera bikobwata buna abanto bagosoa nagosoka, renda nga tari kera omonto ogosoa aroro, nobomongeri obuya.
Dholuo: Puothe mitime nonro mopogre dwaro arita
Somali: Beeraha cilmi baarista waxay u baahan yihiin nabadgelyo adag.

English: High temperatures reduce productivity. Provide shade, ventilation, and constant water.
Kiswahili: Halijoto ya juu hupunguza uzalishaji. Hutoa kivuli, uingizaji hewa, na maji yasiyobadilika.
Ekegusii: Ekero riberera rire igoro mono nigo rigokei amabere ase etugo. Beka ekiriri, karwe ribaga ase embeo rgoetera, na beka amache okonya ase etugo chingaki chionsi.
Dholuo: liet ma malo duoko yuto mag pith piny
Somali: Heerkulka sare wuxuu yareeyaa waxsoosaarka dalagga.

English: Early warning prevents losses. Monitor conditions and share forecasts with herders.
Kiswahili: Onyo la mapema huzuia hasara. Fuatilia hali na ushiriki utabiri na wafugaji.
Ekegusii: Komanya omochando bwango nigo kogotanga asara. Rigeria buya komanya rire buna rire na sanga nabatugi bamino.
Dholuo: nyis jokwath ranyisi mag yamo biro timore, mondo gikony chiaye
Somali: Digniinta hore waxay ka hortagtaa khasaaraha.

English: Be cautious of investment apps advertised during football matches on illegal streams. Many are fronts for data theft or financial fraud
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu na programu za uwekezaji zinazotangazwa wakati wa mechi za mpira wa miguu kwenye mikondo haramu. Nyingi ni njia za wizi wa data au ulaghai wa kifedha.
Ekegusii: Erende korwa omochieso ogotangaswa ase chisimi kobeka chibesa ase etimi gete ng'a nonyore chibesa goetra esimi chingaki chiegosri yomopira. Abange ba abwo bakorenta chigosori echi nigo barengete koiba amanga iigoro yao bakorere oboibi.
Dholuo: Bed motang' gi gik ma itiyogo e lando tuke mag futball e yore ma ok kare.
Somali: Ka digtoonow barnaamijyada dhaqaale ee lagu shaaciyo inta lagu jiro ciyaaraha kubada cagta ee durdurrada sharci darrada ah.

English: "DCI is investigating a fake 'youth startup grant' program circulating on TikTok and Instagram. There is no such initiative funded by the Government of Kenya."
Kiswahili: "DCI inachunguza mpango bandia wa 'ruzuku ya vijana wanaoanza' unaosambazwa kwenye TikTok na Instagram. Hakuna mpango kama huo unaofadhiliwa na Serikali ya Kenya."
Ekegusii: Abanyanyimbo mbagendererete gotuka igoro yogochaka ogokonywa ase abasae neserikari ya Kenya goetera TikTok na Instagram. Gento kenga buna ekio tikeiyo korende noborimo bwoka.
Dholuo: "DCI nono chenro mar miriambo ma yudore e TikTok kod Instagram. onge chenro ma kamano ma sirkal mar Kenya nigo mar chiwo pesa".
Somali: "DCI waxay baareysaa barnaamijyo been abuur ah oo loo yaqaan 'leprosy' oo lagu faafiyo TikTok iyo Instagram. Ma jiro barnaamij la mid ah oo ay maalgeliso Dowladda Kenya".

English: The Ministry of Public Service reminds job seekers that all internship postings are free to apply for. Avoid anyone asking for bribes or airtime in return
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Utumishi wa Umma inawakumbusha wanaotafuta kazi kwamba nafasi zote za mafunzo ya vitendo ni bure kuomba. Epuka mtu yeyote anayeomba rushwa au muda wa maongezi kama malipo.
Ekegusii: Eminisitiri yobokoreri bwabanto nkoinyoria are abakorogia egasi nga baria bakorigia gosoa ase okwegera mono igoro yamosomo abo nigo agwancherwa na gosoa bosa. Kana monto onde bwensi oragosabe riaki.
Dholuo: Ofis mar Tij Sirkal parone jogo madwaro tich ni ginyalo kwayo thuolo mar dhi e tiegruok.
Somali: Wasaaradda Adeegga Dadweynaha waxay xasuusineysaa dadka shaqo doonka ah in dhammaan xarumaha maxalliga ah ay xor u yihiin inay codsadaan.

English: Several Kenyans have reported scam calls claiming to be from international couriers requesting customs clearance payments. Confirm such calls with KRA or the courier directly
Kiswahili: Wakenya kadhaa wameripoti simu za ulaghai zinazodaiwa kutoka kwa wasafirishaji wa kimataifa wanaoomba malipo ya kibali cha forodha. Thibitisha simu hizo moja kwa moja na KRA au msafirishaji.
Ekegusii: Abakenya abange banyorire chisimi korwa ebobagp bikobasaba chibesa gose kobaa amanga igoro yabo korwa abakweroka buna baria bagokora emeremo yobobogoria emesigo korwa chinse chia isiko mbare nomosigo oo abae chibesa chiogoetia omoesigo iyio erio bagokonye. Koranyore esimi yengencho etye manyia office chia chiebango (KRA) gose ekambani eyio bakogotebi.
Dholuo: Jo Kenya mang'eny osewacho ni ne giwuoyo gi mikoche ma ne dwaro ni mondo gichul pesa mondo giso gig ohala e gweng' ka
Somali: Qaar ka mid ah dadka Kenya waxay soo sheegeen wicitaanada khayaanada ah oo ay sheegeen inay yihiin kuwa caalamiga ah ee maraakiibta ah oo dalbanaya lacag caddaan ah oo canshuur ah.

English: "Be cautious of business mentorship programs advertised by influencers that ask for hefty registration fees. Many lack legal registration."
Kiswahili: "Kuwa mwangalifu na programu za ushauri wa biashara zinazotangazwa na watu wenye ushawishi wanaoomba ada kubwa za usajili. Nyingi hazina usajili wa kisheria."
Ekegusii: Renda kegima tosoa ase emeroberio yogosomia igoro goetera chisimi nabanto bare nokobua gokong'ina nakobebegena bagosaba chibesa chinyinge gosoera Abange babanto aba tiberigeti neserikari.
Dholuo: "Tang'uru gi chenro mag puonj milande mbui, ka ikwaye pesa mangeny
Somali: "Ka digtoonow barnaamijyada ganacsiga ee ay xayeysiiyaan dadka wax saameyn ku leh oo dalbanaya khidmadaha diiwaangelinta.

English: "We urge wananchi to report any person asking for 'expedited NHIF services' in exchange for cash. NHIF does not charge for processing."
Kiswahili: "Tunawasihi wananchi kumripoti mtu yeyote anayeomba 'huduma za NHIF za haraka' badala ya pesa taslimu. NHIF haitozi malipo kwa ajili ya usindikaji."
Ekegusii: Nigo togosaba abanto komanyia abagambi gose abasikari igoro yabanto bagosaba chibesa basuguikie akadi yao ya NHIF ekore egasi. NHIF teri gosaba besa goetia emesigo.
Dholuo: "Wajwayo wananchi mondo oripot ng'ato ang'ata ma kwayo pesa mondo olos gige NHIF
Somali: "Waxaan ugu baaqaynaa muwaadiniinta inay soo sheegaan qof kasta oo adeegyada NHIF codsanaya lacag caddaan ah.

English: The Judiciary warns of false bail refund letters sent to unsuspecting litigants. Refunds are processed only through court registries
Kiswahili: Mahakama yaonya kuhusu barua za kurejeshewa dhamana za uongo zinazotumwa kwa walalamikaji wasio na uhakika. Marejesho yanashughulikiwa kupitia sajili za mahakama pekee
Ekegusii: Ekoti yaonyire abanto igoro yamarube oborimo ogotomwa gochia ekoti korigia koiranerigwa chibesa babegete ebondi false bail refund letters sent to unsuspecting litigants. Okoiranerigwa chibesa chiepondi nkotini kogokorerwa na tari ande onsi.
Dholuo: Bura chiwo siem kuom barupe mag miriambo mag dwoko pesa kuom gowi ma oor ne joma kia kaka kot tiyo
Somali: Wargeyska Judiciary wuxuu ka digayaa warqadaha been abuurka ah ee loo diray dadka aan aqoon u lahayn.

English: "Ministry of Housing has not contracted any agents to collect payments for affordable housing units. Application is done through Boma Yangu portal only."
Kiswahili: "Wizara ya Nyumba haijawapa kazi mawakala wowote wa kukusanya malipo ya nyumba za bei nafuu. Maombi yanafanywa kupitia lango la Boma Yangu pekee."
Ekegusii: Eminisitiri yobokoreri bwabanto nkoinyoria ere abakorogia egasi nga baria bakorigia gosoa ase okwegera mono igoro yamosomo abo nigo agwancherwa na gosoa bosa. Kana monto onde bwensi oragosabe riaki.
Dholuo: "Minister of Housing ok osetiyo gi ng'ato moro amora mondo ochul pesa mag ot ma nigi nengo moromo.
Somali: "Holalka guryaha lama oggola hay'adaha guryaha raqiisan. Lacagta la bixiyo waxaa lagu bixiyaa bogga My Business oo keliya".

English: Red Cross Kenya cautions citizens against donation drives using MPESA till numbers not registered to the organization. Always crosscheck before sending money.
Kiswahili: Msalaba Mwekundu Kenya inawaonya raia dhidi ya michango inayotumia nambari za MPESA ambazo hazijasajiliwa kwa shirika. Daima angalia kabla ya kutuma pesa.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe Ekebaririri gia Kenya kiarure ogokurerwa ase abanainchi igoro yemechango goetera MPESA chinamba chia till chitarikiri rasimi na Safaricom ase abwo bagosaba omochango . Tema komanya buya nyuma otatatoma chibesa chiao.
Dholuo: Red Cross Kenya chiwo siem ne raia kuom chiwo mag pesa ka gitiyo gi MPESA nyaka e kwan mag joma ok nie riwruok mar oganda.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ka digeysaa muwaadiniinta in ay ka hortagaan ururada deeq bixiya iyagoo adeegsanaya MPESA ilaa tirada dadka aan ka diiwaangashanayn ururka.

English: Public warning: PSC does not conduct interviews on WhatsApp. Any job ad asking for 'application fees' is fake and should be reported
Kiswahili: Onyo kwa umma: PSC haifanyi mahojiano kwenye WhatsApp. Tangazo lolote la kazi linaloomba 'ada za maombi' ni bandia na linapaswa kuripotiwa
Ekegusii: Ogokurera ase bonsi: Enseo yesrikari eria etenenerete emeremo yeserikari (PSC) teri gokria abanto ogotema gwokorigia emeremo goetra Whatsapp. Any job ad asking for 'application fees' is fake and should be reported
Dholuo: Siem ne ji: PSC ok tim intaviu e WhatsApp.
Somali: Dadweynaha: PSC ma qabato wareysiyada barta WhatsApp. Waxqabad kasta oo sheegta "barashada codsiga" waa been abuur waana in la soo sheegaa

English: "CBK is aware of mobile apps charging 'CRB clearance' fees upfront. CRB requests are processed through licensed bureaus only."
Kiswahili: "CBK inafahamu kuhusu programu za simu zinazotoza ada za 'kibali cha CRB' mapema. Maombi ya CRB yanashughulikiwa kupitia ofisi zenye leseni pekee."
Ekegusii: "Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK ) nemanyete ebikoreri biechisimi apps charging 'CRB clearance' fees upfront. Ogosaba gochia baria batenenerete ogosaria kwobogoko (CRB) nigo kogokorwa nabanto bancheire gokora egasi eyio boka"
Dholuo: "CBK ong'eyo ni kuonde mitimoe ohala mag simo, ichulo pesa mag 'CRB clearance' ka pok ochopo.
Somali: "CBK waxay ogtahay in codsiyada loo helo adeegyada taleefanka gacanta ee loo yaqaan 'CRB express' ay yihiin codsiyada CRB oo kaliya iyada oo loo marayo rukhsad".

English: EACC has flagged a syndicate offering forged title searches and valuations in Kisumu. Use verified government channels only
Kiswahili: EACC imeripoti kuwa shirika linalotoa utafutaji na uthamini bandia wa hati miliki huko Kisumu. Tumia njia za serikali zilizothibitishwa pekee
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) yarure ogokurerwa igoro yamarube oborimo koa abanto emeremo, gose chinamba chiamaremo chioborimo, na korenga oboremo obwo nga nirenga boisaine aaria Kisumu. Tumia chiofisi chieserikari ekero otagete komanya ayio boronge.
Dholuo: EACC osechako mako  jomiriambo mariambo ni gichiwo nonro mag title deed e piny Kisumu.
Somali: EACC waxay kor u qaadday calanka daabacaadda ururka raadinta iyo qiimeynta cinwaanada luqadda Somali. Isticmaal kaliya idaacadaha dawladda ee la xaqiijiyay

English: "DCI confirms arrests of fake NGO representatives claiming to partner with World Food Programme in Northern Kenya. Always verify through official NGO registry."
Kiswahili: "DCI inathibitisha kukamatwa kwa wawakilishi bandia wa mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali wanaodai kushirikiana na Mpango wa Chakula Duniani Kaskazini mwa Kenya. Daima thibitisha kupitia usajili rasmi wa mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali."
Ekegusii: "Omotuki omonene enekirie okobwatwa kwa abatenereri be'NGO boborimo bakweroka abakobwaterana nekeombe kia Omoroberio Bwendagera Bwense (World Food Programme) aaria Kenya ya Irianyi. Botambe manya boronge korwa egetabu gia NGO."
Dholuo: "DCI ne omak jomariambo ni tiyo gi  riwruoge kaka World Food Programme e piny Kenya.
Somali: "DCI waxay xaqiijineysaa in la qabtay wakiilo been abuur ah oo ka tirsan hay'adaha aan dowliga ahayn oo sheegta inay ka qaybqaataan Qorshaha Cuntada Adduunka ee Waqooyiga Kenya. Waxay had iyo jeer xaqiijineysaa diiwaangelinta rasmiga ah ee hay'adaha aan dowliga ahayn".

English: "Wanafunzi wanaombwa wasitumie wasimamizi wasiojulikana kusajili HELB. Maafisa bandia wamekuwa wakichukua pesa wakiahidi kufanikisha mkopo."
Kiswahili: "Wanafunzi wanaombwa wasitumie wasimamizi wasiojulikana kusajili HELB. Maafisa bandia wamekuwa wakichukua pesa wakiahidi mkopo."
Ekegusii: "Abana babioriigwe tibatumia abatenereri batamanyekaneti ekero bakwerika konyora ogokonya gwechibesa korwa HELB. Abanene ba pandia babeire bagosaba chibesa ase okobatebia ng'a mbabae chibesa chieroni ya HELB."
Dholuo: Nyithi mbalariany osekwer mondo kik kichom  joma gikia e manyo helb, nikech kuo pesa matimore e yorego
Somali: "Codsadayaashu waa la weydiinayaa in ay joojinayaan qodobbada aan ka gudbin ee ku dhow HELB. Saraakiisha Benin ayaa ka xumaaday in ay soo qaataan lacag ay ku ballanqaadaan in ay ku guuleystaan amaahda".

English: Communications Authority warns of cloned betting apps circulating on Telegram. Many steal your phone data and banking information
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Mawasiliano yaonya kuhusu programu za kamari zilizotengenezwa kwa njia ya kloni zinazosambaa kwenye Telegram. Nyingi huiba data ya simu yako na taarifa za benki
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenerete okoererania amangana ase embeo kiarure ogokurera igoro yegokoreri gia bahati na sibu kioborimo kerandete ase Telegram. Abange nigo bakoiba amanga ao are ase esimi amo nayenamba yebengi yao.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar Weche Loso Wacho e Wi Weche mag Intanet, chiwo siem ni nitie program mag goyo tuke mag loyo mich kuom hawi ma yudore e Telegram.
Somali: Hay'adda Isgaarsiinta ayaa ka digtay barnaamijyada lacag dhiga ee aan dabiici ahayn ee loo qaybiyo Telegram.

English: KRA reminds taxpayers that agents are not allowed to collect cash payments in person. Use official PayBill numbers and receipts
Kiswahili: KRA inawakumbusha walipa kodi kwamba mawakala hawaruhusiwi kukusanya malipo ya pesa taslimu ana kwa ana. Tumia nambari rasmi za PayBill na risiti
Ekegusii: Ekeombe ekenene giokorusia ebango gia Kenya (KRA) nkoinyoria kere baakani abango nga abaachenti babo tibaganeirie korusia ebango gose koegwa chibesa tbarabwo abanyene. Tumia enamba yabeene ya PayBill na nyora risiti riogoakana.
Dholuo: KRA parone josol osuru ni ok oyienegi jotelo kawo pesa e wang' ji.
Somali: KRA waxay xasuusineysaa canshuur bixiyeyaasha in wakiilada aan loo oggolaan in ay ururiyaan lacagtooda shakhsi ahaaneed.

English: "We urge Kenyans to confirm job offers from airlines, especially Emirates and Qatar Airways. Multiple scams promising airport jobs have been flagged.
Kiswahili: "Tunawasihi Wakenya kuthibitisha ofa za kazi kutoka kwa mashirika ya ndege, hasa Emirates na Qatar Airways. Ulaghai mwingi unaoahidi ajira za viwanja vya ndege umeripotiwa.
Ekegusii: "Nigo togosaba abakenya komanya buya amatangaso yechigasi korwa ase ebitii bienchindege, mono kobua buna keria Emirates na Qatar. Amatangaso amange yoborimo igoro yemeremo ase ebitii biechindege bwaansire.
Dholuo: "Wakwayo jo Kenya mondo onon tije milando e kambi ndeke kaka Emirates kod Qatar Airways
Somali: "Waxaan ugu baaqaynaa dadka Kenya inay xaqiijiyaan shaqooyinka ay bixiyaan shirkadaha diyaaradaha, gaar ahaan Emeras iyo Qatar Airways.

English: EACC is investigating individuals posing as ministry auditors soliciting bribes from small schools. All inspections are officially scheduled and documented
Kiswahili: EACC inachunguza watu wanaojifanya wakaguzi wa wizara wanaoomba rushwa kutoka shule ndogo. Ukaguzi wote umepangwa rasmi na kuandikwa.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwani obopkorekanu (EACC) ngotuka kere abanto gete bagwekora baria bakorigereria amatumisi yechibesa chieserikari na igo gosaba amaaki korwa ase chisukuru chinke. Okorigererigwa bwebitabu nigo gokoba ekero gwatangasirwe.
Dholuo: EACC nono joma nyiso ni gin jorit-tinda mag sirkal kendo manyo asoya e skunde matindo.
Somali: EACC waxay baaritaan ku sameyneysaa dadka isku dayga ah ee iskuulada yaryar ka codsanaya musuqmaasuqa.

English: "CBK reminds Kenyans that legitimate banks do not conduct promotions via Facebook inboxes. Ignore messages asking for account details to 'activate rewards'."
Kiswahili: "CBK inawakumbusha Wakenya kwamba benki halali hazifanyi matangazo kupitia visanduku vya barua pepe vya Facebook. Puuza jumbe zinazouliza maelezo ya akaunti ili 'kuamsha zawadi'."
Ekegusii: "Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK) nkoinyoria ere abanto ba Kenyan ng'a chibengi boronge tichiri gokinia abakori emeremo babo goetera Facebook. Ombia mang'ana ande onsi akogosaba obae ennamba yao yebengi erio bakobekere ekeegwa gie chibesa."
Dholuo: "CBK parone Jo-Kenya ni bengi ma nigi chike makare ok tim kampen e otese ma giyudo e Facebook.
Somali: "CBK waxay dadka Kenya xasuusineysaa in bangiyada sharciga ah aysan dhigin xayeysiis ku saabsan shabakadda Facebook sanduuqyada.

English: "DCI warns against conmen selling fake 'church land' in Kayole and Ruai. Verify ownership documents at the Ministry of Lands before making any payment."
Kiswahili: "DCI yaonya dhidi ya matapeli wanaouza 'ardhi bandia ya kanisa' huko Kayole na Ruai. Thibitisha hati za umiliki katika Wizara ya Ardhi kabla ya kufanya malipo yoyote."
Ekegusii: "Omotuki omonene orure ogokurera gochia abangainereria baria bakkonia amaremo echikanisa ataiyo aari kayole na Ruai. Manya buya abanyene oboremo ase ofisi chia amaremo otaraakana besa chinde chionsi."
Dholuo: "DCI chiwo siem ne joma wuondo ji ma uso 'piny mag kanisa' e Kayole kod Ruai.
Somali: "DCI waxay ka digeysaa in la xakameeyo kuwa iibiya 'goobaha been abuurka ah' ee Kayole iyo Ruai. Sharciyada hantida ee Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda ka hor inta aan la bixin wax lacag ah".

English: NSSF alerts contributors to disregard WhatsApp messages claiming there is a special withdrawal window for those over 40. No such provision exists.
Kiswahili: NSSF yawatahadharisha wachangiaji kupuuza jumbe za WhatsApp wakidai kuna dirisha maalum la kujiondoa kwa wale walio na umri wa zaidi ya miaka 40. Hakuna kifungu kama hicho kilichopo.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kiabagotu (NSSF) giakureire abanto baye bonsi baombie amanga ande onsi korwa WhatsApp agotebia abanto ng'a baria bonsi baikire emiaka 40 nkonyarekana ere korusia chibesa chiabo. Mang'ana anga buna ayio taiyo.
Dholuo: NSSF okwedo ote miore hatsApp ka giwacho ni nitie thuolo makende mar weyo solro ni jogo ma hikgi oloyo 40.
Somali: NSF waxay uga digeysaa qorayaasha inay iska indha tiriyaan fariimaha WhatsApp ee sheegaya in ay jiraan daaqado gaar ah oo loogu talagalay dadka ka weyn 40 sano.

English: Be cautious of investment apps advertised during football matches on illegal streams. Many are fronts for data theft or financial fraud.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu na programu za uwekezaji zinazotangazwa wakati wa mechi za mpira wa miguu kwenye matangazo haramu. Nyingi ni njia za wizi wa data au ulaghai wa kifedha.
Ekegusii: Erende korwa amatangaso yokonyora chibesa goetera chitimu chiomopira chikobua chigotangaswa ekero kiemepira egoakwa ase abarimo gagwesoi ime. Abange babwo nigo barengete komanya na koiba amangana yebinto biao bakoibere nonya nechibesa.
Dholuo: Bed motang' gi chenro mag keno ma ilandoga saa tuke e Intanet
Somali: Ka digtoonow barnaamijyada dhaqaale ee lagu shaaciyo inta lagu jiro ciyaaraha kubada cagta ee durdurrada sharci darrada ah.

English: "The Judiciary has received complaints about fake court summons sent via email. Summons are never delivered electronically or through WhatsApp
Kiswahili: "Mahakama imepokea malalamiko kuhusu wito bandia wa mahakama unaotumwa kupitia barua pepe. Wito haujawasilishwa kielektroniki au kupitia WhatsApp."
Ekegusii: "EkKoti yanyorire okwemurunganania okonge igoro yokorangerigwa kwa abanto baike kotini ase enchera yoborimo goetera eintaneti. Amangana yokorangerigwa goika kotini tari gotomwa goetera eintaneti gose goetera Whatsapp.
Dholuo: migao mar chike osekwedo lendo mioro e kot e yor email.
Somali: "Xukuumadda Garsoorka waxay heshay cabasho ku saabsan warar been abuur ah oo ay maxkamadu soo dirtay e-mayl.

English: EACC warns of imposters offering job placements at parastatals for upfront cash. All official job listings are published on PSC and organization websites.
Kiswahili: EACC yaonya kuhusu matapeli wanaotoa nafasi za kazi katika mashirika ya umma kwa pesa taslimu mapema. Orodha zote rasmi za kazi huchapishwa kwenye tovuti za PSC na mashirika.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) giakureire abakwebeka buna mbare namabaga ase yemeremo ase chikambani chiserikari ase okobaakana besa inke. Emeremo yonsi yeserikari nigo egotangaswa ase ensemo yeserikari tenerete emeremo yeserikari (PSC) na ase eintaneti yechikambani echio.
Dholuo: EACC chiwo siem ne joma wuondore ni chiwo tije e sirkal kaluwore gi pesa
Somali: EACC waxay ka digeysaa dadka codsiyada shaqada u diraya xarumaha parastals lacag caddaan ah. Dhammaan liisaska rasmiga ah ee shaqooyinka waxaa lagu daabacaa bogagga internetka ee PSC iyo ururada.

English: "People have been sent 'Safaricom refund claim' links that look like the real site. Safaricom does not issue refunds without an official claim form."
Kiswahili: "Watu wametumiwa viungo vya 'Safaricom refund claim' vinavyofanana na tovuti halisi. Safaricom haitoi marejesho bila fomu rasmi ya madai."
Ekegusii: "Abanto batomeirwe amang'ana koiranigwa chibesa ase bare ase egsio ekebe korwa safaricom. 'Ogosabwa oko koirania chibesa nigo kogokorwa ase enchera omonto okonayra kwegena. Safaricom teri gosaba koiranigwa gwechibesa otaichoretie efomu yabeene."
Dholuo: ji mangeny oseyudo wach mamiriambo ni safaricom dwoko pesa.  Kambi no osekwedo wachno
Somali: "Dadka ayaa loo diray 'Safaricom refrifly supsition' isku xirka la mid ah goobta dhabta ah. Safaricom ma bixiso heshiis aan lahayn foom rasmi ah oo sheegashada ah".

English: The Ministry of Transport has received reports of fake NTSA agents collecting bribes along major highways. Report any suspicious activity via 999 or NTSA portal
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Uchukuzi imepokea ripoti za maajenti bandia wa NTSA wakikusanya rushwa kwenye barabara kuu. Ripoti shughuli yoyote ya kutiliwa shaka kupitia 999 au lango la NTSA
Ekegusii: Emonistiri yobobogoria yanyorire amang'ana igoro yabateneneri boborimo ba (NTSA) bagosaba amaaki ase chinhera chinene. Karwe amangana igoro yamang'ana anga buna ayio are nechitang'utang'u naro goetera enamba yesimi yamorero 999 gose eintaneti ya (NTSA)
Dholuo: Tij Lando osemiyo ofis mar weche mag wuoth ofwenyo ni joma ok kare ma tiyo gi NTSA ne kawo asoya e nderni madongo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Gaadiidka waxay heshay warbixin ku saabsan wakiilada been abuurka ah ee NTSA oo musuqmaasuq ka qaadaya waddooyinka waaweyn.

English: "CBK reminds Kenyans that any investment requiring you to recruit others to earn returns is likely a pyramid scheme. Report such activities immediately."
Kiswahili: "CBK inawakumbusha Wakenya kwamba uwekezaji wowote unaokuhitaji kuajiri wengine ili kupata faida huenda ni mpango wa piramidi. Ripoti shughuli kama hizo mara moja."
Ekegusii: "Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK) nkoinyoria ere aba'Kenyan ng'a moroberio bwokobeka chibesa ande yonsi eganetie orike abanto gosoa aroro erio konyora eng'eria rnigo enga buna emeroberio yoboibi buna eria ya pyramid scheme. Karwe eripoti ya yobokenga ebwo kegima kwayarora."
Dholuo: "CBK paronwa Jo-Kenya ni ohala madwaroni  ikele ji mang'eny koka iyud pesa en miriambo kendo iter ripot kapolis
Somali: "CBK waxay dadka reer Kenya u xusuusineysaa in dhaqaale kasta oo ku qasbanaada inaad dib u hesho dadka kale si aad u soo celiso lacagta ay u badan tahay in ay tahay qorshe pyramid ah.

English: "Fraudsters posing as election observers have been soliciting money from aspirants for fake clearance. IEBC does not charge for clearance forms."
Kiswahili: "Walaghai wanaojifanya waangalizi wa uchaguzi wamekuwa wakiomba pesa kutoka kwa wagombea kwa ajili ya kibali bandia. IEBC haitozi ada kwa fomu za kibali."
Ekegusii: "Abangainereria bagwekora buna abarigereria buna chikura chigoakwa babeire bagosangereria chibesa korwa ase baria bakorigia chikura kobarusia korwa erkodi yogokora bobe. Ekeombe keria gietenenerete buna chikura chiogoakwa (IEBC) nkeri gosaba chibesa erio korigereria gose nore namamocho aragotange toboria goakerwa chikura."
Dholuo: "Joma wuondore ni gin jorit mag yiero osebedo ka kwayo joma dwaro yudo rusa mag wuondruok pesa.
Somali: "Warar bixiyayaasha isku dayaya inay daawadaan doorashooyinka waxay lacag ka codsadeen taageerayaasha si ay u bixiyaan markhaatiyaal been abuur ah. IEBC ma sheeganeyso inay yihiin habab cad".

English: We advise Kenyans not to share photos of their ID, NHIF or voters card on Facebook job groups. These details are being harvested for fraud
Kiswahili: Tunawashauri Wakenya kutoshiriki picha za vitambulisho vyao, NHIF au kadi za wapiga kura kwenye vikundi vya kazi vya Facebook. Maelezo haya yanakusanywa kwa ajili ya ulaghai.
Ekegusii: Nigo togosemia abanto ba Kenya tibasanga chipicha chibibande chiabana babo, chiria chia nyagitari (NHIF ) gose chikadi chiogoaka chikura ase okorigia emeremo goetera Facebook. Amangana aya yabana bao nigo agotumika gokora obosaria.
Dholuo: Wachiwo ne jo Kenya rieko mar weyo keto picha mag ID, NHIF kata kad mar joma oyiero e grup mag tich e Facebook.
Somali: Waxaan kula talineynaa dadka Kenya inaysan isticmaalin sawirada aqoonsiga, NHIF ama kaarka codbixinta kooxaha shaqada ee Facebook.

English: NSSF has suspended several field agents found collecting cash for 'special processing. NSSF does not charge for fast-tracking services
Kiswahili: NSSF imewasimamisha kazi mawakala kadhaa wa shambani waliopatikana wakikusanya pesa kwa ajili ya 'usindikaji maalum. NSSF haitozi malipo kwa huduma za haraka
Ekegusii: Ekeoombe keria ekenene kiabagotu (NSSF) kiabutire abakori emeremo abange banyoretwe bagosangereria chibesa korwa abagotu erio kobakonya korosia chibesa chiobogotu bwabo. NSSF teri gosaba besa chinde chionsi ekero ekobwatia komanya ayakorengete.
Dholuo: NSSF osegolo jotich makwayo pesa kuom jopiny eka migi kony
Somali: NSF waxay soo bandhigtay qaar ka mid ah qalabka adeegga ee la helay si ay u ururiyaan lacag loogu talagalay nidaamka gaarka ah ee NSSF ee aan bixin adeegyada degdegga ah - degdegga ah

English: Several students have lost fees to fake school accounts shared on WhatsApp. Always pay school fees through officially designated bank accounts.
Kiswahili: Wanafunzi kadhaa wamepoteza karo kutokana na akaunti bandia za shule zinazoshirikiwa kwenye WhatsApp. Lipa karo za shule kila wakati kupitia akaunti za benki zilizoteuliwa rasmi.
Ekegusii: Abana abange basisiririe chibesa chiesukuru fisi goetera chiakaonti chioborimo chibekire WhatsApp. Chingaki chionsi akana chibesa chiesukuru goetera ebengi yesukuru yekeene.
Dholuo: Jopuonjre mang'eny oselalo osuru nikech gik ma ne giwacho e skul ma ne gin miriambo ma ne gichiwo e WhatsApp.
Somali: Arday dhowr ah ayaa lumisay khidmadaha xisaabaadka been abuurka ah ee dugsiyada lagu soo diro barta WhatsApp.

English: KRA warns taxpayers not to use agents who claim they can erase penalties for a fee. All tax waivers are issued through formal channels.
Kiswahili: KRA yaonya walipa kodi kutotumia mawakala wanaodai wanaweza kufuta adhabu kwa ada. Misamaha yote ya kodi hutolewa kupitia njia rasmi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenenerete korusia ebango (KRA) kiarure ogokurera ase baria bagoakana chikodi chiabo tibatumia abaachenti abwo bakobang'aina nga nabo baranyare gotinyia chifaini chiabo ase okorwa gento geke. Okonacherwa gose kogokeaneri abango nigo kogokorwa goetera enchera ya ofisi yoka.
Dholuo: KRA chiwo siem ne josol osuru ni kik giti gi joma wacho ni ginyalo rucho osuru bang' chudo.
Somali: KRA waxay ka digeysaa cashuur bixiyayaasha inay u adeegsadaan qareenada sheeganaya inay joojin karaan ganaaxyada lacag bixinta.

English: Those job ads for 'NGO agents hiring enumerators' without an interview are a scam. Verify with the actual NGO before sending money."
Kiswahili: Matangazo hayo ya kazi kwa 'mawakala wa mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali wanaoajiri wahesabuji' bila mahojiano ni ulaghai. Thibitisha na mashirika yasiyo ya kiserikali kabla ya kutuma pesa.
Ekegusii: Amangana ogosegeta korwa abaagenti ba'NGO ng'a nkorika bare abanto bakorika amang'ana gotakorigwa ogotemwa kwemeremo namangana oborimo. Manya boronge ng'a NGO ki yatomete amang'ana ayio."
Dholuo: Lendo mag tich michiwo gi NGOs maonge intaviw gin mag miriambo
Somali: Xayeysiisyada shaqo ee loogu talagalay 'Wakiilada NGO-yada ee shaqaaleysiiya taageerayaasha' iyada oo aan la waraysan waa khiyaano. Hubi hay'adda NGO-da lafteeda ka hor intaadan lacag dirin".

English: EACC notes rising cases of impersonation in procurement offices. Report anyone claiming to 'influence' tender outcomes
Kiswahili: EACC yabaini visa vinavyoongezeka vya uigaji katika ofisi za ununuzi. Ripoti mtu yeyote anayedai 'kushawishi' matokeo ya zabuni
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokorekanu (EACC) kiarorire ng'a ekogeseka kwobosaria bwogwekora abakori emeremo ba eofisi yobogori bweserikari. Karwe eripoti igoro ya monto onde oresio kobukania obogori bwechitenda chuieserikari
Dholuo: EACC ong'eyo ni nitie joma medo wuondo ji e tije mag pesa.
Somali: EACC waxay sheegeysaa kiisaska sii kordhaya ee ah inay noqdaan kuwa ugu caansan xafiisyada iibsiga.

English: "The Ministry of Agriculture has disowned individuals collecting registration fees for 'subsidized fertilisers. All legitimate lists are displayed at ward offices."
Kiswahili: "Wizara ya Kilimo imewakataa watu wanaokusanya ada za usajili kwa 'mbolea zilizofadhiliwa. Orodha zote halali zinaonyeshwa katika ofisi za kata."
Ekegusii: "Eminisitiri yoboremi yangire abanto abanto bagosangereria chibesa chiokwerika ase okonyora obwoyo bweserikari. Amariko akworokia emeroberio eyio nkonantigwa are ase kera Ewodi Yomokansera oino."
Dholuo: jatend migao mar pur osedagi tim mar chulo pesa eka ji yud mbolea
Somali: "Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay diidday dadka soo uruuriya khidmadaha diiwaangelinta ee 'bixiyeyaasha la joojiyay. Liisaska sharciga ah oo dhan waa la dhigay xafiisyada".

English: CBK warns Kenyans against sending money to social media groups promising weekly payouts from investment plans. These are unregulated and illegal.
Kiswahili: CBK inawaonya Wakenya dhidi ya kutuma pesa kwa vikundi vya mitandao ya kijamii na kuahidi malipo ya kila wiki kutoka kwa mipango ya uwekezaji. Hizi hazidhibitiwi na ni kinyume cha sheria.
Ekegusii: Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK) yakureire abaKenya igoro yogotoma chibesa gochia chigurupu chiembeo bakobangaina konyora obwaita kera ewiki. Ebinto binga buna ebio tibiri bia amachiko igo nebiobong'ainereria.
Dholuo: CBK osiemo jo Kenya ni kik gior pesa ne grube mag social media ma singo ni gibiro chulo pesa juma ka juma kuom chenro mag ohala.
Somali: CBK waxay uga digeysaa dadka Kenya inay lacag u diraan kooxaha shabakadaha bulshada ee ballanqaadaya lacag maalgelin toddobaadle ah.

English: "Public notice: DCI has shut down a fraudulent real estate company operating under multiple names in Kiambu. Always perform a search at the Lands Ministry."
Kiswahili: "Taarifa kwa umma: DCI imefunga kampuni ya ulaghai ya mali isiyohamishika inayofanya kazi kwa majina mengi huko Kiambu. Daima fanya utafutaji katika Wizara ya Ardhi."
Ekegusii: "Ogokurera ase bonsi": Omotuki omonene osiekire ekampani yobokengeka ogokora obokengeka bwaye goetera amarieta ao ao aaria Kiambu ekongaina abanto kobaoneria emechi yokomenya operating. Kera engaki rigia komanya obomaene bwebinto binga buna ebio korwa ofosi yamaremo."
Dholuo: DCI osemako jomatimo ohand lowo e yo morochore kiambu
Somali: "Ogaysiiska dadweynaha: DCI waxay xidhtay shirkad beero iyo guri been abuur ah oo ku shaqeysa magacyo kala duwan Kiambu. Had iyo jeer waxay baaritaan ku sameysaa Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda".

English: Fake insurance brokers have been selling invalid motor covers in bus stations. Confirm your insurer through IRA  public registry.
Kiswahili: Madalali wa bima bandia wamekuwa wakiuza vifuniko vya magari visivyo halali katika vituo vya mabasi. Thibitisha kampuni yako ya bima kupitia usajili wa umma wa IRA.
Ekegusii: Abaonia bechinsuarensi boborimo babeire bakoonia ebinto bioborimo nonya nime yechirori chibasi. Manya buya ng'a einsuarensi yao nerikire gose neitabire neserikari goetera Insuaren Regulatory Authority (IRA).
Dholuo: Jolok ohala mag miriambo osebedo ka uso inshuarens mag mtoka e stesen mag bas.
Somali: Dillaacayaasha caymiska waxay ku iibiyeen baabuurta oo lacag la'aan ah joogsiyada basaska. Hubi shirkaddaada caymiska iyada oo loo marayo diiwaangelinta IRA ee dadweynaha.

English: Communications Authority has warned of fake WiFi installers operating in residential estates. Confirm service providers through the CA licensed list
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Mawasiliano imeonya kuhusu wafungaji bandia wa WiFi wanaofanya kazi katika maeneo ya makazi. Thibitisha watoa huduma kupitia orodha iliyoidhinishwa ya CA
Ekegusii: Communications Authority has warned of fake WiFi installers operating in residential estates. Confirm service providers through the CA licensed list
Dholuo: Migao mar Fuambo gi keyo osegolo siem kuom jogo ma keto Wi-Fi e ute mag ji.
Somali: Maamulka Isgaarsiinta ayaa ka digay qalabka WiFi-ga ee been abuurka ah ee ka shaqeeya guryaha dadka deggan.

English: "We have received multiple reports of individuals faking job placement letters for Qatar and UAE. All foreign employment must go through accredited agencies."
Kiswahili: "Tumepokea ripoti nyingi za watu binafsi wanaofanya barua za uwekaji kazi bandia kwa Qatar na UAE. Ajira zote za kigeni lazima zipitie mashirika yaliyoidhinishwa."
Ekegusii: "Twanyorire chiripoti chinyinge chiabanto bagwegokora ng'a mbare namarube yemeremo gochia Qatar na UAE. Emeremo yonsi gochia chinse chia isiko goika aetere ebiombe bimanyekanete buya nabwo bagotebwa nga mbare nemeremo neserikari ya Kenya"
Dholuo: "Waseyudo ripode mang'eny mag ji magolo barupe mag tich e Qatar kod UAE e yo morochore
Somali: "Waxaan helnay warbixinno badan oo ku saabsan dadka qoraya waraaqaha shaqada ee Qatar iyo Imaaraadka. Dhammaan shaqooyinka dibadda waa inay maraan hay'adaha soo galaya".

English: "The Ministry of ICT reminds citizens that all eCitizen payments are automated. Do not send money to personal numbers for services."
Kiswahili: "Wizara ya TEHAMA inawakumbusha raia kwamba malipo yote ya kielektroniki ni otomatiki. Usitume pesa kwa nambari za kibinafsi kwa huduma."
Ekegusii: "Eminisitiri yamang'ana netekinorochi yokoererania amang'ana (ICT)nkoinyoria ere abanainchi chibesa chionsi chia eCitizen nigo chigoakanwa goetera ebengi na Mpesa chimanyekanete neserikari . Tiga gotoma chibesa gochia chinamba chabanto nonya ngake."
Dholuo: "Ministerio mar ICT parone raia ni chudo duto mag eCitizen itimo gi masinde. Kik ior pesa e namba mag ji mondo iyudgo tich".
Somali: Adeegga ICT wuxuu muwaadiniinta xasuusinayaa in dhammaan lacag bixinta eCitizen ay maamusho dawladda. Ha u dirin lacag lambarrada shaqsiyeed ee adeegga. "

English: "Fake humanitarian campaigns using stolen photos have been flagged on Twitter. Always verify fundraisers through trusted platforms like M-Changa or Red Cross Kenya."
Kiswahili: "Kampeni bandia za kibinadamu zinazotumia picha zilizoibiwa zimeripotiwa kwenye Twitter. Daima thibitisha wafadhili kupitia majukwaa yanayoaminika kama M-Changa au Msalaba Mwekundu Kenya."
Ekegusii: "Chibicha chioborimo gotumia chibicha chiabanto bande baibete korigeria chibesa chiangirwe buna okogenda mamincha yerichiko ria twiter. Kera engaki chungusa abakorigia chibesa goetra chinchera chiegenire buna M-Changa gose Omosaraba Omobaririri) Red Cross Kenya."
Dholuo: "Kampen mag konyo ji ma ok kare ma tiyo gi piche mokwal oseket e twita. Kinde duto tem neno joma golo chiwo kokalo kuom kuonde ma igeno kaka M-Changa kata Red Cross Kenya".
Somali: "Hawlgalada xuquuqda aadanaha ee loo adeegsado sawirada la xaday ayaa lagu daabacay barta Twitter-ka. had iyo jeer waxaa lagu xaqiijiyaa barta la isku halleyn karo sida M-Changa ama Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya".

English: Nairobi residents, beware of people who claim to provide business loans within an hour. The government does not have such a cash-in-hand program.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Nairobi, jihadharini na watu wanaodai kutoa mikopo ya biashara ndani ya saa moja. Serikali haina mpango kama huo wa pesa taslimu.
Ekegusii: Abamenyi ba Nairobi, kab maiso nabanto bagwekora ng'a nkorwa bare chironi chiebiasara ase engaki yensa eyemo yoka. Eserikari tebwati moroberio onga buna eyio bwechibesa koboko chiokorwa.
Dholuo: Jood Nairobi, tang'uru gi joma wacho ni gimiyou pesa ohala dichiel.
Somali: Dadka ku nool Nairobi, ka digtoonaada dadka ku andacooda in ay bixiyaan amaah ganacsi saacad gudaheed.

English: Kenyans are warned to avoid online forex traders promising guaranteed profits. CBK does not license individuals to offer such services.
Kiswahili: Wakenya wanaonywa kuepuka wafanyabiashara wa fedha za kigeni mtandaoni wanaowaahidi faida iliyohakikishwa. CBK haiwape watu leseni ya kutoa huduma kama hizo.
Ekegusii: Abakenya bakureirwe gwetanga koonia chibesa chiechinse ao ao goetera eintaneti abanyabiasara bakongaina abanto nga abaita obonene mboreo. Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK) teri korwa erensesi as omonto oyomo gkora agasi eyio.
Dholuo: jopiny Kenya ikwero mondo kik gikwed jo ohala mag  forex ma singo ni gibiro yudo pesa. CBK ok chiw thuolo ne ji mondo ochiw tije kaka mago.
Somali: Kuwa Kenya waa inay ka fogaadaan ganacsatada galmada internetka ee ballanqaadaya faa'iidooyinka la xaqiijiyay. CBK ma siinayso dadka xuquuqda ay ku bixiyaan adeegyada noocan oo kale ah.

English: DCI cautions the public against forged university admission letters being used to defraud parents. Always verify admission directly with the institution.
Kiswahili: DCI inaonya umma dhidi ya barua bandia za udahili wa chuo kikuu zinazotumiwa kuwadanganya wazazi. Daima thibitisha udahili moja kwa moja na taasisi hiyo.
Ekegusii: Omotuki omonene okureire aanainchi igoro yamarube yogosa eyunifasiti yoborimo agendererete gotimeka kongaina na koibera abaibori. Kera engaki chungusa rirube riogosoa eyunifasiti goetra uyunifasiti enyene.
Dholuo: DCI chiwo siem ne ji duto kuom weche mag miriambo ma nyalo miyo giyud barua mag somo e yunivasiti mondo okony jonyuol.
Somali: DCI waxay ka digeysaa dadweynaha in ay ka soo gudbiyaan qoraallada jaamacadaha been abuurka ah ee loo adeegsado in lagu khiyaameeyo waalidiinta. Waxay marwalba hubisaa in hay'addu si toos ah u ogolaato.

English: Public warning: There are no County Government jobs offered via agents in town. Anyone asking for a facilitation fee is running a scam.
Kiswahili: Onyo la Umma: Hakuna kazi za Serikali ya Kaunti zinazotolewa kupitia mawakala mjini. Mtu yeyote anayeomba ada ya uwezeshaji anaendesha ulaghai.
Ekegusii: Ogokurerwa kwa bonsi: Meremo teiyo yechikaonti okorugwa goetera abaachenti abwo emechie gose chitaoni. Onde bwensi ogosaba chibesa chiokomokonya agokorere ayio noboibi maiso marore.
Dholuo: Ji duto ong'eyo ni onge tije mag sirkal ma ibiro chiw kokalo kuom agents
Somali: Dadweynaha: Ma jiraan shaqooyin dowladeed oo lagu bixiyo wakiilada magaalada. Qof kasta oo codsanaya lacag maalgelinta dowladda ayaa baxsanaya.

English: "Communications Authority has launched a hotline for reporting impersonation scams involving fake mobile providers. Dial 0800 222 777 to report."
Kiswahili: "Mamlaka ya Mawasiliano imezindua simu ya dharura kwa ajili ya kuripoti ulaghai wa uigaji unaohusisha watoa huduma bandia za simu. Piga 0800 222 777 ili kuripoti."
Ekegusii: "Ekeombe getenenerete oboererania bwamang'ana giaansire enamba ya morero gokonya koyemanyia gose abasikari igoro yabanto bagwekona nga nkorwa bare obokoreri beintaneti. Aka esimi 0800 222 777 koyemanyia amang'ana ayio."
Dholuo: Sirkal ochiwo namba mar 0800 222 777 mondo watigo e chiwo ripod kuo mar simu
Somali: "Xirfadaha isgaarsiinta ayaa bilaabay barnaamij ay ku soo bandhigaan khiyaanooyinka isgaarsiinta dadka oo ay ku lug leeyihiin bixiyeyaasha taleefanada been abuurka ah. Dial00 222 777 si ay u soo sheegaan".

English: "Be cautious of agents offering NHIF registration at matatu stages. Report such individuals to the nearest police post. NHIF registration is free."
Kiswahili: "Kuwa mwangalifu na mawakala wanaotoa usajili wa NHIF katika hatua za matatu. Waripoti watu kama hao kwenye kituo cha polisi kilicho karibu. Usajili wa NHIF ni bure."
Ekegusii: "Kabe maiso korwa abanto bagwekora ng'a nkorika bare ase omoroberio bweinsuarensi ya nyagitari (NHIF) abwo ase chirori chikorinerwa. Ripoti abanto abwo ase eporisi ere ange naye. Kwerika koba oyomo ase Einsuarensi ya Nyagitari (NHIF) mbosa egokorwa."
Dholuo: "Bed motang' gi joma chiwo kwayo mar ng'ado nying' e NHIF e stadiums mag matatu.
Somali: "Ka taxaddar saraakiisha booliska ee isdiiwaangaliya saldhigyada saddexaad.

English: "The Ministry of Education reiterates that bursary forms are distributed freely and do not require payment. Any demand for money should be reported."
Kiswahili: "Wizara ya Elimu inasisitiza kwamba fomu za ufadhili wa masomo zinasambazwa kwa uhuru na hazihitaji malipo. Ombi lolote la pesa linapaswa kuripotiwa."
Ekegusii: "Eminisitiri yechisemi yabekire chinguru nga chibasari chiesukuru nigo chikorugwa bosa fnaigo tegaineirie nga oakane. Gosabwa besa chinde chionsi nere buya korwaipoti."
Dholuo: "Minister mar Puonjruok wacho ni fom mag chiwo chiwo chiwo ok ochuno ni ng'ato ochul pesa, kendo ni onego ochiw ripot kuom kwayo moro amora mar pesa".
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa sheegtay in sanduuqyada loo qaybiyo si xor ah oo aan loo baahnayn lacag".

English: "We urge Kenyans to double-check the legitimacy of any NGO requesting donations via mobile payment. Many have been flagged for fraud."
Kiswahili: "Tunawahimiza Wakenya kuangalia upya uhalali wa shirika lolote lisilo la kiserikali linaloomba michango kupitia malipo ya simu. Mengi yametajwa kwa ulaghai."
Ekegusii: "Nigo togosaba abakenya koirorera gocheki oboamaene bwebiombe bia NGO dchigosaba ogokonya goetera entaneti. Chinyinge chiechio chianyorirwe koba echioboibi"
Dholuo: "Wakwayo jo Kenya mondo onon ane ni riwruok moro amora mar NGO ma kwayo chiwo kokalo kuom pesa mitimo e yor simo en riwruok mar oganda Nyasaye.
Somali: "Waxaan ugu baaqaynaa dadka reer Kenya in ay labanlaabaan sharci ahaanta hay'ad kasta oo aan dowladeed ahayn oo lacag bixinta taleefanka gacanta ka dalbanaysa.

English: Do not give your M-PESA PIN to anyone! This is a very common scam.
Kiswahili: Usimpe mtu yeyote PIN yako ya M-PESA! Huu ni ulaghai wa kawaida sana.
Ekegusii: Tobaisa korwa epini ya M-PESA yaogochia ase onde bwensi! Eye nero enchera abange baibeirwe.
Dholuo: Kik imi ng'ato ang'ata PIN mar M-PESA!
Somali: Hana siinina mid ka mid ah rizqiga, arrintaasuna waa wasakh muuqda.

English: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) for all bank and social media accounts.
Kiswahili: Wezesha uthibitishaji wa vipengele viwili (2FA) kwa akaunti zote za benki na mitandao ya kijamii.
Ekegusii: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) for all bank and social media accounts.
Dholuo: Bed gadier gi gik moko ariyo (2FA) e wi weche duto mag bengi kod weche mag social media.
Somali: Xaqiijinta laba-geesoodka ah (FA) dhammaan xisaabaadka bangiyada iyo shabakadaha bulshada.

English: Beware of emails pretending to be from banks asking for account verification.
Kiswahili: Jihadhari na barua pepe zinazojifanya kuwa zinatoka benki zinazoomba uthibitishaji wa akaunti.
Ekegusii: Beware of emails pretending to be from banks asking for account verification.
Dholuo: Tang' gi barupe ma nyiso ni gin mag bengi
Somali: Ka digtoonow emails-ka bangiga oo u sheega in la xaqiijiyay koontadaada.

English: Use a strong password like 'Nairobi2023!/' that is not easy to crack.
Kiswahili: Tumia nenosiri kali kama 'Nairobi2023!/' ambalo si rahisi kulifungua.
Ekegusii: Tumia enomba yesiri enkongu okoigorera esimi yao buna Gusii2025! Eyio etari raisi ase monto onde koigora.
Dholuo: Ti gi paswad motegno ka 'Nairobi2023!/' ma ok yot ketho.
Somali: Isticmaal eray sir ah oo xoog leh sida "Nairobi2023!/'

English: Never click on suspicious links like 'Youve won KSh 100,000!' in SMS.
Kiswahili: Kamwe usibofye viungo vinavyotiliwa shaka kama 'Umeshinda KSh 100,000!' katika SMS.
Ekegusii: Tobaisa kobata eraini yeintaneti orechitangutangu nero buna eria ekogotebi ng'a kwanyorire chibesa 100,000!' goetera amangana ameng'e eyesimi.
Dholuo: Kik idonj e  tuke ma nyalo miyo ng'ato opar ni inyaloyudo pesa mangeny kaka 'Isebedo gi pesa 100,000 KSh!' e SMS.
Somali: Weligaa ha gujin lifaaqyada shakiga leh sida "Waxaad ku guuleysatay 100,000 KSh!" farriimaha qoraalka ah.

English: Update your phones software monthly to fix security vulnerabilities.
Kiswahili: Sasisha programu yako ya simu kila mwezi ili kurekebisha udhaifu wa usalama.
Ekegusii: Kera engaki tema gokora keboyia einchini yesimi yao kera omotienyi erio koyerenda korwa okoriegwa nebinyinyi.
Dholuo: Timga nonro e yor simo dwe ka dwe mondo ine kuonde ma weche tekie.
Somali: Dib u eeg barnaamijyada telefoonka bil kasta si aad u hagaajisid xannibaadaha amniga.

English: If your child is being bullied online, report it to the DCI Cyber ​​Unit immediately!
Kiswahili: Ikiwa mtoto wako ananyanyaswa mtandaoni, toa taarifa kwa Kitengo cha Mawasiliano cha DCI mara moja!
Ekegusii: Onye omwana oo ogochandwa, kogoswa gose koramwa goetera eintaneti, manyia omonene bwobotuki otari konyorwa!
Dholuo: Kapo ni nyathini yudo chandruok e Intanet, nyis migao mar weche intanet wachno mapiyo!
Somali: Haddii ilmahaagu ku xadgudbo Internetka, si dhakhso leh u soo sheeg Xarunta Kombuyuutarka DCI!

English: Avoid using public Wi-Fi for banking. Hackers can steal your data.
Kiswahili: Epuka kutumia Wi-Fi ya umma kwa ajili ya benki. Wadukuzi wanaweza kuiba data yako.
Ekegusii: Tiga gotumia chisimi gose eintaneti kobeka gose gotoma chibesa gochia akaonti yao yebengi. Gokora igo nigo okorwa ribaga abaibi bare nobang'aini bwogosoa eintaneti yao na gokoibera ase obowororo.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi Intanet e weche mag bengi nikech jonjore mag Intanet nyalo kwalo weche ma in-go.
Somali: Ka fogow adeegsiga shabakadaha bulshada ee Wi-Fi ee bangiyada. Hackers waxay xadin karaan macluumaadkaaga.

English: Teach children to avoid sharing personal details with 'online friends'.
Kiswahili: Wafundishe watoto kuepuka kushiriki maelezo ya kibinafsi na 'marafiki mtandaoni'.
Ekegusii: Abana batige gosanga amangana abao nabasani babo bembeo goeera eintaneti.
Dholuo: Puonj nyithindo kik giwach weche mopandore gi 'osiepe ma gin-go e Intanet.'
Somali: Carruurta baro inaysan waxyaabaha shakhsi ahaaneed u sheegin "saaxiibbada taleefanka".

English: Check 'Serena_254's' profile to see if it's legit before accepting the friend request.
Kiswahili: Angalia wasifu wa 'Serena_254's' ili kuona kama ni halali kabla ya kukubali ombi la urafiki.
Ekegusii: Risegereria komanya inki 'Serena_254's' erengete nyuma otarakora kende nabarabwo.
Dholuo: Non ane weche ma Serena_254 nowacho kapok iyie gi kwayo mar bedo osiepne.
Somali: Fiiri 'Serena_254 comments si aad u aragto haddii ay fiican tahay in aad aqbasho codsiga saaxiibkaa.

English: Use a VPN on public networks to encrypt your internet traffic.
Kiswahili: Tumia VPN kwenye mitandao ya umma ili kuficha trafiki yako ya intaneti.
Ekegusii: Tumia chinamba chiesiri ekero ogosoa ase Wi-Fi yabanto bonsi erio bwerende korwa abant barengete koyetuka komanya ninki kere ime.
Dholuo: Ti gi VPN e intanet mondo ipand weche mitime intanet.
Somali: Isticmaal shabakadda VPN ee shabakadaha dadweynaha si aad u qariso adeegyadaada internetka.

English: Lock SIM yako kwa *something#! Usiache mtu atumie line yako kufanya maovu.
Kiswahili: Funga SIM yako kwa *something#! Usiache mtu atumie mstari wako kufanya maovu.
Ekegusii: Sieka ESIM kadi yesimi yao buna *gentogete#! Totigera omonto atumie eraini yesimi yao gokora obobe
Dholuo: ket *something#! E simbi mondo kik ti gi simbi marach
Somali: Lock aad SIM la *June #! Ha u oggolaan in ay ku dhintaan line aad u samaynta aagag.

English: Fake job offers like 'Earn KSh 50k daily from home' are scams.Avoid upfront payments.
Kiswahili: Ofa bandia za kazi kama vile 'Pata KSh 50k kila siku kutoka nyumbani' ni ulaghai. Epuka malipo ya awali.
Ekegusii: Emeremo yoborimo buna Nyora chinusi chilifu 50 kera rituko korwa nka' namangana oborimo agotumeka gokora oboibi. Tiga korwa chibesa omanye konyora chibesa.
Dholuo: Meseg mawacho ni inyalo 'Yudo KSh 50,000 pile ka pile ka in dala' en miriambo
Somali: Fakash wuxuu bixiyaa sida "Ku kasbo 50k KSh maalin kasta guriga" waa khiyaano.orgA exegection.

English: Monitor bank statements for unauthorized transactions weekly.
Kiswahili: Fuatilia taarifa za benki kwa miamala isiyoidhinishwa kila wiki.
Ekegusii: Mongera buna chibesa chia chigosoa na gosoka kera ewiki ase akaonti yebengi yao erio onyare komanya bwango boibi bonde bwonsi bobaise kobao.
Dholuo: Non weche mag bengi ma nyiso kaka isudo pesa juma ka juma.
Somali: Warbixinnada bangiga ee todobaadlaha ah ee ku saabsan heshiisyada sharci darrada ah.

English: Don't write your passwords down in a book! Use an app like 'SafePass' to save them.
Kiswahili: Usiandike manenosiri yako kwenye kitabu! Tumia programu kama 'SafePass' kuyahifadhi.
Ekegusii: Tiga korika ringana riao riesiri riesimi goge ebengi ase egetabu! Tumia omoroberio beintanati yao ekero okoyeigora 'SafePass' rio korenda ringana erio ria riabobisi.
Dholuo: ti gi app kaka 'SafePass' mondo iket paswad e yo maber.
Somali: Ha qorin erayadaada qarsoodiga ah kitaab.

English: Use biometrics (fingerprint/face ID) instead of PINs where possible.
Kiswahili: Tumia biometriki (alama za vidole/kitambulisho cha uso) badala ya PIN inapowezekana.
Ekegusii: Tumia egento buna ekiara kiao gose epicha yobosio bwao rika ria enamba yesiri ase ekonyarekana.
Dholuo: Ti gi pichni mag dhano (fingerprint/face ID) kar tiyo gi PIN ka nyalore.
Somali: Haddii ay suurtogal tahay, laba farac u isticmaal halkii aad ka heli lahayd PIN-yada.

English: Download apps only from Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
Kiswahili: Pakua programu kutoka Duka la Google Play au Duka la Programu la Apple pekee.
Ekegusii: Nyora ebinto biria gigokonya esimi gokora emeremo yaye goetera Google Play Store gose Apple App Store.
Dholuo: Gol app mana e Google Play Store kata Apple App Store.
Somali: Codsiyada ka soo dejiso Google Play Stost ama Apple Store oo keliya.

English: If you are using a cyber computer, log out after using your Gmail!
Kiswahili: Ikiwa unatumia kompyuta ya mtandao, ondoka baada ya kutumia Gmail yako!
Ekegusii: Onye kogotumia ekombiuta yesaiba, rimia Gmail akaonti yao ekero gwakorire korora ebinto gwatagete!
Dholuo: Kapo ni itiyo gi kompyuta mar intanet, lor gi maber k ' tiyo gi Gmail!
Somali: Haddii aad isticmaasho kombiyuutarka, ka dib codso emaylkaaga!

English: Ignore messages like 'Youve won Safaricom Jackpot!'Theyre scams.
Kiswahili: Puuza jumbe kama 'Umeshinda Safaricom Jackpot!'Ni ulaghai.
Ekegusii: Ombia amang'ana ameng'e esimi buna 'Kwabuire ejakipoti ya Safaricom' Aya namangana arengete gokoibera.
Dholuo: Kik iwinj weche kaka, 'Iseloso Safaricom Jackpot!'
Somali: Diidmada fariimaha sida "Waxaad ku guuleysatay Safaricom Jackpot!"

English: Encrypt sensitive files before sharing them online.
Kiswahili: Simba faili nyeti kabla ya kuzishiriki mtandaoni.
Ekegusii: Amanagana ao obobisi yakeborane gochia enkwana yobobisi otayarasanga ase eintaneti.
Dholuo: ket siri e ndiko mopogore kapok iketogi e Intanet.
Somali: Faylasha qarsoodiga ah ka hor intaadan u qaybin internetka.

English: Don't use the same password for Gmail, Facebook, and bank! If hacked, they'll all be gone.
Kiswahili: Usitumie nenosiri moja kwa Gmail, Facebook, na benki! Ikiwa zitadukuliwa, zote zitatoweka.
Ekegusii: Totumia enamba yesiri eyemo ase esimi, ebengi, akaonti ya Gmail, sose Facebook! Omonto aise gwesoi ase akaonti yao, onso aria kwabwate aroro nigo agosira pi na tokoyanyora rinde.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi weche ma sirkal tiyogo e weche mag Gmail, Facebook, kod bank!
Somali: Ha isticmaalin sirta isku midka ah ee Gmail, Facebook iyo bangiyada!

English: Verify charities before donating online.Fake fundraisers are common.
Kiswahili: Thibitisha mashirika ya kutoa misaada kabla ya kutoa michango mtandaoni.Michango bandia ni ya kawaida.
Ekegusii: Kongoria buya ebiombe biria bigosaba ogokonywa goetera eintaneti otararwa besa ende yonsi. Abarigia chibesa boborimo nao bare.
Dholuo: Tem ane nono riwruoge ma konyo ji kapok ichiwo kony e Intanet.
Somali: Hay'adaha samafalka ka hor intaadan bixin deeqaha internetka.

English: Install antivirus software to protect against malware and spyware.
Kiswahili: Sakinisha programu ya antivirus ili kulinda dhidi ya programu hasidi na programu chafu.
Ekegusii: Beka egento keria kegotanga ebinyinyi ase esimi nekombiuta yao koyerenda korwa ebinyinyi bia malware na spyware.
Dholuo: Ket program mar antivirus program mag malware kod spyware.
Somali: Ku rakib barnaamijyada ka hortagga fayraska si aad uga ilaaliso bakteeriyada iyo qalabka kormeerka.

English: Avoid 'get rich quick' schemes promising high returns.Theyre Ponzi scams.
Kiswahili: Epuka mipango ya 'kutajirika haraka' inayoahidi faida kubwa. Ni ulaghai wa Ponzi.
Ekegusii: Tiga kongaineka ng'a notenke bwango' emeroberio amangana akogotebia obwaita bwa bwango. Obo noborimo.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi chenro mar ' bedo jamwandu mapiyo ' ma singo ni ibiro yudo pesa mang'eny.
Somali: Ka fogow barnaamijyada "si dhakhso leh u taajirsan" oo ballanqaadaya faa'iidooyin aad u sarreeya.

English: Secure home Wi-Fi with a strong password like 'Jamhuri@1963'.
Kiswahili: Linda Wi-Fi ya nyumbani kwa kutumia nenosiri kali kama 'Jamhuri@1963'.
Ekegusii: tanga abanto korwa eWi-Fi yao ya nka goetera ringana rikingu kwegia buna'Jamhuri@1963'.
Dholuo: Ket Wi-Fi mar ot obed motegno ka itiyo gi wach mar sirkal motegno kaka 'Jamhuri@1963'.
Somali: Guri aamin ah oo Wi-Fi ah oo leh eray sir ah oo xoog leh sida "Republic@1963'.

English: Turn off your Bluetooth when you're not using it! Others can access your phone.
Kiswahili: Zima Bluetooth yako wakati huitumii! Wengine wanaweza kufikia simu yako.
Ekegusii: Rimia eBluetooth yao ekero otari koyetumia. Abanto bande bensemo nabo barosoe ase esimi yao otamanyanyeti.
Dholuo: Geng'i Bluetooth sama ok itiyo kode!
Somali: Xidh midabka buluugga ah marka aadan isticmaalin, dadka kale waxay isticmaali karaan taleefankaaga.

English: Check for 'https://' and a padlock icon before entering payment details online.
Kiswahili: Angalia 'https://' na aikoni ya kufuli kabla ya kuingiza maelezo ya malipo mtandaoni.
Ekegusii: Rigereria 'https://' amo nekeogorero kiaye nyuma otarabeka gose goskana chisebesa goetera eintaneti.
Dholuo: Non ane ' kod ranyisi mar kad mar locho kapok idonjo weche midwaro chulo e intanet.
Somali: Ka hel macluumaadka 'https://' iyo muuqaalka muuqaalka ee dhismayaasha dadweynaha ka hor intaadan marin internetka lacag bixinta.

English: If someone says 'I'm with DCI, help me fix your computer', hang up! It's a scam.
Kiswahili: Ikiwa mtu atasema 'Niko upande wa DCI, nisaidie kurekebisha kompyuta yako', kata simu! Ni ulaghai.
Ekegusii: Omonto aise kogotebi 'nao inde nomotuku omonene, nkonye nkoroserie enkombiuta yao, rimia omonto oyio korwa enkwara nere! Oyo nkogokona are akoibere anamangana ao korwa ekombiuta.
Dholuo: Kapo ni ng'ato owacho ni, 'An e DCI, konya loso kompyuta,' kik iwuo kode
Somali: Haddii qofku yidhaahdo "Waxaan la socdaa DCI, i caawi inaan dayactiro kombuyuutarkaaga", waa khiyaano.

English: Back up important data to an external drive to avoid ransomware attacks.
Kiswahili: Hifadhi nakala rudufu ya data muhimu kwenye kiendeshi cha nje ili kuepuka mashambulizi ya ransomware.
Ekegusii: Rosia ekopi yamangana ao yengencho ase esimi goe ekombiuta gochia ekegachi kende terio gwekonya korwa ogosarigwa nebinyinyi
Dholuo: Golo weche madongo e kompyuta mondo kik gimi program mar ransomware omonjgi.
Somali: Soo celinta macluumaadka muhiimka ah si looga fogaado weerarada madaxfurashada.

English: Use privacy screens on laptops in public to prevent shoulder surfing.
Kiswahili: Tumia skrini za faragha kwenye kompyuta mpakato hadharani ili kuzuia kuteleza kwenye mabega.
Ekegusii: Tumia ekerore ase ekombiuta yao yakoboko ekerore monto onde ore ange naye atanyarekorora eki okorikagose gwancha monto abekerere gento igoro ase ekombiuta yao. Eyio nabe arabe enchera eyemo yomoiba amangana ao gose kokoibera chibesa.
Dholuo: Ti gi kompyuta ma nigi paswad mondo kik ng'ato kwal wecheni e mbui
Somali: Ku rakib xannibaadaha sirta ah kombiyuutarada dadweynaha si looga fogaado in lala socdo.

English: Don't use 'Mothers maiden name' for security questions! Use a fictional answer.
Kiswahili: Usitumie 'Jina la ukoo la Mama' kwa maswali ya usalama! Tumia jibu la kubuni.
Ekegusii: Tobaisa gotumia erieta riorera ria mama omino buna ring'ana ria riobobisi bwesimi gose ekombiuta. Tumia erieta riokwebaka orayare koinyora.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi nying mamau sama iseto paswad, to ti gi dwoko ma ok nyal bedo adier.
Somali: Ha isticmaalin magaca 'Hooyada' su'aalaha amniga!

English: Fake DHL parcel alerts are common scams.Verify via official customer service.
Kiswahili: Arifa bandia za vifurushi vya DHL ni ulaghai wa kawaida.Thibitisha kupitia huduma rasmi kwa wateja.
Ekegusii: Amanagana agokomanyia igoro yemesigo yoborimo goetera DHL nenchera eyemo abanto bakongainwa. Rigia komanya buya emeremo ekambani eyio egokora.
Dholuo: Meseg mag pasel mawuok DHL  gin miriambo.
Somali: Codsiga DHLlate waa macluumaad khiyaano ah oo caadi ah, iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyada rasmiga ah ee macaamiisha.

English: Do not open the 'Free Movies' USB on your computer! It may contain a virus.
Kiswahili: Usifungue USB ya 'Filamu za Bure' kwenye kompyuta yako! Huenda ikawa na virusi.
Ekegusii: Tobaise koigora gose kobeka chisiinema chia bosa ase ekombiuta yao goetera egento keria gekogacha chisinema gekorokwa eflash! Nabo keeranyare gosaria ekombiuta yao goetera ebinyinyi eflash ebogoretie.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi USB mar 'Free Movies' e kompyuta! Nyalo bedo ni oting'o tuwo moro.
Somali: Ha furin 'Magaalada Xorriyadda' kombiyuutarkaaga! Waxay ku jiri kartaa fayrasyo.

English: Use incognito mode on shared devices to avoid saving browsing history.
Kiswahili: Tumia hali fiche kwenye vifaa vilivyoshirikiwa ili kuepuka kuhifadhi historia ya kuvinjari.
Ekegusii: Ekero ogotumia ekombiuta yeintaneti, yebeke tabaisa kogacha eki kware korora gose gosoma ekero gwasiekire eki kware gokora. Renda gotagacha eki ogokora ase ase ekombiuta.
Dholuo: Ti gi yo mar ng'eyo weche maok nyal ng'ere e masinde ma ji tiyogo mondo kik iket weche ma ne isebedo ka itiyogo e ng'iyo weche manie web.
Somali: Isticmaal farsamooyin isku dhafan si aad u ilaaliso diiwaanka taariikhiga ah.

English: If you are looking for customer support, use the numbers on the company's website.
Kiswahili: Ikiwa unatafuta huduma kwa wateja, tumia nambari zilizo kwenye tovuti ya kampuni.
