Ekegusii: Onye gokorigia ogokonywa korwa ekambani, tumia chinamba chiesimi gose eintaneti yekambani.
Dholuo: Kapo ni idwaro kony ne joodi, ti gi namba manie websait mar kambi.
Somali: Haddii aad raadineyso taageero macaamiisha, isticmaal lambarrada ku jira websaydhka shirkadda.

English: Disable browser password-saving features to protect accounts if your device is stolen.
Kiswahili: Zima vipengele vya kuhifadhi nenosiri kwenye kivinjari ili kulinda akaunti ikiwa kifaa chako kitaibiwa.
Ekegusii: Tobaise gwanchera ekombiuta okogachere ringangana riao riobobisi koyeigora erio korenda amagnana ase ekonbiuta eise koibwa gose gosira.
Dholuo: Geng'o weche ma nyalo miyo ng'ato oketh weche ma ok odonj e websait mondo kik omak weche ma ok odonj e websait ka oketho gik ma ne itiyogo.
Somali: Qaybaha sirta ah ee aan macquul aheyn si loo ilaaliyo koontadaada haddii qalabkaaga la xaday.

English: Visit rental properties in person. Online listings can be fake.
Kiswahili: Tembelea nyumba za kukodisha ana kwa ana. Orodha za mtandaoni zinaweza kuwa bandia.
Ekegusii: Tarera chinyomba chigokomboa aye omonyene. Amangana goetera eintaneti nabo arabe oborimo.
Dholuo: Dhi e ute mipango iwuon kapok ichulo
Somali: Soo booqashada hantida canshuurta ee shakhsi ahaaneed. Liisaska internetka waxay noqon karaan kuwo been abuur ah.

English: Download apps only from official stores like Google Play or Apple App Store.
Kiswahili: Pakua programu kutoka kwa maduka rasmi kama vile Google Play au Apple App Store pekee.
Ekegusii: Nyora ebinto biria bigokonya esimi gose ekombiuta gokora emeremo korwa aase egenire buna Google Play gose Apple App Store.
Dholuo: Gol app mana e duka mag Google Play kata Apple App Store.
Somali: Ka soo qaado barnaamijyada dukaamada rasmiga ah sida Google Play ama Apple Apppo.

English: Enable 'Find My Device' on phones to track them if lost or stolen.
Kiswahili: Washa 'Tafuta Kifaa Changu' kwenye simu ili kuzifuatilia ikiwa zitapotea au kuibiwa.
Ekegusii: Ase chisimi bata Enable' Rigia Esimi Yane' ase chisimi erio koyebwatia ekero yasirire gose koibwa.
Dholuo: Ti kod 'Find My Device' e simo mondo omanygo simu molal kata mokwal
Somali: Taleefanka 'Find My Device' waa la heli karaa si loo ogaado haddii uu lumay ama la xaday.

English: Never share OTPs.Even with 'bank staff'. Legit banks wont ask for them.
Kiswahili: Kamwe usishiriki OTP.Hata na 'wafanyakazi wa benki'. Benki halali hazitaki kuziomba.
Ekegusii: Tobaise gosanga OTPs. Nonya nase okori emeremo bwebengi'. Chibengi chiekeene tichiri koyesaba.
Dholuo: Kik ipog OTPs kata gi 'jotich mag bengi.'
Somali: Weligaa ha la wadaagin OTPs.Xitaa "shaqaalaha qaybaha ciidda". Legitbansings ayaa ka codsada.

English: Use ad blockers to stop malicious pop-ups like 'Youve won an iPhone!'.
Kiswahili: Tumia vizuizi vya matangazo ili kuzuia madirisha ibukizi hasidi kama vile 'Umeshinda iPhone!'.
Ekegusii: Tumia egento kegotanga amangana ogotangasa ebiasara buan kwanyorire esimi iPhone eye nencher eyemo yogotanga ebinyibigosaria esimi giose ekombiuta yao.
Dholuo: Ti gi gige geng'o weche miriambo kaka 'Isebedo gi iPhone!'
Somali: Isticmaal ka hortagga codka si aad u joojiso dhawaaqa waxyeelada leh sida " iPhone-ka waad ka adkaatay!

English: Check email sender addresses for typos like 'support@paypa1.com' (scam!).
Kiswahili: Angalia anwani za watumaji barua pepe kwa makosa ya kuandika kama vile 'support@paypa1.com' (ulaghai!).
Ekegusii: Rora buya ng'a ningo otomete eimeil komanya eyebingainereria buna 'support@paypa1.com' (Oboibi!).
Dholuo: Non adirese mag jolos barua pepe mondo ine ni nitie ketho mag ndiko kaka 'support@paypa1.com' (scam!).
Somali: Fiiri cinwaanada emailka ee qaladaadka sida 'taageerada@pappa1.com (scam!).

English: Avoid public USB charging stations They can steal your data.
Kiswahili: Epuka vituo vya kuchajia USB vya umma. Vinaweza kuiba data yako.
Ekegusii: Erende korwa nogochacherigwa esimi yao nomorande o USB. Ebi nabo biraibe amang'ana ao.
Dholuo: Kik iti kod kuonde ma ji chaje USB.
Somali: Ka fogow xarumaha USB ee dadweynaha ee macluumaadkaaga xadi kara.

English: "Do not download apps from random websites. Always use Google Play Store or Apple App Store. Unverified apps may contain malware."
Kiswahili: "Usipakue programu kutoka kwa tovuti zisizo rasmi. Tumia Duka la Google Play au Duka la Programu la Apple kila wakati. Programu ambazo hazijathibitishwa zinaweza kuwa na programu hasidi."
Ekegusii: "Tiga korusia ebikoreri biria bigonya esimi gokora egasi korwa eintaneti aende yonsi. Kera engaki binyore korwa Google Play Store gose Apple App Store".
Dholuo: "Kik igo app moko e websait moogoreopogore. Ti gi Google Play Store kata Apple App Store kinde duto.
Somali: "Ha ku rakibin barnaamijyo goobaha aan barnaamij lahayn... had iyo jeer isticmaal Google Plave Host ama Apple Appp dukaanka.

English: Avoid using public Wi-Fi for banking. Use a VPN if you must connect. Most free networks are not secure."
Kiswahili: Epuka kutumia Wi-Fi ya umma kwa ajili ya benki. Tumia VPN ikiwa ni lazima uunganishe. Mitandao mingi ya bure si salama."
Ekegusii: "Erende korwa eWi-Fi yabanto bonsi kobeka chibesa ebengi. Tumia a VPN onye gokonyara gosoa ime. Chinetewaki chinyinge chia bosaare nchibwati borendi buya."
Dholuo: Kik iti gi Wi-Fi e weche mag bengi, to iti gi VPN kapo ni idwaro tudori kodgi.
Somali: Ka fogow adeegsiga internetka Global-Fi ee bangiyada. Isticmaal VPN haddii aad u baahato inaad ku xirto. Shabakadaha badankood ee xor ah ammaan ma laha".

English: "If you receive an email asking you to verify your bank account, dont click  it's phishing. Report to the DCI Cybercrime Unit."
Kiswahili: "Ukipokea barua pepe inayokuomba uthibitishe akaunti yako ya benki, usibofye ni ulaghai. Ripoti kwa Kitengo cha Uhalifu wa Mtandaoni cha DCI."
Ekegusii: "If you receive an email asking you to verify your bank account, dont click it's phishing. Report to the DCI Cybercrime Unit."
Dholuo: "Ka imiyo barua-pepe ma kwayo ni mondo ine ka in gi bengi, kik idwok e wi wachno.
Somali: "Haddii aad hesho emayl ku weydiinaya in aad xaqiijiso koontadaada bangiga, ha u sheegin taleefanka.

English: Do not share your MPESA PIN with anyone. Safaricom and banks will never ask for it. If in doubt, call official support.
Kiswahili: Usishiriki PIN yako ya MPESA na mtu yeyote. Safaricom na benki hazitaiomba kamwe. Ikiwa una shaka, piga simu kwa usaidizi rasmi.
Ekegusii: Tobaisa gosanga enemba yao yobobisi ya MPESA nonde bwensi. Safaricom gose ebengi mbarikobori koboria nga obayetebie. Ekero ore nechitangutangu yeringana erio, rangeria ebengi yao koboria buya okonywe.
Dholuo: Kik ipog PIN mar MPESA gi ng'ato ang'ata. Safaricom kod bengi ok bi kwayo ng'atno.
Somali: Ha u qorin PIN-kaaga qofna. Safaricom iyo bangiyada marnaba ma weydiisan doonaan.

English: "Set up 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication) for all your accounts. If your password is stolen, you will still be protected."
Kiswahili: "Weka 2FA (Uthibitishaji wa Sababu Mbili) kwa akaunti zako zote. Ikiwa nenosiri lako litaibiwa, bado utalindwa."
Ekegusii: "Eroserie 2FA (Chinchera ibera komnya buya) buna chiakaonti chiao ebengi chigendererete. Onye ringana riao riobobisi riaibirwe, nobe kwerendete ekiagera orosetie 2FA."
Dholuo: "Chik 2FA ne paswad duto ma in-go. Kapo ni oket weche mitiyogo e kad, pod ibiro rito weche duto".
Somali: Marag uga yeedha labadiina nin haddaad ka tagto waxaad ka mid noqon daalimiinta.

English: Always wear a helmet when riding a bodaboda - it saves lives!
Kiswahili: Vaa kofia ngumu kila wakati unapoendesha bodaboda - inaokoa maisha!
Ekegusii: Kera engaki beka ehofia eri egokorende ekero kiomobasekano korinete epigipigi - ngokonya ere obogima!
Dholuo: Kinde duto rwakri gi helmet sama idwaro riembo bodaboda - mano reso ngima ji!
Somali: Had iyo jeer gashid koofiyadaha marka aad waddo booda - taasi waxay badbaadinaysaa nolosha!

English: Don't use your phone while walking on the road! Look both ways before crossing the road.
Kiswahili: Usitumie simu yako unapotembea barabarani! Angalia pande zote mbili kabla ya kuvuka barabara.
Ekegusii: Tiga gotara kogotumia esimi ekero ore epara! Rigereria rigoro na maata otarantamboka.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi simo sama iwuotho e ndara! Nen yore ariyogo kapok ing'ado ndara.
Somali: Ha isticmaalin taleefanka gacanta intaad wadada ku socoto!

English: Keep children away from open flames and hot surfaces in the kitchen.
Kiswahili: Weka watoto mbali na miali ya moto na sehemu zenye joto jikoni.
Ekegusii: Beka abana are korwa ase omorero ore gose ebinto bigosamba aaria echikoni.
Dholuo: Kik iket nyithindo but mach ma liel kendo kik iwegi kendgi kuma mach nitie.
Somali: Carruurta ku xidh meel kulul iyo jikada kulul.

English: Install barriers on windows and doors on upper floors to prevent children from falling.
Kiswahili: Weka vizuizi kwenye madirisha na milango kwenye ghorofa za juu ili kuzuia watoto kuanguka.
Ekegusii: Sambereria gose beka ase emerangwa nechitirisa ase enyoba yeekorofa ebinto bigokonya gotanga abana tibagwa inse.
Dholuo: Keturu yiende mag riembo dhoot e dirisa mag gorofa malo mondo kik nyithindo opodho.
Somali: Dhis daaqadaha iyo albaabada dabaqa sare si carruurta looga hortago inay dhacaan.

English: Never leave children unattended near water bodies - drowning happens silently.
Kiswahili: Usiwaache watoto bila uangalizi karibu na vyanzo vya maji - kuzama hutokea kimya kimya.
Ekegusii: Tobaisa gotiga abana boka aase amache amange are - okonywa chintobe nigo ekoba raisi otamanyeti.
Dholuo: Kik iwe nyithindo obed maonge jorit machiegni gi pi - tho mar pi timore aling' ling'.
Somali: Ha ka tagin ilmaha biyaha agteeda oo kaligiis ah - biyaha oo dhan waxay ku dhintaan si aamusnaan leh.

English: Use crossing points and traffic lights where available.
Kiswahili: Tumia sehemu za kuingilia na taa za trafiki inapopatikana.
Ekegusii: Tumia gotamboka epara aase ebimanyererio bibekire gose chitochi chikogotebia ekero obwenerete gotamboka epara.
Dholuo: Ti gi ler mag ndara mondo kik gari nyoni
Somali: Isticmaal meelaha aad ka gudubto iyo nalalka baabuurta meesha aad joogtid.

English: Install smoke detectors in your home for early fire warnings.
Kiswahili: Weka vifaa vya kugundua moshi nyumbani kwako kwa tahadhari za mapema za moto.
Ekegusii: Beka ebinto biria bikonyonka erioki ase enyomba yao gokomanyia bwango elero enyomba yabwatire omorero oyorimie bwango.
Dholuo: Ket masin mar neno iro e odi mondo ing'e ni nitie mach.
Somali: Guryahaaga ku rakib qalab lagu ogaado qiiqa si aad uga digto dabka.

English: Keep a first aid kit at home and learn basic first aid procedures.
Kiswahili: Weka vifaa vya huduma ya kwanza nyumbani na ujifunze taratibu za msingi za huduma ya kwanza.
Ekegusii: Kabe namariogo nyomba aria aragokonye gokonyera oborwaire bwa mobasekano gose omonto oumiire otaramoikia nyagitari.
Dholuo: Bed gi kit konyruok mokwongo e odi kendo puonjri weche ma dwarore ahinya e wi konyruok mokwongo.
Somali: Sanduuqa ugu horeeya ee adeegga guriga ku dhig oo baro hababka aasaasiga ah ee gargaarka.

English: Always check expiry dates on food products to avoid food poisoning.
Kiswahili: Daima angalia tarehe za mwisho wa matumizi ya bidhaa za chakula ili kuepuka sumu ya chakula.
Ekegusii: Kera engaki mongera chitariki chiendagera kogunda otaragora erio bwerende gotara na koria endagera eng'undo ekoretere obokong'u.
Dholuo: Kinde duto non trik ma chiemo nyalokethore mondo kik ibed matuo
Somali: Had iyo jeer hubi taariikhda la soo dhaafay ee alaabta cuntada si aad uga fogaato cunnada.

English: If you see a power cable fallen, stay away and call 999 immediately.
Kiswahili: Ukiona kebo ya umeme imeanguka, kaa mbali na upigie 999 mara moja.
Ekegusii: Korarore omorande bwesitima ogwete inse, toika ang,e rangeria enamba ya morero ya porisi 999 otari konyorwa.
Dholuo: Kapo ni ineno ka waya mar stima olwar, sud mabor kendo luong 999 mapiyo.
Somali: Haddii aad aragto in fiilada korontada ay hoos u dhacdo, toos u wac 999 isla markiiba.

English: Secure heavy furniture to walls to prevent tip-over accidents with children.
Kiswahili: Funga samani nzito kwenye kuta ili kuzuia ajali za watoto zinazotokea wakati wa kuanguka.
Ekegusii: Torerania ebinto buna eborogo gose chimesa chidito nyomba ase chinyasi gokonya hitichigwera abana ekero bagotema korina igoro.
Dholuo: Ket gige ot ma pek ahinya e kor ohinga mondo kik nyithindo ochwanyre.
Somali: Darbiyada ku dheji qalab culus oo ammaan ah si looga hortago shilal aan macquul aheyn oo carruurta ku dhaca.

English: Do not use gas stoves indoors - keep them in a well-ventilated area.
Kiswahili: Usitumie majiko ya gesi ndani ya nyumba - yaweke katika eneo lenye hewa ya kutosha.
Ekegusii: Tiga gotumia eagsi gotugera nyombe ase etirisa gose morangwa otari koreta embeo nyomba - yetumie ase aigogete embeo egosoa buya.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi mach ma tiyo gi gas e ot - ketgi kama yamo nitie maber.
Somali: Ha isticmaalin qasabadaha gaaska ee guriga ku jira - meel si fiican loo qurxiyo.

English: Learn basic swimming skills - it could save your life or someone else's.
Kiswahili: Jifunze ujuzi wa msingi wa kuogelea - inaweza kuokoa maisha yako au ya mtu mwingine.
Ekegusii: Egegera buna oranyare goaka ontimbu -nabo eragokonye gose gokonya omonto onde.
Dholuo: Puonjri ng'eyo kaka inyalo goyo abal- inyalo reso ngimani kata ngima ng'at machielo.
Somali: Baro xirfadaha aasaasiga ah ee dabaasha - waxay badbaadin karaan naftaada ama qof kale.

English: Put emergency contacts in your phone: Police (999), Ambulance (911), Fire (990).
Kiswahili: Weka anwani za dharura kwenye simu yako: Polisi (999), Ambulensi (911), Zimamoto (990).
Ekegusii: Bechaka chinamba chiemebasekano ime ase esimi yao: Porisi (999), Egari yemebasekano (911), Omorero bwatekire (990).
Dholuo: Ket nembni ma nyalo konyo e simo: Polis (999), Ambulance (911), Fire (990).
Somali: Ka hortag xiriirada xaaladaha degdegga ah ee telefoonkaaga: Booliska (999), Ambulance (911), Dab-damiska (990).

English: Always have a fire extinguisher in your kitchen and know how to use it.
Kiswahili: Daima uwe na kizima-moto jikoni mwako na ujue jinsi ya kukitumia.
Ekegusii: Kera engaki kabe negento keria gekorimia omorero ase echikoni yenyomba yao na manya buna okogetumia.
Dholuo: Kinde duto bed gi masinde mag tieko ligek mach e kar tedo kendo ng'e kaka inyalo ti kodgi.
Somali: Had iyo jeer qalab lagu damiyo jikadaada iyo inaad ogaato sida loo isticmaalo.

English: If you see water on the road, do not try to cross it - It may be deep.
Kiswahili: Ukiona maji barabarani, usijaribu kuyavuka - Huenda yakawa na kina kirefu.
Ekegusii: Korarore amache ase epara, tobaisa gotamboka- nabo oranyore amache ayio namange orimere.
Dholuo: Kapo ni ineno pi e ndara, kik item ng'ado - onyalo bedo matut.
Somali: Haddii aad aragto biyo wadada, ha isku dayin inaad u gudubto - waxaa laga yaabaa inay qoto dheer tahay.

English: Teach children their full names, parents' contacts, and home address.
Kiswahili: Wafundishe watoto majina yao kamili, anwani za wazazi, na anwani ya nyumbani.
Ekegusii: Egeria abana komanya amarieta abo onsi, enamba yesimi, inka sobo buna ekorokwa, agose enamba yeposita yerirube.
Dholuo: Puonj nyithindo nyingegi duto, nying jonyuolgi, kod kama gidakie.
Somali: Carruurta bar magacyadooda, xiriirka waalidka iyo meesha ay ku nool yihiin.

English: Keep emergency exits open and unblocked in shops and offices.
Kiswahili: Weka njia za dharura zikiwa wazi na hazijazuiwa katika maduka na ofisi.
Ekegusii: Manyia gose orokereria buya aase abanto bakominchoreria gochia ekero kiobokongu na koyatiga aigoire chingaki chionsi egasi egenderete.
Dholuo: Keturu yore mag wuok e duka kod ofise obed mochanore kendo maok ogol.
Somali: Albaabada xaaladaha degdegga ah ee dukaamada iyo xafiisyada furan oo aan la xirin.

English: Never overload electrical sockets - it can cause fires.
Kiswahili: Usizidishe soketi za umeme kupita kiasi - inaweza kusababisha moto.
Ekegusii: Tiga gotumba ebinto ebinge ase esoketi eyemo yesitima -eye nabo erabe enchera eyemo yomorero gwateka nyomba.
Dholuo: Kik imed gige stima e soket mokalo tong', nikech ginyalo kelo mach.
Somali: Weligaa ha ku buuxin foornada korontada - waxay keeni karaan dab.

English: If you notice a foul smell from the gas, leave the house immediately and call the gas company.
Kiswahili: Ukiona harufu mbaya kutoka kwa gesi, ondoka nyumbani mara moja na upigie simu kampuni ya gesi.
Ekegusii: Ekero oranyoke rimisu riegasi, tama korwa enyomba eyio kegima na rangeria abanto bekambani yegasi eyio gose porisi.
Dholuo: Kapo ni ineno ka gas nigi suya marach, wuog e ot mapiyo kendo igochne kambi ma tiyo gi gas go
Somali: Haddii aad dareento ur xun oo ka soo baxa gaaska, degdeg guriga ka bax oo wac shirkadda shidaalka.

English: Always wear seatbelts - front and back seats - on every trip.
Kiswahili: Vaa mikanda ya usalama kila wakati - viti vya mbele na vya nyuma - katika kila safari.
Ekegusii: Siba omchibi kore erori ime chingaki chionsi - nyuma na magega kera engaki egari ekogenda.
Dholuo: Kinde duto rwakuru tike mag sirkal
Somali: Mar kasta oo aad safarka tagtid, fadhiya kursi hore iyo gadaalba.

English: Do not allow children to play near stones during construction.
Kiswahili: Usiruhusu watoto kucheza karibu na mawe wakati wa ujenzi.
Ekegusii: Totiga abana gotienera ase amagena are ekero amaagacho agendererete.
Dholuo: Kik iwe nyithindo tugo machiegni gi kite sama igero ot.
Somali: Ha u oggolaan carruurta inay dhagaxyada ku ciyaaraan marka la dhisayo.

English: Keep emergency numbers visible in your home and workplace.
Kiswahili: Weka nambari za dharura zikionekana nyumbani kwako na mahali pako pa kazi.
Ekegusii: Beka chinamba chiria chiemebasekano ase chikororekana buya chinka chiaino na ase emeremo.
Dholuo: Ket namba mag simo e odi koda kar tich.
Somali: Hubi in xaaladaha degdegga ah ay jiraan guriga iyo goobta shaqada.

English: Create a family emergency plan and meeting point for disasters.
Kiswahili: Unda mpango wa dharura wa familia na mahali pa kukutania majanga.
Ekegusii: Manyererania genkio nabanto benyoma yao aase ogotamera chingaki chiomobasekano.
Dholuo: Tim chenro mar rito joodi e kinde masira.
Somali: Qorshaha xaaladaha degdegga ah ee qoyska iyo meelaha shirarka loogu talagalay musiibooyinka.

English: Always supervise children when they're using playground equipment.
Kiswahili: Wasimamie watoto kila wakati wanapotumia vifaa vya uwanja wa michezo.
Ekegusii: Kabe ange nabana bao ekero bakogosori nebinto biria biogokorerwa chigosori.
Dholuo: Kinde duto rit nyithindo sama gitugo.
Somali: Had iyo jeer fiiri caruurta inay isticmaalaan alaabta lagu ciyaaro.

English: Do not use damaged or burning electrical appliances.
Kiswahili: Usitumie vifaa vya umeme vilivyoharibika au vinavyoungua.
Ekegusii: Tobaisa gotumia ebinto biesitima bisaregete gose bigisamba.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi gik moko ma nyalo muocho sitima kata mach.
Somali: Ha isticmaalin qalab waxyeello ama koronto leh.

English: Learn the Heimlich maneuver to help someone who's choking.
Kiswahili: Jifunze mbinu ya Heimlich ili kumsaidia mtu anayekabwa koo.
Ekegusii: Soma na komanya igoro ya Heimlich maneuver erio omanye buna orkonye omonto ongentirwe nandagera gose amache.
Dholuo: Puonjri timo kaka Heimlich itimo mondo ikony ng'at ma gimoro deyo
Somali: Baro xeeladaha Heimlich ee lagu caawiyo qof la xidhay.

English: Put covers on unused electrical outlets, especially in homes with children.
Kiswahili: Weka vifuniko kwenye soketi za umeme ambazo hazijatumika, hasa katika nyumba zenye watoto.
Ekegusii: Tibua ande onsi aase esitima egosokera buna chisoketi, mono kegima ase chinka chire nabana.
Dholuo: Ket rachung' e gik moko duto ma ok itiyogo, to ahinya ahinya e ute ma nyithindo nitie.
Somali: Qalabka korontada ee aan la isticmaalin, gaar ahaan guryaha carruurta ku jira, ku hay daboolida.

English: Never leave candles burning unattended - use hurricane lamps instead.
Kiswahili: Usiache mishumaa ikiwaka bila mtu anayeiangalia - tumia taa za kimbunga badala yake.
Ekegusii: Totiga omosuma ogwoka bwoka monto taiyo korora buna ogwoka - tumia etaya nyakio rika riomosuma.
Dholuo: Kik iweya ka teyni liel maok iketo pachi e yo maber - ti gi teyni mag yamo mager kar mano.
Somali: Weligaa ha u oggolaan inaad shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada shumacyada sh

English: If you are riding a bodaboda, make sure the driver has a helmet and a reflective jacket.
Kiswahili: Ukiwa unaendesha bodaboda, hakikisha dereva ana kofia ya chuma na koti linaloakisi mwanga.
Ekegusii: If you are riding a bodaboda, make sure the driver has a helmet and a reflective jacket.
Dholuo: Kapo ni idwaro riembo bodaboda, tem neno ni dereba nigi osuru kod jaket ma nyiso ni idwaro riembo bodaboda.
Somali: Haddii aad waddo boda, hubso in darawalku uu haysto koofiyad bir ah iyo jaakad iftiin leh.

English: Keep walkways clear of obstacles to prevent trips and falls.
Kiswahili: Weka njia za kutembea mbali na vikwazo ili kuzuia matembezi na kuanguka.
Ekegusii: Rusia kegocha kende giosni ase abanto baogoetera gokonya abanto mbagochwa na kogwa.
Dholuo: Kik iketh gik manyalo mono ng'ato donjo e wuoth.
Somali: Ka fogow caqabadaha si aad uga fogaato safarka iyo dhaca.

English: Keep  mosquito repellent at home, especially during the rainy season.
Kiswahili: Weka dawa ya kufukuza mbu nyumbani, hasa wakati wa mvua.
Ekegusii: Kabe naguta aria agoseria chiimbu korwa nyomba, na mono kegima chingaki chiembura.
Dholuo: Bed gi yath ma geng'o kute e odi, to ahinya ahinya e kinde koth.
Somali: Guriga ku hay daawooyin lagu tuuro dufanka, gaar ahaan xilliga roobka.

English: Always check weather forecasts before planning outdoor activities.
Kiswahili: Daima angalia utabiri wa hali ya hewa kabla ya kupanga shughuli za nje.
Ekegusii: Rigereria buya rire buna rire otarasoka kogenda gose gosoka gochia esafari.
Dholuo: Tem neno kaka kor lwasi biro chalo kapok ichano timo gik moko e yor lendo.
Somali: Had iyo jeer fiiri saadaasha cimilada ka hor intaadan qorsheyn inaad dibadda tagto.

English: Do not leave your vehicles open or valuables visible.
Kiswahili: Usiache magari yako wazi au vitu vya thamani vionekane.
Ekegusii: Tomocha gotasieka erori yao gose gotiga ebinto biengencho kororekana ime.
Dholuo: Kik iwe mtokni oyawore kata gik ma nengogi tek onenre.
Somali: Ha u daynin baabuurtaada inay u muuqdaan kuwo furan ama qiimo leh.

English: Install carbon monoxide detectors if you use gas or kerosene heaters.
Kiswahili: Sakinisha vigunduzi vya monoksidi kaboni ikiwa unatumia hita za gesi au mafuta ya taa.
Ekegusii: Beka egento keria gekonyonka embeo embe onye kogotumia amaguta etaya gose egasi.
Dholuo: Ket masin mar neno gas kata petrol mondo okonyi ng'eyo ni nitie gas ma nyalo monoyi tiyo gi gas.
Somali: Ku rakib qalab lagu ogaado carbon monoxide adoo adeegsanaya gaaska ama kuleylka saliidda.

English: Make an emergency kit with a flashlight, batteries, first aid, and drinking water.
Kiswahili: Tengeneza kifaa cha dharura chenye tochi, betri, huduma ya kwanza, na maji ya kunywa.
Ekegusii: Kabe nebinto bia ntenera biranyare kogokonya ekero kiobokongu buna ekero esitima etaiyo obe etochi koreta oborabu ase eyomba, amo namasasi, na amariogo, namache okonywa.
Dholuo: Tim kit moro mar konyruok ma nigi taya, batri, konyruok, kod pi modho.
Somali: Sanduuqa xaaladaha degdegga ah oo leh toosh, baytari, daryeel degdeg ah, iyo biyo la cabbo.

English: Never drink and drive - even small amounts of alcohol impair judgment.
Kiswahili: Usinywe pombe na kuendesha gari kamwe - hata kiasi kidogo cha pombe hudhoofisha uamuzi.
Ekegusii: Tonywa amarwa naende ogendie erori - nanya namarwa amake igo nigo agosaria ebirengererio nachisemi eki obwenerete gokora.
Dholuo: Kik imadh kong'o kendo kik iriemb mtoka - kata mana kong'o matin nyalo ketho ng'ado bura.
Somali: Weligaa ha cabin oo ha wadin baabuur - xitaa cabitaan yar oo khamri ah ayaa xukuma go'aanka.

English: Keep your doctor's and hospital's numbers nearby in case of emergencies.
Kiswahili: Weka nambari za daktari wako na hospitali karibu iwapo kutatokea dharura.
Ekegusii: Gacha enmba yanyagitari nomonyagitari oo ange nase ebogete omobuko oo bwemebasekano buna amarigo.
Dholuo: Ket namba mar laktar kod mar osiptal machiegni kodi kapo ni nitie gimoro ma chando chunyi.
Somali: Haddii xaalad degdeg ah dhacdo, xisaabaadka dhakhtarkaaga ku hay isbitaalka.

English: Teach children how to call for help in emergencies (999 or 112).
Kiswahili: Wafundishe watoto jinsi ya kupiga simu kuomba msaada katika dharura (999 au 112).
Ekegusii: Somia abana bamanye buna baranyare krigia ogokonya ekero kiemebasekano goetera (999 gose 112).
Dholuo: Puonj nyithindo kaka ginyalo kwayo kony e kinde mag chandruok (999 kata 112).
Somali: Carruurta ku baro sida ay caawimaad ugu codsan karaan xaaladaha degdegga ah (999 ama 112).

English: Do not leave dangerous items within the reach of young children.
Kiswahili: Usiache vitu hatari karibu na watoto wadogo.
Ekegusii: Tiga kobeka ebinto bire atari ase abana ase baranyare kobikera.
Dholuo: Kik iwe gik manyalo hinyo ngima nyithindo matindo.
Somali: Caruurta yaryar ha u dhigin waxyaalo khatar ah.

English: Always have an emergency evacuation plan for your workplace.
Kiswahili: Daima uwe na mpango wa dharura wa kuhamisha watu mahali pako pa kazi.
Ekegusii: Kera chingaki kabe na ase oranyanyare kominchoreria ekero kiomobasekano ase egasi.
Dholuo: Kinde duto bed gi chenro mar reso kar tich.
Somali: Had iyo jeer diyaar u noqo inaad shaqada ka tagto xaaladaha degdegga ah.

English: If you have farms, clearly label fertilizers and pesticides.
Kiswahili: Kama una mashamba, weka lebo wazi kwenye mbolea na dawa za kuua wadudu.
Ekegusii: Onye kobwate omogondo bwoboremi, orokereria buya obwoyo mborobi, n amariogo boigo.
Dholuo: Kapo ni in gi puothe, ket tong' maler e wi yien kod yedhe mamero.
Somali: Haddii aad leedahay beero, si cad u sheeg bacriminta iyo cayayaanka.

English: Never use generators indoors - they produce deadly carbon monoxide.
Kiswahili: Usitumie jenereta ndani ya nyumba - hutoa monoksidi kaboni hatari.
Ekegusii: Tobaisa kobeka echenereta nyomba na koyiokia - erioki riaye nesumu ase omobere.
Dholuo: Kik iti gi  jenereta e uteu nikech gikelo carbon monoxide ma kelo tho.
Somali: Weligaa ha isticmaalin korontooyinka guryaha - waxay soo saaraan kaarboon monoksayid halis ah.

English: Install waterproof devices on all electrical sockets in the home.
Kiswahili: Sakinisha vifaa visivyopitisha maji kwenye soketi zote za umeme nyumbani.
Ekegusii: Beka egento kegotuba aase esitima egosokera korwa buna esoketi nnka bwoo.
Dholuo: Ket gik ma  geng'o pi e pi e ute duto.
Somali: Qalab kasta oo biyo xakameynaya ku rakib qalabka korontada guriga.

English: Keep emergency exits clearly marked and unobstructed in public buildings.
Kiswahili: Weka alama wazi za kutokea kwa dharura na bila kizuizi katika majengo ya umma.
Ekegusii: Erokeria buya aase okominchoreria elekero kiemebasekano ere na etbwati binto biranyare kogocha abanto kabagotama.
Dholuo: Ket kuonde ma ji nyalo dhiye e seche mag masira
Somali: Albaabada xaaladaha degdegga ah u dhig meel bannaan oo aan la xannibin.

English: Use sunscreen and avoid the sun between 10 am and 4 pm.
Kiswahili: Tumia mafuta ya kuzuia jua na epuka jua kati ya saa 10 asubuhi na saa 4 jioni.
Ekegusii: Use sunscreen and avoid the sun between 10 am and 4 pm.
Dholuo: Ti gi moo ma geng'o liet mar chieng e kind sa apar okinyi nyaka sa ang'wen odhiambo.
Somali: Isku day inaad qorraxda ka ilaaliso oo aad qorraxda ka fogaato inta u dhaxaysa saacadaha 10 iyo 4 habeenkii.

English: Always check depth before diving into water - neck injuries can be fatal.
Kiswahili: Daima angalia kina kabla ya kupiga mbizi ndani ya maji - majeraha ya shingo yanaweza kusababisha kifo.
Ekegusii: Kera engaki pima komanya obotambe bwamache otarasoa goaka ontimbu. - nabo oraumie bobe ebigoti.
Dholuo: Kinde duto tem ane nono tut pi kapok idonjo e pi nikech pi matut nyalo nego ng'ato.
Somali: Had iyo jeer u fiirso qoto dheer ka hor intaadan ku dhufan dhaawacyada qoorta biyaha.

English: Do not leave cooking utensils uncovered when using cooking oil.
Kiswahili: Usiache vyombo vya kupikia vikiwa vimefunikwa unapotumia mafuta ya kupikia.
Ekegusii: Kunekeri chufuguri ekero ogotumia amaguta amaguta ogokaranga endagera.
Dholuo: Kik iwe agulni ma okiumo saa ma itedo
Somali: Qalabka cuntada lagu kariyo ha ku qarin saliid lagu kariyo.

English: Learn basic first aid for burns, cuts, and choking incidents.
Kiswahili: Jifunze huduma ya msingi ya kwanza kwa matukio ya kuungua, kukatwa, na kusongwa na koo.
Ekegusii: Manya chinchera chia bwango buna oranyare gokora ekero kwayire, kwenachire gose kwangentirwe nandagera gose amache.
Dholuo: Puonjri thieth mokwongo ma nyalo konyo ng'ato owang' kata ka gimoro odeye
Somali: Baro habka aasaasiga ah ee lagu gubo, loo gooyo, loona dhigo.

English: Emergency contacts are: Police (999), Ambulance (911), Fire (990).
Kiswahili: Watu wa dharura wanaowasiliana nao ni: Polisi (999), Ambulensi (911), Zimamoto (990).
Ekegusii: Chinamba chiemebasekano: Porisi (999), Erori ya Ambulance (911), Omorero bwatekire (990).
Dholuo: Joma nyalo konyi e masira gin: Polise (999), Ambulance (911), Mach (990).
Somali: Isgaarsiinta xaaladaha degdegga ah waxaa ka mid ah: booliska (1999), ambulansiyada (911), dabka (990).

English: Never leave children alone in vehicles - temperatures rise dangerously fast.
Kiswahili: Usiwaache watoto peke yao ndani ya magari - halijoto huongezeka kwa kasi hatari.
Ekegusii: Totiga abana boka erori ime - riberera ime yorori nigo rikomenta bwango.
Dholuo: Kik iwe nyithindo obed kendgi e mtokni nikech liet medore mapiyo.
Somali: Ha ka tagin carruurta baabuurta - kulaylku si dhakhso leh ayuu u sii kordhayaa.

English: Use easy-opening windows in bedrooms for emergencies.
Kiswahili: Tumia madirisha yanayofunguka kwa urahisi katika vyumba vya kulala kwa dharura.
Ekegusii: Beka chitirisa chikoigoka kebwororo ase chinyomba chiokorara koba aororo ekero kiemebasekano kominchoria.
Dholuo: Ti gi dirisa ma yot yawo e ute nindo e seche mag chandruok.
Somali: Xaaladaha degdegga ah isticmaal daaqadaha furitaanka qolka jiifka.

English: Keep walkways well-lit at night to prevent accidents and deter crime.
Kiswahili: Weka njia za kutembea zikiwa na mwanga mzuri usiku ili kuzuia ajali na kuzuia uhalifu.
Ekegusii: Rora nga nobegeta chitaya ase abanto bagoetera botuko ase ogotanga emebasekano yomonto kogochwa and gotanga obosaria.
Dholuo: Bed gi ler maber e ndara gotieno mondo kik yud masira kendo kik itim timbe mahundu.
Somali: Habeenkii wadada ku sii soco si aad uga hortagto shilalka iyo dambiyada.

English: Do not leave electrical appliances plugged into sockets when not in use.
Kiswahili: Usiache vifaa vya umeme vimeunganishwa kwenye soketi wakati havitumiki.
Ekegusii: Tobaise gotiga ebinto biria bigotumia esitima bisomekire ase esoketi ekero otari kobikorera egasi.
Dholuo: Kik iwe gik moko mag sitima omak gi soket sama ok itiyogo.
Somali: Ha u oggolaan inaad qalabka korontada ku dhejiso qolka marka aan la isticmaalin.

English: Always have a working flashlight and extra batteries at home.
Kiswahili: Daima uwe na tochi inayofanya kazi na betri za ziada nyumbani.
Ekegusii: Kera engaki tema koba netochi inka orayare gwokia ekero esitima yagendire amao nasasi ande oranyare koyebeka ekro aria are ime aerire.
Dholuo: Kinde duto bed gi taya mar taya kod batri mamoko e odi.
Somali: Had iyo jeer guriga ku hay toosh ku shaqeeya iyo baytariyo dheeri ah.

English: Keep an emergency contact list on the fridge and with your older children.
Kiswahili: Weka orodha ya mawasiliano ya dharura kwenye friji na pamoja na watoto wako wakubwa.
Ekegusii: Rika chinamba orarangerie onyore ogokonya ase egento keria kegokendia endagera (efurichi) amo nabana bao abanene.
Dholuo: Ket weche ma nyalo konyi e simo kendo ikri gi nyithindi madongo.
Somali: Liiska xaaladaha degdegga ah ka dhig qaboojiyaha iyo carruurtaada waaweyn.

English: Always lock doors and windows when leaving home, even for short periods.
Kiswahili: Funga milango na madirisha kila wakati unapoondoka nyumbani, hata kwa muda mfupi.
Ekegusii: Kera chingaki sieka emerangu nechitirisa ekero ogosoka korwa inka, nonya nase egeka egeke.
Dholuo: Kinde duto ilor dhoot koda dirisa sama iwuok e ot, kata mana kuom kinde matin.
Somali: Marwalba albaabada iyo daaqadaha hayso markaad guriga ka baxdo, xitaa waqtiyada gaaban.

English: Report suspicious activities in your neighborhood to police immediately.
Kiswahili: Ripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka katika mtaa wako kwa polisi mara moja.
Ekegusii: mnyia amangan ore nechitangutangu naro agokorekeka ase chiamate chiao gochia ase omogambi gose abasikari kegima.
Dholuo: Ket weche ma ok adier e alworau e nyim polis mapiyo.
Somali: Si deg deg ah booliiska uga wargeli xaaladaha shakiga leh ee xaafadaada.

English: Install security lights around your property to deter burglars.
Kiswahili: Weka taa za usalama kuzunguka mali yako ili kuzuia wezi.
Ekegusii: Iboka chitaya chikomoreka buya ase enibo yao ere buna enchera eyemo yogotanga abaibi.
Dholuo: Ket ler mar sirkal e alwora mar utegi mondo irit jomecho.
Somali: Guryahaaga ku hareereeya nalalka ammaanka si looga hortago dadka guryaha jabsada.

English: Don't display valuables in your car - keep them out of sight.
Kiswahili: Usionyeshe vitu vya thamani kwenye gari lako - viweke mbali na macho.
Ekegusii: Tiga kworokia ebinto bierigori ime yerori yao - keep them outside.
Dholuo: Kik inyis gik ma nengogi tek e mtoki - ketgi mabor gi wang'i.
Somali: Ha gelin waxyaabaha qaaliga ah ee gaarigaaga ku jira - ha iska dayrin.

English: Join or start a neighborhood watch program in your area.
Kiswahili: Jiunge au anza programu ya ulinzi wa ujirani katika eneo lako.
Ekegusii: Join or start a neighborhood watch program in your area.
Dholuo: Bed achiel kuom joma biro rito alwora ma idakie.
Somali: Ku qor ama bilow barnaamijka daawashada xaafadaada.

English: Take photos of your valuables and record serial numbers for identification.
Kiswahili: Piga picha za vitu vyako vya thamani na uandike nambari za mfululizo kwa ajili ya utambulisho.
Ekegusii: Aka ebicha ebinto bia biengencho bionsi chibicha na rika chinamba chiokobiatanana.
Dholuo: Kaw picha mag gik ma nengogi tek kendo ndikgi mondo iyudgo nying.
Somali: Qaado sawirada alaabtaada qaaliga ah iyo lambarrada taxanaha si loo aqoonsado.

English: Use strong padlocks for gates and sheds - avoid cheap, easy-to-cut locks.
Kiswahili: Tumia kufuli imara kwa malango na vibanda - epuka kufuli za bei rahisi na rahisi kukata.
Ekegusii: Tumia ebiburi ebikong'u ase ebiita biao nekiriri igoro yabo - tga kogora ebinto biebei enke, bikobutoru naibaibi bwngo.
Dholuo: Ti gi yiende motegno e dhoudi kod ute mag joma ok nyal yieyo.
Somali: Isticmaal furayaasha adag ee albaabbada iyo qolalka - ka fogow furayaasha raqiis ah ee si fudud loo jaray.

English: Be cautious about sharing travel plans on social media.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu kuhusu kushiriki mipango ya usafiri kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Ekegusii: Tiga gwatora-tora emeroberio yechisfari chiao ase eintaneti.
Dholuo: Bed motang' sama ilando chenro mag wuoth e yoregi mag tudruok.
Somali: Ka taxaddar qorshayaasha gaadiidka ee shabakadaha bulshada.

English: Keep bushes and trees near windows trimmed to eliminate hiding spots.
Kiswahili: Weka vichaka na miti karibu na madirisha yaliyokatwakatwa ili kuondoa sehemu za kujificha.
Ekegusii: Nacha emete na rabia orosana ase chitirisa gotanga abaibi tibebisa aroro.
Dholuo: Ket yiende kod yiende machiegni gi dirisa mondo kik ibed gi kuonde mopondo.
Somali: Geedo iyo geedo u dhig daaqadaha la jaray si aad uga saarto meelaha lagu qariyo.

English: Mark your property with UV pens or engraving to help recovery if stolen.
Kiswahili: Weka alama kwenye mali yako kwa kalamu za UV au mchoro ili kusaidia kurejesha ikiwa imeibiwa.
Ekegusii: Beka ebinto biao nekemanyererio "UV pens or engraving" gokonya kobinyora onye biaibirwe.
Dholuo: Ket ranyisi mar gik ma in-go gi piche mag UV kata gik ma ondik mondo okonyi yudo gik ma in-go ka owalgi.
Somali: Sanduuqaaga ku calaamadi qalinka uumiga si aad u soo kaban karto haddii lagaa xado.

English: Install peepholes in exterior doors to identify visitors before opening.
Kiswahili: Weka vizuizi vya macho kwenye milango ya nje ili kuwatambua wageni kabla ya kufungua.
Ekegusii: Bochora ebingoro biabeene ase emerangu yaisiko kogokonya korora nakomanya omonto korwa nyomba otaramogorera.
Dholuo: Keturu kuonde ma ji nyalo ng'iyoe dhoot mondo ging'e ka pok giyawo.
Somali: Albaabada dibedda ka dhig godad si aad u aqoonsato martida ka hor intaadan furin.

English: Don't carry large amounts of cash - use mobile payment options instead.
Kiswahili: Usibebe kiasi kikubwa cha pesa taslimu - tumia njia za malipo za simu badala yake.
Ekegusii: Tiga kobogoria chibesa chinyinge - rika riokobogoria chibesa, tumia chinhera chigedichitari.
Dholuo: Kik iting' pesa mang'eny - ti gi gik ma inyalo timo e yor simo.
Somali: Taa bedelkeeda, ha qaadin lacag aad u badan oo aad ku bixin karto taleefanka gacanta.

English: Park in well-lit areas at night and check surroundings before exiting vehicle.
Kiswahili: Egesha gari katika maeneo yenye mwanga wa kutosha usiku na angalia mazingira kabla ya kutoka.
Ekegusii: Ekero ogoteneni erori yao botuko yeteneni ase oborabu bore boisaine, na mongera aaria na gochia aaria buya nyuma otarasoka korwa erori ime.
Dholuo: Par kar dak e alwora ma ler ler nitie gotieno kendo ne kama idakie kapok iwuok e mtoka.
Somali: Habeenkii meel iftiin leh ku dhig oo ka eeg deegaanka intaadan ka bixin baabuurka.

English: Teach domestic staff to verify identities before opening gates/doors.
Kiswahili: Wafundishe wafanyakazi wa majumbani kuthibitisha utambulisho wao kabla ya kufungua malango/milango.
Ekegusii: Somia abakori emeremo bao ba nka korigereria buya ebibande bia'bageni nyuma batarabaigoreraebiita gose omorangu.
Dholuo: Puonj jotich manie ot mondo onon kitgi kapok giyawo dhoot.
Somali: Waxbar shaqaalaha guriga si ay u hubiyaan aqoonsiga ka hor inta aysan furin albaabada iyo albaabada.

English: Use timers for lights when away to give appearance someone is home.
Kiswahili: Tumia vipima muda kwa ajili ya taa ukiwa mbali ili kuonyesha kama kuna mtu nyumbani.
Ekegusii: Ekero gwasokire gochia esafari, beka chitochi chia chiesitima chinsa chireokie chinyene buna egento giokworokia nga omonto nare nka.
Dholuo: Ti gi masinde mag rieny sama in mabor mondo inyis ni ng'ato ni e ot.
Somali: Isticmaal calaamadaha iftiinka - waqti iftiinka marka qof guriga ka muuqdo.

English: Keep car keys in a secure location at home, not near doors/windows.
Kiswahili: Weka funguo za gari mahali salama nyumbani, si karibu na milango/madirisha.
Ekegusii: Gacha ebibunguo bierori yao inka ase agiya, korende tari ase omorangu gose etirisa.
Dholuo: Ket okombeni mag mtoka kama oting'o maber, to ok machiegni gi dhoot kata dirisa.
Somali: Furayaasha baabuurta guriga ku hay meel aamin ah oo aan albaabada iyo albaabada u dhow.

English: Verify credentials of service personnel before allowing access to property.
Kiswahili: Thibitisha sifa za wafanyakazi wa huduma kabla ya kuruhusu ufikiaji wa mali.
Ekegusii: Verify credentials of service personnel before allowing access to property.
Dholuo: Non ane weche mag joma tiyo e sirkal kapok iyie gi ng'ato donjo e ot.
Somali: Shuruudaha loo baahan yahay shaqaalaha adeegga ka hor inta aan la oggolaan helitaanka hantida.

English: Install security cameras at entry points and make them visible.
Kiswahili: Sakinisha kamera za usalama kwenye sehemu za kuingilia na uzifanye zionekane.
Ekegusii: Beka chikamera chikobwata buna abanto bagosoa na gosoka korwa bwoo as omorangu gose egeita hirirekanete buya.
Dholuo: Ket kamera mag sirkal e kuonde ma idonjoe kendo iketgi e yo ma nenore.
Somali: Qaado kamaradaha ammaanka ee meesha aad ka soo baxdo oo ka dhig inay muuqdaan.

English: Be aware of common scams like fake lottery winnings or inheritance claims.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu kuhusu ulaghai wa kawaida kama vile ushindi bandia wa bahati nasibu au madai ya urithi.
Ekegusii: Erende korwa ebinto biobongainereria buna kong'ainwa ng'a kwabuire bahati na sibu buna omonyamwando bwomonto osirete.
Dholuo: Bed motang' gi timbe mag wuond kaka loso loso loso tuke mag loyo mich kuom hawi kata kawo mwandu.
Somali: Ka digtoonow khiyaanooyinka caadiga ah sida guusha been abuurka ah ee bakhtiyaa ama sheegashada dhaxalka.

English: Don't resist during armed robbery - your safety is more valuable than property.
Kiswahili: Usipinge wakati wa wizi wa kutumia silaha - usalama wako una thamani zaidi kuliko mali.
Ekegusii: Ekero ebibago biobibi bikogosagana tiga kwamererania nabarabwo- obogima bwa nobwengencho kobua enibo.
Dholuo: Kik ikwed sama ikwalo gimoro gi gige lweny nikech rito ngima ng'ato en gima duong' moloyo mwandu.
Somali: Ha ka faa'iideysan waxqabadka hubka - ammaankaagu wuxuu ka qiimo badan yahay hantida.

English: Keep emergency numbers programmed in your phone for quick access.
Kiswahili: Weka nambari za dharura zikiwa zimepangwa kwenye simu yako ili zipatikane haraka.
Ekegusii: Rika na kogacha esimi yaoime chinamba orarangerie chingaki chiemebasakano.
Dholuo: Ket namba mag simo e simo mondo iyudgi mapiyo.
Somali: Ka dhig lambarrada xaaladaha degdegga ah taleefankaaga si aad u isticmaasho si dhakhso leh.

English: Use different routes when traveling regularly to avoid establishing patterns.
Kiswahili: Tumia njia tofauti unaposafiri mara kwa mara ili kuepuka kuweka mifumo.
Ekegusii: Etera chinhera ao ao echi ogosokera korwa inka na koirana erio osirerio amabarato yorogendo rwao buna enchera eyemo yokwerenda.
Dholuo: Sama iwuotho e yo mopogore opogore, kik idonj e wuoth ma kamano.
Somali: Isticmaal siyaabo kala duwan markaad si joogto ah u safrayso si aad uga fogaato caqabadaha.

English: Shred documents containing personal information before disposal.
Kiswahili: Kata vipande vya hati zenye taarifa binafsi kabla ya kuzitupa.
Ekegusii: Tandora na gosria gose samba amasakara ao abwate amang'ana bobisi otarayatuguta.
Dholuo: Ket weche moko moting'o weche mag ng'ato owuon e bwo sand kapok ogolgi.
Somali: Dukumiintiyo been abuur ah oo ku jira macluumaadka shakhsi ahaaneed ka hor inta aan la tuurin.

English: Join us in the fight against corruption. Be part of the solution.
Kiswahili: Jiunge nasi katika vita dhidi ya ufisadi. Kuwa sehemu ya suluhisho.
Ekegusii: Tobwatisies ase ekinano nobokengeka. Kabe oyomo ase okoreta ekeganeirie.
Dholuo: Bed achiel kuom joma biro tieko ywaruok.
Somali: Nala soo biir dagaalka musuqmaasuqa oo qayb ka noqo xalinta.

English: Promote integrity and transparency in all institutions. Together, we can prevent corruption before it starts.
Kiswahili: Kukuza uadilifu na uwazi katika taasisi zote. Kwa pamoja, tunaweza kuzuia ufisadi kabla haujaanza.
Ekegusii: Segeta ekeene nobomaiso marore ase chinsemo chionsi chiobokoreri. Ase oboamo, nabo togotanga obokorekanu tiboba.
Dholuo: Jiwo winjruok maber gi riwruoge duto, kendo timo kamano biro miyo kik wadonj e mibadhi kapok ochakore.
Somali: Waxaan ka hortagi karnaa musuqmaasuqa ka hor inta uusan bilaabin.

English: Report irregular hiring and misuse of public office. Fair recruitment builds trust and accountability.
Kiswahili: Ripoti kuhusu ajira zisizo za kawaida na matumizi mabaya ya ofisi ya umma. Uajiri wa haki hujenga uaminifu na uwajibikaji.
Ekegusii: Karwe eripoti igoro yokorikwa kwa abanto omoroberio omoronge otabwatirie ase ogotumia bobe ofisi yobokoreri bwabanto. Okorika abanto ase omoroberio omuya nigo ogosegeta obwegenwa noboteneri obuya.
Dholuo: Nyis ni itiyo gi migawo moro e yo maok kare, kendo itiyo gi migawo moro e yo marach.
Somali: Warbixin ku saabsan shaqo la'aanta iyo isticmaalka xun ee xafiisyada dadweynaha.

English: Corruption weakens counties. Ttake a stand! Uphold ethics in public service and support anti-graft initiatives.
Kiswahili: Rushwa hudhoofisha kaunti. Chukua msimamo! Kudumisha maadili katika utumishi wa umma na kuunga mkono mipango ya kupambana na ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Obokorekanu nigo bokogengeria chinguru chiense. Chora buya! Segeta na goikerania obokereri obuya ase na sira emeroberio yokorwania obokorekanu.
Dholuo: Korruok miyo pinje bedo gi teko mang'eny, omiyo rituru timbe mabeyo e tij sirkal kendo riwuru lwedo chenro mag kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: Musuqmaasuqa ayaa hoos u dhigaya xisaabaadka dawladda.

English: Every Kenyan must join the fight against corruption.Uuphold our dignity and justice.
Kiswahili: Kila Mkenya lazima ajiunge na vita dhidi ya ufisadi. Tulinde utu na haki yetu.
Ekegusii: Nere buya kera omo'Kenya kobwatisia esegi gotanga obokorekanu. Segeta amasikani nekeene.
Dholuo: Ji duto manie piny Kenya nyaka riwre e kedo gi mibadhi. Rituru duong' kod timbewa makare.
Somali: Muwaadin kasta oo Kenya ah waa inuu ku biiro dagaalka musuqmaasuqa.

English: Urgent reforms at Kenya Power & Lighting Company (KPLC) are vital to restore public trust. Be part of the change.
Kiswahili: Mageuzi ya haraka katika Kampuni ya Kenya Power & Lighting (KPLC) ni muhimu ili kurejesha uaminifu wa umma. Kuwa sehemu ya mabadiliko.
Ekegusii: Oboonchoreria bwa bwango ase ekambani yesitima ya Kenya (KPLC) nayengencho ase okoirania obwegenwa gati yekambani eyio yomorero nabanto ba Kenya. Kabe oyomo ase baria bakorenta amaonchorerio.
Dholuo: Mondo ji obed gi yie kendo, dwarore ni Kenya Power & Lighting Company otim lokruok mapiyo.
Somali: Isbedelka degdegga ah ee Kenya Power & Lighting Company (KPLC) ayaa lagama maarmaan u ah dib u soo celinta kalsoonida dadweynaha.

English: Automation of the self-declaration process is now live. Uphold integrity by complying online today.
Kiswahili: Mchakato wa kujitangaza kiotomatiki sasa unaendelea. Dumisha uadilifu kwa kufuata sheria mtandaoni leo.
Ekegusii: Okwemanyekania aye omonyene igoro yenibo obwate bono nigo ogekorwa goetera egedichitri gose eintaneti. Segeta obokeene ase ogoikerania ayio goetera eintaneti.
Dholuo: Tim mar nyiso ni in ng'at ma ok kare koro tiyo gi thuolo mar timo yiero.
Somali: Dhibaatooyinka is-dhiirrigelinta hadda waa mid toos ah.

English: Embrace innovation for greater impact. Ethical leadership starts with you.
Kiswahili: Kubali uvumbuzi kwa athari kubwa zaidi. Uongozi wa kimaadili huanza na wewe.
Ekegusii: Bwata chinchera chinyia chiogokora emeremo ase obokoreri oboikeranu. Engencho engiya nigo egochaka naye.
Dholuo: Ti gi lony e timo gik manyien mondo omi ibed gi nyak.
Somali: Waxaad noqoneysaa hogaamiye cusub oo saameyn weyn leh.

English: Unified action is needed in the war against graft. Stand firm, report corruption.
Kiswahili: Hatua ya pamoja inahitajika katika vita dhidi ya ufisadi. Simama imara, ripoti ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Okobwatera amo nkoganeirie erio gosegeta esegi ase obokorekanu. Tenena bokong'u, teba ase obokorekanu bore.
Dholuo: Dwarore ni watim kinda e kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: Waxaa loo baahan yahay tallaabooyin adag si looga hortago tallaalka.

English: Search warrants are investigative tools, not criminal proceedings. Uphold the law, uphold integrity.
Kiswahili: Hati za upekuzi ni zana za uchunguzi, si kesi za jinai. Tetea sheria, tetea uadilifu.
Ekegusii: Abasikari gocha kogotuka buna koti yabatomete nokorigia obosaiti, na tari ekina kiobosaria. Sika richiko, kabe nekeene.
Dholuo: Weche mag manyo ji gin gik ma inyalo nonego otigo e timo nonro to ok e weche mag ketho chik.
Somali: Baadhitaanka dukumiintiyada sharciga waa qalab baaritaan ah, ma aha dambi.

English: Visit the ASK Eldoret Show and stand with us in the fight against corruption. Together we can safeguard Kenya’s future.
Kiswahili: Tembelea Kipindi cha ASK Eldoret na ushirikiane nasi katika mapambano dhidi ya ufisadi. Kwa pamoja tunaweza kulinda mustakabali wa Kenya.
Ekegusii: Tarera amaorokererio yoboremi (ASK) aaria Eldoret na koba oyomo oito ase okorwania obokengeka. Amo nabo torakonye Kenya ayito aiga motwe.
Dholuo: Dhiuru e ASK Eldoret Show kendo riwruokwa lwedo e kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: Booqo Bandhigga Rys Eldoret oo nala soo biir dagaalka musuqmaasuqa.

English: Keep our roads safe. Corruption in licensing and inspections is “licensing to kill.” Report bribery in transport.
Kiswahili: Weka barabara zetu salama. Rushwa katika utoaji leseni na ukaguzi ni "leseni ya kuua." Ripoti rushwa katika usafiri.
Ekegusii: Bwatia amachiko obogendi chirori gotanga emebasekano. Konyora erensesi yokogendi erori ase obokengeka gose eroi yao koegwa amarube yoborigereria nga mbuya ere yoborimo “nokorwa erensesi yogoita.” Teba igoro yokoria riaki ase obobogoria.
Dholuo: Rituru yorewa. Miyo ji thuolo mar yudo rusa kod weche mag nono, en "yie nego ji".
Somali: Musuqmaasuqa liisanka iyo xaqiijinta waa tallaabo weyn oo dil ah. Warbixin ku saabsan gaadiidka.

English: Join our outreach in Nandi County: raise awareness, promote ethics, and stand with us against graft.
Kiswahili: Jiunge nasi katika Kaunti ya Nandi: ongeza uelewa, endeleza maadili, na usimame nasi dhidi ya ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Inchuo naintwe ase ogoikera abanto isiko gokwanerana aiga ekaonti yaito ya Nandi: manyia abanto, segeta chingencho chingiya, na tenena naintwe korwania obokengeka.
Dholuo: Bed achiel kuom joma dhi nyime gi tijwa mar lendo e County mar Nandi: jiw ji, jiw timbe mabeyo, kendo riwri kodwa e kwedo mibadhi.
Somali: Ku biir dadaalkeena Gobolka Nandi: in la horumariyo fahamka, in la horumariyo anshaxa, iyo in la nagala soo horjeedo tallaalka.

English: Be cautious of strangers asking for personal or financial information.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu dhidi ya wageni wanaouliza taarifa binafsi au za kifedha.
Ekegusii: Erende korwa abanto otamanyeti bagokobori amangana igoro yao gose chibesa chiao.
Dholuo: Tang' gi joma ok ing'eyo ma kwayo ng'ato weche mag ohala.
Somali: Ka digtoonow dadka aadan aqoon inay weydiistaan macluumaad shakhsi ah ama dhaqaale.

English: Install window security film to make glass harder to break.
Kiswahili: Sakinisha filamu ya usalama ya dirisha ili kufanya kioo kiwe kigumu kuvunjika.
Ekegusii: Sambereria chichuma ase chetirisa chia erio gotanga ebirore tibiateka raisi.
Dholuo: Ket film mar rito dirisa mondo omi yien obed matek ketho.
Somali: Filimka daaqadda ku dheji si aad u adkeysato in lagu jabiyo muraayadda.

English: Don't leave ladders or tools outside that could help burglars gain access.
Kiswahili: Usiache ngazi au vifaa nje ambavyo vinaweza kuwasaidia wezi kupata njia ya kuingia.
Ekegusii: Totuiga engasi gose kende gionsi keranyare gokonya abaibi korina mwao ase ekorofa na kogoikera.
Dholuo: Kik iwe gik moko ma nyalo konyo jomecho donjo e odno.
Somali: Ha ka tegin jaranjarada ama qalabka ka soo baxa si ay u caawiyaan dadka guryaha jabsada inay helaan jidka.

English: Keep car doors locked and windows up when driving in high-risk areas.
Kiswahili: Weka milango ya gari imefungwa na madirisha wazi unapoendesha gari katika maeneo yenye hatari kubwa.
Ekegusii: Sieka emerangu yerori yao na koyeroki buya ekero okogendia erori yao ase chirori nabanto bare abange gose obosaria bwa igoro.
Dholuo: Bed gi dhoot mochiel kendo riwo dirisa e mtoka sama itiyo gi mtoka e alwora ma nyalo kelo hinyruok.
Somali: Albaabada iyo daaqadaha baabuurta kor u dhig markaad waddo meelaha sare.

English: Use tracking devices for valuable items like electronics and vehicles.
Kiswahili: Tumia vifaa vya kufuatilia vitu vya thamani kama vile vifaa vya elektroniki na magari.
Ekegusii: Beka erori yao ebinto biria biranyare koyebwatia gose koyerora ase ere ekero yaibirwe nebinto binde bia bionsi biingencho.
Dholuo: Ti gi gik ma nyalo miyo ng'ato oyud gik ma nengogi tek kaka gik mamoko ma korgi tek kaka gik mag elektronika kod mtokni.
Somali: Isticmaal qalab qiimo leh sida qalabka elektaroonigga ah iyo baabuurta.

English: Be wary of strangers offering unsolicited help with ATMs or banking.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu na wageni wanaotoa msaada usioombwa na ATM au benki.
Ekegusii: Eborie buya igoro tabanto otamanyeti bakorwa ogokonya kwa bosa goetera obokoreri bwechisimi, (ATMs) gose ebengi.
Dholuo: Tang' gi joma ok ing'eyo ma nyalo konyi tiyo gi gige pesa kata gige bengi.
Somali: Ka digtoonow dadka aadan aqoon ee ku siinaya caawimaad aan la weydiin ATM ama bangi.

English: Create inventory of household items with photos and receipts for insurance.
Kiswahili: Tengeneza orodha ya vitu vya nyumbani ukitumia picha na risiti za bima.
Ekegusii: Rika inse ebinto bionsi bia mwao. biake chibicha na gacha amarisiti kwabigorerete gonya insuarensi kogoakana ekero birayie gose koibwa.
Dholuo: Tim nonro mar gik ma itiyogo e ot, kaachiel gi piche kod kweno mag insuarans.
Somali: Liiska alaabta guriga oo leh sawirada iyo rasiidhada caymiska.

English: Use deadbolt locks on exterior doors for added security.
Kiswahili: Tumia kufuli za kuzuia milango kwenye milango ya nje kwa usalama zaidi.
Ekegusii: Use deadbolt locks on exterior doors for added security.
Dholuo: Ti gi yiende ma ok nyal tiyo e dhoudi mag oko mondo omi ibed gi ritruok momedore.
Somali: Si aad u ilaaliso albaabada dibedda, isticmaal furayaasha qallalan.

English: Be cautious about sharing personal information on phone calls.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu kuhusu kushiriki taarifa binafsi kwenye simu.
Ekegusii: Renda tobaise gosanga amangana ao abobisi gose ayengencho na monto onde bwensi goetera chinkwana ase esimi.
Dholuo: Bed motang' sama iwacho weche ma ok ochuno e wi ng'ato.
Somali: Ka taxaddar macluumaadka shakhsi ahaaneed ee telefoonka.

English: Install motion-activated lights in dark areas around your property.
Kiswahili: Sakinisha taa zinazowezesha mwendo katika maeneo yenye giza karibu na nyumba yako.
Ekegusii: Beka ase enkna yao gose ase enibo yao ere ebirobu biesitima biria ekero biarorire omonto botuko bigwoka gokomanyia nga onto nare isiko.
Dholuo: Ket ler ma rieny e alwora ma mudho nitie.
Somali: Nalalka dhaqdhaqaaqa ka dhig meelo mugdi ah oo ku xeeran hantidaada.

English: Keep shrubbery near entry points low to maintain visibility.
Kiswahili: Weka vichaka karibu na sehemu za kuingilia chini ili kudumisha mwonekano.
Ekegusii: Simeka amaoga ase omorangwa gose egesona kiao.
Dholuo: Ket yiende ma ne ni machiegni gi kama ne idonjoe piny mondo kik gikethre.
Somali: Dhirta hoos u dhig si aan loo arki karin.

English: Don't leave spare keys in obvious places like under doormats or flowerpots.
Kiswahili: Usiache funguo za ziada katika sehemu zinazoonekana wazi kama vile chini ya mikeka ya mlango au vyungu vya maua.
Ekegusii: Totiba ekopi yebinguo biao bia kobera aase aamo engaki entambe buna inse yomogeka bwenyomba gose ase enyongo yamaoga - bichenchie kera engaki.
Dholuo: Kik iweya gi ofungu mamoko e kuonde ma nenore ayanga kaka e bwo dhoot kata e bwo piende mag maua.
Somali: Furaha dheeriga ah ha ku dhigin meel bannaan, tusaale ahaan albaabka ama ubaxyada.

English: Use security bars or grilles on vulnerable windows and doors.
Kiswahili: Tumia baa za usalama au grille kwenye madirisha na milango iliyo hatarini.
Ekegusii: Sambereria egiriri ase chitirisa nemerangu gochikong'ia.
Dholuo: Ti gi bar kata gir mag rito yien e dirise kod dhoot ma nyalo bedo ni ok nyal geng'o.
Somali: Ka dhig daaqadaha iyo albaabada birta lagu ilaaliyo oo si fudud u burburin kara.

English: Be alert in parking lots - have keys ready and check backseat before entering.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu katika maegesho ya magari - uwe na funguo tayari na uangalie kiti cha nyuma kabla ya kuingia.
Ekegusii: Be alert in parking lots - have keys ready and check backseat before entering.
Dholuo: Bed motang' sama idonjo e kar park - bed gi ofungu kendo tem ng'eyo kama idhiye bang' donjo.
Somali: Fiiro gaar ah u yeelo meesha baabuurta la dhigto - furayaasha iyo xoolaha ka hor intaadan soo gelin.

English: The Police Service urges Patriotic Kenyans to report cases of illegal immigrants for arrest to the nearest police stations.
Kiswahili: Huduma ya Polisi inawahimiza Wakenya wazalendo kuripoti visa vya wahamiaji haramu kwa ajili ya kukamatwa katika vituo vya polisi vilivyo karibu.
Ekegusii: Abasikari baboririe abakenya baria banhete ense yabo Kenya bamanyie igoro yabanto bakagere gosoa Kenya goetera emerangu ya magega gochia eporisi steseni ya ange babwatwe.
Dholuo: Polise jiwo jo Kenya mondo oland wach joma ok chik chik chik mondo omakgi e stesen ma machiegni.
Somali: Hay'adda Booliska ayaa ku boorrinaysa Mujaahidiinta Qaranka Kenya inay soo sheegaan kiisaska socdaalka sharci darada ah si ay u qabsadaan saldhigyada booliska ee ugu dhow.

English: We urge citizens to cooperate with security personnel as they perform their duties and use lawful channels to address their grievances.
Kiswahili: Tunawasihi raia kushirikiana na wafanyakazi wa usalama wanapotekeleza majukumu yao na kutumia njia halali kushughulikia malalamiko yao.
Ekegusii: Nigo togosaba abanainchi babweterane nabarendi boborendi chingaki bagokora emeremo yabo ase ogotumia chinchera chireo korwa okwemurunganania kwabo.
Dholuo: Wapakore raia mondo oti kanyachiel gi joma rito sirkal sama gitimo tije maggi kendo gitiyo gi yore mag chik mondo gichop ne jogo ma ok dwar weche.
Somali: Waxaan muwaadiniinta ugu baaqaynaa inay la shaqeeyaan shaqaalaha amniga shaqada iyo inay isticmaalaan hababka sharciga ah si ay u xaliyaan cabashooyinkooda.

English: We urge citizens to continue volunteering information that will lead to the arrest of Francis Gaitho.
Kiswahili: Tunawasihi raia kuendelea kutoa taarifa za kujitolea zitakazopelekea kukamatwa kwa Francis Gaitho.
Ekegusii: Nigo togosaba abanainchi bagenderere korwa amang'ana gochia ase abasikari aranyare gokonya komobwata Francis Gaitho.
Dholuo: Wapak ji mondo odhi nyime chiwo weche ma biro miyo omak Francis Gaitho.
Somali: Waxaan muwaadiniinta ugu baaqaynaa inay sii wadaan warbixinta keentay in la qabto Francis Gaitto.

English: Let's continue playing our part in thwarting terror by sharing information on suspicious activities with relevant authorities.
Kiswahili: Tuendelee kuchukua jukumu letu katika kuzuia ugaidi kwa kushiriki taarifa kuhusu shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka na mamlaka husika.
Ekegusii: Kera oyomo oito atigare koba maiso nagokora ensemo yaye gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomuin goetera akomanyania amang'ana gose ebinto tore nechitangutangu nabirobio.
Dholuo: Weuru wadhi nyime timo kinda mar tieko timbe mahundu kuom pogo weche e wi timbe ma ok kare gi jotelo molony.
Somali: Aynu sii wadeyno inaan ka qaybqaadno ka hortagga cabsida adigoo macluumaad shaki leh la wadaagaya mas'uuliyiinta ku lug leh.

English: If you have information, #ReachDCI through hotline number 0800 722 203. Let's work together to uphold justice and accountability. #FichuaGaitho
Kiswahili: Kama una taarifa, #Wasiliana naDCI kupitia nambari ya simu 0800 722 203. Tushirikiane kudumisha haki na uwajibikaji. #FichuaGaitho
Ekegusii: Onye kore nering'ana, #Moikera omotuki omonene goetera enamba ya morero 0800 722 203. Tiga tokore emeremo amo gosegeta ekeene nobotenereri obuya. #Bisora Gaitho
Dholuo: Ka in gi weche, tudri gi #ReachDCI e simo mar 0800 722 203. We wati kanyachiel mondo warit ratiro kod bura. #FichuaGaitho
Somali: Haddii aad haysato macluumaad, #ReachDCI telefoonka 0800 722 203. Aan wada shaqeyno si aan u difaacno xuquuqda iyo mas'uuliyadda. #FichuaGaitho

English: The public is advised to exercise restrain and is explicitly cautioned against any attempts to enter without authorisation or break into JKIA as it is a protected zone under the laws of Kenya.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kujizuia na unaonywa waziwazi dhidi ya majaribio yoyote ya kuingia bila idhini au kuingia JKIA kwani ni eneo lililolindwa chini ya sheria za Kenya.
Ekegusii: Abanto basemiigwe gwetanga koba nobororo na gokurerwa kegima ng'a tibatema kobuna egeita na gosoa nechinguru egetii kene giechindege gia Jomo Kennyatta International Airport (JKIA) egekogera aiga naase arendire nerichiko ria Kenya.
Dholuo: Oganda ji ijiwo mondo otang' kendo ochiw siem kuom tembe mag donjo e pinyno ka ok giyudo rusa kata donjo e pinyno nikech en alwora moting'o rit kaluwore gi chike mag Kenya.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay sameeyaan tallaabooyin ka hortag ah waxaana si cad looga digayaa isku day kasta oo ay ku galaan JAKI maadaama ay tahay aagga la ilaaliyo sharciga Kenya.

English: Youths are advised to reject alshabaab propaganda to avoid premature death or such hefty jail sentences.
Kiswahili: Vijana wanashauriwa kukataa propaganda za alshabaab ili kuepuka kifo cha mapema au vifungo hivyo vikali vya jela.
Ekegusii: Abasae basemiigwe kwanga amangana alshabaab aporopaganda gotanga ogokwa kwabwango buna etarenge engencho yogokwa gose gosibwa echera engaki entambe.
Dholuo: Ijiwo rowere mondo otamgi lando miriambo mag al-shabaab mondo kik githo chon kata kik giyud twech mager.
Somali: Dhallinyarada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay diidaan wararka Alshabaab si ay uga fogaadaan dhimashada hore ama xabsiga.

English: Citizens are advised to avoid buying phones from random people as Telcos and Security Agencies are tracking the stolen devices.
Kiswahili: Raia wanashauriwa kuepuka kununua simu kutoka kwa watu wasio na mpangilio kwani Telko na Mashirika ya Usalama yanafuatilia vifaa vilivyoibiwa.
Ekegusii: Abanainchi basemiigwe gotanga gotaboria chisimi korwa ase abantoekiageraekambani eria yarosetie chisimi echio nabasikari nkobwatia bare chisimi chibire.
Dholuo: Owete gi nyimine ma odak e pinyno ijiwo mondo kik ging'iew simu kuom joma ok nyal yudo simo nikech telcos kod riwruoge mag sirkal manyoga gik ma ne okwelgo.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan inay iibsadaan taleefanka dadka aan qorshe lahayn halka Telcos iyo Hay'adda Nabadsugida ay la socdaan qalabka la xaday.

English: Let's work with Police to arrest criminals hiding in #Maandamano to steal, destroy properties and commit other crimes.
Kiswahili: Tushirikiane na Polisi kuwakamata wahalifu waliojificha katika #Maandamano ili kuiba, kuharibu mali na kufanya uhalifu mwingine.
Ekegusii: Tiga tokore emeremo amo nabasikari kobwata ebibago biebisete ase amaanadamano erio koiba, dgosaria ebinto kobakora abande koba ebibago.
Dholuo: We wati gi polise e mako jomahundu mopondo e #Maandamano mondo okwel, oketh mwandu kod ketho mamoko.
Somali: Aynu la shaqeyno Booliska si aan u qabanno dambiilayaasha ku dhuumaalaystay #Mashruucyada si ay u xadaan, u burburiyaan hantida iyo falal kale oo dambi ah.

English: Let's avoid sharing propaganda, unverified information, and graphic images in order not to add to the distress of the affected.
Kiswahili: Tuepuke kushiriki propaganda, taarifa zisizothibitishwa, na picha za picha ili tusiongeze dhiki kwa walioathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Totige korandarandia amangana yoborimo, amangana ataramanyekana boronge, amo nechibicha erio titoba abakogesa obororo ase baria bare nobokong'u.
Dholuo: Weuru kik wawuo gi jomoko e wi weche mag miriambo, weche ma ok ong'ere, kod piche ma nyiso gik ma timore e ngima, mondo kik wamed miyo joma chandore obed gi parruok.
Somali: Aynu iska ilaalino wararka been abuurka ah, wararka aan la xaqiijin, iyo sawirada muuqaalka ah si aan u kordhin dhibaatada dadka dhibaatadu saameysay.

English: Citizens are advised to conduct themselves in a lawful manner. All acts of sabotage, theft and incitement will be prosecuted.
Kiswahili: Wananchi wanashauriwa kujiendesha kwa njia halali. Vitendo vyote vya hujuma, wizi na uchochezi vitachukuliwa hatua.
Ekegusii: Abanainchi basabirwe koba abatebere na abasigete richiko. Ebikoru biobosaria biabomwenu, oboibi na gosegeta abanto kobuna amchiko goika agambigwe.
Dholuo: Owete gi nyimine ma kamago onego otim gik moko e yo mowinjore kendo ibiro ng'adnegi buch tho, kwalo kod chwanyo ji.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si sharci ah u dhaqmaan, dhammaan falalka waxyeelada, tuugada iyo rabshadaha waxaa lagu eedeyn doonaa.

English: Disturbance of peace, incitement, looting, and vandalism remain unlawful.
Kiswahili: Uvunjifu wa amani, uchochezi, uporaji, na uharibifu wa mali bado ni kinyume cha sheria.
Ekegusii: Ogoturubania omorembe, ogosegeta abanto, okiba, na gosaria ebinto nigo bire mamincha yerichiko.
Dholuo: Ketho kuwe, chuno ji mondo otim gik maricho, kwalo gik moko, kod ketho gik moko, pod ok gin chik.
Somali: Dhibaatooyinka nabadda, rabshadaha, boolida iyo burburinta ayaa weli sharci darro ah.

English: Verify identity of delivery personnel before allowing access to property.
Kiswahili: Thibitisha utambulisho wa wafanyakazi wa usafirishaji kabla ya kuruhusu ufikiaji wa mali.
Ekegusii: Rigereria buya ekabande kiomonto ogokoba gose korenta ebinto buya nyuma otaramwanchera gosoa.
Dholuo: Non ane nying joma chiwo chiwo ka pok oyienegi donjo e ot.
Somali: Iska aqoonsashada shaqaalaha dhalmada ka hor inta aan la oggolaan in la helo hantida.

English: Don't leave valuables visible in your car when parked.
Kiswahili: Usiache vitu vya thamani vikionekana kwenye gari lako unapoegesha gari.
Ekegusii: Totiga ebinto biengencho birorekane ime yerori yao ekero oyeteneneties ase chirori chikobekwa.
Dholuo: Kik iwe gik ma nengogi tek onenre e mtoki sama iparogi.
Somali: Ha u ogolaanin waxyaabaha qaaliga ah inay ku soo muuqdaan baabuurkaaga markaad joogto.

English: Use steering wheel locks as additional deterrent for vehicle theft.
Kiswahili: Tumia kufuli za usukani kama njia ya ziada ya kuzuia wizi wa gari.
Ekegusii: Sieka gose richania egento keria kierori omorundia erori agotumia goonchorana amagoro gakoyegendi (Obureki) buna enchera eyo yogotanga teibwa.
Dholuo: Ti gi ng'iel mar taya kaka gima chielo manyalo geng'o wuondo mtoka.
Somali: Isticmaal furayaasha gawaarida sida caqabad dheeri ah ee lagu xado baabuurta.

English: Be cautious of 'distraction theft' tactics in public places.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu dhidi ya mbinu za 'wizi wa usumbufu' katika maeneo ya umma.
Ekegusii: Tigara komanyete buna abaibi chingencho abaibi bagotumia ase abanto bare abange koiba.
Dholuo: Tang' gi yore ma inyalo wuoyogo ji ka in e kuonde ma ji ng'enyie.
Somali: Ka fogow xeeladaha xadgudubka xoogga.

English: Keep emergency numbers visible near phones and programmed in mobile devices.
Kiswahili: Weka nambari za dharura zikionekana karibu na simu na zimewekwa kwenye vifaa vya mkononi.
Ekegusii: Rika na kobeka chinamba chiesimi ase chikororekana buya mbarabare nesimi yao echio chirangerigwe ekero kiomobaseka konyora obokonyi visible.
Dholuo: Ket namba mag simo machiegni gi simo kendo iketgi e simo.
Somali: U hubso in lambarrada xaaladaha degdegga ah ay ku yaalliin telefoonada iyo qalabka gacanta.

English: Consider installing a safe for important documents and valuables.
Kiswahili: Fikiria kufunga sefu ya kuhifadhia hati muhimu na vitu vya thamani.
Ekegusii: Nere buya koba nase agiya okobeka amanag'ana ao na ebinto biaobiengencho.
Dholuo: Tem keto sanduk ma nyalo konye kano weche madongo kod gik ma nengogi tek.
Somali: Ka fikir inaad meel ammaan ah ku dhigto dukumiintiyada muhiimka ah iyo waxyaabaha qaaliga ah.

English: Be wary of 'emergency' scams where callers pretend to be family in distress.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu na ulaghai wa 'dharura' ambapo wapiga simu hujifanya kuwa familia iliyo katika shida.
Ekegusii: Kabe maiso nechisimi korwa ase abanto bagwekona buna abamo babamino chigokorangeria nga omonto omino nare ase emechando eganetie oboknyi bwa bwango gokonya obogima bwaya.
Dholuo: Tang' gi timbe mag wuond ma nyalo miyo ng'ato ogwel e simo ka en e ot ma joode chandore.
Somali: Ka digtoonow inaad "si been ah u sheegto dadka ku wacaya telefoonada iyagoo isku dayaya inay yihiin qoys dhibaataysan.

English: Use security chains on doors even when expecting visitors.
Kiswahili: Tumia minyororo ya usalama kwenye milango hata unapotarajia wageni.
Ekegusii: Sieka emerangu yao yenyomba nenyororo nonya nekero okagerete abageni gocha kogokwania.
Dholuo: Ti gi nyororo mag rito dhoot kata mana sama irito welo.
Somali: Xitaa markaad martida sugaysid albaabka ku xir xidho silsilado ilaalin ah.

English: Don't leave purses or wallets unattended in shopping carts or public places.
Kiswahili: Usiache pochi au pochi bila mtu yeyote kwenye mikokoteni ya ununuzi au sehemu za umma.
Ekegusii: Tiga gotiga ebibeti biechibesa bitarendiri na monto ase eduka, echiro gose aande onsi.
Dholuo: Kik iwe gige pesa kata gige pesa maonge ng'at morito e geche mag ohala kata kuonde ma ji nitie.
Somali: Ha ka tegin boorsooyinka ama boorsooyinka adigoo keligaa ku jira gawaarida wax iibsiga ama meelaha dadku joogaan.

English: Be cautious of 'shoulder surfing' at ATMs and when entering PINs.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu dhidi ya 'kuteleza kwenye mabega' kwenye ATM na unapoweka PIN.
Ekegusii: kabe maiso ase emachini eria ekorusia chibesa ase ebengi na abanto bakoigoka ang'e okobata PIN emachine ekoe chibesa.
Dholuo: Bed motang' sama itiyo gi ATM kod sama idonjo e PIN.
Somali: Ka digtoonow inaad "kor ugu dhaqaaqdo hirarka" ATM-yada iyo markaad gasho PIN-yada.

English: Use security cameras with cloud storage to preserve evidence if needed.
Kiswahili: Tumia kamera za usalama zenye hifadhi ya wingu ili kuhifadhi ushahidi inapohitajika.
Ekegusii: Beka chikamera chiria chibwatanirie neintaneti chikobwata abanto buna bagosoa na gosoka gose ebinto bigendererete kogonya obosaiti ekero boganeirie.
Dholuo: Ti gi kamera mag sirkal ma nigi kuonde ma inyalo kano gik moko e boche polo mondo iket gik ma nyiso ni gimoro otimore.
Somali: Isticmaal kamaradaha amniga ee daruurta lagu keydiyo si aad u keydiso caddaynta haddii loo baahdo.

English: Usifanye maonyesho ya mali thamani kwa umma - weka kwa siri na salama.
Kiswahili: Usifanye maonyesho ya mali thamani kwa umma - weka kwa siri na salama.
Ekegusii: Tobaise kworokia enibo yao ore nero ase abanto- yegache ase obobisi na buya.
Dholuo: Kik itim gima nyiso ni in gi nengo maduong' ne oganda - weka kwa siri na salama.
Somali: Urife bandhigay qiimaha dadweynaha - hay in sari iyo samaha.

English: Install security film on glass doors to prevent easy break-ins.
Kiswahili: Weka filamu ya usalama kwenye milango ya kioo ili kuzuia uvamizi rahisi.
Ekegusii: Beka egamu gatigati yebirore bierori yao gotanga abaibi kobwata ase obwororo.
Dholuo: Ket film mar rito dhoot mondo kik ng'ato donj e ot mayot.
Somali: Irdaha muraayadaha ku dheji filimka ilaalinta si looga hortago dhaawac fudud.

English: Put unique marks on your belongings to easily identify them if they are stolen.
Kiswahili: Weka alama za kipekee kwenye mali zako ili kuzitambua kwa urahisi ikiwa zitaibiwa.
Ekegusii: Beka ekemayererio kia beene ase ebinto biao erio onyare kobiatanana buya ekero biabirwe.
Dholuo: Ket alama e gigeu mondo omi iyudgi mayot kapo ni owalgi.
Somali: Waxyaabahaaga ku dheji calaamado gaar ah si aad u ogaato haddii la xaday.

English: Keep car registration and insurance documents secure, not in glove compartment.
Kiswahili: Weka hati za usajili wa gari na bima salama, si kwenye sehemu ya glavu.
Ekegusii: Gacha amasakara kwagorerete erori yao amo neinsuarensi kafa yerori yao ase agaya , na tari ase erori yao ome.
Dholuo: Ket weche moting'o kar dhi e mtoka kod weche moting'o insuarans e kama oting'o gige kano gige lweny.
Somali: Diiwaangelinta baabuurta iyo dukumiintiyada caymiska ku hay meel ammaan ah, oo ha ku dhigin qolka baabuurta.

English: Be cautious of 'too good to be true' offers for rentals or purchases.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu na ofa za 'nzuri sana kuwa kweli' za kukodisha au ununuzi.
Ekegusii: Kabe maiso nebinto bikororekana buya na buna ebiekeene bikorugwa ogore enyomba aase gete.
Dholuo: Tang' gi gik ma nyalo miyo ng'ato ochul ot kata odag e ot ma jaode dwaro ni odagie.
Somali: Ka taxaddar "wax wanaagsan" sida canshuurta ama iibsashada.

English: Don't leave doors and windows open at night, even if it's very hot.
Kiswahili: Usiache milango na madirisha wazi usiku, hata kama ni joto sana.
Ekegusii: Tobaise gotiga omorangu gose etirisa bitasiekirie botuko, nonya riberera rire rinene.
Dholuo: Kik iwe dhoudi kod dirise obed moel gotieno, kata ka liet ng'eny ahinya.
Somali: Ha u oggolaanin albaabada iyo daaqadaha in la furo habeenkii, xitaa haddii ay kulul tahay.

English: Consider joining or forming a business watch program in commercial areas.
Kiswahili: Fikiria kujiunga au kuunda programu ya kuangalia biashara katika maeneo ya kibiashara.
Ekegusii: Nere buya kobwatana nabanyabiasara ase oborendi bwebiasara biano aaria ase ebiasara.
Dholuo: Par ane kaka inyalo chako timo chenro mar rito ohala e alwora ma ji oheroe ohala.
Somali: Ka fikir inaad ku biirto ama aad sameysid barnaamijka saacadaha ganacsiga ee meelaha ganacsiga.

English: Contact emergency services through: Police (999), DCI (0800 722 203).
Kiswahili: Wasiliana na huduma za dharura kupitia: Polisi (999), DCI (0800 722 203).
Ekegusii: Ikera ogokonywa chingaki chiemebasekano goetera: Porisi (999), Omotuki omonene (0800 722 203).
Dholuo: Wuo gi joma tiyo e tije mag konyruok kitiyo gi: Police (999), DCI (0800 722 203).
Somali: Adeegyada xaaladaha degdegga ah: Booliska (999), DCI (0800 722 203).

English: Be cautious of strangers asking to use your phone for 'emergencies'.
Kiswahili: Kuwa mwangalifu na wageni wanaokuomba kutumia simu yako kwa 'dharura'.
Ekegusii: Erende nabanto otamanyeti bakogosaba esimi yao baake ase ingana rinde rionsi riomobasekano'.
Dholuo: Bed motang' gi joma ok ing'eyo ma kwayo mondo giti gi simo e weche mag 'masira.'
Somali: Ka taxaddar dadka aadan aqoon ee doonaya inay isticmaalaan taleefankaaga xaaladaha degdegga ah.

English: APS outlines communityâ€‘policing & conflict resolution functions
Kiswahili: APS inaelezea kazi za polisi jamii na utatuzi wa migogoro
Ekegusii: Abasikari bobokoreri (APS) baeire abarendi boborendi buna babwenerete gokora mechando ende meke goetera chinkwana erio gokora eminano.
Dholuo: APS lero tije mag oganda mar 'polisi ' kod tieko ywaruok
Somali: APS waxay ku qoran tahay hawlaha bulshada ee ilaalinta iyo xallinta khilaafaadka

English: UNDP feature on community policing, Nyumba Kumi and Youth liaison programs in Kenya
Kiswahili: Makala ya UNDP kuhusu polisi jamii, Nyumba Kumi na programu za uhusiano na vijana nchini Kenya
Ekegusii: Obomo bwechinse chikwegambera nemeroberio yamagenderero (UNDP) nkworokereria ere igoro yabarendi boborendi (Community Policing), Nyumba Kumi amo nemeroberio yogoikera abasae (Youth liaison programs) aiga Kenya
Dholuo: UNDP wuoyo kuom chenro mag polis mar oganda, Nyumba Kumi kod chenro mag tudruok gi rowere e piny Kenya
Somali: Qeybta UNDP ee daryeelka bulshada, 10-ka Guryo iyo barnaamijyada xiriirka dhalinyarada ee Kenya

English: Police Reforms Working Group calls for stronger COP
Kiswahili: Kikundi Kazi cha Mageuzi ya Polisi chataka COP imara zaidi
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kia baria bagokora amaonchorerio ase obokoreri bwabasikari nigo kegosaba ogokongigwa kwa abarendi boborendi (COP)
Dholuo: Grup mar Tich mar Policial Reforms dwaro ni COP obed motegno
Somali: Kooxaha Ciidanka Booliska ee ka shaqeeya waxay u baahan yihiin COP awood badan

English: Study report on Nyumba Kumi impacts in Migori County (Suna West)
Kiswahili: Ripoti ya utafiti kuhusu athari za Nyumba Kumi katika Kaunti ya Migori (Suna Magharibi)
Ekegusii: Eripoti ya ayarorekanete goikerwa naobokoreri bwa Nyumba Kumi aaria ekaonti ya Migori (Suna West).
Dholuo: Ripot mar puonjruok e wi gik ma Nyumba Kumi timo e county mar Migori (Suna West)
Somali: Warbixin baaritaano ah oo ku saabsan tobanka guryo oo ka soo horjeeda degmada Migori (Suna West)

English: KIPPRA analysis of community policing reforms
Kiswahili: Uchambuzi wa KIPPRA wa mageuzi ya polisi jamii
Ekegusii: Obokongoria bwa KIPPRA igoro yamaonchorerio igoro yabarendi boborendi.
Dholuo: Nonro mar KIPPRA mar lokruok e weche mag polise e kind oganda
Somali: Si loo qiimeeyo isbeddellada adeegga bulshada

English: Nairobi informal settlements community policing case study with relevance to wider Nakuru experience.
Kiswahili: Uchunguzi wa kesi za polisi jamii katika makazi yasiyo rasmi ya Nairobi unaohusiana na uzoefu mpana wa Nakuru.
Ekegusii: Ayanyorekanete arengete abarendi boborendi ase emechie yechirandi aaria Nairobikoreng'ana na ayare aaria Nakuru engima.
Dholuo: Nairobi oketo chenro mar timo nonro e wi weche mag polise mag oganda ka en gi tudruok gi gik ma ne otimore e ngima mar Nakuru.
Somali: Dacwad aan rasmi ahayn oo ka dhacday magaalada Nairobi oo lagu baaro waayo aragnimada cudurka.

English: Community policing committees model in Narumoru station (serving Nyeri County), supported by IMLU, engaging community officers
Kiswahili: Mfano wa kamati za polisi jamii katika kituo cha Narumoru (kinachohudumia Kaunti ya Nyeri), ukiungwa mkono na IMLU, ukiwashirikisha maafisa wa jamii
Ekegusii: Engencho engiya yechikomiti chia abarendi boborendi aaria omochie o'Narumoru station (Obokoreri bwakaonti ya Nyeri), bwasiretwe na IMLU, kobwaterana nabarai bebinyoro.
Dholuo: Oganda mar oganda ma nigi komiti mar rito sirkal e Narumoru Station (ma tiyo ne County of Nyeri), ma riwruok mar oganda mar oganda Jehova (IMLU) siro, ma riwo lwedo jotich sirkal
Somali: Guddiyada kormeerka bulshada ee xarunta Narumoru (oo u adeegta gobolka Nyari), oo ay taageerto IMLU, oo ay ka qaybgalaan saraakiisha bulshada

English: IMLU report on community policing committees in Narumoru (serving Nyeri and Nyandarua region)
Kiswahili: Ripoti ya IMLU kuhusu kamati za polisi jamii huko Narumoru (zinazohudumia mkoa wa Nyeri na Nyandarua)
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kia IMLU kiarure eripoti igoro yechikomoti chiabarendi boborendi aaria Narumoru (egokorera ensemo ya Nyandarua)
Dholuo: Ripot mar IMLU e wi komiti mag polise e Narumoru (ma tiyo ne alwora mar Nyeri kod Nyandarua)
Somali: Warbixinta IMLU ee ku saabsan guddiyada maamulka bulshada ee Narumoru (xannaanada xayawaanka iyo xayawaanka)

English: Machakos County community policing attributed to crime reduction in Mwala subâ€‘county
Kiswahili: Polisi jamii wa Kaunti ya Machakos wahusishwa na kupungua kwa uhalifu katika kaunti ndogo ya Mwala
Ekegusii: Abarendi boborendi bekaonti ya Machakosyamanyirie ng'a ogkeania obosaria kwarorekanire aaria ensemo ya Mwala.
Dholuo: Polise mar alwora mar County ma Machakos ne okonyo e tieko mahundu e sub county mar Mwala
Somali: Ururka Machakos County ayaa la sheegay in ay yareeyeen dambiyada deegaanka Mwala oo hoos yimaada faa'iidooyinka dalka

English: Mombasa community policing forum convened by KEPSSI and local leaders to curb juvenile gangs in Likoni
Kiswahili: Jukwaa la polisi jamii la Mombasa laitishwa na KEPSSI na viongozi wa eneo hilo ili kukabiliana na magenge ya vijana huko Likoni
Ekegusii: Ogocha amo kwabarendi boborendi aaria ekaonti ya Mombasa gwakoretwe nekeombe keria kiobomo bwechisukuru chioboroso  (KEPSSI) ase okobwaterana nabarai bebinyoro gokinana na ebiombe biobosaria nabana abake aaria Likoni
Dholuo: Chokruok mar polise mar oganda mar Mombasa ma ne oluong gi KEPSSI kod jotelo mag gweng'no mondo omonjgo grube mag rowere e Likoni
Somali: Golaha booliska ee Mombasa ayaa la kulmay CEPSSI iyo saraakiisha deegaanka si looga hortago kooxaha dhalinyarada ee Lycon

English: KEPSSI partnered with NPS to train community policing committees across six Mombasa subâ€‘counties combatting youth crime
Kiswahili: KEPSSI ilishirikiana na NPS kutoa mafunzo kwa kamati za polisi jamii katika kaunti ndogo sita za Mombasa kuhusu kupambana na uhalifu wa vijana
Ekegusii: ekeombe keria kiobomo bwechisukuru chioboroso  (KEPSSI) nkiabwateranete nekeombe kiabanyanyimbo (NPS) kuorokereria ekamati yabarendi ase ekenyoro
