Dholuo: KEPSSI noriwore gi NPS e tiego komiti mag polise e alwora mar Mombasa e kedo gi timbe mahundu mag rowere
Somali: TEPSSI waxay la shaqeyneysaa ururka NPS si ay u tababaraan guddiyada adeegga bulshada inay ku dhex maraan lix gobol oo ka kooban Mombasa si ay ula dagaallamaan dambiyada dhalinyarada

English: Research showing how police community collaboration contributed to crime reduction in Machakos Sub County
Kiswahili: Utafiti unaoonyesha jinsi ushirikiano wa jamii ya polisi ulivyochangia kupunguza uhalifu katika Kaunti Ndogo ya Machakos
Ekegusii: Obotuki bokoorokia buna okobwaterana gwe ekenyoro na eserekari biorokiri gokei obosaria
Dholuo: Nonro manyiso kaka riwruok mar oganda mar polise nokonyo e dwoko piny mahundu e sub county mar Machakos
Somali: Daraasad muujineysa sida wada shaqeynta booliska ay gacan ka geysatay dhimista dambiyada Gobolka Macachakos

English: Academic findings on drivers of COP success and constraints in Migori County's Nyumba Kumi program
Kiswahili: Matokeo ya kitaaluma kuhusu vichocheo vya mafanikio na vikwazo vya COP katika mpango wa Nyumba Kumi wa Kaunti ya Migori
Ekegusii: Amasomo abeene aorokirie buna omosangerekano bwabasangi ase oborendi (COP) bwakonyire gokeania emechando aaria ekaonti ya Migori goetera omoroberio O'Nyumba Kumi.
Dholuo: Weche ma josomo osepuonjore kuom gik ma ne nyalo miyo COP odhi maber kod gik ma ne nyalo miyo kik gikonygi e program mar Nyumba Kumi e County mar Migori
Somali: Natiijada baaritaanka mashruuca Numba Ten ee Gobolka Socdaalka Guryaha

English: Outline of training programs for police and community defenders in Kisumu, Mombasa, Nakuru, prior to national elections
Kiswahili: Muhtasari wa programu za mafunzo kwa polisi na watetezi wa jamii huko Kisumu, Mombasa, Nakuru, kabla ya uchaguzi wa kitaifa
Ekegusii: Ngwatora ere emeroberio yokwegeria as abasikari nabaegereri bebinyoro aaria Kisumu, Mombasa amo na' Nakuru ange nobochori obonene.
Dholuo: Weche machuok mag tiegruok ne polise kod joma kedo ne oganda e Kisumu, Mombasa, Nakuru, kapok itimo yiero mar piny
Somali: Sawirka barnaamijyada tababarka booliiska iyo difaacayaasha bulshada ee Kisumu, Mombasa, Nakuru, ka hor doorashada qaranka

English: All 47 Kenyan county security committee members received training in community policing and prevention of violent extremism
Kiswahili: Wajumbe wote 47 wa kamati ya usalama ya kaunti ya Kenya walipata mafunzo katika ulinzi wa jamii na kuzuia itikadi kali za kikatili
Ekegusii: Abarendi boborendi bechikaonti chionsi 47 mbanyorete amasomo amao nabateneneri boborendi bebinyoro abanyene gotanga obosareki bwogoonchorwa ebirengererio.
Dholuo: Jood komiti mar weche sirkal duto 47 ma Kenya noyudo tiegruok e weche mag rito oganda kendo geng'o timbe gero
Somali: Dhammaan 47 xubnood oo ka tirsan guddiga ammaanka ee degmada Kenya ayaa la tababaray diiwaangelinta bulshada iyo ka hortagga diinta adag

English: TOday GBV-capacity workshop with NPS and community figures across Kisumu subcounties
Kiswahili: Leo warsha ya uwezo wa GBV na NPS na watu mashuhuri katika jamii katika kaunti ndogo za Kisumu
Ekegusii: Rero ogomomia gokinia okomanya igoro yogokorera bobe abande ase yeki bare ase abasikari nabanto bande bebinyoro basikire ase amechie emeke yonsi inse ye'kaonti ya Kisumu
Dholuo: Tiegruok mar tiyo gi GBV mar odiechieng' kodiechieng' gi jotelo mag NPS kod jomamoko e alwora duto mar Kisumu
Somali: aqoon isweydaarsiga TOday GBV-caclacity oo ay ku jiraan NPS iyo tirakoobka bulshada ee deegaanada Kisumu

English: KNCHR tells of citizen engagement programs boosting security and human rights awareness in Kisumu County
Kiswahili: KNCHR inasimulia kuhusu programu za ushirikishwaji wa raia zinazoimarisha usalama na uhamasishaji wa haki za binadamu katika Kaunti ya Kisumu
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gia Kenya kerendete oboronge bwa mwanyabanto (KNCHR) ngoteba bare igoro yemeroberio yokobwaterana buna yakong'irie oborendi na obomanyi igoro yoboronge bwa mwanayabanto aaria ekaonti ya Kisumu
Dholuo: KNCHR wacho ni nitie chenro mag konyo ji mondo obed gi winjruok maber gi sirkal kod chike mag dhano e gweng' mar Kisumu
Somali: KCHCHR waxay ka hadleysaa barnaamijyo shukaansi ah oo xoojinaya amniga iyo wacyiga xuquuqda aadanaha ee Gobolka Kisumu

English: NPS published an official Text for community policing roles and expectations to help residents and officers work together more effectively
Kiswahili: NPS ilichapisha Nakala rasmi ya majukumu na matarajio ya polisi jamii ili kuwasaidia wakazi na maafisa kufanya kazi pamoja kwa ufanisi zaidi
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekekene kiabasikari (NPS) ngiatomete amanga amen'ge gochia abarendi boborendi bwebinyoro goetera esimi kobamanyia emeremo yabo nekere gekageire korwa asebare gokonya abamenyi na abaofisa gokora emeromo amo keboikeranu.
Dholuo: NPS ne ogolo ndiko mar tich mar polise mar oganda kod gik ma ne dwarore ni otim mondo okony jogweng' kod jotelo oti kanyachiel e yo maber
Somali: NPS waxay daabacday qoraal rasmi ah oo ku saabsan waajibaadka iyo rajada ay ku caawiso dadka deggan iyo saraakiisha inay si wax ku ool ah u wada shaqeeyaan

English: Study demonstrates that adoption of community policing in Nairobi significantly improves service delivery and police accountability
Kiswahili: Utafiti unaonyesha kwamba kupitishwa kwa polisi jamii jijini Nairobi kunaboresha kwa kiasi kikubwa utoaji wa huduma na uwajibikaji wa polisi
Ekegusii: Amasomo aorokirie ng'a goitabwa kwoborendi bwenyoro nabanyene aaria Nairobi yakonyire kegima emeremo yokorwa oborendi ase oboikeranu.
Dholuo: Nonro nyiso ni tiyo gi chenro mar polise e Nairobi miyo tij lendo kod miyo polise chiwo dwoko mag penjono maber
Somali: Cilmi-baarista ayaa muujineysa in maamulka dadweynaha ee Nairobi uu si weyn u wanaajiyo gaadiidka adeegyada iyo waajibaadka booliska

English: NPS published a Text detailing roles and expectations of community policing in Nairobi County
Kiswahili: NPS ilichapisha Nakala inayoelezea majukumu na matarajio ya polisi jamii katika Kaunti ya Nairobi
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene ki'abasikari nkiarigete amangana ameng'e agoteba buya emeremo na egekageire korwa abarendi boborndi bwebinyo ase ekaonti ya Nairobi.
Dholuo: NPS ne ogoyo ndiko ma lero tich kod geno mag polise e gweng' mar Nairobi
Somali: NPS waxay daabacday qoraal sharaxaya waajibaadka iyo rajada booliska dadweynaha ee Gobolka Nairobi

English: Research shows that community policing in Nairobi County significantly improves service delivery in police stations
Kiswahili: Utafiti unaonyesha kwamba polisi jamii katika Kaunti ya Nairobi inaboresha kwa kiasi kikubwa utoaji wa huduma katika vituo vya polisi
Ekegusii: Amasomo yokorigia chisemi chinyia nkworokia are ng'a abarendi boborendi bwenyoro ase ekaonti ya Nairobi ogoonchoreria okonene buna egasi egokorwa yoborendi ase chisitesheni chia police.
Dholuo: Nonro nyiso ni polise mag oganda e County Nairobi medo konyo ahinya e miyo tije mag polise e stesen
Somali: Cilmi baaris ayaa muujineysa in hawlaha dadweynaha ee Gobolka Nairobi ay si weyn u wanaajiyaan gaadiidka booliiska

English: Citywide COP strategy building citizen coalitions for crime prevention in Nairobi City
Kiswahili: Mkakati wa COP kote jijini kujenga miungano ya raia kwa ajili ya kuzuia uhalifu jijini Nairobi
Ekegusii: Chinchera chibarendi boborendi bwenyoro Nairobi engima (COP) bagoetera gocha amo nakorosia ebiombe bioboamo gotanga obosaria omochie omonene o'Nairobi.
Dholuo: Chenro mar COP mar konyo ji duto e kedo gi mahundu e taon mar Nairobi
Somali: Istaraatiijiyadda COP ee meel kasta ka dhiseysa isbahaysiga rayidka ah ee ka hortagga dambiyada magaalada Nairobi

English: NCRC government report finds mixed public trust in police despite years of community policing
Kiswahili: Ripoti ya serikali ya NCRC yagundua imani mchanganyiko ya umma kwa polisi licha ya miaka mingi ya ulinzi wa jamii
Ekegusii: Chiripoti chiekeombe ekenene gieserikari ekio kebwata chiripoti chieserikari chionsi (NCRC) nkworokia kere chitang'utang'u gati yabanainchi buna okwegena kwabo ase abasikari kore ogoke nonya yabeire engaki entambe korwa omoroberio bwoborendi nabarendi bebinyoro ochagete.
Dholuo: Ripot mar sirkal mar NCRC nyiso ni ji ok oyie gi polis kata obedo ni sirkal osebedo ka timo kamano kuom higni mang'eny
Somali: Warbixinta dawladda ee NCRC waxay isku khilaafineysaa kalsoonida dadweynaha ee booliiska inkasta oo ay jirtay sannado badan oo kormeerka bulshada ah

English: Analysis of police social media use and public trust dynamics in Nairobi City County
Kiswahili: Uchambuzi wa matumizi ya mitandao ya kijamii ya polisi na mienendo ya uaminifu wa umma katika Kaunti ya Jiji la Nairobi
Ekegusii: Okounenkia kwabasikari buna ebinto biokomanyia amang'ana (NCRC) bagotumeka na buna abainainchi babegenete ase ekaonti yomochi omonene bwekaonti ya Nairobi.
Dholuo: Nonro mar kaka polise tiyo gi weche mag tudruok gi ji kod kaka ji geno weche mag sirkal e taon mar Nairobi
Somali: Baadhitaan ku saabsan adeegsiga shabakadaha bulshada ee booliska iyo kalsoonida dadweynaha ee Gobolka Nairobi City

English: NCRC report reveals while community policing increased info sharing public trust remains low in Nairobi County
Kiswahili: Ripoti ya NCRC inaonyesha huku polisi jamii ikiongeza uaminifu wa umma katika ushiriki wa taarifa bado uko chini katika Kaunti ya Nairobi
Ekegusii: Chiripoti chiekeombe keria ekenene getenerete amasomo yobosaria (NCRC) yaorokirie ng'a nonya abarendi boborendi bwenyoro bagesete okomanyania amang'ana okwegenwa kwabo ase abainchi nogo kore inse ase ekaonti ya Nairobi.
Dholuo: Ripot mar NCRC nyiso ni kata obedo ni polise mag oganda medo medo chiwo weche, geno mar ji pod dhi piny e County Nairobi
Somali: Warbixinta NCC ayaa muujineysa in tirada dadka mas'uulka ka ah shaqada sii kordheysa ee warbaahinta dadweynaha ay weli hoos u dhacday Gobolka Nairobi

English: NCRC survey shows Kenyans want COP to tackle drug abuse, professionalism and slow investigations
Kiswahili: Utafiti wa NCRC unaonyesha Wakenya wanataka COP kukabiliana na matumizi mabaya ya dawa za kulevya, taaluma na uchunguzi wa polepole
Ekegusii: Obokongoria bwekeombe keria ekenene getenerete korigia chisemi chinyia chiogotanga obosaria (NCRC) nigo bookorokia ng'a abanto ba Kenya mbatagerte omonene otenerete obokoreri bwasikari (COP) akore omochando bwogotumia bobe amarigo nebinto biogotindia ase obotuki bwa bwango.
Dholuo: Nonro mar NCRC nyiso ni Jo-Kenya dwaro ni COP olo timbe mag tiyo gi yedhe mamero, lony e weche mag tich, koda nono weche mos mos
Somali: Baadhitaanka NCRC ayaa muujinaya in Kenya ay rabto in COP ay wax ka qabato isticmaalka daroogada, xirfad iyo baaritaan gaabis ah

English: NPS urged by IPOA and oversight bodies to strengthen community policing to improve public trust
Kiswahili: NPS yahimizwa na IPOA na vyombo vya usimamizi kuimarisha polisi jamii ili kuboresha uaminifu wa umma
Ekegusii: Ekeombe ekenene kia abasikari NPS giasoroirwe nekeombe keria getenerete abasikari bonsi (IPOA) na bonsi baria bakorigereria emeremo yabasikari bae abarendi boborendi bwenyiro chunguru buna enchera eyemo yokoirania okwegena.
Dholuo: NPS ne ojiw gi IPOA kod riwruoge ma nono weche mag sirkal mondo omed jiwo chenro mag sirkal mar sirkal mondo ji omed geno
Somali: NPS oo ay dhiirigelisay IPOA iyo guddiyada kormeerka si loo xoojiyo kormeerka bulshada si loo hagaajiyo kalsoonida dadweynaha

English: Interior Ministry commits to implement police reform proposals including expanded COP structures
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Mambo ya Ndani yaahidi kutekeleza mapendekezo ya mageuzi ya polisi ikiwa ni pamoja na miundo iliyopanuliwa ya COP
Ekegusii: Eministry yoborendi bwa ime yaenekirie gokora oboonchoreria bwa amachiko emeremo yabasikari buna ebirengererio biarwetwe na kogarei obokoreri bweofisi yomosikari oria otenenerete emeremo yabasikari (COP).
Dholuo: Ministry of Interior ochiwore mar tiyo gi paro mag lokruok e weche mag polise moriwo koda medo chenro mag COP
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha waxay fulineysaa talooyin ku saabsan dib-u-habeynta booliska iyo dhismayaasha ballaaran ee COP

English: New community policing head Judy Jebet appointed to lead COP efforts in Nairobi County
Kiswahili: Mkuu mpya wa polisi jamii Judy Jebet ateuliwa kuongoza juhudi za COP katika Kaunti ya Nairobi
Ekegusii: Omorai omonene omoyia bwabarendi bwoborendi bwenyoro Judy Jebet obekirwe koba omorai omonene otenenerete obokori emereyo yabasikari (COP) bwekaonti ya Nairobi.
Dholuo: Jatelo manyien mar polise mag oganda Judy Jebet oyier mondo ota tij COP e County Nairobi
Somali: Hogaamiyaha cusub ee maamulka bulshada Judy Jebet ayaa loo magacaabay inuu hoggaamiyo dadaallada COP ee Gobolka Nairobi

English: UoN report assesses trust dynamics and communication as key to successful COP in Ruai portion of Nairobi
Kiswahili: Ripoti ya UoN inatathmini mienendo ya uaminifu na mawasiliano kama ufunguo wa COP iliyofanikiwa katika sehemu ya Ruai jijini Nairobi
Ekegusii: Eripoti yeyunifasiti ya Nairobi (UoN) yarengete ayarengete obwegenu na oboererania bwamangana buna obwengencho enene goikerania obokoreri bwabasikari (COP) aaria ensemo ya Ruai ya Nairobi.
Dholuo: Ripot mar UN nono dongruok mar geno kod tudruok kaka gima duong' e miyo COP odhi maber e Ruai ma Nairobi
Somali: Warbixinta UoN waxay tilmaamaysaa in kalsoonida iyo isgaarsiinta ay muhiim u yihiin guusha COP ee qayb ka mid ah magaalada Nairobi

English: University of Nairobi research shows strong positive link between COP strategies and crime reduction in Machakos SubCounty
Kiswahili: Utafiti wa Chuo Kikuu cha Nairobi unaonyesha uhusiano mzuri kati ya mikakati ya COP na upunguzaji wa uhalifu katika Kaunti Ndogo ya Machakos
Ekegusii: Obokongoria bweyunifasiti ya Nairobi Nairobi mbwaorogetie emeroberio yokobwateterana kwabeene gati yomoteneneri omonene bwegasi yabasikari (COP) buna yakeanirie obosaria ase emechie ameke yekaonti ya Machakos
Dholuo: Nonro mar University of Nairobi nyiso tudruok maber e kind chenro mag COP kod dwoko piny mahundu e sub county mar Machakos
Somali: Cilmi baaris ka sameysan Jaamacadda Nairobi ayaa muujineysa xiriir wanaagsan oo u dhexeeya farsamooyinka COP iyo yareynta dambiyada Machakos Subcounty

English: Police presence and roadblocks set up in Machakos ahead of youth-driven Nane Nane protests as part of COP and crowd management readiness
Kiswahili: Uwepo wa polisi na vizuizi vya barabarani vimewekwa Machakos kabla ya maandamano ya Nane Nane yanayoendeshwa na vijana kama sehemu ya utayari wa COP na usimamizi wa umati
Ekegusii: Obonge bwabasikari nebirichanio biechipara biabekirwe Machakos nyuma yokororobekana kwabasae kwa Nane Nane erio gokinana nabarabwo buna omoroberio (COP) ase ogokinana na abanto abnge.
Dholuo: Polise ne ochako bedoe e taon mar Machakos kod yore mag ndara kane pok ochopo e kind joma tindo ma ne dhi kedo e lweny mar Nane Nane e kinde ma ne itimo COP kod chenro mar rito oganda
Somali: Ciidamada Booliska iyo xannibaadaha ayaa laga dhigay Machakos ka hor banaanbaxa dhalinyarada ee 8-ka sida qayb ka ah diyaar garowga COP iyo hoggaanka

English: Arrest in Yatta neighborhood achieved after public tip-off about robberies example of citizen-police collaboration
Kiswahili: Kukamatwa katika kitongoji cha Yatta kumepatikana baada ya taarifa za umma kuhusu wizi mfano wa ushirikiano wa raia na polisi
Ekegusii: Okobwatwa kwebibago aaria ase emate ya Yatta nogo kwanyarekanete nyuma yabainchi korwa korwa amang'ana gochia ase abasikari buna enchera eyemo yabainchi kobwaterana nabasikari
Dholuo: Ne omakgi e gweng ' mar Yatta bang ' ka sirkal osewacho ni ne gin jomecho ma ne oketho odgi
Somali: Xadhiga lagu sameeyay wadada Yatta ayaa ku guuleystay ka dib markii la shaaciyay falkii ka dambeeyay afduubka iskaashiga rayidka ah

English: Regional police launch COP-informed operations profiling gangs and increasing patrols in Kisumu County
Kiswahili: Polisi wa eneo hilo wazindua operesheni zinazoongozwa na COP za kuorodhesha magenge na kuongeza doria katika Kaunti ya Kisumu
Ekegusii: Abarai babateneneri bwokoreri bwabasikari bechingo babekirwe goikerani obokoreri obuya ase okomanya abasaria ba kera engencho nagotoma abasikari gochia ase ayio aaria ekaonti ya Kisumu.
Dholuo: Polise mag alwora chako tijni mar manyo joma biro ketho riwruok mar oganda Jehova kendo medo rito kuonde ma ji dhiyoe e alwora mar Kisumu County
Somali: Ciidamada Booliska Gobolka ayaa bilaabay dhaqdhaqaaqyo COP ah oo dhiirigelinaya kooxaha iyo kor u qaadista ilaalada Gobolka Kisumu

English: Interior CS opens new Kasagam police station enhancing security and COP infrastructure in Kisumu East
Kiswahili: Waziri wa Mambo ya Ndani afungua kituo kipya cha polisi cha Kasagam kinachoimarisha usalama na miundombinu ya COP huko Kisumu Mashariki
Ekegusii: Omonimisita bwoborendi bwa ime oigoire egetaseni gia porisi enyia ya Kasagam kogesa oborendi nobokoreri bwa baria batenenerete abasikari buna bagokora emeremo yabo aaria Kisumu ya mocha.
Dholuo: CS mar weche mag ot ochako soseyo manyien mar Kasagam mar polise mondo omed miyo sirkal obed gi ritruok kod chenro mag COP e Kisumu East
Somali: Gudaha dalka CS waxay furaysaa xarun cusub oo booliis ah oo loo yaqaan 'Kasagam Police Station' oo kor u qaadeysa amniga iyo qaab dhismeedka COP ee Kisumu Bari

English: IOM-supported COP public engagement events bring communities and security agencies together in Garissa
Kiswahili: Matukio ya ushiriki wa umma wa COP yanayoungwa mkono na IOM yanaleta pamoja jamii na mashirika ya usalama huko Garissa
Ekegusii: Ekeombe ekenene giense getenerete gokongia obokoreri bweserikari (IOM) giakonyire gosira abanene babasikari gokora emeremo yabo ase okobwaterana gokora emeremo yabo amo nabainchi aaria Garissa.
Dholuo: Chokruoge mag COP ma IOM siro kelo riwruok mar oganda dhano e Garissa
Somali: Dhacdooyinka shukaansiga dadweynaha ee ay taageerto IOM waxay isu keenaan bulshada iyo ururada amniga magaalada Garissa

English: Stakeholders including police chiefs and counselors trained in GBV community policing and awareness in Kisumu County
Kiswahili: Wadau wakiwemo wakuu wa polisi na washauri waliofunzwa kuhusu ulinzi na uhamasishaji wa jamii kuhusu GBV katika Kaunti ya Kisumu
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi amo nabasikari na baria bonsi batagegete oborendi amo nabasemia basomiigwe igoro komanyia abanto igoro yobobe bwogochaya gose gokorera abande bobe ase enncho yeki bare aaria ekaonti ya Kisumu
Dholuo: Joma nie grup moriwo nyaka jotend polise kod jodongo ma osetieg e weche mag polise kod chiwo pach ji e alwora mar Kisumu County
Somali: Xadgudbayaasha oo ay ku jiraan saraakiisha booliiska iyo lataliyayaasha tababaray kormeerka bulshada ee GBV iyo ogaanshaha Gobolka Kisumu

English: NPS published its official Community Policing Information Booklet to clarify roles, expectations and citizen engagement frameworks
Kiswahili: NPS ilichapisha Kijitabu chake rasmi cha Taarifa za Polisi Jamii ili kufafanua majukumu, matarajio na mifumo ya ushirikishwaji wa raia
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) nkiarwete egetabu kebwate eripoti igoro yoborendi bwebinyoro erio kobamanyia buna babwenerete gokora emeremo yabo, eke gekageire korwa ase bare bokobwaterana nabanyabinyoro.
Dholuo: NPS ne ogoyo buk mar Official Community Policing Information Booklet mare mondo oler tije, geno kod chenro mag bedo gi oganda
Somali: NPS waxay daabacday qaamuuska rasmiga ah ee Bulshada ee Warfaafinta Wararka si ay u qeexdo waajibaadka, rajada iyo shuruudaha shukaansiga rayidka ah

English: Kenya Methodist University/IJRISS research shows community policing significantly improves service delivery and trust in Nairobi County
Kiswahili: Utafiti wa Chuo Kikuu cha Methodist cha Kenya/IJRISS unaonyesha kwamba polisi jamii inaboresha kwa kiasi kikubwa utoaji wa huduma na uaminifu katika Kaunti ya Nairobi
Ekegusii: Eyunifasiti ya Kenya Methodist University kobwaterana na nechiyunfasiti chinde igoro yokorigia chisemi chinyia igoro yobobwenia nabanto korwa Belgium (IJRISS) yaorogetie ng'a oborendi bwebinyoro nobwengencho ase okorwa oborendi bwokwegena aaria ekaonti ya Nairobi.
Dholuo: Nonro mar Kenya Methodist University/IJRISS nyiso ni polise mag oganda medo konyo ahinya chiwo mar tich kod geno e County Nairobi
Somali: Cilmi baaris ay sameysay Jaamacadda Metodistka ee Kenya/IYRIS ayaa muujineysa in hawlaha bulshada ay si weyn u wanaajiyaan wax soo saarka adeegga iyo rajada Gobolka Nairobi

English: University of Nairobi research identifies communication as key to community trust and COP effectiveness in Ruai Township
Kiswahili: Utafiti wa Chuo Kikuu cha Nairobi unatambua mawasiliano kama ufunguo wa uaminifu wa jamii na ufanisi wa COP katika Mji wa Ruai
Ekegusii: Eyunifasiti ya Nairobi ekorigia chisemi chinyia yaorogetie nga ogokwanerana bun egento kiengencho koreta obwegenwa ase ebinyoro na okobwtera nebinyoro korwa oborendi (COP) ase oboikeranu aria etaoni enke ya Ruai.
Dholuo: Puonj mag University of Nairobi nyiso ni tudruok en gima duong' ahinya e miyo ji obed gi yie kendo mondo gikony e miyo weche obed maber e taon mar Ruai
Somali: Cilmi baaris ay sameeyeen Jaamacadda Nairobi ayaa muujineysa in isgaarsiinta ay muhiim u tahay kalsoonida iyo xiriirka bulshada ee magaalada Ruai Township

English: Nairobi Regional Commander pledges safe policing of GenZ protests incorporating COP principles and coordination with community groups
Kiswahili: Kamanda wa Mkoa wa Nairobi aahidi ulinzi salama wa maandamano ya GenZ kwa kuzingatia kanuni za COP na uratibu na vikundi vya kijamii
Ekegusii: Omosikari omonene bworogongo rwa Nairobi oenekeirie abasae ba GenZ oborendi ekero giokorobererekana kwabo bobwateranete nokobwaterana nobwebinyoro kobarenda inse yemeroberio ya (COP) ase okoererania nebinyoro.
Dholuo: Jatend Regional Commander Nairobi osesingore ni obiro rito gik ma timore e kind joma kedo e kind oganda mar GenZ ka oketo chike mag COP kod winjruok gi grube mag oganda
Somali: Taliyaha Gobolka Nairobi ayaa ku dhaartay in uu si nabadgelyo leh u kormeero banaanbaxyada GenZ oo ay ku jiraan xeerarka COP iyo wada shaqeynta kooxaha bulshada

English: Police credit community policing efforts for a marked decline in murders, defilement and other serious crimes in Mwala Machakos County
Kiswahili: Juhudi za polisi za kulinda jamii kwa kupunguza kwa kiasi kikubwa mauaji, unajisi na uhalifu mwingine mkubwa katika Kaunti ya Mwala Machakos
Ekegusii: Abasikari baitabire oborendo bwebinyoro ase ogokeie obosareku bwogoita, gotibonga na amamocho ande amabe aaria ekaonti ya Mwala Machakos.
Dholuo: Polise nyiso ni kinda mar polise mar oganda e miyo kwan mar joma ne oneg, joma ne oketho kod timbe mamoko maricho omedore ahinya e county mar Mwala Machakos
Somali: Booliska ayaa sheegaya in dadaallada booliska ee raadinaya adeegyada bulshada ay sabab u tahay dhimashada, kufsiga iyo dambiyada kale ee xun ee gobolka Mwala Machakos

English: Community forums sponsored by IOM improved trust and intelligence sharing between residents and security.
Kiswahili: Mabaraza ya jamii yaliyofadhiliwa na IOM yaliboresha uaminifu na ushiriki wa kijasusi kati ya wakazi na usalama.
Ekegusii: Emesangerekano yebinyoro yasiretwe nekeombe giense igoro yobonganyi (IOM) yasegetete okwegenana na gosanga amang'ana obotuki gati ya abanto bebinyoro nabarendi boborendi.
Dholuo: Chokruoge mag oganda ma IOM ne siro ne miyo ji bedo gi geno kendo ne gipogore weche mag sirkal e kindgi kod sirkal.
Somali: Shirarka bulshada ee ay taageertay IOM waxay xoojiyeen kalsoonida iyo isdhexgalka maskaxda ee dadka iyo nabadgelyada.

English: The Inspector General pledged to implement IPOA recommendations to strengthen oversight, disciplinary processes, and responsiveness to misconduct complaints.
Kiswahili: Mkaguzi Mkuu aliahidi kutekeleza mapendekezo ya IPOA ili kuimarisha usimamizi, michakato ya nidhamu, na uwajibikaji kwa malalamiko ya utovu wa nidhamu.
Ekegusii: Omorai omonene bwasikari (IG) nriete eira goikerania okoboria gwekeombe keria gietenerete korora buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) erio gokong'ia obomongeria, nchera yokorwa egesusuro, na koiraneria bwango gochia okwemuranganania kwa abanainchi.
Dholuo: Inspector General nosingore ni obiro tiyo gi paro mag IPOA mondo omed jiwo chenro mar rito, rito chike, kod dwoko kwayo mag ketho chik.
Somali: Madaxa Kormeerka ayaa ballanqaaday inuu fulin doono talooyinka IPOA ee ku saabsan xoojinta maamulka, nidaamyada cadaadis, iyo ka jawaabista cabashooyinka xun.

English: A report documented systemic excessive force during protests and called for prosecutions, crowd control reforms, and stronger conduct enforcement mechanisms.
Kiswahili: Ripoti ilirekodi matumizi mabaya ya nguvu wakati wa maandamano na kutoa wito wa mashtaka, mageuzi ya udhibiti wa umati, na mifumo imara ya utekelezaji wa mwenendo.
Ekegusii: Eripoti yarekoorokia buna abasikari bagotumia chinguru chinyinge ekero abanto bakorobererekana na ekaboria ng'a egosoerwa, amaonchorerio igoro buna abakorobererekana bakorendwa, nenchera ebwenerete kobarenda bikorwe.
Dholuo: Ripot moro ne nyiso kaka ne itiyo gi teko mokalo tong' e kinde mar protest kendo ne okwayo mondo oter kes, otim lokruok e wi kaka ne itiyo gi teko mar chiko ji, kendo mondo omi chike mag tayo timbe ji obed motegno.
Somali: Warbixin ayaa sheegtay in dibadbaxyada ay yihiin kuwo aad u xoog badan waxayna ku baaqeen in la dacweeyo, in la beddelo xakamaynta dadkii badnaa, iyo in la hirgeliyo nidaamyo dhaqameed oo aad u xoog badan.

English: Advocacy group PRWG urged criminal responsibility for senior commanders whose subordinates commit misconduct and expansion of command responsibility doctrine.
Kiswahili: Kundi la utetezi la PRWG liliwahimiza kuwajibika kwa jinai makamanda wakuu ambao wasaidizi wao hufanya utovu wa nidhamu na kupanua mafundisho ya wajibu wa amri.
Ekegusii: Ebiombe bwabarwanereri bia abasikari baria batenerete korigia amaonchorerio (PRWG) mbamanyetie abanene ba abasikari kobogoria amamocho abasikari babo abwo bakomocha ase chigasi chiabo goetera oggochoreria amachiko as ayio.
Dholuo: Grup mar PRWG ne ojiwo mondo oket bura ne jotelo madongo ma ne gin joma ok kare kendo ne gijiwo puonj mar bedo gi ting' mar tayo jolweny.
Somali: Kooxda difaaca ee PRWG waxay ku boorisay mas'uuliyadda dembiga in saraakiisha sare ee ay hoos yimaadaan ay ku dhaqmaan si xun oo ay u ballaariyaan cilmiga maamulka.

English: The Kenya Human Rights Commission criticized the IG for bypassing the Police Service Commission’s authority, warning that it undermines constitutional oversight.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Haki za Kibinadamu ya Kenya ilimkosoa IG kwa kupuuza mamlaka ya Tume ya Huduma za Polisi, ikionya kwamba inadhoofisha usimamizi wa kikatiba.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenerete oboronge bwamwanyabanto (KNCHR) mbangete ebikoru bwomonene bwabasikari kogenda mamincha namachiko yobokoreri bwekeombe getenerete obokoreri bwabasikari, komokurera ng'a ebikoru biaye nigo bire mamincha nobomongeria.
Dholuo: Kenya Human Rights Commission nokwedo IG nikech ne oketo pachgi kuom migawo mar Commission of Police Service, kendo ne osiemo ni mano ketho chike mag sirkal.
Somali: Guddiga Xuquuqda Aadanaha ee Kenya ayaa cambaareeyay IG-da inay ku xadgudubtay awoodda Guddiga Adeegyada Booliska, iyagoo ka digay inay hoos u dhigeyso maamulka dastuurka.

English: Media highlighted calls for an independent investigation into a custodial death, with families demanding prosecution and better detention oversight.
Kiswahili: Vyombo vya habari viliangazia wito wa uchunguzi huru kuhusu kifo cha mtu aliyekamatwa, huku familia zikidai mashtaka na usimamizi bora wa kizuizini.
Ekegusii: Ebiombo biokomanyia abanto amangana mbiaboretie nga obotuki bwogwetenera bokorwe igoro yogokwa yabanto baria barenge eseri ya porisi, abowo ase baria bakweretwe nabamwabo nga abasikari basoerwe na buna baria bare ase chiseri chia porisi bakoreretwe gose barendire.
Dholuo: Jofwamb weche ne onyiso ni ne dwarore ni otim nonro ma onge ratiro kuom tho ma ne otimore e jela, kendo joodgi ne dwaro ni otergi e bura kendo mondo omi gibed gi chenro maber mar rito joma otwe.
Somali: Warbaahinta ayaa xoogga saartay baahida loo qabo baaritaan madax banaan oo ku saabsan xuquuqda dhimashada, halka qoysaska ay codsadeen in la dacweeyo oo la xiro si ka wanaagsan.

English: An NGO launched a citizen oversight toolkit with training materials and reporting templates to strengthen youth involvement in accountability.
Kiswahili: Shirika lisilo la kiserikali lilizindua zana ya usimamizi wa raia yenye vifaa vya mafunzo na vielelezo vya kuripoti ili kuimarisha ushiriki wa vijana katika uwajibikaji.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe gie NGO yarwete egetabu kiomoroberio bwo'bomongeri bwabainchi nebinto bwokwegeria na buna babwenerete korwa amang'ana gochia erio gokongia abasae komanya na gotenerera ebikoru biabo.
Dholuo: Riwruok moro mar oganda maok nie sirkal nochako chenro mar konyo ji mondo obed gi chenro mar tiego ji kendo chiwo ripot e yo maber mondo omed jiwo rowere mondo obed gi thuolo mar timo yiero.
Somali: Hay'ad aan dawladeed ahayn ayaa soo saartay hay'ad kormeerka dadweynaha oo leh qalab tababar ah waxayna soo saartay tallaabooyin lagu xoojinayo dhalinyarada ka qaybgalka mas'uuliyadda.

English: Judicial leadership endorsed IPOA’s mandate and pledged support for stronger cooperation between the judiciary and the oversight body.
Kiswahili: Uongozi wa mahakama uliidhinisha agizo la IPOA na kuahidi kuunga mkono ushirikiano imara zaidi kati ya mahakama na chombo cha usimamizi.
Ekegusii: Abatenereri bokogamba ebina mbaete okoboko ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) buna kegokora emeremo na koenekia kobasira ase okobwaterana gti yechikoti nebiombe biria bikomongera obokoreri bwabo.
Dholuo: Jotelo mag buche mag bura ne oyie gi migawo mar IPOA kendo ne gisingore ni gibiro riwo lwedo winjruok motegno e kind buche mag buche mag bura kod buche mag bura.
Somali: Maamulka garsoorka ayaa ansixiyay IPOA ee beerta waxayna ballanqaadeen inay taageeraan iskaashi xooggan oo u dhexeeya maxkamadaha iyo guddiga maamulka.

English: IPOA launched a toll-free hotline operating 24/7 for public reporting of misconduct to increase accessibility and transparency.
Kiswahili: IPOA ilizindua simu ya dharura isiyolipishwa inayofanya kazi masaa 24 kwa siku, siku 7 kwa ajili ya kuripoti kwa umma kuhusu utovu wa nidhamu ili kuongeza ufikiaji na uwazi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) giansete esimi ya bosa ogoaka kobamanyia kobamanyia buna abasikari bakomocha ase emeremo yabo egokora emeremo amatuko onsi chinsa chionsi erio gokinia ogoikera obokoreri bwaporisi maiso marore.
Dholuo: IPOA ne ochako tiyo gi simo maonge chudo ma tiyo odiechieng' kodiechieng' mondo okony ji ng'eyo timbe maricho ma ne otimore mondo omi ji obed thuolo kendo gibed mang'won.
Somali: IPOA waxay bilawday shabakad internet oo aan xaddidnayn oo 24/7 ah iyadoo shaacinaysa habdhaqanka xun si loo kordhiyo helitaanka iyo caddaaladda.

English: A formal agreement between IPOA and the Law Society of Kenya aimed to streamline legal responses and improve prosecution support.
Kiswahili: Makubaliano rasmi kati ya IPOA na Chama cha Wanasheria cha Kenya yalilenga kurahisisha majibu ya kisheria na kuboresha usaidizi wa mashtaka.
Ekegusii: Okoigwana kwabeene gati yekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) na ekeombe keria ekenene getenerete obogambi ebina namachiko gia Kenya kwarengete kobeka buya obokoreri bwamachiko na korongei na gosira buna ebina bigosou.
Dholuo: Oganda mar Joluo mar Kenya kod IPOA notimo singruok mar loso chike e yo mayot kendo e yo maber mondo okony joma ne dhi donjo e buche mag kes.
Somali: Heshiiska rasmiga ah ee u dhexeeya IPOA iyo Hay'adda Sharciga Kenya wuxuu diiradda saarey soo bandhigida fikradaha sharciga iyo hagaajinta taageerada dacwadaha.

English: A review detailed IPOA’s achievements, challenges, and strategic direction and outlined next steps in police accountability reform.
Kiswahili: Mapitio yalielezea kwa kina mafanikio ya IPOA, changamoto, na mwelekeo wa kimkakati na kuainisha hatua zinazofuata katika mageuzi ya uwajibikaji wa polisi.
Ekegusii: Okorigereria keboyia ngwatebe geikaranu buna ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) giakorire buya, emechamndo ereo, amo nemeroberio yabeene yar koorokia ebitambokero bia motwe biogoikerania abasikari gotenera ebikotu biegasi yabo.
Dholuo: Nonro moro ne olero e yo matut gik ma IPOA osetimo, pek ma oyudo, kod yo ma gichano mar lochoe, kendo ne olero okang' ma biro luwo e loso chike mag polis.
Somali: Dib u eegis faahfaahsan oo ku saabsan guulaha, caqabadaha, iyo tilmaamaha sare iyo tilmaamaya tallaabooyinka soo socda ee xisaabinta booliska.

English: Following an IPOA probe, a senior officer and colleague were charged with torture and abuse of office, demonstrating judicial follow-through.
Kiswahili: Kufuatia uchunguzi wa IPOA, afisa mkuu na mwenzake walishtakiwa kwa mateso na matumizi mabaya ya ofisi, wakionyesha ufuatiliaji wa kimahakama.
Ekegusii: Goetra obotuki bwe'keombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA), omosikari omonene nomoke oye mbasoeretwe na gokumerwa igoro yogochanda gose komosuna omonto kare eseri ya porisi buna amamocho yogotumia amadaraka abo bobe, ekoenekia buna ekoti ekomongera amashitaka buya.
Dholuo: Bang' nono weche mag IPOA, ne odonjne ofisa moro maduong' kod jaode ni ne gitimo timbe mag sand kod tiyo marach gi migawo ma ne en-go, kendo mano nonyiso ni ne gitimo kamano e yo ma ratiro.
Somali: Ka dib markii la soo bandhigay IPOA, sarkaal sare iyo shaqaale kale ayaa lagu eedeeyay inay ku xadgudbeen xafiisyada, iyagoo muujinaya falalka xukunka.

English: A court verdict held a police sergeant accountable in a fatal shooting case, setting precedent for misconduct prosecutions.
Kiswahili: Uamuzi wa mahakama ulimfanya sajenti wa polisi kuwajibika katika kesi ya kupigwa risasi na kusababisha kifo, na kuweka mfano wa mashtaka ya utovu wa nidhamu.
Ekegusii: Ekoti yanacherete omosikari omonene kobogori amamocho ase ekina giokorasa, kworokia buya buna amchiko agokora emeremo ase bonsi.
Dholuo: Kot nong'ado bura ma nomiyo jatend polise odonjo e bura nikech ne oneg ng'ato ka ne onege. Mano nomiyo oter kesno e kot nikech timbe maricho.
Somali: Go'aanka maxkamaddu wuxuu ku baaqay nin booliis ah inuu xisaabtamo kiiska toogashada dhimashada, taasoo tusaale u ah dacwad-bixiyayaasha aan waxba galabsanayn.

English: A legal ruling confirmed IPOA’s exclusive authority to investigate police misconduct and rejected attempts to limit its jurisdiction.
Kiswahili: Uamuzi wa kisheria ulithibitisha mamlaka ya kipekee ya IPOA kuchunguza utovu wa nidhamu wa polisi na kukataa majaribio ya kupunguza mamlaka yake.
Ekegusii: Okonacha gwekoti nkwaete ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) chinguru chiogotuka buna abasikari bagokora bobe na kwanga ogosaba ng'a chinguru chiabo chikeanigwe.
Dholuo: Bura moro ma ne ong'ad ne onyiso ni IPOA kende ema nigi ratiro mar nono timbe maricho mag polise kendo notamore temo chungo ratiro mar sirkal.
Somali: Go'aanka sharciga ayaa xaqiijiyay in IPOA Uganda ay leedahay awood u gaar ah oo ay ku baarto dhaqanka xun ee booliska isla markaana ay diido isku dayga in la yareeyo awooddeeda.

English: IPOA spotlighted a serious misconduct case in Mombasa, calling for transparency and systemic discipline reforms.
Kiswahili: IPOA iliangazia kesi kubwa ya utovu wa nidhamu huko Mombasa, ikitaka uwazi na mageuzi ya nidhamu ya kimfumo.
Ekegusii: Ekoti ekanacha ekina ng'a ekeombe keri gietenenerete korigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo (IPOA) nkere nokobua koringori amamocho abasikari bakora igo ekanga ogosabang'a chinguru chiabochi keanigwe.
Dholuo: IPOA ne oketo ranyisi mar ketho chik maduong' e Mombasa, kendo ne okwayo ni otim lokruok e weche ma nyiso ni ji ong'eyo weche duto kendo ni otim lokruok e yo ma tayo chik.
Somali: IPOA waxay soo bandhigtay kiis xun oo ku saabsan habdhaqan xun oo ka dhacay Mombasa, iyadoo ku baaqeysa in la beddelo nidaamka difaaca jirka.

English: IPOA issued updates on detainee fatality investigations and outlined measures to improve custodial conditions.
Kiswahili: IPOA ilitoa taarifa mpya kuhusu uchunguzi wa vifo vya wafungwa na kuainisha hatua za kuboresha hali ya kifungo.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gietenerete korigereria buna abasikariba gokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) nkiarwete eripoti yobotuki bwabo igoro yabaria babegetwe chiseri na buna baumiete amo nemeroberio yokorora ng’a baria bonsi babwatetwe mbaegwe obosibore bwabo ime yechiseri.
Dholuo: IPOA ne ogolo weche manyien e wi nonro mar tho mar joma otwe kendo ne olero okang' ma ne onego oluw mondo okony joma otwe.
Somali: IPOA waxay soo saartay warbixin cusub oo ku saabsan baaritaanka dilka booliiska waxayna tilmaamaysaa tallaabooyin lagu hagaajin karo xaaladaha koritaanka.

English: A judicial ruling found former officers guilty of murder, reinforcing accountability for serious misconduct.
Kiswahili: Uamuzi wa mahakama ulibaini maafisa wa zamani kuwa na hatia ya mauaji, na hivyo kuimarisha uwajibikaji kwa utovu mkubwa wa nidhamu.
Ekegusii: Ekoti yanyorete abasikari namamocho yogoita, egekoro kiabegete chinguru gokora emeremo buya gwanchereria gotaiyo goikerania korora ng’a kera omosikari ebogorerie emeremo yaye.
Dholuo: Bura moro ma ne ong'ad ne onyiso ni joma ne tiyo e sirkal ne gin joma ne oneg ji, kendo mano nomiyo gibedo gi ratiro mar kawo okang' ne joma ne otimo timbe maricho.
Somali: Go'aanka maxkamaddu wuxuu ku eedeeyay saraakiisha hore inay dileen, taas oo xoojisay mas'uuliyadda mas'uuliyadda xadgudubka.

English: An IPOA warning stated that silence within the police force enables impunity and called for cultural reforms and safe reporting.
Kiswahili: Onyo la IPOA lilisema kwamba ukimya ndani ya jeshi la polisi huwezesha kutokujali na lilitaka mageuzi ya kitamaduni na kuripoti kwa usalama.
Ekegusii: Ogokurerwa korwa ekeombe keria gietenerete korigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA)ngwatebete ng’a ogotakwana buna abasikari bagokora bobe nenchera eyemo yagerire abasikari bagendererete gokora amamocho na gotegwa egesusuro, nagosaba ng’a oboonchoreria goetera chinchera chiegenka kobe erio korwa ribaga abanto koripoti.
Dholuo: Siem moro mar IPOA nowacho ni ling'ling' ei polise miyo ji bedo maonge ketho kendo ne okwayo ni otim lokruok e kit ngima ji kendo mondo weche duto ma timore kik lal.
Somali: Digniinta IPOA waxay sheegtay in aaminnimada ciidanka booliska ay ka caawineyso in laga fogaado ciqaabta iyo in la codsado isbeddelka dhaqanka iyo in lagu soo wargeliyo si ammaan ah.

English: IPOA inspected forensic labs and case files to improve evidence integrity and transparency in criminal investigations.
Kiswahili: IPOA ilikagua maabara za uchunguzi wa kimatibabu na faili za kesi ili kuboresha uadilifu wa ushahidi na uwazi katika uchunguzi wa jinai.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gietenerete korigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) nkiarogereretie buya chifaeri chiebina goikerania oboikeranu bwebinto bikworokia buna amagoso arenge ase enchera yamaiso marore ase obotuki bwebina.
Dholuo: IPOA osenono buge mag kes mondo ong'i ratiro mag weche miyalo e court
Somali: IPOA waxay dib u eegis ku sameysay shaybaarada maxkamadaha iyo faylasha dacwada si loo hagaajiyo xaqiiqda caddaynta iyo caddaaladda baaritaanka dambiyada.

English: A multi-agency forum aligned civil society, oversight bodies, and government to develop a coordinated police reform strategy.
Kiswahili: Jukwaa la mashirika mengi liliunganisha asasi za kiraia, vyombo vya usimamizi, na serikali ili kuunda mkakati wa mageuzi ya polisi ulioratibiwa.
Ekegusii: Okobwaterana kwebiombe biechi-enichio (NGOs), baria bakomongera, amo nesirikari korosia amo omoroberio bwokoererania ase okoererania kwa’maonchorerio a porsi.
Dholuo: Chokruok mar riwruoge mang'eny ne oromo  mondo olos chenro mar tich obila
Somali: Barxadda kala duwan waxay isku dartay bulshada rayidka ah, guddiyada kormeerka, iyo dawladda si ay u abuuraan nidaam booliis oo qorsheysan.

English: A public forum in Kakamega enabled citizens to report misconduct directly to officials, strengthening community oversight.
Kiswahili: Jukwaa la umma huko Kakamega liliwawezesha raia kuripoti utovu wa nidhamu moja kwa moja kwa maafisa, na hivyo kuimarisha usimamizi wa jamii.
Ekegusii: Omosangerekano obonsi aaria Kakamega okonyire abanainchi komanyia abane gotyaertera monto onde igoro yogokora bobe kwabasikari gochia abanene, naigo yakonya kwororobia gokora emeremo.
Dholuo: Chokruok moro mar ji duto ma ne otim Kakamega ne omiyo raia thuolo mar nyiso jotelo wach timbe maricho ma ne gitimo, kendo mano nomiyo ji omedo bedo gi paro maler
Somali: Barxadda dadweynaha ee Kakamega waxay shacabka u oggolaatay inay si toos ah u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xun saraakiisha, taasoo xoojineysa kormeerka bulshada.

English: An audit exposed misuse of public funds in police operations and prompted calls for fiscal transparency and procurement reform.
Kiswahili: Ukaguzi ulifichua matumizi mabaya ya fedha za umma katika shughuli za polisi na kusababisha wito wa uwazi wa kifedha na mageuzi ya ununuzi.
Ekegusii: Obokongoria mbwaorokia maiso marore igoro yogotumia chibesa bobe ekero abasikari bagokora emesako ekio kiagerete abanto gotaka komanya obokeene na obomaiso marore ase ogotumia chibesa echio na amaochorerio yobogori.
Dholuo: nonro mar pesa mitiyogo e migao mag polise osekelo lokruok mabeyo e chano kaka pesa tiyo
Somali: Isticmaalka la caddeeyay ee lacagaha dadweynaha ee howlaha booliska ayaa kiciyay codsiyada la caddeeyo dhaqaalaha iyo isbeddelka.

English: A live radio program educated listeners on detainee rights, proper custody treatment, and legal recourse for abuse.
Kiswahili: Kipindi cha redio cha moja kwa moja kilielimisha wasikilizaji kuhusu haki za wafungwa, utunzaji sahihi wa watoto, na njia ya kisheria ya kuchukua hatua dhidi ya unyanyasaji.
Ekegusii: Amasomo goetera eredio nasomitie abategereri oborionge bwabaria bare chiseri chia polisi, buna babwenerete korendwa buya ime yeseri, na ekibaranyare gokora onye bakorereirwe bobe.
Dholuo: program mar redio osepuonjo jowinjo e wi ratiro ma joma otwe nigo, kaka onego otim ne joma otwe, kod kaka inyalo tiek tim mar chayo ng'ato e yor chik.
Somali: Barnaamijka tooska ah ee idaacadda waxaa dhagaystayaashu ku baray xuquuqda xadgudubka, daaweynta saxda ah, iyo tallaabooyinka sharciga ah ee xadgudubka.

English: Posters distributed nationwide explained suspects’ rights, legal search limits, and how to file complaints with oversight bodies.
Kiswahili: Mabango yaliyosambazwa kote nchini yalielezea haki za washukiwa, mipaka ya utafutaji wa kisheria, na jinsi ya kuwasilisha malalamiko kwa vyombo vya usimamizi.
Ekegusii: Ebinto bwabwate amariko are komanyia oboronge bwomokagerwa, ekerngo giokomotababa, na buna oranyare gosoera abasikari gochia ase baria bakomongera buna abasikari bagokora emeremo.
Dholuo: Weche ma ne ondik e piny mangima ne lero ratiro ma joma iketoe kiawa nigo, tong' ma chike chike oketo e manyo joma oket e tuech, koda kaka inyalo donj ne riwruoge ma nono weche.
Somali: Boostada ayaa dalka oo dhan u qaybiyay dadka ku eedeysan xuquuqda boqorka, xuduudaha baaritaanka sharciga, iyo sida loo xaliyo cabashooyinka hay'adaha maamulka.

English: NPS launched an online portal providing access to oversight reports, misconduct statistics, complaint status, and disciplinary actions.
Kiswahili: NPS ilizindua lango la mtandaoni linalotoa ufikiaji wa ripoti za usimamizi, takwimu za utovu wa nidhamu, hali ya malalamiko, na hatua za kinidhamu.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kiabasikari (NPS) giansire obokoreri bweintaneti goikera chiripoti chia’ bamongeri buna poilisibagokora emeremo yabo barenge bakorore mamincha, buna ayio agendererete korigererigwa, negeusuro kiarurwe.
Dholuo: NPS nochako chenro mar tiyo gi intanet mar yudo ripode mag jarit, weche mag timbe maricho, chal mar gik ma ji wacho, koda weche mag kum.
Somali: NPS waxay soo saartay websaydh ka kooban warbixinnada kormeerka, tirakoobka habdhaqanka xun, xaaladda cabashooyinka, iyo tallaabooyinka ciqaabta.

English: APS introduced a yellow card system allowing citizens to report misconduct anonymously during patrols.
Kiswahili: APS ilianzisha mfumo wa kadi za njano unaowaruhusu raia kuripoti utovu wa nidhamu bila kujulikana wakati wa doria.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gis abasikari bobokoreri (APS) mnkiarwete ekadi yerangi yomochununu buna enchera yogokonya abanainchi komanyia amamocho abasikari bagokora gotemanyekania naye ng'o chingaki bagora omosako.
Dholuo: APS ne oketo chenro mar yudo kad ma jachuoyo ma ne miyo raia thuolo mar nyiso timbe maricho e yo maok ong'ere sama gitimo tij lworo.
Somali: APS waxay sameysay nidaam kaarka huruudka ah oo u oggolaanaya muwaadiniinta inay si qarsoodi ah u soo sheegaan waxyaabaha aan sax ahayn inta lagu jiro booqashada.

English: Mombasa County launched a text-based reporting line for victims to send secure complaints to oversight officials.
Kiswahili: Kaunti ya Mombasa ilizindua laini ya kuripoti kwa njia ya maandishi kwa waathiriwa kutuma malalamiko salama kwa maafisa wa usimamizi.
Ekegusii: Ekaonti ya Mmobasa yaansete okomanyia gooetera rirube erieng'e riesimi ase baria bakoreirwe bobe gotoma ebirero biabo gochia abatenereri babasikari kobwatia amamocho ayio.
Dholuo: Mombasa County nochako chenro mar chiwo ripot e yor ndiko ne joma ne otho mondo oor weche ma ok nyal geng'o kethogi ne joma ne tayo tijno.
Somali: Gobolka Mombasa wuxuu diyaariyay khadka warbixinta dhibbanaha si ay u diraan cabashooyinka amniga saraakiisha maamulka.

English: DCI urged citizens to submit crime complaints or tips directly to DCI offices or email to improve investigative response.
Kiswahili: DCI iliwasihi raia kuwasilisha malalamiko ya uhalifu au vidokezo moja kwa moja kwa ofisi za DCI au barua pepe ili kuboresha majibu ya uchunguzi.
Ekegusii: Omosikari omonene bwobotuki (DCI) osoroire abanainchi babe bagotoma okwemurangania kwabo gose bosemia konde gwonsi gochia asare ere omonyene gose komotomera eimeiri erio kwangoyia obotuki nokoiraneria.
Dholuo: DCI ne ojiwo raia mondo oter weche mag ketho chik kata weche mag ketho chik e ofise mag DCI kata e-mail mondo omi ji obed gi paro maber e wi weche mag nonro.
Somali: DCI waxay ku boorisay muwaadiniinta inay soo gudbiyaan cabashooyin dambiyeed ama inay si toos ah talooyin u siiyaan xafiisyada DCI ama emayl si loo hagaajiyo jawaabta baaritaanka.

English: Guidance provided on how to file police misconduct complaints and the rights of complainants.
Kiswahili: Mwongozo umetolewa kuhusu jinsi ya kuwasilisha malalamiko ya utovu wa nidhamu wa polisi na haki za walalamikaji.
Ekegusii: Oborai borure buna obwenerete komanyia abatenereri babasikari buna bagokora bobe gose okwemuranganania amo noboronge bwoyokwemuranganania.
Dholuo: Puonj ochiw e wi kaka inyalo donj ne polise e weche mag ketho chik kod ratiro mag joma odonjnego.
Somali: Tilmaamaha waxaa lagu bixiyay sida loo xalliyo cabashooyinka ku saabsan dhaqdhaqaaqa xun ee booliska iyo xuquuqda dacwad-bixiyayaasha.

English: NPS refuted a false terror alert online and urged verification through official channels.
Kiswahili: NPS ilikanusha tahadhari ya uwongo ya ugaidi mtandaoni na kuhimiza uthibitishaji kupitia njia rasmi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) mbangete amangana oborimo igoro yokobamanyia obokebago goetera eintaneti, na bagasorora ng'a koenekia amangana ayio nere buya akoreke goetera chichera chiria chireo chiokobamanyia.
Dholuo: NPS ne okwedo siem ma miriambo mar luoro e intanet kendo ne okwayo mondo okonygi ng'eyo wachno kokalo kuom yore mag sirkal.
Somali: NPS waxay diidday hanjabaadaha been abuurka ah ee internetka waxayna ku riixday xaqiijinta kanaalka rasmiga ah.

English: US Embassy warned citizens of increased terror threats at tourist sites and advised heightened awareness.
Kiswahili: Ubalozi wa Marekani ulionya raia kuhusu kuongezeka kwa vitisho vya ugaidi katika maeneo ya watalii na kushauri uelewa zaidi.
Ekegusii: Obobarosi bwa America Kenya (US Embassy) mbwaruete ogokurera gochia abainchi igoro yokogeseka kwobwoba nokogosereria kwobokebago ase chioteri chiria abageni korwa chinse chi isko bakobera na korwa ogosemia buna berure komanyia ayio.
Dholuo: Amerka Embassy nochiwo siem ne raia kuom wach medo bedo gi luoro e kuonde ma ji wuokie kendo ne ojiwogi mondo gijiw ji.
Somali: Safaaradda Mareykanka waxay muwaadiniinta uga digtay khataraha sii kordhaya ee argagixisada ee ka jira meelaha dalxiisayaasha waxayna dadka kula talisay inay wax badan ogaadaan.

English: Authorities warned Western and Nyanza communities of suspected terror recruitment and urged reporting of suspicious behavior.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka zilionya jamii za Magharibi na Nyanza kuhusu tuhuma za kuajiri watu wanaoshukiwa kuwa magaidi na kuhimiza kuripotiwa kwa tabia zinazoshukiwa.
Ekegusii: Aabarai mbakurerete ebinyoro bia Mocha na Nyanza igoro yogosoigwa ase obokebago bwogoaka chipomu na gosororwa komanyia abagambi igoro ya kende gionsi giechitang'utang'u.
Dholuo: Sirkal nosiemo ji e pinje mag Western kod Nyanza kuom wach chulo ji mondo oti gi gige lweny kendo ne gijiwo ji mondo ochiw ripot kuom timbe maricho.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiintu waxay ka digeen reer Galbeedka iyo reer Badda dadka looga shakisan yahay inay ku biiraan ciidamada argagixisada waxayna ku booriyeen inay soo sheegaan dhaqanka shakiga leh.

English: Public informed of an Al-Shabaab attack in Garissa and encouraged to stay vigilant as security heightened.
Kiswahili: Umma umearifiwa kuhusu shambulio la Al-Shabaab huko Garissa na kuhimizwa kuwa macho huku usalama ukiimarishwa.
Ekegusii: Abanainchi bamanyiigwe igoro yebikoreri bia akili bandia Al bia -Shabaab goaka epomu Garissa, na kobaa omoyo gotigara maiso ekiagera oborendi bwagesirwe.
Dholuo: Ji duto ne olando ni Al-Shabaab ne omonjo Garissa kendo ne ojiwogi ni gisik ka girito ka sirkal medo bedo motegno.
Somali: Wararka dadweynaha ee ku saabsan weerarkii Al-Shabaab ku qaadeen magaalada Garissa ayaa ku dhiirrigeliyay in la ilaaliyo nabadgelyada markii ay dab ka dhacday.

English: Security operations intensified in Kitale and North Rift to combat cattle rustling with specialized units deployed.
Kiswahili: Shughuli za usalama ziliimarishwa Kitale na North Rift ili kupambana na wizi wa mifugo huku vikosi maalum vikiwekwa.
Ekegusii: Emeroberio yoborendi aaria Kitale na North Rift bangangane gokora aboibi bwechiombe ase okobwaterana nebitengo bieserikari bia beene biatomirwe aroro.
Dholuo: Ne omedo tiyo gi yore mag rito dhok e Kitale kod North Rift mondo giked gi ywaruok ma ne nitie e kind dhok.
Somali: Waxqabadyada difaaca ayaa la kordhiyay Qalabka iyo Dooxada Waqooyiga Waqooyiga si looga hortago lo'da si degdeg ah u duulaya oo leh qaybo gaar ah.

English: Government recognized GBV as a national security threat and called for inter‑agency collaboration.
Kiswahili: Serikali ilitambua GBV kama tishio la usalama wa taifa na ikataka ushirikiano kati ya mashirika.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yarorire ogkorerwa bobe ekiagera eki ore (GBV) koba ringana rokogosereria eborendi bwense na koreta amo ebitengo bieserikari kobwaterana.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne oyie ni GBV en gima kelo hinyruok ne sirkal kendo ne okwayo ni riwruok mar oganda Jehova oriwre gi riwruok mar oganda Jehova.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay aqoonsatay GBV inay khatar u tahay amniga qaranka waxayna dalbatay iskaashi u dhexeeya dowladda iyo xisbiga.

English: A terror cell in Lamu was dismantled and suspects arrested in a joint security operation.
Kiswahili: Kikosi cha ugaidi huko Lamu kilivunjwa na washukiwa walikamatwa katika operesheni ya pamoja ya usalama.
Ekegusii: Eseri ase ebibago biechipomu bibekire aaria Lamu yabunetwe na abakagerwa mbabwatetwe goetera ebitengo ao ao bieserikari.
Dholuo: Ne oketh sel moro mar jo mahundu e taon mar Lamu kendo ne omak joma ne itemo chungo e tij sirkal.
Somali: Qeybta cabsida ee magaalada Lamu ayaa la burburiyay waxaana la xiray dadka loo tuhmay inay yihiin ciidamo ilaalin ah.

English: NPS debunked a fake terror warning poster and cautioned against misinformation.
Kiswahili: NPS ilikanusha bango bandia la onyo la ugaidi na kuonya dhidi ya taarifa potofu.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gia abasikari (NPS) nkiarwete oboene igoro yongainereri goetera amariko ogokurera anantetigwe chinaysi bwogoakwa epomu na gokurera abanto batige korwa amangana agotantania.
Dholuo: NPS ne oketo kiawa kuom weche ma ne ondik e wi weche mag lweny kendo ne ochiwo siem ne ji mondo kik gibed gi weche maok kare.
Somali: NPS waxay tirtirtay calaamadaha digniinta been abuurka ah iyo digniinta ka hortagga wararka been abuurka ah.

English: US Embassy issued advisory warning of heightened crime and terror risks and urged caution.
Kiswahili: Ubalozi wa Marekani ulitoa onyo la ushauri kuhusu hatari kubwa za uhalifu na ugaidi na kuhimiza tahadhari.
Ekegusii: Obobalosi bwa America (US Embassy) aiga Kenya yarwete ogosemia kwogokurera igoro yobosareku bwaigoro mono nokonyarekana kwobokebago na gosaba koba maiso.
Dholuo: Amerka Embassy nolando siem mar wach ketho chik kod timbe mahundu kendo ne okwayo ni mondo gibed motang'.
Somali: Safaaradda Mareykanka waxay ka digtay kororka dambiyada iyo khatarta argagixisada waxayna ka digtay.

English: US Embassy imposed travel restrictions for staff in six counties due to insecurity.
Kiswahili: Ubalozi wa Marekani uliweka vikwazo vya usafiri kwa wafanyakazi katika kaunti sita kutokana na ukosefu wa usalama.
Ekegusii: Obobalosi bwa America (US Embassy) aiga Kenya mbwarwete ogokurera gochia abanto babo koba maiso gotarera chikaonti 6 aiga Kenya ekiagera oborendi botaisaine aroro.
Dholuo: Amerka ne ogolo chike mag wuoth ne jotich e gwenge auchiel nikech ne onge ritruok.
Somali: Safaaradda Maraykanka ayaa xannibay safarka shaqaalaha lix gobol sababtoo ah ammaan la'aanta.

English: NPS published a list of most wanted terror suspects and urged anonymous public reporting.
Kiswahili: NPS ilichapisha orodha ya washukiwa wa ugaidi wanaotafutwa sana na kuhimiza watu wasiojulikana kuripoti.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) nkiarwete omoroberio obaria baganeirie mono buna ebibago biogoaka chipomu na gosaba abanto babamanyie bakagerwa bande bateri gweteba barabwo mbarabi .
Dholuo: NPS ne ogolo list mar joma ne omany ahinya e weche mag mahundu kendo ne okwayo ni mondo ji ong'e ni ok gitim kamano.
Somali: NPS waxay daabacday liiska argagixisada lagu eedeeyay in ay yihiin kuwa aad loo raadinayo waxayna soo saartay warbixin aan la garanayn.

English: KAA heightened airport security after a bomb threat and advised early arrival for screening.
Kiswahili: KAA iliimarisha usalama wa uwanja wa ndege baada ya tishio la bomu na kushauri kuwasili mapema kwa ajili ya uchunguzi.
Ekegusii: Egetii giechindege kia Kenya (KAA) kiagesire oborendi ase egetii nyuma yobwoba bweombu goateka na gosaba baria bonsi bagochia koiruruka baike mapema gokorerwa oboringori.
Dholuo: KAA ne omedo rito ndege bang' ka ne masira mar mbom moro otimore kendo ne ojiwo ni ji odog chon mondo otim nonro.
Somali: KAA waxay kor u qaadday amniga garoonka diyaaradaha ka dib halista qaraxa waxayna ku talisay inay horay u yimaadaan baaritaano.

English: US government advised citizens to avoid Eastleigh and Kibera due to security concerns.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Marekani iliwashauri raia kuepuka Eastleigh na Kibera kutokana na wasiwasi wa usalama.
Ekegusii: Eserikari ya America yasemirie abanainchi koba maiso gochia Eastleigh na Kibera ase engencho yoborendi botari oboikeranu.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar Amerka nojiwo raia mondo kik giriw Eastleigh kod Kibera nikech weche mag sirkal.
Somali: Dowladda Mareykanka waxay muwaadiniinta kula talisay inay ka fogaadaan Eastleigh iyo Kibera sababo la xiriira walaaca amniga.

English: Additional personnel were deployed to Naivasha to secure the Safari Rally event.
Kiswahili: Wafanyakazi wengine walitumwa Naivasha ili kuhakikisha tukio la Safari Rally.
Ekegusii: Abakori emeremo abange batomirwe gochia Naivasha kobeka oborendi ekero gia Safari Rally event.
Dholuo: Ne oor jotich mamoko e taondno mondo omi gitim chokruok mar Safari Rally.
Somali: Shaqaalaha kale waxaa loo diray Naivasha si ay safarka u sameeyaan mid saaxiibtinimo leh.

English: Public advised not to circulate graphic images after the DusitD2 attack to protect victims’ dignity.
Kiswahili: Umma ulishauri kutosambaza picha za picha baada ya shambulio la DusitD2 ili kulinda heshima ya waathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Abanainchi basabirwe tibasiarera chibicha chiokwoboi buna DusitD2 yaagetwe ebomu erio korenda amasikani ya baria baagetwe nepomu.
Dholuo: Ji ne okwayo mondo kik giland piche jomosenindo bang' monj mar DusitD2 mondo omi girit luor mar joma ne otho.
Somali: Dadweynaha ayaa kula talinaya in aan la qaybin sawirro cad kadib weerarkii DusitD2 si loo ilaaliyo dhibanayaasha ololaha sharafta leh.

English: Cyclone Hidaya alert issued urging coastal residents to prepare for strong winds and floods.
Kiswahili: Tahadhari ya Kimbunga Hidaya yatolewa ikiwataka wakazi wa pwani kujiandaa kwa upepo mkali na mafuriko.
Ekegusii: Ogokurerwa igoro ya yomorindo omonene okorokwa Hidaya kwarwetwe gosorora abanto bamenyete ang'e na nyancha ukwearigania ase emerindo emene netoigo.
Dholuo: Riembo kod pi mager mar yamo kod apaka ne okelo siem ne joma odak e dho nam.
Somali: Hurricane Hirada waxay dadka ku nool xeebta uga digtay inay diyaar u noqdaan dabaysha iyo fatahaadaha.

English: Interior Ministry warned ahead of protests, urging peaceful demonstrations and placing security forces on alert.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Mambo ya Ndani ilionya kabla ya maandamano, ikihimiza maandamano ya amani na kuwaweka vikosi vya usalama katika tahadhari.
Ekegusii: Eminisitiri yoboredi bwa ime yakurerwe nyuma yokoroberekana gotaraba, egosorora nga okoroberekana kobe okwomorembe na kobeka ebitengo bionsi bioborendi maiso.
Dholuo: Ministry of Interior nochiwo siem e wi gik ma ne dhi timore ka ji ok dhi e chokruok, ne okwayo mondo otim gik ma ne dhi kelo kuwe kendo ne oketo jolweny mag sirkal e bwo tem.
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha ayaa digniin ka bixisay banaanbaxyada, iyagoo ku booriyay banaanbaxyada nabadda iyo in ciidamada amniga ay feejignaadaan.

English: National Cybersecurity Strategy published outlining plans to protect digital infrastructure.
Kiswahili: Mkakati wa Kitaifa wa Usalama wa Mtandaoni ulichapisha ukielezea mipango ya kulinda miundombinu ya kidijitali.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio omonene bweserikari okorenda amang'ana aye arikire taminchoria gochia amaboko amabe nkiarurwete omoroberio buna ekorenda bionsi biria bigachete amang'ana.
Dholuo: Chenro mar National Cybersecurity Strategy ne ogolo chenro mar rito chenro mag digital.
Somali: Istaraatiijiyadda Qaranka ee Xaddidaadda Isticmaalka Internetka ayaa daabacday qorsheyo lagu ilaalinayo qaababka dhijitaalka ah.

English: Multiple suspects arrested in Lamu during a counter‑terror operation; public urged to report tips.
Kiswahili: Washukiwa kadhaa wakamatwa Lamu wakati wa operesheni ya kukabiliana na ugaidi; umma wahimizwa kuripoti taarifa za watu waliokamatwa.
Ekegusii: Abakagerwa bobosaria ba kera engencho mbabwatetwe aaria lamu ekero kiomosako gotana ogoakwa nechipomu; abanainchi mbasabetwe koerwa chiripoti.
Dholuo: Ji mang'eny ma ne odonjore gi timbe mahundu ne omak e taon mar Lamu; ne ojiw ji mondo ochiw paro.
Somali: Dad badan oo lagu tuhmay ayaa lagu qabtay Lamu inta lagu gudajiray qalliinka caloosha; dadweynaha ayaa ka codsaday inay soo sheegaan talooyin.

English: Residents in flood and conflict‑prone areas ordered to evacuate with routes and shelters listed.
Kiswahili: Wakazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko na migogoro wameamriwa kuhama huku njia na makazi yakiorodheshwa.
Ekegusii: Abamenyi bari bare aase emegoko gose aregire chimanano bachikirwe kong'anya korwa ase ande onsi ararete emechando gochia ase atebire neserikari gose chinyomba chiria eserikariyatebire.
Dholuo: Ne ochik joma odak e alwora ma pi opong'o kendo ma nigi tungni mondo owuog e gweng'no, kendo ne oket kuonde ma gidhiye.
Somali: Dadka degganaa deegaanada ay fatahaadu ka dhacday iyo dagaalada ayaa amar ku bixiyay in dadka ay u guuraan waddooyin iyo guryo ay ku noolaadaan.

English: Government issued updates on North Rift anti‑bandit operations and reaffirmed commitment to security.
Kiswahili: Serikali ilitoa taarifa mpya kuhusu shughuli za kupambana na majambazi za North Rift na kuthibitisha tena kujitolea kwa usalama.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yarure eriport igoro ya yebitengo bieserikari gotanga aboibi bwechiombe aaria North Rift na kobaenekeria oborendi bwabo.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne ogolo weche manyien e wi tij lweny ma ne itimo e North Rift kendo ne onyiso ni ne oketo pache kuom weche mag sirkal.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay soo saartay warbixin cusub oo ku saabsan howlaha ka hortagga isgaarsiinta ee Waqooyiga Wabiga waxayna dib u xaqiijisay mas'uuliyadeeda amniga.

English: NPS reminded officers to avoid misuse of force during protests and maintain professionalism.
Kiswahili: NPS iliwakumbusha maafisa kuepuka matumizi mabaya ya nguvu wakati wa maandamano na kudumisha weledi.
Ekegusii: Ekombe keria ekenene gia abasikari (NPS) kiainyoirie abobisa baye gotatumia chibunduki bobe chingaki chiokoroberekana na goikerania obokoreri emeremo obuya.
Dholuo: NPS noparo ne jotend polis ni kik giti gi teko e yo marach e kinde mag mor kendo gitim gik ma nyiso ni gin joma olony.
Somali: NPS waxay xasuusisay saraakiisha booliska inay ka fogaadaan isticmaalka xoogga xad-dhaafka ah intii lagu jiray mudaaharaadyada iyo inay ilaaliyaan awoodda aqooneed.

English: US Embassy warned of potential unrest during primaries and urged citizens to avoid large gatherings.
Kiswahili: Ubalozi wa Marekani ulionya kuhusu machafuko yanayoweza kutokea wakati wa kura za mchujo na kuwasihi raia kuepuka mikusanyiko mikubwa.
Ekegusii: Obobalosi bwa America aiga Kenya US Embassy) nyarwete ogokurera igoro yomoburakano ekero gwokorwanererera chitigiti chiebiama biegesiaia igo gosaba abanainchi berende gotaba ase emesangerekano emenene.
Dholuo: Amerka ne osiemo ji kuom ywaruok manyalo bedoe e kinde mag yiero mag siasa kendo ne ojiwo raia mondo kik chokre e chokruoge madongo.
Somali: Safaaradda Maraykanka ayaa ka digtay rabshadaha ka dhici kara xilligii xukunka waxayna muwaadiniinta ugu baaqday inay ka fogaadaan shirarka waaweyn.

English: Government declared a nationwide high-alert and urged citizens to remain calm, report suspicious activity, and cooperate with security agencies.
Kiswahili: Serikali ilitangaza tahadhari kubwa kitaifa na kuwasihi raia kuwa watulivu, kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka, na kushirikiana na vyombo vya usalama.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yatangasire koba maiso ense engima na gosaba abanainchi koba abatoreru, korwa eripoti igoro ya ebire nechitang'utang'u, na kobwaterana nabateneneri bobosrendi.
Dholuo: Sirkal nolando ni piny mangima en kama odong' gi siem kendo nojiwo raia mondo obed gi chuny mokuwe, onyis ni gitimo gik ma ok kare, kendo giti kanyachiel gi riwruoge ma rito weche mag sirkal.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay ku dhawaaqday tallaabo sare oo dalka oo dhan ah waxayna ku boorisay muwaadiniinta inay noqdaan kuwo xasilloon, inay soo sheegaan waxqabadyada shakiga leh, iyo inay la shaqeeyaan ururada amniga.

English: NPS warned the public about a fake police recruitment advert online and advised job seekers to rely only on official government platforms.
Kiswahili: NPS ilionya umma kuhusu tangazo bandia la kuajiri polisi mtandaoni na kuwashauri wanaotafuta kazi kutegemea majukwaa rasmi ya serikali pekee.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) giakureire abainchi igoro yokong'ainwa goetera eintaneti ng'a abasikari nkorikwa bare na kobamanyia bonsi ng'a ogotangasa gwokorika abasikari ngoetera eintaneti yeserikari yoka.
Dholuo: NPS nosiemo ji kuom wach lando miriambo mag polise e intanet kendo ne ojiwo jogo madwaro tich mondo oket genogi kuom chenro mag sirkal kende.
Somali: NPS waxay dadweynaha uga digtay booliiska been abuurka ah ee diiwaangashan internetka waxayna ku talisay dadka shaqo raadinaya inay ku tiirsan yihiin oo keliya barnaamijyada rasmiga ah ee dowladda.

English: NPS dismissed a viral terror-warning poster as a hoax and urged the public to verify information before sharing.
Kiswahili: NPS ilipuuza bango lililokuwa likieneza onyo la ugaidi kama ulaghai na kuwahimiza umma kuthibitisha taarifa kabla ya kuzisambaza.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) yakanete amangana igoro yokogosereria goetera eintaneti ng'a ebibago ngoaka biarenge epomu na gosaba abainchi koenekia amangana aya ase aruwete nyuma batarasareria.
Dholuo: NPS ne oketo poster ma ne nyiso ni ji nigi sigu gi timbe mahundu kaka miriambo kendo ne ojiwo ji mondo onon weche kapok gipogogi.
Somali: Hay'adda NPS waxay baabi'isay calaamadaha digniinta argagixisada inay yihiin khiyaano waxayna dadka ku boorrisay inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadka ka hor inta aan la qaybin.

English: APS responded to a school bomb threat by evacuating students, securing the area, and launching investigations into the source.
Kiswahili: APS ilijibu tishio la bomu la shule kwa kuwahamisha wanafunzi, kulinda eneo hilo, na kuanzisha uchunguzi kuhusu chanzo.
Ekegusii: Abasikari bobokoreri (APS) nkiairaneretie bwango igoro yamang'ana yokogosereria gwepombu ase esukuru goetera ogotamia abana, goetanana ase ayio, na goansa obotuki komanya ase amangana ayio arwete.
Dholuo: APS ne odwoko pek ma ne oyudo nikech mbom moro ne omako skul kuom golo jopuonjre, rito alwora, kendo chako nono kama ne owuokie.
Somali: APS waxay ka jawaabtay hanjabaadda qaraxa dugsiga iyagoo ardayda u wareejiyay, goobta ay ku sugan yihiin ay ogaadeen, waxayna bilaabeen baaritaano.

English: A curfew was imposed in Mandera County to address rising insecurity and facilitate ongoing security operations.
Kiswahili: Amri ya kutotoka nje iliwekwa katika Kaunti ya Mandera ili kukabiliana na ongezeko la ukosefu wa usalama na kurahisisha shughuli za usalama zinazoendelea.
Ekegusii: Ogochika gotanga abanto mbasoka korwa chinka chiabo chinsa gete nkwabegetwe aaria ekaonti ya Mandera buna enchera eyemo yogokeania obokebago na kobeka oborendi ase omoroberio bwokogenderera.
Dholuo: Ne oket chik mar wuok e kambi e taon mar Mandera mondo otiek gik maricho ma timore e alwora kendo mondo omi weche mag sirkal obed mayot.
Somali: Gobolka Mandera waxaa lagu soo rogay amarka dib u soo noqoshada si looga hortago welwelka loona fududeeyo howlaha amniga ee socda.

English: Kenya Meteorological Department issued a flash-flood advisory for seven counties and urged residents to take safety precautions.
Kiswahili: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya ilitoa ushauri kuhusu mafuriko ya ghafla kwa kaunti saba na kuwasihi wakazi kuchukua tahadhari za usalama.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gekorigeria rire buna rire nkiarwete ogkurera igoro yogocha kwembura enyinge nemegoko ime yechikaonti 7 naigo koboria abanto ng'a berende.
Dholuo: Kenya Meteorological Department ne ogolo siem mar pi pi e gwenge abiriyo kendo ne ojiwo jogweng'no mondo otang' gi masiche.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha cimilada ee Kenya ayaa talooyin sare siisay toddoba degmo waxayna ku booriyeen dadka deegaanka inay qaataan tallaabooyin amni.

English: Airports nationwide were placed on high alert with intensified screenings following a classified security memo.
Kiswahili: Viwanja vya ndege kote nchini vimewekwa katika tahadhari kubwa huku uchunguzi ukiimarishwa kufuatia taarifa ya usalama iliyofichwa.
Ekegusii: Ebitii biechindeke Kenya engima mbiabiaboretigwe koba maiso na komongera buya baria bonsi bagosoa ase ebitii ebio korengana nogokurerwa kwa ime kwarwetwe nabarendi boborendi.
Dholuo: E pinje duto, ne oket ndege e bwo rit maduong' kendo ne oket chenro mar nono weche mag sirkal.
Somali: Garoomada diyaaradaha ee dalka oo dhan waxaa si taxadar leh loo baaray iyadoo la raacayo tallaabooyinka amniga.

English: Authorities deployed surveillance, roadblocks, and emergency teams to ensure safety ahead of the Safari Rally.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ziliweka ufuatiliaji, vizuizi vya barabarani, na timu za dharura ili kuhakikisha usalama kabla ya Safari Rally.
Ekegusii: Abarendi mbagegete obomongeri, ebitumo ase chipara, na baria bagokonya ekero kiemebasekano goikerania oborendi nyuma yamashindano yechigari.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne oketo chenro mar rito ji, ne ogeng'o ndara, kendo ne oketo grup mag rito ji mondo omi girit ngimagi kapok chokruok mar Safari ochakore.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiintu waxay safarka Rully ka hor dhigeen sirdoonka, xannibaadaha, iyo kooxaha xaaladaha degdegga ah si loo ilaaliyo nabadgelyada.

English: Government issued updates on North Rift anti-banditry operations, including arrests and livestock recovery, urging public cooperation.
Kiswahili: Serikali ilitoa taarifa mpya kuhusu shughuli za kupambana na ujambazi za North Rift, ikiwa ni pamoja na kukamatwa na kurejeshwa kwa mifugo, ikihimiza ushirikiano wa umma.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yamanyetie abanto ba North Rift igoro yemeroberio yaye gotanga oboibi bwechiombe, abaibi babwatirwe nechiombe chianyorirwe na koiranigwa, na gosaba nga okobwaterana kobeo.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne ogolo weche manyien e wi tij lweny ma ne itimo e North Rift, moriwo nyaka twech kod choko jamni, kendo ne ojiwo ji mondo oti kanyachiel.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay soo saartay warbixin cusub oo ku saabsan howlaha ka hortagga xadgudubka xuquuqda muwaadiniinta, oo ay ku jiraan qabashada dadka iyo xoolaha, waxayna ku dhiirigelisay wada shaqaynta dadweynaha.

English: Ministry of Interior advised evacuations in conflict-prone and flood-affected areas and deployed emergency response teams.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Mambo ya Ndani ilishauri uhamishaji katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na migogoro na mafuriko na kupeleka timu za kukabiliana na dharura.
Ekegusii: Eminisirtiri yoborendi bwaime yarwete ogosemia abanto barwe chngongo chiria neminano na chiria chigoterema amache na gotoma baria bagokonya elero kiemebasekano.
Dholuo: Ministry of Interior ne ochiwo siem mondo ji owuog e gwenge ma ne nigi ywaruok kod kuonde ma ne pi opong'o kendo ne oket grup mag chiwo kony e kinde mag chandruok.
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha waxay dadka kula talisay inay ka guuraan meelaha khilaafaadka iyo fatahaadaha ka dhaca iyo inay u diraan kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah.

English: NPS reiterated guidance for officers to use proportional force during protests and to prioritize peaceful engagement.
Kiswahili: NPS ilirudia mwongozo kwa maafisa kutumia nguvu sawia wakati wa maandamano na kuweka kipaumbele katika ushiriki wa amani.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kiabasikari (NPS) kiairoreire komanyia abasikari gotumia chinguru chinke chingaki chiokorobererekana na koba nobwororo chingaki bakoiranererania nabainchi.
Dholuo: NPS ne onwoyo paro ma ne ochiwo ne jotelo mondo oti gi teko mar kwan e kinde mag mor kendo mondo oket motelo weche mag kuwe.
Somali: NPS waxay mar kale tilmaamaysaa in saraakiisha ay adeegsadaan xoog intii lagu jiray mudaaharaadyada iyo inay horay u qorsheeyaan xiriir nabadeed.

English: A national alert was issued over rising insecurity, with assurances that security measures were being strengthened across affected counties.
Kiswahili: Tahadhari ya kitaifa ilitolewa kuhusu ongezeko la ukosefu wa usalama, huku kukiwa na uhakikisho kwamba hatua za usalama zinaimarishwa katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa.
Ekegusii: Ogokurerwa Kenya engima nkwarwetwe igoro yoborendi, na koenekeria abanainchi ng'a oborendi boisaine bwabekirwe chikaonti chionsi.
Dholuo: Ne ogol siem mar piny mangima nikech ne nitie gik ma ne dhi miyo ngima obed matek, kendo ne ginyiso ni ne idhi med timo dongruok e weche mag sirkal.
Somali: Digniinta qaranka ayaa laga soo saaray ammaan la'aanta sii kordheysa, iyadoo la xaqiijiyay in tallaabooyinka amniga la xoojiyay gobollada ay saameyn ku yeelatay.

English: U.S. Embassy renewed its advisory on possible unrest during U.S. primaries and urged heightened vigilance in demonstration-prone areas.
Kiswahili: Ubalozi wa Marekani ulirejesha ushauri wake kuhusu uwezekano wa machafuko wakati wa kura za mchujo za Marekani na kuhimiza umakini mkubwa katika maeneo yenye maandamano.
Ekegusii: Obobalosi bwa America (U.S. Embassy) aiga Kenya naende yarure ogokurerwa igoro yechiburaburu chingaki chiobochori bwa abarai bwebiam aaria America no kobeka obokongori bwa igoro kegima ase akageire koba nechiburaburu.
Dholuo: Ambasada mar Amerka ne ochiwo siem manyien e wi ywaruok manyalo bedoe e kinde mag yiero mag piny Amerka kendo ne ojiwo ni mondo gibed motang' ahinya e alwora ma ji ohero riwo lwedo.
Somali: Safaaradda Maraykanka ayaa dib u habeysay talooyinkeeda ku saabsan rabshadaha suurtagalka ah xilligii madaxweynaha Maraykanka waxayna ku baaqday in si taxadar leh loo ilaaliyo meelaha dibadbaxyada ka dhaca.

English: Authorities issued detailed Cyclone Hidaya safety guidance urging coastal residents to secure property and avoid non-essential travel.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka yalitoa mwongozo wa kina wa usalama wa Kimbunga Hidaya kikiwataka wakazi wa pwani kulinda mali na kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima.
Ekegusii: Abari mbwaretwe oborai boisaine igoro yomorindo okorokwa (Cyclone Hidaya) sna gosaba amenyi bonsi bamenyete ang'e na nyancha barende chinibo chiabo na gokeania chisafari chitari chiengencho.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne ogolo weche matut e wi weche mag ritruok mag kodh yamo mag Hurricane Hidaya ka gikwayo jogweng' manie nam mondo orit mwandugi kendo gitang' gi wuoth maok ochuno.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiintu waxay bixiyeen tilmaamo faahfaahsan oo ku saabsan Hydaya oo u baahan dadka ku nool xeebta inay hanti helaan oo ay ka fogaadaan gaadiidka caadiga ah.

English: Security agencies increased nationwide patrols during the festive season to deter crime and safeguard communities.
Kiswahili: Mashirika ya usalama yaliongeza doria za kitaifa wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu ili kuzuia uhalifu na kulinda jamii.
Ekegusii: Abatenereri boborendi bagesire obomongeri bwabo Kenya engima chingaki chiotimoko nemeyega ao ao gotanga obokebago eri korenda ebinyoro.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne medo timo tij lendo e piny mangima e kinde mag nyasi mondo gimi ji kik tim timbe mahundu kendo girit oganda.
Somali: Hay'adaha amniga ayaa kordhiyay safarada dalka oo dhan xilliyada xafladaha si looga hortago dambiyada loona ilaaliyo bulshada.

English: Interior CS briefed the Senate on national security readiness, highlighting anti-terror efforts and enhanced intelligence coordination.
Kiswahili: Waziri wa Mambo ya Ndani aliifahamisha Seneti kuhusu utayari wa usalama wa taifa, akisisitiza juhudi za kupambana na ugaidi na uratibu ulioimarishwa wa kijasusi.
Ekegusii: Omominisita bwoborendi bwa ime narwete enkwana gochia abagambi beseneti buna beariganirie igoro yoborendi bwense, na kobeka chinguru buna okwearigania kwa beene nabasikari baria batenenerete obokebago bwogoaka chipomu beariganirie goetera okoererania kwobotuki.
Dholuo: CS mar weche mag ot ne olero ne Senate wach mar bedo moikore ne weche mag sirkal, ka onyiso kinda mar kedo gi timbe mahundu kod medo jiwo winjruok e kind weche mag sirkal.
Somali: CS-ga Gudaha wuxuu ku soo koobay Baarlamaanka diyaar garowga amniga qaranka, isagoo xoojinaya dadaallada ka hortagga dowladda iyo kor u qaadista isdhexgalka maskaxda.

English: Government reaffirmed its commitment to combating cattle rustling through intensified patrols in the North Rift.
Kiswahili: Serikali ilithibitisha tena kujitolea kwake kupambana na wizi wa mifugo kupitia doria zilizoimarishwa katika North Rift.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yaenekirie okwerwa kwaye gokora oboibi bwechiombe goetra obomongeria bwaye ase chipara nechinchera ase abaibi bagoetia chiombe chioboibi aaria ensemo ya North Rift.
Dholuo: Sirkal nojiwo kendo chiwruokne mar kedo gi kwalo jamni kokalo kuom rito kuonde ma ji timoe nonro e North Rift.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay dib u xaqiijisay go'aankeeda ka dhanka ah socdaalka lo'da iyada oo loo marayo ciidamo sii kordhaya oo ku sugan Wabiga Waqooyi.

English: Authorities notified the public of an Al-Shabaab attack in Garissa and urged vigilance as additional troops were deployed.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka iliwaarifu umma kuhusu shambulio la Al-Shabaab huko Garissa na kuhimiza kuwa macho huku wanajeshi wengine wakipelekwa.
Ekegusii: Aabarai banyirie abanainchi igoro yobkebago bwogokwa epomu na Al-Shabaab aaria garisa Garissa na gosaba koba maiso buna enchera eyemo gokonya ebikosi bia abasikari biria biatomirwe.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne onyiso ji ni Al-Shabaab ne omonjo Garissa kendo ne gikwayo ji mondo obed motang' nikech ne omed jolweny mamoko.
Somali: Saraakiisha ayaa shacabka ka warbixiyay weerarkii Al-shabaab ay ku qaadeen magaalada Garissa, waxayna ku baaqeen inay ka taxaddaraan ciidamo badan oo la adeegsaday.

English: NPS discredited multiple fake posters circulating online and urged the public to avoid sharing unverified content.
Kiswahili: NPS ilikanusha mabango mengi bandia yanayosambaa mtandaoni na kuwahimiza umma kuepuka kushiriki maudhui ambayo hayajathibitishwa.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS)nkiangete ebinto birikire bia gosiarerwa goetera entaneti buna ebioborimo na gosaba banainchi berende kobisiarera.
Dholuo: NPS ne oketo nying' joma ne ondiko weche mag miriambo e Intanet kendo ne okwayo ji mondo kik gipog weche ma ne ok ong'ere.
Somali: NPS waxay wasakheysay boodhadhyo badan oo been abuur ah oo lagu faafiyay internetka waxayna dadka ku boorrinaysay inay ka fogaadaan soo saarista waxyaabaha aan la aqoonsanayn.

English: APS promptly evacuated a school following a bomb threat and initiated investigations while strengthening safety protocols.
Kiswahili: APS ilihamisha shule mara moja kufuatia tishio la bomu na kuanzisha uchunguzi huku ikiimarisha itifaki za usalama.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) nkinganyetie abanto bwango gotanyorwa korwa esukuru nyuma yogosarera kwamang'ana kwogoakwa epombu na goansa obotuki ekero boigo bagesete oborendi.
Dholuo: APS ne oringo mapiyo skul moro bang' ka ne masira mar mbom moro otimore kendo ne ochako timo nonro ka gijiwo chike mag ritruok.
Somali: Ciidamada APS ayaa isla markiiba u wareejiyay dugsiga ka dib halista qaraxa waxayna bilaabeen baaritaan iyagoo xoojinaya xeerarka amniga.

English: PRWG urged police to prevent masked infiltrators during protests, maintain professional crowd control, and ensure accountability for misconduct.
Kiswahili: PRWG iliwasihi polisi kuzuia wavamizi waliovaa barakoa wakati wa maandamano, kudumisha udhibiti wa kitaalamu wa umati, na kuhakikisha uwajibikaji kwa utovu wa nidhamu.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria getenerete oboonchoreria ase abasikari (PRWG) ngiasororete abasikari gotanga bonsi baria bagwesoi ase okorobererekana koburukania okorobererekana kwomorembe, goikerania amachiko emeremo yabo ekero bakorwa oborendi ase abakorobererekana, na koba ange gotenenera ebokoro biabo.
Dholuo: PRWG ne ojiwo polise mondo ogeng' joma donjo e timbe mag wuondo, kendo mondo gichak rito oganda mar ji, kendo mondo gimi ji duto obed gi ketho kuom timbe maricho.
Somali: Ururka PRWG wuxuu booliiska ku booriyay inay ka hortagaan inay soo galaan mudaaharaadyada, inay xakameynayaan shaqaalaha, iyo inay hubiyaan inay mas'uul ka yihiin dhaqanka xun.

English: Amnesty Kenya reminded officers to respect protest rights, protect medics and journalists, and avoid excessive force.
Kiswahili: Amnesty Kenya iliwakumbusha maafisa kuheshimu haki za maandamano, kuwalinda madaktari na waandishi wa habari, na kuepuka kutumia nguvu kupita kiasi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kia Amnesty aiga Kenya nkiainyoretie abasikari gosika amchiko yokorobererekana, barendi abanyagitari nabariki amang'ana, na korenda gotatumia chinguru chinyinge ekero batenenerete okorobererekana.
Dholuo: Amnesty Kenya noparo ne jotend sirkal ni onego giwinj ratiro mag joma riwo lwedo, girit lakteche kod jotim weche, kendo gitang' gi tiyo gi teko mokalo tong'.
