Somali: Hay'adda Amnesty Kenya waxay xasuusisay saraakiisha dowladda inay ixtiraamaan xuquuqda mudaaharaadyada, inay ilaaliyaan astaamaha iyo saxafiyiinta, iyo inay ka fogaadaan isticmaalka xoogga xad dhaafka ah.

English: IPOA opened a comprehensive investigation into allegations of police misconduct during June protests, including use of live rounds and mass detentions.
Kiswahili: IPOA ilianzisha uchunguzi wa kina kuhusu madai ya utovu wa nidhamu wa polisi wakati wa maandamano ya Juni, ikiwa ni pamoja na matumizi ya risasi za moja kwa moja na kuwekwa kizuizini kwa wingi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) nkiagorete obotuki obonene komanya igoro yokwemuranganania ng'a abasikari mbakorete meremo yabo buya chingaki chiokorobererekana kwomotienyi 6, amo nogotumia chimbunde bobe na kobeka abanto ase egesibo getari kiaboronge.
Dholuo: IPOA ne ochako nonro matut kuom weche ma ne wacho ni polis ne ok tim maber e kinde mar gik ma ne otim e dwe mar Jun, moriwo tiyo gi bunde kod mako ji mang'eny.
Somali: IPOA waxay furtay baaritaan qoto dheer oo ku saabsan eedeymaha dulmiga booliska ee ka dhacay mudaaharaadyadii bishii Juun, oo ay ku jiraan isticmaalka wareegyada nolosha iyo xadhiga dadweynaha.

English: PRWG reaffirmed that peaceful protests must be protected and criticized failures to separate violent actors from lawful demonstrators.
Kiswahili: PRWG ilithibitisha tena kwamba maandamano ya amani lazima yalindwe na kukosolewa kwa kushindwa kuwatenganisha wahusika wa vurugu na waandamanaji halali.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria getenenerete oboonchoria ase emeremo yabasikari (PRWG) nkiaenegetie ng''a okorobererekana kwomorembe goika korendwe naigo goteba ng'a abasikari mbasinyetwe goseberania abarobererekani bari bare notindi erio korwa ribaga ase abaroberekani bekeene.
Dholuo: PRWG ne owacho ni ok onego oket ketho kuom joma ne timo timbe gero kendo ne ok ginyal pogo joma ne timo timbe gero gi joma ne timo gik ma chik oyiego.
Somali: Ururka PRWG wuxuu mar kale caddeeyay in dibadbaxyada nabadeed ay tahay in la ballaariyo oo la dhaleeceeyo guuldarada si loo kala saaro jilayaasha rabshadaha leh iyo dibadbaxayaasha sharciga ah.

English: Human Rights Watch noted lack of prosecutions for 2023 protest-related deaths and urged enforcement of IPOA recommendations.
Kiswahili: Human Rights Watch ilibainisha ukosefu wa mashtaka kwa vifo vinavyohusiana na maandamano ya 2023 na kuhimiza utekelezaji wa mapendekezo ya IPOA.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria kerigeretie oboronge bwekemwanyabanto (Human Rights Watch) nkiaroche ng'a ogotasoera baria bausikanete namakweri yabaria bakwete ekero okorobererekana kwomwaka 2023 na gosaba ng'a amangana yekeombe keria getenerete obokori emeremo na abasikari (IPOA) yatebete akore emeremo.
Dholuo: Human Rights Watch ne owacho ni onge kes ma ne odonjne ne ji ma notho nikech gik ma ne otimore e higa mar 2023, kendo ne okwayo ni mondo otim kaka ne okor.
Somali: Hay'adda Human Rights Watch ayaa sheegtay in aysan jirin wax dacwad ah oo ku saabsan dhimashada 2023 ee ka dhalatay mudaaharaadyada waxayna ku riixday in la hirgeliyo talooyinka IPOA.

English: Investigations revealed police attempts to misreport protest fatalities as accidents, raising concerns over deliberate cover-ups.
Kiswahili: Uchunguzi umebaini kuwa polisi wanajaribu kuripoti vibaya vifo vya waandamanaji kama ajali, na kuzua wasiwasi kuhusu kuficha kwa makusudi.
Ekegusii: Obotuki mbwaorogetie buna abasikari batemete kobisa enamba yabanto baumiete gose gosiria obogima goetera goetera okorobererekana, buna ringana riamakusudi kobisa amang'ana.
Dholuo: Nonro ma ne otim nonyiso ni polise ne temo ketho weche ma ne owacho ni ne gin masiche nikech ne gitimo gik ma ne ok nyis ni ne giparo ni ne gineno ji.
Somali: Baadhitaanku wuxuu tilmaamay in booliska ay isku dayeen inay burburiyaan wararka aan sax ahayn ee ku saabsan dhimashada dadka mudaaharaadka ah inta lagu gudajiray shilalka, taas oo cabsi ka abuurtay warbixinnada cad ee ku saabsan dhacdada.

English: Reports detailed police-ordered lockdowns on Saba Saba Day, including blocked routes, live fire, and escalated confrontations.
Kiswahili: Ripoti zinaelezea kwa kina amri ya polisi ya kufungiwa kwa watu siku ya Saba Saba, ikiwa ni pamoja na njia zilizofungwa, mapigano ya moja kwa moja, na mapigano yaliyoongezeka.
Ekegusii: Chiripoti igoro ya buna abasikari batangete ogotara, gosanga na koererania amangana rituko ria Saba Saba, goetra ogosieka chipara, okorasa chimbunde, na kogesa emeburukano.
Dholuo: Ripot nyiso weche matut kuom twege ma polis nochiko e odiechieng Saba Saba, moriwo yore mag ndara, mach mager, kod lweny ma nomedore.
Somali: Faahfaahin faahfaahsan oo ku saabsan hoos u dhaca xayiraadaha booliska maalinta 7-da, oo ay ku jiraan wadooyinka la xiray, dabka tooska ah, iyo dagaallada sii kordhaya.

English: Opposition leaders demanded the president’s resignation after he appeared to endorse shoot-on-sight rhetoric during protests.
Kiswahili: Viongozi wa upinzani walidai rais ajiuzulu baada ya kuonekana kuunga mkono kauli za watu wanaoonekana wakipigana risasi wakati wa maandamano.
Ekegusii: Abarai bopinsani mbaimokererete igoro koboria omorai bwense erusie emeremo ekero aitabete ng'a abanto bagosangerekana baraswe amagogoro abwo abwo buna enchera yokobeka asikari chinguri chiogogokorera bobe baria bakorobererekana.
Dholuo: Jotelo mag jo akwede ne dwaro ni jatelo owe tich bang' ka ne osenyiso ni oyie gi weche mag goyo mbaka e kinde mar protest.
Somali: Hogaamiyayaasha mucaaradka ayaa dalbaday in madaxweynaha uu iscasilaado kadib markii la ogaaday inuu taageero u qabo sheegashada toogashada intii lagu jiray mudaaharaadyada.

English: Reuters reported the arrest of activist Mwangi over alleged possession of tear gas and ammunition during protests, widely condemned as political intimidation.
Kiswahili: Reuters iliripoti kukamatwa kwa mwanaharakati Mwangi kwa madai ya kumiliki gesi ya machozi na risasi wakati wa maandamano, ambayo yamelaaniwa sana kama vitisho vya kisiasa.
Ekegusii: Abamanyi amangana ba Reuters mbamanyetie ense igoro yomoegereri Mwangi ase okomebekerera ng'a nabwate ebinto biria bikoraswa korwa erioki amo nechimbunde chingaki chikoroberekana, na kwanga okogoserigwa konga buna okwo kwegesiasa kwoboi abakoroberekana.
Dholuo: Reuters ne owacho ni jarit Mwangi ne omak nikech ne okaw gas ma pi wang' piyo kod bunde e kinde mar piem, ma ji mang'eny ne okwedo kaka tim mar miyo ji luoro.
Somali: Wakaaladda wararka ee Reuters ayaa soo sheegtay in dhaqdhaqaaqa Muangi la xiray iyadoo lagu eedeeyay in uu haystay qaraxyo indho la'aan ah iyo rasaas intii lagu jiray mudaaharaadyada, kuwaas oo si weyn loogu eedeeyay inay yihiin hanjabaad siyaasadeed.

English: The Guardian covered the arrest of a constable linked to a political blogger’s death in custody, seen as a rare step toward accountability.
Kiswahili: Gazeti la Guardian liliripoti kukamatwa kwa polisi aliyehusishwa na kifo cha mwanablogu wa kisiasa akiwa kizuizini, jambo linaloonekana kama hatua adimu kuelekea uwajibikaji.
Ekegusii: Abariki amang'ana ba The Guardian mbarigete igoro yokobwatwa kwomosikari oyio otumegete gesiasa na komobwata kwomoriki amangana bwetenenerete oyio okerete eseri ya polisi buna enchera eyemo ekworokia buna abasikari babweneret goajibika.
Dholuo: Gaset mar Guardian ne olero ni polis moro ma ne oneko e jela osemaki, kendo mano ne en okang' maber ahinya mar nyiso ratiro jomotue
Somali: Wargeyska Guardian ayaa ka hadlay qabashada sarkaalka booliska ee ku lug leh dhimashada blogger siyaasadeed ee Celas ee xabsiga, taas oo u muuqata inay tahay tallaabo aan caadi aheyn oo loo qaaday mas'uuliyadda.

English: AP News reported police use of tear gas on activists protesting a custodial death, reigniting public demands for justice and transparency.
Kiswahili: AP News iliripoti matumizi ya polisi ya gesi ya kutoa machozi kwa wanaharakati wanaopinga kifo cha kufungwa jela, na kufufua madai ya umma ya haki na uwazi.
Ekegusii: Amang'ana amayia yabasikari boborai (AP) namanyetie buna abasikari barasete ebinto biraia bigokrwa erioki ase gochia ase abaegereri baria bare koroberekana ogori yomoegereri gokwera eseri ya porisi, na gosegeta abanainchi godai ekeene na obomaiso marore ase ayio.
Dholuo: AP News ne owacho ni polis notiyo gi gas ma pi wang' piyo e kedo ne joma ne kedo ne tho ma ne otim e jela, kendo mano nomiyo ji odwaro ni mondo gibed gi bura makare kendo gibed gi ng'eyo makare.
Somali: Warbaahinta AP News ayaa sheegtay in booliisku ay qaraxyo indho la'aan ah u adeegsadeen dhaqdhaqaaqayaasha ka soo horjeeda dilka sharciga ah, iyagoo fulinaya shuruudaha dadweynaha ee caddaaladda iyo caddaaladda.

English: Reuters confirmed the arrest of Constable Mukhwana over the death of blogger Albert Ojwang, marking a rare formal charge amid unrest.
Kiswahili: Reuters ilithibitisha kukamatwa kwa Konstebo Mukhwana kutokana na kifo cha mwanablogu Albert Ojwang, na kuashiria shtaka rasmi ambalo ni nadra kutokea wakati wa machafuko.
Ekegusii: Abarimi amang'ana ba Reuters mbaenegetie okobwatwa kwomosikari Mukhwana igoro yamakweri yomoriki amangana bwogwetenenera Albert Ojwang, eke nigo kiabete egento getanyagokoreka rinde, na konyorwa nare nekina giokoiraneria nonya chuburaburu chiareo.
Dholuo: Reuters osenyiso ni polis mukhwana osemak nikech tho mar blogger Albert Ojwang, ma en ketho mapile e bwo tungni.
Somali: Wakaaladda wararka ee Reuters ayaa xaqiijisay in Constable Mukhwana la xiray dhimashada bloggerka Albert Ojwang, taasoo calaamad u ah eedeymo rasmi ah oo aan caadi ahayn oo ku saabsan rabshadaha.

English: The Guardian reported Constable James Mukhwana as the first officer arraigned over the custodial death case, signaling increased scrutiny of police conduct.
Kiswahili: Gazeti la The Guardian liliripoti kwamba Konstebo James Mukhwana ndiye afisa wa kwanza kushtakiwa kuhusu kesi ya kifo cha kifungo cha gerezani, jambo lililoashiria uchunguzi zaidi wa mwenendo wa polisi.
Ekegusii: Abariki amang'ana ba The Guardian mbamanyetie nga omosikari James Mukhwana buna omosikari omotangani gosoerwa igoro yomonto gokwera maboko aye ekero are eseri ya porisi, egekoro gekworokia ng'a abasikari mbarigereirie buna bagokora emeremo yabo.
Dholuo: Gaset mar The Guardian ne onyiso ni polis James Mukhwana e ma ne okwongo tero e kot nikech wach tho ma ne otimore e jela, kendo mano nyiso ni polis medo nono ahinya timbe mag polis.
Somali: Wargeyska The Guardian ayaa sheegay in Constable James Mukhwana markii sarkaalkii ugu horreeyay uu ku dhawaaqay dacwada dhimashada ilmaha, taas oo muujineysa in booliska ay baaritaan dheeraad ah sameeyeen.

English: Missing Voices documented a sharp rise in enforced disappearances and killings linked to protests, urging justice for families of missing victims.
Kiswahili: Missing Voices ilirekodi ongezeko kubwa la kutoweka kwa watu na mauaji yaliyohusishwa na maandamano, ikihimiza haki kwa familia za waathiriwa waliopotea.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kia Missing Voices mbarigete igoro yokomenteka kwabanto gosira gose gokenganigwa, and goitwa ase engencho yokorobererekana kwanga oborai obobe, na gosaba ng'a ekeeneo gekoreke ase abanto bakenganirie gose kobiswa ase engencho yokorobererekana.
Dholuo: Missing Voices ne onyiso ni kwan mar joma ne onegi gi thuologi duto kod joma ne onegi ne medore ahinya nikech ne gineno ni onge gima ne dhi timore ne joodgi ma ne olal.
Somali: Codadka la waayay waxay muujinayeen koror aad u weyn oo ku yimid khasaaraha iyo dilka ka dhashay banaanbaxyada, iyagoo codsaday caddaalad qoysaska dhibanayaasha la waayay.

English: AP News covered Mwangi’s release on bail and rights groups’ criticism of terrorism charge misuse during protests.
Kiswahili: AP News iliripoti kuhusu kuachiliwa kwa Mwangi kwa dhamana na ukosoaji wa makundi ya haki za binadamu kuhusu matumizi mabaya ya shtaka la ugaidi wakati wa maandamano.
Ekegusii: Managana amayia yabasikari boborai (AP) nyarigete igoo yokobwatokwa kwa Mwangi ase ogotenenerwa nebiombe biokoegerera ebio biangete okobekererwa kwobosaria bwobokegago bwokoruta chipomu ekero bakorobererekana.
Dholuo: AP News ne olero kaka ne ogonyo Mwangi e jela nikech ne ogolo bail kod kaka riwruoge ma kedo ne ratiro mag ji ne kwedo weche mag tiyo marach gi weche mag mahundu e kinde mag protest.
Somali: Warbaahinta AP News waxay ku dartay dadka reer Havana in ay qandaraas la galaan kooxaha xaq u lahaanshaha ee lagu dhaleeceeyay falal argagixiso ah intii lagu jiray mudaaharaadyada.

English: Local media reported calls for prosecution of officers accused of excessive force during Gen Z protests, urging IPOA and ODPP action.
Kiswahili: Vyombo vya habari vya ndani viliripoti wito wa kushtakiwa kwa maafisa walioshutumiwa kwa kutumia nguvu kupita kiasi wakati wa maandamano ya Gen Z, wakihimiza hatua za IPOA na ODPP.
Ekegusii: Chisiteseni chai aiga inka chiokomnyia amang'ana nchiatebete konyora chisimi chikogosereri kobabwata na kopbasoera ase ogotangasa abasikari baria basoeretwe gotumia chinguru goetania ekero giokorobererekana chingaki chia Gen Z, na bakarigia ogokonya korwa IPOA na ODPP.
Dholuo: Oganda mar Jo-Kenya ne oketo chenro mar keto ketho kuom jotelo ma ne odonjne ni ne otiyo gi teko mokalo tong' e kinde mar ng'ur mar Gen Z, kendo ne gikwayo mondo otim gima biro miyo otim kamano.
Somali: Warbaahinta maxalliga ah ayaa sheegtay inay doonayaan inay dacweeyaan saraakiisha booliska ee lagu eedeeyay inay adeegsadeen xoog xoog badan intii lagu jiray banaanbaxyada Gen Z, iyagoo ku booriyay IPOA iyo ODP inay talaabo qaadaan.

English: An academic analysis linked protest-related abuses to systemic police impunity rooted in historical failures of accountability.
Kiswahili: Uchambuzi wa kitaaluma ulihusisha unyanyasaji unaohusiana na maandamano na kutokujali kwa polisi kwa utaratibu uliotokana na kushindwa kwa uwajibikaji wa kihistoria.
Ekegusii: Amasomo yokongori igoro yabasikari kobuna amahiko ekero giokorobererekana kobwataine nagotakorerwa ekero kwamochire ase obokoreri bwabasikari bwairire emeri ase eiaka emenge yogotakorerwa kende ekero bamochire.
Dholuo: Nonro moro mar josomo ne oketo tudruok e kind timbe maricho ma ne timore e kind joma ne kedo gi sirkal kod timbe maok kare ma ne timorega e kind polise nikech ne ok ginyal chiwo dwoko.
Somali: Falanqaynta aqoonyahanku waxay isku dartay falalka diidmada ah ee ka dhanka ah booliska nidaamka sharciga oo aan la ciqaabin xadgudubyada taariikhiga ah ee mas'uuliyadda.

English: A quantitative summary outlined protest timelines, injuries, deaths, arrests, and legislative outcomes to contextualize state response.
Kiswahili: Muhtasari wa kiasi ulielezea ratiba za maandamano, majeraha, vifo, kukamatwa, na matokeo ya kisheria ili kuainisha muktadha wa mwitikio wa serikali.
Ekegusii: Amangana amanene arikire ase obwenge naorogetie chinsa, buna abanto baumiete, abkwete, ababwatetwe, na ekere kiabete kworokereria buna eserikari egokora emeremo yaye.
Dholuo: Weche ma ne otigo e nyiso kaka ne idhi tim kampen, kaka ne idhi hiny ji, tho, twech, kod weche mamoko ma ne dhi timore e bwo chik mondo omi sirkal ong'e gima ne dhi timore.
Somali: Muuqaal kooban oo ku saabsan jawaab celinta mucaaradka, dhaawacyada, dhimashada, xadhiga iyo cawaaqibka sharciga ah ee ka dhashay falcelinta dowladda.

English: An encyclopedic overview documented causes, fatalities, economic triggers, and arrest numbers from the 2025 protests.
Kiswahili: Muhtasari wa ensaiklopidia uliandika sababu, vifo, vichocheo vya kiuchumi, na idadi ya kukamatwa kutokana na maandamano ya 2025.
Ekegusii: Amangana ase oboamo arigetwe naorogetie ekiaretete, omkoumia kwabanto, okomigwa kiuchumi kebogoko buna egesegeto, na enamba ya baria babwatetwe ekero giokoroberereka kwa 2025.
Dholuo: Buk moro mar encyclopedic ne oting'o weche manyiso gimomiyo ji notho, gik ma ne miyo ji tho, koda kwan mag joma ne omak e higa mar 2025.
Somali: Sababtoo ah dhacdooyinka la xaqiijiyay, dhimashada, sababaha dhaqaale, iyo dadka la xiray ee ka soo jeeda banaanbaxyada 2025.

English: Missing Voices published a registry of killings and disappearances among youth during Gen Z protests, calling for formal investigations.
Kiswahili: Missing Voices ilichapisha sajili ya mauaji na kutoweka kwa vijana wakati wa maandamano ya Gen Z, ikitaka uchunguzi rasmi ufanyike.
Ekegusii: Abariki amang'ana ba Missing Voices mbarigete buna abasae bare goitwa, gokenganigwa gose kobiswa ekero giokorobererekana kwa Gen Z, na koboria ng'a obotuki bwakeene bokorwe.
Dholuo: Missing Voices ne ogolo buk manyiso kaka ne oneg rowere kod kaka ne githung' e kind rowere e kinde mag ng'ur mar Gen Z, kendo ne okwayo mondo otim nonro.
Somali: Codadka lumay waxay daabaceen liiska dilka iyo la'aanta dhalinyarada ka dhacay mudaaharaadyada Gen Z, waxayna dalbadeen baaritaan rasmi ah.

English: A civic observance commemorated Saba Saba protest victims, spotlighting grievances over unresolved police brutality cases.
Kiswahili: Maadhimisho ya kiraia yaliwakumbuka waathiriwa wa maandamano ya Saba Saba, yakiangazia malalamiko kuhusu kesi za ukatili wa polisi ambazo hazijatatuliwa.
Ekegusii: Rituko riokoinyoro ogokwa kwa baria bare korobererekana ria Saba Saba, mabaorogotie ogotaisaneka igoro yobororo bwamanag'ana atarakwanerwa neserikari igoro buna abasikari batari gokora emeremo yabo koreng'ana namachiko ase abakorobererekana.
Dholuo: Rapar moro mar oganda ne oparo joma ne otho nikech akwede ma ne otimore Saba Saba, kendo ne oketo e paro gik ma ne timore nikech timbe mahundu ma ne otim ne polise.
Somali: Xaflad rayid ah ayaa lagu xusay dhibanayaasha banaanbaxyada ka dhacay Saba, iyadoo lagu muujiyey cabashooyinka ku saabsan kiisaska rabshadaha booliska ee aan la xallin.

English: AP featured families of protest victims expressing grief, frustration with impunity, and demands for justice and oversight reforms.
Kiswahili: AP iliangazia familia za waathiriwa wa maandamano zikielezea huzuni, kukatishwa tamaa na kutokujali, na madai ya haki na mageuzi ya usimamizi.
Ekegusii: Abasikari boborai (AP)mbaorogetie buna chifamiri chia baria barenge ase emechando yogosiria abamwabo, na buna abasikari bakobuna amachiko batari okorerwa kende, na gosaba nga ekeene gekoreke na ogoonchoreria kwa amachiko arengete obokoreri bwa abasikari.
Dholuo: AP ne onyiso kaka jood joma ne oketho e lwenyno ne nyiso kuyo, chunygi ne onyosore nikech ne ok giyud kum, kendo ne gidwaro ni otim lokruok e yo makare.
Somali: Warbaahinta AP waxay liis gareysay qoysaska dhibanayaasha banaanbaxyada iyagoo muujinaya murugo, niyad jab aan la ciqaabin, iyo sheegashada caddaaladda iyo isbeddelka maamulka.

English: BBC aired evidence of coordinated brutality during Gen Z protests, identifying officers and urging prosecution of responsible commanders.
Kiswahili: BBC ilirusha ushahidi wa ukatili ulioratibiwa wakati wa maandamano ya Gen Z, ikitambua maafisa na kuhimiza kushtakiwa kwa makamanda waliohusika.
Ekegusii: Abamanyi amang'ana ba BBC mbagegete ase embeo obosaiti buna abasikari bare korasa abanto, gotumi chinguru goetania ekero giokorobererekana kwa abasae Gen Z, goteba abasikari bare gokora ayio na gosaba ng'a abanene ba abasikari baria bare korwa amachiko ng'a barase abanto basoerwe.
Dholuo: BBC ne olando gik manyiso ni ne nitie timbe mahundu ma ne itimo e kind ji mopogore opogore e kinde mar ng'ur mar Gen Z, kendo ne onyiso ni ne oketne askeche kod jotelo ma ne nigi ratiro mar timo kamano.
Somali: BBC-da ayaa soo bandhigtay caddeyn ku saabsan rabshadaha lagu qorsheeyay mudaaharaadyada Gen Z, waxayna shaacisay saraakiisha waxayna ku booriyeen in la dacweeyo saraakiisha masuulka ah.

English: United Nations urged Kenya to respect human rights during protests and called for independent investigations into killings and disappearances.
Kiswahili: Umoja wa Mataifa uliitaka Kenya kuheshimu haki za binadamu wakati wa maandamano na kutoa wito wa kufanyika kwa uchunguzi huru kuhusu mauaji na kupotea kwa watu.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwense (UN) mbwasabete Kenya gosika oboronge bwamwanyanto chingaki chiokorobererekana naboigo kobori ng'a obotuki bwetenererete bokorwe igoro yogoitwa kwabanto na gosira kwa abanto batamanyiri ase bare.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar Pinje ne ojiwo Kenya mondo omi ratiro mag dhano luor e kinde mag piem kendo ne okwayo mondo otim nonro maok mar sirkal e wi nek kod lal mar ji.
Somali: Qaramada Midoobay waxay Kenya ugu baaqday inay ixtiraamto xuquuqda aadanaha intii lagu jiray mudaaharaadyada waxayna ku baaqday baaritaan madax banaan oo ku saabsan dilka iyo la'aanta.

English: U.S. Embassy warned citizens of risks during ongoing protests, advising avoidance of demonstration areas due to potential violence.
Kiswahili: Ubalozi wa Marekani uliwaonya raia kuhusu hatari wakati wa maandamano yanayoendelea, ukishauri kuepuka maeneo ya maandamano kutokana na uwezekano wa vurugu.
Ekegusii: Obobarosi bwa america aiga Kenya (U.S. Embassy) mbakurerete abakenya kwerenda chingaki okorobererekana kwagendererete, na korwa ogosemia abanto gotaika ang'e ase okorobererekana kore ase obwoba bwobotindi boreo.
Dholuo: Amerka ne osiemo raia kuom gik manyalo hinyo ji e kinde mag piem, kendo ne okonyogi mondo kik gichak dhi e kuonde ma ji timoe nonro nikech timbe gero.
Somali: Safaaradda Maraykanka waxay muwaadiniinta uga digtay khataraha ka jira mudaaharaadyada socda, iyagoo ku talinaya inay ka fogaadaan meelaha mudaaharaadyada ka dhaca sababtoo ah waxaa dhici kara rabshado.

English: Media oversight body condemned arrests and assaults on journalists covering protests, calling for an independent inquiry into press violations.
Kiswahili: Shirika la usimamizi wa vyombo vya habari lililaani kukamatwa na kushambuliwa kwa waandishi wa habari wanaoripoti maandamano, likitaka uchunguzi huru kuhusu ukiukwaji wa vyombo vya habari.
Ekegusii: Abariki amang'ana ba Media oversight body mbatebete koba bobe okobwatwa na ogoakwa kwabariki amang'ana bare korika na kobwata buna okorobererekana kware gokorwa, na koboria nga obokongori bwabeene bokorwe komnya ninki kiagerete abariki amanga bare gosaganerwa.
Dholuo: Bura mar Jarito mar Jotim Dhano ne okwedo twege kod timbe mag gero jotim weche ma ne nyiso ni ne gitimo gik ma ne nyiso ni ne gikwedo riwruok mar oganda Nyasaye, kendo ne okwayo mondo otim nonro ma onge mibadhi kuom weche ma ne giwacho.
Somali: Guddiga kormeerka warbaahinta ayaa ku eedeeyay in la qabtay iyo in la weeraray saxafiyiinta ka warbixinaya mudaaharaadyada, iyagoo dalbaday baaritaan madax banaan oo ku saabsan xadgudubyada sharciyada warbaahinta.

English: Katiba Institute reported constitutional rights violations during protests and urged judicial safeguards and rights-based policing.
Kiswahili: Taasisi ya Katiba iliripoti ukiukwaji wa haki za kikatiba wakati wa maandamano na kuhimiza ulinzi wa mahakama na polisi inayozingatia haki.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe gia Katiba Institute nkiamanyetie buna okobunwa kwa amachiko nabasikari kware gokorwa kwegosa gotaiyo chingaki chiokorobererekana na gosaba bororo ng'a amachiko atumeke korenda abakorobererekana buna oboronge bwabo.
Dholuo: Katiba Institute ne owacho ni kare ne nitie ketho mag chike mag piny e kinde mar piem kendo ne okwayo ni sirkal otim chenro mar rito chike mag sirkal kod chike mag sirkal.
Somali: Hay'adda Dastuurka ayaa ka warbixisay xadgudubyada xuquuqda dastuurka intii lagu jiray mudaaharaadyada waxayna ku boorisay ilaalinta maxkamadaha iyo maamulka xuquuqda aadanaha.

English: JLTM NGO documented over 500 protest-related arrests, urging release of minors and access to legal representation.
Kiswahili: Shirika lisilo la kiserikali la JLTM lilirekodi zaidi ya watu 500 waliokamatwa kuhusiana na maandamano, likihimiza kuachiliwa kwa watoto na kupata uwakilishi wa kisheria.
Ekegusii: JLTM NGO mbarigete goetania abanto500 abarobererekani babwatetwe, na kobori ng'a babwatokwe ara rimo na mono abana abake na baegwe oborongo bwokoegererwa kemachiko.
Dholuo: JLTM NGO ne ondiko weche mokalo 500 motudore gi makruok gi ji, ka gikwayo ni ogony nyithindo matindo kendo mondo giyud thuolo mar bedo e bwo chik.
Somali: Hay'adda JLTM NGO waxay xasuusisay in ka badan 500 oo mudaaharaadayaal ah la xiray, waxayna ku baaqday in carruurta yaryar la sii daayo iyo in la helo wakiil sharci.

English: Kenya Red Cross provided data on protest-related injuries and EMS response, urging improved pre-positioning of medical resources.
Kiswahili: Msalaba Mwekundu wa Kenya ulitoa data kuhusu majeraha yanayohusiana na maandamano na mwitikio wa EMS, ukihimiza uboreshaji wa upangaji wa awali wa rasilimali za matibabu.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kiomoslaba omobaririri nkiarwete enamba ya baria baumiete ekero giokorobererekana na buna abanyagitari bemebasekano gokonya (EMS), na gosaba ng'a okobwekwa kwebinto biobonyagitari chinsemo chionsi chiokorobererekana bibeo.
Dholuo: Kenya Red Cross ne ochiwo weche e wi hinyruok ma ne otimore nikech akwede kod kaka ne itimo ne thieth mar thieth, kendo ne okwayo ni mondo thieth obed maber.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay warbixin ku saabsan dhaawacyada la xiriira banaanbaxyada iyo falcelinta EMS, iyagoo ku baaqay in la hagaajiyo soo bandhigida qalabka caafimaadka.

English: Law Society demanded accountability for commanders behind protest suppression tactics, calling for prosecutions including chain-of-command responsibility.
Kiswahili: Chama cha Wanasheria kilidai uwajibikaji kwa makamanda waliohusika na mbinu za kukandamiza maandamano, wakitaka mashtaka yafunguliwe ikiwemo jukumu la mnyororo wa amri.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kia amachiko (Law Society) nkiaboretie ng'a abanene babasikari baria bare korwa amachiko chingaki chiokorobererekana babogorerigwe ebitambokero, na gosaba ng'a abanene babasikari amo na baria baete richiko kobuna amachiko basoerwe.
Dholuo: Law Society ne dwaro ni jotend lweny obed gi ratiro mar tieko akwede, kendo ne gidwaro ni otergi e bura moriwo nyaka joma nigi ratiro mar chiko lweny.
Somali: Hay'adda Sharciga waxay sheegtay in ciidanka amniga ay ka dambeeyeen tallaabooyinka cadaadisku, waxayna soo saartay dacwad, oo ay ku jiraan waajibaadka amarka silsiladda.

English: A youth movement organized a peaceful march demanding justice for protest victims and reforms to use-of-force protocols.
Kiswahili: Harakati ya vijana iliandaa maandamano ya amani wakidai haki kwa waathiriwa wa maandamano na mageuzi ya itifaki za matumizi ya nguvu.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwa'basae mwatwarete okorobererekana kwomorembe omotienyi 3 koboria ekeene igoro ya baria baumisetwe nabasikari amo nogoonchoreria kwamachiko igoro yekerengo giechinguru abasikari babwenerete gotumia.
Dholuo: Riwruok moro mar rowere nochano mar dhi e wuodhe mar lamo ka gidwaro ni otim ne joma ne oketho chik bura bura bura makare kendo mondo otim lokruok e chike ma ne oketo mar tiyo gi teko.
Somali: Dhaqdhaqaaqyada dhalinyarada waxay diyaariyeen banaanbaxyo nabadeed si ay u codsadaan caddaaladda dhibanayaasha banaanbaxyada iyo wax ka beddelka xeerarka aasaasiga ah.

English: Young influencers produced real-time video series documenting protest injuries and brutality to raise awareness and counter state narratives.
Kiswahili: Vijana wenye ushawishi walitengeneza mfululizo wa video wa muda halisi unaoonyesha majeraha na ukatili wa maandamano ili kuongeza uelewa na masimulizi ya kukabiliana na serikali.
Ekegusii: Abasae abasegeti amaonchorerio mbarosetie esinema yechingaki chiokorobererekana na kworokia buna abarobererekani baumiete, na buna abasikari bare gotumia richiko goetania erio komanyia abanto buna enchera eyemo yokworokereria buna eserikari egotumia amachiko bobe.
Dholuo: Rowere ma ne nigi teko mar chiko ji ne oloso vidio ma nyiso kaka ne giyudo hinyruok e kind joma ne kedo gi sirkal kod timbe gero ma ne gitimo mondo ji ong'e kendo gitim gik ma ne timore e kind sirkal.
Somali: Dhallinyarada isticmaala fiidiyowyada internetka waxay muujiyeen dhaawacyada banaanbaxyada iyo rabshadaha si loo kordhiyo fahamka iyo sharaxaadda dowladda.

English: Civil society coalitions opened legal clinics offering free representation to families of protest casualties and detainees.
Kiswahili: Miungano ya asasi za kiraia ilifungua kliniki za kisheria zinazotoa uwakilishi huru kwa familia za waliouawa na wafungwa wa maandamano.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwa (Civil society Coalitions) mbaigorete ebituo bikorwa obokonyi bwakemachiko bosa goetera kobatenere abarobererekani kotini buna abanogeri babo rase abamwabo baria basiretie abamwabo gose koumia na baria babegetwe echera gotaiwa kotini.
Dholuo: Riwruok mag riwruoge mag oganda dhano osechako loso ute mag joma oyie mondo obed gi thuolo mar wuoyo gi jood joma ne otho e lweny kod joma ne omak.
Somali: Ururka bulshada rayidka ah ayaa furay xarumo caafimaad oo sharci ah oo si xor ah u wakiil u ah qoysaska dhibanayaasha mudaaharaadyada iyo maxaabiista.

English: Civil society organized silent vigils in Nairobi to honor protest victims and call for justice across diverse communities.
Kiswahili: Asasi za kiraia ziliandaa mikesha ya kimya kimya jijini Nairobi ili kuwaenzi waathiriwa wa maandamano na kutaka haki itendeke katika jamii mbalimbali.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio bwobomo bwebiombe bitari bieserikari okaroberia ogekengano aaria Nairobi koinyora baria baria bakwete na gokorerwa bobe na koboria ng'a ekeene ase abarobererekani gokoreke ase abanto bonsi Kenya engima.
Dholuo: Jo-dhano ne ochano mondo otim nyasi mar rito ji e Nairobi mondo gipakgo joma ne oketho nikech gik ma ne gitimo kendo ne gikwayo ni mondo ji otimnegi makare e kindgi giwegi.
Somali: Bulshada rayidka ah waxay magaalada Nairobi ku qabanqaabisay cibaadooyin aamusnaan ah si ay u ixtiraamaan dhibanayaasha mudaaharaadyada iyo inay codsadaan caddaaladda bulshada.

English: A civic-tech initiative published live maps of protest zones, police deployments, and safe routes to enhance demonstrator safety.
Kiswahili: Mpango wa teknolojia ya kiraia ulichapisha ramani za moja kwa moja za maeneo ya maandamano, kupelekwa kwa polisi, na njia salama ili kuimarisha usalama wa waandamanaji.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio bwogotumia eintaneti oansirwe okworokia aase okorobererekana kware gokoreka Kenya engima, buna abasikari batometwe, nechinchera chiokominchoreria ase ogokonya abarobererekani.
Dholuo: Chenro moro mar teknoloji mar oganda ne ogolo map mag kuonde ma ji ne dhi timoe kampen, kuonde ma polise ne dhi tiyogo, kod yore ma ne gidhi luwo mondo ji obed gi ritruok.
Somali: Mashruuca tikniyoolajiyadda dadweynaha wuxuu daabacay khariidadaha meelaha banaanbaxyada, ciidamada booliska, iyo hababka ammaanka loo kordhin karo.

English: An exhibition showcased photographic evidence of protest brutality and mass gatherings, documenting state response to civic unrest.
Kiswahili: Maonyesho yalionyesha ushahidi wa picha za ukatili wa maandamano na mikusanyiko ya watu wengi, yakionyesha jinsi serikali ilivyojibu machafuko ya raia.
Ekegusii: Chipicha chianantetigwe kera aase nchiaenegetie buna abasikari bare gotumia chinguru goetania ase bria bare korobererekana na baria bare konyorwa amo ase obonge, nchiarogetie buna eserikari yaineretie igoro yokogechigwa kwa abainainchi ase obogambi obobe.
Dholuo: E chokruok moro ma ne otim, ne onyis gik manyiso kaka ji ne timo gik maricho e kinde mag protest kod chokruok ma ji ne timo, kendo mano ne nyiso kaka sirkal ne timo gik maricho e kindego.
Somali: Bandhigyadu waxay muujiyaan muuqaal muuqaal ah oo muujinaya rabshadaha mudaaharaadyada iyo shirarka waaweyn, iyagoo muujinaya sida ay dawladdu uga jawaabto rabshadaha bulshada.

English: A rights group compiled a verified injury registry with photos and medical data to support accountability and prosecution efforts.
Kiswahili: Kundi la haki za binadamu liliandaa sajili ya majeraha iliyothibitishwa yenye picha na data ya kimatibabu ili kusaidia juhudi za uwajibikaji na mashtaka.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kioboronge nkiabegete amo eripoti engikeranu igoro ya baria baumiete amo nechibicha neripoti ya nyagitari yabwate amarieta baria baumiete gosira emeroberio yokobabogoreria egatambokero na kobasoera.
Dholuo: Grup moro mar kedo gi ratiro mag dhano nochano mondo okony joma ne oyudo hinyruok e yo ma kamano, kendo ne ochano mondo okonygi e keto kethogi e bura.
Somali: Kooxda xuquuqda u dooda waxay soo ururiyeen liis la xaqiijiyay oo ku saabsan dhaawacyada iyadoo la adeegsanayo sawirada iyo tirakoobka caafimaadka si ay u taageeraan bixinta shaqada iyo ciidamada.

English: Workshops trained young journalists in ethical verification, safe documentation, and protective practices during protest reporting.
Kiswahili: Warsha ziliwafunza waandishi wa habari wachanga katika uthibitishaji wa maadili, uwekaji wa nyaraka salama, na mbinu za ulinzi wakati wa kuripoti maandamano.
Ekegusii: Abariki amangana mbasometigigwe buna bakomanya oboikeranu bwamangana, korenda obobisi bwa baria bonsi bausikanete, na buna bakwerenda chingaki bare ase emeremo yabo yokorika amangana ekero giokorobererekana.
Dholuo: Tiegruok ma ne otim ne otiego jonenogo e weche mag chike, weche ma ok onego obed ni okethore, koda yore ma ginyalo ritogo ji sama gikelo ripot mag akwede.
Somali: Farsamooyin shaqo oo u tababbaray weriyayaasha dhalinyarada ah inay sameeyaan baaritaano ku saabsan anshaxa, dukumiintiyada ammaanka ah, iyo habdhaqanka ilaalinta marka la soo sheegayo mudaaharaadyada.

English: Community leaders in Garissa received training on early radicalization indicators and reporting procedures under PCVE programs.
Kiswahili: Viongozi wa jamii huko Garissa walipokea mafunzo kuhusu viashiria vya mapema vya uasi na taratibu za kuripoti chini ya programu za PCVE.
Ekegusii: Abarai bebinyoro aaria Garissa mbanyorete amasomo agenkio buna baranyare korora na komanya ebokoro biogosarigwa ebirengererio na engencho yokomanyia abasikari inse yemeroberio yobokoreri bori botenererete gotanga and korwania okwegena gose ebikoro biomonto gose abanto kwegena gotumia obosareku goikera amaganio abo (PCVE).
Dholuo: Jotelo mag oganda Jo-Katholik ne oyudo tiegruok e wi ranyisi mag radikalization kod yore mag chiwo ripot e bwo program mag PCVE.
Somali: Hogaamiyayaasha bulshada ee Garissa waxay ka heleen tababar ku saabsan calaamadaha hore ee isbeddelka siyaasadeed iyo warbixinta nidaamka barnaamijyada PCVE.

English: An MoU was signed to integrate gender equality into national PCVE structures and empower women in terrorism-prevention roles.
Kiswahili: MoU ilisainiwa ili kuunganisha usawa wa kijinsia katika miundo ya kitaifa ya PCVE na kuwawezesha wanawake katika majukumu ya kuzuia ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Okoigwanana nkwabegetwe egechara kobwatana amo oboreng'ananu bwabanto gochia ase omoroberio bweserikari bwogotanga na korwania obokegab bwogogosria ebirengererio (PCVE) gosomia na na kobaa ebire bineirie erio babe abakoreri bengencho gotanga komanya na gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu.
Dholuo: Ne oket sei e winjruok mar timo winjruok e kind chwo gi mon e bwo chenro mag piny mangima mar PCVE kendo miyo mon teko mar loyo timbe mahundu.
Somali: Heshiiska ayaa la saxiixay si loo mideeyo sinnaanta jinsiga ee xarumaha Qaranka ee PCVE loona dhigo haweenka kuwo awood u leh inay ka hortagaan argagixisada.

English: KDF and NCTC held a community engagement initiative in Lamu to build resilience against extremism and inter-communal tension.
Kiswahili: KDF na NCTC waliandaa mpango wa ushirikishwaji wa jamii huko Lamu ili kujenga ustahimilivu dhidi ya itikadi kali na mvutano kati ya jamii.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kioborendi bwa Kenya (KDF) na Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC)mbabete nomoroberio nokoumerana nebionyoro aaria Lamu erio gikinana nogosarigwa ebirengererio na neminano yebinyoro.
Dholuo: KDF kod NCTC ne otimo chenro mar konyo oganda e Lamu mondo gibed gi teko mar kedo gi timbe mahundu kod ywaruok e kind oganda.
Somali: KDF iyo NCTC waxay sameeyeen barnaamij shukaansi bulsho oo ku yaal Lamu si ay u abuuraan xaalad adag oo ka hortagga xiisadda iyo isgaarsiinta.

English: Government sought public input on leveraging AI and technology to detect and prevent self-radicalization trends.
Kiswahili: Serikali ilitafuta maoni ya umma kuhusu kutumia akili bandia na teknolojia ili kugundua na kuzuia mitindo ya kujifanya kuwa na msimamo mkali.
Ekegusii: Eserikari nyarigetie ebirengererio korua isiko buna eranyare koreng'anania chisemi chia pandia (AI) na tekinorochia erio komanya na gotanga chinchera abasae bagwesaria ebirengererio barabwo abanyene goetera eintaneti.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne dwaro ni ji ochiw pachgi kuom tiyo gi teko mar timo nonro kod teknoloji mondo gine kendo geng'e timbe mag wuondo ji.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay raadineysay aragtida dadweynaha ee ku saabsan sida loo shaqeeyo qalabka AI iyo tikniyoolajiyadda si loo ogaado loona hortago dabeecadaha is-dhexgalka.

English: Government sought public input on using artificial intelligence and new technologies to strengthen prevention of violent extremism and address rising online recruitment risks.
Kiswahili: Serikali ilitafuta maoni ya umma kuhusu kutumia akili bandia na teknolojia mpya ili kuimarisha kuzuia itikadi kali na kushughulikia hatari zinazoongezeka za kuajiri watu mtandaoni.
Ekegusii: Eserikari nyarigetie amaoni korwa abanainchi igoro yogotumia akiri pandia na tekinorochia enyia gokongia gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu na gokwanera igoro yemechando yogosoigwa goetera eintaneti.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne okwayo ji mondo ochiw paro e wi tiyo gi rieko mar loso gik moko kod teknoloji manyien mondo omi ji omed geng'o timbe mahundu kendo mondo gitiek chandruoge ma yudo ji e intanet.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay raadineysay aragtida dadweynaha ee ku saabsan isticmaalka sirdoonka macmalka ah iyo tikniyoolajiyada cusub si loo xoojiyo ka hortagga siyaasadda adag iyo wax ka qabashada khataraha internetka.

English: Training provided to mining sector stakeholders on safe handling of commercial explosives to reduce misuse by terror groups and prevent smuggling.
Kiswahili: Mafunzo yametolewa kwa wadau wa sekta ya madini kuhusu utunzaji salama wa vilipuzi vya kibiashara ili kupunguza matumizi mabaya ya vikundi vya kigaidi na kuzuia ulanguzi wa magendo.
Ekegusii: Ekwegerigwa kwarurwe ase baria bakorema amadini  na baria bakobwaterana buna bakoiya, kogacha na kobibogoria bakeanie okobitatumia buya na baria abasaria bokoruta chipomu na gotanga oboibi bwebinto ebio.
Dholuo: Tiegruok ma ne omi joma nie tich mag manyo mwandu mag lowo e wi tiyo gi gik ma nyalo miyo gik ma dongo obedie e ngima maber, mondo omi grube mag mahundu kik ti kodgi marach kendo mondo kik wuoth ma ok kare.
Somali: Tababar loogu talagalay ganacsatada macdanta ah ee ku saabsan sida loo xakameeyo bamada ganacsiga si ammaan ah si loo yareeyo isticmaalka xun ee kooxaha argagixisada iyo ka hortagga ganacsiga.

English: Pilot sub county forum launched to build community trust and improve public reporting as part of the national countering violent extremism strategy.
Kiswahili: Jukwaa la majaribio la kaunti ndogo limezinduliwa ili kujenga uaminifu wa jamii na kuboresha utoaji wa taarifa kwa umma kama sehemu ya mkakati wa kitaifa wa kukabiliana na ugaidi wa vurugu.
Ekegusii: Emesangerekano ase chikaonti inke yakoretwe korenta obwegenwa ase abanainchi na gokong'ia emeroberio ya abaninchi korwa chiripoti buna ensemo yemoroberio yeserikari gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu.
Dholuo: Oganda ma ne tiyo gi weche mag siasa e pinyno nochako timo chenro mar loso winjruok e kind oganda kendo medo chiwo ripot ne ji e wi timbe gero.
Somali: Shirkii gobolka Pilot wuxuu aasaasay kalsoonida bulshada iyo hagaajinta warbixinta dadweynaha iyada oo qayb ka ah ka hortagga istiraatiijiyadda nabadda qaranka.

English: Expanded training in Kiambu brought together county officials, youth, media, and civil society to strengthen local prevention networks.
Kiswahili: Mafunzo yaliyopanuliwa huko Kiambu yaliwaleta pamoja maafisa wa kaunti, vijana, vyombo vya habari, na asasi za kiraia ili kuimarisha mitandao ya kuzuia maambukizi ya virusi vya corona.
Ekegusii: Okogareigwa kwamasomo aaria Kiambu nkwaretete amo barai bechikaonti, abasae, abariki amang'ana, amo nebiombe bitari bweserikari (NGOs) samo gokong'ia oborai bwebinyoro gotanga obokebago.
Dholuo: Tiegruok ma ne otim Kiambu ne oriwo jotelo mag county, rowere, joote, kod oganda mar oganda mondo omed jiwo chenro mag thieth.
Somali: Tababarka ballaaran ee Kiambu wuxuu isu keenay mas'uuliyiinta gobolka, dhalinyarada, warbaahinta, iyo bulshada rayidka ah si loo xoojiyo nidaamyada ka hortagga cudurrada deegaanka.

English: Public invited to contribute to development of artificial intelligence tools for detecting self radicalization and improving prevention strategies.
Kiswahili: Umma unaalikwa kuchangia katika uundaji wa zana za akili bandia kwa ajili ya kugundua ubinafsi na kuboresha mikakati ya kuzuia.
Ekegusii: Abanainchi baariganiigwe gochia korosia ebokoreri bi'akiri pandia bikomanyia omonto buna asriigwe eberengererio na komenta chinchera omonto aranyare kwerenda.
Dholuo: Ne ogwel ji mondo okony e loso gik ma konyo e ng'eyo kaka dhano nyalo bedo gi paro makare kod kaka ginyalo konyo e tieko timbe maricho.
Somali: Dadweynaha ayaa ku baaqay in ay gacan ka geystaan soo saarista qalabka sirdoonka ee lagu ogaado cudurka xad dhaafka ah iyo horumarinta habka looga hortago cudurka.

English: Kenya and Indonesia held a Nairobi–Mombasa workshop to share community based approaches and draft a memorandum of understanding on PCVE collaboration.
Kiswahili: Kenya na Indonesia zilifanya warsha ya Nairobi-Mombasa ili kushiriki mbinu zinazotegemea jamii na kuandaa hati ya makubaliano kuhusu ushirikiano wa PCVE.
Ekegusii: Kenya na Indonesia mbabete negeikaranso kia Nairobi – Mombasa gosanga buna ebinyoro biranyare korika amang'ana okoigwanana gose kobwatana igoro yogotanga ogosarigwa ebirengererion gwancha obokebago bwogotumia chinguru (PCVE) ase oboamo.
Dholuo: Kenya gi Indonesia ne otimo chokruok mar Nairobi - Mombasa mondo gipog paro ma ji nigo e wi gik ma gitimo kendo gichop e wi winjruok e wi tich ma gitiyogo e PCVE.
Somali: Kenya iyo Indonesia waxay qabanqaabiyeen aqoon isweydaarsiga Nairobi Motherbasa si ay ula wadaagaan xiriirka bulshada ee aasaasiga ah iyo diiwaangelinta fahamka iskaashiga PCVE.

English: Five day regional training focused on disengagement, de radicalization, and reintegration for security personnel across East Africa.
Kiswahili: Mafunzo ya kikanda ya siku tano yalilenga kujitenga, kupunguza itikadi kali, na kuwaunganisha tena na jamii kwa wafanyakazi wa usalama kote Afrika Mashariki.
Ekegusii: Amatuko atano yechingongo kwegera igoro yokwerusia gose gotiga amangana ogosaria ebirengererio na koirana gati yabarendi boborendi Kenya, yuganda na Tanzania (Afrika ya Mocha engima).
Dholuo: Tiegruok mar ndalo abich mar alwora ne oket e wi golo ji e tij sirkal, golo ji e timbe mag gero, kod duogo e riwruok mar oganda mar sirkal e pinje mag East Africa.
Somali: Tababbarka gobolka ee shan maalmood socday wuxuu diiradda saarey in la baabi'iyo, la burburiyo, lana soo celiyo shaqaalaha amniga ee Bariga Afrika oo dhan.

English: National Counter Terrorism Centre worked with the Ministry of Basic Education to train teachers on identifying and mitigating radicalization risks in schools.
Kiswahili: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Kupambana na Ugaidi kilifanya kazi na Wizara ya Elimu ya Msingi kutoa mafunzo kwa walimu kuhusu kutambua na kupunguza hatari za itikadi kali shuleni.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) kegakora emeremo amo neminisitiri yechisemi chioboroso gosomia abarimu buna bakomanya na gotanga obobe bwiogosarigwa ebirengererio chisukuru.
Dholuo: National Counter Terrorism Centre ne otiyo gi Ministry of Basic Education e tiego jopuonj e fwenyo kendo geng'o pek mag radikalisation e skunde.
Somali: Xarunta Qaranka ee La-dagaallanka Argagixisada waxay la shaqaysay Wasaaradda Waxbarashada Aasaasiga ah si ay u tababarto macalimiinta inay aqoonsadaan oo ay yareeyaan khataraha isbedelka dugsiyada.

English: One hundred forty eight park officers trained to strengthen early detection of terror related threats around major tourism areas.
Kiswahili: Maafisa mia moja arobaini na wanane wa hifadhi wamefunzwa ili kuimarisha ugunduzi wa mapema wa vitisho vinavyohusiana na ugaidi katika maeneo makubwa ya utalii.
Ekegusii: Obaofisa emia eyemo na merongo ene na batana na batato boborendi aaria ase chingiti chiorosana kirorerwa mbasometigwe gokongia obokoreri bwabo buna bakomongera na komanya ebokoru biobokebago bwokoruta chipomu chinsemo chiabo.
Dholuo: Jolweny 148 ma tiyo e pawno ne otieg mondo omed fwenyo mapiyo gik ma kelo luoro e alwora mag alwora ma ji oheroe wuoth.
Somali: Siddeed boqol oo ka mid ah saraakiisha jardiinooyinka ayaa la tababaray inay xoojiyaan ogaanshaha hore ee hanjabaadaha la xiriira meelaha waaweyn ee dalxiiska.

English: Youth beneficiaries in Lamu received entrepreneurship kits and awareness training on preventing violent extremism as part of reintegration efforts.
Kiswahili: Vijana walionufaika huko Lamu walipokea vifaa vya ujasiriamali na mafunzo ya uhamasishaji kuhusu kuzuia itikadi kali kama sehemu ya juhudi za kuwaunganisha tena.
Ekegusii: Abasae aaria Lamu mbasometigwe na koegwa ebinto kobakonya gochaka ebiasra buna enchera eyemo yogotanga ogosarigwa ebirengererio gosoa obokebago bwokoruta chipomu na koiranigwa inka.
Dholuo: Rowere ma ne oyudo kony e Lamu noyudo gige tich mar bedo jatelo kendo ne giyudo tiegruok mar geng'o timbe mahundu kaka achiel kuom yore mag duoko ji e riwruok manyien.
Somali: Dhalinyarada ka faa'iideysanaya Lamu waxay heleen qalab shaqo iyo tababar ku saabsan ka hortagga siyaasadda adag sida qayb ka mid ah dadaallada dib u soo celinta awoodda dadka kale.

English: Media Council of Kenya urged journalists to report violent extremism responsibly with emphasis on fact checking and ethical coverage to avoid amplifying radical narratives.
Kiswahili: Baraza la Habari la Kenya liliwahimiza waandishi wa habari kuripoti itikadi kali za kikatili kwa uwajibikaji, wakisisitiza kuangalia ukweli na uandishi wa maadili ili kuepuka kukuza masimulizi ya kikatili.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenenerete oboriki bwamang'ana ngiasabete abariki amangana korika na komanyia ense igiroro yobokebago bwogosaria ebirengererio ase enchera engikaranu gose yobomaene gokonya gotanga ogosarera kwobosaria bweberengererio.
Dholuo: Bura mar Joote Kenya ne ojiwo jondik weche mondo onyis timbe gero mag gero e yo mowinjore, ka giketo pek ahinya kuom nono adiera kod nyiso timbe mabeyo mondo kik giwuo kuom weche ma kelo timbe gero.
Somali: Golaha Warbaahinta Kenya ayaa ku booriyay warbaahinta inay ka warbixiyaan dhaqanka siyaasadeed ee xooggan isla markaana ay diiradda saaraan macluumaadka saxda ah ee cilmi baarista iyo anshaxa si looga fogaado in lagu faafiyo sheekooyinka reer Yurub.

English: County public forums in Nairobi reviewed the updated National Strategy to Prevent and Counter Violent Extremism focusing on gender, youth, and technology.
Kiswahili: Mabaraza ya umma ya kaunti jijini Nairobi yalipitia Mkakati wa Kitaifa uliosasishwa wa Kuzuia na Kupambana na Ugaidi unaozingatia jinsia, vijana, na teknolojia.
Ekegusii: Omosngerekano obonsi aaria Nairobi norigereretie keboyia emeroberio yaye na korwa omoroberio omoyia igoro yogotanga na korwania obokebago bwogosaria ebirengererio kwarengete abanto bechingencho chionsi, na mono abasae na tekinorochi erio gokora obokebago obwo.
Dholuo: Chokruoge mag ji duto ma ne nitie Nairobi ne onono chenro mar National Strategy to Prevent and Counter Violent Extremism ma ne otim manyien, ma ne oketo pachgi kuom weche mag nindruok, rowere, kod teknoloji.
Somali: Isgoysyada gobollada ee magaalada Nairobi waxaa lagu soo bandhigay Barnaamijka Qaranka ee ka hortagga iyo ka hortagga rabshadaha galmada, dhalinyarada iyo tikniyoolajiyadda.

English: Community policing campaign in Lamu engaged youth, elders, and security agencies to strengthen early warning and reporting systems.
Kiswahili: Kampeni ya polisi jamii huko Lamu iliwashirikisha vijana, wazee, na mashirika ya usalama ili kuimarisha mifumo ya tahadhari na utoaji wa taarifa mapema.
Ekegusii: Oborendi bwebinyoro aaria Lamu mbabete nechinkwana chiogosegeta abasae, abakwani bebinyoro, neserikari buna bagokong'ia obomongeri komanya bwango ebikoru biobosaria na komanyia abarendi kegima.
Dholuo: Kampen mar rito sirkal mar Lamu ne oriwo rowere, jodongo, kod riwruoge mag sirkal mondo omed jiwo chenro mag chiwo ripot e kinde ma weche biro chakore.
Somali: Ololaha maamulka bulshada ee Lamu wuxuu ku lug lahaa dhalinyarada, waayeelka, iyo ururada ammaanka si loo xoojiyo nidaamyada digniinta iyo warbixinta hore.

English: Journalists from multiple counties trained on responsible reporting of violent extremism to prevent sensationalism and reduce harm.
Kiswahili: Waandishi wa habari kutoka kaunti nyingi walipata mafunzo kuhusu kuripoti kwa uwajibikaji kuhusu itikadi kali za kikatili ili kuzuia uchochezi na kupunguza madhara.
Ekegusii: Abariki amangana korwa chinse ao ao mbaegeretie igoro yokorika na komanyia goetra amangana ase enchera engikeranu igoro yogosarigwa ebirengererio buna enchera eyemo yogotanga ogosarigwa obongo amangana echinkuma, okogosia gose okongainereria erio gotanga ogosareka kwa'bange.
Dholuo: Jofwamb weche moa e pinje mang'eny ne otieg mondo kik gibed gi timbe mahundu kendo mondo kik giketh gik ma timore.
Somali: Warbaahinta badankoodu waxay barteen inay ka warbixiyaan rabshadaha diinta si ay u yareeyaan xiisaha iyo waxyeelada.

English: Security Sector Counter Violent Extremism partners held public forums in Mapenya and Mkunumbi to build resilience and counter extremist messaging.
Kiswahili: Washirika wa Sekta ya Usalama wa Kupambana na Vurugu za Kidini walifanya mijadala ya umma huko Mapenya na Mkunumbi ili kujenga ustahimilivu na ujumbe wa kukabiliana na itikadi kali.
Ekegusii: Ensemo yoborendi ase okobwaterana korwana nobokebago bwogosaria amongo koba ekabago gikoruta chipomu mbagete nechinkwana nabanainchi aaria Mapenya na Mkunumbi kobaa chinguru gotenena na korwania obokebago bwogosaria amongo goetera ogotoma amang'ana ameng'e esimi.
Dholuo: Jowuoth ma tiyo gi weche mag sirkal e kedo gi timbe gero mag siasa mag tungni ne otimo chokruok e piny Mapenya kod Mkunumbi mondo gimi ji obed gi teko mar kedo gi timbe mag tungni.
Somali: Ilaalada Amniga ee Dagaalka iyo Qoraalka Xoogga aadanaha waxay ku lahaayeen goobo dadweyne ah oo ku yaal Mapenya iyo Mkunumbi si ay u abuuraan niyad jab iyo diidmo farriimo adag oo farriimo ah.

English: Training delivered to Anti Terrorism Police Unit officers to strengthen ideological awareness and operational skills under the national CVE framework.
Kiswahili: Mafunzo yametolewa kwa maafisa wa Kitengo cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi ili kuimarisha ufahamu wa kiitikadi na ujuzi wa uendeshaji chini ya mfumo wa kitaifa wa CVE.
Ekegusii: Amasomo arwetwe ase abasikari bari batenererete gotanga ogwateka gwechipomu gokongia chinhera chikomanya ebirengererio biogosari obongo na buna oranyare gotanga ayio goetera amachiko yokorwania gotanga gosarigwa obongo.
Dholuo: Tiegruok ma ne omi jotelo mag polis ma kedo gi timbe mahundu mondo omed jiwo paro kod lony e weche mag tich e bwo chenro mar piny mangima mar CVE.
Somali: Tababar loo diray saraakiisha Booliska ka hortagga Argagixisada si loo xoojiyo aragtida iyo xirfadaha qalliinka nidaamka qaranka ee CVE.

English: County security engagement forums enhanced collaboration between communities and security agencies for early warning in high risk areas of Lamu.
Kiswahili: Mabaraza ya ushirikishwaji wa usalama wa kaunti yaliimarisha ushirikiano kati ya jamii na mashirika ya usalama kwa ajili ya kutoa tahadhari mapema katika maeneo yenye hatari kubwa ya Lamu.
Ekegusii: Okobwaterana ase aborendi bechikaonti ngwakongetie oboererania gati yebinyoro nabarendi boborendi komanya bwango ebiorokererio bwobokebago bwokoruta chipomu chinsemo chiria chiregire nobokebago aaria Lamu.
Dholuo: Chokruoge mag weche rito weche mag sirkal ne omedo jiwo winjruok e kind oganda kod riwruoge mag weche mag sirkal mondo omi ji ochiw siem chon e alwora ma nigi pek maduong' e taon mar Lamu.
Somali: Shirarka amniga ee gobollada ayaa xoojiyay iskaashiga bulshada iyo ururada amniga ee digniinta hore ee meelaha ugu halista badan ee Lamu.

English: Advisory notes high likelihood of terrorist attacks targeting public areas and urges awareness and adherence to security guidance.
Kiswahili: Ushauri unabainisha uwezekano mkubwa wa mashambulizi ya kigaidi kulenga maeneo ya umma na unahimiza uelewa na kufuata mwongozo wa usalama.
Ekegusii: Abasemia baorokirie okonyarekana goakwa chipomu chirengete aba abanto bare na igo gosaba abanto komanyigwa berende na kobwatia amachiko oborendi.
Dholuo: Owacho ni nitie pek mang'eny ma nyalo yudo ji ka gineno ni nitie timbe mahundu e alwora ma ji odakie kendo ojiwo ni ji ong'e kendo oluw puonj ma tayo weche mag sirkal.
Somali: Talooyinku waxay muujinayaan in weeraro argagixiso ah oo lala beegsanayo goobaha dadweynaha ay aad u badan yihiin, isla markaana ay kor u qaadaan aqoonsiga iyo u hoggaansanaanta tilmaamaha amniga.

English: United States advisory urges increased caution due to terrorism and kidnapping risks and recommends reviewing personal security plans.
Kiswahili: Ushauri wa Marekani unahimiza tahadhari zaidi kutokana na ugaidi na hatari za utekaji nyara na unapendekeza kupitia upya mipango ya usalama wa kibinafsi.
Ekegusii: Abasemia ba America koba maisi enchera ya igoro mono igoro igoro yobokebago nokobwatwa na gotamigwa kwa'banto na gosaba nga amachiko oborendi arigererigwe keboyia.
Dholuo: Bura mar United States jiwo ahinya ni mondo gibed motang' nikech timbe mahundu kod mako ji kendo ojiwo ni mondo giwuo kuom chenro mag rito ngima dhano.
Somali: Maraykanku wuxuu ku baaqayaa in la sameeyo taxaddar dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan argagixisada iyo khatarta afduubka wuxuuna ku talinayaa in la sameeyo barnaamijyo ammaan oo shaqsiyeed.

English: Counties along the Somalia border face heightened terrorism threats and essential travel only is advised.
Kiswahili: Kaunti zilizo kando ya mpaka wa Somalia zinakabiliwa na vitisho vya ugaidi vilivyoongezeka na usafiri muhimu pekee unashauriwa.
Ekegusii: Chikaonti chiruia chibebekanete na Somalia chire ase obwoba bogoakwa chipomu ase igo gababwa ng'a bkeanie chisafari chiabo.
Dholuo: Alwora man machiegni gi tong' mar Somalia romo gi pek mag timbe mahundu kendo ji duto ma dhi e pinje mamoko e ma dwarore ni owuoth.
Somali: Ururada ku nool xuduudda Soomaaliya waxay la kulmaan khataraha argagixisada oo sii kordhaya iyo gaadiidka muhiimka ah ayaa la soo jeedinayaa.

English: Security tightened in Lamu following recent attacks and travelers are urged to remain vigilant and avoid certain road routes.
Kiswahili: Usalama umeimarishwa Lamu kufuatia mashambulizi ya hivi karibuni na wasafiri wanahimizwa kuwa macho na kuepuka njia fulani za barabarani.
Ekegusii: Oborendi bwabekirwe boisaine aaria Lamu ase engencho yogoakwa chipomu bwango iga, ase ayio na abanto bare ase chifari chiabo baboriigwe koba maiso ase ogotaetera chinchera chiria chiregire.
Dholuo: Sirkal osemiyo weche mag sirkal omedo bedo matek e taon mar Lamu bang' masiche ma nyocha otimore, kendo ojiw jowuoth mondo obed motang' kendo kik giwuoth e nderni moko.
Somali: Ammaanka ayaa la kordhiyay kadib weerarradii dhowaan dhacay iyo dadka socotada ah waxaa lagu dhiiri geliyaa inay feejignaadaan oo ay ka fogaadaan waddooyinka qaarkood.

English: United Kingdom advisory urges alertness in hotels, malls, and transport hubs and encourages use of counter terrorism guidance.
Kiswahili: Ushauri wa Uingereza unahimiza tahadhari katika hoteli, maduka makubwa, na vituo vya usafiri na unahimiza matumizi ya mwongozo wa kukabiliana na ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Abasemia ba United Kingdom basabire abanyene bechinyoma chiokoragera na korara, chiduka chinene chikoonia ebinto ao ao, amo naase chirori chikorinerwa erio koba maiso na kobwatia amachiko ogotanga obokebago.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar piny Britain jiwo ahinya ni ji obed motang' e ute mag otel, e chiro, kod kuonde ma ji wuokie e wuoth, kendo ojiwo ni oti gi weche ma tayo ji mondo gikwed timbe mahundu.
Somali: Boqortooyada Ingiriiska waxay ku boorineysaa in la ilaaliyo hoteelada, dukaamada waaweyn iyo saldhigyada gaadiidka waxayna ku talineysaa in la isticmaalo hababka looga hortago argagixisada.

English: DusitD2 attack underscores importance of knowing emergency exits and procedures in hotels and office buildings.
Kiswahili: Shambulio la DusitD2 linasisitiza umuhimu wa kujua njia za kutokea na taratibu za dharura katika hoteli na majengo ya ofisi.
Ekegusii: Ogoakwa epomu gwa DusitD2 nogokurera ng'a komanya bwango na gotanga obokebago nechinchera chiokominchoreria nemeroberio yonsi ase chinyomba chiokoragerera nechiofisi eikaranigwe.
Dholuo: Lweny mar DusitD2 jiwo gimomiyo dwarore ni ng'ato ong'e yore mag wuok kod yore mag wuok e ute mag yueyo kod ute mag ofis.
Somali: Duqeynta DusitD2 waxay xoojineysaa muhiimadda ay leedahay in la ogaado halka xaaladaha degdegga ah ay ka dhacaan iyo nidaamyada hoteellada iyo dhismayaasha xafiisyada.

English: Advisories recommend avoiding large gatherings and taking caution during religious and cultural events due to elevated risks.
Kiswahili: Ushauri unapendekeza kuepuka mikusanyiko mikubwa na kuchukua tahadhari wakati wa matukio ya kidini na kitamaduni kutokana na hatari kubwa.
Ekegusii: Obosemia obwo nigo bokomanyia ng'a bonsi baria bare ase emesangerekano yabanto abange buna chikanisa nemesikiti na emesangerekano ende yonsi babe maiso ekiagera yogoakwa chipomu okwo gokageire koba.
Dholuo: Jotim nonro nyiso ni ber mondo kik ichokre e chokruoge madongo kendo iti gi rieko sama itimo chokruoge mag din kod kit ngima ji nikech nitie pek mang'eny.
Somali: Talo bixiyayaashu waxay kugula talinayaan inaad ka fogaato shirarka waaweyn oo aad ka taxaddartid dhacdooyinka diinta iyo dhaqanka sababtoo ah khatarta weyn ayaa jirta.

English: High threat of kidnapping targeting foreigners in northern and coastal areas and travelers are urged to avoid high risk zones.
Kiswahili: Tishio kubwa la utekaji nyara unaolenga wageni katika maeneo ya kaskazini na pwani na wasafiri wanahimizwa kuepuka maeneo yenye hatari kubwa.
Ekegusii: Obwoba bwa igoro bwokobwatwa na kobiswa kwabanto korengete abarwa isiko bamenyete aaria Irianyi mbarabare nenyancha na baria bonsi bagotumia chigari ase rogendo baboriigwe gotaika ange nchinsemo echio chiregire nobokebago.
Dholuo: Ojiwo joma owuok e pinje mamoko mondo kik omigi thuolo mar dhi e pinje mamoko.
Somali: Dadka ajnabiga ah ee ku nool waqooyiga iyo xeebta ayaa halis weyn u ah in la afduubto, dadka safarka ahna waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan meelaha khatarta ah.

English: Terrorist attacks are more likely during major holidays and the public is urged to maintain heightened awareness and avoid crowded spaces.
Kiswahili: Mashambulizi ya kigaidi yana uwezekano mkubwa wa kutokea wakati wa sikukuu kuu na umma unahimizwa kudumisha uelewa mkubwa na kuepuka nafasi zilizojaa watu.
Ekegusii: Ogoakwa chipomu ngokageire mono chingaki chiemetiko nemeyega emenene igo ogosaba goikarania koba maiso kwarurwe goetra okomanyania na kwebacha korwa omoganda bwabanto abange.
Dholuo: Thoth ji nyalo timo timbe mahundu e kinde mag nyasi madongo kendo ijiwo ji mondo obed motang' gi pek mag ngima kendo kik gibed gi kuonde ma ji ng'enyie.
Somali: Weerarrada argagixisadu waxay u badan yihiin xilliyada ciidaha waaweyn, dadkana waxaa lagu dhiiri geliyaa inay ka fogaadaan meelaha dadku ka buuxaan.

English: Government outlines offenses classified as terrorism under the Prevention of Terrorism Act and urges public awareness of legal obligations.
Kiswahili: Serikali inaelezea makosa yaliyoainishwa kama ugaidi chini ya Sheria ya Kuzuia Ugaidi na inahimiza uelewa wa umma kuhusu majukumu ya kisheria.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yarure omoroberio ogoatanana igoro yamnamocho yobokebago bwokoruta chipomu inse yamachiko yogotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu na gosaba abanto komanya igoro ya ayare obwenerete gokora aye buna omokenya.
Dholuo: Sirkal lero timbe mahundu ma iwuoyo kuomgi e Chik mar Kwedo Timbe Mahundu kendo ojiwo ji mondo ong'e chike ma chik dwaro ni gitim.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay sheegeysaa khaladaadka lagu tilmaamo argagixisada sharciga argagixisada waxayna ku boorineysaa shacabka inay gartaan waajibaadka sharciga.

English: Kenya hosts regional training to strengthen capacity in combating terrorism financing with participation from experts across Africa.
Kiswahili: Kenya inaandaa mafunzo ya kikanda ili kuimarisha uwezo katika kupambana na ufadhili wa ugaidi kwa kushirikisha wataalamu kote Afrika.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaretire amo okwegerigwa kwa abarai bechingongo gokongia okobua kwabo korwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu na baria bakorwa chibesa gokora ayio ase ogasanga nabimanyi korwa Afrika engima.
Dholuo: Kenya timo tiegruok e pinje mag Afrika mondo omed jiwo nyalo mar kedo gi pesa ma itiyogo e chulo tuke mag mahundu.
Somali: Kenya waxay leedahay tababar gobol ah oo lagu xoojinayo awoodda ka hortagga kharashka argagixisada iyada oo la kaashanayo khubarada Afrika oo dhan.

English: Analysis identifies persistent terrorist activity in counties bordering Somalia and urges adherence to safety recommendations.
Kiswahili: Uchambuzi unabainisha shughuli za kigaidi zinazoendelea katika kaunti zinazopakana na Somalia na unahimiza uzingatiaji wa mapendekezo ya usalama.
Ekegusii: Obokongori bwaorokirie igoro yokogenderera kwobkebago bwokuruta chipomu ase chikaonti chiria chibebekaine na Somalia na gosaba ng'a okobwatia amachiko oborendi buna ring'ana riengencho.
Dholuo: Nonro nyiso ni nitie timbe mahundu ma siko e gwenge ma limo Somalia kendo ojiwo ni oluw puonj mag ritruok.
Somali: Cilmi-baarista ayaa muujineysa in argagixisada ay sii wadaan inay ka shaqeeyaan gobollada xuduudka la leh Soomaaliya waxayna dadka ku dhiirigelinayaan inay raacaan talooyinka amniga.

English: United Kingdom advisory urges continued vigilance due to unpredictable threats in public places, hotels, and religious sites.
Kiswahili: Ushauri wa Uingereza unahimiza kuendelea kuwa macho kutokana na vitisho visivyotabirika katika maeneo ya umma, hoteli, na maeneo ya kidini.
Ekegusii: Obosemia korwa United Kingdom bwasabire omongeri bwakogenderera ase engencho yogotamanyereria ekero ebibago birarute chipomu ase abanto, chinyomba chiokoragera, naase gosabera.
Dholuo: Bura mar paro mar piny Ingresa jiwo ni mondo gidhi nyime bedo motang' nikech gik ma timore e kuonde ma ji ng'enyie, e ute mag nindo, kod kuonde ma ji lamoe.
Somali: Boqortooyada Ingiriiska waxay ku boorineysaa inay ka feejignaato hanjabaadaha aan la saadaalin karin ee ka jira goobaha dadweynaha, hoteellada iyo meelaha diinta.

English: National Assembly strengthens laws to detect and prevent terrorism financing and improve transparency across financial systems.
Kiswahili: Bunge la Kitaifa linaimarisha sheria za kugundua na kuzuia ufadhili wa ugaidi na kuboresha uwazi katika mifumo yote ya fedha.
Ekegusii: Bunge yakong'irie laws yokomanya na gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu n baria bakobaa chibesa gokora ayio naboigo koba maiso marore buna chibesa chigoeta anaboko abanto.
Dholuo: Bura mar National Assembly otego chike mondo onyis kendo ogeng'o weche mag pesa ma itiyogo e chulo pesa mag wuondo ji kendo mondo okony e miyo weche mag pesa obed maler.
Somali: Baarlamaanka Qaranka ayaa xoojinaya sharciyada lagu ogaado iyo ka hortagga kharashaadka argagixisada iyo kor u qaadista caddeynta dhammaan nidaamyada maaliyadeed.

English: Kenya and the United Kingdom opened a modern Anti Terrorism Police Unit headquarters in Mombasa to enhance coastal security capacity.
Kiswahili: Kenya na Uingereza zilifungua makao makuu ya kisasa ya Kitengo cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi huko Mombasa ili kuongeza uwezo wa usalama wa pwani.
Ekegusii: Kenya amo na United Kingdom Bigoire polisi enyia buna oboikaranso bwaye obonene aaria Mombasa etenerete gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu gokong'ia oborendi boetanaine enyancha.
Dholuo: Kenya kod United Kingdom oseyawo ofis mar polis ma kedo gi timbe mahundu e Mombasa mondo omed miyo sirkal obed gi teko mar rito nam.
Somali: Kenya iyo Ingiriiska ayaa xarun weyn oo ka tirsan ciidamada ka hortagga argagixisada ka furay Mombasa si loo hagaajiyo awoodda amniga xeebta.

English: Canada advises high vigilance across Kenya due to ongoing extremist threats and warns against large gatherings.
Kiswahili: Kanada inashauri kuwa makini kote Kenya kutokana na vitisho vinavyoendelea vya itikadi kali na inaonya dhidi ya mikusanyiko mikubwa.
Ekegusii: Canada yarure obosemia koba maiso Kenya engima ase engencho ykogosia okwo kogendererete jkwogoakwa chipomu na gosaba nga abanto tibaba ase emesagerekano ybanto abange amo.
Dholuo: Kanada nyiso ni Kenya duto onego obed motang' ahinya nikech ji ma kwedo weche siasa mag mahundu kendo ochiwo siem ni kik gitim chokruok madongo.
Somali: Kanada waxay ku talineysaa in Kenya oo dhan si taxaddar leh loo ilaaliyo hanjabaadaha joogtada ah iyo digniinta ka dhanka ah shirarka waaweyn.

English: Kenya introduced legislation regulating virtual asset service providers to reduce money laundering and terrorism financing risks.
Kiswahili: Kenya ilianzisha sheria inayodhibiti watoa huduma za mali pepe ili kupunguza hatari za utakatishaji fedha na ufadhili wa ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaansire amachiko goyotanga baria bagotoma chibesa goetera eintaneti bakeanie oborosia bwechibesa pandia gosegeta obokebago ase akobaa chibesa echio.
Dholuo: Kenya ne oketo chike ma tayo jogo matiyo gi mwandu mag digital mondo okony e tieko buche mag chulo pesa kod chiwo pesa ne jomahundu.
Somali: Kenya waxay soo saartay sharciyo ku saabsan bixiyeyaasha adeegyada khayraadka si loo yareeyo lacagaha iyo khatarta argagixisada.

English: United Nations and Kenyan agencies co hosted workshops to help local officials and communities address incitement and prevent extremism.
Kiswahili: Umoja wa Mataifa na mashirika ya Kenya yaliandaa warsha ili kuwasaidia maafisa wa eneo hilo na jamii kushughulikia uchochezi na kuzuia itikadi kali.
Ekegusii: United Nations amo na Kenyan nebitengo biaye mbaraete omosangerekano barai ba inse nebinyoro biabo gotanga obosegeti korwania obokebago bwogosaria obongo.
Dholuo: Riwruok mag Pinje kod Kenya ne ochako timo chokruok mar tich mondo okony jotelo kod oganda ma kuno kedo gi timbe mag gero kod geng'o timbe gero.
Somali: Qaramada Midoobay iyo hay'adaha Kenya waxay diyaariyeen garaash si ay u caawiyaan saraakiisha maxalliga ah iyo bulshada inay sameeyaan khudbado dhiirigelin leh oo ay ka hortagaan diinta adag.

English: Reports show continued Al Shabaab activity near the Somalia border and call for sustained vigilance.
Kiswahili: Ripoti zinaonyesha shughuli za Al Shabaab zinaendelea karibu na mpaka wa Somalia na zinahitaji umakini endelevu.
Ekegusii: Chiripoti nkwrokia chire buna ebikoru bia Al Shabaab ang'e nechimbebe chia Somalia igo koboria koba maiso chingaki chionsi.
Dholuo: Ripot nyiso ni Al Shabaab dhi nyime gi tich machiegni gi tong' mar Somalia kendo gidwaro ni gibed motang'.
Somali: Wararka ayaa sheegaya in Al Shabaab ay sii wadaan howlgalkooda xadka Soomaaliya waxayna ku baaqeen in ay sii joogaan feejignaanta.

English: Parliament is reviewing amendments to strengthen oversight and enforcement against terrorism financing.
Kiswahili: Bunge linapitia marekebisho ili kuimarisha usimamizi na utekelezaji dhidi ya ufadhili wa ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Bunge negendererete korigereria amaonchorerio gokong'ia obomongeria nechinguru igoro yokoa ebibago bwokoruta chibesa.
Dholuo: Od bura ne oketo chenro mar tiyo gi yore mopogore opogore mag geng'o pesa madhine jonjore
Somali: Baarlamaanka ayaa dib u eegis ku sameynaya si loo xoojiyo maamulka iyo hirgelinta qorshooyinka la dagaalanka argagixisada.

English: The National Counter Terrorism Centre continues public alerts urging vigilance and reporting of suspicious activity.
Kiswahili: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Kupambana na Ugaidi kinaendelea kutoa tahadhari kwa umma kikihimiza uangalifu na kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkegendererete korwa ogokurerwa na korwa amang'ana igoro yebikoru biechitang'utang'u gochia ase abarai.
Dholuo: National Counter Terrorism Centre dhi nyime chiwo siem ne ji duto mondo gibed motang' gi jonjore
Somali: Xarunta Argagixisada Qaranka waxay sii wadaysaa digniinta dadweynaha iyagoo ku boorinaya in la taxaddaro loona soo wargeliyo waxqabadyada shakiga leh.

English: Kenya and the United Kingdom opened a new Anti Terrorism Police Unit facility in Mombasa to strengthen operations.
Kiswahili: Kenya na Uingereza zilifungua kituo kipya cha Kikosi cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi huko Mombasa ili kuimarisha shughuli.
Ekegusii: Kenya nobomo bwa Boraya mbaigorete egetuo kiabasikari kegokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu aaria Mombasa gokongia obokoreri.
Dholuo: Kenya kod United Kingdom oseyawo kambi manyien mar polise ma kedo gi timbe mahundu e Mombasa
Somali: Kenya iyo Boqortooyada Ingiriiska ayaa xarun cusub oo Booliska Argagixisada ah ka furay Mombasa si ay u xoojiyaan howlahooda.

English: Critics warn that terrorism related charges applied to protestors must balance security with constitutional rights.
Kiswahili: Wakosoaji wanaonya kwamba mashtaka yanayohusiana na ugaidi yanayowakabili waandamanaji lazima yasawazishe usalama na haki za kikatiba.
Ekegusii: Abmongeria goro yekeene basiemire eserikari ase ogotumia richiko riobokebago bwokoruta chipomu gosoera abakorobererekana koba mamincha nerichiko kobiga abakorobererekana na mamincha yobosibore bwomonto bwerichiko gotara, gosangererekana na gokwanerana.
Dholuo: Joma kwedo weche din wacho ni ketho mag mahundu ma ne oter ne joma ne kedo ne sirkal ne nyaka pog winjruok e kind sirkal kod chike mag piny.
Somali: Dhaleeceeyayaashu waxay ka digayaan in eedeymaha argagixisada ee ku saabsan mudaaharaadyada ay tahay inay isku dheelitiraan ammaanka iyo xuquuqda dastuuriga ah.

English: After the 2015 Garissa University attack, authorities increased security and encouraged vigilance in learning institutions.
Kiswahili: Baada ya shambulio la Chuo Kikuu cha Garissa la mwaka 2015, mamlaka ziliongeza usalama na kuhimiza umakini katika taasisi za elimu.
Ekegusii: Ekero eyunifasity ya Garissa yasaganetwe nobokebago bwogoakwa epomu, abarai mbagesete oborendi na gosegeta obomongeria ime yechisukuru.
Dholuo: Bang' lweny ma ne otimore e Yunivasiti mar Garissa e higa mar 2015, sirkal ne omedo jiwo weche mag ritruok kendo ne ojiwo ni gibed motang' e ute mag tiegruok.
Somali: Ka dib weerarkii 2015 ee ka dhacay Jaamacadda Garissa, mas'uuliyiintu waxay kordhiyeen amniga iyo kor u qaadista dareenka xarumaha waxbarashada.

English: The Anti Terrorism Police Unit conducts preparedness training and urges ongoing vigilance.
Kiswahili: Kitengo cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi kinatoa mafunzo ya maandalizi na kinahimiza uangalizi unaoendelea.
Ekegusii: Abasikari bensemo yokorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu ngokora bare okwegeria igoro yokoba maiso na gosaba ng'a abanto batigare koba maiso.
Dholuo: Polise ma kedo gi timbe mahundu timo tiegruok mar bedo moikore kendo ojiwo ni gibed motang'.
Somali: Xarunta Ciidanka Booliska ee la dagaalanka Argagixisada waxay ku tababartaa diyaar garowga waxayna dadka ku boorrinaysaa inay sii joogaan feejignaanta.

English: The National Counter Terrorism Centre calls for prompt reporting of suspicious activities.
Kiswahili: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Kupambana na Ugaidi kinatoa wito wa kuripotiwa haraka kwa shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) kiaboririe nga abanto bagenderere gokenyia ebikoru baroche biechitangutangu.
Dholuo: National Counter Terrorism Centre dwaro ni ji ochiw ripot mapiyo kuom gik ma chando ji.
Somali: Xarunta Qaranka ee la dagaalanka Argagixisada waxay dooneysaa warbixin degdeg ah oo ku saabsan waxqabadyada shakiga leh.

English: The United Kingdom advises visitors to remain vigilant due to terrorism threats targeting public areas.
Kiswahili: Uingereza inawashauri wageni kuendelea kuwa macho kutokana na vitisho vya ugaidi vinavyolenga maeneo ya umma.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwa Boraya (United Kingdom) bwasemirwe abare bakobatarera koba maiso ase engencho yobwoba bwobokebago bwokoruta chipomu borengete ase abanto abange bare.
Dholuo: Piny Britain nyiso jowuoth ni gibed motang' nikech lweny ma timore e alwora no
Somali: Boqortooyada Ingiriiska waxay dadka ajnabiga ah kula talineysaa inay ka feejignaadaan hanjabaadaha argagixisada ee meelaha dadweynaha lagu beegsanayo.

English: A UN workshop brought together multiple sectors to improve strategies for preventing violent extremism.
Kiswahili: Warsha ya Umoja wa Mataifa ilileta pamoja sekta nyingi ili kuboresha mikakati ya kuzuia itikadi kali za kikatili.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwechinse (UN) mbwaretete amo abanto ao ao korwa eserikari goikerania emeroberio yogotanga obokebago bwogosaria abanto amongo goetera amorokererio amabe.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar Pinje ma nono weche siasa e piny mangima, ne ochako timo chokruok mondo okony e geng'o gero.
Somali: aqoon isweydaarsiga Qaramada Midoobay waxaa lagu soo ururiyay dhowr warshadood si loo hagaajiyo farsamooyinka ka hortagga siyaasadda adag.

English: Advisories highlight persistent al Shabaab threats and urge high situational awareness.
Kiswahili: Ushauri unaangazia vitisho vinavyoendelea vya al Shabaab na kuhimiza uelewa wa hali ya juu.
Ekegusii: Abasemia bamanyirie igoro yokonyarekana kwa al Shabaab kogenderera koruta chipomu na gosaba ng'a abanto babe maiso komanya eki barengete.
Dholuo: Puonj mag al Shabaab nyiso ni al Shabaab osiko ka kelo hinyruok kendo jiwo ni ji ong'e weche.
Somali: Ciidamada Al Shabaab ayaa soo bandhigaya hanjabaad ay ku hayaan, waxayna ku adkeysanayaan fahamka cimilada ee sareeya.

English: A terrorism threat report outlines activity by al Shabaab and IS and stresses public vigilance.
Kiswahili: Ripoti ya vitisho vya ugaidi inaelezea shughuli zinazofanywa na al Shabaab na IS na inasisitiza umakini wa umma.
Ekegusii: Erpoti yobokebago igoro yokoruta chipomu yaorogetie ebokoru bia al Shabaab amo nobomo bwaisabanto batigare maiso.
Dholuo: Ripot moro mar weche ma nyiso ni ji oheroga tiyo gi weche mag mahundu nyiso kaka al Shabaab kod IS timo gik ma nyiso ni ji pod ni motang'.
Somali: Warbixin argagixiso ah ayaa muujineysa howlaha al Shabaab iyo IS waxayna diiradda saareysaa dareenka dadweynaha.

English: The United Kingdom warns of high terrorism risk in Kenya, especially targeting UK interests.
Kiswahili: Uingereza yaonya kuhusu hatari kubwa ya ugaidi nchini Kenya, hasa ikilenga maslahi ya Uingereza.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwa Boraya (United Kingdom) bwarure ogokurera igoro yokonyarekana goakwa nebibago bwokoruta chipomu aiga nka Kenya, mono kegima birengete abanto bense yabo abwo bare iaga Kenya nebinto biabo.
Dholuo: Piny Britain chiwo siem kuom pek maduong' mar timbe mahundu e piny Kenya, to moloyo ka giketho dwaro mag piny Britain.
Somali: Boqortooyada Ingiriiska ayaa ka digtay khatarta argagixisada ee Kenya, gaar ahaan iyada oo diiradda la saarayo danaha Ingiriiska.

English: Authorities warn that extremists may continue targeting critical infrastructure.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka yaonya kwamba watu wenye msimamo mkali wanaweza kuendelea kulenga miundombinu muhimu.
Ekegusii: Aborai bwarure ogokurerwa ng'a ebibago biogosaria abanto amongo mbirengete goaka ebikoreri ao ao bioborendi biserikari.
Dholuo: Sirkal chiwo siem ni jo mahundu nyalo dhi nyime tiyo gi yore madongo mag gedo.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiintu waxay ka digayaan in siyaasiyiinta adag ay sii wadi karaan inay bartilmaameedsadaan dhismayaasha - aasaaska ugu sarreeya.

English: An annual analysis reviews terrorism trends and advises residents and travelers on safety.
Kiswahili: Uchambuzi wa kila mwaka hupitia mitindo ya ugaidi na kuwashauri wakazi na wasafiri kuhusu usalama.
Ekegusii: Okorigereria gwa kera omwaka bunayeboba bikoruta chipomu gwasemirie abamenyi na baria bakogenda chisafari berende.
Dholuo: Nonro ma itimo higa ka higa nono kaka timbe mahundu chalo kendo konyo joma odak e alworano kod joma wuotho e yor ritruok.
Somali: Baadhitaannada sanadlaha ah waxay falanqeeyaan rabshadaha argagixisada waxayna la talinayaan dadka deggan iyo dadka safarka ah amniga.

English: Summary of tactics used in Westgate, Garissa, and Dusit attacks with government guidance on reporting, preparedness, and emergency response.
Kiswahili: Muhtasari wa mbinu zilizotumika katika mashambulizi ya Westgate, Garissa, na Dusit pamoja na mwongozo wa serikali kuhusu kuripoti, utayari, na majibu ya dharura.
Ekegusii: Obwenge bwa'mangana igoro yechinchera chiatumegete goaka chipomu aaria Westgate, Garissa, na Dusit eserikari yarwete oborai buna abariki amang'ana na komanyia amangana ayio abanto yakoretwe, koba maiso, na ekere kiare gokorwa chingaki echio chiemebasekano.
Dholuo: Weche machuok e wi yore ma ne otigo e lweny mar Westgate, Garissa, kod Dusit, ka sirkal chiko kaka onego otim tij lendo, bedo moikore, kod chiwo kony e kinde mag chandruok.
Somali: Muuqaal kooban oo ku saabsan farsamooyinka loo adeegsado Westgate, Garissa, iyo Dusit weerarada dowladda ee ku saabsan warbixinta, diyaarinta, iyo jawaab celinta xaaladaha degdegga ah.

English: Advisory highlighting increased terrorism threats in the United States and urging vigilance and reporting of suspicious activities.
Kiswahili: Ushauri unaoangazia ongezeko la vitisho vya ugaidi nchini Marekani na kuhimiza uangalifu na kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Ogokurerwa korwa eserikari kwamanyirie abanto igoro yokogeseka kwobokebago bwokoruta chipomu aaria America na koboria ng'a babe maiso na komanyia ase obwango gento kende gionsi bare nechitang'utang'u nakerokio.
Dholuo: Puonj ma jiwo kaka timbe mahundu medo bedoe e piny Amerka kendo jiwo ni ji obed motang' kendo ochiw ripot kuom gik ma chando ji.
Somali: Talooyinku waxay tilmaamayaan khatarta sii kordheysa ee argagixisada ee Maraykanka waxayna ku boorinayaan in la taxaddaro oo la soo wargeliyo waxqabadyada shakiga leh.

English: National campaign encouraging the public to report suspicious activity to prevent terrorism related crimes.
Kiswahili: Kampeni ya kitaifa ya kuhamasisha umma kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia uhalifu unaohusiana na ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio omone bwense ogosegeta abanto komanyia eserikari bokoru binde bionse biechitangutangu erio gotanga bokebago bonde bwonsi bwokoruta chipomu.
Dholuo: Kampen mar piny mangima mar jiwo ji mondo ochiw ripot kuom timbe ma ok kare ma timore e ngima dhano mondo gikwed timbe mahundu.
Somali: Olole dalka oo dhan ah ayaa dadweynaha ku dhiirigelinaya inay soo sheegaan waxqabadyada shaki ku jira si looga hortago dambiyada argagixisada.

English: Message encouraging citizens to recognize and report suspicious behavior noting that vigilance strengthens community security.
Kiswahili: Ujumbe unaowahimiza raia kutambua na kuripoti tabia za kutiliwa shaka ukibainisha kuwa uangalifu huimarisha usalama wa jamii.
Ekegusii: Amangana amenge esimi koa abanainchi emioyo buna bakomanya na korwa eripot igoro yebikoru biechitangutangu bamanyete buya ng'a koba maiso nenchera eyemo yogokongia oborendi bwebinyoro.
Dholuo: Sirkal jiwo raia mondo ohul timbe ma ok kare, ka owacho ni rito ji miyo sirkal bedo gi rit maber.
Somali: Fariin ku dhiirigelinaya muwaadiniinta inay aqoonsadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dabeecadaha shakiga leh iyagoo xusuusanaya in taxadarku uu xoojiyo nabadgelyada bulshada.

English: Advisory urging reporting of suspicious activity in public spaces such as schools, concerts, and sporting events.
Kiswahili: Ushauri wa kuhimiza kuripotiwa kwa shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka katika maeneo ya umma kama vile shule, matamasha, na matukio ya michezo.
