Ekegusii: Ogokurera korwa eserikari korigetie abanto korwa amang'ana gochia agambi igoro yebikoru biechitang'utang'u aase abanto bakobera buna chisukuru, chinyomba chiokwegokeria, amo nechogosori.
Dholuo: Puonj ma jiwo ji mondo ochiw ripot e wi gik ma chando ji e alwora ma ji nitie kaka skul, thum, koda tuke.
Somali: Talooyin la taaban karo ayaa sheegaya waxqabadyada shaki leh ee ka dhaca goobaha dadweynaha sida dugsiyada, bandhigyada muusikada iyo cayaaraha.

English: Outline of four steps to enhance digital safety and strengthen national security online.
Kiswahili: Muhtasari wa hatua nne za kuimarisha usalama wa kidijitali na kuimarisha usalama wa taifa mtandaoni.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio bwebinto bine ebikeranu gokong'ia oborendi bwedichitari na gokong'ia oborendi bwense ase eintaneti.
Dholuo: Weche ang'wen ma biro konyo e medo ritruok e yore mag digital kod ritruok mar piny mangima e Intanet.
Somali: Sawirka afar tallaabo oo lagu hagaajinayo amniga dijitaalka ah iyo xoojinta amniga qaranka ee internetka.

English: Assessment noting high terrorism threat levels in the United States from domestic and foreign violent extremists.
Kiswahili: Tathmini ikibainisha viwango vya juu vya vitisho vya ugaidi nchini Marekani kutoka kwa watu wenye msimamo mkali wa ndani na nje ya nchi.
Ekegusii: Okorenga kwa beene nkwaorogetie ase ebirengo bia igoro ng'a okonyarekana kwogoakwa chipomu aaria America korwa ebibago bia ime na korwa isiko.
Dholuo: Nonro nyiso ni nitie pek mang'eny ma ji yudo nikech timbe mahundu e piny Amerka kod mag pinje mamoko.
Somali: Ka dib halista argagixisada ee ugu weyn ee Maraykanka oo ka timid siyaasiyiin xooggan oo gudaha iyo dibadda ah.

English: Overview of updated United Kingdom counter terrorism laws including youth diversion and enhanced risk management tools.
Kiswahili: Muhtasari wa sheria mpya za kukabiliana na ugaidi za Uingereza ikiwa ni pamoja na upotoshaji wa vijana na zana zilizoboreshwa za usimamizi wa hatari.
Ekegusii: Amangana amenge yamachiko akworokia buna Obomo bwa Boraya bokorwania gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu, amo nomoroberio bwogokonya nabasae tibasoa obokebago obwo, boigo na nobosemia bwokobakonya gokinana na nobosareki.
Dholuo: Weche ma ne otim e wi chike mag piny United Kingdom ma ne otigo e kedo gi timbe mahundu moriwo nyaka loko pach rowere kod yore mag loyo chandruoge.
Somali: Boqortooyada Ingiriiska ee la hagaajiyay waxay qaadataa tallaabooyin lagu hagaajinayo sharciyada argagixisada oo ay ku jiraan da'da dhalinyarada iyo hagaajinta qalabka maamulka.

English: EU guidance on gender responsive and violence prevention measures within the counter terrorism strategy.
Kiswahili: Mwongozo wa EU kuhusu hatua za kuzuia ukatili na kukabiliana na jinsia ndani ya mkakati wa kukabiliana na ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Ogochika kwobomo bwa Bongeresa (EU) igoro okogania kwabanto ao ao buna abasacha, abakungu nabande bchingencho ao ao buna enchera eyemo yogokonya abanto gotesoi ase obokebago bwokoruta chipomu.
Dholuo: Puonj ma ji chiwo e wi weche mag nindruok kod geng'o timbe gero e bwo chenro mar kedo gi timbe mahundu.
Somali: Tilmaamaha Midowga Yurub ee ku saabsan falcelinta jinsiga iyo tallaabooyinka ka hortagga rabshadaha nidaamka la dagaalanka argagixisada.

English: Update on United States Treasury sanctions targeting terrorism financing networks.
Kiswahili: Taarifa mpya kuhusu vikwazo vya Hazina ya Marekani vinavyolenga mitandao ya ufadhili wa ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Uamangana abwango korwa Ekegncha ekenene giesirikari ya America gosieka chibengi chiabanto gete na kobeka ebisusuro ase abamochi buna enchera eyemo yogatanga koa ebiombe biebibago chibesa.
Dholuo: Weche manyien e wi sirkande mag pesa mag Amerka ma keto ketho ne riwruoge ma siro weche mag lweny.
Somali: Warar cusub oo ku saabsan cunaqabateynta maaliyadeed ee Mareykanka ee lala beegsanayo shabakadaha maaliyadeed ee argagixisada.

English: Kenya’s strategy to curb radicalization and prevent violent extremism through community engagement and multi agency responses.
Kiswahili: Mkakati wa Kenya wa kupunguza itikadi kali na kuzuia itikadi kali kupitia ushiriki wa jamii na majibu ya mashirika mengi.
Ekegusii: Emeroberio ya Kenya gokora ogosarigwa obongo namang'ana yebibago na gotanga ogoakwa chipomugoetera okobwaterana nebinyoro nebitengo ao ao bieserikari goikerania ayio.
Dholuo: Chenro mar Kenya mar geng'o ji mondo kik gibed gi timbe mahundu kendo geng'o timbe mahundu kokalo kuom riwruok mar oganda koda riwruok mopogore opogore.
Somali: Kenya Bradtons waxay leedahay istaraatijiyad ay ku hortagto isbeddelka siyaasadeed ee weyn iyo ka hortagga rabshadaha rabshadaha iyada oo loo marayo rabshadaha bulshada iyo falcelinta ururada badankood.

English: Public awareness campaign strengthening intelligence sharing and trust between communities and security agencies.
Kiswahili: Kampeni ya uhamasishaji umma kuimarisha ushiriki wa kijasusi na uaminifu kati ya jamii na mashirika ya usalama.
Ekegusii: Emeroberio yokomanyia abanto nigo egokong'ia okoererania kwobotuki na komenta okwegenana gati yabanto nabarendi boborendi.
Dholuo: Lendo mar konyo ji mondo ong'e weche momedore e wi wach sirkal kod riwruoge mag sirkal.
Somali: Ololaha wacyi-gelinta ayaa xoojiyay isdhexgalka garashada iyo kalsoonida bulshada iyo hay'adaha amniga.

English: Kenya Police measures to combat terrorism and violent extremism focusing on the Anti Terrorism Police Unit.
Kiswahili: Hatua za Polisi wa Kenya za kupambana na ugaidi na itikadi kali zikizingatia Kitengo cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Emeroberio ya abasikari ba Kenya arengete abasikari baria boborendi bwogotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu, namangana yosaria obongo goetera amorokererio amabe.
Dholuo: Polise mag Kenya kawo okang' mar kedo gi timbe mahundu kod timbe mahundu ka giketo pachgi kuom Polise ma kedo gi timbe mahundu.
Somali: Booliska Kenya waxay ku dadaalaan inay la dagaallamaan argagixisada iyo siyaasadeedka adag ee loogu talagalay Isbahaysiga Booliska ee la dagaalanka Argagixisada.

English: Parliamentary amendment strengthening legal frameworks to combat terrorism financing and regulate virtual assets.
Kiswahili: Marekebisho ya Bunge ya kuimarisha mifumo ya kisheria ya kupambana na ufadhili wa ugaidi na kudhibiti mali pepe.
Ekegusii: Ogoochoreria kwa amachiko na Bunge gwakong'irie amachiko gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu na baria bakobaa chibesa goetra eintaneti gokora obosaria.
Dholuo: Lokruok mar Bura mar Piny ma jiwo chike mag chike mag kedo gi pesa ma siro timbe mahundu kod chike mag rito mwandu mag dhano.
Somali: Isbeddellada dowladda oo xoojinaya qaab dhismeedka sharciga si looga hortago argagixisada dhaqaale ahaan iyo in la xakameeyo hantida dhabta ah.

English: Summary of Anti Terrorism Police Unit mandate to prevent detect and investigate terrorism through cooperation and outreach.
Kiswahili: Muhtasari wa agizo la Kitengo cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi la kuzuia kugundua na kuchunguza ugaidi kupitia ushirikiano na ufikiaji.
Ekegusii: Amangana amenge bwa ayarengete egekosi gia Porisi kegokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu erio gotuka, komanya bwango na gotanga bwango goetera okobwaterana na gosoka goikera.
Dholuo: Weche machuok mag migawo mar polise ma kedo gi timbe mahundu mar geng'o timbe mahundu kik timre kendo timo nonro kuomgi kokalo kuom tich ma gitiyogo e konyo ji.
Somali: Qoraal kooban oo ku saabsan amarka booliska ee ka hortagga argagixisada si looga hortago argagixisada si wadajir ah iyo si khiyaano leh.

English: Opening of the Coast Regional Anti Terrorism Police Unit headquarters to improve responses to terrorism cases.
Kiswahili: Kufunguliwa kwa makao makuu ya Kitengo cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi Mkoa wa Pwani ili kuboresha majibu ya kesi za ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Ogochaka na koigorwa kwegekosi gia Porisi aaria chinsemo chia Mombasa buma oboikaranso bwaye obonene erio gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu gokongia gokinanan nobokebago obwo.
Dholuo: Yudo ofis maduong' mar Polise mar Coast Regional Anti Terrorism Unit mondo okony e loyo pek mag timbe mahundu.
Somali: Furitaanka xarunta ciidamada Booliska Gobolka Xeebta si loo hagaajiyo jawaabta dhacdooyinka argagixisada.

English: Kenya’s cybersecurity strategy to protect critical information infrastructure and enhance public online safety.
Kiswahili: Mkakati wa usalama wa mtandao wa Kenya kulinda miundombinu muhimu ya taarifa na kuimarisha usalama wa umma mtandaoni.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio o'Kenya korenda chisimi nechikombiuta tichitumeka bobe erio korenda amang'ana tasoa amaboko amabe buna enchera eyemo yogoikerania oborendi bweintaneti.
Dholuo: Chenro mar Kenya mar rito weche mag intanet mondo orit weche mag weche mag intanet kendo omed miyo ji obed gi ritruok e Intanet.
Somali: Kenyablogas waa istaraatijiyad lagu xakameynayo internetka si loo ilaaliyo nidaamka macluumaadka muhiimka ah loona wanaajiyo amniga dadweynaha ee internetka.

English: Toolkit empowering communities to counter violent extremism under the NIWETU multi stakeholder initiative.
Kiswahili: Kifaa cha kuwawezesha jamii kukabiliana na itikadi kali chini ya mpango wa NIWETU unaowashirikisha wadau wengi.
Ekegusii: Egetabu kegosomia abanainchi buna baranyare gokinana nobokebago bwogosaria obongo goetera amasomo amabe inse yomoroberi o'NIWETU omoroberio bwabakoreri ao ao.
Dholuo: Kit mar gik ma konyo ji mondo oked gi timbe gero mag gero e bwo chenro mar NIWETU mar joma nigi paro mang'eny.
Somali: Qalabka ka caawiya bulshooyinka inay ka hortagaan siyaasadda adag ee uu hogaaminayo NIWETU.

English: Highlights efforts to raise awareness on online safety and cybersecurity, emphasizing child protection.
Kiswahili: Inaangazia juhudi za kuongeza uelewa kuhusu usalama mtandaoni na usalama wa mtandao, ikisisitiza ulinzi wa watoto.
Ekegusii: Amangana amanene agosegeta gokonia okomanya igoro yokwerenda korwa obosareku bweintaneti na amangana echisimi nechikombiuta erio erio korenda amang'ana, erengete oborendi bwabana.
Dholuo: Ojiwo kinda mitimo mar miyo ji ong'e weche motudore gi ritruok e Intanet kod weche mag intanet, kendo ojiwo ahinya rito nyithindo.
Somali: Qodobada ugu muhiimsan ee dadaalka lagu kordhinayo fahamka amniga internetka iyo amniga internetka, oo diiradda lagu saaro ilaalinta carruurta.

English: Describes Anti Terrorism Police Unit prevention and investigation work using specialized teams.
Kiswahili: Inaelezea kazi ya kuzuia na uchunguzi wa Kitengo cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi kwa kutumia timu maalum.
Ekegusii: Nkorwa kere oboagare bwegekosi gia Porisi keria kegotumia okoererania ase obotuki na gotanga obokebago goetera ebitengo biabamanyi.
Dholuo: Olero tije mag polise mag geng'o timbe mahundu kod timo nonro ka gitiyo gi grube molony.
Somali: Faahfaahin ka bixi habka ka hortagga argagixisada ee ka hortagga booliiska iyo baaritaanka ay sameeyaan kooxo gaar ah.

English: Calls for stronger consumer education and digital safety to address cyber threats.
Kiswahili: Inatoa wito wa elimu bora kwa watumiaji na usalama wa kidijitali ili kukabiliana na vitisho vya mtandao.
Ekegusii: Okoboria gwechinguru ng'a abagokorerwa emeremo basemigwe igorro yoboronge bwabo na buna babwenerete kwerenda gedichitari erio gotanga obwoba korwa eintaneti.
Dholuo: Ojiwo mondo oti gi yore mag manyo mor kod yueyo e konyo joma dwaro tiyo gi Intanet.
Somali: Taleefanada taleefanka si loo dalbado waxbarasho macaamiisha oo xooggan iyo amniga dijitaalka ah si looga hortago hanjabaadaha internetka.

English: Reports on campaigns building trust and intelligence sharing with communities.
Kiswahili: Ripoti kuhusu kampeni zinazojenga uaminifu na ushiriki wa akili na jamii.
Ekegusii: Nkomanyia bare igoro yechinkwana chigosegeta gokina okwegenana na koererania amang'ana obotuki nabanyabinyoro.
Dholuo: Ripot ma nyiso kaka kampen mag gero geno kod pogo weche mag sirkal gi ji konyo.
Somali: Warbixin ku saabsan ololaha lagu dhisayo iimaanka iyo awoodda maskaxda ee bulshada.

English: Outlines Anti Terrorism Police Unit operations focused on investigations and public cooperation.
Kiswahili: Inaelezea shughuli za Kitengo cha Polisi cha Kupambana na Ugaidi zinazolenga uchunguzi na ushirikiano wa umma.
Ekegusii: Nkworokereria are igoro yemeroberio ya yegekosi kia abasikari gokonana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu birengete obotuki na obosagani ebinyoro.
Dholuo: Olero tije mag polise ma kedo gi timbe mahundu ma ne itimo e kindgi kod joma ne timo nonro kod joma ne tiyo kanyachiel gi ji.
Somali: Maqaallada ka soo horjeeda Ciidamada Argagixisada waxay ku saabsan yihiin baaritaanka iyo wada shaqeynta dadweynaha.

English: ATPU conducts threat interdiction, awareness, and multi agency operations.
Kiswahili: ATPU hufanya kazi ya kuzuia vitisho, uhamasishaji, na shughuli nyingi za mashirika.
Ekegusii: Egetengo kia abasikari getenerete gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu (ATPU) ngotanga kere obokebago botaraba, komanyia abanto, amo nokobwaterana nebitengo binde bieserikari.
Dholuo: ATPU timo tij geng'o gik ma kelo hinyruok, chiwo paro, koda tije mag riwruoge mang'eny.
Somali: ATPU waxay hoggaamineysaa hanjabaadaha faragelinta, aqoonsiga, iyo hawlaha badankood ee ururada.

English: EU and Kenya expand engagement to operationalize the NSCVE.
Kiswahili: EU na Kenya zapanua ushirikiano ili kuendesha NSCVE.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwa Bogeresa EU na Kenya bagareirie obokoreri bwabo goikerania emeroberio ya Kenya yoborendi gokinanana nobokebago bwogosaria obongo goewtera amasomo amabe (NSCVE).
Dholuo: EU kod Kenya medo tiyo gi chenro mar tiyo gi chenro mar NSCVE.
Somali: Midowga Yurub iyo Kenya waxay ballaarinayaan iskaashiga si ay u hirgeliyaan NSCVE.

English: New legislation strengthens financial transparency and anti terrorism financing measures.
Kiswahili: Sheria mpya huimarisha uwazi wa kifedha na hatua za kupambana na ugaidi za kufadhili.
Ekegusii: Amachiko amayia okongirie obomiso marore buna chibesa chikoenanwa erio gotanga buna ebibago bwokoruta chipomu bikoegwa chibesa gokora oboseria bwabo.
Dholuo: Chike manyien jiwo yore mag chiwo pesa e yo maler kendo konyo e tieko timbe mahundu.
Somali: Sharciyada cusub waxay xoojinayaan caddaaladda dhaqaalaha iyo tallaabooyinka looga hortago argagixisada.

English: Security agencies receive updated protocols for data and intelligence sharing.
Kiswahili: Mashirika ya usalama hupokea itifaki zilizosasishwa za kushiriki data na ujasusi.
Ekegusii: Ebitengo bioborendi nkomanyigwa bire emeroberio emeyia yogokora emeremo yabo ase amangana na koererania obotuki.
Dholuo: Ofise mag weche sirkal yudoga weche manyien mag weche ma ginyalo miyo ji ng'eyo weche ma gipuonjore.
Somali: Hay'adaha amniga waxay helayaan macluumaad cusub iyo ka qaybgalka dadka caqliga leh.

English: Kenya launches curriculum enabling officers to identify and counter extremism.
Kiswahili: Kenya yazindua mtaala unaowawezesha maafisa kutambua na kukabiliana na itikadi kali.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaansire amasomo gokonya abarai komanya na gotanga obokebago bwogosaria ebirengererio.
Dholuo: Kenya chako chenro mar somo ma miyo jotelo nyalo fwenyo kendo kedo gi timbe mahundu.
Somali: Kenya waxay bilaabaneysaa waxbarasho u oggolaanaysa saraakiisha inay aqoonsadaan diimaha adag oo ay diidaan.

English: Kenya adopts updated UN and FATF sanctions lists targeting terrorism financing.
Kiswahili: Kenya yapitisha orodha mpya za vikwazo vya Umoja wa Mataifa na FATF zinazolenga ufadhili wa ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaitabire na gochaka gokorera emeremo ebikwaso biabegetwe na nobomo bwechinse chikwegambera (UN) na ekeombe keria ekenene gekorigereri buna chibesa chigokora emeremo (FATF) kerengete gotanga ebibago biokorut chipomu koegwa chibesa.
Dholuo: Kenya oyie gi list mar UN kod FATF mar chulo buche ma dwaro ni oti gi pesa e siro weche mag lweny.
Somali: Kenya waxay isticmaashaa cunaqabateyntii ugu dambeeyay ee Qaramada Midoobay iyo ATF, waxayna ku tilmaamaysaa inay tahay ujeedada ay u doonayso in ay ka hortagto dhaqaalaha argagixisada.

English: Parliament strengthens anti money laundering and counter terrorism financing frameworks.
Kiswahili: Bunge laimarisha mifumo ya kupambana na utakatishaji fedha haramu na kupambana na ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Bunge yakongirie okorosia chipesa chia pandia na gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu na baria bakobaa chibesa gokora obokebago obwo.
Dholuo: ATPU timo tij geng'o gik ma kelo hinyruok, chiwo paro, koda tije mag riwruoge mang'eny.
Somali: Baarlamaanku wuxuu xoojiyaa qorshaha ka hortagga isticmaalka lacagta iyo ka hortagga argagixisada.

English: NCTC uses online platforms to increase awareness and reporting.
Kiswahili: NCTC hutumia majukwaa ya mtandaoni ili kuongeza uelewa na utoaji wa taarifa.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe gia Kenya getenenerete gokinanana gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) ngotumia kere omoroberio bweintaneti komnyia abanto na korwa chiripoti.
Dholuo: NCTC tiyo gi chenro mag intanet mondo okony ji ong'e kendo ochiw ripot.
Somali: NCTC waxay isticmaashaa barxadaha internetka si kor loogu qaado wacyiga iyo warbixinta.

English: Kenya launches a C-IED training complex to train security personnel.
Kiswahili: Kenya yazindua kituo cha mafunzo cha C-IED ili kuwafunza wafanyakazi wa usalama.
Ekegusii: Kenya yaansire esukuru yabeene kwegeria abakoreri baye boborendi buna bakomanya na gotegora chipomu chiokweroseria (C-IED).
Dholuo: Kenya chako tiego joma tiyo ne sirkal mondo otieg joma tiyo ne sirkal.
Somali: Kenya waxay bilaabaneysaa tababaryo kala duwan oo loogu talagalay tababarka shaqaalaha amniga.

English: Kenya updated the PBO Act to tighten oversight on terrorism financing. Stay compliant and report suspicious activity.
Kiswahili: Kenya ilisasisha Sheria ya PBO ili kuimarisha usimamizi wa ufadhili wa ugaidi. Endelea kufuata sheria na uripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Kenya yarigereirie keboyia amachiko yebiombe bitari bieserikari (PBO) gokongia obomongeri igoro yokoa abibago bwokoruta chipomu chibesa gokora obokebago bwabo. Kabe omoikaranu na karue eripoti igoro yebikoru biechitang'utang'u.
Dholuo: Kenya oseloso Chik mar PBO mondo omed rito weche mag pesa ma itiyogo e chulo timbe mahundu.
Somali: Kenya waxay cusbooneysiisay Sharciga PBO si loo xakameeyo dhaqaalaha argagixisada.

English: Corruption threatens security and growth. Report unethical conduct to safeguard public resources.
Kiswahili: Rushwa inatishia usalama na ukuaji. Ripoti mwenendo usio wa kimaadili ili kulinda rasilimali za umma.
Ekegusii: Obokengeka nokokosia ase aborendo namagenderero. Karwe eripoti yebikoru ore nechitangutangu gose ogokora gotabwenereti gochia ase abarai korena obonda bwebinyoro na Kenya.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar oganda Jehova biro miyo ji duto obed gi winjruok maber gi Nyasaye.
Somali: Musuqmaasuqku wuxuu khatar ku yahay ammaanka iyo horumarka.

English: Report corruption anonymously through hotlines and portals to support fast investigations.
Kiswahili: Ripoti ufisadi bila kujulikana kupitia simu za dharura na milango ili kusaidia uchunguzi wa haraka.
Ekegusii: Manyia abaraia amangana igoro yobokengeka otari kwemanyekania goetera enamba yesimi morerero na gowetera eintaneti erio goikerania obotuki bwa bwango.
Dholuo: Nyis ji ketho nyinggi e yor miriambo kokalo kuom simo kod websait mondo okony e timo nonro mapiyo.
Somali: Warbixin ku saabsan musuqmaasuqa internetka iyo bogagga internetka ee taageeraya baaritaanka degdegga ah.

English: Learn how corruption affects services and take part in community education to prevent it.
Kiswahili: Jifunze jinsi rushwa inavyoathiri huduma na ushiriki katika elimu ya jamii ili kuizuia.
Ekegusii: Soma buna obokengeka bore omochando ase obokoreri nigo kabe oyomo ase okomanyia na gosomia ekenyoro bun enchera eyemo yogotanga obokorekanu.
Dholuo: Puonjri kaka mibadhi chiko tije mag lendo kendo ikri mondo ikony ji kik obed gi mibadhi.
Somali: Baro sida musuqmaasuqa u saameynayo adeegga iyo waxbarashada bulshada si looga hortago.

English: Know your rights and demand integrity from public officials to reduce corruption risks.
Kiswahili: Jua haki zako na udai uadilifu kutoka kwa maafisa wa umma ili kupunguza hatari za ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Manya oboronge bwa na boria ng'a abakoreri beserikari babe abeene ase emeremo yabo gokeania obokengeka.
Dholuo: Ng'e ratiro ma in-go kendo iket chik mondo jotich sirkal obed joma ler mondo okonygi giduok chien rach ma giyudo nikech mibadhi.
Somali: Ogsoonow xuquuqdaada oo codso daacadnimada saraakiisha dawladda si loo yareeyo khatarta musuqmaasuqa.

English: Civil society networks across Africa push for transparency. Support governance-strengthening efforts.
Kiswahili: Mitandao ya asasi za kiraia kote Afrika inasukuma uwazi. Saidia juhudi za kuimarisha utawala.
Ekegusii: Okobwaterana kwebiombe bitari bieserikari Africa engima mbagendererete gosuguma obomaiso marore ase obokoreri. Sira emeroberio eye egokongia obogambi obuya.
Dholuo: Oganda mar oganda dhano e Afrika duto jiwo weche duto ma nyiso ni gidwaro bedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: Shabakadaha bulshada ee Afrika oo dhan waxay ku adkeysanayaan caddeynta.

English: Transparent governance improves safety and service delivery. Stay alert and speak up in your community.
Kiswahili: Utawala wa uwazi huboresha usalama na utoaji wa huduma. Endelea kuwa macho na zungumza katika jamii yako.
Ekegusii: Obogambi bwa maiso marore nigo bogokongia oborendi nobokoreri. Kabe maiso na kwana igoro yobokengeka ase ekenyoro kiao.
Dholuo: Bedo gi chenro maber mar tayo weche miyo weche bedo maber kendo miyo ji bedo gi ritruok.
Somali: Maareynta isbeddelka waxay hagaajineysaa amniga iyo bixinta adeegyada. Ka taxaddar oo si kalsooni leh uga hadla bulshadaada.

English: Reporting corruption aids asset recovery and strengthens law enforcement. Use official channels.
Kiswahili: Kuripoti ufisadi husaidia kurejesha mali na kuimarisha utekelezaji wa sheria. Tumia njia rasmi.
Ekegusii: Karwe eripoti yobokengeka nigo egokonya ase okoirania enibo konye yaibirwe na gokong'ia obokoreri bwamachiko . Wetera chinchera chiekeofisi.
Dholuo: Ka ng'ato chiwo ripot e wi mibadhi, mano konyo e chulo mwandu kendo jiwo chike.
Somali: Warbixinta musuqmaasuqa waxay gacan ka geysaneysaa soo kabashada iyo xoojinta sharciga.

English: Kenya increased funding for anti‑corruption bodies for stronger accountability in 2025.
Kiswahili: Kenya iliongeza ufadhili kwa mashirika ya kupambana na ufisadi kwa ajili ya uwajibikaji imara zaidi mwaka wa 2025.
Ekegusii: Kenya yagesete ekerengo giechibesa as ebitengo biria biogokinana nobokengeka goikerania abokeri oboikeranu omwaka 2025.
Dholuo: Kenya ne omedo pesa ne riwruoge ma kedo gi mibadhi mondo omi gibed gi ratiro mar chiwo dwoko mag penjo e higa mar 2025.
Somali: Kenya waxay kordhisay lacagaha la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa si loo helo mas'uuliyad xoogan sanadka 2025.

English: A new justice sector framework was introduced to unify anti‑corruption efforts.
Kiswahili: Mfumo mpya wa sekta ya haki ulianzishwa ili kuunganisha juhudi za kupambana na ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Amaonchorerio ime yeserikari ase obokoreri bwamachiko arengete chikoti naansetwe koreta amo okorwania obokengeka.
Dholuo: Ne oket chenro manyien mar weche mag bura mondo oriw kinda mitimo e kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: Nidaam caddaalad ah oo cusub ayaa la aasaasay si loo mideeyo dadaallada la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa.

English: EACC recovered KSh 28B over six years, redirecting resources to public projects.
Kiswahili: EACC ilirejesha KSh 28B kwa kipindi cha miaka sita, ikielekeza rasilimali kwenye miradi ya umma.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) nkiairanetie chieiringi chibirioni 28 gati yemiaka 6, na enibo eyio ekabagwa ase amagenderero ense.
Dholuo: EACC ne odwoko KSh 28B kuom higni auchiel, kendo ne ooro pesane e tije mag sirkal.
Somali: EACC waxay dib u heshay KSh 28B in ka badan lix sano, iyada oo loo marayo khayraadka mashaariicda dadweynaha.

English: The Kenya Integrity Plan sets a roadmap for transparency improvements through 2028.
Kiswahili: Mpango wa Uadilifu wa Kenya unaweka ramani ya uboreshaji wa uwazi hadi 2028.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio bwerichiko omonene o'Kenya igoro yobwegenwa ase emeremo nobegete chingaki goikerani gokora emeremo boronge na maiso marore goika omwaka 2028.
Dholuo: Chenro mar Kenya Integrity Plan keto chenro mar dongruok e weche duto e piny Kenya nyaka 2028.
Somali: Barnaamijka Daacadnimada Dabeecadda Kenya wuxuu qeexayaa horumarka hufan sanadka 2028.

English: Recent prosecutions of officials show commitment to tackling economic crimes.
Kiswahili: Mashtaka ya hivi karibuni dhidi ya maafisa yanaonyesha kujitolea kwao kukabiliana na uhalifu wa kiuchumi.
Ekegusii: Okonacherwa ekina kwa abaofisa bwango iga nekiorokererio giesirikari korwania obosaria bwobogoko bwense.
Dholuo: Timbego ma nyocha otim ne jotelo nyiso ni gigeno ahinya tieko timbe mahundu.
Somali: Dacwaddii ugu dambeysay ee mas'uuliyiintu soo jeediyeen waxay muujinayaan mas'uuliyadda ay u leeyihiin in la joojiyo dambiyada dhaqaale.

English: A bill proposes a 10‑year procurement ban for individuals and firms convicted of corruption.
Kiswahili: Muswada unapendekeza marufuku ya miaka 10 ya ununuzi kwa watu binafsi na makampuni yaliyopatikana na hatia ya ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Richiko riyia igoro yobogori bwobokengeka riabekire ogotangwa emiaka 10 korwa obogori ae abagoribakonyorekana koba abogori bakengeka.
Dholuo: Bill moro otemo keto mar higini apar marfuk mar nyiewo gik moko ne ji koda ne ohala ma ne oyang' gi ketho mar mibadhi.
Somali: Sharcigu wuxuu soo jeedinayaa in 10 sano la mamnuuco shaqsiyaadka iyo shirkadaha lagu xukumay musuqmaasuq.

English: KNCHR calls for stronger measures to protect human rights from corruption impacts.
Kiswahili: KNCHR inatoa wito wa hatua kali zaidi za kulinda haki za binadamu kutokana na athari za ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenen gekorwanerera oborongo bwa mwanyabanto (KNCHR) kiaboririe ng'a emeroberio emiya yokorenda yokorenda oboronge bwa'banto korwa emechando ekorentwa nobokorekanu.
Dholuo: KNCHR dwaro ni otim kinda ahinya mondo orit ratiro mag dhano kik kethre gi mibadhi.
Somali: KCHR waxay dooneysaa tallaabooyin aad u xoog badan si loo ilaaliyo xuquuqda aadanaha masiibooyinka musuqmaasuqa.

English: Judiciary budget upgrades will automate courts and speed up corruption case handling.
Kiswahili: Maboresho ya bajeti ya mahakama yataendesha mahakama kiotomatiki na kuharakisha ushughulikiaji wa kesi za ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Okogeswa chibesa ase obokoreri bwa koti mboikerania chikoti gokora emeremo yaye goetera etekinorochi ase obokoreri obuya Jkwangoi kogaba ebina biobokorekanu.
Dholuo: Medruok mar bajet mar sirkal biro miyo kot obed mayot kendo biro miyo weche mag mibadhi obed mayot.
Somali: Sharciyada miisaaniyadda dowladda waxay hagaajin doonaan maxkamadaha dowladda waxayna dardar gelin doonaan dacwadaha musuqmaasuqa.

English: African Anti‑Corruption Day 2025 urged united action against abuses of human dignity.
Kiswahili: Siku ya Kupambana na Rushwa ya Afrika 2025 ilihimiza hatua za pamoja dhidi ya unyanyasaji wa utu wa binadamu.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe gia African kere mamincha nobokorekanu rituko riokoinyora obokorekanu omwaka 2025 ngiasabete okobwaterana na bonsi korwania obokengeka bokoura abanto oboronge, amasikani na komenya buya.
Dholuo: Odiechieng' mar kedo gi mibadhi e Afrika 2025 ne ojiwo ni mondo otim kinda e kedo gi timbe maricho mag ketho nying dhano.
Somali: Maalinta Afrika ee ka hortagga burburka ee 2025 waxay ku dhiirigelisay tallaabo wadajir ah oo looga hortago xadgudubka sharafta aadanaha.

English: EACC partnered with the Catholic Church to promote ethics during the 2025 Lenten season.
Kiswahili: EACC ilishirikiana na Kanisa Katoliki kukuza maadili wakati wa msimu wa Kwaresima wa 2025.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) nkiabwateranete nekanisa yabaromani Katholic gosegeta amachiko yogokora emeremo chingaki chia amatuko 40 yokwengata omwaka 2025.
Dholuo: EACC noriwore gi Kanisa mar Katholik e jiwo timbe mabeyo e kinde mar higa mar 2025.
Somali: EACC waxay la shaqaysay Kaniisadda Katooliga si ay u horumariso anshaxa inta lagu jiro xilli ciyaareedka Kwareten ee 2025.

English: KLIF engaged private sector partners to advance the Kenya Integrity Plan.
Kiswahili: KLIF iliwashirikisha washirika wa sekta binafsi ili kuendeleza Mpango wa Uadilifu wa Kenya.
Ekegusii: Ogocha amo gwekeombe kiemegondo nobokoreri (KLIF) nkiakwanerete nabanyabiasara kobwatera erio gokina meroberio yobokeri bwobwegenwa bwa Kenya.
Dholuo: KLIF ne okonyo jowete e yore mag ohala mondo okony e loso chenro mar Kenya Integrity Plan.
Somali: KLIF waxay ka qayb qaadatay xubno ka tirsan qaybaha gaarka loo leeyahay si ay u horumariyaan Mashruuca Daacadnimada Kenya.

English: Kenya suspended officials implicated in graft, reinforcing zero‑tolerance policy.
Kiswahili: Kenya imewasimamisha kazi maafisa waliohusika na ufisadi, na hivyo kuimarisha sera ya kutovumilia kabisa.
Ekegusii: Kenya yarusetie abakori baye emeremo ase emeremop bri banyorekanete bare kengeka, goikerania richiko riogotekumba ase obokorekanu.
Dholuo: Kenya ne ogolo tijno kuom jotelo ma ne omako mibadhi, kendo mano nomiyo oket chenro mar weyo ne ji duto timbe maricho.
Somali: Kenya waxay joojisay saraakiisha ku lug lahaa tallaalka, waxayna xoojisay siyaasadda sufuritolero.

English: The Kenya Integrity Plan expands oversight and training across all counties.
Kiswahili: Mpango wa Uadilifu wa Kenya unapanua usimamizi na mafunzo katika kaunti zote.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio o'Kenya igoro yobwegenwaiogareeirie obomongeria nokwegerigwa ase chikaonti chionso.
Dholuo: Chenro mar Kenya Integrity Plan medo neno kendo tiego ji e gwenge duto.
Somali: Barnaamijka Daacadnimada Kenya wuxuu kordhiyaa maamulka iyo tababarka dhammaan dhinacyada.

English: EACC raised awareness at the 2025 Eldoret Show on reporting corruption.
Kiswahili: EACC ilitoa uelewa katika Onyesho la Eldoret la 2025 kuhusu kuripoti ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) ngiakorete okomanya omoerio bwomwaka 2025 aaria ase amoorokereria yoboremi Eldoret buna aranyare koria eriporti igoro yobokorekanu.
Dholuo: EACC ne ochiwo paro e wi ripot mar mibadhi e higa mar 2025 Eldoret Show.
Somali: EACC waxay wacyiga ka bixisay Bandhigga Eldoret ee 2025 ee ku saabsan warbixinta musuqmaasuqa.

English: Anti‑corruption training reached officials and residents in Nandi County.
Kiswahili: Mafunzo ya kupambana na ufisadi yaliwafikia maafisa na wakazi katika Kaunti ya Nandi.
Ekegusii: Amasomo igoro yogotanga obokengeka naikerete abaofisa nabamenyi ba ba aaria ekaonti ya Nandi.
Dholuo: Tiegruok mar kedo gi mibadhi ne ochopo ne jotelo koda joma odak e county mar Nandi.
Somali: Saraakiisha iyo dadka deggan gobolka Nandi waxay tababar ka heleen ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa gobolka Byndi.

English: Kenya’s judiciary is automating courts to improve transparency nationwide.
Kiswahili: Mahakama ya Kenya inaendesha mahakama kiotomatiki ili kuboresha uwazi kote nchini.
Ekegusii: chikoti chia Kenya chiansire obokoreri goetera eintaneti goikerania obomaisomarore bwemeremo Kenya engima.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar Kenya tiyo gi yore mag yalo e yo mayot mondo omi sirkal obed gi weche mang'eny ma nyiso ni sirkal onge gi ketho.
Somali: Maxkamadaha Kenya ee PAPs waxay maamulaan maxkamado si loo wanaajiyo caddaaladda dalka oo dhan.

English: EACC filed 47 civil suits to recover KSh 9.2B in stolen assets.
Kiswahili: EACC iliwasilisha kesi 47 za madai ili kurejesha KSh 9.2B katika mali iliyoibiwa.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gokorwania obokorekanu (EACC) ngiasoete ebina 47 biamang'ana egenka koirania chibirioni 9.2 chiebinto bieserikari bibire chikaonti ao ao.
Dholuo: EACC ne okelo kes 47 mar loso KSh 9.2B e mwandu ma ne okwal.
Somali: EACC waxay furtay 47 xuquuq oo muwaadiniin ah si ay dib ugu helaan KSh 9.2B hantida la xaday.

English: EACC partnered with Catholic Church Kisumu to promote ethics during Lent.
Kiswahili: EACC ilishirikiana na Kanisa Katoliki Kisumu kukuza maadili wakati wa Kwaresima.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokorekanu (EACC) nkibwatanete nekanisa ya Roman Catholiki aaria Kisumu gosegeta keene ase egasi chingaki chiepasaka.
Dholuo: EACC noriwore gi Kanisa mar Katholik ma Kisumu e jiwo timbe mabeyo e kinde mar Lamo mar Ji Duto.
Somali: Kooxda EACC waxay la shaqaysay Kaniisadda Katooliga ah si ay u horumariyaan anshaxa.

English: Youth and public engaged through integrity clubs at Eldoret Show.
Kiswahili: Vijana na umma wameshirikishwa kupitia vilabu vya uadilifu katika Eldoret Show.
Ekegusii: Abasae nechinkwana chebinyoro goetra ebiombe bioboene aaria Eldoret chiokworokia igoro oboremi.
Dholuo: Rowere gi ji duto ne timo gik moko e riwruok mar oganda Jehova e Eldoret Show.
Somali: Dhallinyarada iyo dadka oo dhanba waxay ku biireen kooxda daacadnimada ee Bandhigga Eldoret.

English: Kenya increased budgets for oversight bodies in FY2025/26.
Kiswahili: Kenya iliongeza bajeti kwa mashirika ya usimamizi katika mwaka wa fedha wa 2025/26.
Ekegusii: Kenya yagesete ekerengo giechibesa chiogokora emeremo ase ebiombe biria bikomongera obokoreri ase omwaka bwechibes 2025/26.
Dholuo: Kenya ne omedo pesa mag riwruoge ma nono weche mag pesa e higa mar 2025/26.
Somali: Kenya waxay kordhisay miisaaniyadda guddiyada kormeerka sanadka maaliyadeed ee 2025/26.

English: EACC urged Bungoma leaders to support anti‑corruption investigations.
Kiswahili: EACC iliwasihi viongozi wa Bungoma kuunga mkono uchunguzi wa kupambana na ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwania obokorekanu (EACC) nkiaboretie abarai ba Bungoma gisira obokongoria bwogotanga obokengeka.
Dholuo: EACC ne ojiwo jotelo mag Bungoma mondo oriw lwedo nonro mag kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: EACC waxay ugu baaqday hoggaamiyeyaasha Bingoma inay taageeraan baaritaanka musuqmaasuqa.

English: EACC trained leaders and citizens in Nandi on integrity.
Kiswahili: EACC iliwafunza viongozi na raia wa Nandi kuhusu uadilifu.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwania obokengeka (EACC) kiaegeirie abarai nabainchi aaria ekaonti ya Nandi igoro yekeene.
Dholuo: EACC ne otiego jotelo kod raia e Nandi kuom wach chung' motegno.
Somali: EACC waxay tababartay hoggaamiyeyaasha iyo muwaadiniinta Nandi ku saabsan daacadnimada anshaxa.

English: African Anti‑Corruption Day linked corruption to human rights harm.
Kiswahili: Siku ya Kupambana na Rushwa ya Afrika ilihusisha rushwa na madhara ya haki za binadamu.
Ekegusii: Rituko riokoinyora egegi igoro yokorwania obokengeka aiga Africa ndirogetie buna obokorekanu bokomiga oboronge bwekemwanyabanto bwabanto.
Dholuo: Odiechieng' ma Jo-Afrika kedo gi mibadhi ne otudore gi mibadhi kod ketho ratiro mag dhano.
Somali: Maalinta Afrika ee ka hortagga burburka waxaa lagu xidhiidhay musuqmaasuqa iyo burburinta xuquuqda aadanaha.

English: NACCSC rolled out a county‑wide ethics and anti‑corruption plan.
Kiswahili: NACCSC ilianzisha mpango wa maadili na kupambana na ufisadi katika kaunti nzima.
Ekegusii: Ekomiti enene etenenerete korwania obokengeka (NACCSC) ngiaansete omoroberio bwechikaonti chionsi gosegeta obokoreri bwekeene na gotanga obokorekanu.
Dholuo: NACCSC ne ochako chenro mar rito timbe mabeyo kod tieko mibadhi e alwora duto mar gweng'no.
Somali: NACCSC waxay bilawday barnaamij anshaxeed oo gobolka oo dhan ah oo ka dhan ah musuqmaasuqa.

English: New rules require officers to declare gifts and avoid conflicts of interest.
Kiswahili: Sheria mpya zinawataka maafisa kutangaza zawadi na kuepuka migongano ya maslahi.
Ekegusii: Amachiko amayia nogo aganetie abarai komanyekania ebieegwa bakoegwa erio gotanga gose korenda obokoreri bwabo gotatuomana nemeremo yabo.
Dholuo: Chike manyien dwaro ni jotelo ochiw mich kendo gitang' gi ywaruok mag dwaro mag jomoko.
Somali: Sharciga cusub wuxuu u baahan yahay saraakiisha inay xayeysiiyaan hadiyado iyo inay ka fogaadaan khilaafaadka xiisaha.

English: Courts now hold daily briefings reinforcing zero tolerance for bribes.
Kiswahili: Mahakama sasa hufanya mikutano ya kila siku inayosisitiza kutovumilia rushwa.
Ekegusii: Chikoti rero nkobwa chire nogosanga kera rituko buna ebwenerete korwa obokoreri gokongia ekonano yokoria amaaki.
Dholuo: Sani kot timoga chokruoge mapile mondo giketh wach mar asoya.
Somali: Maxkamaduhu waxay hadda soo saaraan warbixin maalinle ah oo ku nuuxnuuxsada dulqaadka musuqmaasuqa.

English: ODPP introduced tech tools and plea deals to cut case backlogs.
Kiswahili: ODPP ilianzisha zana za kiteknolojia na mikataba ya madai ili kupunguza mrundikano wa kesi.
Ekegusii: Ofisi yomosoeri ebina (ODPP) yaansete egekoreri kigedichitarierio kwangoi gokora ebina ebinge korwa abwo magega.
Dholuo: ODPP ne oketo chenro mar tiyo gi yore mag teknoloji kod loso winjruok mar ketho chik mondo oketh yuto mar kes.
Somali: ODPP waxay soo bandhigtay qalab farsamo iyo codsiyo si loo yareeyo sababaha dacwada.

English: A procurement ban bill seeks to deter corruption through strict penalties.
Kiswahili: Muswada wa marufuku ya ununuzi unalenga kuzuia ufisadi kupitia adhabu kali.
Ekegusii: Richiko riyia nigo ririgetie gotanga obokorekanu bwechikambani gose abanyabiasara baria abakorekanu goetera kwanga gokora emeremo neserikari goika emiaka 10 buna egesusuro.
Dholuo: Chenro mar golo chik marfuk chulo pesa dwaro geng'o mibadhi kokalo kuom kum mager.
Somali: Sharciga ka hortagga musuqmaasuqa waxaa loogu talagalay in la joojiyo musuqmaasuqa iyada oo loo marayo ciqaab adag.

English: Rise in robberies and unrest during protests calls for vigilance.
Kiswahili: Kuongezeka kwa wizi na machafuko wakati wa maandamano kunahitaji uangalifu.
Ekegusii: Okogeseka kwoboibi nechiminano chingaki chiokorobererekana neringana rigneti korigerigwa ase obongaini.
Dholuo: Kwan mar joma kwalo gik moko kod joma ok winjre e kindgi e kinde mag protest dwaro ni wabed motang'.
Somali: Si aad u soo baxdo boobka iyo rabshadaha inta lagu jiro banaanbaxyadu waxay u baahan yihiin taxaddar.

English: New report shows increased blogger harassment; verify safety online.
Kiswahili: Ripoti mpya inaonyesha ongezeko la unyanyasaji wa wanablogu; thibitisha usalama mtandaoni.
Ekegusii: Chiripoti chinyia nigo chikworokia buna baria bakorika amangana betenenete bagendererete komigwa; riganetie obokongoria koenekia.
Dholuo: Ripot manyien nyiso kaka sand mar josomo omedore; nonuru ni ginyalo bedo gi ritruok e Intanet.
Somali: Warbixin cusub ayaa muujineysa in dadka wax qoraya ay aad u dhib badan yihiin; waxay xaqiijineysaa amniga internetka.

English: Travelers should exercise high caution due to terror and unrest risks.
Kiswahili: Wasafiri wanapaswa kuwa waangalifu sana kutokana na hatari za ugaidi na machafuko.
Ekegusii: Abatari gose baria bare ase orogendo nebagwenerete koba maiso igoro yobokebago nemechando yeminano.
Dholuo: Joma wuotho onego obed motang' ahinya nikech gik manyalo kelo luoro kod ywaruok.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waa inay ka taxaddaraan cabsida iyo khatarta.

English: Experts warn of protest‑related unrest; avoid high‑risk areas.
Kiswahili: Wataalamu wanaonya kuhusu machafuko yanayohusiana na maandamano; epuka maeneo yenye hatari kubwa.
Ekegusii: Abamanyi barure ogokurera igoro yemonanokorwa ase okorobererekana na emonano ebwatekaine; kabe are korwa ase ayio.
Dholuo: Jotim nonro nyiso ni nitie gik manyalo kelo ywaruok e kind ji kod joma ok oyie gi puonjno; kendo gitemo matek mondo kik gibed gi timbe maricho.
Somali: Khubarada ayaa ka digaya banaanbaxyada rabshadaha; ka fogow meelaha sare ee Havanarisk.

English: Protests caused disruptions; stay alert and follow safety guidance.
Kiswahili: Maandamano yalisababisha usumbufu; kaa macho na fuata mwongozo wa usalama.
Ekegusii: Okorobererekana nigo kwaretete oturubano; kabe maiso na bwatia emeroberio yoborendi.
Dholuo: Gik ma ne otimore ne ji ne ok dhi maber; ne dwarore ni ibed motang' kendo iluw weche ma ne okor.
Somali: Banaanbaxyadu waxay keeneen rabshado; sii taxaddar oo raac tilmaamaha amniga.

English: US global caution highlights terrorism threats; stay vigilant.
Kiswahili: Tahadhari ya kimataifa ya Marekani inaangazia vitisho vya ugaidi; endelea kuwa macho.
Ekegusii: Ogokurerwa gochia ense korwa America nkworokia kore okonyarekana kwobokebago bokoruta chipomu; kabe maiso.
Dholuo: Weche ma Jo-US wacho e wi piny mangima nyiso ni nitie gik ma kelo luoro ji; beduru motang'.
Somali: Digniinta caalamiga ah waxay muujineysaa khatarta argagixisada; sii taxaddar.

English: Australia urges extreme caution due to crime and terrorism.
Kiswahili: Australia yatoa wito wa tahadhari kali kutokana na uhalifu na ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Australia yaboriruie koba maiso kegima ase engencho yobosaria bwokoruta chipomu.
Dholuo: Australia jiwo ahinya ni kik ng'ato wuondre nikech mahundu kod timbe mahundu.
Somali: Australia waxay ku boorineysaa in la taxaddaro xad dhaafka ah dambiyada iyo argagixisada.

English: KNCHR urges action on human rights abuses and safety risks.
Kiswahili: KNCHR yahimiza hatua kuchukuliwa dhidi ya ukiukwaji wa haki za binadamu na hatari za usalama.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwanerera oboronge bwanyabwanto (KNCHR) giasabire egetambokero igoro yogokorerwa bobe goge kogosereria oborendi bwomonto.
Dholuo: KNCHR jiwo ahinya mondo otim kinda e tieko ketho ratiro mag dhano kod gik manyalo miyo ngima ji obed matek.
Somali: KCHR waxay ku boorineysaa tallaabooyin looga hortago xadgudubyada xuquuqda aadanaha iyo khataraha amniga.

English: Terror threats remain high; avoid high‑profile crowded areas.
Kiswahili: Vitisho vya ugaidi vinabaki juu; epuka maeneo yenye msongamano mkubwa.
Ekegusii: Obwoba bogakwa chipomu nigo bore igoro; erende toba ase omosangerekano bwa abanto abange.
Dholuo: Kata kamano, nitie gik ma nyalo miyo ji obed gi luoro mang'eny.
Somali: Waxaa weli jira khatarro badan; ka fogaada meelaha dadku ka buuxaan.

English: Enhanced airport and public‑space security aims to protect visitors.
Kiswahili: Usalama ulioimarishwa wa viwanja vya ndege na anga za umma unalenga kuwalinda wageni.
Ekegusii: Oborendi bwebitii biechindege nechisitechi chiokorinera chirori oborendi bwagesirwe borengete korenda abanto, abageni bagocha aiga nense.
Dholuo: Tego sirkal mar ndege kod sirkal mar alwora dwaro rito jowuoth.
Somali: Garoonka diyaaradaha iyo nabadgelyada diyaaradaha dadweynaha waxaa loogu talagalay inay ilaaliyaan dadka soo booqda.

English: UN urges transparent investigations after protest fatalities.
Kiswahili: Umoja wa Mataifa wahimiza uchunguzi wa wazi baada ya vifo vya waandamanaji.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwechinse chikwegambera (UN) bwaboririe obutuki bwa maiso marore nyuma yabarobererekani koumia.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar Pinje dwaro ni otim nonro e wi joma notho nikech akwede.
Somali: Qaramada Midoobay waxay ku boorineysaa in baaritaano cad loo sameeyo dhimashada dadka mudaaharaadayaasha ah.

English: US warns of road closures and heavy security in Nairobi CBD.
Kiswahili: Marekani yaonya kuhusu kufungwa kwa barabara na ulinzi mkali katika eneo la katikati mwa jiji la Nairobi.
Ekegusii: America yarure ogokurerwa igoro yogosiekwa chipara nobonge bwabasikari aaria etaoni gati ya Nairobi.
Dholuo: Amerka chiwo siem kuom twech mag ndara kod rit matek e Nairobi CBD.
Somali: Maraykanka ayaa ka digay in la xiro waddooyinka iyo amniga magaalada Nairobi CBD.

English: Kenya will adjust curfew hours in Turkana and Kainuk due to improved security.
Kiswahili: Kenya itarekebisha saa za kutotoka nje huko Turkana na Kainuk kutokana na usalama ulioimarishwa.
Ekegusii: Kenya nebangete korigeria keboyia chingaki abanto babwenerete korwa isiko kogenda chinka aaria Turkana na Kainuk ekiagera oborendi bwabeire buya ake.
Dholuo: Kenya biro rieyo seche mag wuok e dhoot e Turkana kod Kainuk nikech sirkal medo bedo gi rit maber.
Somali: Kenya ayaa hagaajin doonta saacadaha guriga ee Turkana iyo Kainuk si loo ilaaliyo amniga.

English: July 7 protests expected; avoid major towns and demonstrations.
Kiswahili: Maandamano ya Julai 7 yanatarajiwa; kuepuka miji mikubwa na maandamano.
Ekegusii: Abarobererekani bechitriki 7 chiomotieny 7 ebakagerete; kabe are nemechie emenene nokoroberekana.
Dholuo: Ne igeno ni ibiro tim gik ma ne dhi timore e dwe mar Julai 7, kendo ne ok idhi tim gik ma ne dhi timore e taonde madongo.
Somali: 7-dii Luulyo waxaa la filayay dibadbaxyo; ka fogaada magaalooyinka waaweyn iyo dibadbaxyada.

English: Government issued directives on firearm use, including shoot‑to‑leg order.
Kiswahili: Serikali ilitoa maagizo kuhusu matumizi ya silaha, ikiwa ni pamoja na amri ya kupigana risasi hadi mguu.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yaruete richiko buna chibunduki chigotumaka, amo nokorasa abanto amagoro.
Dholuo: Sirkal ne ogolo chike ma ne nyiso ni onego oti gi gige lweny, moriwo nyaka chik mar goyo asere.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay soo saartay amar ku saabsan hubka, oo ay ku jiraan amar lagu toogto Ingiriiska.

English: Interior Ministry condemned attacks on security installations.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Mambo ya Ndani ililaani mashambulizi dhidi ya vituo vya usalama.
Ekegusii: Eminisitiri yoborendi bwaime Inogo yaroche bobe ogosariwa kwebinto bieserikari.
Dholuo: Ministry of Interior nokwedo monj ma ne otim e ute mag sirkal.
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha ayaa cambaareysay weerarada lagu qaaday xarumaha amniga.

English: Police in Malindi cutting juvenile crime through new initiatives.
Kiswahili: Polisi mjini Malindi wapunguza uhalifu wa vijana kupitia mipango mipya.
Ekegusii: Abasikari aaria Malindi babogoirie ebitambokero biogotanga obosari gati yabana goetra emeroberio emyia.
Dholuo: Polise e piny Malindi, medo tieko timbe mahundu mag nyithindo matindo kokalo kuom chenro manyien.
Somali: Booliska Malindi waxay yareeyaan dambiyada dhalinyarada iyada oo loo marayo tallaabooyin cusub.

English: Garissa schools receive armed security after fatal attack.
Kiswahili: Shule za Garissa zapokea ulinzi wa kijeshi baada ya shambulio la kuua.
Ekegusii: Chisukuru chia Garissa chiaeirwe aabasikari babwate chibunduki nyuma yogosaganwa.
Dholuo: Bang' lweny ma ne otimore e skul mar Garissa, sirkal ne omiye sirkal mar rito skul.
Somali: Dugsiyada Garissa waxaa lagu ilaaliyaa hub ka dib weerarkii dilka ahaa.

English: KEPHIS boosts seed security at borders to prevent threats.
Kiswahili: KEPHIS inaimarisha usalama wa mbegu mipakani ili kuzuia vitisho.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe gia Kenya gesugurigete nechimbego chiogosimeka mogondo (KEPHIS) bagesire oborendi bwechimbego aaria chimbebe erio gotange okogoswa.
Dholuo: KEPHIS jiwo rito kodhi e tong' mondo kik gikethgi.
Somali: TEFIS waxay kor u qaadeysaa amniga miraha xadka si looga hortago khatarta.

English: Parts of Marsabit declared disturbed; follow security protocols.
Kiswahili: Sehemu za Marsabit zilitangazwa kusumbuliwa; kufuata itifaki za usalama.
Ekegusii: Abarai Marsabit batebire nga orogongo orwo nigo rore ase ogsaganwa naigo baborirwa omorembe; bwtia amachiko oborendi.
Dholuo: Gik moko moko moko ma Marsabit ne okethore, kendo ne giluwo chike mag rito ngima.
Somali: Goobaha Marsabit ayaa lagu dhawaaqay in ay yihiin kuwo aan caadi aheyn; waa in la raacaa tallaabooyinka amniga.

English: IG banned arms in disturbed areas; surrender weapons to police.
Kiswahili: IG ilipiga marufuku silaha katika maeneo yenye vurugu; walisalimisha silaha kwa polisi.
Ekegusii: Omorai omonene bwa'basikari (IG) ochikire abanto gotwara chibunduki aaria ase are nechisagano; Bwatoka chibundukigochia ase abasikari.
Dholuo: IG ne ogolo chik mar golo gige lweny e alwora ma ne okethore; ne ochiwo gige lweny ne polise.
Somali: IG waxay mamnuucday hubka meelaha ay ka dhacday rabshadaha; kuwaas oo siiyay hubka booliiska.

English: UN concerned over protest deaths; calls for accountability.
Kiswahili: Umoja wa Mataifa una wasiwasi kuhusu vifo vya waandamanaji; wito wa uwajibikaji.
Ekegusii: Obiomo bwechinse chikwegambera (UN) nechandegete igoro yamakweri abaria bare koroberekana; baboririe eserikari kobogoria obobe obwo.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar Pinje (UN) parore kuom tho mar joma ne kedo; ogwelo mondo okel bura.
Somali: Qaramada Midoobay waxay ka walaacsan tahay dhimashada mudaaharaadyada; waxaad u baahan tahay inaad mas'uul ka noqotid.

English: US warns of security force deployments; avoid protest zones.
Kiswahili: Marekani yaonya kuhusu kupelekwa kwa vikosi vya usalama; epuka maeneo ya maandamano.
Ekegusii: America yarure ogokurerwa igoro yogotoma basikari; kabe are korwa chinsemo chiria abanto bakorobererekana.
Dholuo: Amerka chiwo siem kuom wach tiyo gi jolweny mag sirkal; tang' gi kuonde ma ji timoe kampen.
Somali: Maraykanka ayaa ka digaya ciidamada ilaalada; ka fogaada meelaha dibadbaxyada ka dhaca.

English: Canada warns travelers of protests and potential disruptions.
Kiswahili: Kanada inawaonya wasafiri kuhusu maandamano na usumbufu unaoweza kutokea.
Ekegusii: Canada yarure ogokurerwa gochia ase baria bakogenda chisafari igoro yokoroberekna amo nkoba gwechiburaburu.
Dholuo: Kanada chiwo siem ne jowuoth ni nitie gik ma nyalo ketho tij lendo.
Somali: Kanada waxay dadka socotada ah uga digtay mudaaharaadyada iyo waxyaabo khatar gelin kara.

English: Nationwide Saba Saba protests expected; avoid busy areas.
Kiswahili: Maandamano ya Saba Saba kote nchini yanatarajiwa; epuka maeneo yenye shughuli nyingi.
Ekegusii: Okoroberekana gwa Saba Saba gokageire; kabe are naase abwate abanto abange.
Dholuo: Ne igeno ni ji biro timo gik ma ne dhi miyo ji owuog e alwora ma ji ng'enyie.
Somali: Dibadbaxyo duufaan ah ayaa laga filayay dalka Saba oo dhan; ka fogaada meelaha mashquulka badan.

English: KEPHIS increases border surveillance to curb biosecurity risks.
Kiswahili: KEPHIS huongeza ufuatiliaji wa mipaka ili kupunguza hatari za usalama wa kibiolojia.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gekorosia chimbusuro chiogosimeka na gochibaga (KEPHIS) kiagesire obomongeria ase chimbebe gotanga ogosoigwa gwechimbego chiapandia na gotanga amarwaire ase oboremi.
Dholuo: KEPHIS medo rito tong' mondo oketh nengo mag ritruok mag ngima.
Somali: KEFIS waxay xoojineysaa baaritaanka xuduudaha si looga hortago khataraha badbaadada noolaha.

English: Malindi police report reduced youth crime.
Kiswahili: Polisi wa Malindi waripoti kupungua kwa uhalifu wa vijana.
Ekegusii: Polisi ya Malindi yaminyirwe igoro yogokeana kwobosaria ase abasae.
Dholuo: Ripot mar polise mar Malindi nyiso ni timbe mahundu mag rowere osedok chien.
Somali: Warbixinta booliska Malin waxay yareysay dambiyada dhalinyarada.

English: Garissa schools receive armed protection after attack.
Kiswahili: Shule za Garissa hupokea ulinzi wa silaha baada ya shambulio.
Ekegusii: Chisukuru chia Garissa chianyore oborendi korwa abasikari babwate chibunduki nyuma yogosaganwa.
Dholuo: Bang' monjno, sirkal rito skul mag Garissa gi gige lweny.
Somali: Dugsiyada Garissa waxaa lagu ilaaliyaa hubka weerarka ka dib.

English: Marsabit areas under security declaration; comply with rules.
Kiswahili: Maeneo ya Marsabit chini ya tamko la usalama; zingatia sheria.
Ekegusii: Chinsemo chia Marsabit chiabekirwe inse yoborendi bweserikari; igwera amachiko yoborendi.
Dholuo: kuonde ma marsabit nitie e bwo sirkal mar rito weche; luw chike.
Somali: Goobaha Marsabit ee ku hoos jira bayaanka ammaanka; raac sharciyada.

English: IG bans possession of arms in designated areas.
Kiswahili: IG inapiga marufuku umiliki wa silaha katika maeneo yaliyotengwa.
Ekegusii: Omonene bwa'basikari IG okanire abanto kobogoria gose koba nechibunduki emeyega gose ogosangerekana gokobera.
Dholuo: IG ok oyie gi bedo gi gige lweny e alwora ma ji oyiero.
Somali: IG waxay mamnuucday hubka laga leeyahay meelaha la doortay.

English: WHO warns of virus outbreak; follow safety advisories.
Kiswahili: WHO yaonya kuhusu mlipuko wa virusi; fuata ushauri wa usalama.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwense bwobochenu (WHO) bwarure ogokurera ogoro yomwateko bwenyinyi; bwatia amachiko obosemia.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar thieth mar piny mangima (WHO) chiwo siem kuom kaka tuwo mar virus nyalo landore; luw siem ma ochiw mondo okonygi.
Somali: Hay'adda WHO waxay ka digtay faafitaanka fayraska; raac la-taliyayaasha amniga.

English: UK urges vigilance due to terrorism and public order risks.
Kiswahili: Uingereza yahimiza tahadhari kutokana na hatari za ugaidi na utulivu wa umma.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwa Bongeresa (UK) bwasabire koba maiso ase engencho yobokebago bwokoruta chipomu naboigo hatari ase abanainchi.
Dholuo: UK jiwo ahinya mondo gibed motang' nikech timbe mahundu kod weche ma kelo chandruok ne oganda.
Somali: Boqortooyada Ingiriiska ayaa soo jeedinaysa in la taxaddaro argagixisada iyo khatarta ka jirta isku dhafka dadweynaha.

English: US warns of Nairobi CBD protests; plan movement carefully.
Kiswahili: Marekani yaonya kuhusu maandamano ya CBD jijini Nairobi; panga harakati kwa uangalifu.
Ekegusii: America (US) yarure ogokurera gochia ensemo ya gati gati yomochie o'Nairobi igoro yokoroberekana; banga buna ogotara nobongaini.
Dholuo: Amerka chiwo siem kuom gik ma biro timore e Nairobi CBD; chano mos weche ma biro timore.
Somali: Maraykanka ayaa ka digaya banaanbaxyada Nairobi CBD; qorshaha dhaqdhaqaaqa banaanbaxa si taxadar leh.

English: Canada warns of terrorism near borders; avoid border areas.
Kiswahili: Kanada yaonya kuhusu ugaidi karibu na mipaka; epuka maeneo ya mpakani.
Ekegusii: Canada yarure ogokurerwa igoro yogoakwa chipomu chimbebe chia Kenya; kabe are nechimbebe.
Dholuo: Kanada chiwo siem kuom timbe mahundu machiegni gi tong'gi; tang' gi kuonde ma tong'gi nitie.
Somali: Kanada waxay ka digtaa argagixisada xuduudaha; ka fogaada meelaha xuduudaha.

English: Rise in robberies during protests calls for stronger security planning.
Kiswahili: Kuongezeka kwa wizi wakati wa maandamano kunahitaji mipango imara ya usalama.
Ekegusii: Ogokina bwoboibi chingaki chiokoroberekana negatie omoroberio omuya bwoborendi.
Dholuo: Kwan mar joma ne kwalo e kinde mag protest ne omedore ahinya, omiyo ne dwarore ni gibed gi chenro maber mar rito sirkal.
Somali: Xadgudubyada sii kordhaya ee ka dhaca banaanbaxyada waxay u baahan yihiin nidaamyo ammaan oo aad u xoogan.

English: Revised Turkana curfew aims to maintain peace.
Kiswahili: Amri ya kutotoka nje iliyorekebishwa Turkana inalenga kudumisha amani.
Ekegusii: Amachiko amayia yogotanga abanto tibatoka isiko gochakera chinsa gete goika chinsa gete aaris norengete kobeka omorembe.
Dholuo: Chenro mar turkana mar weyo ji e dho wath ma ne oloki, dwaro ni kuwe obedie.
Somali: Revised Turkana, oo guriga ku soo laabtay, wuxuu doonayaa inuu nabadda ilaaliyo.

English: KNCHR urges caution after violent protests.
Kiswahili: KNCHR yatoa wito wa tahadhari baada ya maandamano ya vurugu.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenen kerendete oboronge bwanyabanto (KNCHR) giasabire abanto maiso nyuma yogosaganwa.
Dholuo: KNCHR jiwo ni ji obed motang' bang' timo gik maricho.
Somali: KCHR waxay ku baaqeysaa taxaddar ka dib mudaaharaadyada rabshadaha leh.

English: Gang violence rising in Nakuru; report suspicious activity.
Kiswahili: Vurugu za genge la wahalifu zaongezeka Nakuru; ripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Ogosagananigwa nebikundi biabasaria aaria Nakuru; karue eripoti ase abagambi gose abasikari igoro yebikoru biechitang'utang'u.
Dholuo: Timbe mahundu mag jonjore medore e Nakuru; wach timbe maok kare.
Somali: Kooxo dambiilayaal ah oo ku sugan Naquru; waxay soo sheegaan waxqabadyo shaki leh.

English: US warns of CBD closures; review personal safety.
Kiswahili: Marekani yaonya kuhusu kufungwa kwa CBD; tathmini usalama wa kibinafsi.
Ekegusii: America (US) yarure ogokurera igoro yogosiekwa gati gati yomochie o'Nairobi; regereria keboyia amachiko ao yokwerenda.
Dholuo: Amerka chiwo siem kuom wach tieko tiyo gi CBD; nonro mar ritruok mar ng'ato owuon.
Somali: Maraykanku wuxuu ka digay in la xiro CBD; iska ilaali ammaanka shakhsiga ah.

English: Coastal counties face disputes; remain vigilant.
Kiswahili: Kaunti za pwani zinakabiliwa na migogoro; endelea kuwa macho.
Ekegusii: Chikaonti chire mbarabare na nyancha nchirigereretie ogotaigwanana; kabe maiso.
Dholuo: Koth manie pinyno nigi ywaruok; to beduru motang'.
Somali: Tirada xeebta waxay la kulmaan khilaafaad; waxay sii wadaan inay feejignaadaan.

English: UN calls for accountability after protester deaths.
Kiswahili: Umoja wa Mataifa watoa wito wa uwajibikaji baada ya vifo vya waandamanaji.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwechinse chikwegambera (UN) bwasabire nga eserikari ebogorie obobe bwabete ekero giokorobererekana abwo ase abarobererekani baitetwe ase okoraswa.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar Pinje dwaro ni ji ochiw paro bang' tho mar jo ma ne dhi e lweny.
Somali: Qaramada Midoobay waxay dooneysaa mas'uuliyadda dhimashada dadka mudaaharaadka ah.

English: Security risks rising; remain alert near Somalia border.
Kiswahili: Hatari za usalama zinaongezeka; endelea kuwa macho karibu na mpaka wa Somalia.
Ekegusii: Amang'ana agendererete nkworokia are ng'a oborendi mbogenderete gosareka. Kabe maiso ekore ore ange na Somali.
Dholuo: Gik ma nyalo kelo hinyruok medo bedoe; dhi nyime bedo motang' machiegni gi tong' mar Somalia.
Somali: Khataraha amniga ayaa soo ifbaxaya; ka taxaddar xadka Soomaaliya.

English: WHO urges vigilance in virus outbreak response.
Kiswahili: WHO yahimiza umakini katika kukabiliana na mlipuko wa virusi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kiobochenu bwense yasabire abanto babe maiso buna enchera eyemo yokorwania ogwateka kwebinyinyi.
Dholuo: WHO jiwo ahinya ni mondo wabed motang' sama tuoche ma kamago chakore.
Somali: Ururka Caafimaadka Caafimaadka (WHO) wuxuu ku boorinayaa in la taxaddaro sida uu u falcelinayo faafitaanka fayraska.

English: UK urges caution in urban centers due to terrorism threats.
Kiswahili: Uingereza yatoa wito wa tahadhari katika vituo vya mijini kutokana na vitisho vya ugaidi.
Ekegusii: Obomo bwa Boraya (UK) bwasabire abanto koba maiso gatigati yechitaoni ase engencho yokogoswa nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu.
Dholuo: UK jiwo ahinya ni ji obed motang' e mier madongo nikech weche ma ji wacho ni kelo luoro.
Somali: Boqortooyada Ingiriiska ayaa kor u qaadeysa digniinta xarumaha magaalooyinka sababo la xiriira hanjabaadaha argagixisada.

English: Interior Ministry highlights week of tightened enforcement.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Mambo ya Ndani yaangazia wiki ya utekelezaji mkali.
Ekegusii: Omominisita bwoborendi bwaime yamanyirie abakenya igoro yogokongia yoborendi.
Dholuo: Tij Lando Wacho e Piny owacho nyiso ni juma mar rito chikego biro bedo matek.
Somali: Wasaaradda Arrimaha Gudaha ayaa soo bandhigtay toddobaad adag oo fulinta ah.
