Somali: Dadka deggan magaalooyinkaas waxay ku dhibtoonayaan helitaanka biyaha iyo adeegyada aasaasiga ah.

English: Educate on legal consequences of ethnic incitement.
Kiswahili: Kuelimisha kuhusu matokeo ya kisheria ya uchochezi wa kikabila.
Ekegusii: Somia abanto komanya obobe bwogosegeta chiburaburu gati yebisaku.
Dholuo: Puonj ji kuom gik ma ketho oganda moro nyalo kelo.
Somali: Xusuusnow cawaaqibka sharciga ah ee rabshadaha qowmiyadaha.

English: Campaign to end stigma against mental health patients.
Kiswahili: Kampeni ya kukomesha unyanyapaa dhidi ya wagonjwa wa afya ya akili.
Ekegusii: Omoroberio bwogosemia gotanga gochaya abarwaire bebiregerio biobongo.
Dholuo: Puonj oganda mondo otiek chayo joma nigi tuoche mag obwongo.
Somali: Olole lagu joojinayo ceebta dadka qaba cudurka dhimirka.

English: Explain legal rights when arrested to the public.
Kiswahili: Eleza haki za kisheria unapokamatwa kwa umma.
Ekegusii: Manyia abanto oboronge bwao bwamachiko ekero kwabwatirwe nabanto.
Dholuo: Ler ne ji duto ratiro ma in-go mar bedo e bwo chik ka ikete e jela.
Somali: Faahfaahin ka bixi xuquuqda sharciga ah ee dadka lagu qabto.

English: Protect children from forced marriages; raise awareness.
Kiswahili: Linda watoto dhidi ya ndoa za kulazimishwa; ongeza uelewa.
Ekegusii: Renda abana korwa enywomo ya mapema; manyia abanto.
Dholuo: Rit nyithindo kik kendgi gi thuon; jiwo ji mondo ong'e wachno.
Somali: Carruurta ka ilaali guurka qasabka ah; horumari waxgarashada.

English: Safeguard personal data on social media.
Kiswahili: Linda data binafsi kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Ekegusii: Renda amangana igoro yao are ase eintaneti.
Dholuo: Rit ratiro mag ji marito tudruok.
Somali: Ilaali macluumaadkaaga shakhsiyeed ee shabakadaha bulshada.

English: Promote awareness on winning discrimination cases.
Kiswahili: Kukuza uelewa kuhusu kushinda kesi za ubaguzi.
Ekegusii: Segeta okomanya igoro yokobua ebina biogobaguliwa.
Dholuo: Jiw ji mondo ong'e kaka inyalo loyo kes mag buono ji.
Somali: Waxay kor u qaadeysaa fahamka ku saabsan ka gudbinta kiisaska takoorka.

English: Train citizens on accessing government documents.
Kiswahili: Wafunze raia kuhusu kupata hati za serikali.
Ekegusii: Somia abanto buna baranyare goikera amang'ana eserikari.
Dholuo: Tieg raia mondo obed gi thuolo mar somo buge mag sirkal.
Somali: Waxbarashada muwaadiniinta ku saabsan helitaanka dukumiintiyada dowladda.

English: Showcase corruption exposés that led to policy changes.
Kiswahili: Onyesha ufichuzi wa ufisadi uliosababisha mabadiliko ya sera.
Ekegusii: Ogwasioria kwobokorekanu kwaretete oboonchoreria ase amachiko.
Dholuo: Nyis kaka ne nitie mibadhi ma ne omiyo sirkal oloko chenro mopogore
Somali: Faahfaahinta musuqmaasuqa waxay keentay isbeddel siyaasadeed.

English: Campaign for free sanitary pads in schools.
Kiswahili: Kampeni ya kupata pedi za usafi bila malipo shuleni.
Ekegusii: Okoboria ng'a ebitambaa biokorenda abana abanyaroka besukuru chingaki chiabichiomotieny bia bosa.
Dholuo: Land ne ji mondo giyud piende mag mako dwe maonge chudo e skunde.
Somali: Olole lagu soo bandhigo qalabka qashinka lagu tuuro dugsiyada oo lacag la'aan ah.

English: Train police in non-discriminatory policing.
Kiswahili: Wafunze polisi katika sera zisizo na ubaguzi.
Ekegusii: Somia abasikari igoro yamachiko yogotabagua abanto.
Dholuo: Tieg polise e yor rito ji e yo maonge nyagruok
Somali: Ciidamada booliiska ku tababar banaanbaxyo aan kala sooc lahayn.

English: Report accessibility issues in public buildings for disabled persons.
Kiswahili: Ripoti matatizo ya ufikiaji katika majengo ya umma kwa watu wenye ulemavu.
Ekegusii: Orokia ase chinchera chiabaremaru chire ase chinyomba chiekorofa kobakonya korina.
Dholuo: Land kuonde ma joma nigi ng'ol nyalo luwo
Somali: Warbixin ku saabsan arrimaha dadka naafada ah laga heli karo guryaha dadweynaha.

English: Host panels for victims of ethnic discrimination.
Kiswahili: Waandaaji wa majopo kwa ajili ya waathiriwa wa ubaguzi wa kikabila.
Ekegusii: Kabe nechinkwana chiogosemia na gokonyana ase baria bapaguriigwe kebosaku.
Dholuo: Los tuak ne joma osekale nyagruok nikech dhok magiwacho
Somali: Soo dhaweynta dhibanayaasha cunsuriyada.

English: Educate on bail and bond rights.
Kiswahili: Kuelimisha kuhusu dhamana na haki za dhamana.
Ekegusii: manyia abanto igoro yokobeka ebondi na oboronge bwomonto kobeka ebondi.
Dholuo: Puonjri weche mag twech ne joma osemaki kod sirkal.
Somali: Dammaanadda iyo xuquuqda damaanadda.

English: Investigate abuse of domestic workers; raise public awareness.
Kiswahili: Chunguza unyanyasaji wa wafanyakazi wa majumbani; ongeza uelewa wa umma.
Ekegusii: Tuka buya amangana yabakori emeremo yechinka; Kongia okomanyia abanto obobe bwogokorera bobe abakori emeremo bnka.
Dholuo: Nonro mar timbe maricho ma itimo ne jotich ma tiyo e ot; jiwo ji mondo ong'e wachno.
Somali: U fiirso isticmaalka xun ee shaqaalaha guriga; u kordhiyo fahamka dadweynaha.

English: Report any unethical conduct in your community to protect public resources and strengthen institutions
Kiswahili: Ripoti mwenendo wowote usio wa kimaadili katika jamii yako ili kulinda rasilimali za umma na kuimarisha taasisi
Ekegusii: Karwe eripoti igoro yebinto ebibe bigenderete ase ekenyoro kiao erio korenda enibo yekenyoro na gokongia obokoreri.
Dholuo: Ket ranyisi mar timbe maok nyis tim makare e alworau mondo irit mwandu mag oganda kendo ijiw riwruoge
Somali: Warbixi habdhaqan kasta oo xun oo bulshadaada ka jira si loo ilaaliyo hantida dadweynaha loona xoojiyo ururada

English: Promote youth inclusion in decision-making; get involved in local governance.
Kiswahili: Kukuza ushirikishwaji wa vijana katika kufanya maamuzi; kushiriki katika utawala wa ndani.
Ekegusii: Segeta okobwaterana nabasae ase okorosia amachiko; sanga ase obogambi bwekenyoro.
Dholuo: Jiw rowere mondo oriw lwedo timo yiero; riwo lwedo loch mar alwora.
Somali: Dhallinyarada ka qaybqaadashada go'aan qaadashada sii wad; ka qaybqaad dawladaha deegaanka.

English: Train journalists on unbiased reporting; uphold media integrity.
Kiswahili: Kuwafunza waandishi wa habari kuhusu kuripoti bila upendeleo; kudumisha uadilifu wa vyombo vya habari.
Ekegusii: Egeria abariki amangana ase enchera etari koengera gochia ensemo eyemo; Beka motwe amachiko yoboriki
Dholuo: Tieg jolendo mondo oland wach ma ok gidonjre; rit ratiro mar weche midwaro.
Somali: Warbaahinta ku tababar warbixin aan kala sooc lahayn; ilaali daacadnimada warbaahinta.

English: Share former inmate experiences to advocate for prison reforms.
Kiswahili: Shiriki uzoefu wa wafungwa wa zamani ili kutetea mageuzi ya magereza.
Ekegusii: Tumia emegano korwa bariabasibirwe chichera gosuma amaonchorerio buna abasibwa bakorendwa.
Dholuo: Wuo gi joma ne otwe chon mondo gikony otim lokruok e jela.
Somali: Ka qaybqaado aragtida maxbuuskii hore si aad u taageerto dib-u-habeynta xabsiga.

English: Provide confidential helplines for LGBTQ+ Kenyans facing violence.
Kiswahili: Toa simu za usaidizi za siri kwa Wakenya wa LGBTQ+ wanaokabiliwa na vurugu.
Ekegusii: Karwe chinamba chiabobisi korangeria ogokonya ase baria baitabete obwanchani bwa abasacha ase abasacha, abakungu ase abakungu na baria kimaumbire batari bakungu gose basacha - babwate obosacha nobokungu amo bionsi aiga Kenya abwo bagendererte gokorebwa bobe.
Dholuo: Chiw kony ma ok oket e wi weche mag nindruok ne jo Kenya ma gin jo LGBTQ + ma romo gi gero.
Somali: Kaalmada qarsoodiga ah ee loogu talagalay dadka LGBTQ+ ee Kenya ee la kulma rabshadaha.

English: Support mobile legal aid clinics serving rural communities.
Kiswahili: Saidia kliniki za usaidizi wa kisheria zinazohamishika zinazohudumia jamii za vijijini.
Ekegusii: Konya, karwe chibesa, na roberia buna orabwaterane nabagambi ebina kotini goikera baria bare risabu korwa obogambi bwa bosa kobakonya konyora ekeene kiabo.
Dholuo: Sir kuonde thieth ma ji tiyogo e gwenge ma ji odakie.
Somali: Ku taageero xarumaha taageerada taleefanka gacanta ee u adeega bulshada miyiga ah.

English: Highlight stories of transgender students fighting for education rights.
Kiswahili: Angazia hadithi za wanafunzi waliobadili jinsia wanaopigania haki za elimu.
Ekegusii: Karwe emegano yabanna baria batari basacha gose bakungu - bare bionsi bnagendererete korwanerera oboronge bwabo.
Dholuo: Nyis ane kaka jopuonjre ma oloko kido mar chuech kedo ne ratiro mag yudo somo.
Somali: Xusuusnow arimaha ardayda xuduudaha ka gudbaya oo u dagaalamaya xuquuqda waxbarashada.

English: Showcase success stories of refugees integrating into Kenyan communities.
Kiswahili: Onyesha hadithi za mafanikio za wakimbizi waliojiunga na jamii za Kenya.
Ekegusii: Manyia igoro yokogenderera kwa baria batamire chisegi korwa sobo komenya buna Abakenya.
Dholuo: Nyis kaka joma oringo thuchegi osedak mochanore gi Jo-Kenya.
Somali: Bal faahfaahin ku saabsan guulaha qaxootiga ku soo biiray Kenya.

English: Transform street children’s lives through shelter programs.
Kiswahili: Badilisha maisha ya watoto wa mitaani kupitia programu za makazi.
Ekegusii: Onchoreria obogima bwa abana bamenyete ebisona ase chitaoni ase okobaa oboraro nechinchera chiokobaonchoreria gochia obogime obuya.
Dholuo: Lok ngima nyithindo manie nderni kokalo kuom chenro mag kuonde dak.
Somali: Carruurta waddooyinka lagu beddelo waxay ku noolaadaan barnaamijyada guryaha.

English: Educate the public on ongoing legal reforms promoting equality.
Kiswahili: Kuelimisha umma kuhusu mageuzi ya kisheria yanayoendelea yanayokuza usawa.
Ekegusii: Manyia abanto igoro yamaonchorerio agendererete arengete oboreng'ananu bwa abanto bonsi.
Dholuo: Puonj ji e wi lokruok mag chike matimore e piny mangima mondo okony ji obed gi winjruok maber gi jomoko.
Somali: Dadweynaha u baro isbeddellada sharciga ee sii kordhaya sinnaanta.

English: Advocate for better mental healthcare in correctional facilities.
Kiswahili: Tetea huduma bora ya afya ya akili katika vituo vya kurekebisha tabia.
Ekegusii: Rwanerera oborendi obuya bwabarwaire bobongo goetera obobwenia obuya aaria ase bakorenderwa.
Dholuo: Kony ji mondo oyud thieth maber e ute joma itweyo.
Somali: Taageerayaasha daryeelka caafimaadka maskaxda ee ugu fiican ee qalabka hagaajinta dabeecadda.

English: Expose forced labor in agriculture through undercover investigations.
Kiswahili: Kufichua kazi ya kulazimishwa katika kilimo kupitia uchunguzi wa siri.
Ekegusii: Asioria ogokorigwa emeremo otancheti ase oboremi goetera obotuki bwansense.
Dholuo: Ket tich marfuk e tij pur kokalo kuom nonro mitimo apanda
Somali: Muuji inaad ku qasban tahay inaad ka shaqeyso beeraha baaritaanka qarsoodiga ah.

English: Teach endangered native languages in schools to preserve cultural heritage.
Kiswahili: Fundisha lugha za asili zilizo hatarini kutoweka shuleni ili kuhifadhi urithi wa kitamaduni.
Ekegusii: Somia omonwa iono ase esukuru ase engencho yokorenda oboikeranu bwekienyechi kiaino.
Dholuo: Puonjuru nyithindo dhok mopogore e skunde mondo orit gikeni mag oganda.
Somali: Waxbarashada luuqadaha deegaanka ee khatarta ku ah dugsiga si loo ilaaliyo dhaxalka dhaqanka.

English: Use official hotlines and online portals to anonymously report corruption for prompt law enforcement action.
Kiswahili: Tumia simu rasmi za dharura na milango ya mtandaoni kuripoti ufisadi bila kujulikana kwa ajili ya hatua za haraka za utekelezaji wa sheria.
Ekegusii: Tumia chiraini chieinteneti chiabeene na chiria korwa eripoti igoro igoro yobokorekanu otari kwemanyekani erio ebitambokero bibogorigwe
Dholuo: Ti gi simo ma sirkal kod websait mag apanda mondo ichop repot mag ketho chike ne abila
Somali: Isticmaal bogga rasmiga ah si aad u ogeysiiso musuqmaasuqa si qarsoodi ah oo loogu talagalay tallaabooyinka sharciga.

English: Learn how corruption affects services and educate your community to prevent it
Kiswahili: Jifunze jinsi rushwa inavyoathiri huduma na uelimishe jamii yako ili kuizuia
Ekegusii: Learn how corruption affects services and educate your community to prevent it
Dholuo: Puonjri kaka mibadhi chiko tije mag lendo kendo ikony ji mondo gikwed mibadhi
Somali: Baro saameynta musuqmaasuqku ku yeesho adeegga iyo barta bulshadaada inay ka hortagaan musuqmaasuqa

English: Demand accountability from public officials and uphold ethics to reduce corruption risks.
Kiswahili: Kudai uwajibikaji kutoka kwa maafisa wa umma na kudumisha maadili ili kupunguza hatari za rushwa.
Ekegusii: Boria komanyigwa buna abakori emeremo beserikari na renda ekeene gotanga obokorekanu.
Dholuo: Dwaruru jotelo mag sirkal ochiw paro kendo mondo omi gibed gi timbe mabeyo mondo giduok chien hinyruok ma nyalo bedoe nikech mibadhi.
Somali: Kuwa sheegta inay mas'uuliyiinta dawladda ka xisaabtami doonaan oo ay ku taageeri doonaan anshaxa si loo yareeyo halista musuqmaasuqa.

English: Addressing the country on Monday, November 3, 2025, after days of unrest that left several towns tense, President Samia said the government was closely monitoring the situation and urged citizens to uphold unity and calm as security agencies work to restore order.
Kiswahili: Akihutubia nchi hiyo siku ya Jumatatu, Novemba 3, 2025, baada ya siku za ghasia zilizoacha mvutano wa miji kadhaa, Rais Samia alisema serikali ilikuwa ikifuatilia kwa makini hali hiyo na kuwahimiza wananchi kudumisha umoja na utulivu wakati mashirika ya usalama yanapoendelea kufanya kazi ili kurudisha amani.
Ekegusii: Gokwanera ense rituko rietichirimo, omotienyi 11 chiatriki 3, omwaka 2025, nyuma yamatuko omoburukano ase emechie yechitaoni chinyinge kogoseka, Omoraisi Samia agateba ng'a eserikari nigo yare maiso ase ayagendererete na gosaba abanto babe nobomo na abatoereru ekiagera abarendi oborendi ngotema bare koirania obotoereru.
Dholuo: Kane owuoyo gi pinyno chieng' Tich Abich tarik adek, dwe mar apar gi achiel higa mar alufu ariyo gi piero ariyo kod abich, bang' ndalo mag lweny ma                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               ne ogoyo mier mang'eny, jatelo mar piny owacho, Samia, nowacho ni sirkal ne nono ahinya chal mar pinyno kendo ne ojiwo ji mondo osik ka gin gi winjruok kod kuwe e kindgi sama riwruoge mag sirkal dhi nyime gi tich mar duoko kwe.
Somali: Isniinta, Nofeembar 3, 2025, oo la hadlayay dalka ka dib maalmo rabshado ah oo ka dhigay magaalooyin badan oo xiiso leh, Madaxweyne Samia wuxuu sheegay in dowladda ay si dhow ula socoto xaaladda wuxuuna muwaadiniinta ugu baaqay inay ilaaliyaan midnimada iyo xasilloonida maadaama hay'adaha amniga ay ka shaqeeyaan sidii loo soo celin lahaa nidaamka.

English: The National Police Service has affirmed its commitment to the fight against narcotics and illicit brews while encouraging members of the public to support the fight by providing relevant information.
Kiswahili: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi imethibitisha kujitolea kwake katika mapambano dhidi ya dawa za kulevya na pombe haramu huku ikiwahimiza umma kuunga mkono mapambano hayo kwa kutoa taarifa muhimu.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kiobokoreri kia abasikari kuianekirie ng'a okwerua kwaye korwania amariogo agotindia amo namarua ekienyeji na gosegeta abanto kobabwatisia ase emerobeio eyio ase okobamanyia ase amangana ayio agokoreka.
Dholuo: Apis mar obila mar National Police Service osenyiso chiwruokne mar kedo gi yedhe mamero kod ohala mag yedhe mamero ka gijiwo ji mondo oriw lwedo lwenyno kuom chiwo weche mowinjore.
Somali: Ciidanka Booliska Qaranka ayaa xaqiijiyay in ay ka go'an tahay la dagaalanka daroogada iyo cabitaanka khamriga sharci darada ah isla markaana ay ku dhiirigelisay shacabka inay taageeraan dagaalka iyagoo siinaya macluumaad ku habboon.

English: We encourage members of the public to support the fight by providing relevant information, NPS added.
Kiswahili: Tunawahimiza wananchi kuunga mkono mapambano hayo kwa kutoa taarifa muhimu, NPS iliongeza.
Ekegusii: Nigo togesegeta abanto gotobwatisia esegi eye goetera okomanyia abasikari ayarengete obobe obwo , ekeombe keria kia abasikari (NPS) kiagesete.
Dholuo: Wajiyo oganda  duto mondo oriw lwedo lwenyno kuom chiwo weche madwarore," NPs nomedo waccho.
Somali: Waxaan ku dhiirigelinaynaa xubnaha dadweynaha inay taageeraan dagaalka iyagoo siinaya macluumaad ku habboon, ayuu intaas ku daray NPS.

English: Members of the public are encouraged to support this initiative by sharing information on suspicious activities and joining efforts to protect communities, especially the youth, from the dangers of drug and substance abuse, NPS said.
Kiswahili: Umma unahimizwa kuunga mkono mpango huu kwa kushiriki taarifa kuhusu shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka na kujiunga na juhudi za kulinda jamii, hasa vijana, kutokana na hatari za matumizi mabaya ya dawa za kulevya na dawa za kulevya, NPS ilisema.
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi basegetirwe kobwatisia omoroberio oyo ase okobwaterana goetera okomanyia abasikikari igoro yebikoru bare nechitang'utang'u nabirobio na ase oboama korende ebinyoro biabo, mono kegima abasae, kporwa ase omochando bwamariogo nebinto bigotindia, NPS batebete.
Dholuo: Riwruogno jiwo ji mondo oriw lwedo chenrono kuom pogo weche ewi gik ma chando ji kendo riwo lwedo kinda mar rito oganda, to moloyo rowere, kuom hinyruok mar tiyo marach gi yedhe mamero kod yedhe mamero, NPS ne owacho.
Somali: Shacabka waxaa lagu dhiirigelinayaa inay taageeraan mashruucan iyagoo la wadaagaya macluumaadka ku saabsan howlaha shakiga leh iyo inay wadaagaan dadaallada lagu ilaalinayo bulshooyinka, gaar ahaan dhalinyarada, khatarta daroogada iyo maandooriyaha, ayuu yiri NPS.

English: By 2 days ago EU urges Tanzanian authorities to exercise restraint amid post election unrest British High Commission in Tanzania advises against all but essential travel to the country, cites disruption and unrest following the October 29 election.
Kiswahili: Kufikia siku 2 zilizopita EU inawasihi mamlaka za Tanzania kujizuia kutokana na machafuko ya baada ya uchaguzi. Ubalozi Mkuu wa Uingereza nchini Tanzania unashauri dhidi ya safari zote isipokuwa muhimu kwenda nchini humo, unataja usumbufu na machafuko kufuatia uchaguzi wa Oktoba 29.
Ekegusii: Ase amartuko abere aerire ekeombe kiabomo bwa Bongeresa EU nigo kegosaba ng'a abarai ba Tanzanian berite ase eburaburu egendererete nyuma yobochori bware neminano bwaretete eburaburu, Omobarosi bwense ya British aaria Tanzania narwete ogosemia igoro ya ayio onsi korenda ase baria bakoyetarera Tanzania ase ngencho yomoburukano bwemechie ase engencho yechikura chintancheranetwe.
Dholuo: Odiechienge ariyo mosekalo, EU osebedo ka jiwo jotelo mag Tanzania mondo obed gi ritruok e kind gik ma ne otimore bang' yiero.
Somali: 2 maalmood ka hor Midowga Yurub wuxuu ugu baaqay mas'uuliyiinta Tansaaniya inay is-hoosaysiiyaan rabshadaha ka dambeeya doorashada. Guddiga sare ee Ingiriiska ee Tansaaniya wuxuu kula talinayaa in laga fogaado dhammaan safarada dalka marka laga reebo kuwa lagama maarmaanka u ah, isagoo tixraacaya jahwareerka iyo rabshadaha ka dambeeya doorashada 29 Oktoobar.

English: Met Department warns Kenyans to brace for heavy rainfall, cold nights of below 10 degrees Kenya 7 months ago by Didacus Malowa Kenyans should prepare for a prolonged bout of heavy rainfall and biting cold nights, with temperatures expected to plunge below 10Ã‚ °C in some regions.
Kiswahili: Idara ya Met yaonya Wakenya kujiandaa kwa mvua kubwa, usiku wa baridi chini ya nyuzi joto 10 Kenya miezi 7 iliyopita na Didacus Malowa Wakenya wanapaswa kujiandaa kwa kipindi kirefu cha mvua kubwa na usiku wa baridi kali, huku halijoto ikitarajiwa kushuka chini ya nyuzi joto 10 katika baadhi ya maeneo.
Ekegusii: Abarengi rire barure ogokurerwa igorbore inse yechidigiri 10 emetienyi 7 yaetire goetera Didacus Malowa nere buya Abakenya kwearigania ase embura entanbe amo nobokengentu botuko, abwo ase riberera rirabe inse kegima yechidigiri 10Ã‚ °ase chingongo gete.
Dholuo: Riwruok mochung'ne chal mar kor lwasi chiwo siem ne Jo-Kenya ni koth ne dhi chue matek, otieno mar koyo ne dhi bedo matin ne digri apar Kenya dweche abiriyo mosekalo kod Didacus Malowa Jo piny  mar Kenya onego okre ne koth mang'eny kendo liet ne dhi bedo matin moloyo digri apar e gwenge moko.
Somali: Waaxda Met waxay uga digeysaa dadka Kenya inay u diyaargaroobaan roobab xooggan, habeenada qabow ee ka hooseeya 10 °C Kenya 7 bilood ka hor by Didacus Malowa dadka Kenya waa inay isu diyaariyaan roobab xooggan oo dheer iyo habeenada qabow oo daran, iyadoo heerkulka la filayo inuu hoos u dhaco 10 °C gobollada qaarkood.

English: By 1 month ago Police appeal for leads in Narok woman's assault Police urge public to share information to aid in arresting suspects filmed assaulting a woman in Narok, condemn act as barbaric, and vow justice.
Kiswahili: Kufikia mwezi mmoja uliopita Polisi waomba viongozi katika shambulio la mwanamke Narok Polisi wawahimiza umma kushiriki taarifa ili kusaidia kuwakamata washukiwa waliorekodiwa wakimshambulia mwanamke huko Narok, kulaani kitendo hicho kama cha kinyama, na kuapa haki.
Ekegusii: Ase omotienyi oyomo oetire babeire bakorigia ogonywa ase obotuki igoro yomokungu asaganetwe nabasacha aaria Narok. Abasikari nigo bagosaba abanto kobamanyia serio gokonya ase okobwatwa kwabakagerwa abwo babwatetetwe chibicha buna bare komorwania omokungu aaria Narok, na gokororeria egekoro ekio buna ekiobosaria na koenekia nga ekkene ngekoreke.
Dholuo: Chiegni dwe achiel mosekalo, ka polise okwayo jomahundu e polise mag Narok, ne gijiwo ji mondo ochiw ripot mondo okonygi mako joma ne odonjo e timbe mahundu ma ne omonjo dhako moro e taon mar Narok.
Somali: 1 bil ka hor booliisku wuxuu ku baaqay in la helo tilmaamo ku saabsan weerarka gabadha Narok Booliisku waxay ugu baaqeen dadweynaha inay la wadaagaan macluumaadka si ay uga caawiyaan in la xiro dadka loo maleynayo inay ku weerareen gabadha Narok, ay cambaareeyaan falka barbarnimada, waxayna ku dhaartaan caddaalad.

English: By 2 days ago EU urges Tanzanian authorities to exercise restraint amid post election unrest British High Commission in Tanzania advises against all but essential travel to the country, cites disruption and unrest following the October 29 election.
Kiswahili: Kufikia siku 2 zilizopita EU inawasihi mamlaka za Tanzania kujizuia kutokana na machafuko ya baada ya uchaguzi. Ubalozi Mkuu wa Uingereza nchini Tanzania unashauri dhidi ya safari zote isipokuwa muhimu kwenda nchini humo, unataja usumbufu na machafuko kufuatia uchaguzi wa Oktoba 29.
Ekegusii: Ase amatuko abarere aerire, ekeombe kiobomo bwa Bongereza (EU) giasabire abarai ba Tanzanian kwerita nyuma yomobukano bwechikura chitancheranetwe omobarosi bwense ya British aaria Tanzania igoro yechibabari chiengencho ime yense, ase omoburukano bwechikura omotienyi 10 chitariki 29.
Dholuo: Odiechienge ariyo mosekalo, EU osebedo ka jiwo jotelo mag Tanzania mondo obed gi ritruok e kind gik ma ne otimore bang' yiero. Kamisen mar Jo-British okwero okwedo wuodhe duto mak mana mochuno kaluwore kod tulo mokel kod yiero mar dwe mar apar tarik piero ariyo gi ochiko.
Somali: 2 maalmood ka hor Midowga Yurub wuxuu ugu baaqay mas'uuliyiinta Tansaaniya inay is-hoosaysiiyaan rabshadaha ka dambeeya doorashada. Guddiga sare ee Ingiriiska ee Tansaaniya wuxuu kula talinayaa in laga fogaado dhammaan safarada dalka marka laga reebo kuwa lagama maarmaanka u ah, isagoo tixraacaya jahwareerka iyo rabshadaha ka dambeeya doorashada 29 Oktoobar.

English: The Head of State said she was speaking both as a leader and as a mother to the nation, asking Tanzanians to prioritise dialogue and peace over chaos Ã¢ ‚¬Å“I sincerely urge my fellow citizens to uphold peace and tranquillity.
Kiswahili: Mkuu wa Nchi alisema alikuwa akizungumza kama kiongozi na kama mama wa taifa, akiwaomba Watanzania kuweka kipaumbele mazungumzo na amani badala ya machafuko - "Ninawasihi kwa dhati raia wenzangu kudumisha amani na utulivu."
Ekegusii: The Head of State said she was speaking both as a leader and as a mother to the nation, asking Tanzanians to prioritise dialogue and peace over chaos Ã¢ ‚¬Å“I sincerely urge my fellow citizens to uphold peace and tranquillity.
Dholuo: Jatelo mar Piny owacho nowacho ni ne owuoyo kaka jatelo kendo kaka miyo morito oganda, ka okwayo ji duto e piny Tanzania mondo oket winjruok motudore gi kwe moloyo tulo," akwayo oganda wetena mondo obed kod kwe kod muolo.
Somali: Madaxa dowladda ayaa sheegtay in ay u hadashay hoggaamiye ahaan iyo sidii hooyo u ah qaranka, iyada oo ka codsaneysa dadka Tansaaniya inay mudnaanta siiyaan wadahadalka iyo nabadda halkii ay ka dhigi lahaayeen jahwareerka. Waxaan si daacad ah ugu boorinayaa muwaadiniinteyda inay ilaaliyaan nabadda iyo xasilloonida.

English: As part of the ongoing government initiative to encourage residents to surrender illegally held firearms, the Sub-County Security Team in Tiaty Central, Baringo County, today, 5th November 2025, received two AK-47 rifles and five rounds of ammunition.
Kiswahili: Kama sehemu ya mpango unaoendelea wa serikali wa kuwahimiza wakazi kusalimisha bunduki walizokuwa nazo kinyume cha sheria, Timu ya Usalama ya Kaunti Ndogo huko Tiaty Central, Kaunti ya Baringo, leo, tarehe 5 Novemba 2025, ilipokea bunduki mbili aina ya AK-47 na risasi tano.
Ekegusii: Buna enchera eyemo yomoroberio bweserikari bwogoseta abanto koirania chibunduki chire ase ababoko abo gochia abdisi (DCC), abateneneri boborendi bwemechie emeke yechikaonti aariaTiaty ya Gati, Ekaonti ya Baringo, rero, chitariki 5 chiomotienyi 11 omwaka 2025, chiunduki 2 chia AK-47 na amasasi 5 amasasi atano mbiairanetigwe.
Dholuo: E bwo chenro mar sirkal mar jiwo jodak mondo ochiw gige lweny ma ok opuodhi, grup mar sirkal man Tiaty ma diere ,e kanuti ma Baringo, ne oyudo bunde ariyo mag AK-47 kod lisasi abich.
Somali: Iyada oo qayb ka ah dadaalka dowladda ee socda ee lagu dhiirigelinayo dadka deggan inay soo dhiibaan hubka rasaasta ee sharci darada ah, Kooxda Amniga Sub-County ee Tiaty Central, Baringo County, ayaa maanta, 5 November 2025, heshay laba qori oo AK-47 ah iyo shan rasaas oo rasaas ah.

English: NPS remains committed to working closely with local communities, National Government Administration Officers, and other stakeholders to promote peaceful coexistence and ensure the safety of all citizens, residents, and visitors through sustained disarmament and community policing initiatives, the statement read.
Kiswahili: Taarifa hiyo ilisema, NPS bado imejitolea kufanya kazi kwa karibu na jamii za wenyeji, Maafisa wa Utawala wa Serikali ya Kitaifa, na wadau wengine ili kukuza mshikamano wa amani na kuhakikisha usalama wa raia wote, wakazi, na wageni kupitia mipango endelevu ya upokonyaji silaha na ulinzi wa jamii.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kia abasikari bobokoreri (NPS) nkierwete gokora emeremo yaye ase okobwaterana nebinyoro, abakoreri obokoreri bweserikari enene, nabasangi bande gosegeta oboamate obuya nokomenya nomorembe buna enchera eyemo oborendi ase abanto bonsi,abamenyi, na abageni goetera okorusia chibinduki ase amaboko abanto nomoroberio bwabarendi boborendi , buna enkwana eio yatebete.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar NPS oseng'ado mar tiyo kanyachiel gi gwenge, jotelo mag sirkal mamalo, kod jotelo mamoko mondo okony e miyo ngima ji obed gi kwe kendo miyo raia duto, joma odak e alworano, kod welo obed gi ritruok kokalo kuom chenro mag tieko lweny kod rito oganda, oboke no ne owacho.
Somali: NPS waxay ka go'an tahay inay si dhow ula shaqeyso bulshooyinka maxalliga ah, Saraakiisha Maamulka Dowladda Qaranka, iyo daneeyayaasha kale si loo horumariyo wada noolaanshaha nabadeed loona hubiyo nabadgelyada dhammaan muwaadiniinta, dadka deggan, iyo booqdayaasha iyada oo loo marayo dadaallada hub-bararka joogtada ah iyo booliiska bulshada, sida lagu sheegay bayaanka.

English: Authorities are now appealing to members of the public to support ongoing efforts to combat crime by sharing information that could aid investigations.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka sasa zinawaomba wananchi kuunga mkono juhudi zinazoendelea za kupambana na uhalifu kwa kushiriki taarifa ambazo zinaweza kusaidia uchunguzi.
Ekegusii: Abarai bono appealing to members of the public to support ongoing efforts to combat crime by sharing information that could aid investigations.
Dholuo: Sani jotelo mag sirkal jiwo ji mondo oriw lwedo kinda mitimo e tieko timbe mahundu kuom chiwo weche ma nyalo konyo e timo nonro.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiintu waxay hadda codsanayaan dadweynaha inay taageeraan dadaallada socda ee la dagaalanka dambiyada iyagoo la wadaagaya macluumaadka caawin kara baaritaanka.

English: By 3 days ago EU urges Tanzanian authorities to exercise restraint amid post election unrest British High Commission in Tanzania advises against all but essential travel to the country, cites disruption and unrest following the October 29 election.
Kiswahili: Kufikia siku 3 zilizopita EU inawasihi mamlaka za Tanzania kujizuia kutokana na ghasia za baada ya uchaguzi. Ubalozi Mkuu wa Uingereza nchini Tanzania unashauri dhidi ya safari zote isipokuwa muhimu kwenda nchini humo, unataja usumbufu na machafuko kufuatia uchaguzi wa Oktoba 29.
Ekegusii: Ase amatuko atato aerire, Ekeombe kiobomo Kia Boraya (EU) giasabire abarai ba Tanzanian kwerita igoro yomoburukano bwechikura chitancheranetwe aobobarosi o'British aaria Tanzania orure ogosemia igor yechibari chiengencho ase emchie yonsi ase ense eyio, eburaburu ase emechie emene omotienyi 10 chitariki 29 chiobochori.
Dholuo: E odiechienge adek mokalo, riwruok mar EU jiwo jotelo mag piny Tanzania mondo obed motang' gi ywaruok ma ne otimore bang' yiero. Kamisen mar jo British okwedo wuodhe duto  madonjo e pinyno mak mana mochuno kagiwacho ni ntiere kethruok kod tulo kotenore kod yiero ma dwe mar apar tarik piero ariyo gi ochiko
Somali: Saddex maalmood ka hor Midowga Yurub wuxuu ugu baaqay mas'uuliyiinta Tansaaniya inay is-hoosaysiiyaan rabshadaha ka dambeeya doorashada. Guddiga sare ee Ingiriiska ee Tansaaniya wuxuu kula talinayaa in laga fogaado dhammaan safarada dalka marka laga reebo kuwa lagama maarmaanka u ah, isagoo tilmaamay jahwareer iyo rabshadaha ka dambeeya doorashada 29-ka Oktoobar.

English: It warned the public about the widespread misinformation online regarding claims that registration was open, stating these claims are fraudulent.
Kiswahili: Ilionya umma kuhusu taarifa potofu zilizoenea mtandaoni kuhusu madai kwamba usajili ulikuwa wazi, ikisema madai haya ni ya ulaghai.
Ekegusii: Yarwete ogokurerwa ase abanto igoro yamangama ankuma gose oborimo goetera eintaneti igoeo yokongainereria nga okwerika gwechikura nkwaigoretwe, na komanyia abanto nga chinkwana echio nechioborimo.
Dholuo: Ne osiemo oganda ewi weche mag miriambo mane yudore e Intanet ewi weche ma ne wacho ni ndikruok mar donjo e sikundno ne oseyaw,  kowacho ni wechego ne gin miriambo.
Somali: Waxay ka digtay dadweynaha macluumaadka khaladka ah ee internetka ee ku saabsan sheegashada in diiwaangelinta la furay, iyadoo sheegtay in sheegashadaasi ay tahay khiyaano.

English: Photo Kenya High Commission The Commission further encouraged Kenyans to continue with their lawful day-to-day activities without fear, noting that no incident targeting Kenyan nationals had been reported so far .
Kiswahili: Picha Ubalozi Mkuu wa Kenya Tume hiyo iliwahimiza Wakenya kuendelea na shughuli zao halali za kila siku bila woga, ikibainisha kuwa hakuna tukio lolote lililowalenga raia wa Kenya lililoripotiwa hadi sasa.
Ekegusii: Ebicha yomomobaro o'Kenay Omobarosi nigo agendererete gosegeta Aba'Kenya kogenderera nechigasi chiabo chia kera rituko buna abanto barendete richiko batari nabwoba, , okobamanyia ng'a mo'Kenya onde tari bwatoirwe ase ase obosaria obwo .
Dholuo: Picha mar kamisen maduong' ma piny Kenya Kamisen'no ne omedo  jiwo Jo piny Kenya mondo odhi nyime gi tijegi ma pile ka pile maonge luoro, kowacho ni onge gima osetimore ne Jo-Kenya nyaka sani.
Somali: Photo Kenya High Commission Guddiga ayaa sidoo kale ku booriyay dadka Kenya inay sii wadaan howlahooda maalinlaha ah ee sharci ah iyagoo aan cabsan, iyagoo xusay in ilaa iyo hadda aan la soo sheegin wax dhacdo ah oo lala beegsaday muwaadiniinta Kenya.

English: According to Sakaja, to prevent such situations, the county government is encouraging residents to register with SHA, ensuring that the programme can reimburse hospitals for patients unable to pay.
Kiswahili: Kulingana na Sakaja, ili kuzuia hali kama hizo, serikali ya kaunti inawahimiza wakazi kujiandikisha na SHA, kuhakikisha kwamba mpango huo unaweza kufidia hospitali kwa wagonjwa ambao hawawezi kulipa.
Ekegusii: Korengana nebirengererio bia Sakaja, gotanga chingencho chinga buna echio, eserikari yekaonti yasabire abanainchi kwerika na neisurance yanyagitari ya SHA, koenekia, nga omoroberio oyio oSHA noiranie chibesa chiria chigoakanwa nyagitari ase abria batari konyara goakana.
Dholuo: Kaluwore gi duond Sakaja,mondo ogeng' gik ma kamago kik timre, sirkal mar gweng'no jiwo oganda mondo odonj e riwruok mar SHA, mondo gine ni chenrono nyalo chudo e ute thieth ne  jotuo ma ok nyal chulo osuru mag thieth.
Somali: Sida laga soo xigtay Sakaja, si looga hortago xaaladaha noocan oo kale ah, dowladda degmada waxay ku dhiiri gelineysaa dadka deggan inay iska diiwaangeliyaan SHA, si loo hubiyo in barnaamijka uu dib ugu celin karo isbitaalada bukaannada aan awoodin inay bixiyaan.

English: The National Police Service commends the continued cooperation of local residents in supporting this initiative to enhance peace, security, and stability in the region.“We encourage the public to maintain their support by providing information at their nearest police station, or by calling 999, 911, or 112.
Kiswahili: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inapongeza ushirikiano unaoendelea wa wakazi wa eneo hilo katika kuunga mkono mpango huu wa kuimarisha amani, usalama, na utulivu katika eneo hilo. "Tunawahimiza umma kudumisha usaidizi wao kwa kutoa taarifa katika kituo cha polisi kilicho karibu nao, au kwa kupiga simu 999, 911, au 112."
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kia abasikari bobokoreri (NPS) bagokeire kogenderera kobwaterana nabanto ase ogosira omoroberio oyo erio goikerania omorembe, oborendi, na gotenena bokong'u ase orogongo. Nigo togosaba abanto babe noboremu nagosira emeremo eye goetera okorwa amangana gochia porisi ere ang'e, gose goetera goaka esimi 999, 911, gose 112.
Dholuo: Afis mar duol machiwo arita kwe mar National Police Service wacho ni joma odak e alworano riwo lwedo chenro mar loso kwe, ritruok, kod kwe e alworano. "Wamiyo ji duto thuolo mar dhi nyime gi chenrono kuom chiwo lendo e stesen mar polise, kata gocho e namba mar 999, 911, kata 112.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa bogaadinaya iskaashiga joogtada ah ee dadka deegaanka ee taageeraya mashruucan si loo xoojiyo nabadda, amniga iyo xasiloonida gobolka.

English: We urge members of the public to provide any information that may assist in their arrest, the report stated in part.
Kiswahili: Tunawasihi wananchi kutoa taarifa yoyote ambayo inaweza kusaidia katika kukamatwa kwao, ripoti hiyo ilisema kwa sehemu.
Ekegusii: Twasabire abanto bonsi korwa manag'ana and onsi aranyare gokonya okobwatwa kwabo, buna eripoti ayio yatebete.
Dholuo: Ripotno wacho ni wakwayo oganda duto mondo ochiw gimoro amora manyalo konyo e ndhiyo  jogo.
Somali: Waxaan ugu baaqaynaa shacabka in ay bixiyaan wixii macluumaad ah ee ka caawin kara in la xiro, warbixinta ayaa qayb ahaan sheegtay.

English: On the recruitment day, candidates must report to designated centres by 8am with original and copies of their academic certificates, ID cards, birth certificates, and, where applicable, NYS discharge certificates with at least a 'GOOD' conduct rating.
Kiswahili: Siku ya kuajiri, wagombea lazima waripoti katika vituo vilivyoteuliwa ifikapo saa 2 asubuhi wakiwa na cheti halisi na nakala za vyeti vyao vya kitaaluma, vitambulisho, vyeti vya kuzaliwa, na, inapohitajika, vyeti vya kufukuzwa vya NYS vyenye angalau ukadiriaji wa 'GOOD' wa mwenendo.
Ekegusii: rituko riokorikwa, baria bakorigia egasi, goika baike ase chisenta chiabo chinsa 2 chia mambia bare nechisatificate chiabo buna basomete, Ekeband, esatifiketi yokoiborwa, na ase ekonyarekana, esatificate yogokora amasomo korwa obokoreri bwasae (NYS) na egekworokia buna ebikoru bioyio bire.
Dholuo: E odiechieng ' mar kawo jotich, jogo madwaro dhi e skundno nyaka chiw ripot e kuonde moyiedhi  saa ariyo okinyi kendo gibed gi kad kod kopi mag kalatese mag sombgi, kad mag ng'eyo odiochieng nyuol ng'ato,  kendo, ka nyalore, kalatese mag duol mar NYS ma nigi alama mar tim maber.
Somali: Maalinta shaqaalaysiinta, musharixiintu waa inay u soo bandhigaan xarumaha loo qoondeeyey saacadaha 8 subaxnimo iyagoo leh asalka iyo nuqulka shahaadooyinkooda tacliinta, kaararka aqoonsiga, shahaadooyinka dhalashada, iyo, haddii ay khuseyso, shahaadooyinka ka bixitaanka NYS oo leh ugu yaraan qiimeyn "GOOD".

English: Security Matters Turning to security matters, the PS revealed that the government is set to launch a mobile app enabling citizens to report road-related incidents directly online.
Kiswahili: Masuala ya Usalama Akizungumzia masuala ya usalama, Katibu Mkuu huyo alifichua kwamba serikali iko tayari kuzindua programu ya simu inayowawezesha raia kuripoti matukio yanayohusiana na barabara moja kwa moja mtandaoni.
Ekegusii: Amangana oborendi aonchokire koba ayoborendi, Omoriki opamanenti (PS) nabisorete ng'a eserikari nere mbere gochakia egekoreri kieintaneti gokonya abanainchi komanyia igoro yemebasekano yechipara gochia eserikari.
Dholuo: weche arita ,miyo pek weche arita , PS ne owacho ni sirkal oseyiero mar chako tiyo gi app mar simo ma miyo raia thuolo mar chiwo ripot achiel kachiel e intanet kuom gik ma timore e nderni.
Somali: Arrimaha Amniga Marka la eego arrimaha amniga, PS waxay shaacisay in dowladda ay diyaar u tahay inay bilawdo barnaamij mobile ah oo shacabka u oggolaanaya inay si toos ah u soo sheegaan dhacdooyinka la xiriira waddooyinka internetka.

English: “We are soon introducing a mobile app that allows citizens to report incidents, particularly road-related cases, directly online, he said.
Kiswahili: "Hivi karibuni tutaanzisha programu ya simu ambayo inaruhusu raia kuripoti matukio, hasa matukio yanayohusiana na barabara, moja kwa moja mtandaoni," alisema.
Ekegusii: “Iga bwango ngochaka tore egekoreri gieintaneti kogokonya abanainchi komanyia erikari amang'ana, mono kegima ayarengete emebasekano yechipara gochia ase bare gotaetera mono onde, buna atebete.
Dholuo: Owacho ni machiegnini wabiro chako tiyo gi app mar simo ma miyo ji thuolo mar chiwo ripot e wi gik ma timore e ndara, to ahinya ahinya  weche  motenore kof masich apaya achiel kachiel e mbui, ne owacho.
Somali: "Waxaan dhowaan soo bandhigi doonnaa barnaamij mobile ah oo u oggolaanaya muwaadiniinta inay si toos ah u soo sheegaan dhacdooyinka, gaar ahaan kiisaska la xiriira waddooyinka, ayuu yiri.

English: The Authority urges firms wishing to engage in parcel and courier services to apply for the requisite licenses from our offices in Nairobi, Kisumu, Eldoret, Nyeri and Mombasa and cautions members of the public to seek parcel and courier services from CA licensed providers only.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka inahimiza makampuni yanayotaka kujihusisha na huduma za vifurushi na usafirishaji wa mizigo kuomba leseni zinazohitajika kutoka ofisi zetu jijini Nairobi, Kisumu, Eldoret, Nyeri na Mombasa na inawaonya wananchi kutafuta huduma za vifurushi na usafirishaji wa mizigo kutoka kwa watoa huduma walio na leseni za CA pekee.
Ekegusii: Abatenereri bobobogoria emesigo basabirwe kwerika neserikari aaria Nairobi, Kisumu, Eldoret, Nyeri na Mombasa erio gwancherwa gokora emeremna gokurera abanto bonsi konyora ogokonywa kwogotoma emesigo yabo goetera baria bakoewa chisatifiketi echio (CA) boka.
Dholuo: Duol'no jiwo kambe madwaro tiyo gi yore mag oro kod mag oro barupe mondo okonygi gi kwayo mag rusa e apise magwa man Nairobi, Kisumu, Eldoret, Nyeri kod Mombasa, kendo osiemo oganda duto mondo ochimre kod mana chenro mopwodhi mag oro baupe.
Somali: Hay'addu waxay ku boorineysaa shirkadaha doonaya inay ku hawlan yihiin adeegyada baakadaha iyo adeegyada gaarsiinta inay ka dalbadaan ruqsadaha looga baahan yahay xafiisyadeena Nairobi, Kisumu, Eldoret, Nyeri iyo Mombasa waxayna ka digeysaa shacabka inay ka dalbadaan adeegyada baakadaha iyo adeegyada gaarsiinta kaliya bixiyeyaasha ruqsadaha CA.

English: Machogu urged the residents to ensure that they nurture the trees to maturity after planting and not to leave it as a responsibility of the Government.
Kiswahili: Machogu aliwasihi wakazi kuhakikisha kwamba wanaitunza miti hiyo hadi kukomaa baada ya kupanda na wasiiache kama jukumu la Serikali.
Ekegusii: Machogu nasabete abaibori koenekia ng'a barende emete basimekire goika ekine buya na tari gosimeka na gotigera eserikari erende.
Dholuo: Machogu nojiwo jogweng'no mondo ong'e ni giweyo yiende odongo e rang'iny makare bang' pidhogi, to ok giwegi mana ka gima en ting ' mar sirkal.
Somali: Machogu wuxuu dadka deggan ugu baaqay inay hubiyaan in ay kor u qaadaan geedaha si ay u bislaadaan ka dib markii la beero oo aysan uga tagin mas'uuliyadda Dowladda.

English: The County Government of Kericho is advising all residents to remain on high alert due to the ongoing heavy rains being experienced across the county.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti ya Kericho inawashauri wakazi wote kuendelea kuwa macho kutokana na mvua kubwa inayoendelea kunyesha kote kaunti.
Ekegusii: Teerikari yekaonti ya Kericho ngosemia ere abanto baye bonsi gotigara koba maiso igoro yembura enyinge eyio egendererete gotwa ime yekaonti engima.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti ma Kericho jiwo ji duto mondo obed motang' ahinya nikech koth maduong' ma dhi nyime e gwenge mag kaunti no duto.
Somali: Maamulka Degmada Kericho ayaa kula talinaya dhammaan dadka deggan inay ku sii jiraan feejignaan sare sababo la xiriira roobabka xoogga badan ee socda ee ka dhaca degmada oo dhan.

English: The County Government appeals to all residents to exercise utmost caution, avoid crossing flooded roads or walking near swollen rivers, and to immediately report any emergencies or incidents to the nearest local administration office or through the County emergency hotline.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti inatoa wito kwa wakazi wote kuwa waangalifu sana, kuepuka kuvuka barabara zilizofurika au kutembea karibu na mito iliyofurika, na kuripoti mara moja dharura au matukio yoyote kwa ofisi ya utawala ya karibu au kupitia simu ya dharura ya Kaunti.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yekaonti nigo egosaba abanainchi bonsi ng'a babe maiso, tibatema goeta ase amache gose oroche rorew nomorindo bwamache, na komantia eserikari igoro ya mobasekano onde bwensi gochia amokoreri bweserikari ore ange nere gose goetera enamba ya morero yekaonti goetera eintaneti.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti no jiwo ji duto mondo otang' ahinya, kik ging'ad nderni mopong' gi pi kata wuoth machiegni gi aoche ma pi opong'o, kendo gikanyono gichiw lipot mar masira moramora e apis maduong' mar sirkal manie gweng'no kata ka gitiyo kod  namba mag chwalo masiche.
Somali: Maamulka Gobolka wuxuu dadka deggan oo dhan ugu baaqayaa inay sameeyaan taxaddar aad u weyn, ka fogaadaan in ay soo gudbaan wadooyinka daadsan ama ay ku socdaan webiyada barwaaqoobay, isla markaana ay isla markiiba u soo sheegaan xaaladaha degdegga ah ama dhacdooyinka xafiiska maamulka maxalliga ah ee ugu dhow ama khadka tooska ah ee xaaladaha degdegga ah ee Gobolka.

English: The County Government reiterates that the safety of residents remains its top priority and urges everyone to stay vigilant, follow official advisories, and support one another during this period of heavy rainfall.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti inarudia kwamba usalama wa wakazi unasalia kuwa kipaumbele chake cha juu na inawasihi kila mtu kuwa macho, kufuata ushauri rasmi, na kusaidiana wakati huu wa mvua kubwa.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yechokaonti yaenekeirie abanainchi nga nare maiso goikerania oborendi na gosaba kera oyomo koba maiso, kobwatia obosemia, na gokonyana chingaki echi chiembura enyinge.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti no medo jiwo ahinya ni rito ngima joodgi en gima duong' ahinya kendo ojiwo ji duto mondo obed motang', oluw puonj mag sirkal, kendo gikonyre giwegi e kinde koth maduong'ni.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka waxay ku celineysaa in badbaadada dadka deggan ay tahay mudnaanta koowaad waxayna ku boorineysaa qof walba inuu feejignaado, u hoggaansamo talooyinka rasmiga ah, kuna taageero midba midka kale inta lagu jiro xilligan roobabka culus.

English: To ensure public safety during the renovation, the County Government has issued a clear directive: Members of the public have been directed to stay at least 30 metres away from the hospital site.
Kiswahili: Ili kuhakikisha usalama wa umma wakati wa ukarabati, Serikali ya Kaunti imetoa agizo wazi: Wananchi wameagizwa kukaa angalau mita 30 kutoka eneo la hospitali.
Ekegusii: Erio goikerania oborendi obuya chingaki chiokoagacha keboyia chinyomba , eserikari yekaonti yarure omoroberio omoronge: Abanto baboriigwe koba are nase ayio yamaagacho goika oboare bwachifuti 100 korwa ase amaagacho agokorerwa yoboagachi bwenyagitari.
Dholuo: Mondo omi sirkal okony e rito ngima ji e seche mag loso, sirkal mar kaunti oseng'ado mar chiwo chik manyien: Oganda  omi chik mondo obed mabor gi osiptal ma borne mita piero adek.
Somali: Si loo hubiyo nabadgelyada dadweynaha inta lagu jiro dayactirka, Maamulka degmada ayaa soo saaray tilmaam cad: Shacabka waxaa lagu amray inay ka fogaadaan ugu yaraan 30 mitir goobta isbitaalka.

English: Youth engagement took centre stage in Kisumu County this week as leaders threw down the gauntlet, urging young residents to swap spectator seats for the architect's table in governance.
Kiswahili: Ushiriki wa vijana ulichukua nafasi muhimu katika Kaunti ya Kisumu wiki hii huku viongozi wakipuuza vikwazo, wakiwahimiza wakazi vijana kubadilishana viti vya watazamaji na meza ya mbunifu katika utawala.
Ekegusii: Okobwaterana nabasae aaria ekaonti ya Kisumu ewiki eye nigo kwabete kwomonguso ase abant abange ekero abarai barwete ogosaba nga abasae babogorie egetambokero kioborendi. Gosegeta abasae batige koba magega na abarigereria korende korende kobwaterana korora ng'a ebirengererio biabo biasoire ase emeroberio yobogamb gose oborai.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar rowere nokawo okang ' maduong ' ahinya e kaunti' mar Kisumu e jumani kane jotelo ogolo Glav, ka gikwayo rowere e gweng'no mondo olok kombe mag jowinjo mondo obed mesa mar jatelo.
Somali: Iskaashiga dhalinyarada ayaa toddobaadkan ka dhacay degmada Kisumu iyadoo hoggaamiyeyaashu ay hoos u dhigeen gacanka, iyagoo ku booriyay dadka dhallinyarada ah inay ku beddelaan kuraasta daawadayaasha miiska dhismaha ee maamulka.

English: The event, held at Gilgil Stadium, was streamed live on KDF platforms to promote transparency and educate the public on the recruitment process.
Kiswahili: Hafla hiyo, iliyofanyika katika Uwanja wa Gilgil, ilirushwa moja kwa moja kwenye majukwaa ya KDF ili kukuza uwazi na kuelimisha umma kuhusu mchakato wa kuajiri.
Ekegusii: Aya iga nigo abete aaria egetii kiemesiecho kia Gilgil, ayio aorogetigwe etibi korwa ekeombe kioboami bwoborendi bwense (KDF) gosegeta obomaiso marore na gosomia abanto buna okorika abaami gokoba.
Dholuo: Chokruogno mane otim e paw tuke mar Gilgil, ne oter e yamo e ndiri mag jolweny mag  KDF mondo omi ji ong'e weche duto elela kendo gipuonj ji weche momedore e wi chenro mar ndikruok.
Somali: Dhacdadan oo ka dhacday garoonka Gilgil Stadium, ayaa si toos ah loogu sii daayay barnaamijyada KDF si kor loogu qaado hufnaan iyo barashada dadweynaha ee ku saabsan habka shaqaaleysiinta.

English: He further encouraged the public to be part of the process through reporting any incidences of bribery or corruption through relevant hotlines.
Kiswahili: Aliwahimiza zaidi umma kuwa sehemu ya mchakato huo kwa kuripoti matukio yoyote ya rushwa au ufisadi kupitia simu husika za dharura.
Ekegusii: Akagenderera gosegeta abanto koba abamo bomoroberio oyio goetera okorwa amangana igoro yobokorekanu ase amoroberio bwokorika abaami goetera enamba yesimi yamorero.
Dholuo: Nomedo jiwo oganda mondo oriw lwedo chenro no  kuom chiwo ripot e wi timbe mag asoya kod mibadhi  ka gitiyo kod nembni mag chwalo ote mag masiche ma apoya.
Somali: Waxa uu sidoo kale bulshada ku dhiiri geliyey inay qayb ka noqdaan geedi socodka iyada oo la soo sheegayo wixii dhacdo ah ee laaluush ama musuqmaasuq iyada oo loo marayo khadadka kulul ee la xiriira.

English: Members of the public and property owners are reminded to prioritize structural safety in residential buildings.
Kiswahili: Wamiliki wa umma na mali wanakumbushwa kuweka kipaumbele usalama wa miundo katika majengo ya makazi.
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi nabanyete enibo bwainyoriigwe korenda buna amaagacho echinyomba gose chitaracha chigwata goikerania oborendi obuya ase chinyomba chiokomenya.
Dholuo: Ji duto kaachiel gi weg mwandu iparonegi mondo oket arita maber e ute ma jodak.
Somali: Shacabka iyo milkiilayaasha hantida waxaa lagu xusuusinayaa inay mudnaanta siiyaan ammaanka dhismaha dhismayaasha.

English: The Public is urged to report any incidences of recruitment malpractices to the nearest Police Station or call 0709099000, 999, 911,112 or #fichuakwaDCI 0800722203.
Kiswahili: Umma unahimizwa kuripoti matukio yoyote ya ukiukwaji wa sheria za ajira kwa Kituo cha Polisi kilicho karibu au piga simu 0709099000, 999, 911,112 au #fichuakwaDCI 0800722203.
Ekegusii: Abanto basabirwe komanyia basikari igoro yabanto korikwa gosoa ebiombe biobosaria gose goetera goaka esimi 0709099000, 999, 911,112 gose #fichuakwaDCI 0800722203.
Dholuo: Oganda duto ijiwo mondo ochiw ripot mag mibadhi e ndikruok stesend obila machiegni kodgi kata gigochne 0709099000, 999, 911,112 kata #chiwo wach ne apisa ma timo norno 0800722203.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu boorinayaa in ay soo sheegaan dhacdooyinka kasta oo ka mid ah habdhaqanka xun ee shaqaaleysiinta Saldhigga Booliska ee ugu dhow ama u wac 0709099000, 999, 911,112 ama #fichuakwaDCI 0800722203.

English: We caution all to beware of fraudsters posing as Commission staff to solicit money in exchange for our services.
Kiswahili: Tunawaonya wote wajihadhari na matapeli wanaojifanya wafanyakazi wa Tume ili kuomba pesa badala ya huduma zetu.
Ekegusii: Nigo togokurera abanto koba maiso igoro yabasaria bagwekora koba abakomisona baita erio koibera abanto chibesa chiabo.
Dholuo: Wachiwo siem ne ng'ato ka ng'ato mondo otang' gi joma wuondore ka gipenjo ka gitiyo e komiti mondo giyud omenda ka gichiwo chenro magwa.
Somali: Waxaan u digaynaa in qof walba uu ka digtoonow khiyaanooyinka isu dhigaya shaqaale ka tirsan Komishanka si ay lacag ugu dalbadaan adeegyadeena.

English: Public Participation and Stakeholder Engagement: In accordance with Article 10(2) of the Constitution of Kenya, the Ministry of Roads and Transport invites members of the public and stakeholders to participate in public forums.
Kiswahili: Ushiriki wa Umma na Ushiriki wa Wadau: Kwa mujibu wa Kifungu cha 10(2) cha Katiba ya Kenya, Wizara ya Barabara na Uchukuzi inawaalika wananchi na wadau kushiriki katika mijadala ya umma.
Ekegusii: Okoumerana na okobwatera nabanto nabasangi ao ao: Koreng'ana nerichiko ria 10(2) riegatabu kiamachiko gia Kenya, Eminisitiri yechipara nobobogoria yachikire abanto nabasangi bande gosanga ase ebikaranso biechinkwana chia bonsi.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar Oganda kod jokanyo: Kaluwore gi Sula mar apar (ariyo) mar Chik mar Kenya, Migao mar weche wuoth gwelo ji duto manie riwruok mar oganda kod jokanyo mondo oriwre e chenro moriwo oganda.
Somali: Ka qaybgalka dadweynaha iyo ka qaybgalka daneeyayaasha: Sida ku cad qodobka 10 ((2) ee Dastuurka Kenya, Wasaaradda Wadooyinka iyo Gaadiidka waxay ku casuumaysaa xubnaha dadweynaha iyo daneeyayaasha inay ka qaybgalaan madasha dadweynaha.

English: Please be advised that the public notice circulating on social media is fake.
Kiswahili: Tafadhali fahamu kwamba taarifa ya umma inayosambazwa kwenye mitandao ya kijamii ni bandia.
Ekegusii: Bono manya buya nga amang'ana agoetananigwa na abanto ase abanto nayoborimo.
Dholuo: Akwayo ni ung'e ni weche ma landore e mbui gin miriambo.
Somali: Fadlan la ogeysii in ogeysiiska dadweynaha ee ku baahsan warbaahinta bulshada uu yahay mid been abuur ah.

English: By David Njaaga 1 month ago 'Ignore fraudulent notices': NPSC warns on fake police hiring advert The National Police Service Commission (NPSC) has warned against a fake recruitment notice for police constables circulating on social media.
Kiswahili: Na David Njaaga mwezi 1 uliopita 'Puuza notisi za ulaghai': NPSC yaonya kuhusu tangazo bandia la kuajiri polisi Tume ya Kitaifa ya Huduma za Polisi (NPSC) imeonya dhidi ya notisi bandia ya kuajiri polisi inayosambaa kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Ekegusii: Ase David Njaaga omotienyi oyomo oetire 'ombia amangana oborimo': NPSC kiarure ogokurerwa igoro yamangana buna porisi nkorika ere abanto buna ayobotimo. Ekeombe kiobokoreri bwa abasikari kiarure ogokurerwa ng'a amangana igoro yokorikwa kwa abasikari goetera eintneti nayoborimo.
Dholuo: Kod David Njaaga dwe achiel mokalo 'Buon lipot mag wuondruok': NPSC chiwo siem kuom ripot mag miriambo mag ndikruok kamisen mar obila mar NPSC osechiwo siem kuom ripot mag wuondruok mag ndikruok mag polise ma landore e mbui.
Somali: By David Njaaga 1 bil ka hor 'Ignore fraudulent notices': NPSC waxay ka digeysaa xayeysiis been abuur ah oo ku saabsan shaqaaleysiinta booliska Komishanka Adeegga Booliska Qaranka (NPSC) ayaa ka digay ogeysiis been abuur ah oo loogu talagalay shaqaaleysiinta booliiska oo ku baahsan warbaahinta bulshada.

English: Therefore, this move is part of a citywide cleaning exercise which has, so far, included orders requiring hawkers to vacate some of the CBD streets and business owners in the CBD to keep their premises clean and avoid loud systems disrupting the public, among others.
Kiswahili: Kwa hivyo, hatua hii ni sehemu ya zoezi la usafi wa jiji lote ambalo, hadi sasa, limejumuisha maagizo yanayowataka wachuuzi kuondoka katika baadhi ya mitaa ya CBD na wamiliki wa biashara katika CBD ili kuweka majengo yao safi na kuepuka mifumo ya kelele kuwasumbua umma, miongoni mwa mengine.
Ekegusii: Ase igo, egetambokero eke nigo kere enchera eyemo yogosibia omochie o'nairobi oganetie nga baria bakooneria ebinto biabo isiko, ekaonti yanyorire ogwancherwa kobarusia chinsemo chiomochie gati bwetaoni (CBD) chinchera gati na abanyaduka bonsi kobeka obochenu ase ebiasara biabo na gotanga amariogi amanene yamatangaso yebiasra biabo atari kogokia abanto na ayande anga buna ayio.
Dholuo: Kuom mano, chenrono en achiel kuom chenro mar pwodho boma duto, ma nyaka sani oriwo chike ma dwaro ni joma uso e akek yore kod jo-ohala e chuny boma oket kuondegi mag tich obed maler kendo gitang' gi thum mamalo makiko winjruok ekind oganda, e kind mamoko.
Somali: Sidaa darteed, tallaabadan waxay qayb ka tahay dhaqdhaqaaq nadaafadeed oo magaalada oo dhan ah oo illaa iyo hadda ka mid ahaa amarro looga baahan yahay in ganacsatada ay ka baxaan qaar ka mid ah jidadka CBD iyo milkiilayaasha ganacsiga ee CBD si ay u ilaaliyaan guryahooda nadiif ah oo ay uga fogaadaan nidaamyada dhawaaqa badan ee jahwareeraya dadweynaha, iyo waxyaabo kale.

English: County emergency response teams and security agencies remain on the ground, helping relocate displaced residents to safer areas and distributing food, blankets, and other essential supplies.
Kiswahili: Timu za kukabiliana na dharura za kaunti na mashirika ya usalama yanaendelea kufanya kazi, na kusaidia kuwahamisha wakazi waliokimbia makazi yao katika maeneo salama na kusambaza chakula, blanketi, na vifaa vingine muhimu.
Ekegusii: Bria batenerete abokonyi chingaki chiemebasekano bekaonti kobwaterana nabarendi boborendi nao bare, bagendererete korwa ogokonya ase baria bakonyanya korwa ase yemechando goetera embura enyinge na kobaa ogokonya kwendagera, ebinto biokorarera, nebinto binde biengencho.
Dholuo: Timbe mag kaunti makonyo e masiche ma apoya kod machiwo arita pod tiyo mondo gikony joma odar odhi kuonde ma onge tuoche, kendo gichiw chiemo, lewni, kod gik mamoko madwarore.
Somali: Kooxaha gargaarka degdegga ah ee degmada iyo hay'adaha amniga ayaa weli jooga goobta, iyagoo gacan ka geysanaya in dadka barakacayaasha ah ay u guuraan meelo aamin ah waxayna qaybiyaan cuntada, qashinada, iyo alaabada kale ee lagama maarmaanka u ah.

English: KeNHA assured the public that the projects will be implemented with transparency and accountability at every stage.
Kiswahili: KeNHA iliwahakikishia umma kwamba miradi hiyo itatekelezwa kwa uwazi na uwajibikaji katika kila hatua.
Ekegusii: Abateneri bechipara chinene (KeNHA) baenekeirie abanto ng'a oborosia bwepara nigo borabe maiso marore nobotenereri obuya ase omoroberio bwensi.
Dholuo: Migawo mar weche wuoth e apaya KeNHA nosingo ne ji ni tijego ne idhi tim e yo maler kendo e yo mowinjore e okang' ka okang'.
Somali: KeNHA waxay shacabka u xaqiijisay in mashaariicda la fulin doono si hufan iyo mas'uuliyad leh marxalad kasta.

English: by CHARLES MGHENYI Coast 07 November 2025 - 05:40 ADVERTISEMENT In Summary Ethekon urged Kenyans to help rebuild trust in the new IEBC, assuring that the commission has strengthened accountability systems, including robust voter identification and result transmission technology.
Kiswahili: na CHARLES MGHENYI Pwani 07 Novemba 2025 - 05:40 TANGAZO Kwa Muhtasari Ethekon aliwasihi Wakenya kusaidia kujenga upya imani katika IEBC mpya, akihakikisha kwamba tume imeimarisha mifumo ya uwajibikaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na utambuzi thabiti wa wapiga kura na teknolojia ya uwasilishaji wa matokeo.
Ekegusii: Goetera CHARLES MGHENYI Coast 07 omotienyi 11 2025 chinsa 11 nechitageka 40 OGOTANGAZA. Ase obweng'e Ethekon agasaba aba'Kenyans gokonya koirania obwegenwa ase abarai abayia baria bekeombe keria getenerete ogoaka chikura IEBC, na koenekia ng'a oboteneneri obwo oboyia bwabekire emeroberio yamaiso marore, amo na obokongoria bwegetabu bwa abaaki chikura bekeene bare ime yegatabu keria kebwate amarieta yabaaki chikura goetera etekinorochi.
Dholuo: Kod Charles Mghenyi Coast tarik abiriyo dwe mar apar kod achiel higa mar alufu ariyo piero ariyo kod piero ario kod abich saa apar gic achiel gi dakika piero ang'wen  Lendo E yo machuok Ethekon nokwayo Jo-Kenya mondo okony e gero yie kuom duol manyyien mar yiero mar IEBC , kendo mondo ging'e ni kamisen osemiyo chenro mag chiwo dwoko, moriwo koda ng'eyo joma oyiero kod lony manyasani mar lando duoko.
Somali: by CHARLES MGHENYI Coast 07 November 2025 - 05:40 ADVERTISEMENT Marka la soo koobo Ethekon waxay ugu baaqday dadka Kenya inay ka caawiyaan dib u dhiska kalsoonida IEBC cusub, iyagoo xaqiijinaya in guddiga uu xoojiyay nidaamyada xisaabinta, oo ay ku jiraan aqoonsiga codbixiyayaasha adag iyo tikniyoolajiyadda gudbinta natiijooyinka.

English: Ethekon urged Kenyans to help rebuild trust in the new IEBC, assuring that the commission has strengthened accountability systems, including robust voter identification and result transmission technology.
Kiswahili: Ethekon aliwasihi Wakenya kusaidia kujenga upya imani katika IEBC mpya, akihakikisha kwamba tume imeimarisha mifumo ya uwajibikaji, ikiwa ni pamoja na utambuzi thabiti wa wapiga kura na teknolojia ya uwasilishaji wa matokeo.
Ekegusii: Ethekon nasabete aba'Kenyansgokonya koagacha obwegenwa ase oborai oboyia bwekeombe keria getenerete goakia chikura (IEBC), koenekeria abakenya ng'a obotenereri bwabo bwkongirie obomaiso marore, amo nokomongera buna chikura korwa chisenta chigotomwa goetera tekinorochi.
Dholuo: Ethekon nojiwo Jo-Kenya mondo okony e gero yie e duol manyien mar yiero , IEBC , kendo nojiwo ni kamisen no osetego chenro mag yore maler moriwo koda ng'eyo joma oyiero kod lony ma nya sani mar chiwo duoko.
Somali: Ethekon waxay ugu baaqday dadka Kenya inay gacan ka geystaan dib u dhiska kalsoonida IEBC cusub, waxayna xaqiijisay in guddiga uu xoojiyay nidaamyada xisaabinta, oo ay ku jiraan aqoonsiga codbixiyayaasha adag iyo tikniyoolajiyadda gudbinta natiijooyinka.

English: To ensure consistency in care, the report urges the Ministry of Health to make clinical guidelines accessible to all providers and to enforce postpartum monitoring standards through supervision and clinical audits.
Kiswahili: Ili kuhakikisha uthabiti katika huduma, ripoti hiyo inahimiza Wizara ya Afya kufanya miongozo ya kliniki ipatikane kwa watoa huduma wote na kutekeleza viwango vya ufuatiliaji baada ya kujifungua kupitia usimamizi na ukaguzi wa kliniki.
Ekegusii: Erio goikerania obuya na oboronge ase obobwenia, eripoti eye nigo yarwete ogosaba ng'a eminisitiri yobobwenia emnyie abakoreri baye emeroberio yobobwenia erio kobeka chinguru obomongeria bwomongina ekero aiboire ase okobamanyia abanyagitari abanene koenekia afia yomongina nomwana oye.
Dholuo: Mondo arita maber omed nenore, lipodno jiwo migawo mar weche thieth mondo oket chike matayo weche thieth obed maler ne lakteche duto kendo one ni rang'iny mag  thieth bang' nyuol onon kod  nonro mag thieth.
Somali: Si loo hubiyo iswaafajinta daryeelka, warbixinta ayaa ku boorineysa Wasaaradda Caafimaadka inay tilmaamaha bukaanka u dhigto mid la heli karo dhammaan bixiyeyaasha iyo inay hirgeliyaan heerarka kormeerka dhalmada kadib iyada oo loo marayo kormeerka iyo baaritaannada bukaanka.

English: Murkomen said the government also launched a toll-free hotline to enable the public to report abductions anonymously, ensuring confidentiality and encouraging information sharing.
Kiswahili: Murkomen alisema serikali pia ilizindua simu ya dharura ya bure ili kuwawezesha umma kuripoti utekaji nyara bila kujulikana, kuhakikisha usiri na kuhimiza ushiriki wa taarifa.
Ekegusii: Murkomen agateba nga eserikari nero yaansete omoroberio bwechisimi chiamorero gokonya abanto komanyia eserikari buna abanto bakobwatia nagotamigwa mamincha yerichikobatari kwemanyekani barabwo mbarabi,korenda obobisi na gosegeta okoerania amang'ana.
Dholuo: Murkomen nowacho ni sirkal bende ne ochako chenro mar ywayo tol ma onge chudo mondo omi ji thuolo mar chiwo ripot e wi meko maok ong'ere, rito weche maling'ling' kendo jiwo ji mondo ochiw ler mar wach.
Somali: Murkomen ayaa sheegay in dowladdu ay sidoo kale bilaabeen khadka tooska ah ee lacag la'aanta ah si ay dadweynaha u oggolaadaan inay si qarsoodi ah u soo sheegaan afduubyada, iyagoo hubinaya asturnaanta iyo dhiirigelinta wadaagista macluumaadka.

English: We call upon all stakeholders political leaders, candidates, and citizens to exercise restraint, demonstrate respect for law and put the interest of the nation above all else.Let us remember: Elections are not a battle of might, but a contest of ideas.
Kiswahili: Tunawaomba wadau wote viongozi wa kisiasa, wagombea, na raia kujizuia, kuonyesha heshima kwa sheria na kuweka maslahi ya taifa mbele ya yote. Tukumbuke: Uchaguzi si vita vya nguvu, bali ni mashindano ya mawazo.
Ekegusii: Nigo tokoboria abarai bonsi begesiasa, baria bakorigia chikura, na abaninainch babe abatoereru, borokererie gosika richiko na kobeka okogania kwa abanto igoro ya kende gionsi.Tiga toinyore: Chikura tari esegi, tari okobetererigwa, chinguru,okogosereria gose ning'o ore nechinguru kobua oyonde, korende okoamemeraria kwebirengererio.
Dholuo: Wakwayo jokanyo, jotelo mag siasa duto, jokanyo mag siasa, kod jopiny mondo oti gi ritruok, omi chik luor, kendo oket dwaro mar piny obed motelo ne gimoro amora. Wapar ni yiero ok en tulo to mana piem mar paro.
Somali: Waxaan ugu baaqaynaa dhammaan daneeyayaasha hoggaamiyeyaasha siyaasadeed, musharixiinta, iyo muwaadiniinta inay is-hoosaysiiyaan, muujiyaan ixtiraamka sharciga oo ay danta qaranka ka dhigaan wax kasta oo kale. Xusuusnow: Doorashooyinka ma aha dagaal xoog, laakiin waa tartan fikrado.

English: MORE OPTIONS AGREE 0 The Public Service Commission (PSC) invited applications from Kenyan professionals to fill 86 job vacancies The commission noted that successful candidates will work at the Ministry of Foreign and Diaspora Affairs Career expert Simon Ingari told TUKO .
Kiswahili: CHAGUO ZAIDI ZINAKUBALIANA 0 Tume ya Utumishi wa Umma (PSC) ilialika maombi kutoka kwa wataalamu wa Kenya kujaza nafasi 86 za kazi Tume ilibainisha kuwa wagombea waliofaulu watafanya kazi katika Wizara ya Mambo ya Nje na Diaspora. Mtaalamu wa kazi Simon Ingari aliambia TUKO.
Ekegusii: NAIRANERIO AMANGE NAREO. Ekeombe kiobokoreri bweserikari (PSC) kiamanyirie abakenya abasomu ase amangana ao ao gotoma gotoma ogosaba kwabokonyora emeremo yamabaga 86. Abatebnereri aba nigo baroche nga bari baranyore egasi eye nigo barakore emeremo ase obifi yemiinisitiri yamang'ana aisoko buna kemanyi oria ogosemia abande Simon Ingari atebetie TUKO .
Dholuo: Yiero mamoko oyier nono. Kamisen ma ndiko jotije mar  PSC norwako kwayo kowuok kuom  joKenya mondo oket thuolo mag tije piero aboro gi auchiel. Kamisen'no nolero ni jogo mabiro yudo thuolo mag tich biro tiyo e Migao mar weche maoko. Jalony eweche mag tije Simon Ingari nowacho ne TUKO.
Somali: Shirkadda Adeegga Dadweynaha (PSC) ayaa casuumay codsiyada xirfadlayaasha Kenya si ay u buuxiyaan 86 shaqo oo bannaan Guddiga ayaa xusay in musharixiinta guulaystay ay ka shaqeyn doonaan Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda iyo Diaspora Khabiir xirfadeed Simon Ingari ayaa u sheegay TUKO .

English: The Public Service Commission (PSC) has advertised 86 job opportunities for Kenyan professionals under the State Department for Foreign and Diaspora Affairs.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Utumishi wa Umma (PSC) imetangaza nafasi 86 za kazi kwa wataalamu wa Kenya chini ya Idara ya Mambo ya Nje na Diaspora.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kiobokoreri bweserikari (PSC) giatangasire amabaga emeremo 86 ase abakenya abasomu bechingencho ao ao ase ensemo yobokoreri bweserikari yamangana echinse chiasiko.
Dholuo: Kamisen  mar jotije mar PSC oselando thuolo mag tije piero aboro gi auchiel ne joma olony e Kenya e bwo migawo mar weche ma oko.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Dadweynaha (PSC) ayaa xayeysiiyay 86 fursado shaqo oo loogu talagalay xirfadlayaasha Kenya ee hoos yimaada Waaxda Arrimaha Dibadda iyo Duleedka.

English: Beware of fraudsters soliciting for bribes from the public while masquerading as commission staff, it warned job seekers.
Kiswahili: Jihadhari na matapeli wanaoomba rushwa kutoka kwa umma huku wakijifanya wafanyakazi wa tume, ilionya watafuta kazi.
Ekegusii: Kabe maiso nabang'ainereria bagosaba amaaki korwa ase abanto bagwekora abakori emeremo bekeombe keria getenererete obokoreri bweserikari, ogokurera gochia abakorigia emeremo.
Dholuo: Osiemo joma manyo tich niya: "Tang'uru gi joma wuondore ka gikwayo asoya ne ji sama gitiyo kaka jotich mar kamisen.
Somali: Ka digtoonow khiyaano-bixiyayaasha ka dalbanaya musuqmaasuq dadweynaha iyagoo isu-xidhaya shaqaalaha guddiga, waxay ka digtay dadka shaqo raadinaya.

English: County Government of Mombasa The county government of Mombasa provides quality, responsive and comprehensive healthcare services to all citizens through innovative, efficient and effective health systems 5.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti ya Mombasa Serikali ya kaunti ya Mombasa hutoa huduma bora, zinazoitikia na za kina za afya kwa raia wote kupitia mifumo bunifu, yenye ufanisi na yenye ufanisi 5.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yekaonti ya Mombasa. Eserikari yekaonti ya Mombasa nigo ekorwa obokoreri oboikeranu, borengete okogania gwa kera omonto ase obobwenia gochia abanto bonsi gpetera obomanyi bwabono, ase egeka egekegoetera ebirengo 5 biobobwenia.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti ma Mombasa Sirkal mar county mar Mombasa chiwo weche thieth mabeyo, makonyo kendo malong'o ne ji duto kokalo kuom chenro mag thieth manyien, mabeyo kendo mang'ith abich.
Somali: Maamulka gobolka Mombasa Maamulka gobolka Mombasa wuxuu dhammaan muwaadiniinta siinayaa adeegyo caafimaad oo tayo leh, waxtar leh oo dhammaystiran iyada oo loo marayo nidaamyo caafimaad oo hal abuur leh, hufan oo wax ku ool ah 5.

English: The police chief further urged the public to stay alert, adding that all rescued individuals had been documented and allowed to return home as investigations continue.
Kiswahili: Mkuu wa polisi pia aliwasihi umma kuwa macho, akiongeza kuwa watu wote waliookolewa wameandikishwa na kuruhusiwa kurudi nyumbani huku uchunguzi ukiendelea.
Ekegusii: Omosikari omonene akagenderera gosaba abanto ng'a babe maiso, na kogesa nga baria bonsi bakonyetwe mbarikire bonsi na bancheirwe koirana chinka chiabo ekero obotuki bogendererete.
Dholuo: Obila no nojiwo ji duto mondo obed motang', komedo wacho ni ji duto mane oresi ne oket e andike kendo ne oyienegi dok dala ka nonro dhi nyime.
Somali: Taliyaha booliska ayaa sidoo kale ugu baaqay dadweynaha inay feejignaadaan, isagoo intaa ku daray in dhammaan dadka la soo badbaadiyay la diiwaangeliyey loona oggolaaday inay guryahooda ku noqdaan maadaama baaritaannada ay sii socdaan.

English: The arrests follow an investigation mounted by the EACC after receiving numerous complaints from motorists and members of the public regarding rampant extortion by the officers manning the roadblock, the EACC statement read in part.
Kiswahili: Kukamatwa kwa watu hao kunafuatia uchunguzi uliofanywa na EACC baada ya kupokea malalamiko mengi kutoka kwa madereva na umma kuhusu ulaghai uliokithiri unaofanywa na maafisa wanaolinda kizuizi cha barabarani, taarifa ya EACC ilisomeka kwa sehemu.
Ekegusii: Okobwatwa kwabo nigo kwanyarekate goetera obonyonki na nekeombe keria gekorwania pobokorekanu (EACC) ekero okumurungania okonge kora abagendi chirori nabaninchiigoro yokomigwa na gosabwa amaakiba abobisa baria batenerete chipara abwo bakobeka ebirichania ase epara, buna amangana a EACC atebete.
Dholuo: Meko no ne oluwo nonro mane otim kod duol mar EACC bang' yudo ywak mang'eny kowuok kuom derepe kod jopiny e wi ohala ma ne otim gi josiasa ma ne omonjo kambi, Lipot mar duol mar EACC ne wacho.
Somali: Xadhiga ayaa ka dambeeya baaritaan ay sameysay EACC kadib markii ay heshay cabashooyin badan oo ka yimid darawalada baabuurta iyo dadweynaha oo ku saabsan xadgudubyo badan oo ay sameeyeen saraakiisha ka shaqeeya xannibaadda wadada, sida ku cad qoraalka EACC.

English: The operation is part of the ongoing crackdown on bribery at public service delivery points to improve access to quality services for all citizens.
Kiswahili: Operesheni hii ni sehemu ya msako unaoendelea dhidi ya rushwa katika vituo vya utoaji huduma kwa umma ili kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma bora kwa raia wote.
Ekegusii: Ogasagana oko nenchera eyemo yomoroberiobwokorigia ebibago biogosaba amaakia as obokoreri bweserikarikorengete goikerania obokoreri obuya ase abanto bonsi.
Dholuo: Timno en achiel kuom yore ma itiyogo e kedo gi mibadhi e kuonde tije mag sirkal mondo jopiny duto  oyud kony maber marom.
Somali: Howlgalkani wuxuu qayb ka yahay tallaabooyinka socda ee la dagaalanka laaluushka goobaha adeegyada dadweynaha lagu bixiyo si loo wanaajiyo helitaanka adeegyo tayo leh oo loogu talagalay dhammaan muwaadiniinta.

English: Apply for a Passport Apply for a Driving License KRA Services Apply for a Birth Certificate Apply for Certificate of Good Conduct Save for Affordable Housing Register a Business Apply for a Marriage Certificate Over 22,000 Government services now available from 100+ Ministries, Counties, Departments and Agencies.
Kiswahili: Omba Pasipoti Omba Leseni ya Udereva Huduma za KRA Omba Cheti cha Kuzaliwa Omba Cheti cha Mwenendo Mzuri Hifadhi kwa Nyumba ya Bei Nafuu Sajili Biashara Omba Cheti cha Ndoa Zaidi ya huduma 22,000 za serikali sasa zinapatikana kutoka Wizara, Kaunti, Idara na Mashirika zaidi ya 100.
Ekegusii: Toma gosaba kwao konyora epass poti toma ogosaba kwao konyora erensesi yokogendia erori. Obokoreri bwekeombe giokorusia ebango (KRA) nabo bobwekaine boria bwokorigia esatifiketi yokoiborwa gose esatifiketi yomonto omotebere gokonya kogora enyomba yobomenyo yomoroberio bweserikari, korika ebiasara biaogose gosaba esatitifiketi yenyomo. Goetania obokoreri ao ao bweserikari 22,000 bono nkonyorekana bore korwa goetania obokoreri ao ao bwechimisitiri 100+, chiekaonti.
Dholuo: ndikri mar yudo barua mar paspot, ndikri mar yudo otiko mar riembo Chenro mag duol machoko osuru kwa otiko mar nyuol kwa barua mar tim maber kung ne ot manengo ne yot kwa barua mar keny moingo chenro alufi perio ariyo gi ariyo mag sirikal sani yudore kowuok e migepe moingo mia achiel, gwenge mar kaunti , migepe kod grube man e bwoye.
Somali: Codso baasaboor Codso ruqsad wadista Adeegyada KRA Codso Shahaadada dhalashada Codso Shahaadada anshaxa Wanaagsan Save for Affordable Housing Register Ganacsi Codso Shahaadada Guurka In ka badan 22,000 Adeegyo Dowladeed oo hadda laga heli karo 100+ Wasaaradood, Degmooyin, Waaxyo iyo Hay'ado.

English: Having an eCitizen account allows Kenyan citizens to have access to all government services, while Foreigners/Residents users have access to some government services conveniently through one click of signing in.
Kiswahili: Kuwa na akaunti ya eCitizen huwawezesha raia wa Kenya kupata huduma zote za serikali, huku watumiaji wa wageni/wakazi wakipata huduma za serikali kwa urahisi kupitia mbofyo mmoja wa kuingia.
Ekegusii: Koba nesatifiketi ya eCitizen nigo egokonya abaKenya gosoa na konyora obokoreri ao ao ase eserikari, abwo ase abanto bakorwa isiko yense boigo bagoikera obokoreri bweserikari goetra okobata rimo rioka ientaneti.
Dholuo: Bedo gi akaunt mar japiny miyo raia mag Kenya thuolo mar yudo yore duto mag sirkal, to joma welo/jodak e pinje mamoko nyalo yudo yore mag sirkal e yo maber kokalo kuom tudruok dichiel mar donjo.
Somali: Haysashada koontada eCitizen waxay u oggolaaneysaa muwaadiniinta Kenya inay helaan dhammaan adeegyada dowladda, halka dadka isticmaala ajaanibta / deganeyaasha ay helaan adeegyada dowladda qaarkood si fudud iyagoo gujinaya hal guji.

English: Constructively participate in the forums and platforms created by the County Government for Public Participation; Seek the guidance of the county government where the person is unable to read or to access information on the Public Participation Issue.
Kiswahili: Shiriki kwa njia ya kujenga katika majukwaa na majukwaa yaliyoundwa na Serikali ya Kaunti kwa ajili ya Ushiriki wa Umma; Tafuta mwongozo wa serikali ya kaunti pale ambapo mtu huyo hawezi kusoma au kupata taarifa kuhusu Suala la Ushiriki wa Umma.
Ekegusii: Gitegerera na koboria amaswari ase emekutano yeserikari yechikaonti konyora ebirengererio bia abanto; Rigia ogokonywa korwa aserikari yekaonti ase baria batamanyeti gosoma na korika goikera amang'ana igoro yogosanga nagokwanerana.
Dholuo: Riw lwedo gi chuny maler chenro mag riwruok mar oganda ma sirkande mag kaunti ochano; manyo yo ma sirkande mag kaunti ka ng'ato ok nyal somo kata yudo weche motenore kod riwruok e chenro mag oganda.
Somali: Ka qaybqaad si wax ku ool ah goobaha iyo goobaha ay Dowladda Gobolka u abuurtay ka qaybgalka dadweynaha; Raadinta hagida dowladda gobolka marka qofka uusan awoodin inuu akhriyo ama uu helo macluumaad ku saabsan Arrinta ka qaybgalka dadweynaha.
