English: The Governor urged citizens to actively participate in the county's development journey.
Kiswahili: Gavana aliwasihi wananchi kushiriki kikamilifu katika safari ya maendeleo ya kaunti.
Ekegusii: Omogafana agasaba abanto korwa ebirengeererio biabo goikerania esafari yamagenderero ekaonti.
Dholuo: Gavana nojiwo raia duto mondo oriwre lwedo e wuodh dongruok e kaunti.
Somali: Guddoomiyuhu wuxuu muwaadiniinta ugu baaqay inay si firfircoon uga qaybqaataan safarka horumarinta gobolka.

English: He encouraged the group to apply for the County Enterprise Fund, which provides financial assistance to community organisations and youth and women's groups to implement their projects.
Kiswahili: Aliwahimiza kikundi hicho kuomba Mfuko wa Biashara wa Kaunti, ambao hutoa usaidizi wa kifedha kwa mashirika ya kijamii na vikundi vya vijana na wanawake ili kutekeleza miradi yao.
Ekegusii: Agasegeta abanto gotoma ogosaba kwabo ase omoroberio biebiasara bike bike biekaonto gwekonyera, oyio okorwa obokonyi bwechibesa ase ebiombe biebonyoro, ebiombe biabasae na abangina gokora ebiasara biabo.
Dholuo: Ne ojiwo grubno mondo oket kwayo ne pesa mar chenro mag kaunti, ma chiwo kony mar pesa ne riwruoge mag oganda koda grube mag rowere kod mon mondo otiek chenrogi.
Somali: Wuxuu kooxda ku dhiiri geliyey inay dalbadaan Sanduuqa Ganacsiga Gobolka, kaas oo bixiya kaalmo dhaqaale ururada bulshada iyo kooxaha dhalinyarada iyo haweenka si ay u hirgeliyaan mashaariicdooda.

English: Governor Dr. Bii urged residents to remain vigilant and to make use of the county's healthcare services, especially during the festive period and the ongoing season of rites of passage.
Kiswahili: Gavana Dkt. Bii aliwasihi wakazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kutumia huduma za afya za kaunti, hasa wakati wa sherehe na msimu unaoendelea wa sherehe za kuaga mwili.
Ekegusii: Omogafana Dak. Biagasaba gotigara koba maiso na gotumia buya obokoreri afia yekaonti, mono kegima chingaki echi chiomotimoko na nechinyangi chiabana kwaroka.
Dholuo: Gavana Laktar Bii nojiwo jodak mondo obed motang' kendo oti gi weche thieth mag loch gwenge, ahinya ahinya e kinde mag nyasi kod kindeni mag chenro mag tero ji nyange.
Somali: Guddoomiye Dr. Bii ayaa ku booriyay dadka deggan inay sii ahaadaan feejignaan iyo inay ka faa'iideystaan adeegyada daryeelka caafimaadka ee degmada, gaar ahaan xilliyada ciidaha iyo xilliyada socda ee xafladaha gudbinta.

English: The Commission urged all candidates and the public to maintain peace and order during the campaign period.
Kiswahili: Tume iliwasihi wagombea wote na umma kudumisha amani na utulivu wakati wa kipindi cha kampeni.
Ekegusii: batenereri nigo basabete barigi chikura bonsinabanainchi koba nomorembe amo noborendi chingaki chiokorigia chikura.
Dholuo: Komisenano nojiwo jolendo duto kaachiel gi ji duto mondo obed gi kuwe kod ler e kinde kampenno.
Somali: Guddiga ayaa ugu baaqay dhammaan musharixiinta iyo shacabka inay nabad iyo nidaam ilaaliyaan inta lagu jiro muddada ololaha.

English: Major roles of political parties include: Enhancing democratic participation through political mobilization by encouraging the public to participate in elections; and formulating public policies, recruitment and selection of political leaders.
Kiswahili: Majukumu makubwa ya vyama vya siasa ni pamoja na: Kuimarisha ushiriki wa kidemokrasia kupitia uhamasishaji wa kisiasa kwa kuhamasisha umma kushiriki katika uchaguzi; na kuunda sera za umma, kuajiri na kuchagua viongozi wa kisiasa.
Ekegusii: Emeremo emenene yebiombe biegesiasa nebwatekaine: Gokinia chinkwana nabanto goetera okoreta abanto amo gesiasa ase ogosegeta abanrto korwa ebirengererio biabo buna bategate obogambi bwabo koba goetera obochori; na korwa ebirengererio buna amachiko abwenerete korosigwa, korika baria bakorigia chikura na gotangasa ababui.
Dholuo: Moko kuom gik madongo ma duod od buche mag siasa timo gin: Riwo lwedo loch mar sirkal kokalo kuom jiwo ji mondo oriwgi e yiero; kendo loso chike mag sirkal, ndiko kod yiero jotelo mag siasa.
Somali: Doorashada ugu weyn ee xisbiyada siyaasadeed waxaa ka mid ah: Kordhinta ka qaybgalka dimuqraadiyadda iyada oo loo marayo dhaqdhaqaaqa siyaasadeed iyada oo lagu dhiirigelinayo shacabka inay ka qaybgalaan doorashooyinka; iyo sameynta siyaasadaha dadweynaha, shaqaaleysiinta iyo xulashada hoggaamiyeyaasha siyaasadeed.

English: He urged residents to continue registering under the scheme to access free healthcare services, and to enable the government plan better for better health provision.
Kiswahili: Aliwasihi wakazi kuendelea kujiandikisha chini ya mpango huo ili kupata huduma za afya bila malipo, na kuwezesha mpango wa serikali kuwa bora zaidi kwa ajili ya utoaji bora wa afya.
Ekegusii: Nasabete abamenyi kogenderera kwerika inse yomoroberio bwobobwenia erio goikera obobwenia bwa bosa, na gokonya eserikari koroberia buya igoro yokonyora obobwenia.
Dholuo: Nojiwo jodak mondo odhi nyime timo chenro mar yudo thieth maonge chudo, kendo mano ne dhi miyo sirkal obed gi chenro maber mar yudo thieth.
Somali: Wuxuu dadka deggan ugu baaqay inay sii wadaan diiwaangelinta nidaamka si ay u helaan adeegyo daryeel caafimaad oo bilaash ah, iyo inay awood u yeeshaan qorshaha dowladda si ka wanaagsan si loo helo daryeel caafimaad oo wanaagsan.

English: The President said the government is constantly improving SHA to make it more efficient, weeding out criminal elements taking advantage of loopholes in the system to swindle the public.
Kiswahili: Rais alisema serikali inaboresha SHA kila mara ili kuifanya iwe na ufanisi zaidi, ikiondoa vipengele vya uhalifu kwa kutumia mianya katika mfumo huo ili kuwalaghai umma.
Ekegusii: Omoraisi agateba ng'a eserikari negebndererete kobeka buya omoroberio o'SHA erio koyokora koba omoikeranu ase, goetera ogosimora abasaria ime yomoroberio oyio bagendererete korora ase ebibao bire ase obokoreri koibera abanto.
Dholuo: Ker nowacho ni sirkal medo timo dongruok ne chenro mar thieth mar SHA kinde ka kinde mondo omi obed gi nyak maber, kogolo timbe mahundu minyalo tigo e chenro no kaka yo mar chiko ji.
Somali: Madaxweynaha ayaa sheegay in dowladdu ay si joogto ah u hagaajineyso SHA si ay u noqoto mid wax ku ool ah, iyada oo la baabi'inayo qaybaha dambiyada ah iyagoo ka faa'iideysanaya godadka nidaamka si ay u khiyaanaynayaan dadweynaha.

English: Governor Mutai assured residents that measures have been put in place to ensure continuity of healthcare services.
Kiswahili: Gavana Mutai aliwahakikishia wakazi kwamba hatua zimechukuliwa ili kuhakikisha mwendelezo wa huduma za afya.
Ekegusii: Omogafana Mutai naenekeretia abamenyi ng'a emeroberio yabekirwe erengete okogenderera korwa obokoreri bwobobwenia.
Dholuo: Jatend kaunti Mutai nosingo ne jopiny  ni okang' mowinjore oseketi mar neno ni chenro mag weche thieth odhi nyime.
Somali: Guddoomiye Mutai wuxuu dadka deggan u xaqiijiyay in tallaabooyin lagu hirgaliyay si loo hubiyo joogteynta adeegyada daryeelka caafimaadka.

English: 750 million into project Thiba Dam site assets handed over to Kirinyaga County Government as Waiguru promises to convert it into hospital Waiguru backs President Ruto's Broad Based Government, urges residents to resist divisive leaders Sagana Industrial City to support farmers, create 150,000 jobs, Waiguru says as Ruto pledges to inject Ksh.
Kiswahili: Milioni 750 za mali za eneo la mradi wa Bwawa la Thiba zakabidhiwa kwa Serikali ya Kaunti ya Kirinyaga huku Waiguru akiahidi kulibadilisha kuwa hospitali Waiguru aiunga mkono Serikali ya Rais Ruto, awasihi wakazi kupinga viongozi wa mgawanyiko Sagana Industrial City ili kuwasaidia wakulima, kuunda ajira 150,000, Waiguru anasema huku Ruto akiahidi kuingiza Ksh.
Ekegusii: Chimirioni 750 chiabekirwe ase omoroberio mwamache o'Thiba Dam nebinto biaye bionsi biarwetwe gochia eserikari yekaonti ya Kirinyaga buna Waiguru arire aira koyeonchoreria koba enyagitari Waiguru nigo agisira eserikari yobaomo, agosaba abanainch kwanga siasa embe, na abarai bomochie omonene bwechifakitori o'Sagana gokonya abaremi, barosie amabaga emeremo 150,000, Waiguru nigo atebire ayio ekiagera Ruto otebire korwa chisiringi.
Dholuo: pesa ma romo milion mia abiriyo gi prabich oket e chenro mar gero yao mar Thiba mwandu ma ochiw ne ksirkand kaunti ma Kirinyaga ka Waiguru  nosingore ni gibiro loko mano obed osiptal. Waiguru osiro Sirkal ma manywanda mar President Ruto, ojiwo ji mondo okwed jotelo mag Sagana Industrial mondo okony jopur, kendo ne oketo tije alufu mia achiel gi piero aich Waiguru ne owacho ka Ruto singore mar rwako siling
Somali: 750 milyan oo doolar oo ah hantida mashruuca Thiba Dam ayaa loo wareejiyay Xukuumadda Gobolka Kirinyaga iyadoo Waiguru ay ballanqaadayso inay isbitaal ka dhigeyso Waiguru waxay taageertaa Xukuumadda Guud ee Madaxweyne Ruto, waxay ku boorineysaa dadka deggan inay iska caabinayaan hoggaamiyeyaasha kala qaybsanaanta ee Sagana Industrial City si ay u taageeraan beeraleyda, ay u abuuraan 150,000 oo shaqo, Waiguru ayaa sheegay in Ruto uu ballanqaaday inuu durbiyo Ksh.

English: He further pledged to work closely with Governor Timamy to foster unity in Lamu County, urging residents to shun divisive politics Ã¢ ‚¬  especially those driven by tribal, religious, or regional differences Ã¢ ‚¬  for the sake of progress.
Kiswahili: Zaidi ya hayo, aliahidi kufanya kazi kwa karibu na Gavana Timamy ili kukuza umoja katika Kaunti ya Lamu, akiwahimiza wakazi kuepuka siasa za mgawanyiko - hasa zile zinazoendeshwa na tofauti za kikabila, kidini, au kikanda - kwa ajili ya maendeleo.
Ekegusii: Akagenderera korwa chiira chiogokora emeremo amo ase okobwaterana na nomogafana Timamy erio gokinia obomo aaria ekaonti ya Lamu, ogosorora abamenyi kwanga siasa yokobagana abanto mono kegima siasa erengete obogesaku, kebokanisa' keboisiramu, gose gose ogotaigwanana kerogongo erio goikerania amagenderero.
Dholuo: Ne omedo singore mar tiyo kanyachiel gi Gavana Timamy e jiwo winjruok e kaunti mar Lamu, kojiwo jogweng'no mondo owe siasa mag pogruok, to ahinya wuon jogo motenore gi pogruok mar oganda, din, kata alwora nikech dongruok.
Somali: Wuxuu sidoo kale ballanqaaday inuu si dhow ula shaqeyn doono Guddoomiye Timamy si kor loogu qaado midnimada Gobolka Lamu, isagoo ku booriyay dadka deggan inay ka fogaadaan siyaasadda kala qaybsanaanta - gaar ahaan kuwa ay keenaan farqiga beelaha, diimaha, ama gobollada - si loo horumariyo.

English: The County Government of Mandera encourages all eligible youth to take advantage of this life-changing opportunity and contribute to the county's development.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti ya Mandera inawahimiza vijana wote wanaostahiki kutumia fursa hii inayobadilisha maisha na kuchangia katika maendeleo ya kaunti.
Ekegusii: Eserikari yekaonti ya Mandera yasegetire abasae bonsi bari bare nogwancherwa kobogoria ribaga eri riabeene goonchoreria obogima bwabo na gosegeta amagenderero yekaonti.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti ma Mandera jiwo rowere duto mowinjore mondo oti gi thuolono e kelo lokruok e ngimagi kendo okonyo e dongruok mar kaunti no.
Somali: Maamulka Degmada Mandera wuxuu ku dhiirigelinayaa dhamaan dhalinyarada u qalma inay ka faa'iideystaan fursadan nolosha beddelaya oo ay gacan ka geystaan horumarinta degmada.

English: Speaking after the awards in Nairobi, today, CECM for Finance Jones Omwenga said the county will continue engaging the public in its decisions for impact.
Kiswahili: Akizungumza baada ya tuzo hizo jijini Nairobi, leo, CECM for Finance Jones Omwenga alisema kaunti itaendelea kuwashirikisha umma katika maamuzi yake ya athari.
Ekegusii: Gokwana nyuma yokorwaebiigwa biobobui gose ogokora buya aaria Nairobi, rero, Omowasiri bwechibesa Jones Omwenga agateba ng'a ekaonti negenderere nechnkwana nabanainchi ase okorwa ebirengererio biamagenderero.
Dholuo: Kane owuoyo bang' yudo michgo Nairobi, kawuono CECM mar Pesa Jones Omwenga nowacho ni, kaunti no biro dhi nyime miyo ji duto thuolo mar ng'ado paro ewi gik ma biro timore kuom ber.
Somali: Isagoo ka hadlayay abaalmarinta ka dib Nairobi, maanta, CECM for Finance Jones Omwenga ayaa sheegay in gobolka uu sii wadi doono inuu dadweynaha ku lug yeesho go'aamada saameynta.

English: On behalf of the selection Panel, Mr Nyabuga assured members of the public and the governor that his team will exercise transparency and accountability when it commences to pick members of the County Service Board.
Kiswahili: Kwa niaba ya Jopo la uteuzi, Bw. Nyabuga aliwahakikishia umma na gavana kwamba timu yake itatekeleza uwazi na uwajibikaji itakapoanza kuwachagua wanachama wa Bodi ya Huduma ya Kaunti.
Ekegusii: Ase ribaga riokomiti yobochori, Mr Nyabuga akaenekeria abanainchi nomogafana ng'a abanto baye makore emeremo yabo maiso marore na oboikeranu wekero eraanse korigia abakoreri bebodi yekaonti .
Dholuo: Kuom wach yiero mar Bura, Nyabuga nosingo ne ji duto kod gavana ni oganda mage  biro tiyo gi thuolo kod ting' ka ochako yiero joma biro bedo e bod mar maloso chenro mar kaunti
Somali: Magaca Guddiga xulashada, Mr. Nyabuga wuxuu u xaqiijiyay shacabka iyo guddoomiyaha in kooxdiisa ay muujin doonto hufnaan iyo mas'uuliyad marka ay bilaabato xulashada xubnaha Guddiga Adeegga Gobolka.

English: ARTICLE 19 condemns Kenyan officials' use of violence and intimidation against students, the public, and journalists.
Kiswahili: KIFUNGU CHA 19 kinalaani matumizi ya vurugu na vitisho kwa maafisa wa Kenya dhidi ya wanafunzi, umma, na waandishi wa habari.
Ekegusii: RICHIKO RIA 19 riairire bobe abobisa ba Kenya ase ogotumia eburaburu na kogosereria gochia ase abana besukuru, abanainchi, na abariki amang'ana.
Dholuo: "Sula apar kod ochiko kwero jotend Piny Kenya tiyo kod lweny kod ayany  ewi jopuonjre, oganda, koda jofwambo kod keyo.
Somali: QAYBTA 19 waxay cambaareysaa adeegsiga rabshadaha iyo cabsida ay mas'uuliyiinta Kenya u geystaan ardayda, dadweynaha, iyo suxufiyiinta.

English: We call on the policing authority to carry out immediate and transparent investigations into the actions, and for the government to be held accountable for its attempts to censor political commentary, artistic expression, and to block the public's access to information,' said Mugambi Kiai, Regional Director for ARTICLE 19 Eastern Africa.
Kiswahili: Tunatoa wito kwa mamlaka ya polisi kufanya uchunguzi wa haraka na wa uwazi kuhusu vitendo hivyo, na serikali iwajibike kwa majaribio yake ya kudhibiti maoni ya kisiasa, kujieleza kisanii, na kuzuia upatikanaji wa taarifa kwa umma,' alisema Mugambi Kiai, Mkurugenzi wa Kanda wa IBARA YA 19 Afrika Mashariki.
Ekegusii: Nigo togosaba abarai abarendi boborendi gochaka obotuki gotachererwa bwa maiso marore buna yabete, naigo eserikari kobogoria obobe bwonsi ase okomiga abanasiasa erio koboboi eki babwenerete gokwana, eki ababugi chingero babwenerete gotera, na gosiekera abanto gotaikera amang'ana,' buna atebete Mugambi Kiai, Omotenereri omonene bworogongo rwa Africa ya Mocha igoro YERICHIKO ARTICLE 19.
Dholuo: Wakwayo sirkal maloso chiek  mondo otim nonro mapiyo kendo e yo maler kuom gik ma ne otimorego, kendo sirkal mondo okaw okang ' mar chiko paro mag siasa, wuoyo e yor kisera, kendo geng'o ji kik obed gi weche mang'eny ma ginyalo winjo, '  Ugwe, Mugambi Kiai  mar sula apar gi ochiko  sirkal mar Africa ma Ugwe nowacho.
Somali: Waxaan ugu baaqaynaa hay'adda booliiska inay fuliyaan baaritaano degdeg ah oo hufan oo ku saabsan tallaabooyinkaas, iyo in dowladda la xisaabtamo dadaallada ay ku tijaabiso faallooyinka siyaasadeed, muujinta farshaxanka, iyo xannibaadda helitaanka macluumaadka dadweynaha, "ayuu yiri Mugambi Kiai, Agaasimaha Gobolka ee ARTICLE 19 Bariga Afrika.

English: The government must facilitate people's right to protest, an important way for citizens to express themselves and participate in governance processes,' said Mugambi Kiai, ARTICLE 19 Eastern Africa Regional Director.
Kiswahili: Serikali lazima irahisishe haki ya watu ya kuandamana, njia muhimu kwa raia kujieleza na kushiriki katika michakato ya utawala,' alisema Mugambi Kiai, MAKALA YA 19 Mkurugenzi wa Kanda ya Afrika Mashariki.
Ekegusii: Eserikari goika erwe ribaga rioboronge bwabanto facilitate people's right to protest, an important way for citizens korwa ebirengererio biabo, koboria amaswari na goteba buna bategete ase obogambi bwabo,' buna atebete Mugambi Kiai, Omoteneneri Omonene bworogongo rwa Africa ya Mocha RICHIKO19.
Dholuo: Mugambi Kiai, sula mar apar kod ochiko Jatelo machiko gwenge ma Afrika ma Ugwe  nowacho kama: ' Sirkal onego okony ratiro mar ji mar dhi e ng'anyo, ma en yo maduong ' ma raia nyalo nyisogo ni gihero loch.
Somali: "Dawladdu waa in ay fududeysaa xuquuqda dadka inay mudaaharaad sameeyaan, taas oo ah hab muhiim u ah muwaadiniinta inay ka hadlaan oo ay ka qaybqaataan geedi socodka maamulka", ayuu yiri Mugambi Kiai, Agaasimaha Gobolka ee ARTICLE 19 Bariga Afrika.

English: ARTICLE 19 urges the Independent International Fact-Finding Mission on Sudan and the International Criminal Court to specifically consider how the information war in Sudan exacerbates harm to civilians, obstructs vital documentation of gross human rights and humanitarian law violations, and contributes to the commission of crimes.
Kiswahili: KIFUNGU CHA 19 kinahimiza Ujumbe Huru wa Kimataifa wa Kutafuta Ukweli kuhusu Sudan na Mahakama ya Kimataifa ya Jinai kuzingatia mahususi jinsi vita vya habari nchini Sudan vinavyozidisha madhara kwa raia, kuzuia uandishi muhimu wa haki za binadamu na ukiukwaji mkubwa wa sheria za kibinadamu, na kuchangia katika utendaji wa uhalifu.
Ekegusii: RICHIKO 19 nigo rigosorora Ekeombe giense Giechinse Chikwegambera ase omoroberio obo bwokomanya ekeene igoro ya Sudan amo Nekoti Yense Egotema Obosaria erigererie buna amang'ana esegi aaria Sudan nigo gokogarei emechando gochia abanainchi, gotanga goikera amangana aganeirie gosoa ekina kiobosaria bwiboronge bwamwanyabanto na ase okobuna amachiko yobokemwanyabanto, na korwa amangana gochia abateneneri bekeombe kioboronge bwamwanyabanto igoro yamamocho.
Dholuo: SULA MAR apar gi ochiko jiwo kamisen mar ratich oganda e piny mangima  e piny Sudan kod od bura mar piny mangima  mondo onon ahinya kaka lwenje mag weche e piny Sudan medo ketho ngima raia, geng'o weche motudore gi ratiro mag dhano kod ketho chike mag dhano, koda kaka gikonyo e tieko timbe mahundu.
Somali: Qodobka 19 wuxuu ku boorinayaa Howlgalka Xaqiijinta Caalamiga ah ee Madaxbanaan ee Suudaan iyo Maxkamadda Caddaaladda Caalamiga ah inay si gaar ah u tixgeliyaan sida dagaalka macluumaadka ee Suudaan uu u sii darayo waxyeelada dadka rayidka ah, u hortago dukumiintiyada muhiimka ah ee ku saabsan xadgudubyada waaweyn ee xuquuqda aadanaha iyo sharciga bani'aadamnimada, isla markaana uu gacan ka geysanayo dembiyada.

English: These violations have occurred amid deep political divisions and the fragmentation of state institutions, fostering a pervasive culture of impunity that undermines media freedom, journalists' safety, and the public's right to information.
Kiswahili: Ukiukaji huu umetokea katikati ya mgawanyiko mkubwa wa kisiasa na mgawanyiko wa taasisi za serikali, na kukuza utamaduni ulioenea wa kutokujali unaodhoofisha uhuru wa vyombo vya habari, usalama wa waandishi wa habari, na haki ya umma ya kupata habari.
Ekegusii: Okobunwa kwa amachiko aya nigo kwabete ase eminano endito yegesiasa nokobagekana na gotakora emeremo amo ase chinsemo chionsi chiserikari, naigo korwa ribaga ase chingencho chiegesaku kogendereria obosareku ayio undermines media freedom, journalists' safety, and the public's right to information.
Dholuo: Buono ni osetimore kata e kinde ma josiasa opogore kod riwruoge mag sirkal opogore ahinya, kendo mano osemiyo ji mang'eny ong'eyo ni onge ng'ato ang'ata ma nyalo ketho ratiro ma jondik gasede nigo mar timo yiero, rito ratiro ma jondik gasede nigo, kod ratiro ma ji nigo mar yudo weche.
Somali: Xadgudubyadaas waxay ka dhaceen khilaafyo siyaasadeed oo qoto dheer iyo kala qaybsanaanta hay'adaha dowladda, iyagoo kor u qaadey dhaqanka ciqaab la'aanta oo burburinaya xorriyadda warbaahinta, badbaadada suxufiyiinta, iyo xuquuqda shacabka inay helaan macluumaad.

English: Apr 15 - 4 min read PRIME Education CS now warns 'rogue' school officials He said co-curriculum activities should be based on the ministry's policies, guidelines and regulations.
Kiswahili: Aprili 15 - Dakika 4 za kusoma Waziri Mkuu wa Elimu sasa awaonya maafisa wa shule 'wakorofi' Alisema shughuli za mtaala sambamba zinapaswa kutegemea sera, miongozo na kanuni za wizara.
Ekegusii: Omotienyi okane 15 - chitageka 4 gosoma. CHISEMI Chiboroso Omowasiri bwechisemi bono arure ogokurerwa ase abarai bechisukuru abangainereria. Agateba ng'a emeremo ende egokonya abana gosoma goika bibe koreng'ana namachiko yewisara akoraa echisemi, nobotenereri.
Dholuo: Dwe mar ang'wen tarik apar kod abich -ang'wen som jatend migao mar somo sani kwedo jotend skul maricho ne wacho ni weche tuke onego oketi e chike matayo somo , chike kod siem.
Somali: 15 Apr - 4 min akhri PRIME Waxbarashada CS hadda waxay uga digeysaa saraakiisha dugsiyada 'xanta' Wuxuu sheegay in waxqabadyada koorsooyinka ay ku saleysan yihiin siyaasadaha, tilmaamaha iyo xeerarka wasaaradda.

English: Accordingly, the Authority encourages members of the public to report all cases of corruption they encounter at the Authority using the following means; i.
Kiswahili: Kwa hivyo, Mamlaka inawahimiza wananchi kuripoti visa vyote vya rushwa wanavyokabiliana navyo katika Mamlaka kwa kutumia njia zifuatazo; i.
Ekegusii: Korengana nayio, oboteneneri nigo bogosegeta abanto bonsi orwa amanag'ana igoro yobokorekanu bakoumerana naro ase abatenereri goetera chinhera echi; i.
Dholuo: Kaluwore gi mano, telo no jiwo oganda mondo ochiw lipot ewi weche duto mag mibadhi ma giyudo e telo ka gitiyo gi yore maluwogi;
Somali: Sidaa daraadeed, Hay'addu waxay ku dhiiri gelineysaa shacabka inay soo sheegaan dhammaan kiisaska musuqmaasuqa ee ay kula kulmaan Hay'adda iyadoo la adeegsanayo hababka soo socda; i.

English: Members of the public are warned against engaging with fraudsters claiming to sell genuine examination papers as all official exams are securely administered and protected by strict integrity measures.
Kiswahili: Umma unaonywa dhidi ya kujihusisha na matapeli wanaodai kuuza karatasi halisi za mitihani kwani mitihani yote rasmi inasimamiwa kwa usalama na kulindwa na hatua kali za uadilifu.
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi bakureirwe gokora emeremo gose kobwaterana nabanto abarimo abwo bagwekora nga nkoonia bare amasakara ya amatemwa erio gosegeta oboibi bwamatemwa, mbuya komanya nga amasakara amatemwa ekeene nigo nigo arendire buya na korugwa neserikari chingaki chiaye chiaboronge.
Dholuo: Jopiny duto osiem kuom wach donjore gi  jomibadhi mawacho ni giuso gpenj manenore ni gin adier, nikech penj duto mopwodhi itimo e yo maber kendo oriti gi chike mager matayo adiera.
Somali: Shacabka waxaa looga digay inay la xiriiraan khiyaanooyinka sheeganaya inay iibiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka dhabta ah maadaama dhammaan imtixaannada rasmiga ah ay si ammaan ah u maamulaan oo ay ilaaliyaan tallaabooyin adag oo daacadnimo ah.

English: THE ASSEMBLY AND DEMONSTRATION BILL,2024 Read more KNCHR ADVISORY ON THE ASSEMBLY AND DEMONSTRATION BILL, 2024 Read more THE PUBLIC PARTICIPATION BILL, 2024 KNCHR in Collaboration with the Office of the Attorney General invites members of the public to give input in the draft Public participation Bill.
Kiswahili: MUSWADA WA BUNGE NA MAADHIMISHO, 2024 Soma zaidi USHAURI WA KNCHR KUHUSU MUSWADA WA BUNGE NA MAADHIMISHO, 2024 Soma zaidi MUSWADA WA USHIRIKI WA UMMA, 2024 KNCHR kwa Ushirikiano na Ofisi ya Mwanasheria Mkuu inawaalika wananchi kutoa maoni yao katika rasimu ya Mswada wa Ushiriki wa Umma.
Ekegusii: RICHIKO RIOGOCHA AMO NA KOROBEREREKANA,2024 Soma amange ekeombe keria gekorwanenerera oboronge bwamwanyabanto (KNCHR) NA OBOSEMIA IGORO YOKOROBEREREKANA KORENGANA NERICHIKO, 2024 Soma amange IGORO YERICHIKO RIOGOCHA AMO NAKOROBEREREKANA, 2024 (KNCHR)ase okobwaterana na nofisi yomotenereri amachiko omonene yaariganirie abanto bonsi korwa ebirengererio biabo ase richiko riria rigendererete korosigwa igor yokoroberekana.
Dholuo: Chik mar od bura kod ng'anyo higa mar alufu ariyo prariyo kod ang'wen som weche momedi pach KNCHR e wi chik mar od bura kod ng'anyo,  of Parliament and Protests, 2024 ne osomo weche momedore e wi Bill of Public Engagement, higa mar alufu ariyo prariyo kod ang'wen tudruok kod apis mar atoni Jener gwelo jopiny duto mondo ochi pachgi e chik mar chnro mariwo oganda.
Somali: Hindise Sharciyeedka Golaha iyo Bannaanbaxa, 2024 Wax dheeraad ah ka sii akhri TALOOYINKA KNCHR ee ku saabsan sharciga golaha iyo bananbaxa, 2024

English: Accident Investigation and WIBA Processing When an accident occurs, and an employee is injured, the employer must report to DOSHS County offices within 24 hours if the accident is fatal, and within 7 days for non-fatal accidents.
Kiswahili: Uchunguzi wa Ajali na Usindikaji wa WIBA Wakati ajali inatokea, na mfanyakazi akaumia, mwajiri lazima aripoti kwa ofisi za Kaunti ya DOSHS ndani ya saa 24 ikiwa ajali hiyo ni mbaya, na ndani ya siku 7 kwa ajali zisizo mbaya.
Ekegusii: Obotuki bwomwbasekano na na buna abanto bemebasekano bagoakanwa (WIBA) ekero emebasekano yabeire, na abakori emeremo baumiire, omotachiri goika amanyie chiofisi chiekaonti chitenerete oborendi bwango kegima (DOSHS) gati yechinsa 24 onye omobasekano ore omonene, na gati yamatuko 7 ase omobasekano emesinini.
Dholuo: Nonro mar masich apaya kod chenro mar WIBA e kinde ma masich apaya otimore, kendo jatich oyudo hinyruok, jatelo onego ochiw ripot ne apise mar kaunti mar DOSHS  motelo ne seche piero ariyo kod ang'wen ka masira no rach ahinya kendo motelo ne ndalo abiriyo ka masich apaya no ok lich ahinya.
Somali: Cilmi-baarista shilalka iyo ka baaraandegista WIBA Haddii shil dhaco, shaqaaluhuna dhaawacmay, shaqo-bixiyuhu waa inuu 24 saacadood gudahood u soo sheegaa xafiisyada Gobolka DOSHS haddii shilku yahay mid dhimasho leh, iyo 7 maalmood gudahood shilalka aan dhimasho lahayn.

English: Different electoral bodies in Kenya, from ECK, IIEC, to IEBC, have had a topsy-turvy trust relationship with the public.
Kiswahili: Miili tofauti ya uchaguzi nchini Kenya, kuanzia ECK, IIEC, hadi IEBC, imekuwa na uhusiano wa uaminifu na umma usio na matumaini.
Ekegusii: Chinsemo ao ao chiobochori aiga Kenya, korwa ekeombe kiobochori gia Kenya (ECK), Ekomiti Yengaki Enke Yobochori (IIEC), goika eke kiabono gekorokwa Ekeombe Gietenererete Kiemepaka yobochori gia Kenya (IEBC), biabeire noboate botari obuya nabanainchi.
Dholuo: E piny Kenya, riwruoge mopogore opogore mag yiero, chakre ECK, IIEC, nyaka IEBC, osebedo gi winjruok maber gi ji.
Somali: Hay'adaha doorashada ee kala duwan ee Kenya, laga bilaabo ECK, IIEC, ilaa IEBC, waxay lahaayeen xiriir kalsooni oo aad u adag dadweynaha.

English: A topic which has never been a subject for public participation in Parliament even after the establishment of the Public Debt and Privatization Committee in the National Assembly (13 th Parliament).
Kiswahili: Mada ambayo haijawahi kuwa mada ya ushiriki wa umma Bungeni hata baada ya kuanzishwa kwa Kamati ya Deni la Umma na Ubinafsishaji katika Bunge la Kitaifa (Bunge la 13).
Ekegusii: Egento getanyakoretwa ase chinkwana chia bonsi Bunge nonya nekero yancheranetwe ng'a oborito bwamabdeni yeserikari na okoonigwa gose ogotenenerwa gwechikambani chieserikari nabanto bebiasara (Bunge ya 13).
Dholuo: Thuon wach moro mane pok otwagie  kod oganda e od Bura, kata mana bang ' ka ne osechak kamiti mar gope jopiny kod mano maketo gige jopiny bedo mar jii giewgi e od bura mamalo ( tarik apr kod adek e od bura)
Somali: Mawduuc aan marnaba ahayn mawduuc ay dadweynuhu ka qayb qaataan Baarlamaanka xitaa ka dib markii la aasaasay Guddiga deynta dadweynaha iyo gaarka loo leeyahay ee Golaha Qaranka (13aad Baarlamaanka).

English: The NSSF Anti-corruption Authority provides an avenue for the public to report acts of corruption and/or fraud within its programs and operations.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Kupambana na Rushwa ya NSSF hutoa njia kwa umma kuripoti vitendo vya rushwa na/au ulaghai ndani ya programu na shughuli zake.
Ekegusii: Abateneneri bekeombe keria gokorwania obokorekanu bechibesa chiobogotu (NSSF) nkorwa bare ribaga buna abanainchi babwenerete gokemanyia igoro yobokorekanu bakoumera ime yomoroberio oyo nobokoreri bwaye.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar NSSF ma kedo gi mibadhi chiwo thuolo ne ji mondo ochwal lipode motendore kod  timbe mag mibadhi kod /kata ma ok ber e chenrone kod timbene.
Somali: Hay'adda la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa ee NSSF waxay dadweynaha u siineysaa fursad ay ku soo wargeliyaan falalka musuqmaasuqa iyo/ama khiyaanada barnaamijyada iyo howlaheeda.

English: The committee is required to facilitate public participation and to take into account the views of the public when it makes its report to the Senate.
Kiswahili: Kamati inahitajika kurahisisha ushiriki wa umma na kuzingatia maoni ya umma inapotoa ripoti yake kwa Seneti.
Ekegusii: Ekomiti neganeirie koarigania chinkwana chiabanto bonsi na kobogoria amaoni abo ase oborito ekero bakorwa chiropoti chiabo gochia ase Eseneti.
Dholuo: Komiti no idwaro mondo omi ji duto obed gi thuolo mar wuoyo e wi wachno kendo mondo oket pachgi kuom paro ma ji nigo sama gichiwo ripode ne buche mag od buch senet.
Somali: Guddiga waxaa looga baahan yahay inuu fududeeyo ka qaybgalka dadweynaha iyo inuu tixgeliyo aragtida dadweynaha marka uu u soo gudbiyo warbixintiisa Senate-ka.

English: The Committee carries out public participation, obtains the views of the members of the public on the Bill and prepares a report within the period specified above.
Kiswahili: Kamati hutekeleza ushiriki wa umma, hupata maoni ya umma kuhusu Muswada na huandaa ripoti ndani ya kipindi kilichoainishwa hapo juu.
Ekegusii: Ekomiti nkoarigania ere chinkwana, konyora ebirengererio bia abanto igoro yerichiko na korosia eripoti ase chingaki chiria chibekire abwo igoro.
Dholuo: Komitino timo ga chenro moriwo oganda duto, kawo paro mag oganda ewi chik kod loso lipot e kinde mowinjore malo kanyo.
Somali: Guddiga ayaa ka qaybqaata shacabka, wuxuu ka helaa aragtida xubnaha shacabka ee ku saabsan Sharciga, wuxuuna soo saaraa warbixin muddada kor ku xusan.

English: Lady Justice Martha Karambu Koome As The C J Of The Republic Of Kenya Report On The Consideration Of The Public Participation Bill No.
Kiswahili: Jaji Martha Karambu Koome Kama CJ wa Jamhuri ya Kenya Ripoti Kuhusu Kuzingatiwa kwa Muswada wa Ushiriki wa Umma Na.
Ekegusii: Omongina Omotenereri bwa Amchiko omonene Omochachi Martha Karambu Koome BUNA OMOTENERERI BWAMACHIKO OMONENE, Ense ya Kenya, Eripoti Igoro Yokorwa Ribaga Igoro Yerichiko Riogosangia Abanainchi ase Chinkwana.

English: The Cabinet Secretary also called on stakeholders, particularly the media, to play an active role in educating the public about the risks associated with engaging in SACCO business with unlicensed entities, specifically those resembling pyramid schemes.
Kiswahili: Waziri wa Baraza la Mawaziri pia aliwataka wadau, hasa vyombo vya habari, kuchukua jukumu kubwa katika kuelimisha umma kuhusu hatari zinazohusiana na kujihusisha na biashara ya SACCO na vyombo visivyo na leseni, haswa vile vinavyofanana na mipango ya piramidi.
Ekegusii: Omowasiri boigo akarangeria abasangi bonsi, mono kegima abariki amang'ana, babogori ribaga ribo ase okomanyia na gosomia rabanto igoro yemechando yogwesoi ase ebiombe biechibesa nebiombe biterigeti neserikari, mono kobua buna keria gia pyramid schemes.
Dholuo: Jatend migao bende ne ojiwo jokanyo duto, to ahinya jofwambo, mondo oriw lwedo tij puonjo jopiny ewi hinyruok ma ohendni mag kungo kod hola SACCO maonge kod obok ahinya ahinya mago machal gi chenro mag piramid.
Somali: Xoghayaha golaha wasiiradu wuxuu sidoo kale ugu baaqay daneeyayaasha, gaar ahaan warbaahinta, inay door firfircoon ka ciyaaraan barashada dadweynaha ee ku saabsan khataraha la xiriira ku hawlan ganacsiga SACCO hay'adaha aan shati lahayn, gaar ahaan kuwa u eg nidaamyada piramida.

English: By fostering trust with stakeholders and the public, the State Department will build reliable relationships and promote a culture of integrity in its trade engagements.
Kiswahili: Kwa kukuza uaminifu kati ya wadau na umma, Idara ya Mambo ya Nje itajenga uhusiano wa kuaminika na kukuza utamaduni wa uadilifu katika shughuli zake za kibiashara.
Ekegusii: Ase okoagacha obwegenwa gati yabasangi nabanainchi, eserikari goetera ofisi yobokoreri neagache oboamate obuya na gosegeta engecho yekeene nobwegenwa ase ebiasara biaye nogokwanerana.
Dholuo: Kuom jiwo winjruok maber e kind jokanyo koda jopiny, apis mar loch mag Pinje biro loso winjruok maber e kindgi kendo jiwo timbe makare e tije mag ohala.
Somali: Iyada oo la horumarinayo kalsoonida daneeyayaasha iyo dadweynaha, Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda waxay dhisi doontaa xiriiro la isku halleyn karo waxayna kor u qaadi doontaa dhaqanka daacadnimada hawlaheeda ganacsiga.

English: By 4 months ago State wants Angata Barikkoi residents to register land leases The government now wants communities residing in the troubled Angata Barikkoi area in Trans Mara to formally register land leases with the Land Registrar to avoid conflicts.
Kiswahili: Kufikia miezi 4 iliyopita Serikali yawataka wakazi wa Angata Barikkoi kusajili ukodishaji wa ardhi Serikali sasa inataka jamii zinazoishi katika eneo lenye matatizo la Angata Barikkoi huko Trans Mara kusajili rasmi ukodishaji wa ardhi kwa Msajili wa Ardhi ili kuepuka migogoro.
Ekegusii: Ase emetienyi 4 yaetire eserikari nigo etagete abanto ba Angata Barikkoi korika amarube yokobanchera gotwara amaremo mono kokua baria abare ase eminano yamaremo aaria Angata Barikkoi ime ya Trans Mara kwerika buna etakeire ase omioriki bwamaremo erio gokeania eminanano.
Dholuo: E bwo dweche ang'wen mosekalo, sirkal mamalo ne dwaro ni jodak e taon mar Angata Barikkoi oket nyinggi e kad mar lowo. Sirkandno sani dwaro ni joma odak e alwora mar Angata Barikkoi e Trans Mara oket nyinggi e kad mar lowo kod jandik lowo mondo kik gibed gi ywaruok.
Somali: 4 bilood ka hor dawladdu waxay rabtaa dadka deggan Angata Barikkoi inay diiwaangeliyaan qandaraasyada kireysiga dhulka Dowladdu waxay hadda rabtaa in bulshooyinka ku nool deegaanka Angata Barikkoi ee Trans Mara ay si rasmi ah ugu diiwaangeliyaan qandaraasyada kireysiga dhulka diiwaangelinta dhulka si looga fogaado khilaafaadka.

English: By 3 months ago KWS concludes public consultations on new park fees The public input process will culminate this Friday with a national validation forum at the Kenyatta International Convention Centre (KICC) in Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Kufikia miezi 3 iliyopita KWS yakamilisha mashauriano ya umma kuhusu ada mpya za bustani. Mchakato wa michango ya umma utafikia kilele Ijumaa hii kwa jukwaa la kitaifa la uthibitishaji katika Kituo cha Mikutano cha Kimataifa cha Kenyatta (KICC) jijini Nairobi.
Ekegusii: Ase emetienyi 3 yaetire ekeombe keria getenenerete chingiti chiorosana (KWS) ngiakorete chinkwana chiaye igoro yekerengo ekeyia giechibesa chiogotenenia chigari aroro. Omoroberio oyo bwokonyora ebirengererio korwa ase abanto noike omoerio oye rituko ria chuma ewiki eye nakobwatigwa nokoenekigwa kwaye aaria Nairobi enyomba yemesangerekano ya Kenyatta International Convention Centre (KICC).

English: By 3 months ago Tanzanian women married to Kenyans to now receive national IDs The government has started the process of documenting Tanzanian women married to Kenyan men in Taita Taveta County.
Kiswahili: Kufikia miezi 3 iliyopita wanawake wa Kitanzania walioolewa na Wakenya sasa wanapokea vitambulisho vya taifa Serikali imeanza mchakato wa kuwaandikisha wanawake wa Kitanzania walioolewa na wanaume wa Kenya katika Kaunti ya Taita Taveta.
Ekegusii: Ase emetienyi 3 yaetire omokungu o'Tanzanian onywomire nomo'Kenya bono konyora ekebande gia Kenya. Eserikari yaansire omoroberio bwokorika omokungu o'Tanzanian onywomire nomosacha omo'Kenya aaria ekaonti ya Taita Taveta.
Dholuo: Kuom dweche adek mosekalo, mon ma okend gi joKenya ma wuok e piny Tanzania mondo sani oyud opande . Sirkal osechako chenro mar ndiko mon ma okend gi chwo ma wuok e piny Kenya e kaunti mar Taita Taveta.

English: In some cases, reporting corruption is more than just a duty; it is a legal obligation: The Prevention and Combating of Corrupt Activities Act requires people in Ã¢ ‚¬Å“positions of authorityÃ¢ ‚¬  in the public and private sectors to report corruption and other crimes listed in the Act involving more than R100Ã‚  000, to the police.
Kiswahili: Katika baadhi ya matukio, kuripoti ufisadi ni zaidi ya wajibu tu; ni wajibu wa kisheria: Sheria ya Kuzuia na Kupambana na Shughuli za Rushwa inawataka watu katika nafasi za mamlaka katika sekta za umma na binafsi kuripoti ufisadi na uhalifu mwingine ulioorodheshwa katika Sheria hiyo unaohusisha zaidi ya R100,000, kwa polisi.

Somali: Xeerka anshaxa ee adeegga dadweynaha wuxuu u baahan yahay dhammaan shaqaalaha adeegga dadweynaha inay u soo sheegaan musuqmaasuqa hay'ad ku habboon.

English: ElectionAccess.org is managed by the International Foundation for Electoral Systems (IFES), an international nonprofit dedicated to strengthening electoral democracy and supporting the right of citizens to participate in free and fair elections.
Kiswahili: ElectionAccess.org inasimamiwa na Wakfu wa Kimataifa wa Mifumo ya Uchaguzi (IFES), shirika lisilo la faida la kimataifa lililojitolea kuimarisha demokrasia ya uchaguzi na kuunga mkono haki ya raia kushiriki katika uchaguzi huru na wa haki.
Ekegusii: ElectionAccess.org nigo geteneneire nekeombe giense igoro yomoroberio nobokoreri bwobochori (IFES), ekio kere ekeombe getari gieserikari gose giokorosia efaita kieruete gokongia dimokirasia ase obochori ase ogosira oborenge bwabaaki chikura korora nga mbare neribaga gokora obochori botari bwokorekanu
Dholuo: Mbui mar electionAccess irio kod chnro mar yiero mar piny mangima mar IFES , riwruok ma ok mar ohala mochung' ne rido ratiro mar yiero kod konyo e ratiro mag jopiny mar timo yiero man thuolo kendo ma ayanga.
Somali: ElectionAccess.org waxaa maamula Hay'adda Caalamiga ah ee Nidaamyada Doorashooyinka (IFES), oo ah hay'ad caalami ah oo aan faa'iido doon ahayn oo loogu talagalay xoojinta dimuqraadiyadda doorashada iyo taageerada xuquuqda muwaadiniinta inay ka qaybqaataan doorashooyin xor ah oo cadaalad ah.

English: GNDEM stands in solidarity with I Watch and all nonpartisan citizen election observers who face threats against their right to observe elections and defend the right of citizens to exercise their vote.
Kiswahili: GNDEM inasimama kwa mshikamano na I Watch na waangalizi wote wa uchaguzi wa raia wasioegemea upande wowote ambao wanakabiliwa na vitisho dhidi ya haki yao ya kuangalia uchaguzi na kutetea haki ya raia ya kutumia kura yao.
Ekegusii: GNDEM neteneine gokongu na I Watch nabanainchi bonsi baria batari koengera gochia aa gose aaria korigereria buna chikura chigoakwa abwo bare ase okogoswa igor yoboronge bwabo bwookomongera buna chikura chigoakwa na koegerera abanainchi goaka chikura chiabo buya.
Dholuo: GNDEM ochung' motegno kod riwruok mar I Watch kaachiel gi jotelo duto ma nono yiero mag ji duto ma romo gi pek ewi ratiro ma gin-go mar chiko yiero kendo riwo lwedo ratiro ma ji nigo mar yiero.
Somali: GNDEM waxay taageersantahay I Watch iyo dhammaan dadka aan xisbiyada ka soo horjeedin ee daawada doorashooyinka muwaadiniinta ah ee la kulma hanjabaado ku saabsan xuquuqdooda inay daawadaan doorashooyinka iyo inay difaacaan xuquuqda muwaadiniinta inay codeeyaan.

English: Everyone has the right to participate in government and public affairs, including by seeking to be elected and to vote in genuinely democratic elections.
Kiswahili: Kila mtu ana haki ya kushiriki katika masuala ya serikali na umma, ikiwa ni pamoja na kutafuta kuchaguliwa na kupiga kura katika chaguzi za kidemokrasia za kweli.
Ekegusii: Kera omonto nare neribaga riokomanya na koboria buna eserikari egokora emeremo, amo na gochorwa gose goaka ekura ase enchera yekeene.
Dholuo: Ng'ato ka ng'ato nigi ratiro mar donjo e weche mag sirkal koda mag jopiny, moriwo nyaka dwaro mondo oyier ng'ato, kendo mondo oyier ng'ato e yor yiero ma ratiro.
Somali: Qof kastaa wuxuu xaq u leeyahay inuu ka qaybqaato arrimaha dowladda iyo dadweynaha, oo ay ka mid yihiin inuu doonayo in la doorto iyo inuu codeeyo doorashooyin dhab ah oo dimuqraadi ah.

English: Nonpartisan (politically impartial and independent) election monitoring by citizens is an extension of the rights to genuine elections, to participate in public affairs, to associate and to seek, receive and impart information in the electoral context.
Kiswahili: Ufuatiliaji wa uchaguzi usioegemea upande wowote (usioegemea upande wowote kisiasa na huru) unaofanywa na raia ni mwendelezo wa haki za uchaguzi halisi, kushiriki katika masuala ya umma, kujumuika na kutafuta, kupokea na kutoa taarifa katika muktadha wa uchaguzi.
Ekegusii: Goetaengera (omonto oteneine gesiasa na ase okeene) okorigereria buna chikura chiogoakwa nigo ebwatekaine nogoikerania nga kera omonto nare neribaga goteba eki arengete goetera goacka chikura, nechikura goakwa ase oboene, giosangerekana na korigia, konyora na komanyia abnde amang'ana igoro yechikura.
Dholuo: Ng'ato ang'ata ma ok odewo wang' ji (ma ok odewo wang' ji kendo ma onge gi ratiro mar timo yiero) rito yiero mar ji duto oriwo miyo ji thuolo mar timo yiero madier, riwo lwedo weche mag oganda, riwo lwedo kendo manyo, yudo kendo chiwo ripot e weche mag yiero.
Somali: Kormeerka doorashooyinka ee aan xisbi lahayn (siyaasadeed ahaan xor iyo madax banaan) ee muwaadiniintu sameeyaan waa kordhinta xuquuqda doorashooyinka dhabta ah, ka qayb qaadashada arrimaha dadweynaha, ku biirista iyo raadinta, helitaanka iyo gudbinta macluumaadka xaaladda doorashooyinka.

English: At the same time, elections allow citizens to aggregate their interests to demand that those seeking office address issues related to economic, social and cultural well being, as well as peace and security.
Kiswahili: Wakati huo huo, uchaguzi huwaruhusu raia kuunganisha maslahi yao ili kuwataka wale wanaotafuta ofisi kushughulikia masuala yanayohusiana na ustawi wa kiuchumi, kijamii na kitamaduni, pamoja na amani na usalama.
Ekegusii: Amo nayio, chikura nigo chifokonya abaaki chikura kobeka amo abirengereri nokogania kwabo amo na koboria ng'a baria bakorigia chikura babogoriew ase oborito aamang'ana obogoko bwenyoro biabo, amagenderero nakomenya buya, naboigo omorembe noborendi.
Dholuo: E kindeno bende, yiero miyo raia thuolo mar wacho ni jogo madwaro bedo jotelo onego okonygi e weche mag yuto, oganda, koda kit ngima ji, kaachiel gi kuwe kod ritruok.
Somali: Isla mar ahaantaana, doorashooyinka waxay u oggolaanayaan muwaadiniinta inay isu soo ururiyaan danahooda si ay u dalbadaan in musharixiinta xafiiska ay wax ka qabtaan arrimaha la xiriira caafimaadka dhaqaalaha, bulshada iyo dhaqanka, iyo sidoo kale nabadda iyo amniga.

English: The rights of citizens to vote and to be elected at periodic, genuine democratic elections are internationally recognized human rights.
Kiswahili: Haki za raia kupiga kura na kuchaguliwa katika chaguzi za kidemokrasia za mara kwa mara na za kweli ni haki za binadamu zinazotambuliwa kimataifa.
Ekegusii: Oboronge bwabanainch goaka chikura na korigia chikura gochorwa ase chingaki gete, gobochori bwaboronge nigo bokobeka motwe gose bogosika oboronge bwekemwanyabanto.
Dholuo: Ratiro mar jopiny mar timo yiero kendo yiero mapile,yiero ma ratiro ong'e e piny mangima kaka yo mar chopo ratiro mar dhano.
Somali: Xuquuqda muwaadiniinta inay codeeyaan iyo in lagu doorto doorashooyin xilliyeed oo dhab ah oo dimuqraadi ah waa xuquuqda aadanaha ee caalamku aqoonsan yahay.

English: Read on WRA warns land grabbers targeting protected dunes KNA2 October 7, 2025 Counties , Environment , Lamu 0 Water Resources Authority (WRA) has issued a directive to individuals illegally occupying and subdividing gazzetted wetlands and sand dunes in Lamu County, ordering cease such activities or face prosecution.
Kiswahili: Soma kuhusu WRA yaonya wanyakuzi wa ardhi wanaolenga matuta yaliyolindwa KNA2 Oktoba 7, 2025 Kaunti , Mazingira , Lamu 0 Mamlaka ya Rasilimali za Maji (WRA) imetoa agizo kwa watu binafsi wanaokaa na kugawanya kinyume cha sheria maeneo oevu na matuta ya mchanga yaliyotengwa na serikali katika Kaunti ya Lamu, ikiamuru kusitisha shughuli hizo au kushtakiwa.
Ekegusii: Soma igoro ya yechinsemo chiemogondo yamache (WRA) eyio yakureire abataboria bemegondo barengete eria ase emachanga yokoagachera na KNA2 omotienyi 10 chitariki 7, omwaka 2025 Chikaonti , Ebitoonchokanaine, Lamu 0 Water Resources Authority (WRA) barure ogochika gochia abanto gete bare ase emegondo eyio na bagendererete koyebaga aaria ekaonti ya Lamu, gochika nga batiga ebikoru ebio gose basaganwe nerichiko.
Dholuo: Som ewi WRA chiwo siem ne joma kawo lowo motudore gi kuonde ma KNA2 kothoe e dwe mar apar  tarik abiriyo higa mar alufu ariyo kod piero ariyo kod abich, kaunti, aluora , Lamu 0 migao mar pi mar  Water Resources Authority (WRA) osechiwo chike ne joma ok ni e chik mondo opog kuonde ma koth chweye kod kuonde ma lowo othoe e kaunti mar Lamu, mondo omi tijego kata chwalgi e nyim doho.
Somali: Read on WRA waxay ka digeysaa dadka dhulka qabsada ee bartilmaameedsada dhuumaha la ilaaliyo KNA2 Oktoobar 7, 2025 Degmooyinka , Deegaanka , Hay'adda Kheyraadka Biyaha ee Lamu 0 (WRA) waxay soo saartay tilmaam loogu talagalay shakhsiyaadka si sharci darro ah u qabsada oo u qaybiya dhul qoyan oo la kormeeray iyo dhuumaha ciidda ee degmada Lamu, iyagoo amray inay joojiyaan hawlahaas ama ay la kulmaan dacwad.

English: We caution all to beware of fraudsters posing as Commission staff to solicit money in exchange for our services What is the Public Service Commission (PSC) It is a constitutional Service Commission established under Article 233 of the Constitution.
Kiswahili: Tunawaonya wote wajihadhari na matapeli wanaojifanya wafanyakazi wa Tume kuomba pesa badala ya huduma zetu Tume ya Utumishi wa Umma (PSC) ni nini? Ni Tume ya Utumishi ya kikatiba iliyoundwa chini ya Kifungu cha 233 cha Katiba.
Ekegusii: Twakureire bonsi bamanye igoro yabantop abarimo bagwekora bagwwekora abokori emeremo boboteneneri koibera abanto nga nkobaa bare obokoreri. Ninki Obotenereri Bwokoreri Bwabanto (PSC)? Nomoroberio bwerichiko obegetwe inse yerichiko 233 rierichiko rinene riense.
Dholuo: Wachiwo siem ne ji duto mondo otang' gi joma wuondore ni gin jotij  kamisen mondo oyud omenda kachiwo tijewa kamisen mar jotije piny owacho en ang'o En yo mar  kamisen mopwodhi kod katiba ma ochaki e pend chik mia ariyo piero adek kod adek mar katiba no.
Somali: Waxaan dhammaan uga digeynaa in ay ka digtoonaadaan khiyaanooyinka u muuqda shaqaalaha komishanka si ay lacag ugu dalbadaan adeegyada aan bixino Waa maxay komishanka adeegga dadweynaha (PSC) Waa komishanka adeegga dastuuriga ah oo lagu aasaasay qodobka 233aad ee Dastuurka.

English: The law is very clear, we must embrace every aspect of humanity in the public service, including the full inclusion and participation of persons with disabilities, Dr. Kiprono stated.
Kiswahili: Sheria iko wazi kabisa, ni lazima tukumbatie kila kipengele cha ubinadamu katika utumishi wa umma, ikiwa ni pamoja na ushirikishwaji kamili na ushiriki wa watu wenye ulemavu, Dkt. Kiprono alisema.
Ekegusii: Richiko nigo rire maiso marore, goika tobwate nakorenda obokemwanyabanto ase obokoreri bwabanto, amo na koreta abanto bonsi bare noborema amo korwa ebirngererio biabo, Dkt. Kiprono atebete.
Dholuo: Dr. Kiprono nowacho ni chikno nyiso maler ni nyaka wati ne oganda duto, moriwo nyaka riwo joma nigi ng'ol.
Somali: Sharcigu waa mid aad u cad, waa inaan ku darnaa dhammaan dhinacyada bani'aadamnimada adeegga dadweynaha, oo ay ku jiraan ka mid noqoshada buuxda iyo ka qaybgalka dadka naafada ah, ayuu yiri Dr. Kiprono.

English: MAKE PEACE 'It's not your war': Ukraine's military ombud warns Africans against joining Russia's fight As South Africa probes how 17 of its citizens ended up in Ukraine's Donbas region, Kyiv's military ombud Olha Reshetylova urges Africans to resist Moscow's recruitment and avoid a war that offers them no protection.
Kiswahili: TENGENEZA AMANI 'Sio vita yako': Mchunguzi wa kijeshi wa Ukraine awaonya Waafrika dhidi ya kujiunga na mapambano ya Urusi Huku Afrika Kusini ikichunguza jinsi raia wake 17 walivyoishia katika eneo la Donbas nchini Ukraine, mchunguzi wa kijeshi wa Kyiv Olha Reshetylova anawasihi Waafrika kupinga kuajiriwa na Moscow na kuepuka vita ambavyo haviwapi ulinzi wowote.
Ekegusii: KORA OMOREMBE 'Eye teri esegi yao aye omonyene': Abarigeria bun esrikari egokorera abant ya abasikari ba Miritari ba Ukraine buna Ombud yasiemire Abagambi ba Afrika gwesoanania ase esegi ya Russia korwania South Africa yaansire obotuki buna abanto baye 17 batogete gokonya eserikari ya Ukraine aaria Donbas region, Kyiv's military buna ombud Olha Reshetylova asabete Afrika kwanga ebiagaso korwa Moscow ase okorika abanto babo gochia esegi, na kwebacha korwa esegi etabwati borendi ase bare.
Dholuo: Timuru kwe 'Ok en Lweny maru': Ombud mar jolwennj Ukraine chiwo siem ne Jo-Afrika ni kik gidonj e lweny mar Russia ka South Africa neno kaka Jo-Ukraine apr kod abiriyo  osetho e Donbas, Ombud Olga jiwo Jo-Afrika mondo okwed tich ma Moscow timo kendo gitang' gi lweny ma miyo gibedo maonge arita.
Somali: Nabada samee 'Ma aha dagaalkaaga': Wasiirka ciidamada Yukreeniyaanku wuxuu uga digay dadka Afrikaanka ah inay ku biiraan dagaalka Ruushka Iyadoo Koonfur Afrika ay baaritaan ku sameyneyso sida 17 muwaadin oo ka mid ah muwaadiniinteeda ay ugu dambeyn ugu gaareen gobolka Donbas ee Ukraine, wasiirka ciidamada ee Kyiv Olha Reshetylova ayaa ku booriyay dadka Afrikaanka ah inay iska caabiyaan musuqmaasuqa Moscow iyo inay ka fogaadaan dagaal aan u bixin ilaalinta.

English: Politics 'It's not your war': Ukraine's military ombud warns Africans against joining Russia's fight As South Africa probes how 17 of its citizens ended up in Ukraine's Donbas region, Kyiv's military ombud Olha Reshetylova urges Africans to resist Moscow's recruitment and avoid a war that offers them no protection.
Kiswahili: Siasa 'Sio vita vyenu': Mchunguzi wa kijeshi wa Ukraine awaonya Waafrika dhidi ya kujiunga na mapambano ya Urusi Huku Afrika Kusini ikichunguza jinsi raia wake 17 walivyoishia katika eneo la Donbas nchini Ukraine, mchunguzi wa kijeshi wa Kyiv Olha Reshetylova anawasihi Waafrika kupinga kuajiriwa na Moscow na kuepuka vita ambavyo haviwapi ulinzi wowote.
Ekegusii: Siasa teri segi yaor': Ombud omiritari o'Ukraine yarure ogokurerwa ase Afrika gotasoa esegi ya Russia korwana ekiagera South Africa ngotuka ere buna abanto baye 17 benyorete ase esegi ya Ukraine, Donbas region, Kyiv's military buna Ombud Olha Reshetylova asabire aba'Afrika kwanga ebiagaso bia Moscow korika abanto babo gosoa esegi etabwati borendi bonde ase bare.
Dholuo: Timuru kwe 'Ok en Lweny maru': Ombud mar jolwennj Ukraine chiwo siem ne Jo-Afrika ni kik gidonj e lweny mar Russia ka South Africa neno kaka Jo-Ukraine apr kod abiriyo  osetho e Donbas, Ombud Olga jiwo Jo-Afrika mondo okwed tich ma Moscow timo kendo gitang' gi lweny ma miyo gibedo maonge arita.
Somali: Siyaasadda 'Ma aha dagaalkaaga': Wasiirka ciidamada Yukreeniyaanku wuxuu uga digay dadka Afrikaanka ah inay ku biiraan dagaalka Ruushka Iyadoo Koonfur Afrika ay baaritaan ku sameyneyso sida 17 muwaadin oo ka mid ah muwaadiniinteeda ay ugu dambeyn ugu gaareen gobolka Donbas ee Ukraine, wasiirka ciidamada ee Kyiv Olha Reshetylova ayaa ku booriyay dadka Afrikaanka ah inay iska caabiyaan musuqmaasuqa Moscow iyo inay ka fogaadaan dagaal aan u bixin wax ilaalin ah.

English: From: Government Digital Service Updated: 17 October 2025 When you need to verify your identity for Companies House When you need to verify depends on your role, and when you started that role.
Kiswahili: Kutoka: Huduma ya Dijitali ya Serikali Imesasishwa: 17 Oktoba 2025 Wakati unahitaji kuthibitisha utambulisho wako kwa Kampuni House Wakati unahitaji kuthibitisha inategemea jukumu lako, na wakati ulianza jukumu hilo.
Ekegusii: Korwa: Eserikari negenderete kobeka buya obokoreri bwaye goetera egedichitari: Chitariki 17 omotienyi 10 omwaka 2025. Ekero oganetie komanya ekeene nga naye omonyene gochia ekambani, nigo erengete eki ogokora ase ere nechinagki gwachagete gokora emeremo eyio.
Dholuo: Kuom: Tij Sirkal mar mbui moseloki: tarik apr kod abiriyo dwe mar apar higa amr alufu ariyo piero ariyo kod abich Kinde ma idwaro nyisogo ni in ng'at machalo nade ne kambi  kinde ma idwaro nyisogo ni in ng'at machalo nade luwore gi tiji, kod kinde ma ne ichako tijno.
Somali: Laga soo bilaabo: Adeegga Dijitalka ee Dowladda Cusbooneysiiyay: 17 Oktoobar 2025 Goorta aad u baahan tahay inaad xaqiijiso aqoonsigaaga ee Guriga Shirkadaha Goorta aad u baahan tahay inaad xaqiijiso waxay kuxirantahay doorkaaga, iyo goorta aad bilowday doorkaas.

English: From: Cabinet Office Updated: 6 November 2025 Public Switched Telephone Network charter The Public Switched Telephone Network charter sets out a voluntary agreement between the government and communication providers to protect vulnerable people when they are moved onto digital services.
Kiswahili: Kutoka: Ofisi ya Baraza la Mawaziri Imesasishwa: 6 Novemba 2025 Mkataba wa Mtandao wa Simu Uliobadilishwa na Umma Mkataba wa Mtandao wa Simu Uliobadilishwa na Umma unatoa makubaliano ya hiari kati ya serikali na watoa huduma za mawasiliano ili kuwalinda watu walio katika mazingira magumu wanapohamishiwa kwenye huduma za kidijitali.
Ekegusii: Korwa: Amanagana amayia omowaziri: Chitariki 6 omotienyi 11 omwaka 2025 Omoroberio bweserikari igor yogotumia chisimi orure okobwatana nekeombe keria giakenya getenenerete oboererania goetera chisimi erio korenda bari batari nabomanyi kegima ase ogokwanerana goetera chisimi chingaki baranganye gochia egedichitari.
Dholuo: kowuok e apis tend migao okete : Tarikauchiel  dwe mar apr kod achiel higa mar alufu ariyo piero ariyo kod abich , Intanet mar jii Duto  Intanet mar jii Duto keto winjruok mamuol e kind sirkla kod jochiw weche e yamo  mondo orit jopiny mok nyal ka orakgi e chenro mag mbui.
Somali: Laga soo bilaabo: Xafiiska Golaha Wasiirada Cusbooneysiiyay: 6 Nofeembar 2025 Sharciga Shabakadda Taleefanka Dadweynaha ee loo beddelay Sharciga Shabakadda Taleefanka Dadweynaha ee loo beddelay ayaa qeexaya heshiis iskood ah oo u dhexeeya dowladda iyo bixiyeyaasha isgaarsiinta si loo ilaaliyo dadka nugul marka loo wareejiyo adeegyada dhijitaalka ah.

English: In a speech read on his behalf by the KPC General Manager Finance, Pius Mwendwa during the facility's soft launch, Sang said the successful launch of the facility heralds a new paradigm in the reticulation of the product with immense benefits to the public.
Kiswahili: Katika hotuba iliyosomwa kwa niaba yake na Meneja Mkuu wa Fedha wa KPC, Pius Mwendwa wakati wa uzinduzi wa kituo hicho, Sang alisema uzinduzi uliofanikiwa wa kituo hicho unaashiria dhana mpya katika ujumuishaji wa bidhaa hiyo yenye faida kubwa kwa umma.
Ekegusii: Ase enkwana yaye yasometwe na nomotenereri omonene bwesitima (KPC), Pius Mwendwa chingaki are gochaka obokorei, Sang nigo atebete ng'a ogochaka kwegekori ekio nomochakano bwoboonchoreria goikerania obokeri obuya ase abanto.
Dholuo: E twak ma nogolo e loye kod  meneja mar omenda ma mwanywanda KPC  Pius Mwende e odiechieng ' ma ne ochakgo tijno, Sang nowacho ni chako tijno e yo maber ne dhi kelo ber mang'eny ne jopiny.
Somali: Khudbad uu ka jeediyay Agaasimaha Guud ee Maaliyadda ee KPC, Pius Mwendwa intii lagu jiray bilowgii jilicsan ee xarunta, Sang wuxuu sheegay in bilowgii guusha ee xarunta uu ku dhawaaqayo qaab cusub oo ku saabsan isku xirnaanta badeecada oo faa'iidooyin weyn u leh dadweynaha.

English: Development cooperation agreements - Norway in Kenya Skip to main content Development cooperation agreements As a means of increasing transparency and accountability, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs wishes to make all its agreements available to the public.
Kiswahili: Mikataba ya ushirikiano wa maendeleo - Norway nchini Kenya Ruka hadi maudhui kuu Mikataba ya ushirikiano wa maendeleo Kama njia ya kuongeza uwazi na uwajibikaji, Wizara ya Mambo ya Nje inataka kutoa mikataba yake yote kwa umma.
Ekegusii: Okoigwan gwokobwatera na amagenderero - Norway aaiga Kenya tuma gochia amangana amaikeranu yamagenderero. Buna enchera eyemo yogokinia obomaiso marore nokoreri obuya, Ewisara yamang'ana aisiko nerengete kobeka okobwatana kwaye maiso marore na goikereka na abanto bonsi.
Dholuo: Winjruok mar dongruok - Norway e  Kenya chikri nyaka e weche mochuno riwruok mar dongruok kaka yo mar bero ler, migao mar weche maoko gombo mondo oket  winjruok mantie ne jopiny.
Somali: Heshiisyada iskaashiga horumarinta - Norway ee Kenya Ka gudub mawduuca ugu weyn Heshiisyada iskaashiga horumarinta Si loo kordhiyo hufnaanta iyo xisaabtanka, Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda waxay doonaysaa in dhammaan heshiisyadeeda ay dadweynaha u soo bandhigaan.

English: Submit a Letter of Intent If a country passes the Core Eligibility Criteria and Values Check and the government identified a lead ministry or agency, it should signal its intent to participate in OGP by sending a Letter of Intent, which formally expresses the government's intention to join OGP.
Kiswahili: Wasilisha Barua ya Nia Ikiwa nchi itapita Vigezo vya Msingi vya Ustahiki na Ukaguzi wa Maadili na serikali ikatambua wizara au shirika linaloongoza, inapaswa kuashiria nia yake ya kushiriki katika OGP kwa kutuma Barua ya Nia, ambayo inaelezea rasmi nia ya serikali ya kujiunga na OGP.
Ekegusii: Toma rirube riokworokia okogania. Onye ense egoikerania ayaganeirie nobwegenwa. Rora gose wisara ki yeserikari ere motwe gokora ayio, aya nabe egetaborero igoro yokworokia yokogania gosoaomoroberio okobwaterana neserikari (OGP) ase ogotoma riuko riokogania, erio riratebe buya ekerenga gieserikari gosoa ase omoroberio oyio (OGP).
Dholuo: Chiw barua mar chiwruok kapo ni piny moro oseng'ado chike moting'o chike kod weche mochuno, kendo sirkal osefwenyo ni en gi migawo kata riwruok ma tayo tij lendo, sirkal onego onyis ni odwaro riwo lwedo OGP kuom oro barua mar chiwruok ma nyiso ni sirkal dwaro riwo lwedo OGP.
Somali: Soo gudbi Warqad Ujeeddo Haddii waddan ay ka gudubto Qiimeynta Qiimeynta iyo Qiimeynta Qiimeynta, dowladuna ay aqoonsatay wasaarad ama hay'ad hoggaamineysa, waa inay calaamadeysaa ujeeddadeeda in ay ka qaybqaataan OGP adoo soo diraya Warqad Ujeeddo, oo si rasmi ah u muujineysa ujeeddada dowladda ee ku biirista OGP.

English: Access to Justice Justice for Accountability Open Justice Public Participation Giving the public opportunities to provide input into government decision-making leads to more effective governance, improved public service delivery, and more equitable outcomes.
Kiswahili: Upatikanaji wa Haki Haki kwa Uwajibikaji Haki Huria Ushiriki wa Umma Kuwapa umma fursa za kutoa maoni katika maamuzi ya serikali husababisha utawala bora zaidi, utoaji bora wa huduma za umma, na matokeo ya usawa zaidi.
Ekegusii: Goikera Ekeene. Ekeene ase Obotenereri Obuya Kiagoirwe. Ekeene na ribaga ase abanto korwa ebirengererio biabo buna eserikari ebwenerete kobakorera emeremo government goikerania obagambi obuya, oboikeranu bwobokoreri, ns smstokeo areng'anaine.
Dholuo: Bedo gi ratiro mar timo gik moko e yo makare, miyo ji thuolo mar chiwo pachgi e weche ma sirkal ong'ado, miyo sirkal bedo gi loch maber, miyo tije mag sirkal bedo maber, kendo kelo nyak machalre.
Somali: Helitaanka Cadaaladda Cadaaladda Xisaabtanka Cadaaladda Furan Kaqaybgalka Dadweynaha Fursadaha dadweynaha si ay uga qaybqaataan go'aan qaadashada dawladda waxay keenaan maamul ka shaqeyn badan, bixinta adeegyada dadweynaha oo hagaagsan, iyo natiijooyin cadaalad ah.

English: Public participation and inclusion: Governments seek to mobilize citizens to engage in public debate, provide input, and make contributions that lead to more responsive, innovative and effective governance.
Kiswahili: Ushiriki na ujumuishaji wa umma: Serikali zinalenga kuwahamasisha raia kushiriki katika mijadala ya umma, kutoa maoni, na kutoa michango inayoongoza kwa utawala sikivu zaidi, bunifu na wenye ufanisi.
Ekegusii: Abanto koegwa ribaga goteba buna batagete: Eserikari nerigetie koreta abanto amo ase chinkwana chia amo, barue abirengereri biabo, ebio biragere obokorei boitabire, borengete chingaki echi na obuya.
Dholuo: Riwruok kod chenro mag oganda: Sirkande dwaro jiwo raia mondo oriwre e mbaka mag oganda, ochiw paro, kendo ochiw chiwo mamiyo sirkal bedo gi paro mowinjore, kendo telo maber.
Somali: Ka qaybgalka dadweynaha iyo ka mid noqoshada: Dowladaha waxay doonayaan inay shacabka u soo ururiyaan inay ka qaybqaataan doodda dadweynaha, inay bixiyaan talooyin, oo ay gacan ka geystaan maamul ka jawaab celin badan, hal-abuurnimo iyo waxtar leh.

English: Collaborate: The government and non-governmental stakeholder should hold an ongoing iterative dialogue where the public contributes to identifying priorities, setting the agenda and developing the commitments.
Kiswahili: Shirikiana: Serikali na wadau wasio wa kiserikali wanapaswa kufanya mazungumzo yanayoendelea ambapo umma huchangia katika kutambua vipaumbele, kuweka ajenda na kuendeleza ahadi.
Ekegusii: Bwaterana: Eserikari nebiombe bitari bieserikari nere buya koba nechinkwana chikonyora ebirengereri biabanto neki baganetie, korwa chachenda chiogokwanerwa na goitaba ase oboamo.
Dholuo: Riwri: Sirkal kod riwruoge mamoko onego otim mbaka ma kinde ka kinde ma ji duto oriwe lwedo mondo ging'e gik monego giket motelo e ngimagi, gichop chenro mag gik ma gidwaro timo, kendo gitim gik ma gidwaro timo.
Somali: Iskaashi: Dowladda iyo daneeyayaasha aan dawliga ahayn waa inay wadahadal joogto ah oo soo noqnoqda sameeyaan halka ay dadweynuhu gacan ka geystaan aqoonsashada mudnaanta, dejinta ajandaha iyo horumarinta ballanqaadyada.

English: How we're helping to improve access to sexual health services We push for political participation We help women vote and participate in politics by partnering with governments, community groups and local associations.
Kiswahili: Jinsi tunavyosaidia kuboresha upatikanaji wa huduma za afya ya ngono Tunasukuma ushiriki wa kisiasa Tunawasaidia wanawake kupiga kura na kushiriki katika siasa kwa kushirikiana na serikali, vikundi vya jamii na vyama vya ndani.
Ekegusii: Buna togendererete gokonya goikerania obokoreri bwa okomanyia igoro ya afia yobwanchani bwomosacha nomokungu. Nigo togosuguma okobwaterana gesiasa. Nigo togokonya abakungu goaka chikura na koba abasangi ase sisasa ase okobwaterana neserikari, ebiombe biebinyoro and obomo bwa abanto ase ebinyoro.
Dholuo: Kaka wakonyo e miyo weche thieth mag ng'ango obed mayot, e kaka wakonyo mon mondo ochiwre e weche siasa, kendo wakonyo mon mondo ochiwre e weche siasa ka wariwore gi sirkal, riwruoge mag oganda, kod riwruoge mag alwora.
Somali: Sida aan u caawineyno hagaajinta helitaanka adeegyada caafimaadka galmada Waxaan ku riixnaa ka qaybgalka siyaasadeed Waxaan ka caawineynaa haweenka inay codeeyaan oo ay ka qeyb galaan siyaasadda iyagoo iskaashi la leh dawladaha, kooxaha bulshada iyo ururada deegaanka.

English: The result, our Anti-Corruption Enforcement Tracker helps campaigners build an evidence base for reform of anti-corruption enforcement, provides journalists and members of the public with accessible and clear statistics, and encourages the government to collect and publish its data in more accessible and accurate ways.
Kiswahili: Matokeo yake, Kifuatiliaji chetu cha Kupambana na Rushwa huwasaidia wanaharakati kujenga msingi wa ushahidi wa mageuzi ya utekelezaji wa kupambana na rushwa, huwapa waandishi wa habari na umma takwimu zinazopatikana kwa urahisi na wazi, na huhimiza serikali kukusanya na kuchapisha data yake kwa njia zinazopatikana kwa urahisi na sahihi zaidi.
Ekegusii: Amairanerio, egekoreri giato giokobeka chinguru kobwatia obokorekanu nigo kegotokonya baria bagokora akambeini koba nobosaidi bogokonya amaonchorerio ase ogokinana nobokorekanu, koa abariki amangana na banto bonsi goikera amangana amaikeranu, na igo gosegeta eserikari kobeka amo amangana aye agaikeraka nabonsi ase oboikeranu.
Dholuo: Duoko gima nono  mibadhi konyo joma kedo ne mibadhi e loso gik ma nyiso ni gisetimo mibadhi, ochiwo ne jofwambo kod jopiny weche ma ginyalo ng'eyo, kendo ojiwo sirkal mondo ochok kendo ogol weche ma kamago e yo mong'ere kendo makare.
Somali: Natiijo ahaan, raadraaca la dagaalanka la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ka caawiyaa ololayaasha inay dhisaan saldhig caddeyn ah oo loogu talagalay isbeddelka la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa, wuxuu siinayaa suxufiyiinta iyo xubnaha dadweynaha tirakoobka la heli karo oo cad, wuxuuna ku dhiiri gelinayaa dowladda inay ururiso oo daabacdo xogteeda siyaabo la heli karo oo sax ah.

English: 1:11 pm Public Health PS Mary Muthoni urges parents and communities to safeguard teens during holidays, highlighting risks of drugs and peer pressure that lead to unwanted pregnancies.
Kiswahili: Saa 1:11 usiku Katibu Mkuu wa Afya ya Umma Mary Muthoni anawasihi wazazi na jamii kuwalinda vijana wakati wa likizo, akisisitiza hatari za dawa za kulevya na shinikizo la rika zinazosababisha mimba zisizohitajika.
Ekegusii: 7:11 chiabotuko. Omoriki Omonene bwewisara ya afia - PS Mary Muthoni osabire abaibori nebinyoro biabo korenda abana babo chingaki chiomotimoko, na goteba buna ogosegetana kwabana gokobaira ase amariogo ogotindia miono kegima ase abana abanyaroka goika babwata obito btancheti.
Dholuo: saa abiriyo gi dakika apar kod achiel odiochieng, jagoro maduong' mar weche mag thieth  Mary Muthoni jiwo jonyuol gi oganda mondo orit rowere e kinde yweyo, ka onyiso rach mar tiyo gi yedhe mamero kod pek mag mbese makelo ich ma ok owinjore.
Somali: 1:11 pm Caafimaadka Dadweynaha PS Mary Muthoni waxay ugu baaqeysaa waalidiinta iyo bulshooyinka inay ilaaliyaan dhalinyarada inta lagu jiro fasaxyada, iyadoo tilmaamaysa khataraha daroogada iyo cadaadiska asxaabta oo horseeda uurka aan la rabin.

English: The members of the public are warned to beware of scammers who are approaching individuals on WhatsApp with their numbers showing a profile photo of the CCF Kenya, Mr Alex Lemarkoko.
Kiswahili: Umma unaonywa kuwa waangalifu na matapeli wanaowakaribia watu binafsi kwenye WhatsApp huku nambari zao zikionyesha picha ya wasifu wa CCF Kenya, Bw. Alex Lemarkoko.
Ekegusii: Aabanainchi bonso bakureirwe igoro babaibi bgochera abanto goetera WhatsApp nechinamba chiabo chiesimi chiokworokia chibicha chiabo ng'a barabwo mbarabi ebicha ya CCF Kenya, Omosike Alex Lemarkoko.
Dholuo: Jopiny osenyis ni gibed motang' gi joma wuondo ji ka gitiyo gi WhatsApp kod namba ma nyiso picha mar CCF ma Kenya, Mr. Alex Lemarkoko.
Somali: Shacabka waxaa looga digay in ay ka digtoonaadaan khiyaanooyinka ku soo dhowaada dadka WhatsApp iyagoo lambarradoodu muujinayaan muuqaal muuqaal ah oo ku saabsan CCF Kenya, Mr Alex Lemarkoko.

English: On the recruitment day, candidates must report to designated centres by 8am with the original and copies of their academic certificates, ID cards, birth certificates, and, where applicable, NYS discharge certificates with at least a 'GOOD' conduct rating.
Kiswahili: Siku ya kuajiri, wagombea lazima waripoti katika vituo vilivyoteuliwa ifikapo saa 2 asubuhi wakiwa na cheti halisi na nakala za vyeti vyao vya kitaaluma, vitambulisho, vyeti vya kuzaliwa, na, inapohitajika, vyeti vya kufukuzwa vya NYS vyenye angalau ukadiriaji wa 'GOOD' wa mwenendo.
Ekegusii: Rituko riria riokwerika, baria bakorigia chikura goika bemanyie ase chisenta chiria chiogoaka chikura chinsa ibere chia mambia ama nechisatifiketi chiabo buna basomete, Ekebande kiabo, Ekebande giokoiborwa, na ase ekonyarekana, esatifiketi yamasomo korwa ekeombe kiobokoreri bwa abasae (NYS) gekworokia buya buna ebikoru bioyio bire.
Dholuo: E odiechieng ' mar ndikruok , joma ndikore nyaka chiw ripot kuonde moyier kar sa aboro okinyi ka gin gi oboke kod kopi mag otese mag somo, opande,barua mar nyuol kod kama owinjore NYS chiwo obok man kod alama mar tim maber.
Somali: Maalinta shaqaalaysiinta, musharixiintu waa inay u soo bandhigaan xarumaha loo qoondeeyey saacadaha 8 subaxnimo iyagoo leh asalka iyo nuqulka shahaadooyinkooda waxbarasho, kaararka aqoonsiga, shahaadooyinka dhalashada, iyo, haddii ay khuseyso, shahaadooyinka ka bixitaanka NYS oo leh ugu yaraan qiimeyn "GOOD".

English: The agency also appealed to the public to report any suspicious individuals or activities that could help in ongoing investigations.
Kiswahili: Shirika hilo pia liliwaomba umma kuripoti watu au shughuli zozote zinazotiliwa shaka ambazo zinaweza kusaidia katika uchunguzi unaoendelea.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe ekio kiobochori boigo ngiasabete abanto ng'a babamanyie mang'ana ande onsi gose omonto bare nechitangutangu nere ase okogekonya gokora obutuki bwabo.
Dholuo: Riwruogno bende ne ogwelo ji duto mondo ochiw ripot ewi gik moko duto ma nyalo konyo e nonro madhi nyime.
Somali: Hay'addu waxay sidoo kale ugu baaqday dadweynaha inay soo sheegaan qof kasta oo shaki leh ama waxqabadyo ka caawin kara baaritaanka socda.

English: The President used the occasion to urge citizens to embrace their democratic rights ahead of the elections.
Kiswahili: Rais alitumia fursa hiyo kuwasihi raia kukumbatia haki zao za kidemokrasia kabla ya uchaguzi.
Ekegusii: Omoraisi natumiete ribaga erio gosaba abanto ng'a babe abatoereru na nagotumia ribaga riabo ase ogoaka chikura buya goikerania ebirengererio biabo nonya nechingaki baganyete rituko riogoakwa chikura.
Dholuo: Jatelo ne otiyo gi thuolono e jiwo raia mondo oyie gi ratiro ma gin-go mar timo yiero.
Somali: Madaxweynaha ayaa ka faa'iideystay munaasabadda si uu ugu booriyo muwaadiniinta inay ku adkeystaan xuquuqdooda dimuqraadiga ah ka hor doorashada.

English: DCI said as it urged the public to report any suspicious activities.
Kiswahili: DCI ilisema huku ikiwahimiza umma kuripoti shughuli zozote zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Omotuki omonene agasingerera ng'a abanto bamomanyie ebikoru binde bionsi bire nechitangutangu ase omoroberio bwogoaka chikura.
Dholuo: DCI nowacho ka ojiwo ji mondo ochiw ripot ewi tim moramora ma achach.
Somali: DCI waxay sheegtay iyadoo ugu baaqaysa shacabka inay soo sheegaan waxqabadyada shakiga ah.

English: By 5 months ago DIG Lagat warns officers to desist from corruption Days after prisoners escaped from lawful custody at a court in Siaya, Deputy Inspector General Eliud Lagat toured the county and urged officers to maintain professionalism and teamwork.
Kiswahili: Kufikia miezi 5 iliyopita DIG Lagat awaonya maafisa kuacha ufisadi Siku chache baada ya wafungwa kutoroka kutoka kizuizini halali katika mahakama huko Siaya, Naibu Inspekta Jenerali Eliud Lagat alizuru kaunti hiyo na kuwasihi maafisa kudumisha weledi na ushirikiano.
Ekegusii: Emetienyi etano yaetire, omorai omonene bwasikari Lagat okureire abakoreri gotiba obokorekanu chingaki abasibwa baminchoretie korwa korwa ekoti aaria, Omorai omoke bwomorai omonene bwa abasikari omochenero Eliud Lagat natarerete ekaonti eyio na gosaba abasikari babwaterere obokoreri bwabo buna eganeirie a ase okobwaterana.
Dholuo: Dweche abich mosekalo ka ne ogolo gwenge mag Lagat, ne osiemo jotelo mondo owe timbe mag mibadhi bang ' ka joma otwe ne oseyudo thuolo mar tony e kot e taon mar Siaya, Jachiwo mar jatend obila Eliud Lagat ne ofwenyo gweng'no kendo ne odwaro ni jotelogo odhi nyime gi tijgi mar tiegruok.
Somali: 5 bilood ka hor DIG Lagat ayaa ka digay saraakiisha inay ka tanaasulaan musuqmaasuqa Maalmo ka dib markii maxaabiista ay ka baxsadeen xadhiga sharciga ah ee maxkamad ku taal Siaya, Taliye ku xigeenka Guud Eliud Lagat ayaa booqday gobolka wuxuuna ku booriyay saraakiisha inay ilaaliyaan xirfadda iyo shaqada kooxda.

English: EACC reaffirms its commitment to combating fraud and safeguarding integrity within the public service sector, a statement from the commission said.
Kiswahili: EACC inathibitisha tena kujitolea kwake kupambana na ulaghai na kulinda uadilifu ndani ya sekta ya utumishi wa umma, taarifa kutoka kwa tume hiyo ilisema.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokurumi kianekirie okwerwa kwaye korwania obokurumi nobongainereria erio goikerania ekeene ase obokoreri bwabanto, buna enkwana korwa ekomisoni yarenge.
Dholuo: EACC osesingore mar kedo gi mibadhi kendo rito tim makare e tije mag sirkal, kaluwore gi weche mowuok kuom kamisona.
Somali: EACC waxay dib u xaqiijineysaa ballanqaadkeeda la dagaalanka khiyaanada iyo ilaalinta daacadnimada qeybta adeegyada dadweynaha, sida lagu sheegay bayaan ka soo baxay guddiga.

English: In a schedule provided by the Chief Justice Martha Koome-led JSC, the public interviews will run from January 12 to March 23 2026.
Kiswahili: Katika ratiba iliyotolewa na JSC inayoongozwa na Jaji Mkuu Martha Koome, mahojiano ya umma yatafanyika kuanzia Januari 12 hadi Machi 23, 2026.
Ekegusii: Ase omoroberio orwetwe nomoteneneri bwamachiko omonene Omong'ina Martha Koome gochia led JSC, the public interviews will run from January 12 to March 23 2026.
Dholuo: Kaluwore gi chenro mane ochiw kod Jang'ad Bura Maduong Martha Koome, romo mar kawo pach oganda duto biro chakore dwe mar achiel tarik apar kod ariyo nyaka dwe mar dwe mar adek tarik piero ariyo kod adek higa mar alufu ariyo piero ariyo kod auchiel.
Somali: Sida ku cad jadwalka ay soo bandhigtay Garsoorka Sare ee Martha Koome, JSC, wareysiyada dadweynaha waxay socon doonaan 12-ka Janaayo ilaa 23-ka Maarso 2026.

English: The CRJ said members of the public are invited to avail in writing any information of interest in respect to any of the shortlisted candidates.
Kiswahili: CRJ ilisema umma unakaribishwa kutoa taarifa yoyote ya kimaandishi inayomhusu yeyote kati ya wagombea walioorodheshwa.

Somali: CRJ waxay sheegtay in xubnaha dadweynaha lagu casuumay inay qoraal ahaan ka faa'iideystaan wixii macluumaad ah ee xiisaha leh ee ku saabsan mid kasta oo ka mid ah musharixiinta liiska gaaban.

English: Take note that the Commission may interview any member of the Public who has submitted information on any of the shortlisted candidates, and such information shall be kept confidential, she said.
Kiswahili: Kumbuka kwamba Tume inaweza kumhoji mwanachama yeyote wa Umma ambaye amewasilisha taarifa kuhusu yeyote kati ya wagombea walioorodheshwa, na taarifa hizo zitahifadhiwa kwa siri, alisema.
Ekegusii: Nere buya komanye ng'a abatenereri nabo bararigie komanya korwa monto onde bwensi komanya okwemurungania igoro yabwo bachoretwe, nayio nigo arakorwe as obobisi buna atabete.
Dholuo: Keti eparo ni kamisen nyalo choko paro kuom japiny mosechiwo wach e wi ng'ato ang'ata mosegwel kendo wach makamano ibiro keti mopondo , ne owacho.
Somali: Xusuusnow in Komishanku uu wareysi siin karo qof kasta oo ka mid ah shacabka oo soo gudbiyay macluumaad ku saabsan mid ka mid ah musharixiinta ku qoran liiska gaarka ah, macluumaadkaasna waa in la ilaaliyaa si qarsoodi ah, ayay tiri.

English: The public was encouraged to submit any relevant information they had on the election or electoral process.
Kiswahili: Umma ulihimizwa kuwasilisha taarifa yoyote muhimu waliyo nayo kuhusu uchaguzi au mchakato wa uchaguzi.

Kiswahili: Jukwaa la Ushahidi hujenga imani zaidi katika mfumo kwa sababu huwawezesha raia kuripoti kuhusu matukio yoyote ya ufisadi kwa wakati halisi, na kusaidia kufuatilia kura.

Dholuo: Websait Miluongo ni ushahidi miyo ji bedo gi yie motegno kuom chenrono nikech okonyo raia mondo ochiw ripot e wi gik maricho ma timore e ngima ji, kendo mano konyo ji mondo ji oket wang' gi e ombulu.
Somali: Barxadda Ushahidi waxay dhisaa kalsooni badan nidaamka sababtoo ah waxay u oggolaaneysaa muwaadiniinta inay ka warbixiyaan dhacdooyinka musuqmaasuqa ee waqtiga dhabta ah, taasoo gacan ka geysata inay isha ku hayaan codbixinta.
