Dholuo: EACC jiwo ji duto manie piny Kenya mondo omak tim makare kendo okonygi kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: EACC waxay ku boorineysaa qof kasta oo reer Kenya ah inuu had iyo jeer ilaaliyo daacadnimada iyo inuu si firfircoon uga qaybqaato la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa.

English: YOUR ROLE AS A CITIZEN 1. Shun corruption, do not tolerate or support it 2. Report any suspected corrupt conduct 3. Desist from glorifying corruptly acquired wealth. 5. Demand accountability from leaders 6. Return any stolen public property in your possession 7. Obey the law
Kiswahili: JUKUMU LAKO KAMA RAIA 1. Epuka ufisadi, usivumilie au kuuunga mkono 2. Ripoti mwenendo wowote unaoshukiwa wa ufisadi 3. Epuka kusifu utajiri uliopatikana kwa ufisadi. 5. Dai uwajibikaji kutoka kwa viongozi 6. Rudisha mali yoyote ya umma iliyoibiwa uliyonayo 7. Tii sheria
Ekegusii: Emeremo yago buna omomenyi 1  Bwange obokurumi, toremerwria gose gwancha obokurumi 2
Dholuo: Ting' ma in-go kaka raia mokwongo. We timbe mag mibadhi, geng'gi, kata riwogi lwedo. mar airyo . Land timbe duto mag mibadhi. mar adek. We miyo mwandu ma ji yudo nikech mibadhi duong'. mar abich. Chiko jotelo mondo gikonygi. mar auchiel. Duoko mwandu duto mag sirkal ma in-go. mar abiriyo. Luwo Chik
Somali: 1. Ka fogow musuqmaasuqa, ha u dulqaadanina ama ha u taageerinina. 2. Warbixi wax kasta oo lagu tuhmo in musuqmaasuq lagu sameeyay. 3. Iska daaya in aad ammaanto hantida musuqmaasuq lagu helay. 5. Madaxda ka codso xisaabinta. 6. Soo celi hantida dawladda ee lagaa xaday. 7. Xeerka addeeca.

English: (EACC) urges Kenyans to be vigilant and avoid falling prey to fraudsters issuing fake integrity clearance letters at a fee
Kiswahili: (EACC) inawahimiza Wakenya kuwa macho na kuepuka kunaswa na matapeli wanaotoa barua bandia za uadilifu kwa ada
Ekegusii: EACC yasegetire abakenya koba maiso na gwetanga korwa abakurumi bakorwa amauko yoborimo ase ebesa
Dholuo: IECC jiwo jokenya mondo obed motang' kendo kik giyudre kod achudhe machiwo kad ma adiera kuom kawo omenda.
Somali: (EACC) waxay ugu baaqeysaa dadka Kenya inay feejignaadaan oo ay ka fogaadaan inay noqdaan dhibanayaasha khiyaanooyinka soo saara waraaqaha saxda ah ee loo yaqaan 'integrity clearance letters' oo lacag lagu bixiyo

English: IEBCKenya urges eligible diaspora voters in USA, Germany, South Africa, Tanzania, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi & South Sudan to come out & register before Feb 4 deadline
Kiswahili: IEBCKenya yawahimiza wapiga kura wanaostahiki kutoka nje ya nchi nchini Marekani, Ujerumani, Afrika Kusini, Tanzania, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi na Sudan Kusini kujitokeza na kujiandikisha kabla ya tarehe ya mwisho ya Februari 4.
Ekegusii: IEBC yarure okoraria inga abakenya bonsi bare maiko buna USA, Bocheremani, Afrika ya Irianyi, Tanzania, Boganda, Rwanda, Burundi na Irianyi ya Sudan besokie na koerikia nyuma ya chitariki 4 omotienyi okabere chitaraika
Dholuo: Duol mar yiero mar  IEBC e piny Kenya ojiwo jotelo mag pinje mag Amerka, Germany, Afrika ma milambo , Tanzania, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi kod South Sudan mondo owuog e pinyno kapok tarik ang'wen dwe mar ariyo ochopo .
Somali: IEBCKenya waxay ku boorineysaa codbixiyayaasha u qalma dibadda ee ku nool Mareykanka, Jarmalka, Koonfur Afrika, Tansaaniya, Uganda, Rwanda, Burundi & South Sudan inay soo baxaan oo ay iska diiwaangeliyaan ka hor 4da Febraayo.

English: IEBCKenya urges citizens who are not registered but are eligible to take advantage of this last week to enlist as voters
Kiswahili: IEBCKenya inawasihi raia ambao hawajajiandikisha lakini wanastahili kutumia fursa ya wiki hii iliyopita kujiandikisha kama wapiga kura
Ekegusii: IEBC yaboririe abakenya batarareikia, koira ribaga eri riabene koerikia
Dholuo: Duol mar yiero e piny kenya jiwo ji duto ma ok osendikore kaka jogo ombulu  mondo okaw thuolo mar juma mogik  mar ndiko nyinggi kaka jogo ombulu.
Somali: IEBCKenya waxay ku boorineysaa muwaadiniinta aan diiwaangelin laakiin xaq u leh inay ka faa'iideystaan todobaadkii la soo dhaafay si ay u diiwaangeliyaan codbixiyayaasha

English: IEBCKenya urges voters, candidates and agents to maintain order at polling stations and avoid wearing or carrying campaign materials
Kiswahili: IEBCKenya inawasihi wapiga kura, wagombea na mawakala kudumisha utulivu katika vituo vya kupigia kura na kuepuka kuvaa au kubeba vifaa vya kampeni
Ekegusii: IEBC yakureire abaaki chikura,abachore na abaechenti korenda amarago na obotoereru ase ebitaseni biogwaka chikura na betange ase okobeka chiyaga chiechikampeni gose ebinyererio biechikampeni
Dholuo: Duol mar yiero e piny kenye jiwo jogo ombulu, joslar kombe  kod jochung'  mondo oket arita kwe  e  kuonde goyo ombulu  kendo kik girwak kata ting'o gige kampen
Somali: IEBCKenya waxay codbixiyayaasha, musharixiinta iyo wakiillada ku boorineysaa in ay nidaamka ka ilaaliyaan goobaha codbixinta isla markaana ay ka fogaadaan inay xirtaan ama qaataan qalabka ololaha

English: IEBC urges citizens to unconditionally embrace peaceful elections & shun violence that is retrogressive to our economic growth and social cohesion.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawasihi raia kukumbatia uchaguzi wa amani bila masharti na kuepuka vurugu ambazo zinarudisha nyuma ukuaji wetu wa uchumi na mshikamano wa kijamii.
Ekegusii: IEBC yaboririe abamenyi gochika gotaiyo ase okorenda omorembe ase chikura na koanga chiburaburu echio chigotoirani magega keboncjoreri na okoigwanana ase ebinyoro
Dholuo: Duol mar yiero e piny kenya jiwo raia mondo orwak yiero mar kwe maonge chik kendo gitang' gi timbe mahundu ma nyalo thiro dongruok mar ohala kod winjruok e kind oganda.
Somali: IEBC waxay muwaadiniinta ugu baaqeysaa inay si shuruud la'aan ah u aqbalaan doorashooyinka nabadeed & ka fogaadaan rabshadaha ka soo horjeeda koritaanka dhaqaalaha iyo isdhexgalka bulshada.

English: Kenya Wildlife Service urges all our amazing visitors to our breathtaking National Parks to join hands in preserving the beauty of our wildlife and natural landscapes.
Kiswahili: Huduma ya Wanyamapori ya Kenya inawasihi wageni wetu wote wa ajabu kwenye Hifadhi zetu za Kitaifa za kuvutia kuungana mkono katika kuhifadhi uzuri wa wanyamapori wetu na mandhari ya asili.
Ekegusii: Obokoreri rwe' chingiti chiorosana yaboririe abatari kwegokeria chinsemo echio chi orogongo chiokogokia, tochirende na ebitongwa binde biakare
Dholuo: Riwruok mar le mag bunge e piny Kenya  jiwo ji duto ma biro limowa e pewe magwa mag le  mondo oriwre lwedo e rito kit le kod yiende mabeyo ma wan - go.
Somali: Hay'adda Kenya Wildlife Service waxay ku boorineysaa dhamaan booqdayaasheena cajiibka ah ee ku yimaada jardiinooyinkayaga qaranka inay iskaashi ku sameeyaan ilaalinta quruxda duurjoogta iyo muuqaalada dabiiciga ah.

English: EACC urges all professional bodies in the country to infuse integrity and accountability in their self-regulatory mechanisms to enhance corruption intolerance among Kenyan professionals
Kiswahili: EACC inazihimiza taasisi zote za kitaaluma nchini kuingiza uadilifu na uwajibikaji katika mifumo yao ya kujidhibiti ili kuongeza uvumilivu wa ufisadi miongoni mwa wataalamu wa Kenya.
Ekegusii: EACC yaboririe chinsagia chionsi chiobokoreri gosangia chiumbu chingiya na oboasioku ase ogwekorerana erio gokanya obokurumi  ase abasomu ba Kenya
Dholuo: EACC jiwo jolony duto e pinyno mondo otim gik moko e yo makare kendo e yo mowinjore mondo omi joma olony e Kenya obed gi chuny mar tiyo maonge  gi mibadhi
Somali: EACC waxay ugu baaqeysaa dhamaan hay'adaha xirfadeed ee dalka inay daacadnimo iyo mas'uuliyad ku darsadaan nidaamyadooda is-xakamaynta si kor loogu qaado dulqaadka musuqmaasuqa ee ka dhexeeya xirfadlayaasha Kenya

English: The Commission urges Machakos voters to turn out & exercise their democratic right
Kiswahili: Tume yawahimiza wapiga kura wa Machakos kujitokeza na kutumia haki yao ya kidemokrasia
Ekegusii: Ekeombe ekio giasegetire abaaki chikura Machakos gocha ase obonge kobwatia obosibore bwabo bwerichiko
Dholuo: Kamisen'no  dwaro ni josiasa ma Machakos owuog oko kendo giti gi ratiro ma gin-go mar timo yiero.
Somali: Guddiga ayaa ugu baaqay codbixiyayaasha Machakos inay soo baxaan oo ay adeegsadaan xuquuqdooda dimuqraadiga ah

English: The registrar @ORPPKenya, Anne Nderitu urges parliament to fast track the enactment of election-related legislation. Late enactments negatively affect the planning of elections.
Kiswahili: Msajili @ORPPKenya, Anne Nderitu anahimiza bunge kuharakisha utekelezaji wa sheria zinazohusiana na uchaguzi. Kupitishwa kwa sheria kuchelewa kunaathiri vibaya upangaji wa uchaguzi.
Ekegusii: Omoriki oyo Orosagia bwe,Biombe bia siasa [ORPP], Anne Nderitu obooriri ekegambiro gie' bunge kobwatia bwango obokoreri bwa'amachiko yobochori na korara ngokare emeremo   Ababunge baise konyoria amachiko ayi, nabo aratebania emeroberio emiya ya' obochori
Dholuo: Anne Nderitu, ma en jagoro mar @orppkenya, jiwo Bura mondo orit mapiyo kaka chike motudore gi yiero tiyo. Keto chike modeko thiro chenro mag yiero.
Somali: Diiwaanka @ORPPKenya, Anne Nderitu waxay Baarlamaanka ugu baaqeysaa inay si dhakhso leh ula socdaan ansixinta sharciyada la xiriira doorashooyinka.

English: NGECKenya representative Winnie Wambua calls for collaboration & asks participants to work together to ensure violence does not impede women from vying for political seats & urges participants to start a campaign to have men support women secure positions of leadership
Kiswahili: Mwakilishi wa NGECKenya Winnie Wambua atoa wito wa ushirikiano na kuwaomba washiriki kufanya kazi pamoja ili kuhakikisha vurugu hazizuii wanawake kugombea viti vya kisiasa na kuwahimiza washiriki kuanzisha kampeni ili wanaume wawaunge mkono wanawake kupata nafasi za uongozi.
Ekegusii: Omorai o'NGEC Kenya, Winnie Wambua obooriria okobwaterana na kobooria emeremo yobwamo, eburaburu tetanga abangina tibaboria amabaga asiasa na gosegeta abasacha bae okoboko abasubati bokoboria ebirogo bia' siasa
Dholuo: Jachung'  mar NGECKenya, Winnie Wambua, ogwelo ji duto mondo oriwre lwedo mondo timbe mahundu kik geng' mon kik donj e loch mag siasa kendo ojiwo ji duto mondo ochak kampen mar konyo chwo mondo oriw lwedo mon e migepe mag telo.
Somali: Wakiilka NGOECKenya Winnie Wambua waxay ku baaqeysaa wada shaqeyn & waxay ka codsaneysaa ka qaybgalayaasha inay wada shaqeeyaan si loo hubiyo in rabshaduhu aysan ka hortagin haweenka inay ku tartamaan kuraasta siyaasadda & waxay ka codsaneysaa ka qaybgalayaasha inay bilaabaan olole ay raggu ku taageeraan haweenka si ay u helaan jagooyin hoggaamineed oo ammaan ah

English: Canada wishes IEBC success in #ECVR2021, urges citizens to register as their vote matters.
Kiswahili: Kanada inaitakia IEBC mafanikio katika #ECVR2021, inawasihi raia kujiandikisha kwani kura zao ni muhimu.
Ekegusii: Canada yaganeirie IEBC chingaki chingiya ase obokoreri bwaye #ECRV2021, ni koa omoyo abaaki chikura berike ekiagera chikura chiabo nechi' engecho enene
Dholuo: Kanada dwaro ni IEBC otim dongruok e #ECVR2021, dwaro ni ji duto odonjre kaka joma biro goyo ombulu nikech ombuchgi en gima duong ahinya.
Somali: Kanada waxay u rajeyneysaa IEBC guul #ECVR2021, waxay ku boorineysaa muwaadiniinta inay isdiiwaangaliyaan sida codkooda ay muhiim u tahay.

English: The Commission Chairman Wafula Chebukati urges Faith Based Organizations to have a collective responsibility to ensure we have a peaceful free and fair election in August 2022.
Kiswahili: Mwenyekiti wa Tume Wafula Chebukati anahimiza Mashirika ya Kidini kuwa na jukumu la pamoja la kuhakikisha tuna uchaguzi huru na wa haki wa amani mwezi Agosti 2022.
Ekegusii: Omonyakerogo bw'obochori Wafula Chebukati obooririe ebiombe bia abegeni koba riboa erimo koeneki chikura nchire nomorembe, chiobosibore na chiancheranete omotienyi ogatano na gatato 2022
Dholuo: Jakom mar Komiti miluongo ni Wafula Chebukati, jiwo riwruok mar dinde mondo obed gi ting ' mar neno ni  yiero e dwe mar Aboro higa mar alufu ariyo piero ariyo kod ariyo otim e yo ma ayanga.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha guddiga Wafula Chebukati wuxuu ugu baaqay ururada ku saleysan iimaanka inay lahaadaan mas'uuliyad wadajir ah si loo hubiyo inaan helno doorasho nabadeed oo xor ah oo cadaalad ah bisha Agoosto 2022.

English: Evans Misati, Chairperson of Political Parties Liaison Committee (PPLC) National Steering Committee urges PWDs to register as members of political parties to claim their rightful share in national representation
Kiswahili: Evans Misati, Mwenyekiti wa Kamati ya Uongozi ya Kitaifa ya Kamati ya Uhusiano ya Vyama vya Siasa (PPLC) anawasihi watu wenye ulemavu kujiandikisha kama wanachama wa vyama vya siasa ili kudai sehemu yao halali katika uwakilishi wa kitaifa.
Ekegusii: Evans Misati, Omonyakerogo bwe' komiti yebiama bia siasa orongo rwa Kenya, obooririe abanto bare noboremaru koira ribaga riabo ria bene ase okoraagwa
Dholuo: Evans Misati, ma en jakom mar Komiti mar Riwruok mar duond od buche (PPLC) komiti matayo sirkal mamalo  jiwo PWDs mondo odonjre kaka jokanyo mag riwruoge mag siasa mondo giyud migawo mowinjore mar bedo jokanyo mag pinje
Somali: Evans Misati, Guddoomiyaha Guddiga Xiriirka Xisbiyada Siyaasadeed (PPLC) Guddiga Hogaaminta Qaranka ayaa ku booriyay dadka PWD inay iska diiwaangeliyaan xubnaha xisbiyada siyaasadeed si ay u codsadaan saamigooda sharciga ah ee wakiilka qaranka

English: Commissioner Wanderi urges women to remain united and support their own candidates in big numbers but also ensure they develop and mentor the youth to be responsible to take up leadership positions in the upcoming August 9, General Election.
Kiswahili: Kamishna Wanderi anawasihi wanawake kubaki wamoja na kuwaunga mkono wagombea wao kwa wingi lakini pia kuhakikisha wanawaendeleza na kuwapa ushauri vijana ili kuwajibika kuchukua nafasi za uongozi katika Uchaguzi Mkuu ujao wa Agosti 9.
Ekegusii: 0mokomishona Wanderi osegetire abangina koba riboa erimo na koegerera omosubati obo ase obonge, naende babwatisie abasae koboria ebirogo bia'siasa ase obochori obonene bore motwe Omotienyi ogatano na gatato chitariki kianda
Dholuo: Kamisona Wanderi jiwo wakeini mondo osik ka gin gi winjruok achiel kendo gichiw kony maduong ' ne joma gidwaro, to bende gijiwo kendo gijiwo rowere mondo obed gi ting ' mar telo e yiero maduong ' mabiro tarik ochiko dwe mar aboro.
Somali: Guddoomiye Wanderi wuxuu ku boorinayaa haweenka inay sii midoobaan oo ay taageeraan musharixiintooda tiro badan, laakiin sidoo kale inay hubiyaan in ay horumariyaan oo ay tababaraan dhalinyarada si ay u noqdaan kuwo mas'uul ka ah inay qabtaan jagooyinka hoggaanka doorashada guud ee soo socota 9ka Ogosto.

English: Commissioner Cherera urges women to mobilise and bring out those not registered to enlist as voters
Kiswahili: Kamishna Cherera awahimiza wanawake kuhamasisha na kuwaleta nje wale ambao hawajajiandikisha kujiandikisha kama wapiga kura
Ekegusii: Omokomishona Cherera oboririe abangina gocha amo na koerikia buna abaaki chikura
Dholuo: kamisona Cherera jiwo wakeini mondo ojiw kendo ochiw joma pok ondikre  kaka joma biro yiero.
Somali: Guddoomiye Cherera wuxuu ku booriyay haweenka in ay soo uruuriyaan oo ay soo saaraan kuwa aan diiwaangashanayn si ay u diiwaangeliyaan codbixiyeyaasha

English: In the meantime, KRA urges all the patriotic citizens of Kenya to stand with the Government, especially during this difficult and unprecedented time.
Kiswahili: Wakati huo huo, KRA inawasihi raia wote wazalendo wa Kenya kusimama na Serikali, hasa wakati huu mgumu na usio wa kawaida.
Ekegusii: Ase ebiro ebioebio, KRA yakureire abakenya bare nogwancha okuya gotenena neserekari,  ase chingaki echi chitamanyereire
Dholuo: E kindeno bende, KRA jiwo raia duto mag Kenya mondo ochung ' kor sirkal, to moloyo e kinde matekni.
Somali: Dhanka kale, KRA waxay ugu baaqeysaa dhammaan muwaadiniinta wadaniyiinta ah ee Kenya inay taageeraan dowladda, gaar ahaan xilligan adag oo aan hore loo arag.

English: Commissioner Francis Wanderi urges media, in the spirit of transparency, to send staff in all polling station to report results as declared by Presiding & Returning Officers.
Kiswahili: Kamishna Francis Wanderi anahimiza vyombo vya habari, kwa roho ya uwazi, kutuma wafanyakazi katika vituo vyote vya kupigia kura kuripoti matokeo kama yalivyotangazwa na Wasimamizi na Maafisa wa Kurudi.
Ekegusii: Omokomishona Francis Wanderi obooririe abariki bamangana, ase omoyo bwoboasioku, gotoma abakoreri ase kera egetaseni gia chikura, korwa chiropoti buna chikura chikorarigwa na abobisa batenerete chikura
Dholuo: kamisona Francis Wanderi jiwo jofwambo e chuny mar ler e tich mondo oor jotich e kombe duto mag yiero mondo ochiw ripode kaka ne oland gi jotelo mochung' ne lendo mag  yiero.
Somali: Guddoomiye Francis Wanderi wuxuu warbaahinta ugu baaqayaa inay si hufan u dirto shaqaale dhammaan goobaha codbixinta si ay u soo sheegaan natiijooyinka sida ay ku dhawaaqeen madaxweyneyaasha iyo saraakiisha soo celinta.

English: Director SCM, Harley Mutisya urges suppliers and service providers to communicate with accuracy on any issues that may hinder their ability to deliver on time to IEBCKenya
Kiswahili: Mkurugenzi SCM, Harley Mutisya anawasihi wasambazaji na watoa huduma kuwasiliana kwa usahihi kuhusu masuala yoyote ambayo yanaweza kuzuia uwezo wao wa kuwasilisha kwa wakati kwa IEBCKenya.
Ekegusii: Omorai omonene oyo SCM Harley Mutisya obooririe abaereri na obokreri goteba kengima gose bokongu bonde mborabeo boratange chinguru chiabo tibaikerani ase IEBC kenya
Dholuo: Jatend SCM, Harley Mutisya ojiwo jouso kod jochiw mwandu  mondo owuo e yo makare e wi weche duto manyalo monogi chwalo mwandu e kinde mowinjore ne duol mar yiero e piny kenya.
Somali: Agaasimaha SCM, Harley Mutisya wuxuu ku boorinayaa alaab-qeybiyeyaasha iyo bixiyeyaasha adeegyada inay si sax ah ula xiriiraan arrimaha kasta oo caqabad ku noqon kara awooda ay ku gaarsiiyaan IEBCKenya waqtigeeda

English: IEBC Chairman Wafula Chebukati urges political parties to familiarize with the Elections Operation Plan (EOP), which provides a roadmap and key timelines of the election calendar.
Kiswahili: Mwenyekiti wa IEBC Wafula Chebukati anahimiza vyama vya siasa kufahamu Mpango wa Uendeshaji wa Uchaguzi (EOP), ambao hutoa ramani ya barabara na ratiba muhimu za kalenda ya uchaguzi.
Ekegusii: Omonyakerogo o'IEBC Wafula Chebukati osegetire ebiama bia siasa kwemanyekani na amachiko yokoroberi obochori (EOP) yokoorokia enchera na ebitambokero ase ekalenda yobochori
Dholuo: Jakom mar IEBC Wafula Chebukati jiwo riwruoge mag siasa mondo ong'e chenro mar Yiero (EOP), ma loso chenro mar luwo yore kod seche mag yiero.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha IEBC Wafula Chebukati wuxuu xisbiyada siyaasadeed ugu baaqay inay la kulmaan Qorshaha Howlgalka Doorashooyinka (EOP), kaas oo bixiya khariidad iyo jadwalka muhiimka ah ee jadwalka doorashada.

English: EACC urges any person with actionable information on corruption to REPORT it for processing in accordance with the law.
Kiswahili: EACC inamsihi mtu yeyote mwenye taarifa zinazoweza kushughulikiwa kuhusu ufisadi kuripoti kwa ajili ya kushughulikiwa kwa mujibu wa sheria.
Ekegusii: EACC yaboririe monto onde bwensi oratware obomanyi bwobukurumi, korwa chiropoti echio chikorerwe emeremo korengana neruchiko
Dholuo: EACC jiwo ng'ato ang'ata ma nigi weche ma nyalo konyo e wi mibadhi mondo ochiw ripot mar loso gik moko kaluwore gi chik.
Somali: EACC waxay ku boorineysaa qofkasta oo haysta macluumaad la xiriira musuqmaasuqa in uu soo sheegayo si loo baaraandego si waafaqsan sharciga.

English: The Commission urges voters, candidates and agents to maintain order at all polling stations, avoid wearing or carrying campaign materials and to avoid campaigning while on the queue #October14thBy-elections.
Kiswahili: Tume inawasihi wapiga kura, wagombea na mawakala kudumisha utulivu katika vituo vyote vya kupigia kura, kuepuka kuvaa au kubeba vifaa vya kampeni na kuepuka kufanya kampeni wakiwa kwenye foleni #UchaguziMdogo wa Oktoba14.
Ekegusii: Ekomishoni yaboririe abaaki chikura, abarai bakobori oborai na abaechenti babeke omochoko ase ebitaseni biobochori naende gokora chikampeni ase omorobiri #Omotienyi o'ikomi 14 chikura chinke
Dholuo: Komisenano jiwo jogo ombulu,joland kombe kod jochung'  mondo orit kwe e  kuonde duto mag goyo ombulu , kik girwak kata ting'o gige kampen kendo kik girwak gige kampen ka gin e opara mar yiero #Oktoba14th By elections.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu codbixiyayaasha, musharixiinta iyo wakiillada ku boorinayaa inay nidaamka ku ilaaliyaan dhammaan goobaha codbixinta, ka fogaadaan inay xirtaan ama qaataan qalabka ololaha iyo inay ka fogaadaan ololaha inta ay safka ku jiraan doorashada #October14thBy.

English: Did you know? That you can apply for special number plates? Apply online via the serviceportal.ntsa.go.ke
Kiswahili: Je, unajua? Kwamba unaweza kuomba nambari maalum za simu? Tuma maombi mtandaoni kupitia serviceportal.ntsa.go.ke
Ekegusii: Nkwamanyete? Nosabe enamba yabene? Saba ase intaneti ntsa
Dholuo: Be ing'eyo ni inyalo kwayo mondo omiyi plede makenda ? kwa e mbui kokalo kuom tond mbui mar serviceportal.ntsa.go.ke
Somali: Ma ogtahay in aad codsan karto lambarrada gaarka ah? Codso khadka tooska ah adigoo adeegsanaya bogga adeegga.ntsa.go.ke

English: Commissioner Francis Wanderi urges the POs and DPOs to respect the law and be impartial to all candidates and pledged to support them to deliver a credible Nguu/Masumba County Assembly Ward (CAW) by-election for #October14thBy-elections
Kiswahili: Kamishna Francis Wanderi anawasihi PO na DPO kuheshimu sheria na kutokuwa na upendeleo kwa wagombea wote na kuahidi kuwaunga mkono ili kutoa uchaguzi mdogo wa Bunge la Kaunti ya Nguu/Masumba (CAW) unaoaminika kwa ajili ya uchaguzi mdogo wa #Oktoba14.
Ekegusii: Omokomishona Francis Wanderi okureire abobisa batenerete obochori ase ebitaseni gosika richko na gotatwara ogwanchereri ase abanasiasa bonsi na akaria eira yokobasegeta gokora emeremo yabo ase chikura chinke chia Nguu/Masumba omotiènyi o'ikomi chitariki 14 obochori oboke
Dholuo: Kamisona Francis Wanderi osayo POS kod DPOs mondo oluw chik kendo kik gidonjre gi ng'ato gi ng'ato kendo gisesingore ni gibiro riwo lwedo jogo mabiro chiwo kad mar loch mar waod mar kaunti (CAW) ne yiero ma adundo mar dwe mar apar tarik apar kod ang'wen yiero ma adundo.
Somali: Guddoomiye Francis Wanderi wuxuu ku booriyay POs-yada iyo DPOs-yada inay ixtiraamaan sharciga oo ay yihiin kuwo aan kala sooc lahayn dhammaan musharixiinta wuxuuna ballanqaaday inay taageeraan si ay u gaaraan doorasho qayb ah oo lagu kalsoonaan karo oo ka dhacda degmada Nguu/Masumba ee #October14thBy-doorashooyinka.

English: Returning Officer for the Nguu/Masumba County Assembly Ward (CAW) by-election Moureen Kerebi Oyaro urges voters and media to observe Covid-19 protocol.
Kiswahili: Afisa Msimamizi wa Uchaguzi mdogo wa Wadi ya Bunge la Kaunti ya Nguu/Masumba (CAW) Moureen Kerebi Oyaro anawasihi wapiga kura na vyombo vya habari kuzingatia itifaki ya Covid-19.
Ekegusii: Omobisa bwe'chikura Nguu/Masumba chikura chinke Moreen Kerebi Oyaro obooriri abaaki chikura na abariki amangana kobwatia amarago a korona
Dholuo: Apisa mochung'ne yiero maduondo Nguu/ e wod mar Kaunti mar Masumba  Moureen Kerebi Oyaro, kwayo jogo ombulu  mondo oluw chik mar tuo mar Covid-19.
Somali: Sarkaalka soo noqnoqda ee doorashada gaarka ah ee Nguu/Masumba County Assembly Ward (CAW) Moureen Kerebi Oyaro wuxuu codbixiyayaasha iyo warbaahinta ku boorinayaa inay u hoggaansamaan borotokoolka COVID-19.

English: In addition to the matters already under investigations, EACC urges any person with relevant information to promptly report to us
Kiswahili: Mbali na masuala ambayo tayari yanachunguzwa, EACC inamsihi mtu yeyote mwenye taarifa muhimu aturipoti haraka.
Ekegusii: Komenta namangana akobwatigwa na ekeombe ekenene gia chiumbu chingiya na obokurumi, monto onde oborigwe gotoma amangana
Dholuo: Mopogore gi weche ma nonro gi dhi nyime, EACC jiwo ng'ato ang'ata ma nigi weche madwarore mondo ochiwnegi ripot mapiyo.
Somali: Marka lagu daro arrimaha horay loo baaray, EACC waxay ku boorineysaa qof kasta oo leh macluumaad ku habboon inuu si dhakhso leh noo soo wargeliyo

English: IEBCKenya Chairman Wafula Chebukati urges PWDs to walk with the Commission in its onward march to a stronger democracy & reiterates IEBC s commitment in delivering a free, fair and credible 2022 General Election that meets the democratic aspirations of Kenyan citizens
Kiswahili: Mwenyekiti wa IEBCKenya Wafula Chebukati anawasihi watu wenye ulemavu kutembea na Tume katika harakati zake za kuelekea demokrasia imara na kusisitiza kujitolea kwa IEBC katika kutoa Uchaguzi Mkuu wa 2022 ulio huru, wa haki na wa kuaminika unaokidhi matarajio ya kidemokrasia ya raia wa Kenya.
Ekegusii: Omonyakerogo o'IEBC Wafula Chebukati obooriri abaremaru gotara amo koeneki obochori bwobosibore, obuya, bokoegeneka 2022 chikura chinene, echio chikogenda na amagani ya abanto bonsi
Dholuo: Jakom  mar duol mar yiero  e kenya IEBC Wafula Chebukati ojiwo PWDs mondo owuoth gi Komison e dhi nyime gi loch mar demokrasi motegno kendo ochiwore mar neno ni yiero ma ayanga kod yiero ma higa mar alufu ariyokod piero ariyo gi ariyo ochopo ratiro mar jopiny Kenya.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha IEBCKenya Wafula Chebukati wuxuu ku booriyay PWDs inay la socdaan Komishanka socdaalkiisa xagga dimuqraadiyadda xooggan & wuxuu ku celceliyay ballanqaadka IEBC ee gaarsiinta doorasho guud oo bilaash ah, cadaalad ah oo la isku halleyn karo oo 2022 ah oo buuxisa himilooyinka dimuqraadiyadda ee muwaadiniinta Kenya

English: Jiandikishe Leo! Hakikisha kura yako imehesabika roundi hii. Tembelea ofisi yoyote ya IEBC iliyo karibu na wewe.
Kiswahili: Jiandikishe Leo! Maana kura yako imehesabika roundi hii. Tembelea ofisi ya IEBC iliyo karibu na wewe.
Ekegusii: Erike rero! Eneki inga ekura yago yasoire ase omobaro
Dholuo: Ndikri kawuono ne ni kuchi okwan kinde ni .Dhiuru e ofis yiero mar IEBC moro amora manie alworau.
Somali: Jiandikishe Leo! Hakikisha kura yako imehesabika round this. Tembelea xafiis kasta oo ka mid ah IEBC ee kugu dhow.

English: IEBC calls upon all eligible citizens-especially young people who have recently attained voting age-to visit the nearest constituency office and register.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatoa wito kwa raia wote wanaostahiki - hasa vijana ambao wamefikia umri wa kupiga kura hivi karibuni - kutembelea ofisi ya eneobunge iliyo karibu na kujiandikisha.
Ekegusii: IEBC yabooririe abaaki chikura na mono abasae baikire emeika yogoaka chikura, batarere abisi ere ange na koerikia
Dholuo: IEBC gwelo ji duto mowinjore, to ahinya wuon rowere ma nyocha ochopo higni mar yiero, mondo olim ofis ma ni machiegni gi kama gidakie kendo gidonj e skundno.
Somali: IEBC waxay ugu baaqeysaa dhammaan muwaadiniinta u qalma - gaar ahaan dhalinyarada dhawaan gaaray da'da codbixinta - inay soo booqdaan xafiiska ugu dhow ee goobaha doorashada oo ay iska diiwaangeliyaan.

English: Why wait inline when you can register online. Apply for special purpose vehicle today.
Kiswahili: Kwa nini usubiri kwenye mstari wakati unaweza kujiandikisha mtandaoni? Tuma maombi ya gari la matumizi maalum leo.
Ekegusii: Nase ki okoganyera kwerikia ribaga erio bwerikie ase omotandao
Dholuo: Ang'o momiyo inyalo rito laini  sama inyalo kwayo e intanet . Kwa gari mar tich mopwodhi kawuono e Intanet?
Somali: Waa maxay sababta aad u sugto safka marka aad iska diiwaangelin karto khadka tooska ah. Maanta codso baabuur loogu talagalay ujeedooyinka gaarka ah.

English: The Commission calls upon candidates and members of the public to maintain peace and order during the campaign period.
Kiswahili: Tume inatoa wito kwa wagombea na umma kudumisha amani na utulivu wakati wa kampeni.
Ekegusii: Ekomishona yaboririe abarai amo abanto bonsi kobeka omorembe na omochoko chingaki chia chikampeni
Dholuo: Komisenano dwaro ni jochung' kod jogo ombulu  obed gi kwe e kinde kampenno.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu ugu baaqayaa musharixiinta iyo shacabka inay nabad iyo nidaam ilaaliyaan inta lagu jiro muddada ololaha.

English: KRA invites you to bid on exciting lots from ICDN, JKIA, CFS “MSA, and the Western Region. Visit https://ibid.kra.go.ke to view and bid. Bid conveniently, transparently, and from anywhere!
Kiswahili: KRA inakualika kuweka zabuni kwenye viwanja vya kusisimua kutoka ICCN, JKIA, CFS “MSA, na Kanda ya Magharibi. Tembelea https://ibid.kra.go.ke ili kuona na kuweka zabuni. Weka zabuni kwa urahisi, kwa uwazi, na kutoka mahali popote!
Ekegusii: Ekeombe ekenene kiogossngereria ebango yakoareganiri gosaba chitenda korws ICDN, JKIA, CFS"MSS" na orogongo rwa Bosongo
Dholuo: KRA gwelo ji mondo ochiw pesa e wi yiero mabeyo moa e ICDN, JKIA, CFS  € "MSA, kod Western Region. Dhiuru e mbui mar  https://ibid.kra.go.ke mondo ung'i kendo uchul pesa. Chiwuru pesa e yo mayot, maler, kendo koa kamoro amora!
Somali: KRA waxay kugu martiqaadeysaa inaad soo bandhigto qodobo xiiso leh oo ka socda ICDN, JKIA, CFS MSA, iyo Gobolka Galbeedka. Booqo https://ibid.kra.go.ke si aad u aragto oo aad u soo bandhigto.

English: Make it official, get your driving license today.
Kiswahili: Ifanye iwe rasmi, pata leseni yako ya udereva leo.
Ekegusii: Kora keofisi, nyora ogwanchera kogendi chigari rero
Dholuo: Ket wachno e yo ma ratiro, kendo iyud laisens mar riembo mtoka sani.
Somali: Si rasmi ah u samee, maanta hel liisanka wadistaada.

English: Stay alert, share your info with imposters. Report and block any suspicious accounts.
Kiswahili: Kuwa macho, shiriki taarifa zako na wadanganyifu. Ripoti na uzuie akaunti zozote zinazotiliwa shaka.
Ekegusii: Kaba maiso,sanga amanga ago nemekora
Dholuo: Bed motang', nyisi weche mari ne joma wuondore, kendo igeng' akaunt moramora ma chiji.
Somali: Iska jira, la wadaag macluumaadkaaga khiyaanooyinka, ka warbixi oo xannibi xisaabaadka shakiga leh.

English: EACC urges Cooperatives that for them to remain commercially viable and sustainable enterprises for socio-economic development, they must embrace tenets of good governance; realized through selfless delivery, embracing integrity, transparency and accountability
Kiswahili: EACC inahimiza Vyama vya Ushirika kwamba ili viendelee kuwa na faida kibiashara na biashara endelevu kwa ajili ya maendeleo ya kijamii na kiuchumi, lazima vikumbatie kanuni za utawala bora; zinazopatikana kupitia utoaji usio na ubinafsi, kukumbatia uadilifu, uwazi na uwajibikaji.
Ekegusii: EACC yakureire abanyabiombe erio bagenderere kobao ase amagenderero, goika banchere oboteneneri obuya, goetera okwerwa abanyene, bokurumi botaiyo, oboasioku na kobeka amangana teneni
Dholuo: EACC jiwo riwruoge mag ohala ni mondo gidhi nyime bedo gi ohala maber kendo ma dhi nyime e dongruok mar oganda koda mar ohala, nyaka giyie gi chenro mag loch maber; ma nyaka timre kokalo kuom chiwruok mar chiwruok, luwo tim makare, ng'eyo tiend weche, kod ting' mar ting'o ting'
Somali: EACC waxay ugu baaqeysaa iskaashatada in ay sii ahaadaan shirkado ganacsi ahaan ku habboon oo macquul ah horumarinta bulshada iyo dhaqaalaha, ay u baahan yihiin inay qaataan mabaadi'da maamul wanaagsanaanta; taas oo lagu fulin karo iyada oo la adeegsanayo adeegyo aan iskaa u dhigin, oo ay ku jiraan daacadnimo, hufnaanta iyo xisaabtanka.

English: KRA urges all licensed manufacturers, importers, distributors, retailers and general public that all bottled water beverages manufactured in or imported into Kenya from 13th November 2019 must be affixed with an Excise Stamp in compliance with the EGMS Regulations.
Kiswahili: KRA inawasihi wazalishaji wote walioidhinishwa, waagizaji, wasambazaji, wauzaji rejareja na umma kwa ujumla kwamba vinywaji vyote vya maji ya chupa vinavyotengenezwa au kuingizwa nchini Kenya kuanzia tarehe 13 Novemba 2019 lazima viambatishwe na Stempu ya Ushuru kwa mujibu wa Kanuni za EGMS.
Ekegusii: KRA yasegetire abarosia bonsi, abanyora ebinto korwa esiko, abasombi, abaoni abakeabake, na chiamate chionsi na abarosi amache abekire chichuba, gose korentwa korwa isiko gochakera 13 omotiènyi o'ikomi na rimo 2019, goika babekerwe ekemanyererio kia ebango korengana na amachiko aya EGMS
Dholuo: KRA jiwo kambe man gi otiko mar loso gik moko, joma kelo gik moko e pinje mamoko, jochwal mwandu , jolok ohala, kod ji duto mondo ong'e ni chakre dwe mar apar gi achiel tarik apr kod adek higa amr alufu ariyo kod apar kod ochiko, gik moko duto mitiyogo e chamo pi modhi e piny Kenya, kata ma gigolo e pinyno, nyaka ketnegi alama mar osuru kaluwore gi chike mag EGMS.
Somali: KRA waxay ugu baaqeysaa dhammaan soosaarayaasha, soo dejinta, qaybiyeyaasha, tafaariiqleyda iyo dadweynaha guud in dhammaan cabitaannada biyaha lagu dhalo ee laga soo saaro Kenya ama laga soo dhoofiyo Kenya laga bilaabo 13ka Nofeembar 2019 ay ku dhejiyaan Stamp excise si waafaqsan Xeerarka EGMS.

English: Ag. Kenya High Commissioner in Rwanda Philip Githiora urges over 6,000 Kenyans living in Rwanda to register kenyaHCrwanda offices. Diaspora Voter Registration is going on in Kigali & the ambassador has urged Kenyans in different districts in Rwanda to enlist as voters
Kiswahili: Balozi Mkuu wa Kenya nchini Rwanda Philip Githiora awahimiza Wakenya zaidi ya 6,000 wanaoishi Rwanda kusajili ofisi za kenyaHCrwanda. Usajili wa Wapiga Kura wa Diaspora unaendelea mjini Kigali na balozi huyo amewahimiza Wakenya katika wilaya tofauti nchini Rwanda kujiandikisha kama wapiga kura
Ekegusii: Ebalozi ya Kenya ime ya Rwanda Philip Githiora obooririe abakenya baitaneti 6000 bamenyete Rwanda kwerikia ase ofisi
Dholuo: Kamisona ma kenya e piny Rwanda Philip Githiora osenyiso Jo-Kenya mokalo  alufu auchiel  modak Rwanda ni gidonj e ofis mar Kenyahcrwanda. Ndikruok mar oko mar Kenya dhi nyime e Kigali kendo jambetre ojiwo jokenya manie gwenge mopogore opogore e Rwanda ondikre kaka jogo ombulu.
Somali: Ag. Kenya Taliyaha sare ee Rwanda Philip Githiora wuxuu ku booriyay in ka badan 6,000 oo reer Kenya ah oo ku nool Rwanda inay diiwaangeliyaan xafiisyada KenyaHCrwanda. Diaspora Voter Registration ayaa ka socda Kigali & safiirku wuxuu ku booriyay reer Kenya ee degmooyinka kala duwan ee Rwanda inay isu diiwaangeliyaan codbixiyayaasha

English: We remain steadfast in ensuring the safety and well-being of Kenyans and urges anyone who spots problematic wildlife to immediately report the sighting through the KWS 24/7 hotline on 0800 597 000 or WhatsApp number +254 726 610509
Kiswahili: Tunabaki imara katika kuhakikisha usalama na ustawi wa Wakenya na tunamsihi yeyote anayeona wanyamapori wenye matatizo kuripoti mara moja tukio hilo kupitia simu ya dharura ya KWS saa 24/7 kwa 0800 597 000 au nambari ya WhatsApp +254 726 610509.
Ekegusii: Totigare tore maiso abasera ase oborendi bwaito na gosegeta onde bwensi ororire obokongu korwa ase chingiti chiorosana korwa chiropoti gwetera enamba ya botuko na mobaso gochia Ekeombe bene gia Chongiti Chiorosana (KWS) 0800 597 000 gose omotandao 0726610509
Dholuo: Wadhi nyime timo kinda mar rito ngima kod ngima mar Jo-Kenya kendo wajiwo ng'ato ang'ata moneno le ma nigi chandruok mondo ochiw ripot mapiyo kuom KWS 24 / 7 mondo one mach e simo mar 08 597 000 kata  namba mar WhatsApp ma en  +254 726 610509
Somali: Waxaan ku adkaysanaynaa hubinta nabadgelyada iyo wanaagga dadka reer Kenya waxaanan ugu baaqaynaa qofkasta oo arkaa duurjoogta dhibaato leh inuu isla markiiba ka warbixiyo aragtida iyada oo loo marayo khadka tooska ah ee KWS 24/7 0800 597 000 ama lambarka WhatsApp +254 726 610509

English: Director-General Urges New Ambassadors to Uphold Integrity and Professionalism
Kiswahili: Mkurugenzi Mkuu Awahimiza Mabalozi Wapya Kudumisha Uadilifu na Utaalamu
Ekegusii: Omorai Omonene osegetire ababalozi abanyia gotwa chiumbu chingiya na obokoreri obosera
Dholuo: Jatelo Maduong ' jiwo jombetre manyien mag Kenya mondo omed bedo joma timbegi beyo kendo molony.
Somali: Agaasimaha Guud wuxuu ugu baaqay Safiirada Cusub inay ilaaliyaan daacadnimada iyo xirfadda

English: EACC urges professionals to apply their expertise in advancing public good and desist from facilitating corruption or other conduct harmful to society.
Kiswahili: EACC inawahimiza wataalamu kutumia utaalamu wao katika kuendeleza manufaa ya umma na kuacha kuwezesha ufisadi au tabia nyingine zenye madhara kwa jamii.
Ekegusii: EACC yaboririe abasomu korenta chisemi chiabo ase ogokonya abanto naende batige pi gosegeta onochi gose obokurumi ase ebinyoro
Dholuo: EACC jiwo josayans mondo oti gi lony ma gin - go e jiwo ber mar oganda, kendo mondo giwere gi timbe mag mibadhi kod timbe mamoko maricho manyalo hinyo oganda.
Somali: EACC waxay ku boorineysaa xirfadlayaasha inay adeegsadaan aqoontooda si ay u horumariyaan wanaagga dadweynaha oo ay ka fogaadaan fududeynta musuqmaasuqa ama habdhaqan kale oo waxyeello u geysanaya bulshada.

English: CS Tuya urges World Bank to align funding with government priorities
Kiswahili: Waziri Tuya ahimiza Benki ya Dunia kuoanisha ufadhili na vipaumbele vya serikali
Ekegusii: Omoriki Omonene Tuya osegetire Ebengi Enene ense engima kobeka chiropoa kogendana namagani yorogongo
Dholuo: Jatend migawo Tuya jiwo Bengi mar Piny mondo oti gi pesa ma sirkal chiwo kaka gimaduong ' moloyo.
Somali: CS Tuya wuxuu ku booriyay Bangiga Adduunka inuu maalgelinta la jaanqaado mudnaanta dowladda

English: Defence Principal Secretary Mr. Patrick Mariru has implored the newly employed civilian staff and interns to serve the Ministry with diligence, zeal and energy saying it is an uncommon privilege to serve in the public service.
Kiswahili: Katibu Mkuu wa Ulinzi Bw. Patrick Mariru amewasihi wafanyakazi wapya wa kiraia na wanafunzi wapya kuitumikia Wizara kwa bidii, ari na nguvu akisema ni fursa isiyo ya kawaida kutumikia katika utumishi wa umma.
Ekegusii: Omoriki Omonene omosike Patrick Mariru osororire abakori emeremo na aborokigwa abageni gokora emeremo nobwegenu, omoyo omuya nechinguru buna etari engencho ya botambe ase obokoreri
Dholuo: Patrick Mariru, ma en jagoro maduong' mar arita e sirkal, osenyiso jotich manyien mag sirkal kod josiasa ni giti e migawono gi kinda, kod teko, kowacho ni tiyo ne sirkal en thuolo makende
Somali: Xoghayaha Guud ee Gaashaandhigga Mr. Patrick Mariru wuxuu shaqaalaha rayidka ah ee cusub ee la shaqaaleysiiyay iyo shaqaaleyaashu ku baryay inay wasaaradda u adeegaan dadaal, xamaasad iyo tamar isagoo sheegay inay tahay mudnaan aan caadi ahayn in lagu adeego adeegga dadweynaha.

English: Defence Cabinet Secretary Hon. Aden Duale has urged Members of Parliament to pass the regulations on National Peace Support Operations Fund proposed by the Defence Council.
Kiswahili: Waziri wa Ulinzi Mhe. Aden Duale amewataka Wabunge kupitisha kanuni kuhusu Mfuko wa Kitaifa wa Operesheni za Kusaidia Amani zilizopendekezwa na Baraza la Ulinzi.
Ekegusii: Omoriki Omonene bwa Oborendi omosuke Aden Duale oboriri ababunge gortia richiko ase ekegancha kerengereire korosigwa na ekomiti yoborendi
Dholuo: Jatend migawo mar arita kwe  Aden Duale, osenyiso jokanyo mag  od Bura ni gidonj e chenro mar pesa makonyo e kelo arita kwe ma  riwruok mar arita kwe  osechiwo.
Somali: Xoghayaha golaha wasiirada Gaashaandhigga Mudane Aden Duale ayaa ugu baaqay xubnaha Baarlamaanka in ay ansixiyaan xeerarka ku saabsan Sanduuqa Howlgallada Taageerada Nabadda Qaranka ee ay soo jeedisay Golaha Gaashaandhigga.

English: EACC URGES BUNGOMA COUNTY LEADERS TO CHAMPION INTEGRITY IN GOVERNANCE
Kiswahili: EACC YAWASIHI VIONGOZI WA KAUNTI YA BUNGOMA KUSHINDA UADILIFU KATIKA UTAWALA
Ekegusii: EACC yaboriri abarai be'kaunti ya Bungoma kobeka bosio okorwani kwa obokurumi ase oboteneneri
Dholuo: EACC jiwo jotelo mag kaunti ma  Bungoma mondo obed jatelo matiyo kod adieri.
Somali: EACC waxay ku baaqeysaa hoggaamiyeyaasha gobolka BUNGOMA inay ku guuleystaan daacadnimada maamulka

English: Dr. Mudavadi Urges Kenyans to Support Diplomatic Efforts Amid Regional Challenges.
Kiswahili: Dkt. Mudavadi Awahimiza Wakenya Kuunga Mkono Juhudi za Kidiplomasia Katikati ya Changamoto za Kikanda.
Ekegusii: Omonyagitari Mudavadi oboriri abakenya gosegeta obwamate obuya nechinse chinde nonya amakongu karea
Dholuo: Laktar Mudavadi jiwo Jo-Kenya mondo oriw lwedo chenro mag telo moriwo nyaka joma ni oko  kata obedo ni pinyno nigi pek mang'eny.
Somali: Dr. Mudavadi wuxuu ugu baaqay dadka Kenya inay taageeraan dadaallada diblomaasiyadeed inta lagu jiro caqabadaha gobolka.

English: EACC urges members of the public not to at any time succumb to bribe demands from public officials but always report such matters.
Kiswahili: EACC inawasihi wananchi kutokubali madai ya rushwa kutoka kwa maafisa wa umma wakati wowote bali waripoti masuala kama hayo kila wakati.
Ekegusii: EACC yasegetire abamenyi tiba korwa amaaki kero kende gionsi korwa ase abakoreri, korende barwe chiropori chia obokurumi yamanga aywe.
Dholuo: EACC jiwo jopiny mondo kik gidog chien ne weche asoya ma idwaro kod jotelo to gibed ka giwachwlo lipode ma kamago.
Somali: EACC waxay ku boorineysaa xubnaha dadweynaha inaysan marnaba hoos u dhicin codsiyada musuqmaasuqa ee mas'uuliyiinta dawladda laakiin had iyo jeer soo sheegaan arrimahaas.

English: IEBCKenya urges our donors to continue supporting the Commission to implement activities in the 2023-2027 electoral cycle
Kiswahili: IEBCKenya inawasihi wafadhili wetu kuendelea kuiunga mkono Tume kutekeleza shughuli katika mzunguko wa uchaguzi wa 2023-2027.
Ekegusii: IEBC kenya yaboriri abakonyi kogenderera gosegeta emeroberio yabochori 2023-2027
Dholuo: Jatend duol mar yiero IEBC , KENYA kwayo komisona  mondo odhi nyime riwo lwedo kamisona e  tich mar yiero mar higa mar alufu ariyo piero ariyo kod adek -alufu ariyo piero ariyo kod abiriyo.
Somali: IEBCKenya waxay ku boorineysaa deeq bixiyeyaasheena inay sii wadaan taageerada ay u yeeshaan Komishanka si ay u hirgeliyaan hawlaha wareegga doorashada 2023-2027

English: Foreign Affairs PS together with Devolution PS Julius Korir and Planning PS Saitoti Torome visited the Kiptogot Kolongolo water project in Transnzoia County
Kiswahili: Katibu Mkuu wa Wizara ya Mambo ya Nje pamoja na Katibu Mkuu wa Ugatuzi Julius Korir na Katibu Mkuu wa Mipango Saitoti Torome walitembelea mradi wa maji wa Kiptogot Kolongolo katika Kaunti ya Transnzoia.
Ekegusii: Omoriki obotambe bwa amangana ye chinse chia isiko amo na omoriki bwa amangana aime ya chikaunti Julius Korir noria bwemeroberio Saitoti Torome batarere amagenderero ya amache aya Kiptogot Kolongolo ime ya kaunti Tranzoia
Dholuo: Jagoro mar weche ma oko mar piny kaachiel gi jagoro mar tend loch gwenge  Julius Korir kod jagoro mar loso chenro Saitoti Torome ne odhi limo chenro mar kuonde yudo pi e Kiptogot Kolololo e kaunti  ' mar Transnzoia
Somali: Shirka Arrimaha Dibadda PS oo ay weheliyaan Devolution PS Julius Korir iyo Planning PS Saitoti Torome ayaa booqday mashruuca biyaha Kiptogot Kolongolo ee Gobolka Transnzoia

English: PS Foreign Affairs @AmbMKamau, PS, Devolution Julius Korir, and PS Planning Saitoti Torome are currently inspecting the Kitale Airport project in Transnzioia County in the ongoing NDITC Project Assessment by PSs
Kiswahili: Katibu Mkuu wa Mambo ya Nje @AmbMKamau, Katibu Mkuu, Ugatuzi Julius Korir, na Katibu Mkuu wa Mipango Saitoti Torome kwa sasa wanakagua mradi wa Uwanja wa Ndege wa Kitale katika Kaunti ya Transnzioia katika Tathmini ya Mradi wa NDITC unaoendelea na PS
Ekegusii: omoriki obotambe ase amang'ana aisiko yense omoruoti kamau M, omoriki obotambe otenenerete amang'ana yechiserekari ye'chikaunti Julius korir amo na omoriki obotambi ase obokoreri ase emeroberi bene saitpti Torome.
Dholuo: Weche mag oko @AmbMKamuu, PS, Devolution Julius Korir, kod PSonation Saitoti Torome sani nono chenro mar Kiale Airport e Transnzioia State e NDITC Project mar PS
Somali: PS Arrimaha Dibadda @AmbMKamau, PS, Devolution Julius Korir, iyo PS Planning Saitoti Torome ayaa hadda kormeera mashruuca Madaarka Kitale ee Gobolka Transnzioia ee Qiimaynta Mashruuca NDITC ee socda ee PSs

English: Kenya Forest Services (KFS) urges citizens to record trees planted on the Jaza Miti app
Kiswahili: Huduma za Misitu Kenya (KFS) zawahimiza raia kurekodi miti iliyopandwa kwenye programu ya Jaza Miti
Ekegusii: ekeombe getenenerete amanani ime yense ya kenya giasoroire abakenya kobara na komenta emete ase omoroberio bwogoichoria emete ime ye app.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar bunge e piny Kenya  jiwo raia mondo ondik yien ma gipidho e chenro mar Yaza Miti
Somali: Adeegyada Kaymaha Kenya (KFS) waxay muwaadiniinta ugu baaqeen inay diiwaangeliyaan geedaha lagu beeray barnaamijka Jaza Miti

English: IEBC urges Kenyan youth to register as voters
Kiswahili: IEBC yawahimiza vijana wa Kenya kujiandikisha kama wapiga kura
Ekegusii: ekeombe gietenenerete giechimbebe nobochori giasoroire abasae ime yense yakenya kogenderera kuerikia buna abaaki chikura.
Dholuo: IEBC jiwo rowere mag Kenya mondo ondikre kaka jogo ombulu.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku boorineysaa dhalinyarada Kenya inay iska diiwaangeliyaan codbixiyayaasha

English: IEBC urges Kenyans to be patient for results
Kiswahili: IEBC yawahimiza Wakenya kuwa na subira kwa matokeo
Ekegusii: ekeombe gietenenerete giechimbebe nobochori giasoroire abakenya koba abaremereria k'obaganyete amachibu.
Dholuo: IEBC jiwo Jo-Kenya mondo obed gi horuok mar yudo dwoko.
Somali: IEBC waxay dadka Kenya ugu baaqeysaa inay samir u yeeshaan natiijooyinka

English: IEBC urges Kenyans to verify list of BBI supporters
Kiswahili: IEBC yawahimiza Wakenya kuthibitisha orodha ya wafuasi wa BBI
Ekegusii: ekeombe gietenenerete giechimbebe nobochori koenekia amarieta ase omoroberio bwokoreta obomo ime yense.
Dholuo: IEBC dwaro ni Jo-Kenya onon joma yieyo lwedo chenro mar BBI
Somali: IEBC waxay dadka Kenya ugu baaqeysaa inay xaqiijiyaan liiska taageerayaasha BBI

English: IEBC urges youth to register as voters as deadline  looms
Kiswahili: IEBC yawahimiza vijana kujiandikisha kama wapiga kura huku tarehe ya mwisho ikikaribia
Ekegusii: ekeombe gietenenerete giechimbebe nobochori giasoroire abasae kwerikia buna aaabaki bechikura amatuko ataraera
Dholuo: IEBC jiwo rowere mondo ondikre kaka jogo ombulu ka ndalo kayo machiegni.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku boorineysaa dhalinyarada inay iska diiwaangeliyaan codbixiyeyaasha maadaama waqtigu soo dhowaanayo

English: The Commission invites all new eligible voters and those seeking transfer of registration status and update of voter particulars/information to visit their preferred IEBCKenya constituency offices with their national identity card or valid Kenyan passport to register.
Kiswahili: Tume inawaalika wapiga kura wote wapya wanaostahiki na wale wanaotaka kuhamisha hadhi ya usajili na kusasisha maelezo/taarifa za wapiga kura kutembelea ofisi zao za jimbo la IEBCKenya wanazopendelea wakiwa na kitambulisho chao cha kitaifa au pasipoti halali ya Kenya ili kujiandikisha.
Ekegusii: ekeombe kiobochori kiabareganirie abaaki chikura abayia bonsi na baria bonsi barigetie kong'anya gochia ase nchisemo chingeni.
Dholuo: Komisonano gwelo jogo duto manyien ma biro yiero kendo madwaro yudo kad manyien mar joma biro yiero mondo olim ofis ma gihero ahinya mar  yiero IEBC KENYA ka gitiyo gi kad mar pinygi kata paspot mar Kenya mondo gindikre.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu ku casuumay dhammaan codbixiyayaasha cusub ee u qalma codbixinta iyo kuwa doonaya inay wareejiyaan xaaladda diiwaangelinta iyo cusbooneysiinta macluumaadka codbixiyayaasha si ay u soo booqdaan xafiisyadooda doorbiday ee goobaha doorashada ee IEBCKenya iyagoo leh kaarka aqoonsiga qaranka ama baasaboorka Kenya ee saxda ah si ay u diiwaangeliyaan.

English: The group urged MPs to increase funding to the State Department for Diaspora Affairs to facilitate voter registration, mobile consular services & additional polling centers.
Kiswahili: Kundi hilo liliwasihi wabunge kuongeza ufadhili kwa Idara ya Mambo ya Nje ya Diaspora ili kuwezesha usajili wa wapiga kura, huduma za ubalozi wa simu na vituo vya ziada vya kupigia kura.
Ekegusii: ekeombe kiababoririe abachumbe komenta eng'eria ase ensemo eria erengete  ayechinse chia isiko erio gokonya obokoreri.
Dholuo: Riwruogno nojiwo jokanyo mag bunge mondo omed chiwo pesa ne migawo mar pinyno e weche mag joma odak e pinje mopogore opogore mondo okony e ndiko joma okendore, tiyo gi simo, kod kuonde mamoko mag yiero.
Somali: Kooxdu waxay ku boorisay xildhibaanada inay kordhiyaan maalgelinta Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda si loo fududeeyo diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha, adeegyada qunsulka ee mobile & xarumaha codbixinta dheeriga ah.

English: The Continuous Voter Registration (CVR) resumes on Monday, 29th September, 2025.
Kiswahili: Usajili Endelevu wa Wapiga Kura (CVR) utaanza tena Jumatatu, tarehe 29 Septemba, 2025.
Ekegusii: okogenderera  g'okwirikia gwa abaaki chikura  nochake naende bene etichirimo yechitariki 29 omotienyi oikomi narimo.
Dholuo: Kwan mar joma biro yiero biro chakore kendo chieng' Tich Abich tarik piero ariyo kod ochiko  dwe mar ochiko higa mar alufu ariyo kod piero ariyo kod abich.
Somali: Diiwaangelinta Codbixiyayaasha Joogtada ah (CVR) ayaa dib loo bilaabi doonaa Isniinta, Sebtember 29, 2025.

English: VACANCY ANNOUNCEMENT, TEMPORARY POSITIONS The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) seeks to recruit temporary staff to serve in the following capacities: 1. Voter Registration Clerks: To be deployed across the 57 Huduma Centres countrywide, and 2. By-Election Poll Officials. For more information visit
Kiswahili: TANGAZO LA NAFASI ZA KAZI, NAFASI ZA MUDA Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka (IEBC) inatafuta kuajiri wafanyakazi wa muda kuhudumu katika nafasi zifuatazo: 1. Makarani wa Usajili wa Wapiga Kura: Watatumwa katika Vituo 57 vya Huduma kote nchini, na 2. Maafisa wa Kura za Uchaguzi Mdogo. Kwa maelezo zaidi tembelea
Ekegusii: OKORARIA,  AMABAGA  Y'EMEREMO, AMABAGA YECHINGAKI NCHIKE. Ekeombe gietenenerete giechimbebe nobochori(IEBC) nkorigi ere.
Dholuo: lendo mag thuolo mantie, mag kinde moketi Migawo mag yiero kod tong' mag pinje (IEBC) dwaro tiyo gi jotich ma tiyo kuom thuolo machuok e migepe maluwogi: achiel . Jondiko mag josiasa: ibiro ti kodgi e kuonde piero abich kod abiriyo mag huduma centers e piny mangima, kod ariyo. Jotelo mag yiero mag yiero. kuom mathoth lim
Somali: Ogeysiiska Fasaxa, Meelaha ku meelgaarka ah Guddiga Madaxa banaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha (IEBC) wuxuu doonayaa inuu shaqaale ku meelgaar ah shaqaaleysiiyo si ay ugu adeegaan awoodaha soo socda: 1. Xoghayaha Diiwaangelinta Codbixiyayaasha: Waa in loo geeyo 57ka Xarumood ee Huduma ee dalka oo dhan, iyo 2. Saraakiisha Doorashada Doorashada. Wixii macluumaad dheeraad ah booqo

English: the Commission reminded its staff that they are more than officers behind a desk ”they are the living face of Kenya s democracy, from the remotest polling station in Turkana to the headquarters in Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Tume iliwakumbusha wafanyakazi wake kwamba wao ni zaidi ya maafisa walio nyuma ya dawati "wao ndio uso hai wa demokrasia ya Kenya, kuanzia kituo cha mbali zaidi cha kupigia kura huko Turkana hadi makao makuu jijini Nairobi."
Ekegusii: ekeombe kiabainyoirie abakoreri baye ng'a barabwo mbaetanetie abakoreri bare ase ebirogo. barabwo noborori bene bwa Kenya ere moyo.
Dholuo: Komisonano noparo ne jotichne ni gin gi apisas mang'eny etok kom ,gin e ratiro mar kenya nenore kuomgi  chakre kama itimee yiero man Turkana nyaka apis yiero maduong' ma boma ma  Nairobi.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu xasuusiyay shaqaalihiisa in ay yihiin shaqaale ka badan saraakiil fadhiya miiska waxay yihiin wajiga nool ee dimuqraadiyadda Kenya, laga bilaabo xarunta codbixinta ee ugu fog Turkana ilaa xarunta guud ee Nairobi.

English: 2 days to the resumption of the Continuous Voter Registration (CVR). Register at any IEBC Constituency office (except in areas currently with by-elections)
Kiswahili: Siku 2 kabla ya kuanza tena kwa Usajili Endelevu wa Wapiga Kura (CVR). Jiandikishe katika ofisi yoyote ya Eneo Bunge la IEBC (isipokuwa katika maeneo yenye uchaguzi mdogo kwa sasa)
Ekegusii: Amatuko abere oka atigaire egere okwerikia koria kwabotambe gochake naende. Erikie ase chiobisi chia ekeombe gietenenerete giechimbebe nobochori ande onsi ase chiobisi chiabo.(otatiga chinsemo chiria chibwate onochori oboke).
Dholuo: Odiechienge ariyo mondo ochak ndiko jogo madwaro yiero (CVR). Ndikri e ofis moro amora mar IEBC (mak mana kuonde monikod yiero ma adundo)
Somali: 2 maalmood laga bilaabo dib u bilaabashada diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha joogtada ah (CVR).

English: IEBC announces resumption of voter registration from September 29
Kiswahili: IEBC yatangaza kuanza tena kwa usajili wa wapiga kura kuanzia Septemba 29
Ekegusii: ekeombe gietenenerete giechimbebe nobochori kiararirie obweriki bwa abaaki chikura gochaka 29 omotienyi okianda.
Dholuo: IEBC ogolo chik mar golo joma ne oket e register mar yiero chakre Septemba 29
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dib loo bilaabi doono diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha laga bilaabo Sebtember 29

English: Kisero Kennedy, Secretary-General of KeMUSA, calls on Kenyan youth to take up voter registration in masses.
Kiswahili: Kisero Kennedy, Katibu Mkuu wa KeMUSA, anatoa wito kwa vijana wa Kenya kuandikisha wapiga kura kwa wingi.
Ekegusii: kisero kennedy, omoriki omonene bw'ekeombe ekenene kimariogo ime yense, oboririe abasae ime yense yakenya kuerikia buna abaaki chikura ase emeganda.
Dholuo: Kisoro Kennedy, Jandiko Maduong' mar KMUSA, ogwelo rowere mag Kenya mondo oket rejista  mar joma biro yiero.
Somali: Kisero Kennedy, oo ah Xoghayaha Guud ee KeMUSA, ayaa ugu baaqay dhalinyarada Kenya in ay ku biiraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha.

English: Mandera County leaders urge residents to embrace IEBC voter registration drive.
Kiswahili: Viongozi wa Kaunti ya Mandera wawahimiza wakazi kukumbatia kampeni ya usajili wa wapiga kura ya IEBC.
Ekegusii: abarai ase ekaunti ya mandera baboririe abamenyi babwatesie ogotiotereria go'kwerikia buna abaaki chikura gwekeombe gietenenerete giechimbebe nobochori.
Dholuo: Jotelo mag kaunti ma Mandera  jiwo ji mondo orwak dwaro mar dol mar yiero mar IEBC mondo ondik jogo ombulu.
Somali: Hogaamiyayaasha gobolka Mandera waxay ku boorinayaan dadka deegaanka inay qaataan dadaalka diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha ee IEBC.

English: Govt warns that citizens should brace themselves for a bumpy ride ahead, as an additional 10 to 15 billion shillings will be required to subsidise fuel in the coming months
Kiswahili: Serikali yaonya kwamba raia wanapaswa kujitayarisha kwa safari ngumu mbele, kwani shilingi bilioni 10 hadi 15 za ziada zitahitajika ili kutoa ruzuku kwa mafuta katika miezi ijayo.
Ekegusii: Eserekaei yarure egekuro ase abanto bonsi kwearegania ase chingaki chinkong'u mono ase enibo enyinge yechibirioni 10 goika 15 chiokomentwa ase ekerenga giokororobia abagori ya'mabuta.
Dholuo: Sirkal chiwo siem ni jopiny onego otim chenro mag wuodhgi chon, nikech ibiro dwarore ni giyud pesa momedore mar bilion apar  nyaka apar kod abich e dweche mabiro.
Somali: Dowladda ayaa ka digtay in muwaadiniintu ay u diyaar garoobaan safar adag oo soo socda, maadaama 10 ilaa 15 bilyan oo shilin oo dheeri ah loo baahan yahay si loo deeqo shidaalka bilaha soo socda

English: Tafadhali mjiandikishe kwa SHA, President Ruto urges Mkongani residents
Kiswahili: Tafadhali mjiandikishe kwa SHA, Rais Ruto awahimiza wakazi wa Mkongani
Ekegusii: kamoranche erikie ase ekeombe giokorua obobwenia ime yense. omonene bwense omosike Ruto oboririe abamenye ba Mkongani.
Dholuo: Akwayo ni undikru e SHA ker Ruto jiwo jodak ma MKongani.
Somali: Fadlan mjiandikishe kwa SHA, Madaxweyne Ruto wuxuu ugu baaqayaa dadka deegaanka Mkongani

English: West Pokot Governor Kachapin urges residents to enrol for TAIFA care as county records low turnout for SHA registration
Kiswahili: Gavana wa Pokot Magharibi Kachapin awahimiza wakazi kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya huduma ya TAIFA huku kaunti ikirekodi idadi ndogo ya waliojitokeza kwa ajili ya usajili wa SHA
Ekegusii: omogabana bw'ekaunti ya pokot ya sugusu kachapin. oboririe abamenyi kwerikia ase omoroberio bwokorenda abatari kwenyara bwense, asengecho korengana namang'ana yokwerikia ase ekaunti abanto abake mono nabwo boka berikirie.
Dholuo: Gavana Kachapin ma kaunti ma Pokot ma imbo okwayo ji mondo ondikre e  TAIFA care ka kaunti keto e andike tin mar ndikruok e SHA.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha Gobolka West Pokot Kachapin ayaa ku booriyay dadka deggan inay isdiiwaangaliyaan daryeelka TAIFA maadaama gobolka uu diiwaangeliyo ka qaybgalka hoose ee diiwaangelinta SHA

English: Governor Wanga urges Kasipul residents to maintain peace during by-election campaigns
Kiswahili: Gavana Wanga awahimiza wakazi wa Kasipul kudumisha amani wakati wa kampeni za uchaguzi mdogo
Ekegusii: omogabana Wanga obaboririe abamenyi be'nsemo ya kasipul koenekia omorembe ekero ye'chingaki chiobotiotereria bwa obochori.
Dholuo: Gavana Wanga jiwo ji duto modak e KasIpuL mondo odag gi kwe e kinde kampen mag yiero ma adundo.
Somali: Guddoomiye Wanga ayaa dadka deggan Kasipul ugu baaqay inay nabad ilaaliyaan ololaha doorashooyinka gaarka loo leeyahay

English: Governor Fatuma Achani urges residents of Kwale to plant trees.
Kiswahili: Gavana Fatuma Achani awataka wakazi wa Kwale kupanda miti.
Ekegusii: omogabana Fatuma Achani obachikirie abamenyi ba kwale gosimeka emete.
Dholuo: Jatelo miluongo ni Fatuma Akani, jiwo Jo-Kwale mondo opidh yiende.
Somali: Guddoomiye Fatuma Achani ayaa ku booriyay dadka degan magaalada Kwale inay beeraan geedo.

English: Livestock PS urges administrators to inform residents of govt projects
Kiswahili: Katibu Mkuu wa Mifugo awahimiza wasimamizi kuwafahamisha wakazi kuhusu miradi ya serikali
Ekegusii: omoriki obotambe ase ewizara yobotugi obaboririe abagambi komanyia abanto bonsi amagenderero yeserekari.
Dholuo: Jagoro mar weche jamni jiwo telo moando onyis jodak ewi chenro mag sirkal.
Somali: Hay'adda Xoolaha waxay maamulayaasha ugu baaqeysaa inay dadka deggan ka wargeliyaan mashaariicda dowladda

English: CS Miano urges Ndaragwa residents to continue registering with the Social Health Authority (SHA), emphasizing the importance of Universal Health Coverage.
Kiswahili: Waziri Miano anawasihi wakazi wa Ndaragwa kuendelea kujiandikisha na Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii (SHA), akisisitiza umuhimu wa Bima ya Afya kwa Wote.
Ekegusii: omowasiri Miano oboririe abamenyi Bandaragwa banderere kwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia Bwabanto bonsi (SHA)
Dholuo: Jatend migawo Miano jiwo ji duto modak e Ndaragwa mondo odhi nyime dhi nyime ndikre e bedo gi riwruok e yor chudo mar thieth mar  SHA, komedo jiwo ber mar yudo thieth e piny mangima.
Somali: CS Miano wuxuu ugu baaqay dadka deggan Ndaragwa inay sii wadaan diiwaangelinta Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada (SHA), isagoo carabka ku adkeeyay muhiimadda ay leedahay daboolka Caafimaadka Caalamiga ah.

English: SHA favorable to marginalized communities, MP Geoffrey Ruku urges Mbeere North residents to register with Social Health Authority (SHA).
Kiswahili: Mbunge Geoffrey Ruku, ambaye ni mshirika wa SHA anayependelea jamii zilizotengwa, anawasihi wakazi wa Mbeere Kaskazini kujiandikisha na Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii (SHA).
Ekegusii: omochumbe Geoffrey Ruku obasoroire abamenyi Bambeere ya Irianyi obaboririe kwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia bwabanto bonsi(sha).
Dholuo: SHA, konyo jogo ma ok nyal,jaod bura Goffrey Ruku  jiwo ji duto modak e alwora mar Mbeere ma Ugwe mondo odonj e chenro mar thieth mar SHA.
Somali: Xildhibaan Geoffrey Ruku oo u taageera bulshooyinka marginalized ayaa ku booriyay dadka deggan degmada Mbeere North inay iska diiwaangeliyaan Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada (SHA).

English: Conservationist Jim Nyamu urges residents of Marsabit County to protect elephants.
Kiswahili: Mhifadhi Jim Nyamu anawasihi wakazi wa Kaunti ya Marsabit kuwalinda tembo.
Ekegusii: omoegereri bw'ebinto bitoonchokanaine  Jim Nyamu osabire abamenyi ba ekaunti ya marsabit koegerera chinchogu.
Dholuo: Jim Nyampat, ma en jal ma rito alwora mar piny, kwayo Jo-Marsabit mondo orit lieje
Somali: Jim Nyamu oo ah ilaalinta deegaanka ayaa dadka deggan degmada Marsabit ku booriyay in ay ilaaliyaan fillada.

English: Leaders say President Ruto will deliver on projects in Mt. Kenya region. PSS from Mt. Kenya continue with town hall meetings. PS Mary Muthoni urges residents to support the government
Kiswahili: Viongozi wasema Rais Ruto atatekeleza miradi katika eneo la Mlima Kenya. PSS kutoka Mlima Kenya inaendelea na mikutano ya halmashauri ya mji. Katibu Mkuu Mary Muthoni awahimiza wakazi kuunga mkono serikali
Ekegusii: Abarai batebire omorai bwense Ruto naikeranie emeroberio yamagenderero ase ensemo ya mount kenya.Abariki babotambe korwa ase ensemo eyuo bagenderere gotwara ebikaro biabotambe na kobwatesia eserekari omoriki obotambe Mary Muthoni oboririe
Dholuo: Jotelo wacho ni Ker Ruto biro oro tijene e gweng' mar got Kenya. PSS moa got Kenya dhi nyime gi romo mag bura mar boma. SS Mary Muthoni kwayo ji duto mondo oriw lwedo sirkal
Somali: Hoggaamiyeyaashu waxay sheegeen in madaxweyne Ruto uu fulin doono mashaariicda gobolka Mount Kenya. PSS oo ka socota Mount Kenya waxay sii wadaan kulamada golaha shacabka. PS Mary Muthoni waxay dadka deggan ugu baaqaysaa inay taageeraan dowladda

English: Reprieve in Tiaty: Tiaty gets office for registration of births and deaths Office to save residents over 230 km of travel PS Bitok urges residents to make use of office
Kiswahili: Ahueni Tiaty: Tiaty yapata ofisi kwa ajili ya usajili wa vizazi na vifo Ofisi ya kuwaokoa wakazi zaidi ya kilomita 230 za usafiri Katibu Mkuu Bitok awahimiza wakazi kutumia ofisi
Ekegusii: okooyera  ime ya Tiaty. Ensemo ya Tiaty yanyorire obisi yokorikia abagosira naba koiborwa erio gokonya abanto gotara egeka kiorogendo oratambe 230kms.omoriki obotambe Bitok osabire abamenyi baike ase obisi eyuo erio konyora obokoreri.
Dholuo: Konyruok e Tiaty: Tiaty yudo ofis mar ndiko nyuol kod ofis mar ndiko thoe mondo ores joma odak kuom kilomita mia ariyo kod piero adek mag wuoth mar Jagoro Bitok jiwo jodak mondooti kod apisno.
Somali: Dib u dhac ka dhacay Tiaty: Tiaty waxay heshay xafiiska diiwaangelinta dhalashada iyo dhimashada Xafiiska si ay u badbaadiyaan dadka deggan in ka badan 230 km safarka PS Bitok wuxuu dadka ku boorinayaa inay adeegsadaan xafiiska

English: KDF urges residents to share intelligence after IED attack in Lamu
Kiswahili: KDF yawahimiza wakazi kutoa taarifa za kijasusi baada ya shambulio la IED huko Lamu
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kioborendi Bwense kiababoririe abamenyi sense gonsanga ase obotuki namang'ana nyuma yesagano yechimbunde ime ya Lamu.
Dholuo: Riwruog jowleny mar KDF jiwo ji mondo ochiw pachgi bang monj mar IED e kaunti ma  Lamu
Somali: KDF waxay ku boorineysaa dadka deegaanka inay la wadaagaan sirdoonka kadib weerarkii IED ee ka dhacay Lamu

English: Governor Anne Waiguru urges residents to embrace routine cancer screening, emphasizing that early detection remains key to successful treatment.
Kiswahili: Gavana Anne Waiguru anawasihi wakazi kukumbatia uchunguzi wa saratani wa kawaida, akisisitiza kwamba ugunduzi wa mapema unasalia kuwa muhimu kwa matibabu yenye mafanikio.
Ekegusii: omogabana Anna Waiguru obasoroire abamenyi kobwatereria bene obotuki bwo oborwaire bwa kansa bwabotambe nagosingerera buna obotuki bwa bwango nabuo bwoka borakonye abagotoka nendwari eyuo kobwenigwa.
Dholuo: Gavana Anne Waiguru jiwo ji mondo omak tim nonro mar kansa, komedo jiwo ni yudo kansa chon en gima dwarore ahinya mondo thieth odhi maber.
Somali: Guddoomiye Anne Waiguru ayaa ku booriyay dadka deggan inay qaataan baaritaanka caadiga ah ee kansarka, isagoo carabka ku adkeeyay in ogaanshaha hore uu weli yahay furaha daaweynta guusha.

English: Kenya Marine and Fisheries Research Institute (KMFRI) CEO Dr. James Mwaluma urges residents of the coastal region to plant mangroves and seagrass to boost Blue Carbon generation.
Kiswahili: Mkurugenzi Mtendaji wa Taasisi ya Utafiti wa Baharini na Uvuvi ya Kenya (KMFRI) Dkt. James Mwaluma anawasihi wakazi wa eneo la pwani kupanda mikoko na nyasi za baharini ili kuongeza uzalishaji wa Kaboni ya Bluu.
Ekegusii: omonene bwekeombe kiobotuki nobotugi bwenchinsu nabiria bigotoka ase amache ime Omonyagitari James Mwalumaosabire abamenyi baroche mbarabare gosimeke emete yechimoti namakendo erio gokonya ase okorenta embeo engiya.
Dholuo: Jatend lupo mar Fisheries Research Institute (KMFRI), Dr. James Mwamuma, jiwo joma odak e chulni mag nam mondo opidh yiende  kod kuonde manie nam mondo omed kelo liet mowinjore mawuok.
Somali: Agaasimaha guud ee Machadka Cilmi-baarista Badda iyo Kalluumaysiga ee Kenya (KMFRI) Dr. James Mwaluma wuxuu dadka deggan gobolka xeebta ku nool ugu baaqay inay beeraan mangroves iyo cawska badda si kor loogu qaado soo saarista kaarboon buluug ah.

English: The president urges residents to surrender guns during the amnesty.
Kiswahili: Rais anawasihi wakazi kusalimisha bunduki wakati wa msamaha.
Ekegusii: Omonene bw'ense orure okoboria asebonsi bararete ebirwanero ebitindi biechimbunde ase ekero amabera atarasiekwa.
Dholuo: Kerno mar ojiwo jopiny mondo ochiw bunde e kinde mar golo chikno.
Somali: Madaxweynaha ayaa ku booriyay dadka deggan inay soo dhiibaan hubka inta lagu jiro cafiska.

English: ODM Leader Raila Odinga urges residents of Migori County to register as party members.
Kiswahili: Kiongozi wa ODM Raila Odinga awahimiza wakazi wa Kaunti ya Migori kujiandikisha kama wanachama wa chama.
Ekegusii: omorai bw'ekiama gia odm Raila odinga obasemirie abamenyi bekaunti ya migori kwerikia buna abanyene ekiama.
Dholuo: Jatend riwruok mar ODM Raila Odinga jiwo ji duto modak e kaunti ma Migori  mondo ondikre kaka jokanyo mar duond od bura.
Somali: Hogaamiyaha ODM Raila Odinga ayaa ku booriyay dadka deggan degmada Migori inay iska diiwaangeliyaan xubnaha xisbiga.

English: Murang a Woman Rep Betty Maina urges residents to be tolerant of local leaders who have taken different political positions, emphasizing that it is their right to do so.
Kiswahili: Mwakilishi wa Wanawake wa Murang Betty Maina anawasihi wakazi kuwa wavumilivu kwa viongozi wa eneo hilo ambao wamechukua misimamo tofauti ya kisiasa, akisisitiza kwamba ni haki yao kufanya hivyo.
Ekegusii:
omobunge omochore ase ensemo yabang'ina ase ekaunti ya Marang'a
Betty Maina orure okoboria ase abanto bonsi koba abaremereria ase abarai babo nonya mbaria bare ase ebiombe ebiao bia siasa asengecho mbare noboene bwabo gokora bo.
Dholuo: Jatend wakeini e kaunti ma Murang'a Betty Maina jiwo jodak  mondo obed gi horruok ne jotend sirkal ma osekawo migepe mopogore opogore mag siasa, komedo jiwo ni gin gi ratiro mar timo kamano.
Somali: Xildhibaanada Murang a Woman Betty Maina ayaa ku booriyay dadka deegaanka inay u dulqaataan hoggaamiyeyaasha deegaanka kuwaas oo qaatay jagooyin siyaasadeed oo kala duwan, iyagoo carabka ku adkeeyay in ay xaq u leeyihiin inay sidaas sameeyaan.

English: Kwale Governor Fatuma Achani has urged residents across Kwale County, especially those living in arid areas of Kinango, Samburu, and Lungalunga, to plant more trees as a way to combat the ongoing drought affecting those regions.
Kiswahili: Gavana wa Kwale Fatuma Achani amewasihi wakazi kote Kaunti ya Kwale, hasa wale wanaoishi katika maeneo kame ya Kinango, Samburu, na Lungalunga, kupanda miti zaidi kama njia ya kupambana na ukame unaoendelea kuathiri maeneo hayo.
Ekegusii: omogabana okwale Fatuma Achani orure okoboria ase abamenyi ime ya kwale kobuq mono abamenyete ase nchinsemo chieroro buna, kinango, Samburu amo na Lungalunga basimeke emete buna enchera eyemo yogokeyia eguragura eyuo echandete chinsemo echuo.
Dholuo: Jatend kaunti  miluongo ni Fatima Akanii osenyiso ji ni mondo gipidh yiende mang'eny e alwora mar Kwale, to ahinya jomodak e alwora mar Kinango, Samburu, kod Lungula mondo okony e oro momako gwengego.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha Gobolka Kwale Fatuma Achani ayaa ugu baaqay dadka deggan gobolka Kwale, gaar ahaan kuwa ku nool gobollada qalalan ee Kinango, Samburu, iyo Lungalunga, inay beeraan geedo badan si ay ula dagaallamaan abaaraha socda ee saameeya gobolladaas.

English: Governor Mbarire urges residents to embrace the project
Kiswahili: Gavana Mbarire awahimiza wakazi kukumbatia mradi huo
Ekegusii: omogabana Mbarire oboririe abamenyi kobwatesia omoroberio
Dholuo: Gavana Mbarire jiwo ji mondo oriw lwedo tijno
Somali: Guddoomiye Mbarire ayaa ku booriyay dadka deegaanka inay qaataan mashruuca

English: Govt commissions boreholes in Habaswein, Wajir county. PS Ronoh urges residents to embrace irrigation farming
Kiswahili: Serikali yazindua visima virefu huko Habaswein, kaunti ya Wajir. Katibu Mkuu Ronoh awahimiza wakazi kukumbatia kilimo cha umwagiliaji
Ekegusii: Eserekari yachakirie bene ebisima ime ya Habaswein,ekaunti ya wajir. omoriki obotambe rono oboririe kobwata oboremi bwogosiarera ebimeri amache.
Dholuo: gavana ochako gero kisimbe e Habaswein, kaunti ma Wajir. jagoro Ronoh jiwo ji mondo omak tije mag eyo mar tindo pi.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay gashay godadka Habaswein, degmada Wajir. PS Ronoh wuxuu dadka ku boorinayaa inay qaataan beeraha waraabka

English: Meru County Commissioner urges residents who need government services to make use of Huduma Centre.
Kiswahili: Kamishna wa Kaunti ya Meru anawasihi wakazi wanaohitaji huduma za serikali kutumia Kituo cha Huduma.
Ekegusii: omogambi omonene  buekaunti orure okoboria ase baria batagete obokoreri kogenda ase chinsemo chiria chikorua obokoreri bene bweserekari.
Dholuo: Komisona ma Kaunti ma Meru jiwo ji duto madwaro kony moa kuom sirkal mondo oti gi huduma centers maber.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha degmada Meru wuxuu dadka deggan ee u baahan adeegyada dowladda ku boorinayaa inay adeegsadaan Xarunta Huduma.

English: Political leaders allied to the broad-based government urge citizens to shun divisive politics from the opposition.
Kiswahili: Viongozi wa kisiasa wanaoshirikiana na serikali pana waliwahimiza raia kuepuka siasa zinazowagawanya wapinzani.
Ekegusii: ase ensemo eria yokwamereria eserekari.
Dholuo: Jotend siasa ne oriwore gi sirkal  maduong' ma jiwo raia mondo kik giriw lwedo siasa ma kelo pogruok.
Somali: Hogaamiyaasha siyaasadeed ee la xidhiidha xukuumadda ballaaran waxay muwaadiniinta ku boorinayaan inay ka fogaadaan siyaasadda kala qaybsanaanta ee mucaaradka.

English: The Baringo Ecosystem: Residents take up conservation agenda Residents urged to guard against exploitation
Kiswahili: Mfumo Ikolojia wa Baringo: Wakazi waanza ajenda ya uhifadhi Wakazi wahimizwa kujilinda dhidi ya unyonyaji
Ekegusii: Ebinto biria bietanaine mwanyabanto Baringo: Abamenyi koimokia egetambokero yokorenda ebitoetanaine ase barure okoboria bw'oborendi korwa ase obotumeki obobe.
Dholuo: Alwora mar Baringo: Jo modak e alworano ne ojiw mondo otang' kik ti kodgi marach.
Somali: Nidaamka deegaanka ee Baringo: Dadka deggan waxay qaataan ajandaha ilaalinta Dadka deggan waxaa lagu booriyay inay ka taxaddaraan ka faa'iideysiga

English: CALL FOR CONSERVATION Embu residents urged to adopt a tree planting culture
Kiswahili: WITO WA UHIFADHI Wakazi wa Embu wahimizwa kufuata utamaduni wa upandaji miti
Ekegusii: okoboria gwokorenda ebirw bitoonchokanaine: abamenyi ba embu baborigwe gotwara enaro yogosimeka emote.
Dholuo: luong mar rito  jodak e kaunti ma Embu onjiw mondo gibed gi kido kod tim mar pidho yien.
Somali: DHAGEYSO DHAGEYSO Dadka deggan Embu oo lagu booriyay inay qaataan dhaqan geedo lagu beero

English: Conserving degraded lands: Nakuru residents urged to help in protecting lands next rivers.
Kiswahili: Kuhifadhi ardhi zilizoharibika: Wakazi wa Nakuru wahimizwa kusaidia katika kulinda ardhi iliyo karibu na mito.
Ekegusii: Korenda ebiseneno amo na'maoromomo: Abamenyi ba Nakuru  baborigwe korenda chingegu chiamache .
Dholuo: Rito lowo ma ne okethore: Jo-Nakuru ne ojiw  mondo okony e rit lope manie geng aore.
Somali: Badbaadinta dhulkii burburay: Dadka deggan Nakuru waxaa lagu booriyay inay ka caawiyaan ilaalinta dhulkii webiyada ku xiga.

English: Egesa Career Clinic: Egesa FM presenters conduct sensitization programme in Kisii Presenters urged residents urged to embrace technical courses
Kiswahili: Kliniki ya Kazi ya Egesa: Watangazaji wa Egesa FM waendesha programu ya uhamasishaji huko Kisii Watangazaji waliwasihi wakazi kukumbatia kozi za kiufundi
Ekegusii: obosemia bwobomanyi bwe'gesa: abararia begesa fm mbatwqre omoroberio bwobosemia bwobomanyi ase echera yogotiotereria abamenyi bagusii gosomera obobundi.
Dholuo: twak mar tije Egesa: Jolendo mag od lendo mar Egesa timo chenro mar chiwo paro ne jo Kisii ne okwayo jogweng'no mondo omakgi gi tiegruok mag lony ma nyasani.
Somali: Egesa Career Clinic: Soo bandhigayaasha Egesa FM waxay qabtaan barnaamij wacyi galineed oo ka socda Kisii Soo bandhigayaashu waxay ku booriyeen dadka deggan inay qaataan koorsooyinka farsamada

English: East African ocean festival: Residents urged to take part in cleaning the beaches Beach cleaning exercise held in Nyali, Mombasa County
Kiswahili: Tamasha la bahari ya Afrika Mashariki: Wakazi wahimizwa kushiriki katika kusafisha fukwe Zoezi la usafi wa fukwe lililofanyika Nyali, Kaunti ya Mombasa
Ekegusii: Emeyega yamache ase Afrika ya mocha: Abamenyi gosemiwa koba ang'e ase omoroberio buogosibia chindoche amo chingegu chiechindoche.
Dholuo: Nyasi mag nam ma Afrika ma Ugwe: Jopiny ojiw mondo oriw lwedo tiegruok mar pwodho nam ma ne otim Nyali, kaunti ma Mombasa.
Somali: Bandhigga Badweynta Bariga Afrika: Dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay ka qayb qaataan nadiifinta xeebta

English: Embu county residents urged to turn up in large numbers to welcome the President.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa kaunti ya Embu wamehimizwa kujitokeza kwa wingi kumkaribisha Rais.
Ekegusii: Amamenyi ba Embu koborigwa gosoka ase obonge ase okomoaregania omonene bw'ense.
Dholuo: Jodak ma Kaunti ma Embu okwayo mondo oriwre mang'eny mondo orwak ker.
Somali: Shacabka degmada Embu waxay ku booriyeen inay soo booqdaan dad fara badan si ay u soo dhaweeyaan Madaxweynaha.

English: INCREASING FOREST COVER 14,000 trees planted in Kitui Residents urged to continue planting trees
Kiswahili: Kuongezeka kwa Misitu Miti 14,000 iliyopandwa Kitui Wakazi wahimizwa kuendelea kupanda miti
Ekegusii: ASE OGOKINIA AMANANI EMETE 14, 000  gosimekwa ime ya kitui, nabamenyi koborigwa gokong'a ase okogenderera gosimeka emete.
Dholuo: Medruok mar bunge mar yiende yiende alufu apar kod ang'wen ma opidhi e Kitui. Jopiny  ojiw mondo odhi nyime gi pidho yiende.
Somali: 14,000 geed oo lagu beeray magaalada Kitui Dadka deggan waxaa lagu booriyay inay sii beeraan geedaha

English: Residents urged to participate in the budget making process through public participation, to familiarize with projects initiated by the County Govt.
Kiswahili: Wakazi walisihiwa kushiriki katika mchakato wa kutengeneza bajeti kupitia ushiriki wa umma, ili kufahamu miradi iliyoanzishwa na Serikali ya Kaunti.
Ekegusii:
Abamenyi koborigwa goikeranq ase emesangererano yokoenana ebirengerio biabo ase amang'ana yokorobereria obotumeki bwechibese , erio kwemanyia boronge igoro yamagenderero yeserekari
y'ekaunti.
Dholuo: Ji ne ojiwo ji mondo oriw lwedo bajetno kokalo kuom riwruok mar oganda, kendo mondo ging'e chenro ma sirkal mar kaunti'no osechako.
Somali: Dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay ka qaybgalaan habka sameynta miisaaniyadda iyada oo loo marayo ka qaybgalka dadweynaha, si ay uga warqabaan mashaariicda ay bilawday Dowladda Gobolka.

English: KRA ON THE ROAD Tax man tours Mombasa County, residents urged to file their returns
Kiswahili: KRA ON THE ROAD Mtoza ushuru azuru Kaunti ya Mombasa, wakazi wahimizwa kuwasilisha marejesho yao
Ekegusii: EKEOMBE KIOGOSANGERERIA EBANGO. Etaro yomonachi ebango omonene ime yekaunti yamombasa abamenyi baborigwe koirania amang'ana yabango yabo ase ekeombe gia KRA.
Dholuo: KRA e yoo. Jasol osuru otimo limbe e kaunti mar  Mombasa, jodak ojiw mondo ochiw duoko mar osuru.
Somali: KRA ON THE ROAD Nin canshuur bixiye ah ayaa booqday gobolka Mombasa, dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay soo gudbiyaan warbixintooda

English: MALINDI COHESION CALLS Residents urged to be wary of politicians sowing seeds of discord Local leaders want action taken against politicians propagating hate
Kiswahili: WITO WA UMOJA WA MALINDI WAWAKILISHA Wakazi kuwa waangalifu na wanasiasa wanaopanda mbegu za kutoelewana Viongozi wa eneo hilo wanataka hatua zichukuliwe dhidi ya wanasiasa wanaoeneza chuki
Ekegusii: okoraria kwobomo ime ya malindi. abamenyi basabirwe kobagikeria baria bakorenta amang'ana yogoatananeka aseigo abarai baborie  abanasiasa bonsi koimekerigwa egetambokero kierichiko bonsi abagosimeka ogoatanananeka.
Dholuo: Riwruok mar Malindi jiwo ji mondo otang ' gi josiasa ma chwoyo kodhi mag jotelo mag gweng'no, dwaro okang' okaw ne jotelo majiwo akwede.
Somali: MALINDI COHESION OO UGU BAAQAY Dadka deegaanka in ay ka digtoonaadaan siyaasiyiinta abuurta khilaafka Hogaamiyayaasha maxalliga ah ayaa doonaya in tallaabo laga qaado siyaasiyiinta faafinaya nacaybka.

English: Meru residents urged to elect leaders of integrity.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Meru wahimizwa kuwachagua viongozi waadilifu.
Ekegusii: Abamenyi bameru basabirwe kobachora abarai abaseera.
Dholuo: Jo-Meru ne ojiw mondo oyier jotelo makare.
Somali: Dadka deggan Meru ayaa lagu booriyay inay doortaan hoggaamiye daacad ah.

English: Nyahururu unclaimed assets Residents urged to claim cash, sureties held at Nyahururu courts Keago: Assets remain uncollected despite case conclusions
Kiswahili: Mali ambazo hazijadaiwa Nyahururu Wakazi wahimizwa kudai pesa taslimu na wadhamini walioshikiliwa katika mahakama za Nyahururu Keago: Mali bado hazijakusanywa licha ya hitimisho la kesi
Ekegusii: Abamenyi ba Nyahuruhru baborigwe gwesokia nakoagara chinibo chiabo ao ao korwa ase ekeombe keria getenenerete chinibo chitaratwara abagochiboria.  korwa ase ekegambero gia keago. chinibo echio nonya ebiina biabirengete bierete korwa ase ekegambero.
Dholuo: Joma odak e dala mar Nyahururu oweyo dwaro mwandu  jodak  ojiw mondo odonj e kot ma Nyahururu romo otim e od bura mar Nyahururu mwandu pok okaw kata obedo ni bura oserumo.
Somali: Hantida aan la sheegin ee Nyahururu Dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay dalbadaan lacag caddaan ah, dammaanadaha lagu hayaa maxkamadaha Nyahururu Keago: Hantida ayaa weli aan la soo ururin inkastoo ay dhacday arrimahaasi

English: Kilifi residents urged  to register for SHA
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Kilifi wahimizwa kujiandikisha kwa SHA
Ekegusii: abamenyi Bakilifi baborigwe kuerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia SHA.
Dholuo: Jo-Kilifi okwa mondo ondikre ne yor chudo mar SHA
Somali: Dadka deggan Kilifi ayaa lagu booriyay inay iska diiwaangeliyaan SHA

English: Hospitals urged to embrace and provide services under SHA
Kiswahili: Hospitali zahimizwa kukumbatia na kutoa huduma chini ya SHA
