Dholuo: Osiptende ojiwo mondo orwaki kendo ochiw kony e bwo chenro mar SHA
Somali: Isbitaalada waxaa lagu booriyay inay qaataan oo ay bixiyaan adeegyada SHA

English: Egesa FM hosts career clinic in Nyamira county. Residents urged to embrace technical courses.
Kiswahili: Egesa FM inaandaa kliniki ya kazi katika kaunti ya Nyamira. Wakazi wahimizwa kukumbatia kozi za kiufundi.
Ekegusii: Egesa Fm koaregania omoroberio bwobosemia bwobomanyi bwechisemi ime yekaunti ya nyamira. Abamenyi koborigwa kuegera amasomo yobobundi.
Dholuo: Od lendo mar Egesa obedo kod twak e Kaunti ma Nyamira . Jodak ojiw mondo orwak somo motenore kod lony ma nyasani.
Somali: Egesa FM waxay martigelisaa rugta xirfadeed ee degmada Nyamira.

English: KEEPING THE DOCTOR AWAY ¦ Free medical camp held in Machakos town Residents urged to go for frequent medical checks
Kiswahili: KUMWEKA DAKTARI MBALI ¦ Kambi ya matibabu ya bure yafanyika mjini Machakos Wakazi wahimizwa kwenda kwa uchunguzi wa kimatibabu mara kwa mara
Ekegusii: OBOMENYO BOTAGANETI  ABANYAGITARI ASE OBOANG'E: Obobwenia botari goakanerwa kende ime ya machakos abamenyi baborigwe goika kera engaki chinyagetari ase okoringorigwa kwabotambe
Dholuo: Bedo mabor gi laktar  romo manono oket e taon ma Machakos jodak ojiw mondo odhi e nonro mar thieth kinde ka kinde.
Somali: Ka fogaanshaha dhakhtarka Xero caafimaad oo bilaash ah oo lagu qabtay magaalada Machakos Dadka deegaanka ayaa loogu baaqay inay aadaan baaritaanno caafimaad oo joogto ah

English: UDA PARTY ELECTIONS Homabay residents urged to exercise peace as UDA party elections gets underway.
Kiswahili: UCHAGUZI WA CHAMA CHA UDA Wakazi wa Homabay wahimizwa kudumisha amani wakati uchaguzi wa chama cha UDA unapoanza.
Ekegusii: OBOCHORI BWEKIAMA KIA UDA: abamenyi bekaunti ya Homabay baborigwe korenda omorembe ekero kiobochori obwo.
Dholuo: Yiero mar od bura mar UDA Jodak ma Homabay nojiwo ji mondo oti gi kuwe e kinde mag yiero mar duond od bura mar UDA.
Somali: Doorashooyinka Xisbiga UDA Shacabka reer Homabay waxay ku booriyeen inay nabad ku noolaadaan xilli ay socdaan doorashooyinka Xisbiga UDA.

English: Tharaka Nithi residents urged to plant more trees particularly in community lands.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Tharaka Nithi wahimizwa kupanda miti zaidi hasa katika ardhi za jamii.
Ekegusii: Abamenyi ba Tharaka Nithi baborigwe gosimeka emete ase emegondo  yebinyoro.
Dholuo: Joma nodak Tharaka Nithi nokwayo mondo oger yiende mang'eny, to ahinya wuon e pinje ma ne odak machiegni kodgi.
Somali: Dadka deggan Tharaka Nithi waxay ku booriyeen inay geedo badan beeraan gaar ahaan dhulka bulshada.

English: Tana River residents urged to reject attempts by politicians to divide them along ethnic lines for personal gain.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Tana River wahimizwa kukataa majaribio ya wanasiasa ya kuwagawanya kwa misingi ya kikabila kwa ajili ya faida zao binafsi.
Ekegusii: Abamenyi ba Tana river baborigwe gwetanga korwa ase abanasiasa abwo bakobaatanana ase oboroso bwagesiasa ase ebirenga biokwenyera boka abanyene.
Dholuo: Jodak e Aora Tana nojiw mondo okwed pogruok ma josiasa ne timo e kindgi mondo giyud ber giwegi.
Somali: Dadka deggan Wabiga Tana waxay ku booriyeen in ay diidaan isku dayga siyaasiyiinta ay ku kala qaybiyaan qowmiyadda si ay u helaan faa'iido shaqsiyeed.

English: Residents urged to embrace the Taifa Care program
Kiswahili: Wakazi wahimizwa kukumbatia mpango wa Taifa Care
Ekegusii: Abamenyi baborigwe kobwatesia omoroberio bwogokonya abanto abagotu nabaria batari kwenyara
Dholuo: Jodak ojiw mondo owe chenro mar Taifa Care
Somali: Dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay qaataan barnaamijka Tafa Care

English: Residents urged to embrace alternative dispute resolution
Kiswahili: Wakazi wahimizwa kukumbatia utatuzi mbadala wa migogoro
Ekegusii: Abamenyi baborigwe kobwatesia omoroberio bwobogayani ase ogokora ogoetana.
Dholuo: Jodak e alworano ojiw mondo oti kod yore mamoko mag tieko tulo.
Somali: Dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay qaataan xal kale oo khilaafaad ah

English: Kiambu residents urged to collect their IDS
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Kiambu wahimizwa kuchukua vitambulisho vyao vya kitambulisho
Ekegusii: Abamenyi ime ya Kiambu baborigwe koagara ebibande biao.
Dholuo: Jo-Kiambu ojiw  mondo odhi okaw opande mekgi.
Somali: Dadka deggan Kiambu ayaa lagu booriyay inay soo ururiyaan aqoonsigooda

English: 0ver 200,000 propagules planted along the Coastal Stretch CSs led the exercise across the coastal region Residents urged to embrace the exercise in a bid to salvage their livelihood.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa eneo la pwani waliomba kukumbatia zoezi hilo kwa lengo la kuokoa maisha yao.
Ekegusii: Goetania ebimeri biamache 200,000gosimekwa ime ya ensemo ya chingegu chia mbarabare omochie onyancha ya mombasa omowasiri nere oraete omoroberio oyuo ase chinsemo chionsi chia enyamcha ya mombasa. Abamenyi koborigwa kobwatesia omoroberio oyuo ase ekerenga koogotoria amagima abo.
Dholuo: Cham moloyo alufu mia ariyo  opidh e dho wath ma ne ni machiegni gi dho nam, Jatend migawo ne otelo ne  tijno e dho wath jodak ojiw mondo orwak tijno mondo okony e ngimagi mapile.
Somali: Qiyaastii 200,000 oo propagules ah oo lagu beeray Xeebaha Xeebaha ee Xeebaha ayaa hogaaminayay jimicsigan gobolka xeebeedka Dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay qaataan jimicsigan si ay u badbaadiyaan noloshooda.

English: Kakamega County residents urged to sign up for affordable housing
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Kaunti ya Kakamega wahimizwa kujisajili kwa nyumba za bei nafuu
Ekegusii: Abamenyi bekaunti ya kakamega koborigwa kwerikia ase omoroberio  bwechinyomba chierigori rianse.
Dholuo: Joma odak e gweng' mar Kakamega ne okwayo mondo gikwong giyie gi ot ma nigi nengo mamalo
Somali: Dadka deggan Gobolka Kakamega ayaa lagu booriyay inay iska diiwaangeliyaan guryo la awoodi karo

English: Laikipia residents urged to join NHIF to avoid seeking hospital waivers
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Laikipia wahimizwa kujiunga na NHIF ili kuepuka kuomba msamaha wa hospitali
Ekegusii: Abamenyi ba Laikipia baborigwe kwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia NHIF erio gwetanga korigia okoruserigwa ogoakana kwa nyagitari kwa abatari kwenyara.
Dholuo: Jo-Laikipia ojiw mondo oriwre gi NHIF mondo giwe manyo thieth manono.
Somali: Dadka deggan Laikipia ayaa lagu booriyay inay ku biiraan NHIF si looga fogaado in ay raadsadaan caymiska isbitaalka

English: Lamu residents urged to protect wildlife for future generations' benefit
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Lamu wahimizwa kulinda wanyamapori kwa manufaa ya vizazi vijavyo
Ekegusii: Abamenyi ba Lamu baborigwe korenda ching'iti chiorosana erio koenekia ebigori birache mbikonyeke korwa ase ching'iti echio.
Dholuo: Jodak Lamu okwa mondo orit le mag bungu mondo okony tieng' mabiro.
Somali: Dadka deggan magaalada Lamu ayaa lagu baaqay inay ilaaliyaan duurjoogta si ay u faa'iideystaan jiilalka soo socda

English: Saving Marsabit Forests: Measures launched to protect forests and water bodies in the county Stakeholders urged to sensitise residents to help combat degradation Residents urged to plant trees to protect water catchment areas
Kiswahili: Kuokoa Misitu ya Marsabit: Hatua zilizozinduliwa kulinda misitu na vyanzo vya maji katika kaunti Wadau wahimizwa kuhamasisha wakazi kusaidia kupambana na uharibifu Wakazi wahimizwa kupanda miti ili kulinda maeneo ya vyanzo vya maji
Ekegusii: Gotoria rinani ria Marsabit: Emeroberio bene nyachakiigwe  ase okorenda amanani nechindoche ase ekaunti.  Ababwatani baborigwe gosegeta abamenyi gokeyia okoera kwa amanani naboigo koboria abamenyi gosemeka emete erio gotoria chinsoko.
Dholuo: Konyo bungu mar Masabit: Chenro mag rito bunge kod yiende mag pi e kaunti'no ne ojiw jokanyo ne ojwi mondo owuo kod jodak mondo okony e rito lowo ojiw jodak mondo opidh yiende mondo oywa pi.
Somali: Badbaadinta kaymaha Marsabit: Tallaabooyinka lagu bilaabay ilaalinta kaymaha iyo biyaha gobolka Dhinacyada daneeyayaasha ayaa lagu booriyay inay dadka deegaanka u wacyi geliyaan si ay uga caawiyaan la dagaalanka burburka Dadka deegaanka ayaa lagu booriyay in ay beeraan geedo si loo ilaaliyo meelaha ay biyo ku jiraan

English: COVID-19 MASS TESTING NMS launches two mass testing in Nairobi Residents urged to turn up to be tested
Kiswahili: UPIMAJI WA WALIMU WA COVID-19 NMS YAZINDUA UPIMAJI WA WALIMU WAWILI jijini Nairobi Wakazi wahimizwa kujitokeza kupimwa
Ekegusii: ogopimwa kwendwari ye'nyamaa kwq abanto abange. Ekeombe ekenene  kiobobwenia NMS giachakirie bene omoroberio buokorenga abamenyi banairobinaboigo abamenyi abwo koborigwa gwesokia ase obonge erio gopimwa.
Dholuo: Pim mar COVID-19 riwruok mar NMS chako nonro mar ji ariyo ne jodak mar  Nairobi jodak  ne ojiw mondo  opim.
Somali: COVID-19 MASS TESTING NMS waxay laba tijaabooyin ballaaran ka bilawday Nairobi Dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay soo muuqdaan si ay u tijaabiyaan

English: Commission on administrative justice opens Garissa office; residents urged to report issues that need attention.
Kiswahili: Tume ya haki ya utawala yafungua ofisi ya Garissa; wakazi wahimizwa kuripoti masuala yanayohitaji kushughulikiwa.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe keria gekorigereria oboene ase obokoreri kiaigoire chiobisi chiay3 ime ya garissa nakobria abamenyi gwesokia nakorigia obokoreri goetera komanyia chiobisi echio onsi ayare arengete obisi eyio.
Dholuo: Kamisen mar adiera e telo oyawo apis ma Garisa , Jodak ojiw mondo ochiw ripot e wi weche madwarore ahinya.
Somali: Guddiga garsoorka maamulka ayaa furaya xafiiska Garissa; dadka deggan ayaa lagu booriyay inay soo sheegaan arrimaha u baahan in la fiiro gaar ah.

English: NAROK FOREST CONSERVATION: Residents urged to plant more trees to increase forest cover in the county
Kiswahili: UHIFADHI WA MSITU WA NAROK: Wakazi wahimizwa kupanda miti zaidi ili kuongeza eneo la misitu katika kaunti hiyo
Ekegusii: Oborendi bw'amanani ime ya Narok: Abamenyi baborigwe gosimeka emete emenge erio korenda na komenta ensemo yamanani.
Dholuo: Rito bungu ma Narok: Jodak ojiw mondo opidh yiende mang'eny mondo omi bunge omedre e kaunti'no.
Somali: NAROK FOREST CONSERVATION: Dadka deegaanka ayaa lagu booriyay inay beeraan geedo badan si loo kordhiyo daboolka kaynta gobolka

English: Embu residents urged to register with NHIF to scale up  UHC
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa Embu wahimizwa kujisajili na NHIF ili kuongeza UHC
Ekegusii: Abamenyi Ba'embubaborigwe kwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia NHIF erio gokinia oboikerani obobwenia bwa bonsi, UHC.
Dholuo: Jodak  Embu ne ojiw mondo ondikre gi  NHIF mondo gimed bedo gi UHC
Somali: Dadka deggan Embu ayaa lagu booriyay inay iska diiwaangeliyaan NHIF si loo kordhiyo UHC

English: Citizens urged to register with the new medical cover (SHA)
Kiswahili: Raia wahimizwa kujiandikisha na bima mpya ya matibabu (SHA)
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi baborigwe kwerikia ase omoroberio  omoyia bw'obobwenia SHA.
Dholuo: Ne ojiw raia mondo odonj e chenro manyien mar thieth (SHA)
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagu booriyay inay iska diiwaangeliyaan caymiska caafimaadka cusub (SHA)

English: Leaders from Tana River County urged to collaborate to ensure citizens benefit from development projects.
Kiswahili: Viongozi kutoka Kaunti ya Tana River wamehimizwa kushirikiana ili kuhakikisha raia wananufaika na miradi ya maendeleo.
Ekegusii: Abarai korwa ekaunti ya Tana river baborigwe kobwaterana koenekia ng'a abamenyi ngokonyeka bare korwa ase amagenderero ao ao
Dholuo: Jotelo ma Kaunti ma  Tana River ojiw  mondo oti kanyachiel mondo gine ni ji duto yudo ber kuom chenro mag dongruok.
Somali: Hogaamiyayaasha Gobolka Tana River waxay ku booriyeen inay iskaashi sameeyaan si loo hubiyo in muwaadiniintu ay ka faa'iideystaan mashaariicda horumarinta.

English: SHA ENROLLMENT Deputy Gov't Spokesperson Mwanaisha Chidzuga has urged citizens to enroll in SHA, which aims to improve healthcare services and provide protection against high medical costs.
Kiswahili: UANDIKISHAJI WA SHA Naibu Msemaji wa Serikali Mwanaisha Chidzuga amewasihi raia kujiandikisha katika SHA, ambayo inalenga kuboresha huduma za afya na kutoa ulinzi dhidi ya gharama kubwa za matibabu.
Ekegusii: okwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia SHA. omokonyi bwomonogeri omonene bweserekari, Mwanaisha Chidzuga orure okoboria ase abamenyi kwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia SHA erio gwekonya korwa ase amagori amanene y'obobwenia.
Dholuo: Ndikruok e SHA Jalup jaloso elo sirkal Mwanaisha Chidzuga osenyiso ji ni gidonj e SHA, ma dwaro ni ji otim dongruok e weche thieth kendo gimi ji ritruok kuom nengo mag thieth.
Somali: SHA ENROLLMENT Afhayeenka ku xigeenka Dowladda Mwanaisha Chidzuga ayaa muwaadiniinta ugu baaqay inay iska diiwaangeliyaan SHA, taas oo ujeedkeedu yahay hagaajinta adeegyada daryeelka caafimaadka iyo bixinta ilaalinta kharashaadka sare ee caafimaadka.

English: NATIONAL ID PROCESSING Public urged to collect documents from respective constituencies Mwaura: 660,000 IDs awaiting collection 600,000 citizens have applied for new documents
Kiswahili: USAFIRISHAJI WA VItambulisho VYA TAIFA Umma wahimizwa kukusanya hati kutoka maeneo bunge husika Mwaura: Vitambulisho 660,000 vinasubiri kuchukuliwa Raia 600,000 wameomba hati mpya
Ekegusii: Omoroberio bwokorosia ebibande. Abanto.bonsi baborigwe koagara amabuko yokorigia ebibande korwa ase chiobisi chiechinsemo chiabo chiechibunge ime yense, otebire omowaziri Mwaura. Ebibande 660,000/= biganyete koagarwa naboigo amaborio yebibande binde 600,000 bigendererete koareganigwa.
Dholuo: Loco opande mar piny . Jopiny ojiw mondo ochok barupe moa e kuonde ka kuonde: Mwaura alufu mia auchiel gi piero auchiel Opande rito choko Jii alufu mia auchiel osendikore mar kawo barupe manyien.
Somali: DHAGEYSO NATIONAL ID PROCESSING Dadweynaha oo lagu baaqay in ay soo ururiyaan dukumiintiyo ka socda gobalada doorashada ee kala duwan Mwaura: 660,000 ID oo sugaya in la soo ururiyo 600,000 oo muwaadin ayaa dalbaday dukumiintiyo cusub

English: The Director highlighted the role of Missions in harnessing Diaspora Investments. He Urged Kenyans abroad to register at their nearest Kenya Embassy, stressing that the missions are the first point of contact between the nation and its diaspora citizens.
Kiswahili: Mkurugenzi huyo aliangazia jukumu la Misheni katika kutumia Uwekezaji wa Diaspora. Aliwahimiza Wakenya walio nje ya nchi kujiandikisha katika Ubalozi wao wa karibu wa Kenya, akisisitiza kwamba misheni hizo ndizo sehemu ya kwanza ya mawasiliano kati ya taifa na raia wake walio nje ya nchi.
Ekegusii: kwerikia bene ase chiobisi chie chinse chiasiko asengecho eyuo Nero enchera yeritang'ani yokomanyekana koba ase chinse echio.
Dholuo: Jatelono nojiwo migawo ma dinde nigo mar tiyo gi pesago e konyo joma odak e pinje mamoko, kendo nojiwo Jo-Kenya modak e pinje mamoko mondo odonj e ofisgi man machiegni gi Kenya, kojiwo ni misonari e okang' mokwongo mar tudruok e kind pinyno gi joma odak e pinje mamoko.
Somali: Agaasimaha ayaa carabka ku adkeeyay doorka Misionnadu ka ciyaaraan ka faa'iideysiga Maalgashiga Diaspora. Wuxuu ugu baaqay dadka Kenya ee dibedda jooga inay iska diiwaangeliyaan safaaradda Kenya ee ugu dhow, isagoo carabka ku adkeeyay in misionnadu yihiin barta ugu horreysa ee xiriirka u dhexeysa qaranka iyo muwaadiniintiisa ku nool dalkaasi.

English: Citizens are urged to participate in this historic Madaraka Day celebration set to take place in Bungoma County for the first time. - PS Interior Dr. Raymond Omollo
Kiswahili: Raia wanahimizwa kushiriki katika sherehe hii ya kihistoria ya Siku ya Madaraka inayotarajiwa kufanyika katika Kaunti ya Bungoma kwa mara ya kwanza. - Katibu Mkuu wa Mambo ya Ndani Dkt. Raymond Omollo
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi baborigwe gwesokia nakobwatana ase okoba asenogochengera kwerituko kenya yenyorerete obosibore erio rirachengerwe ase akaunti ya Bungoma ase engaki etang'ani kegima. omoriki obotambe Raymond omollo otebire.
Dholuo: Ji duto igwelo mondo oriwre kodgi e nyasi maduong' mar chieng' madaraka Ji ma ne ochakore e kaunti ma Bungoma . - jagoro mar weche mag arita Laktar  Raymond Omollo
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ka qeyb galaan xafladan taariikhiga ah ee Maalinta Madaraka oo markii ugu horreysay ka dhici doonta degmada Bungoma. - PS Gudaha Dr. Raymond Omollo

English: EACC does not condone any form of corruption among staff. Kindly report the case you refer to through eacc@integrity.go.ke. Citizens are urged to beware of fraudsters impersonating EACC staff.
Kiswahili: EACC haikubaliani na aina yoyote ya ufisadi miongoni mwa wafanyakazi. Tafadhali ripoti kesi unayoirejelea kupitia eacc@integrity.go.ke. Raia wanahimizwa kuwa waangalifu dhidi ya wadanganyifu wanaojifanya wafanyakazi wa EACC.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe gikorwania obokurumi ime yense keri kobwatesia ase nchera ende yonsi obokurumi ase abakoreri baye. koranche, karwe amang'ana ayuo obwate goetera ase eacc@integrity.go.ke. naboigo korwa okoboria abanto koba maiso ase abang'ainereria ab2o bagoteba barabwo nabwo abaobisa bokorwani obokurumi.
Dholuo: EACC ok oyie gi mibadhi moro amora e kind jotich. Riwruogno orwako wachno kokalo kuom eacc@integrity.go.ke. Ojiw ji mondo otang' gi joma wuondore ni gin jotich e riwruok mar EACC.
Somali: EACC ma aqbalo nooc kasta oo musuqmaasuq ah shaqaalaha. Fadlan soo sheeg kiiska aad tixraacayso iyada oo loo marayo eacc@integrity.go.ke.

English: Mwananchi views: Members of the public advised to read and understand the BBI report
Kiswahili: Maoni ya Mwananchi: Umma washauriwa kusoma na kuelewa ripoti ya BBI
Ekegusii: ebirengererio kwabanto: Abanto bonsi baborigwe gosoma nakoigwa ayare ime ya BBI.
Dholuo: paro mar japiny: Jopiny ojiw mondo osom kendo owinj ripot mar BBI
Somali: Aragtida Mwananchi: Shacabka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay akhriyaan oo fahmaan warbixinta BBI

English: Thank you for your feedback. Please report all cases of corruption and bribery to EACCKenya
Kiswahili: Asante kwa maoni yako. Tafadhali ripoti kesi zote za ufisadi na rushwa kwa EACCKenya
Ekegusii: mbuyamono ase ebirengererio biao:kamoranche enana amang'ana ande onsi yobokurumi ase ekeombe giokorwania obokurumi ime yense ya kenya. EACC.
Dholuo: Erokamano kuom dwoko mari. nyis weche duto motudore gi mibadhi kod asoya ne riwruok mar EACC Kenya.
Somali: Waad ku mahadsan tahay jawaabtaada. Fadlan u sheeg dhammaan kiisaska musuqmaasuqa iyo laaluushka EACCKenya

English: You are most welcome to Integrity Centre or any of our regional offices. You can visit to report corruption or share knowledge on how best we can fight corruption.
Kiswahili: Karibu sana katika Kituo cha Uadilifu au ofisi yoyote ya mkoa wetu. Unaweza kutembelea ili kuripoti ufisadi au kushiriki maarifa kuhusu jinsi tunavyoweza kupambana na ufisadi.
Ekegusii: mwaareganigwe mwensi goika ase enyomba enene yokorwania obokurumi ya integrity centre gose, abisi ended yonsi ere ang'e naye ase okoenana amang'ana arengete obokurumi hose ase okoenana ebirengererio biao bunavtoranyare goting'ia esegi yokorwania obokurumi.
Dholuo: Warwaki ahinya e apis mar Intergrity Center kata e ofis moro amora mar  gwenge. Inyalo limo ofisno mondo inyis ji wach mibadhi kata imiwa yo kaka wanyalo kedo gi mibadhi.
Somali: Waad soo dhaweyn kartaa Xarunta Daacadnimada ama mid ka mid ah xafiisyadeena gobolka.Waxaad booqan kartaa si aad u soo sheegto musuqmaasuqa ama aad u wadaagto aqoonta ku saabsan sida ugu fiican ee aan u la dagaallanaan karno musuqmaasuqa.

English: You are welcome to report corruption please call Toll Free line 1551 or email report@integrity.go.ke.
Kiswahili: Mwaareganigwe mwensi koenana amang'ana igoro y'obokurumi ase enchera yesimu ya bosa 1551 gose otome rirube riembeo report@integrity.go.ke
Ekegusii: Mwaareganigwe mwensi koenana amang'ana igoro y'obokurumi ase enchera yesimu ya bosa 1551 gose goetera rirube riembeo report@integrity.go.ke
Dholuo: Warwaki mondo ichiw lipot mar mibadhi, tudri gi namba mar 1551 kata mbui mar  report@integrity.go.ke.
Somali: Fadlan wac khadka lacag la'aanta ah 1551 ama email report@integrity.go.ke.

English: Good morning. We process number plates within 7 working days. Never deal with brokers. Report cases of corruption to @EACCKenya
Kiswahili: Habari za asubuhi. Tunashughulikia nambari za usajili ndani ya siku 7 za kazi. Kamwe usishughulikie madalali. Ripoti visa vya ufisadi kwa @EACCKenya
Ekegusii: Bwakire. nigo tokorosia chinamba chiegari yao ase amatuko yemeremo 7. Tobaise kwebwaterania amo nabaria bagati gose chiburoka. Enana mang'ana ande onsi arengete obokurumi ase ekeombe ekenene giokorwania obokurumi eacc.
Dholuo: Okinyi maber . Watiyo gi ndalo abiriyo mag tich e loso plede. Kik iti kod broka. Chiw  Ripot mar mibadhi ne @EACCKenya.
Somali: Subax wanaagsan. waxaan ka baaraandegeynaa lambarrada lambarrada 7 maalmood oo shaqo gudahood. marnaba wax ka qabso la-hawlgalayaasha. ka warbixi kiisaska musuqmaasuqa @EACCKenya

English: Good evening. Please note the Duty field has been updated as PAID and your records were updated. You can now view your vehicle details via the service portal.
Kiswahili: Habari za jioni. Tafadhali kumbuka kuwa sehemu ya Ushuru imesasishwa kama IMALIPO na rekodi zako zimesasishwa. Sasa unaweza kuona maelezo ya gari lako kupitia lango la huduma.
Ekegusii: Bwairire buya.kamoranche inyora ng'a ebango yaikeranire koorokiwq ng'a yaakanirwe. Aseigo amakaratasi ao aorokirie goakanwa.
Dholuo: Odhiambo maber. Ng'e ni kuonde mitiyogo e chulo osuru sani oseloki mana kaka ne ichulo, kendo weche misendikogo sani oseloki. Inyalo neno weche mag mtokni kokalo kuom websait mar tij lendo.
Somali: Fiidkii wanaagsan. Fadlan ogow in goobta waajibaadka la cusbooneysiiyay sida PAID iyo diiwaankaaga la cusbooneysiiyay. Hadda waxaad ka arki kartaa faahfaahinta gaadhigaaga iyada oo loo marayo bogga adeegga.

English: You don't need to deal with a broker to access any NTSA service. Kindly report corruption and bribery related
Kiswahili: Huna haja ya kushughulika na dalali ili kupata huduma yoyote ya NTSA. Tafadhali ripoti kuhusu ufisadi na rushwa zinazohusiana
Ekegusii: Toganeirie goetera ase monto.onde bwensi erio goikera obokoreri ase ekeombe gia NTSA. kamoranche enana amang'ana ande onsi abwqreranetie obokurumi gose okoenanwa kwa amasoya ase ekeombe ekio.
Dholuo: Ok ochuno ni nyaka iti kod jachung' mondo iyud chenro mar NTSA. Chiw lipot mar mibadhi kod motenore kod asoya.
Somali: Uma baahnid inaad wax ka qabatid dhexdhexaadiye si aad u hesho adeeg kasta oo NTSA ah. Fadlan soo sheeg musuqmaasuq iyo laaluush la xiriira

English: Kindly proceed to apply for a duplicate logbook from your account. Please reach out if your require any more information.
Kiswahili: Tafadhali endelea kutuma maombi ya kitabu cha kumbukumbu kutoka kwa akaunti yako. Tafadhali wasiliana nasi ikiwa unahitaji maelezo zaidi.
Ekegusii: Kamoranchegenda motwe nagosaba egetabu kiegari yao ekio kebwakaine ekenyene korwa ase ekegancha kiao.Keratoke nobwate mochando onde.
Dholuo: Ka diher ng'eyo weche momedore, inyalo dhi nyime kwayo mondo okonyi yudo kopi ariyo mag bugno mar mtoka.
Somali: Fadlan sii wad codsigaaga si aad u hesho buugga diiwaangelinta ee koontadaada. Fadlan la xiriir haddii aad u baahan tahay macluumaad dheeraad ah.

English: No room for corruption or laziness,  CS Geoffrey Ruku has urged all public servants to uphold professionalism, report to work on time, and treat Kenyans with dignity and respect.
Kiswahili: Hakuna nafasi ya ufisadi au uvivu,  Waziri Geoffrey Ruku amewasihi watumishi wote wa umma kudumisha weledi, kuripoti kazini kwa wakati, na kuwatendea Wakenya kwa utu na heshima.
Ekegusii: omowasiri Geoffrey Ruku otebire ribaga riobworo nobokurumi tiriyo ase obokoreri na kobori abakoreri beserekari kobeka motwe obokoreri obuya na goikerana emeremo genkio erio gokiarania obokoreri obuya na amasikani ase abakenya.
Dholuo: Onge thuolo mar mibadhi kod yulo. Geoffrey Ruku osejiwo jotich duto mag sirkal mondo oti tijegi, otim tijegi e sa mowinjore, kendo otim ne Jo-Kenya gik moko gi luor kod luor.
Somali: Ma jiro meel musuqmaasuq ama caajis ah, CS Geoffrey Ruku wuxuu ugu baaqay dhammaan shaqaalaha dowladda inay ilaaliyaan xirfadda, u soo gudbiyaan warbixin si ay u shaqeeyaan waqtigeeda, oo ay ula dhaqmaan dadka Kenya leh sharaf iyo ixtiraam.

English: Call Toll Free line 1551 or email report@integrity.go.ke to report cases of corruption.
Kiswahili: Piga simu ya bure 1551 au tuma barua pepe kwa report@integrity.go.ke ili kuripoti visa vya ufisadi.
Ekegusii: korarore bokurumi bonded bwonsi ase obokoreri aka esimi 1551 gose rika riuko riembeo ase report@integrity.go.ke erio obeke amang'ana ao yobokurumi.
Dholuo: Tudri gi namba mar 1551 maonge chudo kata or e-mail report@integrity.go.ke mondo inyis ji weche mag mibadhi.
Somali: Wac lambarka Toll Free 1551 ama email u dir report@integrity.go.ke si aad u soo sheegto kiisaska musuqmaasuqa.

English: Please feel free to report any cases of forgery or corruption via email report@integrity.go.ke or call 1551.
Kiswahili: Tafadhali jisikie huru kuripoti visa vyovyote vya kughushi au ufisadi kupitia barua pepe report@integrity.go.ke au piga simu 1551.
Ekegusii: Nobwate obosibore gosoa ekero kwarorire obokurumi, obong'ainereria bwokwegia ase riuko riembeo @integrity. go.ke gose oake esimi 1551.
Dholuo: Inyalo oro ripot moro amora mar gik mochuogi  kata mibadhi kitiyo gi e-mail@integrity.go.ke kata igo simo e namba mar 1551.
Somali: Fadlan si xor ah u soo sheega kiisaska been abuurka ama musuqmaasuqa emailka report@integrity.go.ke ama wac 1551.

English: Report via email report@integrity.go.ke or call 1551 in case you have specific corruption cases which need action.
Kiswahili: Ripoti kupitia barua pepe report@integrity.go.ke au piga simu 1551 ikiwa una kesi maalum za ufisadi zinazohitaji hatua.
Ekegusii: Enana amang'ana ande onsi yobokurumi ase okorika riuko riembeo @integrity.go.ke gose oake esimi 1551 erio egetambokero bene keimokigwe.
Dholuo: Chiw lipot kitiyo gi e-mail report@integrity.go.ke kata luong namba 1551 kapo ni in gi weche moko ma nyiso ni idwaro kawo okang'.
Somali: Ka warbixi emailka report@integrity.go.ke ama wac 1551 haddii aad qabtid kiisas musuqmaasuq gaar ah oo u baahan tallaabo.

English: If you have any particular cases of corruption you need to report, please do so via email report@integrity.go.ke or call 1551.
Kiswahili: Ikiwa una visa vyovyote maalum vya ufisadi unavyohitaji kuripoti, tafadhali fanya hivyo kupitia barua pepe report@integrity.go.ke au piga simu 1551.
Ekegusii: onye kobwate ing'ana rinde rionsi rikobwaterania obokurumi  noganetie koenana amang'ana aserirube riembeo @integrity. go.ke gose oake esimi 1551.
Dholuo: Kapo ni in gi wach moro ma chandi, inyalo ndiko wachno e adres mar@integrity.go.ke kata inyalo ywayo tol e namba mar 1551.
Somali: Haddii aad qabtid kiisas gaar ah oo musuqmaasuq ah oo aad u baahan tahay inaad soo sheegto, fadlan sidaas ku samee emailka report@integrity.go.ke ama wac 1551.

English: Meru Huduma Centre launches Customer Service Week: Members of the public have been urged to seek various Government services.
Kiswahili: Kituo cha Huduma cha Meru chazindua Wiki ya Huduma kwa Wateja: Umma umehimizwa kutafuta huduma mbalimbali za Serikali.
Ekegusii: ime ya meru kaunti mbachagetie bene omokubio bwobokoreri bene. Na abanto bonsi koborigwa goikerana ase omoroberio oyuo erio kwenyorera obokoreri ao ao bweserekari.
Dholuo: Kar chiwo chenro mag sirkal mar Huduma Center ma Meru  chako Juma mar chiwo chenro ne jonyiewo: Oganda osejiw mondo omany tije mopogore opogore mag sirkal.
Somali: Xarunta Meru Huduma waxay bilowday Todobaadka Adeegga Macaamiisha: Shacabka ayaa lagu booriyay inay raadsadaan adeegyo kala duwan oo Dowladda ah.

English: We have very many uncollected IDs in our Huduma Centres. I want to strongly urge all Kenyans who have not yet collected their IDs to do so without delay, as it is the first step towards registering for the Social Health Authority (SHA) and accessing vital government services.” Geoffrey Ruku, Cabinet Secretary for Public Service, Human Capital Development and Special Programmes
Kiswahili: Tuna vitambulisho vingi sana ambavyo havijachukuliwa katika Vituo vyetu vya Huduma. Ninataka kuwasihi sana Wakenya wote ambao bado hawajachukua vitambulisho vyao kufanya hivyo bila kuchelewa, kwani ni hatua ya kwanza kuelekea kujiandikisha kwa Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii (SHA) na kupata huduma muhimu za serikali.” Geoffrey Ruku, Katibu wa Baraza la Mawaziri wa Huduma za Umma, Maendeleo ya Rasilimali Watu na Programu Maalum.
Ekegusii: Ebibande binge mbiraba bikoagarwa korwa ase chiobisi chiobokoreri bene, nebibande wbi nabio birakonye abanto kwerikia ase okonyora obobwenia  ase omoroberio SHA. Naboigo gokonya ase ogoikera obokoreri ao ao bweserekari. aya nigo akwanirwe nomowasiri ase obokoreri bweserekari Geoffrey Ruku.
Dholuo: Wan gi opande mang'eny mapok okaw  e kuonde mag Huduma centers. Adwaro jiwo ahinya Jo-Kenya duto ma pok ochoko gik ma gisetimo mondo gitim kamano maok gideko, nimar mano en okang' mokwongo mar dhi e riwruok mar oganda mangima (SHA) kendo yudo kony mag sirkal. " Geoffrey Ruku, jatend migawo mar tije , dongruok mar pes jopiny kod chenro mowinjore.
Somali: Waxaan haynaa aqoonsiyo badan oo aan la soo aruurin Xarumaha Huduma. Waxaan si adag ugu boorinayaa dhammaan dadka Kenya ee aan weli soo aruurin aqoonsigooda inay sidaas sameeyaan si deg deg ah, maadaama ay tahay tallaabada ugu horreysa ee diiwaangelinta Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada (SHA) iyo helitaanka adeegyada muhiimka ah ee dowladda. " Geoffrey Ruku, Xoghayaha Golaha Wasiirada ee Adeegga Dadweynaha, Horumarinta Maalgashiga Aadanaha iyo Barnaamijyada Gaarka ah

English: Need assistance with your taxes? Our services are also available at all Huduma Centres during the extended hours. Drop by at your convenience and let us help you stay compliant.
Kiswahili: Unahitaji usaidizi kuhusu kodi zako? Huduma zetu zinapatikana pia katika Vituo vyote vya Huduma wakati wa saa zilizoongezwa. Tembelea kwa urahisi wako na tukuruhusu kukusaidia kuendelea kufuata sheria.
Ekegusii: Noganetie bokorwri bonded bwonsi ase okoirania amamachibu ao yebango? Bono nabo okonyora obokoreri oboiga ase chiobisi chionsi chiobokoreri bene nchinsa chinsi erio kogokonya koba omoikeranu ase okoirania amachibu ao yebango.
Dholuo: Be dwaro kony gi pesa michulo mar  osuru? chenrowa bende yudore e kuonde duto mag Huduma  centers kuom seche mochwalore chop e saa mowinjore kendo wamiyi wach mowinjore.
Somali: Waxaad u baahan tahay caawimaad canshuurtaada? Adeegyadeena ayaa sidoo kale laga heli karaa dhammaan Xarumaha Huduma inta lagu jiro saacadaha dheeraadka ah.

English: ALERT: Application for various NTSA services by National and County Government entities. The Authority has set up a dedicated help desk at NTSA HQ, all NTSA regional offices and Huduma Centres. For email enquiries reach us through numberplates@ntsa.go.ke
Kiswahili: TAARIFA: Maombi ya huduma mbalimbali za NTSA kutoka kwa vyombo vya Serikali ya Kitaifa na Kaunti. Mamlaka imeanzisha dawati maalum la usaidizi katika Makao Makuu ya NTSA, ofisi zote za mkoa wa NTSA na Vituo vya Huduma. Kwa maswali ya barua pepe, wasiliana nasi kupitia numberplates@ntsa.go.ke
Ekegusii: OKOMANYIGWA: Obokoreri ao ao obwo bokoenanwa ase chiobisi chia NTSA gochia ase ebibekerero bionsi biekaunti amo neserekari enene. obokoreri bene bwabekirwe ase chiobisi chinene chia NTSA amo na chiria chiobokoreri bene kwana amo naintwe goetera enamba yegariyao@ntsa.go.ke.
Dholuo: Lendo : Lendo mag  tije mopogore opogore mag NTSA kod riwruoge mag sirkal. Sirkal osechako loso mesa mar konyruok  e mesa mar  apis maduong' mar  NTSA, ofise duto mag gweng' kod kuonde mag Huduma centres. Kuom tudruok mar mbui chopnwa kitiyo kod mbui mar numberplates@ntsa.go.ke
Somali: Digniin: Codsiga adeegyada kala duwan ee NTSA ee hay'adaha Dowladda Qaranka iyo Degmada. Hay'addu waxay ka sameysay xafiis caawimaad gaar ah xarunta NTSA, dhammaan xafiisyada gobolka ee NTSA iyo Xarumaha Huduma. Su'aalaha emaylka naga soo xiriir lambarka numberplates@ntsa.go.ke

English: Did you know that all KRA Services are free?  You can receive our services from our contact centre, KRA offices or Huduma Center near you  Find out more here
Kiswahili: Je, unajua kwamba Huduma zote za KRA ni bure? Unaweza kupokea huduma zetu kutoka kituo chetu cha mawasiliano, ofisi za KRA au Kituo cha Huduma kilicho karibu nawe. Pata maelezo zaidi hapa.
Ekegusii: Inee, nomanyete ng'a obokoreri bwensi bwebango gose KRA nigo bore obwabosa otari goakana kende? Nabo okonyora obokoreri bwaito korwa ase ogotwakera esimi  gose obisi ya KRA obisi chiobokoreri bène ang'e naye.
Dholuo: Be ing'eyo ni tije duto mag KRA gin maonge chudo? Inyalo yudo tijewa e kuonde tudruok, ofise mag KRA kata e Huduma center man machiegni kodi ng'e weche momedore kae
Somali: Ma ogtahay in dhammaan Adeegyada KRA ay yihiin lacag la'aan? Waxaad ka heli kartaa adeegyadeena xarunteena xiriirka, xafiisyada KRA ama Xarunta Huduma ee kuugu dhow Halkan ka sii aqri

English: President Ruto slams critics of SHA medical scheme, urges Kakamega residents to register
Kiswahili: Rais Ruto awakosoa wakosoaji wa mpango wa matibabu wa SHA, awahimiza wakazi wa Kakamega kujiandikisha
Ekegusii: omorai bwense William Ruto obagikeirie abamochi omoroberio bw'obobwenia SHA,  nakobasaba abamenyi bakakamega kwerikia ase omoroberio oyuo.

Somali: Madaxweyne Ruto ayaa dhaleeceeyay dhaleeceeyayaasha qorshaha caafimaadka ee SHA, wuxuu dadka deggan Kakamega ugu baaqay inay isdiiwaangaliyaan

English: Kirinyaga Senator Kamau Murango faults the decision to list Mwea Rice Factory for privatization. He urges the government to consult with Kirinyaga residents before proceeding with the process.
Kiswahili: Seneta wa Kirinyaga Kamau Murango akosoa uamuzi wa kuorodhesha Kiwanda cha Mpunga cha Mwea kwa ajili ya ubinafsishaji. Anahimiza serikali kushauriana na wakazi wa Kirinyaga kabla ya kuendelea na mchakato huo.

Dholuo: rSeneta Kamau Murango, ma en Ja-Kirinyaga, oketho paro ma ne ong'ado mar keto kambi mchele mar  Mwea mondo oloke mar jii giwegi , okwayo sirkal mondo owuo gi Jokirinyaga  kapok odhi nyime gi chenro'no.
Somali: Senator-ka Kirinyaga Kamau Murango ayaa diidaya go'aanka lagu soo bandhigay Warshadda Bariiska ee Mwea si loo gaarsiiyo gaarka loo leeyahay, wuxuuna ku boorinayaa xukuumadda inay la tashato dadka deggan Kirinyaga ka hor inta aysan sii wadin geedi socodka.

Kiswahili: Uangalizi wa Kisiasa: Seneta wa Kakamega awaonya wakazi dhidi ya matapeli wa chama cha UDA

English: The former senator has called upon the residents to vote for leaders from the sub-county, constituency, and county levels under the DCP party in the 2027 general elections.
Kiswahili: Seneta huyo wa zamani amewataka wakazi hao kuwapigia kura viongozi kutoka ngazi za kaunti ndogo, jimbo, na kaunti chini ya chama cha DCP katika uchaguzi mkuu wa 2027.

Dholuo: Seneta machon-no osenyiso jodak  ni mondo giyier jotelo moa e pinje matindo, mag sirkal, koda mag gweng' e bwo DCP e yiero maduong' mar higa mar alufu ariyo piero ariyo gabiriyo.
Somali: Senatorkii hore wuxuu ugu baaqay dadka deggan inay u codeeyaan hoggaamiyeyaal ka socda gobollada hoose, gobollada, iyo heerarka gobollada ka hooseeya xisbiga DCP doorashada guud ee 2027.

English: GT News | EACC urges compliance with traffic laws to combat corruption on Kenyan roads. Motorists play a vital role. Let's prioritize road safety! Report corruption to Toll-Free No.1551.
Kiswahili: Habari za GT | EACC yahimiza kufuata sheria za trafiki ili kupambana na ufisadi barabarani Kenya. Madereva wana jukumu muhimu. Tuweke kipaumbele usalama barabarani! Ripoti ufisadi kwa Nambari ya Simu Isiyolipishwa 1551.
Ekegusii: Amayia korwa GT, ekeombe giokorwania obokurumi ime yense kiaboririe amachiko onsi abara kobwatigwa erio gokeania obokurumi ase chibara, abarundia nigo bagokora emeremo emiya ase ogoikerania oboseera ase chibara.  karue amang'ana ao igoro yobokurumi ase ogoaka esimi etari konacha besa 1551.
Dholuo: Lendo maduong' EACC jiwo ji mondo oluw chike mag ndara mondo giked gi mibadhi e nderni mag Kenya. Dereba nigi migawo maduong'. Weuru waket weche motudore gi ritruok e nderni obed motelo! Chiw lipot mar mibadhi e namba manono mar 1551.
Somali: EACC waxay ku boorineysaa in la hoggaansamo xeerarka taraafikada si looga hortago musuqmaasuqa waddooyinka Kenya. Gawaarida baabuurta ayaa door muhiim ah ka ciyaara. Aan mudnaanta siino nabadgelyada waddooyinka!

English: EACC urges Kenyans to report all forms of corruption for investigation, saying they treat all reports with utmost confidentiality and subjects them to a meticulous analysis process.
Kiswahili: EACC inawasihi Wakenya kuripoti aina zote za ufisadi kwa ajili ya uchunguzi, ikisema wanashughulikia ripoti zote kwa usiri mkubwa na kuziweka chini ya mchakato wa uchambuzi wa kina.
Ekegusii: ase obobisi obonene nakoyaunenkia onsi ase oboikeranu obonene.
Dholuo: EACC jiwo Jo-Kenya mondo ochiw ripot e wi kit mibadhi duto, ka giwacho ni gikano ripot duto e yo mopondo kendo gitimo nonro matut kuomgi.
Somali: EACC waxay ugu baaqeysaa dadka Kenya inay soo sheegaan dhammaan noocyada musuqmaasuqa si baaritaan loogu sameeyo, waxayna sheegtay inay si qarsoodi ah ula dhaqmaan warbixinnada oo dhan waxayna u gudbiyaan nidaam falanqayn taxaddar leh.

Kiswahili: IEBC Yawasihi Wakazi Kujiandikisha huku Iten Akirekodi Hakuna Wapiga Kura Wapya

English: The recent accusations against Francis Awino of Bunge la Mwananchi have raised critical questions about the independence of the EACC. Civil society urges accountability, not weaponized state machinery.
Kiswahili: Shutuma za hivi karibuni dhidi ya Francis Awino wa Bunge la Mwananchi zimeibua maswali muhimu kuhusu uhuru wa EACC. Asasi za kiraia zinahimiza uwajibikaji, si silaha za serikali.
Ekegusii: Amang'ana yogokagerwa igoro yobokurmi komobwata Francis awino omobwatania bwebunge yegenka aretire amaborio amange igoro yobokoreri nogwetenenera bene bwekeombe giokorwania obokurumi.  Na yagerire abaegereri boboene bwa mwanyabanto koboria oboikeranu ase obokoreri korende tari obokoreri bwogwanchereria gose boria bwogotumeka buna ekerwanero neserekari.
Dholuo: Weche ma nyocha otim ne Francis Awino ma en jakanyo mar od bura mamalo osechako kelo penjo madongo e wi chung' mar EACC. Telo mar sirkal jiwo ler mar tich ok tiyo kod masinde mag lweny.
Somali: eedeymaha dhawaan lagu soo oogay Francis Awino oo ka tirsan Bunge la Mwananchi ayaa soo jeediyay su'aalo xasaasi ah oo ku saabsan madaxbanaanida EACC. Bulshada rayidka ah waxay ku boorineysaa xisaabtanka, ma aha mashiin dowladeed oo hubaysan.

English: If we realize that you have not declared some of your assets, we will sue you for that and recover the assets that you have failed to declare - EACC CEO Mohamud warns public officers
Kiswahili: Tukigundua kuwa hujatangaza baadhi ya mali zako, tutakushtaki kwa hilo na kurejesha mali ambazo umeshindwa kutangaza - Mkurugenzi Mtendaji wa EACC Mohamud awaonya maafisa wa umma
Ekegusii: Eise gotoka ng'a tikwebegete tenene enibo yao yonsi togende bosio bwekegambero erio togosoere nagokoura enibo eyio otabegete arabu amang'ana aye omokoreri omonene ase ekeombe giokorwania obokurumi ime yense.  mohamud gochia ase abakoreri beserekari.
Dholuo: Kapo ni wafwenyo ni ne ok inyiso mwandu mag ng'ato, wabiro donjone e kot kendo wabiro yudo mwandu ma ne ok inyiso - jatelo matayo EACC  Mohamud chiwo siem ne jotelo mag sirkal.
Somali: Haddii aan ogaano in aadan sheegin qaar ka mid ah hantidaada, waxaan ku dacweeyn doonnaa taas oo aan dib u soo celineyno hantida aad ku guuldareysatay inaad sheegto - Maamulaha EACC Mohamud wuxuu ka digay saraakiisha dawladda

English: REPORT CORRUPTION @EACCKenya urges Kenyans to report all forms of corruption for investigation. EACC treats all reports with the utmost confidentiality and subjects them to a meticulous analysis process. Below is the reporting process.
Kiswahili: RIPOTI RUSHWA @EACCKenya inawasihi Wakenya kuripoti aina zote za rushwa kwa ajili ya uchunguzi. EACC hushughulikia ripoti zote kwa usiri mkubwa na kuziweka chini ya mchakato wa uchambuzi wa kina. Hapa chini ni mchakato wa kuripoti.
Ekegusii: ENANA AMANG'ANA IGORO YOBOKURUMI@EACCkenya yababoririe abakenya koenana amang'ana igoro yobokurumi honde bwensi ase obotuki bene. EACC nigo ekeonekia ng'a amang'ana onsi okoenana abekirwe ase obobisi nakoringorigwa bene. Nabo okoenanana amang'ana ao goetera enchera eye.
Dholuo: Chiw lipot mar mibadhi @EACC kenya jiwo jopiny Kenya mondo onyis kit mibadhi duto e nonro. EACC rito ripode duto gi weche mopondo kendo timo nonro matut kuomgi. Chenro mar chwalo lipode ni piny.
Somali: REPORT CORRUPTION @EACCKenya waxay dadka Kenya ugu baaqeysaa inay soo sheegaan dhammaan noocyada musuqmaasuqa si baaritaan loogu sameeyo. EACC waxay si qarsoodi ah ula dhaqmaysaa dhammaan warbixinnada waxayna u dhigeysaa nidaam falanqayn taxadar leh. Hoos waxaa ku qoran habka warbixinta.

English: Siaya County graft probe: Oguna urges EACC to probe misuse of funds in the county Oguna: we call on EACC to conclude Ksh. 600M theft probe
Kiswahili: Uchunguzi wa ufisadi katika Kaunti ya Siaya: Oguna ahimiza EACC kuchunguza matumizi mabaya ya fedha katika kaunti ya Oguna: tunatoa wito kwa EACC kukamilisha uchunguzi wa wizi wa Ksh. 600M
Ekegusii: Obotuki bwobokurumi ime yekaunti ya siaya:oguna oboririe EACC gotuka obokurumi obwo bobwateranetie enibo ekaunti eyuo.otebire iga nigo tokoboria EACC gotuka 600,000,000. ime yekaunti ya siaya.
Dholuo: Ng'ado mar Puonjruok e Weche lony manya mag Kaunti mar Siaya: Oguna jiwo EACC mondo ong'e kaka otiyo gi pesa e yo marach e Kaunti  Oguna: Wakwayo EACC mondo otiek ng'ado mar siling milion mia auchiel.
Somali: Baadhitaanka xadgudubka ee gobolka Siaya: Oguna wuxuu ugu baaqay EACC inay baaritaan ku sameyso xadgudubka lacagaha gobolka Oguna: waxaan ugu baaqaynaa EACC inay soo afjaro baaritaanka 600M Ksh.

English: Aaroncheruiyot supports the motion on the Report of the Mediation Committee on the Conflict of Interest Bill, saying it was the missing puzzle in the fight against corruption, as noted by EACC. He urges EACC to act and make Kenya corruption-free.
Kiswahili: Aaroncheruiyot anaunga mkono hoja kuhusu Ripoti ya Kamati ya Upatanishi kuhusu Muswada wa Mgogoro wa Maslahi, akisema ilikuwa ni kitendawili kinachokosekana katika mapambano dhidi ya ufisadi, kama ilivyobainishwa na EACC. Anahimiza EACC kuchukua hatua na kuifanya Kenya isiwe na ufisadi.
Ekegusii: Aaron cheruyot obwatesirie ogokwanera ase ebunge amang'ana aria abwateranetie ogwatananekana ase obokoreri ase abakoreri beserekari. na koboria abachumbe koyekwenera ng'ana yobogayani ebwateranetie amang'ana ayuo. Nahoteba eyuo Nero eng'ana yarenge embachero enene ase okorwania obokurumi ase ekombe EACC ime yense. Boigo orure okoboria EACC goting'ia esegi yokorwania obokurumi nagokora kenya koba ense etabwati bokurumi pi.
Dholuo: Aaroncheruiyot riwo lwedo ripot mar Komiti mar Winjruok ewi chik mar pogruok e paro, kowacho ni ripotno ne en gima ne onge e lweny mar kedo gi mibadhi, mana kaka EACC ne onyiso. Ne ojiwo EACC mondo okaw chik kendo oket piny Kenya obed maonge mibadhi.
Somali: Aaroncheruiyot wuxuu taageerayaa mooshinka ku saabsan Warbixinta Guddiga Dhexdhexaadinta ee Sharciga Khilaafka Danta, isagoo sheegay inay ahayd halyeeyga maqan ee la dagaalanka musuqmaasuqa, sida lagu xusay EACC.

English: Nyamira's Jerusha Momanyi Urges EACC to Intensify War on Corruption in Nyamira.
Kiswahili: Jerusha Momanyi wa Nyamira Aitaka EACC Kuzidisha Vita dhidi ya Ufisadi huko Nyamira.
Ekegusii: Jerusha momanyi korwa Nyamira oboririe ekeombe giokorwania obokurumi ime yense EACC  goting'ia esegi yokorwania obokurumi ime ya Nyamira.
Dholuo: Jerusha Momanyi mawuok Nyamira jiwo EACC mondo omed kedo gi mibadhi e Nyamira.
Somali: Jerusha Momanyi oo ka soo jeeda Nyamira ayaa ku booriyay EACC inay xoojiso dagaalka ka dhanka ah musuqmaasuqa magaalada Nyamira.

English: EACC Vows to Deal with all Land Grabbing Cases, Urges Counties to Assist in Rooting Out Culprits
Kiswahili: EACC Yaapa Kushughulikia Kesi Zote za Unyakuzi wa Ardhi, Yazihimiza Kaunti Kusaidia Kuondoa Wahalifu
Ekegusii: Ekeombe giokorwania obokurumi ime yense EACC giatianire gochia korwani oboibi bwamaremo yeserekari  nakoboria chikaunti gosokia  bonsi baria babweteranirie noboibi obwe.
Dholuo: EACC osesingore ni obiro kawo okang ' mar tieko kes duto mag kawo lowo, kendo ojiwo kaunti mondo okony e golo achije.
Somali: EACC waxay ballanqaadeysaa in ay wax ka qabato dhammaan kiisaska qabsashada dhulka, waxay ku boorineysaa degmooyinka inay gacan ka geystaan baabi'inta dambiilayaasha

English: PROCEEDS OF CORRUPTION EACC hands to the President Sh5B assets recovered from proceeds of graft President Ruto urges MPs to pass Conflict of Interest Bill in its original form
Kiswahili: MAPATO YA UFISADI EACC YAMkabidhi Rais Mali ya Sh5B zilizopatikana kutokana na mapato ya ufisadi Rais Ruto awahimiza wabunge kupitisha Mswada wa Mgogoro wa Maslahi katika umbo lake la asili
Ekegusii: Ekeombe giokorwania obokurumi ime yense EACC kiaenanire enibo ye eisaine chibesa 5billion.  eria yanyorekanete ase chinchera chiobikurumi gochia ase omorai bwense. Omalorai bwense Ruto boigo oboririe abachumbe goetia eng'ana eria yogotwara ogotantanigwa ase obokoreri buna ere etari gokorerwa oboonchoreria.
Dholuo: Weche momedi mag mibadhi EACC okelo mwandu mag ker bilion abich mwandu mokaw kowuok kerRuto jood bura mondo okal chochni mar paro e chik yie.
Somali: DHAGEYSO MUSUQMAASUQA EACC oo madaxweynaha ku wareejisay Sh5B hantidii laga soo celiyay lacagaha uu musuq maasuqay madaxweyne Ruto wuxuu ku booriyay Xildhibaanada inay ansixiyaan Hindise Sharciyeedka Khilaafaadka Ribada oo qaabkiisii ​​hore ahaa

English: EACC rubbishes KERRA employees defence that he raised 21 M for dowry urges court not to unfreeze.
Kiswahili: EACC yapinga utetezi wa wafanyakazi wa KERRA kwamba alikusanya 21 M kwa ajili ya mahari yaitaka mahakama isifungue mashtaka.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe giokorwania obokurumi ime yense EACC giatuguteire are amang'ana yomokori emeremo ase ekombe giechipara gia kerra buna nigo anyorete enibo ye 21million.korwa ase ogoakanwa chiombe chienywomo nagotebia ekegambero ngesibora  esa echuo.
Dholuo: EACC rucho defence mar jotije mar KERRA ma osegolo milion piero ariyo gi achiel mar dhiang' jiwo od bura mondo ogol ageng'a.
Somali: EACC burburinta shaqaalaha KERRA difaaca in uu soo ururiyey 21 M oo ah hadiyad ku booriyay maxkamadda in aan la qaboojiyo.

English: EACC ORDERS all State entities to stop payment of terminal dues to civil servants resigning from government to evade prosecution for forging academic papers.
Kiswahili: EACC INAAGIZA mashirika yote ya Serikali kusitisha malipo ya ada ya mwisho kwa watumishi wa umma wanaojiuzulu kutoka serikalini ili kukwepa mashtaka kwa kughushi hati za masomo.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe giokorwania obokurumi ime yense EACC kiarure ogochika gochia ase eserekari gotenenia oboakani bwechibesa chiaritaya gochi ase abakoreri beserekari baria bagwetigia emeremo asengecho yogotama gosoerwa asengecho yogotwara chisatibigeti chiobong'ainereria.
Dholuo: EACC chiwo chik ne riwruoge duto mag sirkal mondo owe chulo osuru mag jotelo mag sirkal ka gidwaro weyo tijegi mag sirkal mondo kik ng'ato yawne bura kuom barupe somo ma bandia.
Somali: EACC waxay amartay dhamaan hay'adaha dowladda in ay joojiyaan bixinta deeqaha dhameystirka ah ee shaqaalaha dawladda ee iska casilay dowladda si looga fogaado dacwad lagu soo oogay warqado waxbarasho oo been abuur ah.

English: NTSA urges motorists to complete pending transactions on TIMS by Friday, December 15, 2023 ahead of integration of all service access on e-Citizen by January 2, 2024.
Kiswahili: NTSA inawasihi madereva kukamilisha miamala inayosubiriwa kwenye TIMS ifikapo Ijumaa, Desemba 15, 2023 kabla ya kuunganishwa kwa huduma zote kwenye e-Citizen ifikapo Januari 2, 2024.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe getenenerete obokoreri obuya ase chibara ime yense NTSA,  kiarure okoboria ase abarundia gokora ritang'ani amateng'o aria yokoboria ase TIMs goikera rituko ria chuma chitariki 15, 2023 motwe bwokobwaterania obokoreri bwonsi bweserekari inse ya e-citizen omotienyi omotang'ani 2,2024.
Dholuo: NTSA jiwo joriembo mondo otiek chudo kod TIMS chieng' tich abich dwe mar apar kod ariyo tarik apar kod abich higa mar alufu ariyo piero ariyo kod adek motelo ne riwo chenro duto e mbui mar ecitizen chieng' tarik ariyo dwe mar achiel higa mar alufu ariyo piero ariyo kof ang'wen.
Somali: NTSA waxay ku boorineysaa taraafikada inay dhammaystiraan macaamil ganacsi oo la sii wado oo ku saabsan TIMS ilaa Jimcaha, 15-ka Diseembar 2023, ka hor inta aan la gelin dhammaan adeegyada adeegga ee e-Citizen illaa Janaayo 2, 2024.

English: Government rolls out e-Citizen Mpesa payments for Inua Jamii beneficiaries starting January; Social Protection PS Motari urges beneficiaries to register Safaricom lines.
Kiswahili: Serikali yazindua malipo ya Mpesa ya kielektroniki kwa wanufaika wa Inua Jamii kuanzia Januari; Katibu Mkuu wa Ulinzi wa Jamii Motari anawasihi wanufaika kusajili laini za Safaricom.
Ekegusii: Eserekari yachakirie bene omoroberio bwogoakana chibesa chiogokonya abagotu amo nechinka chiria chitari kwenyara goetera omoroberio bwesimi mpesa amo na e-Citizen gochakera omotienyi omotang'ani. Omoriki obotambe ase obokoreri Motari oboririe bonsi korikia bene chiraini chiabo chiesimi ase okonyora obokoreri ase omoroberio oyo.
Dholuo: Sirkal chiwo mich kokalo kuom E-Citizen Mpesa ne joma yudo kony mar INUA Jamii chakre dwe mar achiel  jagoro mar ratiro mar oganda  Motari jiwo joma yudo kony mondo odhi oka laind  safarikom.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay bixisaa lacag bixinta e-Citizen Mpesa ee ka faa'iideystayaasha Inua Jamii laga bilaabo Janaayo; Badbaadada Bulshada PS Motari waxay ku boorineysaa ka faa'iideystayaasha inay diiwaangeliyaan khadadka Safaricom.

English: Govt Urges Pensioners to Register on e-Citizen by May 10 to Avoid Payroll Suspension To all government pensioners: You are urged to register on the e-Citizen platform by the extended deadline of 10th May.” Isaac Mwaura Gov't Spokesman
Kiswahili: Serikali Yawahimiza Wastaafu Kujiandikisha kwenye Mtandao wa Kielektroniki ifikapo Mei 10 ili Kuepuka Kusimamishwa kwa Mishahara Kwa wastaafu wote wa serikali: Mnahimizwa kujiandikisha kwenye mfumo wa Kielektroniki wa Kiraia ifikapo tarehe ya mwisho iliyoongezwa ya Mei 10.” Isaac Mwaura Msemaji wa Serikali
Ekegusii: Eserekari yababorie abakoreri emeremo baria abagotu gose bakorire obooreri kwerikia ase omoroberio o e-citizen ase obwango bwa omotienyi ogatano chitariki 10. erio gwetanga korwa omoroberio bwogwakanua gotuguterwa are.
Dholuo: Sirkal kwayo joyudo pes rutaya  mondo ondikre  e-Citizen e dwe mar abich mondo kik gikos  chiwone jotelo duto mag sirkal pesa  Ijiwi mondo idhi e pension e e-Citizen e dwe mar abich tarik apar jaloso e lo sirkal Isaac Mwaura nowacho.
Somali: Dowladda waxay ku boorineysaa dadka hawlgabka ah inay diiwaangeliyaan e-Citizen 10-ka Maajo si looga fogaado joojinta mushaarka Dhamaan dadka hawlgabka ah ee dowladda: Waxaad ku boorineysaa inaad ka diiwaangeliso barnaamijka e-Citizen 10-ka Maajo marka la kordhiyo waqtiga. "Isaac Mwaura Afhayeenka Dowladda

English: Government urges pensioners to register to avoid payroll suspension To all government pensioners, you are urged to register on the e-Citizen platform by the extended deadline of 10th May, the government spokesperson said.
Kiswahili: Serikali inawasihi wastaafu kujiandikisha ili kuepuka kusimamishwa kwa mishahara. Kwa wastaafu wote wa serikali, mnahimizwa kujiandikisha kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen ifikapo tarehe ya mwisho iliyoongezwa ya Mei 10, msemaji wa serikali alisema.
Ekegusii: Eserekari yababorie ababarure emeremo asengecho yobogotu kwerikia erio gotanga omoroberio bwogwakanua gotuguterwa are  ase abakoreri abagotu bonsi. amatuko yokwerikia amentirwe goikera chitariki 10 omotienyi ogatano.
Dholuo: Sirkal jiwo joma yudo pes rutaya mondo ondikre mondo  gikwed chudo duto ma sirkal chiwo, kendo gidwaro ni gidonj e e-Citizen e giko dwe mar abich tarik apar , jaloso e loo sirkal nowacho.
Somali: Dowladda waxay ku boorineysaa dadka hawlgabka ah inay isdiiwaangaliyaan si looga fogaado joojinta mushaarka Dhamaan dadka hawlgabka ah ee dowladda, waxaan ku boorineynaa inaad isdiiwaangaliyaan barta e-Citizen marka la gaaro waqtiga la kordhiyay ee May 10, ayuu yiri afhayeenka dowladda.

Register for eTiMS today via @eCitizenKenya Portal today here; kra.ecitizen.go.ke #GavaMkononi #KRAKwaGavaMkononi

Ndikri ne ETIMS kawuono kokalo kuom @ecitizenkenya portal kawuono kae; kra.ecitizen.go.ke #gavamnono #Krakwavavamnono

Codsiyada ilaa macluumaadka, ka hel wax kasta oo aad u baahan tahay hal xarun adeegyo dawladeed oo Digital ah. Isdiiwaangelinta eTiMS maanta iyada oo loo marayo bogga @eCitizenKenya maanta halkan; kra.ecitizen.go.ke #GavaMkononi #KRAKwaGavaMkononi

English: eCITIZEN FIRST ANNIVERSARY I urge all Kenyans to register now because eCitizen means service bila stress. Whatever government service you need, eCitizen is your go to platform. -Julius Bitok, PS Immigration & Citizen Services #KBCniYetu^EM

Dholuo: Nyasi mokwongo mar Ecitizen Akwayo Jo-Kenya duto mondo ondikre sani nikech ecitizen ochung'ne tich maonge paro mang'eny. Kata bed ni idwaro tich mane mar sirkal, ecitizen en dhi e ndiri. -JULIUS BITOK, jagoro mar weche madhi oko kod chenro mar jopiny  #Kbcniyetu^em
Somali: eCITIZEN FIRST ANNIVERSARY Waxaan ugu baaqayaa dhammaan dadka Kenya inay hadda iska diiwaangeliyaan maxaa yeelay eCitizen waxay ka dhigan tahay adeeg aan walwal lahayn.
