English: A section of the Isiolo “Meru community has raised concerns over what they describe as rampant bad governance within the county administration. The leaders accused local officials of mismanagement and failing to fulfill key development pledges.
Kiswahili: Sehemu ya jamii ya Isiolo “Meru” imeibua wasiwasi kuhusu kile wanachokielezea kama utawala mbaya uliokithiri ndani ya utawala wa kaunti. Viongozi hao waliwashutumu maafisa wa eneo hilo kwa usimamizi mbaya na kushindwa kutimiza ahadi muhimu za maendeleo.
Ekegusii: Egati yabamenyi ba'isiolo abwo bare abameru baichaneire ase keria bakoroka obokoreri obobe nobotumeki obobe bwenibo ase ogoikerania amagenderero.
Dholuo: Moko kuom joma odak e alwora mar Isiolo  osechako bedo gi luoro e wi gima giwacho ni en loch marach ahinya e kauntino. Jotelo go seyo jotelo ma aluorano kuom telo marach kod koso chopo singo mag dongruok.
Somali: Qeyb ka mid ah bulshada Isiolo Meru ayaa walaac ka muujiyay waxa ay ku tilmaamaan maamul xumo aan caadi ahayn oo ka jirta maamulka degmada. Hoggaamiyeyaashu waxay ku eedeeyeen mas'uuliyiinta deegaanka in ay maamusho xun oo ay ku guuldareysteen inay buuxiyaan ballanqaadyada horumarinta muhiimka ah.

English: Amid a rise in suicides and killings believed to be linked to mental health challenges, clerics and local leaders are calling on government to lower the cost of living and establish more counselling centres to help address the growing crisis.
Kiswahili: Huku kukiwa na ongezeko la kujiua na mauaji yanayoaminika kuhusishwa na changamoto za afya ya akili, viongozi wa dini na viongozi wa mitaa wanatoa wito kwa serikali kupunguza gharama ya maisha na kuanzisha vituo zaidi vya ushauri nasaha ili kusaidia kushughulikia mgogoro unaokua.
Ekegusii: koreng'ana nokomenteka ase baria bagweita amo nagoita amang'ana ayuo abwateranirie amo nogotwara omochando bwebirengerio ebinge biobongo, abarai bechikanisa amo nabarai bande barure okoboria aseneserekari gokeyia amagori yechindagera amo nebinto binde erio gokeyia amagori aigoro yobogima. Naboigo baboririe eserekari koronsia nchisemo chiria chiobosemia egere chibe chigokonya omochando oyoiga ogendererete gokina.
Dholuo: To nikech kwan  momedore mar derruok kod nek mosetudi kod wich molokore , jolemo kod jotend gweng 'jiwo sirkande mag dhano mondo oket nengo mag ngima piny kendo ochak kuonde ma ji nyalo yudoe kony e tieko chandruogno mamedore.
Somali: Iyadoo ay sii kordhayaan isdilka iyo dilalka la rumeysan yahay inay ku xiran yihiin dhibaatooyinka caafimaadka dhimirka, culimada iyo hoggaamiyeyaasha deegaanka ayaa ugu baaqay dowladda inay hoos u dhigto qiimaha nolosha iyo in la dhiso xarumo la talin badan si ay uga caawiyaan xallinta dhibaatada sii kordheysa.

English: Self-help-groups in Thika, Kiambu county have received posho mills from well wishers in collaboration with local leaders. This was in a bid to help the cluster groups comprising youths and women start generating income. #NTVAtOne
Kiswahili: Vikundi vya kujisaidia huko Thika, kaunti ya Kiambu vimepokea vinu vya posho kutoka kwa wasamaria wema kwa ushirikiano na viongozi wa eneo hilo. Hii ilikuwa katika juhudi za kusaidia vikundi vya makundi vinavyojumuisha vijana na wanawake kuanza kupata mapato. #NTVAtOne
Ekegusii: Ebiombe ime ya Thika ekaunti ya kiambu banyorire ogokonywa gwechitinga korwa ase abasani bokogania okuya kobwaterana  amo nabarai babo erio kwegendereria ase emeroberio ya maganderero ase ensemo ya basket nabang'ina. erio kwegendereria ase obonchooreria bwabo.
Dholuo: Grube mag kosalo  e kaunti ma Thika, kaunti ma Kiambu oseyudo kony moa kuom jochiwo mang'won ka gitiyo gi jotelo mag gweng'no. Mano ne en e tiegruok mar konyo grube moting'o rowere kod mon mondo ochak golo pesa. #Ntvatone
Somali: Kooxaha is caawinta ee degmada Thika ee degmada Kiambu waxay ka heleen warshadaha posho oo ay ka helaan shaqaale faraxsan oo kaashanaya hoggaamiyeyaasha deegaanka. Tani waxay ahayd dadaal ay ku caawinayaan kooxaha kooxaha ka kooban dhalinyarada iyo haweenka inay bilaabaan inay helaan dakhli. #NTVAtOne

English: Insecurity in Baringo: Security committee on tour to assess security situation. Local leaders want victims of banditry compensated #CitizenWeekend
Kiswahili: Ukosefu wa usalama Baringo: Kamati ya usalama ikifanya ziara ya kutathmini hali ya usalama. Viongozi wa eneo hilo wanataka waathiriwa wa ujambazi walipwe fidia #CitizenWikendi
Ekegusii: bonsi baria babwateranetwe ase obobegu goakanwa. #citizen weekend.
Dholuo: Rohcruok mar arita e kaunti ma Baringo: Komiti mar Ritruok dhi nono chal mar ritruok. Jotelo mag gweng'no dwaro ni joma ne odonjo e timbe mahundu oyud resruok. #giko juma mar jopiny.
Somali: Nabadsugida Baringo: Guddiga amniga ayaa booqasho ku socda si ay u qiimeeyaan xaaladda amniga Madaxda deegaanka waxay rabaan in dhibanayaasha tuugada lagu magdhowdo #CitizenWeekend

English: Rescue Centre Torture Probe: Human rights activists call on local leaders to stop politicising the alleged torture claims being perpetrated at the Eldoret Rescue Centre.
Kiswahili: Uchunguzi wa Mateso wa Kituo cha Uokoaji: Wanaharakati wa haki za binadamu watoa wito kwa viongozi wa eneo hilo kuacha kuhusisha siasa na madai ya mateso yanayodaiwa kufanywa katika Kituo cha Uokoaji cha Eldoret.
Ekegusii: okoringoria kwogochandwa ase chinyomba chiria chiokobisa ababwateranirie nobounereria: Abaegereri boboene bwa'mwanyabanto barure okoboria  abarai gotiga korenta siasa ase keria kogetebwa buna obounereria kegokorwa ase enyomba yobotoria ya Eldoret.
Dholuo: Puonjruok ma ne otim e kambi mar Resruok : Joma kedo ne ratiro mag dhano dwaro ni jotelo mag gweng'no owe timbe mag sand ma ne itimo e kambi mar Resruok scue  e taon mar Eldoret.
Somali: Tijaabada Cadaadis ee Xarunta Badbaadinta: Dhaqdhaqaaqayaasha xuquuqda aadanaha waxay ugu baaqdaan hoggaamiyeyaasha deegaanka inay joojiyaan siyaasadeynta sheegashada lagu eedeeyay in cadaadis lagu sameeyay Xarunta Badbaadinta Eldoret.

English: Kilifi Rejects Nuclear Project Kilifi leaders have unanimously opposed the proposed multibillion-shilling Uyombo nuclear power plant, citing environmental risks to local communities.
Kiswahili: Kilifi Yakataa Mradi wa Nyuklia Viongozi wa Kilifi wamepinga kwa kauli moja pendekezo la mtambo wa nyuklia wa Uyombo wenye thamani ya mabilioni ya shilingi, wakitaja hatari za kimazingira kwa jamii za wenyeji.
Ekegusii: Abamenyi ba vilified bakanire omoroberio bwechinguru chianiukiria ime ya kilifi. Abarai ime ya kilifi bakanire ase eriogi erimo omoroberio bwechimguru chianiukiria oyio okageire koba bwechibesa chinyinge mono ase ekewango giechibirioni. Uyombo nuclear power plant, bagoteba obwoba bwabo nkoreng'ana nogosareka kwe'bitoonchokanaine gochia ase abamenyi bensemo eyuo.
Dholuo: Kilifi okwedo chenro mar nyuklia ma jotelo mag Kilifi oseng'ado mar kwedo gi chuny achiel chenro moketi e paro mar bilionde modhawo mar nyuklia mar Uyombo, ka gichiwo ranyisi mar pek ma onyalo kelo e aluora mar oganda.
Somali: Hogaamiyayaasha Kilifi ayaa si wadajir ah uga soo horjeestay xarunta korontada nukliyeerka ee loo soo jeediyay in ay ku kacdo dhowr bilyan oo shillings, iyagoo tixraacaya khataraha deegaanka ee bulshooyinka maxalliga ah.

English: West Pokot Governor Simon Kachapin has criticized a section of local leaders, accusing them of engaging in divisive, toxic, and deceitful politics intended to derail development and promote sabotage.
Kiswahili: Gavana wa Pokot Magharibi Simon Kachapin amekosoa sehemu ya viongozi wa eneo hilo, akiwashutumu kwa kujihusisha na siasa za mgawanyiko, sumu, na udanganyifu zinazolenga kuvuruga maendeleo na kukuza hujuma.
Ekegusii: Omogabana opokot ya sugusu obamochirie egati yabarai bensemo eyuo ase ogokora siasa yokobagana abanto, yendamwamu amo neyo'bong'ainereria ere nekerenga yogoirania amagenderero ye'nsemo eyuo maega naboigo yokogochana.
Dholuo: Gavana mar Pokot ma Ugwe , Simon Kachapin, oseng'ado ne jotelo moko mag pinjego bura ni giriwo lwedo siasa ma kelo pogruok, ma nigi sum, kendo ma kelo mibadhi ma thiro dongruok kendo nyayo kethruok.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha gobolka West Pokot Simon Kachapin ayaa dhaliilay qayb ka mid ah hoggaamiyeyaasha deegaanka, isagoo ku eedeeyay inay ku lug lahaayeen siyaasado kala qaybsame, sun ah, iyo khiyaano leh oo loogu talagalay in la burburiyo horumarka loona horumariyo burburinta.

English: School For The Deaf: Safaricom Foundation funds refurbishment of school Chikombero School has learners with hearing impairment Local leaders call for investment in special needs schools
Kiswahili: Shule ya Viziwi: Wakfu wa Safaricom wafadhili ukarabati wa shule Shule ya Chikombero ina wanafunzi wenye ulemavu wa kusikia Viongozi wa eneo hilo watoa wito wa uwekezaji katika shule za mahitaji maalum
Ekegusii: Esukuru Yemetino:ekeombe kioboroso bwa'safaricom kiarure chibesa echio chirakonye ase okobarera esukuru yemetino ya chikombero eyuo ebwate abaorokigwa babwate omochando bwoboremerwa bwokoigwa. Abarai ase ensemo eyuo barure okoboria ase enibo kobekwa ase ensemo yechisukuru chia abatari kwenyara kemobere.
Dholuo: Skul mar Joma Itgi odino: Riwruok mar Safaricom Foundation ochung;ne bero gedo mar sikul mar chikombero manikod josomo manikod sida mar wuoyo jotelo mag gweng' luongo dongruok mar sikunde mag joma nikod  ng'ol.
Somali: Dugsi loogu talagalay dadka Dhagaha la'aanta ah: Hay'adda Safaricom Foundation waxay maalgelisaa dayactirka dugsiga Dugsiga Chikombero Dugsigu wuxuu leeyahay ardayda dhaawaca maqalka leh Madaxda deegaanka ayaa ku baaqaya maalgashiga dugsiyada baahiyaha gaarka ah

English: Improving schools infrastructure Nyahururu leaders call on government to build classrooms Local MPs pledge to invest part of NG-CDF on infrastructure
Kiswahili: Kuboresha miundombinu ya shule Viongozi wa Nyahururu watoa wito kwa serikali kujenga madarasa Wabunge wa eneo hilo waahidi kuwekeza sehemu ya NG-CDF kwenye miundombinu
Ekegusii: koenekia amaagacho amaya ase chisukuru abarai ime ya Nyahururu barure okoboria ase eserekari kwagacha ebirasi ase abachumbe bensemo eyuo barure chiira gochia kobeka enibo ya NG-CDF ase okorosia nakobareera ebirasi ase ensemo eyuo.
Dholuo: Bero gedo mag sikunde Nyahururu ogwelo sirkal mondo oger ute mag tiegruok jood bura osingo mar keto omenda mar  NG-SDF e gedo.
Somali: Hagaajinta kaabayaasha dugsiyada Madaxda Nyahururu waxay ku baaqeen dowladda inay dhisto fasalo Xildhibaanada deegaanka ayaa ballanqaaday inay qeyb ka mid ah NG-CDF ka maalgeliyaan kaabayaasha

English: A family in Kirimangai Village, Nyandarua, has been left homeless after a fire gutted their 4-bedroom house. They are appealing to local leaders and well-wishers for assistance
Kiswahili: Familia moja katika Kijiji cha Kirimangai, Nyandarua, imeachwa bila makao baada ya moto kuteketeza nyumba yao ya vyumba vinne vya kulala. Wanawaomba viongozi wa eneo hilo na wasamaria wema msaada.
Ekegusii: Enka eyemo ime yekenyoro kiakirimangai ime ya Nyandarua mbatigetwe batabwati obomenyo nyuma yenyomba yabo ebwate chinyomba chiokorara 4 koyia omorero. Barure okoboria ase abarai bensemo eyuo amo nabanto bonsi bokogania okuya kobakonya.
Dholuo: Familia moro e  gweng' mar Kirimangai, Nyandarua, osedong' ka onge ot ma gidakie bang' ka ot ma nigi ute ang'wen-go osewang'o. Gikwayo kony kowuok kuom jochiwo mang'won kod jotelo mag gwengego.
Somali: Qoys ka tirsan tuulada Kirimangai, Nyandarua, ayaa hoy la'aan ku tagay kadib markii dabku baabi'iyey gurigooda 4 qol oo jiif ah.

English: UNITED WE STAND Villagers in Gatundu contribute and construct a makeshift bridge They are urging local leaders to construct a permanent bridge #KBCniYetu
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa kijiji cha Gatundu wachangia na kujenga daraja la muda. Wanawahimiza viongozi wa eneo hilo kujenga daraja la kudumu #KBCniYetu
Ekegusii: ASE OBOMO NTOTENEINE abwo bare abamenyi ime ya Gatundu marketers chinibo chiabo ase okorosia ekiambokero kiemete. barure okoboria ase abarai babo kobaroseria ekiambokero egeikeranu.
Dholuo: Ka wamakore to wachung' Jogweng' duto  mar Gatundu konyo kendo gero olalo ka gikwayo jotelo mag gweng'no mondo oger olalo mosiko #KBCNIYETU
Somali: DAAWO DAAWO Gobolada Gatundu waxay gacan ka geystaan dhismaha buundada ku meelgaarka ah Waxay hogaamiyaasha deegaanka ku boorinayaan inay dhisaan buundada joogtada ah #KBCniYetu

English: Local leaders in Lamu East have urged residents to unite and elect visionary leaders ahead of the upcoming general elections, citing slow development in the region. They urged the Bajuni community to support leaders committed to service and good governance. #KBCniYetu ^MM
Kiswahili: Viongozi wa eneo la Lamu Mashariki wamewahimiza wakazi kuungana na kuwachagua viongozi wenye maono kabla ya uchaguzi mkuu ujao, wakitaja maendeleo ya polepole katika eneo hilo. Waliwahimiza jamii ya Bajuni kuwaunga mkono viongozi waliojitolea kutoa huduma na utawala bora. #KBCniYetu ^MM
Ekegusii: Abarai ime ya lamu ya mocha baboririe abamenyi kobwaterana na gochora abarai babwate amaroro bosio bw'obochori obonene nagokwanera amagenderero ang'ora ase ensemo eyuo. Barure okoboria ase egesaku kiababajuni kobwateseia abarai baria bamagenderero no'bokoreri.#kbcniyetu^mm
Dholuo: Jotelo mag  Lamu ma Ugwe osesayo ji mondo oriwgi kanyachiel kendo giyier jotelo ma nigi paro maber kapok oyud yiero maduong' mabiro, ka giseyo dongruok ma mos e gweng'no. Gijiwo jogweng' ma Bajoni mondo ojiw jotelo moyie tich kod telo maber  #KBCniYetu ^MM
Somali: Hogaamiyaasha deegaanka Lamu East waxay ku booriyeen dadka deegaanka inay isu yimaadaan oo ay doortaan hoggaamiyeyaal aragti leh ka hor doorashada guud ee soo socota, iyagoo tixraacaya horumarka gaabis ah ee gobolka. Waxay ku booriyeen bulshada Bajuni inay taageeraan hoggaamiyeyaal u heellan adeegga iyo maamulka wanaagsan. #KBCniYetu ^MM

English: Lamu County Government Urges Liquor Board to Refrain from Licensing in High-Risk Areas.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti ya Lamu Yaitaka Bodi ya Vinywaji Kuacha Kutoa Leseni katika Maeneo Yenye Hatari Kubwa.
Ekegusii: Eserekari yekaunti ya Lamu yaboririe ekeombe keria getenenereteogwanchera oboonia bwamarwa kaborigwe gotaenana amakaratasi yogwancherwa ase chinsemo chiria chibwate emebasokano.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti ma Lamu jiwo jotelo mag kong'o mondo kik chiw otiko  mag kong'o e gwenge ma nyalo kelo hinyruok maduong'.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka Lamu waxay ugu baaqeysaa Guddiga Khamriga inay ka fogaadaan rukhsad bixinta aagagga halista sare leh.

English: Push For SHA Registration Nairobi county Woman Rep Esther Passaris, urges Kenyans to register for SHA to make it easy to access government health services.
Kiswahili: Shinikiza Usajili wa SHA Mwakilishi wa Wanawake wa kaunti ya Nairobi Esther Passaris, anawasihi Wakenya kujiandikisha kwa SHA ili kurahisisha upatikanaji wa huduma za afya za serikali.
Ekegusii: Ogosegeta gokwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia SHA omobunge omosubati ase ase ekaunti ya Nairobi Esther Passages, oboririe abakenya kwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia SHA erio kobabera aororo goikera obobwenia obuya ase chinyagetari.
Dholuo: Dhiro ndikruok e chenro mar SHA jotend mine e kaunti ma Nairobi Esther Papitaris, jiwo Jo-Kenya mondo ondikre e SHA mondo obed mayot yudo weche thieth mag sirkal.
Somali: Push For SHA Registration Nairobi County Rep Esther Passaris, waxay ugu baaqaysaa dadka Kenya inay iska diiwaangeliyaan SHA si ay u fududeeyaan helitaanka adeegyada caafimaadka ee dowladda.

English: Nairobi County Government urges members of the public to identify and collect the bodies within one week, failure to which they will be disposed of at city cemeteries.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti ya Nairobi inawasihi wananchi kutambua na kukusanya miili hiyo ndani ya wiki moja, la sivyo itazikwa kwenye makaburi ya jiji.
Ekegusii: Eserekari yekaunti ya Nairobi yarure okoboria gochia ase abamenyi goikerana nakoenekia ng'a kwagara bare emebere ase egeka kwiewiki eyemo ere motwe, onye taribo, emebere eyuo nigo erachie koenigwa ase chimbera chikaunti eyuo.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti ma Nairobi jiwo ji mondo ong'e ringregi kendo ochokgi e juma achiel, nikech tok mano ibiro witgi e kuonde iko mag boma.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka Nairobi waxay ugu baaqeysaa shacabka inay u aqoonsadaan meydadka isla markaana ay soo ururiyaan hal usbuuc gudahood, haddii aysan sidaas samayn waxaa lagu tuuri doonaa xabaalaha magaalada.

English: Clergy on schools reopening: Clergy urges government to ensure safety of school children. 10 schools remain submerged in Budalangi, Busia County Odhiambo: Ensure children are safe as schools reopen
Kiswahili: Makasisi kuhusu kufunguliwa tena kwa shule: Makasisi wahimiza serikali kuhakikisha usalama wa watoto wa shule. Shule 10 bado zimejaa maji huko Budalangi, Kaunti ya Busia Odhiambo: Hakikisha watoto wako salama huku shule zikifunguliwa tena
Ekegusii: Abarandia korwa eberengerio biabo ase okoigorwa gwechisukuru: Abarandia baboririe eserekari koenekia abaorokigwa mbabwate oborendi boisaine. chisukuru ikomi ime ya budalangi ekaunti ya Busia nigo chiichire amache. Enekia abaorokigwa baenekerigwe oborendi obuya ekero bakoirana ase chisukuru nyuma yomotimoko. aya nigo ayateba Odhiambo.
Dholuo: Wach jotemb lamo e yepo mar skul jotend lemo ojiwo sirkal mondo oket nyime arita mar nyithindo . Sikunde apar odong ka onimo e Budalangi : Kaunti mar Busia Odhiambo, Budalandi, Busia wacho: neni  Nyithindo nitiere maber ka sikul oyaw.
Somali: Culimada oo ka hadlaya dib u furitaanka dugsiyada: Culimadu waxay dowladda ku boorinayaan in ay xaqiijiso badbaadada carruurta dugsiga. 10 dugsi ayaa weli hoos u dhacay Budalangi, degmada Busia Odhiambo: Hubi in carruurta ay ammaan yihiin marka dugsiyada dib loo furo

English: Nairobi county government urges land rates defaulters to pay up as it targets 30 billion in annual revenues
Kiswahili: Serikali ya kaunti ya Nairobi yawahimiza waliokiuka viwango vya ardhi kulipa huku ikilenga mapato ya kila mwaka ya bilioni 30
Ekegusii: Eserekari yekaunti ya Nairobi yarure okoboria ase baria babwate chisira chiamaremo yekaunti goakana ase obwango erio koenekia Eserekari ngoikerania ere ekerenga kiaye kiebango guokonyora 30billion.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar Nairobi jiwo jogolo lowo mondo ochiw osara mar dola bilion piero adek e bajet ma higa ka higa
Somali: Dowladda gobolka Nairobi waxay ku boorineysaa dadka aan degganeyn qiimaha dhulka inay bixiyaan maadaama ay bartilmaameedsaneyso 30 bilyan oo dakhliga sanadlaha ah

English: Assistant County Commissioner Phebians Olungah sheds light on the Government's Promises on Education. He urges Kenyans to be realistic about their expectations.
Kiswahili: Kamishna Msaidizi wa Kaunti Phebians Olungah aangazia Ahadi za Serikali kuhusu Elimu. Anawasihi Wakenya kuwa na mtazamo wa kweli kuhusu matarajio yao.
Ekegusii: omogambi omokonyi ase ekaunti phebias olungah obekire oboarabu ase chiira chieserekari ase ensemo yechisemi naboigo korwa okoboria ase abanto bonsi koba abaene ase amagani abo.
Dholuo: Jakony Komisona  mar kaunti Phebians Olungah keto ler e singo mar  sirkal e wi somo. Ojiwo Jo-Kenya mondo obed gadier gi gik ma gigeno.
Somali: Guddoomiye ku xigeenka degmada Phebians Olungah ayaa iftiiminaya ballanqaadyada dowladda ee ku saabsan waxbarashada.

English: Nairobi County Government, led by Geoffrey Mosiria warns of loud music in church “Keshas”, clubs, and bars. Urges citizens to report any incident of noise pollution
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti ya Nairobi, ikiongozwa na Geoffrey Mosiria inaonya kuhusu muziki wa sauti kubwa kanisani "Keshas", vilabu, na baa. Inawahimiza raia kuripoti tukio lolote la uchafuzi wa kelele
Ekegusii: Eserekari yekaunti ya Nairobi gekorau na Geoffrey mosiria yarure ogokurera ogotindi ase chinsemo chiogosasima echio chikobugia ebinanda ase amariogi aigoro ekero bare ase amasabo yobotuko bwonsi, ebirabu amo nabaonia amarwa, koenekia nkobwatia bare amachiko yamariogi. orure okoboria ase abamenyi gwesokia nakobateba abatari kobwatia amachiko ayuo.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti ma Nairobi, ma ne itayo gi Geoffrey Mosria, chiwo siem e wi thum ma nigi dwol maduong' e kanisa, kuonde mag thum, kuonde to ngona kod kuonde math  . Jiwo jopiny mondo ochiw lipot mar wach mar koko e kor lwasi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka Nairobi, oo uu hogaaminayo Geoffrey Mosiria ayaa ka digtay muusikada weyn ee kaniisadaha "Keshas", naadiyada, iyo baararka.

English: County Functions Transfer: National government to transfer remaining functions Pres. Ruto says funds will be allocated in 2025/26 FY Devolved assets to be transferred by June 2025 Pres. Ruto urges harmonious intergovernmental relations
Kiswahili: Uhamisho wa Kazi za Kaunti: Serikali ya kitaifa kuhamisha kazi zilizobaki Rais Ruto asema fedha zitatengwa katika mwaka wa fedha wa 2025/26 Mali zilizogatuliwa zitahamishwa ifikapo Juni 2025 Rais Ruto ahimiza uhusiano mzuri kati ya serikali
Ekegusii: Okoenana bene emeroberio yonsi yechikaunti: Eserekari enene nechie koenana bene emeroberio yonsi etigarete yechikaunti, omorai bwense otebire enibo yogoirania aya nebekwe ase omwaka bwechibesa bweserekari 2025/2026. Chinibo chionsi chibwateranetie chiserekari chiechikaunti koenanwa bene goikera omotienyi ogatano rimo, 2026. Ruto osabire omoroberio bwokoigwana nomorembe ase chieserekari chikaunti amo neria enene.
Dholuo: Tije mag kaunti mowil: sirkal mamalo mondo okel tije ma pod odong' mag Pres. Ruto wacho ni pesa ibiro chiw e higa mar 2025/26 FY mwandu moketi mondo okel e dwe mar auchiel higa mar alufu ariyo gi piero ariyo gi abich ker. Ruto jiwo winjruok maber mar sirkande
Somali: Wareejinta howlaha degmada: Dowladda qaranka ayaa wareejineysa howlaha ka haray Madaxweyne Ruto ayaa sheegay in lacagaha loo qoondeyn doono sannadka maaliyadeedka 2025/26 Hantida loo wareejiyay in la wareejiyo bisha Juun 2025 Madaxweyne Ruto wuxuu ku booriyay xiriirka dawladaha u dhexeeya

English: Mombasa, Your Voice Matters! Mombasa County invites all citizens to engage in the Finance Bill 2025, ADP, and CBROP discussions. Youth leaders and changemakers read, engage & influence decisions shaping our county’s future. Let’s show up,speak up & build the Mombasa we deserve.
Kiswahili: Mombasa, Sauti Yako Ni Muhimu! Kaunti ya Mombasa inawaalika raia wote kushiriki katika mijadala ya Muswada wa Fedha wa 2025, ADP, na CBROP. Viongozi wa vijana na waleta mabadiliko husoma, kushirikisha na kushawishi maamuzi yanayounda mustakabali wa kaunti yetu. Tujitokeze, tuzungumze na tujenge Mombasa tunayostahili.
Ekegusii: mombasa eriogi riao neriengencho! eserekari yekaunti ya Mombasa yabareganirie abamenyi ya mombasa bonsi koenana ebirengererio biabo igoro yomoreberio bwebango ime yense 2025, ADP, CBROP ase gosanga Ebirengerio. Abarai babasae baria bakorigia korenta amaonchoreria ao ao nigo bagosoma bemanyia erio banyara korenta amaonchoreria aria akorenta oboroso obuya ase ekaunti yaito, toikerane ase obonge erio tokwane,nakoagacha mombasa etogwenerete twensi.
Dholuo: Mombasa, dwondi konyo! Kaunti mar Mombasa gwelo ji duto mondo oriwre e loso pesa mar 2025, ADP, kod mbaka mar CBROP. Jotelo mag rowere kod joma kelo lokruok somo, riwo lwedo kendo chiko yiero makelo lokruok e ngima kaunti marwa. Weuru wanenre, wawuo, kendo wakeduru e ngima maber mar Mombasa.
Somali: Mombasa, Codkaaga ayaa muhiim ah! Gobolka Mombasa wuxuu ugu yeedhiyaa dhammaan muwaadiniinta inay ka qaybgalaan doodda Sharciga Maaliyadda 2025, ADP, iyo CBROP. Hogaamiyaasha dhalinyarada iyo kuwa wax ka beddelaya waxay akhriyaan, ka qaybgalaan & saameyn ku yeeshaan go'aamada qaabeynaya mustaqbalka gobolkeena. Aan soo bandhigno, ka hadalno & dhisno Mombasa aan mudan nahay.

English: National Assembly Speaker Moses Wetang’ula urges county governments to support the government’s push to have Kenyans register for SHA.
Kiswahili: Spika wa Bunge la Kitaifa Moses Wetang’ula anazisihi serikali za kaunti kuunga mkono juhudi za serikali za kuwataka Wakenya kujiandikisha katika SHA.
Ekegusii: omonogeri ase bunged enene yense Moses wetangula orure okoboria gochia ase chiserekari chiechikaunti koenekia ng'a  abanto bonsi kwerikia ase omoroberio bw'obobwenia SHA
Dholuo: Moses Wetang'ula, ma en jatend od bura mamalo, jiwo sirkande mag kaunti mondo oriw lwedo chuno sirkande mag Kenya mondo odonj e riwruok mar SHA.
Somali: Guddoomiyaha Golaha Qaranka Moses Wetang'ula wuxuu ugu baaqay dowladaha gobollada inay taageeraan dadaalka dowladda ee ah in dadka Kenya ay iska diiwaangeliyaan SHA.

English: The county government of Nyandarua urges farmers to undertake soil testing, following the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding with the Cereal Growers Association.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya kaunti ya Nyandarua inawasihi wakulima kufanya upimaji wa udongo, kufuatia kutiwa saini kwa Mkataba wa Makubaliano na Chama cha Wakulima wa Nafaka.
Ekegusii: Eserekari yekaunti ya Nyandarua yarure okoboria gochia ase abaremi ase ensemo eyuo koenekia ng'a koira bare amaroba ase okoringorigwa bene nyuma yokorika amaigwano gati yabo nekeombe ekenene getenenerete chinyeke ime yense.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti mar Nyandarua jiwo jopur mondo otim nonro mar lowo, bang ' ka osendik winjruok mar winjo tiend wachno gi riwruok mapidho cham.
Somali: Dowladda gobolka Nyandarua waxay ku boorineysaa beeraleyda inay sameeyaan tijaabooyinka ciidda, ka dib markii la saxiixay Memorandum of Understanding la xiriira ururka beeraleyda hadhuudhka.

English: Mental health boost in Kenya: 32 counselors graduate in Thika to tackle depression, trauma, and substance abuse. Africana College Director Dr. Susan Gitau urges government to fund county-level counseling centers to expand access to lifesaving psychosocial support.
Kiswahili: Kuimarika kwa afya ya akili nchini Kenya: Washauri 32 wahitimu huko Thika ili kukabiliana na mfadhaiko, kiwewe, na matumizi mabaya ya dawa za kulevya. Mkurugenzi wa Chuo cha Africana Dkt. Susan Gitau anahimiza serikali kufadhili vituo vya ushauri nasaha vya ngazi ya kaunti ili kupanua ufikiaji wa usaidizi wa kisaikolojia unaookoa uhai.
Ekegusii: Ogosegetwa okonene ase amarwaire yobongo: Abasemia bo'bongo 32 babete bagosoka bene korwa esukuru ya thika erio gokonya ase ebirengererio ebinge, emechando yogosiria amo na nayande abwetekaine  obongo.
Dholuo: bero paro maber mar obuongo e Piny Kenya: Jolony piero adek kod ariyo machiwo paro mar mag thieth e Thika kedo gi tuwo mar parruok, timbe mahundu, kod tiyo marach gi yedhe mamero. Susan Gitau, ma en jatend mbalariany mar piny Afrika , kwayo sirkal mondo ochiw kony gi kuonde ma ji yudoe kony e weche thieth mondo okonygi.
Somali: Kordhinta caafimaadka maskaxda ee Kenya: 32 lataliye ayaa ka qalin jabiyay Thika si ay ula qabsadaan niyadjabka, dhaawaca, iyo xadgudubka maandooriyaha. Agaasimaha Koleejka Afrikaanka Dr. Susan Gitau ayaa ku booriyay dowladda inay maalgeliso xarumaha la-talinta heer degmo si loo ballaariyo helitaanka taageerada naf badbaadada maskaxda iyo bulshada.

English: Met Department warns Kenyans to brace for heavy rainfall, cold nights of below 10 degrees Kenya 7 months ago by Didacus Malowa Kenyans should prepare for a prolonged bout of heavy rainfall and biting cold nights, with temperatures expected to plunge below 10°C in some regions.
Kiswahili: Idara ya Met yawaonya Wakenya kujitayarisha kwa mvua kubwa, usiku wa baridi chini ya nyuzi joto 10 Kenya miezi 7 iliyopita na Didacus Malowa Wakenya wanapaswa kujiandaa kwa kipindi kirefu cha mvua kubwa na usiku wa baridi kali, huku halijoto ikitarajiwa kushuka chini ya nyuzi joto 10 katika baadhi ya maeneo.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe giokorenga rire kiarure egekuro gochia ase abakenya kwearigania ase embura enyinge mono, obokendu chingaki chia botuko inse yechidigirii 10 ase nchisemo chinde.
Dholuo: Migawo mar Riwruok mar  chal mar kor lwasi  (MET) osiemo Jo-Kenya ni koth maduong' ne dhi chue, otieno ma piny ne nyalo chue gi digri apar e piny Kenya dweche abiriyo mosekalo kendo Didacus Malowa Kenya ne dhi ikore ne koth maduong' kod yuto mang'eny e otieno ma piny ne dhi chue e bwo digri apar e kuonde moko.
Somali: Waaxda Met waxay uga digeysaa dadka Kenya inay u diyaargaroobaan roobab badan, habeenada qabow ee ka hooseeya 10 °C Kenya 7 bilood ka hor by Didacus Malowa Dadka Kenya waa inay isu diyaariyaan roobab badan oo dheer iyo habeenada qabow ee qabow, heerkulka ayaa la filayaa inuu hoos u dhaco 10 °C gobollada qaarkood.

English: Citizens are urged to provide information on to improve service provision.
Kiswahili: Wananchi wanahimizwa kutoa taarifa kuhusu kuboresha utoaji wa huduma.
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi baborigwe korwa amang'ana arakonye gokinia obokoreri obuya ase eserekari.
Dholuo: Ijiwo raia mondo ochiw ripot e wi mondo omed bero chenro michiwo.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa laga codsanayaa inay bixiyaan macluumaad ku saabsan hagaajinta bixinta adeegyada.

English: The National Treasury urges members of the public to remain vigilant about to ensure public safety.
Kiswahili: Hazina ya Kitaifa inawasihi wananchi kuendelea kuwa macho ili kuhakikisha usalama wa umma.
Ekegusii: Ekegancha ekenene gieserekari kiaboririe abanto bonsi koba maiso erio kwenekia oborendi ase bonsi.
Dholuo: Keno mar sirkal mamalo jiwo ji mondo obed motang' ahinya mondo omi jopiny obed gi arita maber.
Somali: Wasaaradda Maaliyadda Qaranka waxay ugu baaqeysaa shacabka inay ka feejignaadaan nabadgelyada dadweynaha.

English: Ministry of Agriculture encourages members of the public to submit comments on for community development.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Kilimo inawahimiza wananchi kutoa maoni yao kuhusu maendeleo ya jamii.
Ekegusii: Ewisara yoboremi yarure ogosegeta ase abanto bonsi koenana amang'ana igoro yamagenderero ase ebinyoro.
Dholuo: Migawo mar pur  jiwo ji mondo ochiw pachgi e wi dongruok mar oganda.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku dhiiri gelineysaa shacabka inay soo gudbiyaan faallooyin ku saabsan horumarinta bulshada.

English: Citizens are urged to support for community development.
Kiswahili: Wananchi wanahimizwa kuunga mkono maendeleo ya jamii.
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi baborigwe kobwatesia amagenderero ase ebinyoro.
Dholuo: Ji ojiw mondo oriw lwedo dongruok mar oganda.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa laga codsanayaa inay taageeraan horumarinta bulshada.

English: The Commission calls upon business owners to stay alert to during the election period.
Kiswahili: Tume inatoa wito kwa wamiliki wa biashara kuwa macho wakati wa uchaguzi.
Ekegusii: Ekeombe kiarure okoboria gochia ase abaonchoreria koba maiso chingaki chiobochori.
Dholuo: Kamison dwaro ni jolok ohala obed motang' sama itimo yiero.
Somali: Komishanku wuxuu ganacsatada ugu baaqayaa inay ka feejignaadaan xilliga doorashada.

English: Citizens should report corruption cases to hotline 999, 911, or 112.
Kiswahili: Raia wanapaswa kuripoti kesi za ufisadi kwa simu ya dharura 999, 911, au 112.
Ekegusii: Abanto bonsi baborigwe koenana amang'ana onsi arengete obokurumi  ase ogoaka esimi yobokonyi 999, 911 gose 112.
Dholuo: Jopiny onego ochiw lipode mag koso arita kwe e namba mar 999, 911, kata 112.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay ka warbixiyaan kiisaska musuqmaasuqa khadka tooska ah ee 999, 911, ama 112.

English: County Government encourages members of the public to exercise caution regarding to ensure public safety.
Kiswahili: Serikali ya Kaunti inawahimiza wananchi kuwa waangalifu kuhusu kuhakikisha usalama wa umma.
Ekegusii: Eserekari yekaunti yarure okoboria ase abanto bonsi koba birori ase okoenekia oborendi ase bamenyete.
Dholuo: Sirkal mar kaunti'no jiwo ji mondo otang' gi weche ma nyalo miyo oganda bedo gi ritruok.
Somali: Maamulka degmada wuxuu ku dhiiri geliyaa shacabka inay taxaddaraan si loo hubiyo nabadgelyada dadweynaha.

English: The government advises motorists to remain vigilant about to promote accountability.
Kiswahili: Serikali inawashauri madereva kuwa macho ili kukuza uwajibikaji.
Ekegusii: Eserekari yarure okoboria ase abarundia koba maiso erio gokinia oboene nobwasioku ase obokoreri.
Dholuo: Sirkal jiwo derepe mondo obed motang' mondo kik gidonj e timbe maok kare .
Somali: Dowladdu waxay kula talineysaa baabuurta in ay feejignaadaan si ay u horumariyaan xisaabinta.

English: Political Parties Liaison Committee backs IEBC, urges Gen Z to register as voters
Kiswahili: Kamati ya Uhusiano ya Vyama vya Siasa yaiunga mkono IEBC, yahimiza Jenerali Z kujiandikisha kama wapiga kura
Ekegusii: Ekeombe gekobwatania ebiama biasiasa yabwetesirie ekeombe kiobori nechimbebe IEBC. nakobasaba abasae abake kwerikia buna abaaki chikura.
Dholuo: Komiti mar Riwruok mar Pinje odok ne duol mar yiero mar  IEBC ka kijiwo rowere mondo ondikre kaka jogo ombulu
Somali: Guddiga Xiriirka Xisbiyada Siyaasadeed wuxuu taageeray IEBC, wuxuu ku booriyay Gen Z inuu iska diiwaangeliyo codbixiyayaasha

English: TAKING STOCK OF DEVOLUTION President Kenyatta urges the National Government and county governments to work together to address climate change in Kenya
Kiswahili: KUCHUNGUZA UADILIFU Rais Kenyatta ahimiza Serikali ya Kitaifa na serikali za kaunti kufanya kazi pamoja ili kushughulikia mabadiliko ya hali ya hewa nchini Kenya
Ekegusii: Korigereria ayare anyarekanire inse yechikaunti omonene bw'ense Kenyatta orure okoboria ase eserekari enene nechiserekari chie chikaunti kobwaterana ase okorenda ebitoetanaine ako noboonchoreria bwerire.
Dholuo: POGRUOK MAG AKWEDE: Ker  Kenyatta jiwo sirkande mamalo kod mag gwenge mondo oti kanyachiel e kelo lokruok e chal mar kor lwasi e piny mar Kenya.
Somali: Madaxweynaha Kenyaatta wuxuu ugu baaqay dowladda qaranka iyo dowlad goboleedyada inay si wadajir ah ula shaqeeyaan sidii wax looga qaban lahaa isbeddelka cimilada Kenya
